
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  MASTER DEPLOYMENT — FlockOS
//
//  HOW TO DEPLOY A NEW CHURCH:
//  ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
//
//  STEP 1 — Edit DEPLOY_CONFIG (below)
//      Change these three values for the new church:
//        • churchName    →  e.g. 'Trinity Baptist Church'
//        • timezone       →  e.g. 'America/Los_Angeles'
//        • churchAppUrl   →  leave blank for now (you'll fill it in Step 5)
//
//  STEP 2 — Open the church's Google Sheet
//      Go to Extensions → Apps Script. This creates a container-bound
//      script that is automatically linked to that sheet.
//
//  STEP 3 — Paste all master code files into that Apps Script project
//      • Code.gs         ← this file (Master Code)
//      • FirestoreSync.gs ← Firestore ↔ Sheet hourly backup
//      (Create each file via the "+" button in the Apps Script editor.)
//
//  STEP 4 — Set Script Properties (⚙ Settings → Script Properties)
//      Required:
//        • FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT       →  service account JSON for THIS
//                                            church's Firebase project
//        • TRUTH_SERVICE_ACCOUNT          →  service account JSON for the
//                                            flockos-truth project
//                                            (enables replicateTruthFromMaster())
//      Optional (auto-resolved from ChurchRegistry if present):
//        • FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID           →  Firebase project ID for this church
//                                            e.g. 'flockos-trinity', 'flockos-theforest'
//                                            Default: 'flockos-notify'
//        • FIRESTORE_CHURCH_ID            →  e.g. 'TBC', 'TheForest'
//                                            (used by FirestoreSync to know
//                                            which Firestore path to read)
//        • TRUTH_FIRESTORE_PROJECT_ID     →  Default: 'flockos-truth'
//
//  STEP 5 — Run setupFlockOS()
//      Select setupFlockOS in the function dropdown and click ▶ Run.
//      Grant permissions when prompted. This does everything:
//        • Builds only auth/system tabs (8 tabs) — all CRM tabs created
//          lazily by FirestoreSync on first data write
//        • Initializes the auth pepper
//        • Replicates Truth content from FlockOS-Truth Firestore →
//          this church's Firestore (requires TRUTH_SERVICE_ACCOUNT)
//        • Creates the first admin account
//        • Seeds AppConfig with church name and timezone
//        • Installs careFollowUpReminder and dailyPastoralSummary triggers
//
//  STEP 6 — Deploy as Web App
//      Deploy → New Deployment → Web App
//        Execute as: Me    |    Access: Anyone
//      Copy the Web App URL.
//
//  STEP 7 — Register the Web App URL
//      Paste the URL into DEPLOY_CONFIG.churchAppUrl below, then select
//      registerChurchUrl in the function dropdown and click ▶ Run.
//      (This writes CHURCH_APP_URL to AppConfig so emails and TheVine
//      can reference the correct endpoint.)
//
//  STEP 8 — Enable Firestore backup (optional)
//      Select syncFirestoreToSheet and click ▶ Run to test.
//      Then run installFirestoreSyncTrigger to start hourly backups.
//
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ── Deployment Configuration — edit here, not in Script Properties ────────────
var DEPLOY_CONFIG = {
  adminEmail:    'flockos.notify@gmail.com',
  adminFirst:    'Flock',
  adminLast:     'Admin',
  adminPassword: '7kR2nP4m9vL1sW6jQ0x8!z&2',
  notifyEmail:   'flockos.notify@gmail.com',
  truthDbId:     '1ZuLKjP1RUI7TibeHKEC_wUsnjiWq0ic-AXt_LIPKSbM',
  churchFolderId:'1f4MJgmOUuvqBLjSgZ6QlyfwLEOSDnObd',

  // ── Church identity (used by finalizeSetup internally) ──────────────────
  // Set these before running setupFlockOS() so AppConfig is seeded correctly.
  churchName:    'FlockOS',              // e.g. 'Grace Community Church'
  timezone:      'America/Los_Angeles', // IANA timezone for pastoral email triggers

  // ── Set AFTER deploying as Web App (Step 3) ──────────────────────────────
  // Paste the Web App URL here, then run registerChurchUrl from the dropdown.
  churchAppUrl:  'https://flockos.yhwh.one',              // e.g. 'https://tbc.yhwh.one'
};
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


// ── Step 3: Register Web App URL ─────────────────────────────────────────────
// After setupFlockOS() completes and you've deployed as a Web App:
// paste the URL into DEPLOY_CONFIG.churchAppUrl above, then run registerChurchUrl.

function registerChurchUrl() {
  registerWebAppUrl(DEPLOY_CONFIG.churchAppUrl);
}
// ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────


// ── Diagnostic: run this directly from the GAS editor ────────────────────────
function testCareNotification() {
  var log = [];

  // ── IMPORTANT: How care email routing works ─────────────────────────────
  // NOTIF_CARE and NOTIF_PRAYER bypass the AuthUsers role-scan entirely.
  // Emails are sent ONLY to members listed in PASTORAL_SLOT_1–10 in AppConfig.
  // The AuthUsers scan below is shown for reference only — it does NOT
  // determine who receives care/prayer notifications.
  log.push('=== FlockOS Care Notification Diagnostic ===');
  log.push('');

  // 1. Check ADMIN_EMAIL in AppConfig
  var adminEmail = getAppConfigValue_('ADMIN_EMAIL', '');
  log.push('[1] ADMIN_EMAIL: "' + adminEmail + '"');

  // 2. Check NOTIFY_CARE_CASE flag
  var rawFlag = getAppConfigValue_('NOTIFY_CARE_CASE', 'TRUE');
  log.push('[2] NOTIFY_CARE_CASE: "' + rawFlag + '" → enabled=' + (String(rawFlag).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE'));

  // 3. Pastoral Slots — THE ACTUAL RECIPIENTS for care/prayer emails
  log.push('');
  log.push('[3] PASTORAL SLOTS (actual care/prayer email recipients):');
  var configuredSlots = 0;
  for (var i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
    var slotVal = String(getAppConfigValue_('PASTORAL_SLOT_' + i, '')).trim();
    if (slotVal) {
      log.push('    PASTORAL_SLOT_' + i + ' = "' + slotVal + '"');
      configuredSlots++;
    }
  }
  if (configuredSlots === 0) {
    log.push('    *** NO PASTORAL SLOTS CONFIGURED — care/prayer emails CANNOT be delivered ***');
    log.push('    *** Go to AppConfig sheet and set PASTORAL_SLOT_1 to your Member ID ***');
  } else {
    log.push('    ' + configuredSlots + ' slot(s) configured.');
    // Resolve to emails
    var resolved = getPastoralEmails_();
    log.push('    Resolved email(s): ' + (resolved.length ? resolved.join(', ') : '(none — member IDs may not match Members sheet)'));
  }

  // 4. AuthUsers role scan (reference only — NOT used for care/prayer routing)
  log.push('');
  log.push('[4] AuthUsers role scan (reference only — NOT used for NOTIF_CARE routing):');
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow >= 2) {
      var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 8).getValues();
      data.forEach(function(r, idx) {
        var em     = String(r[0] || '').trim().toLowerCase();
        var role   = String(r[6] || '').toLowerCase();
        var status = String(r[7] || '').toLowerCase();
        var level  = ROLE_LEVELS[role] || 0;
        var q = (em && status === 'active' && level >= 4);
        log.push('    Row ' + (idx+2) + ': ' + em + ' role="' + role + '" level=' + level + ' active=' + (status==='active') + ' → role qualifies=' + q + ' (NOTE: irrelevant for care/prayer)');
      });
    } else {
      log.push('    AuthUsers sheet is empty.');
    }
  } catch (e) {
    log.push('    ERROR reading AuthUsers: ' + String(e));
  }

  // 5. Attempt the actual notification
  log.push('');
  log.push('[5] Calling notifyPastorsAndAdmins_ with NOTIF_CARE...');
  try {
    notifyPastorsAndAdmins_('FlockOS Care Notification Test', 'This is a test of the full care notification path.', 'testCareNotification');
    log.push('    Completed without error.');
    if (configuredSlots === 0) {
      log.push('    *** Email was NOT sent — no pastoral slots configured (see [3] above) ***');
    } else {
      log.push('    Email should have been sent to: ' + getPastoralEmails_().join(', '));
    }
  } catch (e) {
    log.push('    THREW: ' + String(e));
  }

  Logger.log(log.join('\n'));
  return log.join('\n');
}


// ── Master Entry Point ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function setupFlockOS() {
  var props   = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties();
  // Use the bound spreadsheet if available (container-bound script),
  // otherwise fall back to SHEET_ID script property (standalone script).
  var _activeSS = null;
  try { _activeSS = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet(); } catch(e) {}
  var sheetId = (_activeSS ? _activeSS.getId() : (props.getProperty('SHEET_ID') || '').trim());
  var adminEmail   = DEPLOY_CONFIG.adminEmail;
  var adminFirst   = DEPLOY_CONFIG.adminFirst;
  var adminLast    = DEPLOY_CONFIG.adminLast;
  var adminPass    = DEPLOY_CONFIG.adminPassword;

  // ── 1. Validate config ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (!sheetId) {
    throw new Error('Could not determine Sheet ID. Either run from a container-bound script, or add SHEET_ID to Script Properties.');
  }

  // Persist resolved sheetId so all downstream functions can read it via props
  props.setProperty('SHEET_ID', sheetId);

  _log_('╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗');
  _log_('║            FlockOS — Master Deployment Starting              ║');
  _log_('╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝');
  _log_('  Sheet ID : ' + sheetId);
  _log_('  Admin    : ' + adminEmail);

  // ── 2. Clear all data validation on every existing tab ───────────────────
  //   Wipes stale dropdown rules left from any previous run so that no
  //   setValues() call later is blocked by setAllowInvalid:false rules.
  //   All rules are re-applied correctly by each setup function below.
  _log_('\n[0/10] Clearing existing data validation rules...');
  try {
    var _ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    _ss.getSheets().forEach(function(s) {
      var rows = s.getMaxRows();
      var cols = s.getMaxColumns();
      if (rows > 0 && cols > 0) {
        s.getRange(1, 1, rows, cols).clearDataValidations();
      }
    });
    _log_('      ✅ Validation rules cleared.');
  } catch(e) {
    _log_('      ⚠️  Could not clear validation: ' + e.message);
  }

  // ── 3. Generate pepper (skips if already exists) ─────────────────────────
  _log_('\n[1/10] Initializing security pepper...');
  initPepper();
  _log_('      ✅ Pepper ready.');

  // ── 3. Build auth/system tabs only ──────────────────────────────────────
  //   CRM and content tabs (Members, Care, Giving, Songs, etc.) are NOT
  //   pre-built. They are created lazily by _getOrCreateSheet_() in
  //   FirestoreSync when data first arrives from Firestore.
  _log_('\n[2/6] Building auth and system tabs...');
  _buildAuthTabsOnly_();
  _log_('      ✅ Auth tabs ready (AuthUsers, AppConfig, ChurchRegistry, AccessControl, Permissions, AuditLog, AuthAudit, UserProfiles).');

  // ── 4. Build permissions infrastructure ─────────────────────────────────
  _log_('\n[3/6] Setting up permissions...');
  setupPermissions();
  _log_('      ✅ Permissions complete.');

  // ── 5. Replicate Truth content from FlockOS-Truth Firestore ─────────────
  //   Reads the 12 Truth collections from the master flockos-truth project
  //   and writes them to this church's Firestore under churches/{churchId}/.
  //   Requires TRUTH_SERVICE_ACCOUNT in Script Properties.
  _log_('\n[4/6] Replicating Truth content from FlockOS-Truth Firestore...');
  try {
    if (typeof replicateTruthFromMaster === 'function') {
      var seeded = replicateTruthFromMaster();
      _log_('      ✅ Truth replicated: ' + seeded + ' documents.');
    } else {
      _log_('      ⚠️  replicateTruthFromMaster not found — paste FirestoreSync.gs to enable.');
    }
  } catch(e) {
    _log_('      ⚠️  Truth replication failed: ' + e.message);
    _log_('         (Non-fatal — run replicateTruthFromMaster() manually after setup.)');
  }

  // ── 8. Create first admin account ────────────────────────────────────────
  _log_('\n[8/10] Creating first admin account (' + adminEmail + ')...');
  _createFirstAdminFromConfig_(adminEmail, adminFirst, adminLast, adminPass);
  _log_('      ✅ Admin account ready.');

  // ── 9. Run smoke tests ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  _log_('\n[9/10] Running smoke tests...');
  runAllSmokeTests();

  // ── 10. Verify the web app responds ─────────────────────────────────────
  _log_('\n[9b/10] Verifying doGet health check...');
  try {
    var result = doGet({ parameter: { action: 'health' } });
    var body = JSON.parse(result.getContent());
    if (body.ok) {
      _log_('      ✅ doGet health check passed.');
    } else {
      _log_('      ⚠️  doGet returned ok:false — check the logs.');
    }
  } catch (e) {
    _log_('      ⚠️  doGet health check threw: ' + e.message);
  }

  // ── Sort all tabs alphabetically ─────────────────────────────────────────
  _log_('\nSorting all tabs alphabetically...');
  var destSs = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
  _sortTabsAlphabetically_(destSs);
  _log_('      ✅ Tabs sorted.');

  // ── 10. Finalize — seed church identity + install triggers ───────────────
  _log_('\n[10/10] Finalizing — seeding church identity and installing triggers...');
  Logger.log('  (Firestore database was seeded in step 5)');

  finalizeSetup();

  _log_('');
  _log_('╔══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗');
  _log_('║          FlockOS Deployment Complete ✅                      ║');
  _log_('║                                                              ║');
  _log_('║  Step 3: Deploy → New Deployment → Web App                  ║');
  _log_('║          Execute as: Me   Access: Anyone                    ║');
  _log_('║  Step 4: Copy the Web App URL, then run:                    ║');
  _log_('║          registerWebAppUrl("https://script.google.com/...")  ║');
  _log_('╚══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝');
}


// ── Internal: create first admin using values from Script Properties ──────────

function _createFirstAdminFromConfig_(adminEmail, adminFirst, adminLast, adminPass) {
  if (!adminEmail || !adminPass) {
    Logger.log('ERROR: ADMIN_EMAIL and ADMIN_PASSWORD script properties are required.');
    return;
  }

  var ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID')
  );
  var email = normalizeEmail(adminEmail);
  var now   = new Date().toISOString();

  var authSheet = ss.getSheetByName('AuthUsers');
  if (!authSheet) { Logger.log('ERROR: AuthUsers tab not found. Core setup may not have run.'); return; }
  var existing = authSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
  for (var i = 1; i < existing.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(existing[i][0]) === email) {
      Logger.log('Admin account already exists for ' + email + ' — skipping.');
      return;
    }
  }

  var creds = createSecurePassword(adminPass);

  authSheet.appendRow([
    email, '', creds.hash, creds.salt,
    adminFirst, adminLast, 'admin', 'active', now, now
  ]);

  var acSheet = ss.getSheetByName('AccessControl');
  if (acSheet) {
    acSheet.appendRow([
      email, 'admin', adminFirst + ' ' + adminLast,
      '', 'TRUE', 'Bootstrap admin account', now, now
    ]);
  }

  var profSheet = ss.getSheetByName('UserProfiles');
  if (profSheet) {
    profSheet.appendRow([
      email, adminFirst + ' ' + adminLast,
      '', '', '', 'America/Chicago', 'en', 'TRUE', 'Auto', now
    ]);
  }

  Logger.log('Admin account created: ' + email + ' (role: admin)');
}


// ── Internal logger (writes to Logger and Spreadsheet console) ────────────────

function _log_(msg) {
  Logger.log(msg);
}


// ── Internal: sort all tabs in a spreadsheet alphabetically ──────────────────

function _sortTabsAlphabetically_(ss) {
  var sheets = ss.getSheets();
  var names  = sheets.map(function(s) { return s.getName(); }).sort(function(a, b) {
    return a.toLowerCase().localeCompare(b.toLowerCase());
  });
  names.forEach(function(name, i) {
    ss.setActiveSheet(ss.getSheetByName(name));
    ss.moveActiveSheet(i + 1);
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  TRUTH SHEET SYNC — Copy Master Content into a New Church Database
//
//  TRUTH_SHEET_ID is the master source of pre-populated content (your single
//  source of truth for Books, Devotionals, Theology, etc.).
//
//  When a new church database is deployed, this function copies every row from
//  each content tab in TRUTH_SHEET_ID into the matching tab in the destination
//  sheet (SHEET_ID). Existing data in the destination is replaced.
//
//  Tabs synced (12 total):
//    Books · Genealogy · Counseling · Devotionals · Reading · Words
//    Heart · Mirror · Theology · Config · Quiz · Apologetics
//
//  Safe to re-run — it always pulls fresh from the master Truth sheet.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// The 12 content tab names to sync from master → destination (alphabetical order)
var TRUTH_TABS_ = [
  'Apologetics', 'Books', 'Config', 'Counseling', 'Devotionals', 'Genealogy',
  'Heart', 'Mirror', 'Quiz', 'Reading', 'Theology', 'Words'
];

function setupTruthSheet() {
  var props   = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties();
  var truthId = TRUTH_DB_ID;
  var destId  = (props.getProperty('SHEET_ID') || '').trim();

  if (!destId) {
    throw new Error('SHEET_ID script property is not set.');
  }

  Logger.log('Opening master Truth sheet (' + truthId + ')...');
  var src  = SpreadsheetApp.openById(truthId);

  Logger.log('Opening destination sheet (' + destId + ')...');
  var dest = SpreadsheetApp.openById(destId);

  var copied = 0, skipped = 0;

  TRUTH_TABS_.forEach(function(tabName) {
    var srcSheet = src.getSheetByName(tabName);
    if (!srcSheet) {
      Logger.log('  ⚠️  Source tab not found in Truth sheet: ' + tabName + ' — skipping.');
      skipped++;
      return;
    }

    var data = srcSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    if (!data || data.length === 0) {
      Logger.log('  ⚠️  ' + tabName + ' is empty in Truth sheet — skipping.');
      skipped++;
      return;
    }

    // Ensure the destination tab exists
    var destSheet = dest.getSheetByName(tabName);
    if (!destSheet) {
      destSheet = dest.insertSheet(tabName);
      Logger.log('  + Created tab: ' + tabName);
    }

    // Clear any existing data validation before writing — validation rules
    // from a previous run would block setValues() when setAllowInvalid:false.
    var numRows = Math.max(destSheet.getMaxRows(), data.length + 10);
    var numCols = Math.max(destSheet.getMaxColumns(), data[0].length);
    destSheet.getRange(1, 1, numRows, numCols).clearDataValidations();

    // Clear destination and write master data
    destSheet.clearContents();
    destSheet.getRange(1, 1, data.length, data[0].length).setValues(data);

    Logger.log('  ✅ ' + tabName + ': copied ' + (data.length - 1) + ' rows (' + data[0].length + ' columns).');
    copied++;
  });

  SpreadsheetApp.flush();
  Logger.log('');
  Logger.log('✅ Truth sync complete — ' + copied + ' tabs copied, ' + skipped + ' skipped.');
  Logger.log('   Source  : ' + truthId);
  Logger.log('   Dest    : ' + destId);

  _log_('\nSorting all tabs alphabetically...');
  _sortTabsAlphabetically_(dest);
  _log_('      ✅ Tabs sorted.');
}




// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// JOHN.gs — Code.gs for FLOCK API (John)
//
// Paste this ENTIRE file as "Code" in the John GAS project.
// It provides:
//   1. doGet / doPost entry points (delegating to Auth.gs)
//   2. Core utility functions needed by ALL other .gs modules:
//      getTab, generateId, normalizeEmail, isoDate, isoNow, toBool,
//      jsonOk, jsonErr, asJson, requireRole, hasRole, writeAudit
//
// Other files in John: Auth.gs, Api.gs, Cards.gs, Care.gs,
//   Communications.gs, Compassion.gs, Database.gs, Discipleship.gs,
//   Hash.gs, Learning.gs, Ministries.gs, Missions.gs, Outreach.gs,
//   Photos.gs, Sermons.gs, Services.gs, Setup.gs, Songs.gs,
//   Statistics.gs, Theology.gs, Todo.gs, Utilities.gs
//
// DO NOT put Extra.gs, Truth.gs, or Gospel.gs in this project.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ── Web App Entry Points ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function doGet(e)  { return expansionDoGet(e);  }
function doPost(e) { return expansionDoPost(e); }


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CORE UTILITIES — used by Auth.gs, Api.gs, and every module
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


/**
 * Opens the spreadsheet identified by the SHEET_ID script property
 * and returns the sheet (tab) with the given name.
 */
var _ssCache = null;
var _sheetCache = {};
function getTab(name) {
  if (!_ssCache) {
    var id = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID');
    _ssCache = SpreadsheetApp.openById(id);
  }
  if (!_sheetCache[name]) {
    var sheet = _ssCache.getSheetByName(name);
    if (!sheet) throw new Error('Tab not found: ' + name);
    _sheetCache[name] = sheet;
  }
  return _sheetCache[name];
}

/**
 * Returns raw AccessControl sheet data (all rows, 8 cols) from CacheService
 * when available (TTL: 60 s), falling back to a live Sheets read.
 * This keeps the Sheets API call off the hot path — every authenticated
 * request and every profile open calls getAccessControlRow(), so even a short
 * cache lifetime dramatically reduces quota usage.
 */
var _AC_CACHE_KEY = 'flockos_ac_v1';
function getAccessControlData_() {
  try {
    var cache = CacheService.getScriptCache();
    var raw = cache.get(_AC_CACHE_KEY);
    if (raw) return JSON.parse(raw);
  } catch (e) { /* cache miss is fine */ }

  var sheet = getTab('AccessControl');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) {
    try { CacheService.getScriptCache().put(_AC_CACHE_KEY, '[]', 60); } catch (e) {}
    return [];
  }
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 8).getValues();
  try { CacheService.getScriptCache().put(_AC_CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify(data), 60); } catch (e) {}
  return data;
}

/**
 * Invalidates the AccessControl CacheService entry.
 * Call immediately after any write (append, update, or delete) to AccessControl.
 */
function invalidateAcCache_() {
  try { CacheService.getScriptCache().remove(_AC_CACHE_KEY); } catch (e) {}
}


/**
 * Generates a UUID-based unique identifier.
 */
function generateId() {
  return Utilities.getUuid();
}


/**
 * Normalizes an email address: trims whitespace and lowercases.
 * Returns empty string for falsy input.
 */
function normalizeEmail(email) {
  if (!email) return '';
  return String(email).trim().toLowerCase();
}


/**
 * Converts a Date to YYYY-MM-DD string. Returns '' for non-Date input.
 */
function isoDate(val) {
  if (!val) return '';
  var d = (val instanceof Date) ? val : new Date(val);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return '';
  return d.toISOString().substring(0, 10);
}


/**
 * Returns the current timestamp as an ISO 8601 string.
 */
function isoNow() {
  return new Date().toISOString();
}


/**
 * Converts truthy/falsy values to boolean.
 * Recognizes "true", "yes", "1", true, 1.
 */
function toBool(val) {
  if (!val) return false;
  var s = String(val).trim().toLowerCase();
  return s === 'true' || s === 'yes' || s === '1';
}


// ── JSON Response Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Returns a success object: { ok: true, ...data }
 */
function jsonOk(data) {
  if (!data) data = {};
  data.ok = true;
  return data;
}


/**
 * Returns an error object: { ok: false, error: msg }
 */
function jsonErr(msg) {
  return { ok: false, error: String(msg || 'Unknown error') };
}


/**
 * Wraps an object as a JSON ContentService TextOutput for Web App responses.
 */
function asJson(obj) {
  return ContentService
    .createTextOutput(JSON.stringify(obj))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.JSON);
}


// ── RBAC Helpers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

var ROLE_LEVELS = {
  // Main ladder
  readonly:  0,
  member:    0,   // same as readonly — level-0 auto-grants cover everything a member sees
  volunteer: 1,   // legacy alias for leader
  leader:    1,
  deacon:    2,
  care:      2,
  elder:     3,
  treasurer: 3,   // legacy alias
  timothy:   4,
  pastor:    4,
  admin:     5,
  // Lateral / specialized roles (same ceiling as their functional level)
  tech:          5,  // system access — MODULE_PERMISSIONS controls what they can actually see
  finance:       3,  // financial scope only — overrides keep them out of pastoral data
  'church-office': 4  // flock admin capped below admin — enforced in handlePermissionsSet_
};

/**
 * Checks whether the authenticated user's role meets or exceeds the required role.
 * Returns true/false.
 */
function hasRole(auth, requiredRole) {
  var userLevel = ROLE_LEVELS[String(auth.role || 'readonly').toLowerCase()] || 0;
  var needLevel;
  if (typeof requiredRole === 'number') {
    needLevel = requiredRole; // numeric level passed directly (e.g. 0, 1, 2)
  } else {
    needLevel = ROLE_LEVELS[String(requiredRole).toLowerCase()];
  }
  if (needLevel === undefined) return false;
  return userLevel >= needLevel;
}


/**
 * Throws if the authenticated user's role is below the required role.
 */
function requireRole(auth, requiredRole) {
  if (!hasRole(auth, requiredRole)) {
    throw new Error('Forbidden: requires ' + requiredRole + ' (you are ' + (auth.role || 'none') + ')');
  }
}


/**
 * Returns true if the authenticated user belongs to the "Lead Pastor" group.
 */
function isLeadPastor_(auth) {
  return auth.groups && auth.groups.indexOf('lead pastor') !== -1;
}

/**
 * Returns true if the authenticated user belongs to the "timothy" group.
 */
function isTimothy_(auth) {
  return auth.groups && auth.groups.indexOf('timothy') !== -1;
}

/**
 * Returns true if the authenticated user belongs to the "developer" group.
 */
function isDeveloper_(auth) {
  return auth.groups && auth.groups.indexOf('developer') !== -1;
}

/**
 * Returns true if the authenticated user belongs to the "womens leader" group.
 */
function isWomensLeader_(auth) {
  return auth.groups && auth.groups.indexOf('womens leader') !== -1;
}

/**
 * Returns true if the authenticated user belongs to the "church-office" group.
 */
function isChurchOffice_(auth) {
  return auth.groups && auth.groups.indexOf('church-office') !== -1;
}

/**
 * Returns true if the authenticated user is the seed admin (AuthUsers row 2).
 */
function isSeedAdmin_(auth) {
  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  if (sheet.getLastRow() < 2) return false;
  var seedEmail = normalizeEmail(sheet.getRange(2, 1).getValue());
  return normalizeEmail(auth.email) === seedEmail;
}

/**
 * Returns true if the user may view confidential pastoral notes.
 * Checks the permission key 'care.notes' (replaces hardcoded role-name check).
 * Seed admin always has access regardless of permission overrides.
 */
function canViewNotes_(auth) {
  if (isSeedAdmin_(auth)) return true;
  // Check the computed permission key — set via the permission matrix
  return auth.permissions && auth.permissions['care.notes'] === true;
}

/**
 * Strips confidential note fields from a care-case object
 * when the caller is not authorized to view them.
 */
function stripCareNotes_(obj, auth) {
  if (!canViewNotes_(auth)) {
    obj.notes = '';
  }
  return obj;
}

/**
 * Strips admin notes from a prayer-request object
 * when the caller is not authorized to view them.
 * Uses 'prayer-admin.notes' permission key.
 */
function stripPrayerNotes_(obj, auth) {
  if (isSeedAdmin_(auth)) return obj;
  if (!auth.permissions || auth.permissions['prayer-admin.notes'] !== true) {
    obj.adminNotes = '';
  }
  return obj;
}

/**
 * Strips resolution notes from a compassion-request object
 * when the caller is not authorized to view them.
 * Uses 'compassion.notes' permission key.
 */
function stripCompassionNotes_(obj, auth) {
  if (isSeedAdmin_(auth)) return obj;
  if (!auth.permissions || auth.permissions['compassion.notes'] !== true) {
    obj.resolutionNotes = '';
  }
  return obj;
}


// ── Audit Trail ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Appends a row to the AuditLog tab.
 *   auth     — the auth context (has .email, .role)
 *   action   — e.g. 'users.create', 'config.set'
 *   target   — tab or resource name
 *   targetId — row index or record id
 *   detail   — human-readable summary
 */
function writeAudit(auth, action, target, targetId, detail) {
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('AuditLog');
    sheet.appendRow([
      isoNow(),
      (auth && auth.email) ? auth.email : 'system',
      (auth && auth.role)  ? auth.role  : '',
      action || '',
      target || '',
      String(targetId || ''),
      detail || ''
    ]);
  } catch (e) {
    // Silently fail — audit should never break the main operation
  }
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Hash.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SALT-PEPPER-HASH — Hardened Password Security for FlockOS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//
// OVERVIEW:
//   Salt  = per-user random string stored in AuthUsers.Salt (column D)
//   Pepper = server-wide secret stored in Script Properties (never in the sheet)
//   Hash  = SHA-256( pepper + salt + passcode )
//
// WHY ALL THREE?
//   - Salt prevents rainbow-table attacks (unique per user)
//   - Pepper prevents sheet-leak attacks (not in spreadsheet at all)
//   - SHA-256 is the strongest digest available in Apps Script
//
// USAGE:
//   On registration / password change:
//     var salt = generateSalt_();
//     var hash = hashPasscode(passcode, salt);
//     // Store hash in col C, salt in col D, clear col B
//
//   On login verification:
//     var ok = verifyPasscode(passcode, storedHash, storedSalt);
//
//   One-time setup (run manually once per deployment):
//     initPepper();
//
// MIGRATION:
//   Call migrateAllPasswords() once to upgrade all existing plain-text
//   passwords and unsalted hashes to the full salt+pepper scheme.
//
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ── Pepper Management ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// The pepper lives in Script Properties, never in the spreadsheet.
// If the pepper is lost, all passwords must be re-set.

var PEPPER_KEY = 'FLOCK_AUTH_PEPPER';

/**
 * Returns the server pepper. Auto-reads from Script Properties.
 * Returns empty string if not yet configured (backwards-compatible).
 */
function getPepper_() {
  var props = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties();
  return String(props.getProperty(PEPPER_KEY) || '');
}

/**
 * One-time setup: generates and stores a cryptographically random pepper.
 * Run this ONCE per GAS deployment via the Script Editor "Run" button.
 * If a pepper already exists, it will NOT overwrite (safety).
 */
function initPepper() {
  var props = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties();
  var existing = props.getProperty(PEPPER_KEY);
  if (existing) {
    Logger.log('Pepper already exists (' + existing.length + ' chars). No change.');
    return;
  }
  var pepper = generateRandomHex_(32);
  props.setProperty(PEPPER_KEY, pepper);
  Logger.log('Pepper created and stored in Script Properties (' + pepper.length + ' chars).');
}


// ── Salt Generation ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Generates a 32-char hex salt using Utilities.getUuid() as entropy source.
 * Apps Script doesn't have crypto.getRandomValues(), so we hash two UUIDs
 * together for a high-entropy salt.
 */
function generateSalt_() {
  var raw = Utilities.getUuid() + '-' + Utilities.getUuid() + '-' + new Date().getTime();
  return sha256Hex_(raw).substring(0, 32);
}


// ── Core Hash & Verify ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Produces the canonical hash: SHA-256( pepper + salt + passcode )
 * @param {string} passcode - The user's plain-text password
 * @param {string} salt     - The user's per-row salt
 * @return {string}         - 64-char lowercase hex hash
 */
function hashPasscode(passcode, salt) {
  var pepper = getPepper_();
  var input = pepper + (salt || '') + String(passcode || '');
  return sha256Hex_(input);
}

/**
 * Verifies a passcode against a stored hash + salt.
 * Also tries legacy formats for backwards compatibility during migration.
 * @param {string} passcode   - Candidate password
 * @param {string} storedHash - Hash from AuthUsers.Passcode Hash (col C)
 * @param {string} storedSalt - Salt from AuthUsers.Salt (col D)
 * @param {string} [email]    - Optional email for legacy format matching
 * @return {boolean}
 */
function verifyPasscode(passcode, storedHash, storedSalt, email) {
  if (!storedHash) return false;
  var target = storedHash.trim().toLowerCase();

  // ── Primary: pepper + salt + passcode (current scheme) ─────────────────
  if (hashPasscode(passcode, storedSalt) === target) return true;

  // ── Legacy fallbacks (pre-migration hashes without pepper) ─────────────
  // These allow login during the migration window. Once migrateAllPasswords()
  // has run and all users have logged in, these can be removed.

  var salt = String(storedSalt || '').trim();
  var e = email ? normalizeEmail(email) : '';
  var legacyCandidates = [
    passcode,                          // bare hash
    e ? e + ':' + passcode : '',       // email:passcode
    e ? passcode + ':' + e : '',       // passcode:email
    salt ? salt + passcode : '',       // salt+passcode
    salt ? passcode + salt : '',       // passcode+salt
    salt ? salt + ':' + passcode : '', // salt:passcode
    salt ? passcode + ':' + salt : ''  // passcode:salt
  ].filter(Boolean);

  for (var i = 0; i < legacyCandidates.length; i++) {
    if (sha256Hex_(legacyCandidates[i]) === target) return true;
  }

  return false;
}


// ── Registration & Password Change Helpers ───────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Creates a salted+peppered hash for a new password.
 * Returns { hash, salt } — caller stores these in AuthUsers cols C & D.
 * @param {string} passcode
 * @return {{ hash: string, salt: string }}
 */
function createSecurePassword(passcode) {
  var salt = generateSalt_();
  var hash = hashPasscode(passcode, salt);
  return { hash: hash, salt: salt };
}

/**
 * Writes a new salted+peppered password to AuthUsers for a given email.
 * Clears plain-text col B, sets hash in col C, salt in col D.
 * @param {string} email
 * @param {string} newPasscode
 * @return {boolean} true if user found and updated
 */
function setSecurePassword(email, newPasscode) {
  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return false;

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  var target = normalizeEmail(email);

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === target) {
      var rowIdx = i + 2;
      var creds = createSecurePassword(newPasscode);
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 2).setValue('');             // B: clear plain text
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 3).setValue(creds.hash);     // C: peppered hash
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 4).setValue(creds.salt);     // D: new salt
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 10).setValue(isoNow());      // J: updated at
      return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}


// ── Migration ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * One-time migration: upgrades ALL existing AuthUsers passwords to the
 * salt+pepper scheme.
 *
 * For each row:
 *   - If col B has plain text → hash it with new salt+pepper, clear col B
 *   - If col C has a hash but col D has no salt → re-hash the stored hash
 *     as a "password" with a new salt+pepper (users will need to log in
 *     once with old password; legacy fallback in verifyPasscode handles this)
 *   - If col D already has a salt and pepper was active → skip (already done)
 *
 * Run via Script Editor: Run → migrateAllPasswords
 * Check Logger for results.
 */
function migrateAllPasswords() {
  var pepper = getPepper_();
  if (!pepper) {
    Logger.log('ERROR: No pepper found. Run initPepper() first.');
    return;
  }

  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) {
    Logger.log('No users to migrate.');
    return;
  }

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  var migrated = 0, skipped = 0, errors = 0;

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var email     = String(data[i][0] || '').trim();
    var plainText = String(data[i][1] || '').trim();
    var oldHash   = String(data[i][2] || '').trim();
    var oldSalt   = String(data[i][3] || '').trim();
    var rowIdx    = i + 2;

    if (!email) continue;

    try {
      if (plainText) {
        // Has plain-text password → full upgrade
        var creds = createSecurePassword(plainText);
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 2).setValue('');           // clear plain text
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 3).setValue(creds.hash);
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 4).setValue(creds.salt);
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 10).setValue(isoNow());
        migrated++;
        Logger.log('Migrated (plain→hash): ' + email);

      } else if (oldHash && !oldSalt) {
        // Has hash but no salt → generate salt, but keep old hash working
        // via legacy fallback until user logs in again
        var newSalt = generateSalt_();
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 4).setValue(newSalt);
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 10).setValue(isoNow());
        migrated++;
        Logger.log('Migrated (added salt): ' + email);

      } else {
        skipped++;
      }
    } catch (e) {
      errors++;
      Logger.log('ERROR migrating ' + email + ': ' + e.message);
    }
  }

  Logger.log('Migration complete: ' + migrated + ' migrated, ' +
    skipped + ' skipped, ' + errors + ' errors.');
}


// ── Utility ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Generates a hex string of the specified byte length using UUID entropy.
 */
function generateRandomHex_(byteLength) {
  var parts = [];
  while (parts.join('').length < byteLength * 2) {
    parts.push(sha256Hex_(Utilities.getUuid() + new Date().getTime()));
  }
  return parts.join('').substring(0, byteLength * 2);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SEED ADMIN HELPER — Run this from the Script Editor to hash a password
// and seed your first admin user directly into the AuthUsers tab.
//
// Usage:
//   1. Edit the 4 values below (email, password, first name, last name)
//   2. Select  seedFirstAdmin  from the function dropdown
//   3. Click Run
//   4. Check the Execution Log — it will show the salt and hash
//   5. Check the AuthUsers tab — row 2 should now have your admin user
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function seedFirstAdmin() {
  // ✏️ EDIT THESE FOUR VALUES ────────────────────────────
  var email     = 'flockos.notify@gmail.com';   // your login email
  var password  = '7kR2nP4m9vL1sW6jQ0x8!z&2';            // your plain-text password
  var firstName = 'System';
  var lastName  = 'Admin';
  // ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  var ss    = SpreadsheetApp.openById(
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID')
  );
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName('AuthUsers');
  if (!sheet) { Logger.log('❌ AuthUsers tab not found.'); return; }
  if (sheet.getLastRow() >= 2) { Logger.log('⚠ AuthUsers already has data — skipping to avoid duplicates.'); return; }

  var salt = generateSalt_();
  var hash = hashPasscode(password, salt);
  var now  = new Date();

  sheet.getRange(2, 1, 1, 10).setValues([[
    email,        // A — Email
    '',           // B — Passcode (blank — using hash)
    hash,         // C — Passcode Hash
    salt,         // D — Salt
    firstName,    // E — First Name
    lastName,     // F — Last Name
    'admin',      // G — Role
    'active',     // H — Status
    now,          // I — Created At
    now           // J — Updated At
  ]]);

  // Also seed AccessControl (8 cols: Email, Role, Display Name, Groups, Active, Notes, Created At, Updated At)
  var acSheet = ss.getSheetByName('AccessControl');
  if (acSheet && acSheet.getLastRow() < 2) {
    acSheet.getRange(2, 1, 1, 8).setValues([[
      email, 'admin', firstName + ' ' + lastName, '', 'TRUE', '', now, now
    ]]);
  }

  Logger.log('✅ Admin seeded: ' + email);
  Logger.log('   Salt: ' + salt);
  Logger.log('   Hash: ' + hash);
  Logger.log('   → AuthUsers row 2 and AccessControl row 2 populated.');
}


// NOTE: sha256Hex_() is defined in auth.gs.
// If deploying this file standalone, uncomment below:
//
// function sha256Hex_(value) {
//   var bytes = Utilities.computeDigest(
//     Utilities.DigestAlgorithm.SHA_256,
//     String(value || ''),
//     Utilities.Charset.UTF_8
//   );
//   var out = [];
//   for (var i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
//     var v = bytes[i];
//     if (v < 0) v += 256;
//     var hex = v.toString(16);
//     out.push(hex.length === 1 ? '0' + hex : hex);

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Auth.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: AUTH — Self-Contained Authentication & Session Management
//
// This file makes the expansion pack a COMPLETE, standalone package.
// It provides:
//   - Login (email + passcode, plain or SHA-256 hashed)
//   - Session management via PropertiesService (6-hour TTL by default)
//   - Token verification (used by all module handlers via requireAuth)
//   - Profile retrieval & update
//   - Passcode change (self-service)
//   - Forgot password (email-based reset with 6-digit code)
//   - Self-registration with admin/pastor approval workflow
//   - Logout with session cleanup
//   - Admin user management (create/update/deactivate/approve/deny)
//   - AppConfig read/update (end-user settings)
//   - RBAC role hierarchy enforcement
//   - Email notifications (registration pending, approved, password reset)
//
// Tabs used:
//   AuthUsers       — email, passcode/hash, name, role, status
//   UserProfiles    — display prefs, photo, bio, timezone
//   AccessControl   — RBAC mapping (email → role, groups, active flag)
//   AuthAudit       — login/logout/passcode events audit trail
//   AuditLog        — all module action audit trail
//   AppConfig       — key/value settings configurable by admin
//
// Role hierarchy:
//   readonly(0) < volunteer(1) < care(2) < leader(3) < pastor(4) < admin(5)
//
// Session storage:
//   PropertiesService.getScriptProperties() with key prefix "exp.session."
//   Token format: UUID-timestamp
//   Default TTL: 6 hours (configurable via AppConfig SESSION_TTL_HOURS)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var EXP_SESSION_PREFIX = 'exp.session.';
var DEFAULT_SESSION_TTL  = 6 * 60 * 60 * 1000;  // 6 hours in ms
var EXP_ROLE_LEVELS = {
  readonly: 0, member: 0,
  volunteer: 1, leader: 1,
  deacon: 2, care: 2,
  elder: 3, treasurer: 3, finance: 3,
  timothy: 4, pastor: 4, 'church-office': 4,
  tech: 5, admin: 5
};


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MODULE PERMISSIONS — Default minimum role per navigable module
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MODULE_PERMISSIONS = {
  // ── Level 0: all authenticated users ─────────────────────────────────────
  'dashboard':        { level: 0, label: 'Dashboard' },
  'upper-room':       { level: 0, label: 'Upper Room' },
  'reading':          { level: 0, label: 'Reading Plan' },
  'devotionals':      { level: 0, label: 'Devotionals' },
  'prayer':           { level: 0, label: 'Prayer Request' },
  'my-requests':      { level: 0, label: 'My Requests' },
  'words':            { level: 0, label: 'Lexicon' },
  'sermons':          { level: 0, label: 'Sermons' },
  'learning':         { level: 0, label: 'Learning' },
  'theology':         { level: 0, label: 'Theology' },
  'library':          { level: 0, label: 'The Word' },
  'genealogy':        { level: 0, label: 'Genealogy' },
  'counseling':       { level: 0, label: 'Counseling' },
  'heart':            { level: 0, label: 'Heart' },
  'app-theology':     { level: 0, label: 'Applied Theology' },
  'quiz':             { level: 0, label: 'Quiz' },
  'apologetics':      { level: 0, label: 'Apologetics' },
  'calendar':         { level: 0, label: 'Calendar' },
  'events':           { level: 0, label: 'Events' },
  'services':         { level: 0, label: 'Services' },
  'ministries':       { level: 0, label: 'Ministries' },
  'todo':             { level: 0, label: 'Tasks' },
  'checkin':          { level: 0, label: 'Check-In' },
  'journal':          { level: 0, label: 'Journal' },
  'my-giving':        { level: 0, label: 'My Giving' },

  // ── Level 1: leader / volunteer ──────────────────────────────────────────
  'songs':            { level: 1, label: 'Songs' },
  'volunteers':       { level: 1, label: 'Volunteers' },

  // ── Level 2: care / deacon ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  'directory':        { level: 2, label: 'Directory' },
  'care':             { level: 2, label: 'Pastoral Care' },
  'my-flock':         { level: 2, label: 'My Flock' },
  'prayer-admin':     { level: 2, label: 'Prayer Admin' },
  'compassion':       { level: 2, label: 'Compassion' },
  'mirror':           { level: 2, label: 'Mirror' },

  // ── Level 3: elder / giving ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  'groups':           { level: 3, label: 'Groups' },
  'attendance':       { level: 3, label: 'Attendance' },
  'giving':           { level: 3, label: 'Giving' },
  'discipleship':     { level: 3, label: 'Discipleship' },
  'outreach':         { level: 3, label: 'Outreach' },
  'reports':          { level: 3, label: 'Reports' },
  'ministry':         { level: 3, label: 'Ministry Hub' },

  // ── Level 4: pastor / timothy ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  'comms':            { level: 4, label: 'Messages' },
  'missions':         { level: 4, label: 'Missions' },
  'statistics':       { level: 4, label: 'Statistics' },
  'content-admin':    { level: 4, label: 'Content Editor' },

  // ── Level 5: admin only ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  'users':            { level: 5, label: 'User Management' },
  'config':           { level: 5, label: 'Settings' },
  'audit':            { level: 5, label: 'Audit Log' },
  'memberCards':      { level: 5, label: 'Member Cards' },
  'bulk':             { level: 5, label: 'Bulk Import / Export' },
  'access':           { level: 5, label: 'Access Requests' },
  'church':           { level: 5, label: 'Church Settings' },

  // ── MY FLOCK sub-permissions ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  'my-flock.full-directory':     { level: 4, label: 'View Full Flock Directory' },
  'my-flock.add-edit-members':   { level: 4, label: 'Add / Edit Members' },
  'my-flock.remove-members':     { level: 4, label: 'Remove Members' },

  // ── DIRECTORY sub-permissions ─────────────────────────────────────────────
  'directory.contact-details':   { level: 4, label: 'View Contact Details' },
  'directory.export':            { level: 4, label: 'Export Directory' },

  // ── CARE sub-permissions ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  'care.create':                 { level: 2, label: 'Open Care Cases' },
  'care.edit':                   { level: 2, label: 'Edit Assigned Cases' },
  'care.view-all':               { level: 3, label: 'View All Care Cases' },
  'care.edit-all':               { level: 4, label: 'Edit Any Care Case' },
  'care.reassign':               { level: 4, label: 'Reassign Care Cases' },
  'care.close':                  { level: 4, label: 'Close / Resolve Cases' },
  'care.notes':                  { level: 4, label: 'View Confidential Case Notes' },
  'care.interactions':           { level: 2, label: 'Log Interactions' },
  'care.follow-ups':             { level: 2, label: 'Manage Follow-Ups' },
  'care.assignments':            { level: 3, label: 'Manage Case Assignments' },

  // ── PRAYER ADMIN sub-permissions ─────────────────────────────────────────
  'prayer-admin.public':         { level: 2, label: 'Prayer Requests (Non-Confidential)' },
  'prayer-admin.confidential':   { level: 3, label: 'Prayer Requests (Confidential)' },
  'prayer-admin.notes':          { level: 4, label: 'View Prayer Admin Notes' },

  // ── COMPASSION sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────
  'compassion.approve':          { level: 2, label: 'Approve Compassion Requests' },
  'compassion.amount':           { level: 2, label: 'View / Set Award Amount' },
  'compassion.notes':            { level: 4, label: 'View Compassion Resolution Notes' },
  'compassion.resources':        { level: 2, label: 'View Resource Inventory' },
  'compassion.resources.edit':   { level: 4, label: 'Manage Resource Inventory' },
  'compassion.log':              { level: 2, label: 'View Aid Log' },
  'compassion.log.create':       { level: 2, label: 'Record Aid Distribution' },

  // ── GIVING sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  'giving.individual':           { level: 3, label: 'View Individual Giving Records' },
  'giving.enter':                { level: 4, label: 'Enter / Record Giving' },
  'giving.edit':                 { level: 5, label: 'Edit Giving Records' },
  'giving.statements':           { level: 4, label: 'Generate / View Giving Statements' },
  'giving.pledges':              { level: 2, label: 'View Pledges' },
  'giving.pledges.edit':         { level: 4, label: 'Manage Pledge Campaigns' },

  // ── CALENDAR sub-permissions ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  'calendar.create':             { level: 1, label: 'Create Calendar Events' },
  'calendar.edit':               { level: 1, label: 'Edit Calendar Events' },
  'calendar.delete':             { level: 3, label: 'Delete Calendar Events' },
  'calendar.share':              { level: 1, label: 'Share / Publish Calendar' },
  'calendar.delegate':           { level: 5, label: 'Delegate Calendar Access' },

  // ── EVENTS sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  'events.edit':                 { level: 2, label: 'Edit Events' },
  'events.rsvp-list':            { level: 1, label: 'View Event RSVP List' },

  // ── SERVICES sub-permissions ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  'services.edit':               { level: 2, label: 'Edit Service Plans' },

  // ── SONGS sub-permissions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  'songs.edit':                  { level: 2, label: 'Edit Songs' },
  'songs.setlist':               { level: 1, label: 'Manage Set Lists' },

  // ── VOLUNTEERS sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────
  'volunteers.manage':           { level: 1, label: 'Manage Volunteers' },
  'volunteers.swap':             { level: 2, label: 'Approve Volunteer Swaps' },

  // ── SERMONS sub-permissions ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  'sermons.edit':                { level: 4, label: 'Edit / Manage Sermons' },
  'sermons.upload':              { level: 1, label: 'Upload Sermon Media' },
  'sermons.approve':             { level: 4, label: 'Approve Sermon Uploads' },
  'sermons.series':              { level: 2, label: 'Manage Sermon Series' },

  // ── ALBUMS sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  'albums':                      { level: 1, label: 'Media Albums' },
  'albums.manage':               { level: 1, label: 'Manage Albums' },

  // ── CONTENT ADMIN sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────
  'content-admin.publish':       { level: 4, label: 'Publish Content' },

  // ── GROUPS sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  'groups.manage':               { level: 1, label: 'Manage Groups' },
  'groups.create':               { level: 3, label: 'Create Groups' },

  // ── ATTENDANCE sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────
  'attendance.record':           { level: 1, label: 'Record Attendance' },
  'attendance.edit-past':        { level: 3, label: 'Edit Past Attendance' },

  // ── CHECK-IN sub-permissions ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  'checkin.manage':              { level: 2, label: 'Manage Check-In' },
  'checkin.sessions':            { level: 2, label: 'Open / Close Check-In Sessions' },

  // ── MEMBER CARDS sub-permissions ─────────────────────────────────────────
  'memberCards.directory':       { level: 2, label: 'Member Card Directory' },
  'memberCards.create':          { level: 4, label: 'Create Member Cards' },
  'memberCards.edit':            { level: 4, label: 'Edit Member Cards' },
  'memberCards.archive':         { level: 5, label: 'Archive Member Cards' },
  'memberCards.links':           { level: 5, label: 'Manage Card Links' },
  'memberCards.views':           { level: 5, label: 'View Card Analytics' },
  'memberCards.bulk':            { level: 5, label: 'Bulk Provision Cards' },
  'memberCards.scan':            { level: 2, label: 'Scan Member Cards' },

  // ── OUTREACH sub-permissions ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  'outreach.contacts':           { level: 1, label: 'View Outreach Contacts' },
  'outreach.contacts.edit':      { level: 2, label: 'Add / Edit Outreach Contacts' },
  'outreach.campaigns':          { level: 3, label: 'View Campaigns' },
  'outreach.campaigns.edit':     { level: 3, label: 'Manage Campaigns' },
  'outreach.follow-ups':         { level: 1, label: 'Manage Follow-Ups' },

  // ── MISSIONS sub-permissions ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  'missions.registry':           { level: 4, label: 'Missionary Registry' },
  'missions.registry.edit':      { level: 4, label: 'Edit Missionary Records' },
  'missions.partners':           { level: 4, label: 'View Mission Partners' },
  'missions.partners.edit':      { level: 4, label: 'Manage Mission Partners' },
  'missions.regions':            { level: 4, label: 'View Regions / Cities' },
  'missions.prayer':             { level: 4, label: 'Mission Prayer Focus' },
  'missions.prayer.edit':        { level: 4, label: 'Edit Mission Prayer Focus' },
  'missions.updates':            { level: 4, label: 'Mission Field Updates' },
  'missions.updates.edit':       { level: 4, label: 'Post Mission Updates' },

  // ── COMMS sub-permissions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  'comms.send-individual':       { level: 4, label: 'Send Individual Messages' },
  'comms.send-group':            { level: 2, label: 'Send Group Messages' },
  'comms.send-all':              { level: 4, label: 'Send All-Church Messages' },
  'comms.channels':              { level: 4, label: 'Manage Channels' },
  'comms.templates':             { level: 4, label: 'Manage Message Templates' },
  'comms.delete':                { level: 5, label: 'Delete Messages' },

  // ── DISCIPLESHIP sub-permissions ──────────────────────────────────────────
  'discipleship.paths':          { level: 1, label: 'View Discipleship Paths' },
  'discipleship.paths.edit':     { level: 4, label: 'Manage Discipleship Paths' },
  'discipleship.steps.edit':     { level: 4, label: 'Edit Discipleship Steps' },
  'discipleship.enroll':         { level: 3, label: 'Enroll Members' },
  'discipleship.progress':       { level: 1, label: 'View Progress' },
  'discipleship.advance':        { level: 3, label: 'Advance Members' },
  'discipleship.mentoring':      { level: 1, label: 'View Mentoring' },
  'discipleship.mentoring.edit': { level: 3, label: 'Manage Mentoring' },
  'discipleship.meetings':       { level: 1, label: 'Log Discipleship Meetings' },
  'discipleship.goals':          { level: 1, label: 'View Goals' },
  'discipleship.goals.review':   { level: 3, label: 'Review / Approve Goals' },
  'discipleship.assessments':    { level: 3, label: 'Conduct Assessments' },
  'discipleship.milestones':     { level: 3, label: 'Manage Milestones' },
  'discipleship.certificates':   { level: 4, label: 'View Certificates' },
  'discipleship.certificates.issue': { level: 4, label: 'Issue Certificates' },
  'discipleship.resources':      { level: 1, label: 'View Resources' },
  'discipleship.resources.edit': { level: 5, label: 'Manage Resources' },

  // ── REPORTS sub-permissions ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  'reports.sensitive':           { level: 4, label: 'View Sensitive Reports' },
  'reports.export':              { level: 5, label: 'Export Reports' },

  // ── USERS sub-permissions ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  'users.create':                { level: 5, label: 'Create Users' },
  'users.edit':                  { level: 4, label: 'Edit Users' },
  'users.deactivate':            { level: 5, label: 'Deactivate Users' },
  'users.delete':                { level: 5, label: 'Delete Users' },
  'users.permissions':           { level: 4, label: 'Edit User Permissions' },

  // ── CONFIG sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────

  // ── CHURCH sub-permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────

};


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ENTRY POINT (doGet / doPost)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Main entry point for the entire expansion pack.
 * Handles both auth actions (no token needed) and module actions (token required).
 * Deploy as: Execute as Me, Access Anyone.
 *
 * Usage — add this to your project's Code.gs or use this as the entry point:
 *
 *   function doGet(e) { return expansionDoGet(e); }
 *   function doPost(e) { return expansionDoPost(e); }
 */

/**
 * Reverse-normalizes params that passed through TheVine._normalizeOutgoing().
 * That function converts camelCase keys → Title Case for Google Sheet column
 * headers, but GAS handlers read params as camelCase. This runs ONCE at the
 * entry point to restore camelCase keys before any handler is called.
 *
 * Handles all four cases produced by _camelToTitle:
 *   1. Single-word PascalCase: 'Locked'       → 'locked'
 *   2. All-caps acronym:       'ID'            → 'id', 'URL' → 'url'
 *   3. Multi-word Title Case:  'Church Name'   → 'churchName'
 *   4. Acronym in multi-word:  'Member ID'     → 'memberId'
 *   5. Hyphenated overrides:   'Follow-Up Date'→ 'followUpDate'
 *
 * Always keeps the original key–value pair so nothing that already worked breaks.
 */
function _normalizeCamelParams(params) {
  // Reverse of TheVine._ACRONYMS — maps all-caps output back to camelChunk form
  // e.g. 'ID'→'Id'  so 'Member ID' splits to [member, Id] = 'memberId'
  var REV = {
    'ID':'Id','URL':'Url','BPM':'Bpm','CCLI':'Ccli','RSVP':'Rsvp',
    'ZIP':'Zip','IP':'Ip','BG':'Bg','SMS':'Sms','ISO':'Iso',
    'HTML':'Html','JSON':'Json','CSV':'Csv','DM':'Dm'
  };
  // Reverse of TheVine._HEADER_OVERRIDES (hyphenated / lowercase-preposition specials)
  var OVERRIDES = {
    'Date of Birth':'dateOfBirth','Date of Death':'dateOfDeath',
    'Follow-Up Requested':'followUpRequested','Follow-Up Needed':'followUpNeeded',
    'Follow-Up Date':'followUpDate','Follow-Up Completed':'followUpCompleted',
    'Follow-Up Done':'followUpDone','Follow-Up Priority':'followUpPriority',
    'Next Follow-Up':'nextFollowUp','Next Follow-Up Date':'nextFollowUpDate',
    'Reply-To ID':'replyToId','In-App Enabled':'inAppEnabled',
    'Co-Leader ID':'coLeaderId','Co-Lead ID':'coLeadId'
  };
  function toCamel(k) {
    // 1. Direct override check (hyphenated / lowercase-preposition specials)
    if (OVERRIDES.hasOwnProperty(k)) return OVERRIDES[k];
    // 2. No space — PascalCase ('Locked'→'locked') or all-caps acronym ('ID'→'id')
    if (k.indexOf(' ') === -1) {
      var w = REV.hasOwnProperty(k) ? REV[k] : k;
      return w.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + w.slice(1);
    }
    // 3. Multi-word Title Case with optional acronyms ('Member ID'→'memberId')
    var parts = k.split(' ');
    var camel = '';
    for (var i = 0; i < parts.length; i++) {
      var part = REV.hasOwnProperty(parts[i]) ? REV[parts[i]] : parts[i];
      camel += (i === 0)
        ? part.charAt(0).toLowerCase() + part.slice(1)
        : part.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + part.slice(1);
    }
    return camel;
  }
  var out = {};
  var keys = Object.keys(params);
  for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
    var k = keys[i];
    out[k] = params[k];                                   // always preserve original
    var camel = toCamel(k);
    if (camel !== k && !out.hasOwnProperty(camel)) {
      out[camel] = params[k];                             // add camelCase alias
    }
  }
  return out;
}

function expansionDoGet(e) {
  var params = _normalizeCamelParams((e && e.parameter) ? e.parameter : {});
  var action = String(params.action || '').trim();

  try {
    // ── Health check ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'health') {
      return asJson(jsonOk({
        message: 'FlockOS Church CRM is running.',
        version: '1.0.0',
        modules: getEnabledModules_()
      }));
    }

    // ── Public auth actions (no token required) ───────────────────────────
    if (action === 'auth.login')           return asJson(handleExpLogin_(params));
    if (action === 'auth.health')          return asJson(jsonOk({ message: 'Auth is running.' }));
    if (action === 'auth.register')        return asJson(handleExpRegister_(params));
    if (action === 'auth.forgotPassword')  return asJson(handleExpForgotPassword_(params));
    if (action === 'auth.resetWithToken')  return asJson(handleExpResetWithToken_(params));
    if (action === 'prayer.submit')        return asJson(handlePrayerSubmitPublic_(params));
    if (action === 'prayer.listPublic')    return asJson(handlePrayerListPublic_(params));
    if (action === 'outreach.contacts.submit') return asJson(handleOutreachContactPublic_(params));

    // ── Failover peer discovery (public — allows TheVine to auto-discover backup URL) ──
    // TheVine calls this on startup: if a peerUrl is returned, it registers it
    // as FLOCK_ENDPOINTS[1] / APP_ENDPOINTS[1] automatically, so no URL needs
    // to be hardcoded in the_living_water.js for each new church deployment.
    if (action === 'system.peerUrl')       return asJson(jsonOk({ peerUrl: getAppConfigValue_('PEER_WEB_APP_URL', '') }));

    // ── Public app content tab reader (Matthew) ────────────────────────
    if (action === 'app.tab')               return asJson(handleAppTab_(params));

    // ── Legacy tab reader — ?tab=TabName (backward compat) ─────────────
    if (!action && params.tab)              return handleTabRead_(params);

    // ── Cross-service auth validation (used by Mark & Luke) ───────────────
    if (action === 'auth.validate')        return asJson(expRequireAuth_(params));

    // ── Public member-card actions (no token required) ────────────────────
    if (action === 'memberCards.public')     return asJson(handleMemberCardsPublic(params, null));
    if (action === 'memberCards.publicFull') return asJson(handleMemberCardsPublicFull(params, null));
    if (action === 'memberCards.vcard')      return asJson(handleMemberCardsVcard(params, null));

    // ── Calendar iCal feed (public or token-authenticated) ────────────────
    if (action === 'calendar.ics')         return handleCalendarIcsFeed_(params);

    // ── Public learning content (no token required) ───────────────────────
    if (action === 'learning.playlists.list') return asJson(handleLearningPlaylistsPublic_(params));
    if (action === 'learning.topics.list')    return asJson(handleLearningTopicsPublic_(params));

    // ── Public events (no token required) — visibility:'public' only ──────
    if (action === 'events.public')           return asJson(handleEventsPublic(params));

    // ── Public church configs (no token required — branding/URLs only) ────
    if (action === 'church.configs')          return asJson(handleChurchConfigs(params, null));

    // ── All other actions require authentication ──────────────────────────
    var auth = expRequireAuth_(params);
    if (!auth.ok) return asJson(auth.error);

    // ── Calendar share token (generates personal subscription URL) ────────
    if (action === 'calendar.shareToken')  return asJson(handleCalendarShareToken_(params, auth));

    // ── Missions routes (Mark) ─────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action.indexOf('missions.') === 0)  return asJson(routeMissions_(action, params, auth));

    // ── Statistics routes (Luke) ───────────────────────────────────────
    if (action.indexOf('statistics.') === 0) return asJson(routeStatistics_(action, params, auth));

    // ── Auth actions (token required) ─────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'auth.profile')         return asJson(handleExpProfile_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'auth.profileUpdate')   return asJson(handleExpProfileUpdate_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'auth.refresh')         return asJson(handleExpRefresh_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'auth.logout')          return asJson(handleExpLogout_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'auth.changePasscode')  return asJson(handleExpChangePasscode_(params, auth));

    // ── Admin: User management ────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'users.list')           return asJson(handleUsersList_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'users.create')         return asJson(handleUsersCreate_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'users.update')         return asJson(handleUsersUpdate_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'users.deactivate')     return asJson(handleUsersDeactivate_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'users.delete')         return asJson(handleUsersDelete_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'users.resetPasscode')  return asJson(handleUsersResetPasscode_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'users.pending')        return asJson(handleUsersPending_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'users.approve')        return asJson(handleUsersApprove_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'users.deny')           return asJson(handleUsersDeny_(params, auth));

    // ── Admin: Access control ─────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'access.list')          return asJson(handleAccessList(params, auth));
    if (action === 'access.set')           return asJson(handleAccessSet(params, auth));
    if (action === 'access.remove')        return asJson(handleAccessRemove(params, auth));

    // ── Admin: AppConfig ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'config.list')          return asJson(handleConfigList_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'config.get')           return asJson(handleConfigGet_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'config.set')           return asJson(handleConfigSet_(params, auth));

    // ── Admin: Permissions ────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'permissions.get')      return asJson(handlePermissionsGet_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'permissions.set')      return asJson(handlePermissionsSet_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'permissions.copy')     return asJson(handlePermissionsCopy_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'permissions.setAll')   return asJson(handlePermissionsSetAll_(params, auth));
    if (action === 'permissions.list')     return asJson(handlePermissionsList_(params, auth));

    // ── Admin: Audit ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    if (action === 'audit.list')           return asJson(handleAuditList(params, auth));

    // ── Module routing ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
    return asJson(routeExpansionAction(action, params, auth));

  } catch (err) {
    return asJson(jsonErr(err && err.message ? err.message : String(err)));
  }
}

function expansionDoPost(e) {
  var params = (e && e.parameter) ? e.parameter : {};
  var payload = {};

  // Parse POST body
  try {
    if (e && e.postData && e.postData.contents) {
      var raw = String(e.postData.contents || '');
      // Check for form-encoded payload parameter
      if (raw.indexOf('payload=') === 0 || raw.indexOf('payload=') > 0) {
        var pairs = raw.split('&');
        for (var i = 0; i < pairs.length; i++) {
          var idx = pairs[i].indexOf('=');
          if (idx < 0) continue;
          var k = decodeURIComponent(pairs[i].substring(0, idx).replace(/\+/g, ' '));
          var v = decodeURIComponent(pairs[i].substring(idx + 1).replace(/\+/g, ' '));
          if (k === 'payload') {
            try { payload = JSON.parse(v); } catch (pe) { payload = {}; }
          } else {
            params[k] = v;
          }
        }
      } else {
        // Try JSON body
        try { payload = JSON.parse(raw); } catch (pe) { payload = {}; }
      }
    }
  } catch (err) { /* use empty payload */ }

  // ── Sync write — handle before merge (needs separate params + body) ──
  if (params.action === 'sync.write') {
    return asJson(handleSyncWrite(params, payload));
  }

  // Merge payload into params (payload values win)
  for (var key in payload) {
    if (payload.hasOwnProperty(key)) params[key] = payload[key];
  }

  // Route through the same handler
  return expansionDoGet({ parameter: params });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LOGIN
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleExpLogin_(params) {
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.email || params.authEmail);
  var passcode = String(params.passcode || '').trim();

  if (!email) return jsonErr('Email is required.');
  if (!passcode) return jsonErr('Passcode is required.');

  // Look up in AuthUsers tab
  var user = findExpUser_(email);
  if (!user) {
    writeAuthAudit_('login_failed', email, 'User not found.');
    return jsonErr('Invalid login.');
  }

  if (user.status !== 'active') {
    writeAuthAudit_('login_denied', email, 'Account status: ' + user.status);
    return jsonErr('Account is not active.');
  }

  if (!verifyExpPasscode_(user, passcode, email)) {
    writeAuthAudit_('login_failed', email, 'Invalid passcode.');
    return jsonErr('Invalid login.');
  }

  // Check AccessControl for RBAC role
  var ac = getAccessControlRow(email);
  if (!ac || String(ac.active).toUpperCase() !== 'TRUE') {
    writeAuthAudit_('login_denied', email, 'No active access control entry.');
    return jsonErr('Access denied. Contact your administrator.');
  }

  // Lockdown gate — only Pastor / Admin may log in while lockdown is active
  var _lockdown = String(getAppConfigValue_('LOCKDOWN', 'FALSE')).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE';
  if (_lockdown) {
    var _rl = EXP_ROLE_LEVELS[String(ac.role).toLowerCase()] || 0;
    if (_rl < 4) {
      writeAuthAudit_('login_denied', email, 'Lockdown active — role ' + ac.role + ' blocked.');
      return jsonErr('FlockOS is currently in maintenance mode. Only Pastors and Admins may sign in.');
    }
  }

  // Create session
  var session = createExpSession_(email, ac);
  var profile = findExpProfile_(email);

  // Compute effective permissions map
  var roleLevel = EXP_ROLE_LEVELS[String(ac.role).toLowerCase()] || 0;
  // 'admin' group elevates permissions to level 5 regardless of visible role
  var acGroups = String(ac.groups || '').toLowerCase();
  var effectiveLevel = (acGroups.indexOf('admin') !== -1) ? Math.max(roleLevel, 5) : roleLevel;
  var permissions = computePermissionsMap_(email, effectiveLevel);

  writeAuthAudit_('login_ok', email, 'Login successful.');

  return jsonOk({
    session: {
      token:       session.token,
      email:       email,
      role:        ac.role,
      roleLevel:   effectiveLevel,
      displayName: ac.displayName || (user.firstName + ' ' + user.lastName).trim(),
      expiresAt:   session.expiresAt,
      permissions: permissions,
      isSeed:      user.rowIndex === 2
    },
    profile: {
      email:       email,
      firstName:   user.firstName,
      lastName:    user.lastName,
      displayName: profile.displayName || ac.displayName || '',
      role:        ac.role,
      groups:      ac.groups,
      photoUrl:    profile.photoUrl || '',
      timezone:    profile.timezone || '',
      theme:       profile.theme || 'Auto'
    }
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// AUTH TOKEN VERIFICATION
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function expRequireAuth_(params) {
  var token = String(params.token || '').trim();
  var claimedEmail = normalizeEmail(params.authEmail || params.email || '');

  if (!token) return { ok: false, error: jsonErr('Missing token.') };

  // Read session from PropertiesService
  var session = readExpSession_(token);
  if (!session) return { ok: false, error: jsonErr('Session expired or invalid. Please log in again.') };

  var sessionEmail = normalizeEmail(session.email);

  // If caller claims an email, it must match the session
  if (claimedEmail && sessionEmail && claimedEmail !== sessionEmail) {
    return { ok: false, error: jsonErr('Session email mismatch.') };
  }

  var resolvedEmail = sessionEmail || claimedEmail;
  if (!resolvedEmail) return { ok: false, error: jsonErr('Unable to resolve user email.') };

  // Look up RBAC role
  var ac = getAccessControlRow(resolvedEmail);
  if (!ac) return { ok: false, error: jsonErr('Access denied. No role assigned for ' + resolvedEmail + '.') };
  if (String(ac.active).toUpperCase() !== 'TRUE') {
    return { ok: false, error: jsonErr('Account is disabled.') };
  }

  var role = String(ac.role || 'readonly').toLowerCase();
  var groups = String(ac.groups || '').split(',').map(function(g) { return g.trim().toLowerCase(); }).filter(Boolean);
  // 'admin' group elevates effective role to admin (level 5) regardless of the role field
  var effectiveRole = (groups.indexOf('admin') !== -1 && ROLE_LEVELS[role] < 5) ? 'admin' : role;
  return {
    ok: true,
    email: resolvedEmail,
    token: token,
    role: effectiveRole,
    roleLevel: ROLE_LEVELS[effectiveRole] !== undefined ? ROLE_LEVELS[effectiveRole] : 0,
    displayName: String(ac.displayName || ''),
    groups: groups
  };
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SESSION MANAGEMENT (PropertiesService)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function createExpSession_(email, acRow) {
  cleanupExpiredExpSessions_();

  var token = Utilities.getUuid() + '-' + String(new Date().getTime());
  var ttl = getExpSessionTtl_();
  var now = new Date().getTime();

  var record = {
    token: token,
    email: email,
    role: acRow.role,
    displayName: acRow.displayName,
    issuedAt: now,
    expiresAt: now + ttl
  };

  PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().setProperty(
    EXP_SESSION_PREFIX + token, JSON.stringify(record)
  );

  return record;
}

function readExpSession_(token) {
  if (!token) return null;
  var key = EXP_SESSION_PREFIX + token;
  try {
    var raw = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty(key);
    if (!raw) return null;
    var parsed = JSON.parse(raw);
    if (!parsed || typeof parsed !== 'object') return null;
    if (!parsed.expiresAt || Number(parsed.expiresAt) <= new Date().getTime()) {
      PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().deleteProperty(key);
      return null;
    }
    return parsed;
  } catch (err) {
    return null;
  }
}

function deleteExpSession_(token) {
  if (!token) return;
  try {
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().deleteProperty(EXP_SESSION_PREFIX + token);
  } catch (err) { /* ignore */ }
}

function cleanupExpiredExpSessions_() {
  try {
    var props = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperties();
    var now = new Date().getTime();
    for (var key in props) {
      if (!props.hasOwnProperty(key)) continue;
      if (key.indexOf(EXP_SESSION_PREFIX) !== 0) continue;
      try {
        var parsed = JSON.parse(props[key]);
        if (!parsed || !parsed.expiresAt || Number(parsed.expiresAt) <= now) {
          PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().deleteProperty(key);
        }
      } catch (err) {
        PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().deleteProperty(key);
      }
    }
  } catch (err) { /* ignore cleanup errors */ }
}

function getExpSessionTtl_() {
  var hours = Number(getAppConfigValue_('SESSION_TTL_HOURS', '6'));
  return (hours > 0 ? hours : 6) * 60 * 60 * 1000;
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// AUTH ACTIONS (profile, refresh, logout, changePasscode)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleExpProfile_(params, auth) {
  var user = findExpUser_(auth.email);
  var profile = findExpProfile_(auth.email);
  // auth already contains role, displayName, and groups from expRequireAuth_ —
  // no need to re-read AccessControl for a second sheet lookup.

  return jsonOk({
    session: { token: auth.token, email: auth.email, role: auth.role, displayName: auth.displayName },
    profile: {
      email:       auth.email,
      firstName:   user ? user.firstName : '',
      lastName:    user ? user.lastName : '',
      displayName: profile.displayName || auth.displayName,
      role:        auth.role,
      groups:      Array.isArray(auth.groups) ? auth.groups.join(', ') : (auth.groups || ''),
      photoUrl:    profile.photoUrl || '',
      phone:       profile.phone || '',
      bio:         profile.bio || '',
      timezone:    profile.timezone || '',
      language:    profile.language || 'en',
      notifications: profile.notifications,
      theme:       profile.theme || 'Auto'
    }
  });
}

function handleExpRefresh_(params, auth) {
  var session = readExpSession_(auth.token);
  if (!session) return jsonErr('Session not found.');

  session.expiresAt = new Date().getTime() + getExpSessionTtl_();
  PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().setProperty(
    EXP_SESSION_PREFIX + auth.token, JSON.stringify(session)
  );

  return jsonOk({
    session: { token: auth.token, email: auth.email, role: auth.role, expiresAt: session.expiresAt }
  });
}

function handleExpLogout_(params, auth) {
  writeAuthAudit_('logout', auth.email, 'Logout.');
  deleteExpSession_(auth.token);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Logged out.' });
}

function handleExpChangePasscode_(params, auth) {
  var currentPasscode = String(params.currentPasscode || '').trim();
  var newPasscode = String(params.newPasscode || '').trim();
  var minLen = Number(getAppConfigValue_('MIN_PASSCODE_LENGTH', '6'));

  if (!currentPasscode) return jsonErr('Current passcode is required.');
  if (!newPasscode) return jsonErr('New passcode is required.');
  if (newPasscode.length < minLen) return jsonErr('New passcode must be at least ' + minLen + ' characters.');
  if (newPasscode === currentPasscode) return jsonErr('New passcode must be different from current passcode.');

  var user = findExpUser_(auth.email);
