  if (!user) return jsonErr('User not found.');

  if (!verifyExpPasscode_(user, currentPasscode, auth.email)) {
    writeAuthAudit_('passcode_change_failed', auth.email, 'Current passcode incorrect.');
    return jsonErr('Current passcode is incorrect.');
  }

  writeExpPasscode_(auth.email, newPasscode);
  writeAuthAudit_('passcode_changed', auth.email, 'Passcode changed by user.');
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Passcode updated successfully.' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SELF-REGISTRATION (public — no token)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Public self-registration. Creates AuthUsers row with status='pending'
 * and AccessControl row with Active='FALSE'. Requires ALLOW_SELF_REGISTER=TRUE.
 * An admin or pastor must then approve via users.approve.
 *
 * Params: email, passcode, firstName, lastName
 * Returns: { ok, message }
 */
function handleExpRegister_(params) {
  // Gate: check if self-registration is enabled
  var allowed = getAppConfigValue_('ALLOW_SELF_REGISTER', 'FALSE');
  if (allowed !== 'TRUE') return jsonErr('Self-registration is not enabled. Contact your church administrator.');

  var email = normalizeEmail(params.email);
  var passcode = String(params.passcode || '').trim();
  var firstName = String(params.firstName || '').trim();
  var lastName = String(params.lastName || '').trim();

  if (!email) return jsonErr('Email is required.');
  if (!firstName) return jsonErr('First name is required.');

  var minLen = Number(getAppConfigValue_('MIN_PASSCODE_LENGTH', '6'));
  if (!passcode || passcode.length < minLen) return jsonErr('Passcode must be at least ' + minLen + ' characters.');

  // Check if user already exists
  var existing = findExpUser_(email);
  if (existing) return jsonErr('An account with this email already exists.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var creds = createSecurePassword(passcode);

  // Write to AuthUsers with status=pending
  var usersSheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  usersSheet.appendRow([
    email,
    '',                     // B: plain passcode — blank
    creds.hash,             // C: SHA-256(pepper + salt + passcode)
    creds.salt,             // D: per-user salt
    firstName,              // E
    lastName,               // F
    'readonly',             // G: default role (can be changed on approval)
    'pending',              // H: status — awaiting approval
    now,                    // I: created at
    now                     // J: updated at
  ]);

  // Write to AccessControl with Active=FALSE (not usable until approved)
  var acSheet = getTab('AccessControl');
  acSheet.appendRow([
    email,
    'readonly',             // B: default role
    (firstName + ' ' + lastName).trim(),
    '',                     // D: groups
    'FALSE',                // E: not active until approved
    'Self-registered — pending approval',
    now,
    ''
  ]);
  invalidateAcCache_();

  writeAuthAudit_('user_registered', email, 'Self-registration submitted.');

  // Notify admin/pastor if ADMIN_EMAIL is configured
  notifyPendingRegistration_(email, firstName, lastName);

  return jsonOk({ message: 'Registration submitted. Your account is pending approval by a church leader.' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FORGOT PASSWORD / RESET WITH TOKEN (public — no token)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var EXP_RESET_PREFIX = 'exp.reset.';
var RESET_TOKEN_TTL  = 60 * 60 * 1000;  // 1 hour

/**
 * Generates a time-limited password reset token and emails it to the user.
 * Always returns a generic success message (never reveals if the email exists).
 *
 * Params: email
 * Returns: { ok, message }
 */
function handleExpForgotPassword_(params) {
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.email);
  if (!email) return jsonErr('Email is required.');

  // Always return generic message (no user-enumeration)
  var genericOk = jsonOk({ message: 'If that email is registered, a reset code has been sent.' });

  var user = findExpUser_(email);
  if (!user) return genericOk;
  if (user.status !== 'active') return genericOk;

  // Generate 6-digit reset code (user-friendly for email)
  var resetCode = generateResetCode_();
  var now = new Date().getTime();

  // Store in ScriptProperties with 1-hour TTL
  var record = {
    email: email,
    code: resetCode,
    issuedAt: now,
    expiresAt: now + RESET_TOKEN_TTL
  };
  PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().setProperty(
    EXP_RESET_PREFIX + email, JSON.stringify(record)
  );

  // Send email with reset code
  try {
    GmailApp.sendEmail(email,
      'Password Reset Code — ' + getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS'),
      'Hello ' + (user.firstName || '') + ',\n\n' +
      'You requested a password reset. Your reset code is:\n\n' +
      '    ' + resetCode + '\n\n' +
      'This code expires in 1 hour.\n\n' +
      'If you did not request this, you can safely ignore this email.\n\n' +
      '— ' + getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'Your Church')
    );
  } catch (err) {
    // Email failed — log but still return generic message
    writeAuthAudit_('reset_email_failed', email, String(err && err.message ? err.message : err));
  }

  writeAuthAudit_('password_reset_requested', email, 'Reset code generated.');
  return genericOk;
}

/**
 * Resets a user's password using a reset code from handleExpForgotPassword_.
 *
 * Params: email, resetCode, newPasscode
 * Returns: { ok, message }
 */
function handleExpResetWithToken_(params) {
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.email);
  var resetCode = String(params.resetCode || '').trim();
  var newPasscode = String(params.newPasscode || '').trim();

  if (!email) return jsonErr('Email is required.');
  if (!resetCode) return jsonErr('Reset code is required.');

  var minLen = Number(getAppConfigValue_('MIN_PASSCODE_LENGTH', '6'));
  if (!newPasscode || newPasscode.length < minLen) return jsonErr('New passcode must be at least ' + minLen + ' characters.');

  // Look up stored reset token
  var key = EXP_RESET_PREFIX + email;
  var raw;
  try {
    raw = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty(key);
  } catch (err) { raw = null; }

  if (!raw) {
    writeAuthAudit_('reset_failed', email, 'No reset code found.');
    return jsonErr('Invalid or expired reset code.');
  }

  var record;
  try { record = JSON.parse(raw); } catch (err) { record = null; }
  if (!record) {
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().deleteProperty(key);
    return jsonErr('Invalid or expired reset code.');
  }

  // Check expiration
  if (!record.expiresAt || Number(record.expiresAt) <= new Date().getTime()) {
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().deleteProperty(key);
    writeAuthAudit_('reset_failed', email, 'Reset code expired.');
    return jsonErr('Reset code has expired. Please request a new one.');
  }

  // Verify code matches
  if (String(record.code) !== resetCode) {
    writeAuthAudit_('reset_failed', email, 'Incorrect reset code.');
    return jsonErr('Invalid reset code.');
  }

  // Code is valid — reset the password
  var ok = writeExpPasscode_(email, newPasscode);
  if (!ok) return jsonErr('User not found.');

  // Consume the reset token
  PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().deleteProperty(key);

  writeAuthAudit_('password_reset_completed', email, 'Password reset via code.');
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Password has been reset. You can now log in with your new passcode.' });
}

/**
 * Generates a 6-digit numeric reset code.
 */
function generateResetCode_() {
  var raw = Utilities.getUuid().replace(/[^0-9]/g, '');
  // Pad if needed, take first 6 digits
  while (raw.length < 6) raw += String(Math.floor(Math.random() * 10));
  return raw.substring(0, 6);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// REGISTRATION APPROVAL (pastor+ actions)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Lists all users with status='pending' (awaiting approval).
 * Requires pastor or admin role.
 */
function handleUsersPending_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][7] || '').toLowerCase() === 'pending') {
      rows.push({
        index:     i + 2,
        email:     normalizeEmail(data[i][0]),
        firstName: String(data[i][4] || ''),
        lastName:  String(data[i][5] || ''),
        role:      String(data[i][6] || 'readonly'),
        status:    'pending',
        createdAt: isoDate(data[i][8]),
        updatedAt: isoDate(data[i][9])
      });
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

/**
 * Approves a pending user. Sets status='active' and AccessControl.Active='TRUE'.
 * Optionally sets a role (defaults to whatever was assigned at registration).
 * Requires pastor or admin role.
 *
 * Params: targetEmail, [role]
 */
function handleUsersApprove_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || '');
  if (!email) return jsonErr('targetEmail is required.');

  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('User not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === email) {
      var currentStatus = String(data[i][7] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (currentStatus !== 'pending') {
        return jsonErr('User is not pending approval (current status: ' + currentStatus + ').');
      }

      var rowIdx = i + 2;
      var role = String(params.role || data[i][6] || 'readonly').toLowerCase();
      if (!EXP_ROLE_LEVELS.hasOwnProperty(role)) return jsonErr('Invalid role.');

      // Activate in AuthUsers
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 7).setValue(role);       // G: role
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 8).setValue('active');    // H: status
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 10).setValue(isoNow());   // J: updated at

      // Activate in AccessControl
      var acSheet = getTab('AccessControl');
      var acLast = acSheet.getLastRow();
      if (acLast >= 2) {
        var acEmails = acSheet.getRange(2, 1, acLast - 1, 1).getValues();
        for (var j = 0; j < acEmails.length; j++) {
          if (normalizeEmail(acEmails[j][0]) === email) {
            acSheet.getRange(j + 2, 2).setValue(role);      // B: role
            acSheet.getRange(j + 2, 5).setValue('TRUE');     // E: active
            acSheet.getRange(j + 2, 6).setValue('Approved by ' + auth.email);
            acSheet.getRange(j + 2, 8).setValue(isoNow());   // H: updated at
            invalidateAcCache_();
            break;
          }
        }
      }

      writeAudit(auth, 'users.approve', 'AuthUsers', rowIdx, email + ' → ' + role);
      writeAuthAudit_('user_approved', auth.email, 'Approved: ' + email + ' as ' + role);

      // Notify the user that their account has been approved
      notifyUserApproved_(email, String(data[i][4] || ''));

      return jsonOk({ message: 'User approved: ' + email + ' with role ' + role + '.' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('User not found.');
}

/**
 * Denies a pending registration. Removes the user from AuthUsers and AccessControl.
 * Requires pastor or admin role.
 *
 * Params: targetEmail, [reason]
 */
function handleUsersDeny_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || '');
  if (!email) return jsonErr('targetEmail is required.');

  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('User not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === email) {
      var currentStatus = String(data[i][7] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (currentStatus !== 'pending') {
        return jsonErr('User is not pending (current status: ' + currentStatus + '). Use users.deactivate instead.');
      }

      // Delete from AuthUsers
      sheet.deleteRow(i + 2);

      // Delete from AccessControl
      var acSheet = getTab('AccessControl');
      var acLast = acSheet.getLastRow();
      if (acLast >= 2) {
        var acEmails = acSheet.getRange(2, 1, acLast - 1, 1).getValues();
        for (var j = 0; j < acEmails.length; j++) {
          if (normalizeEmail(acEmails[j][0]) === email) {
            acSheet.deleteRow(j + 2);
            invalidateAcCache_();
            break;
          }
        }
      }

      var reason = String(params.reason || 'No reason provided');
      writeAudit(auth, 'users.deny', 'AuthUsers', '', email + ' — ' + reason);
      writeAuthAudit_('user_denied', auth.email, 'Denied: ' + email + ' — ' + reason);

      return jsonOk({ message: 'Registration denied for ' + email + '.' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('User not found.');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EMAIL NOTIFICATION HELPERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Notifies the admin email that a new registration is pending approval.
 */
function notifyPendingRegistration_(email, firstName, lastName) {
  if (String(getAppConfigValue_('NOTIFY_NEW_REGISTRATION', 'TRUE')).toUpperCase() !== 'TRUE') return;
  var adminEmail = getAppConfigValue_('ADMIN_EMAIL', '');
  if (!adminEmail) return;
  var churchName = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS');

  try {
    GmailApp.sendEmail(adminEmail,
      'New Registration Pending — ' + churchName,
      'A new user has registered and is awaiting approval:\n\n' +
      '  Name:  ' + firstName + ' ' + lastName + '\n' +
      '  Email: ' + email + '\n\n' +
      'Log in to the Admin dashboard to approve or deny this registration.\n\n' +
      '— ' + churchName
    );
  } catch (err) {
    writeAuthAudit_('notify_failed', email, 'Pending-registration email failed: ' + String(err && err.message ? err.message : err));
  }
}

/**
 * Notifies a user that their registration has been approved.
 */
function notifyUserApproved_(email, firstName) {
  if (String(getAppConfigValue_('NOTIFY_REGISTRATION_APPROVED', 'TRUE')).toUpperCase() !== 'TRUE') return;
  var churchName = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS');
  try {
    GmailApp.sendEmail(email,
      'Your Account Has Been Approved — ' + churchName,
      'Hello ' + (firstName || '') + ',\n\n' +
      'Your registration has been approved! You can now log in.\n\n' +
      '— ' + churchName
    );
  } catch (err) {
    writeAuthAudit_('notify_failed', email, 'Approval notification failed: ' + String(err && err.message ? err.message : err));
  }
}

// ── Pastoral Slots Cache (per execution) ─────────────────────────────────
var _pastoralEmailsCache_ = null;

/**
 * Resolves PASTORAL_SLOT_1 through PASTORAL_SLOT_10 member IDs from AppConfig
 * into email addresses via the Members sheet.
 * These slots are the ONLY recipients for sensitive emails (care, prayer, notes).
 * Result is cached for the duration of the GAS execution.
 * @return {string[]} deduplicated email addresses
 */
function getPastoralEmails_() {
  if (_pastoralEmailsCache_) return _pastoralEmailsCache_;
  var emails = [];
  var seen = {};
  try {
    var sheet = getTab(MEM_TAB);
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    var memberData = lastRow >= 2 ? sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MEM_NUM_COLS).getValues() : [];
    // Build member ID → email index
    var idToEmail = {};
    memberData.forEach(function(r) {
      var mid = String(r[MEM.ID] || '').trim();
      var em  = normalizeEmail(String(r[MEM.EMAIL1] || ''));
      if (mid && em) idToEmail[mid] = em;
    });
    for (var i = 1; i <= 10; i++) {
      var mid = String(getAppConfigValue_('PASTORAL_SLOT_' + i, '')).trim();
      if (!mid) continue;
      var em = idToEmail[mid];
      if (em && !seen[em]) { emails.push(em); seen[em] = true; }
    }
  } catch (e) {
    console.log('[getPastoralEmails_] ERROR: ' + String(e));
  }
  _pastoralEmailsCache_ = emails;
  return emails;
}

/**
 * Returns a set of emails that have the nopimail/limitpii flag in AccessControl.
 * Used to exclude certain role-level users from receiving PII-containing emails.
 * @return {Object} map of {email: true}
 */
function _loadPiiLimitedEmails_() {
  var limited = {};
  try {
    var acData = getAccessControlData_();
    acData.forEach(function(row) {
      var em     = normalizeEmail(String(row[0] || ''));
      var groups = String(row[3] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (em && (groups.indexOf('nopimail') !== -1 || groups.indexOf('limitpii') !== -1)) {
        limited[em] = true;
      }
    });
  } catch (_) {}
  return limited;
}

/**
 * Load CommsNotificationPrefs into a map keyed by lowercase email.
 * Called once per notification dispatch — result is not cached across
 * executions (GAS execution boundary keeps it safe).
 */
function _loadCNPMap_() {
  var map = {};
  try {
    var sheet = getTab(CNP_TAB);
    var last = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (last < 2) return map;
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, last - 1, CNP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    data.forEach(function(r) {
      var em = normalizeEmail(String(r[CNP.MEMBER_EMAIL] || ''));
      if (em) map[em] = r;
    });
  } catch (_) {}
  return map;
}

/**
 * Dispatch a single notification to one recipient, honoring their CNP prefs.
 * @param {string}  em         normalised email address
 * @param {Array}   cnpRow     raw CNP sheet row (or null = no prefs → skip)
 * @param {string}  cnpTypeCol CNP column name to check (e.g. 'NOTIF_CARE')
 * @param {string}  subject
 * @param {string}  body
 * @param {string}  source     label for audit on failure
 * @param {string}  churchName
 * @param {string}  footer
 */
function _dispatchNotif_(em, cnpRow, cnpTypeCol, subject, body, source, churchName, footer, mandatory) {
  // mandatory=true: care/prayer/escalation emails that must reach active pastors
  // regardless of whether they have a CNP row or have opted out.
  var isMandatory = mandatory === true;

  if (!cnpRow && !isMandatory) return;

  var emailOn, inAppOn;
  if (cnpRow) {
    var typeOn = String(cnpRow[CNP[cnpTypeCol]] || 'FALSE').toUpperCase() === 'TRUE';
    // Mandatory types override the per-type toggle but still respect nopimail/pii guards above
    if (!typeOn && !isMandatory) return;
    emailOn = isMandatory || String(cnpRow[CNP.EMAIL_ENABLED]  || 'FALSE').toUpperCase() === 'TRUE';
    inAppOn = String(cnpRow[CNP.IN_APP_ENABLED] || 'FALSE').toUpperCase() === 'TRUE';
  } else {
    // No CNP row but mandatory — email only, no in-app
    emailOn = true;
    inAppOn = false;
  }

  if (emailOn) {
    try {
      GmailApp.sendEmail(em, subject + ' — ' + churchName, body + footer);
    } catch (err) {
      writeAuthAudit_('notify_failed', em,
        (source || '_dispatchNotif_') + ' email failed: ' + String(err && err.message ? err.message : err));
    }
  }

  if (inAppOn) {
    try {
      var ss = db();
      createNotification_(ss, { email: 'SYSTEM' }, {
        recipientEmail: em,
        title:          subject,
        body:           body,
        notifType:      cnpTypeCol === 'NOTIF_CARE' ? 'Care' :
                        cnpTypeCol === 'NOTIF_PRAYER' ? 'Prayer' :
                        cnpTypeCol === 'NOTIF_SYSTEM' ? 'System' : 'Announcement',
        priority:       'Normal',
        sentVia:        emailOn ? 'Email+In-App' : 'In-App'
      });
    } catch (err) {
      writeAuthAudit_('notify_failed', em,
        (source || '_dispatchNotif_') + ' in-app failed: ' + String(err && err.message ? err.message : err));
    }
  }
}

// Sensitive notification types routed through PASTORAL_SLOT_1-10 ONLY.
// NOTIF_CARE and NOTIF_PRAYER bypass role-scan entirely.
var PASTORAL_ONLY_TYPES = ['NOTIF_CARE', 'NOTIF_PRAYER'];

function notifyPastorsAndAdmins_(subject, body, source, cnpTypeCol) {
  var typeCol    = cnpTypeCol || 'NOTIF_CARE';
  var churchName = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS');
  var appUrl     = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_APP_URL', '');
  var footer     = '\n\n— ' + churchName + (appUrl ? '\n' + appUrl : '');
  var notified   = {};

  // ── Sensitive types → Pastoral Slots ONLY ────────────────────────────────
  // NOTIF_CARE and NOTIF_PRAYER go to PASTORAL_SLOT_1-10 only. No role-scan.
  if (PASTORAL_ONLY_TYPES.indexOf(typeCol) !== -1) {
    var pastoralEmails = getPastoralEmails_();
    if (!pastoralEmails.length) {
      console.log('[notifyPastorsAndAdmins_] WARNING: no pastoral slots configured. Set PASTORAL_SLOT_1-10 in AppConfig.');
    }
    pastoralEmails.forEach(function(em) {
      try {
        GmailApp.sendEmail(em, subject + ' — ' + churchName, body + footer);
        notified[em] = true;
      } catch (e) {
        console.log('[notifyPastorsAndAdmins_] slot email failed for ' + em + ': ' + String(e));
      }
    });
    return; // sensitive — no fallthrough to role-scan
  }

  // ── General types → CNP-based role-scan routing ───────────────────────────────
  var cnpMap = _loadCNPMap_();
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow < 2) return;
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 8).getValues();
    data.forEach(function(r) {
      var em     = normalizeEmail(String(r[0] || ''));
      var role   = String(r[6] || '').toLowerCase();
      var status = String(r[7] || '').toLowerCase();
      var level  = ROLE_LEVELS[role] || 0;
      if (em && status === 'active' && level >= 4) {
        var mandatory = (typeCol === 'NOTIF_MESSAGES' || typeCol === 'NOTIF_ANNOUNCEMENTS');
        _dispatchNotif_(em, cnpMap[em] || null, typeCol, subject, body, source, churchName, footer, mandatory);
        notified[em] = true;
      }
    });
  } catch (e) {
    console.log('[notifyPastorsAndAdmins_] ERROR: ' + String(e));
  }

  // Group allmail/timothy routing for general types only
  try {
    var acData = getAccessControlData_();
    acData.forEach(function(row) {
      var em     = normalizeEmail(String(row[0] || ''));
      var active = String(row[4] || '').toUpperCase();
      var groups = String(row[3] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (!em || active !== 'TRUE' || notified[em]) return;
      var send = ['lead pastor', 'timothy', 'allmail'].some(function(g) { return groups.indexOf(g) !== -1; });
      if (send) {
        GmailApp.sendEmail(em, subject + ' — ' + churchName, body + footer);
        notified[em] = true;
      }
    });
  } catch (e) {
    console.log('[notifyPastorsAndAdmins_] GROUP AUTO-NOTIFY ERROR: ' + String(e));
  }
}

function notifyPastorsOnly_(subject, body, source, cnpTypeCol) {
  var typeCol    = cnpTypeCol || 'NOTIF_CARE';
  var churchName = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS');
  var appUrl     = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_APP_URL', '');
  var footer     = '\n\n— ' + churchName + (appUrl ? '\n' + appUrl : '');

  // ── Sensitive types → Pastoral Slots ONLY ────────────────────────────────
  if (PASTORAL_ONLY_TYPES.indexOf(typeCol) !== -1 || source === 'dailyPastoralSummary') {
    var pastoralEmails = getPastoralEmails_();
    if (!pastoralEmails.length) {
      console.log('[notifyPastorsOnly_] WARNING: no pastoral slots configured. Set PASTORAL_SLOT_1-10 in AppConfig.');
    }
    pastoralEmails.forEach(function(em) {
      try {
        GmailApp.sendEmail(em, subject + ' — ' + churchName, body + footer);
      } catch (e) {
        console.log('[notifyPastorsOnly_] slot email failed for ' + em + ': ' + String(e));
      }
    });
    return;
  }

  // ── General types → CNP-based role-scan routing ───────────────────────────────
  var cnpMap   = _loadCNPMap_();
  var notified = {};
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow < 2) return;
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 8).getValues();
    data.forEach(function(r) {
      var em     = normalizeEmail(String(r[0] || ''));
      var role   = String(r[6] || '').toLowerCase();
      var status = String(r[7] || '').toLowerCase();
      var level  = ROLE_LEVELS[role] || 0;
      if (em && status === 'active' && level >= 4) {
        var mandatory = (typeCol === 'NOTIF_MESSAGES' || typeCol === 'NOTIF_ANNOUNCEMENTS');
        _dispatchNotif_(em, cnpMap[em] || null, typeCol, subject, body, source, churchName, footer, mandatory);
        notified[em] = true;
      }
    });
  } catch (e) {
    console.log('[notifyPastorsOnly_] ERROR: ' + String(e));
  }
}

/**
 * Notify finance group members — giving reports and financial updates.
 * Routes to users with the 'finance' or 'allmail' group in AccessControl.
 * No CNP row required. nopimail flag is respected.
 *
 * @param {string} subject
 * @param {string} body
 * @param {string} [source]
 */
function notifyFinance_(subject, body, source) {
  var churchName = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS');
  var appUrl     = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_APP_URL', '');
  var footer     = '\n\n— ' + churchName + (appUrl ? '\n' + appUrl : '');
  var notified   = {};
  try {
    var acData = getAccessControlData_();
    acData.forEach(function(row) {
      var em     = normalizeEmail(String(row[0] || ''));
      var active = String(row[4] || '').toUpperCase();
      var groups = String(row[3] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (!em || active !== 'TRUE') return;
      if (groups.indexOf('nopimail') !== -1 || groups.indexOf('limitpii') !== -1) return;
      if (groups.indexOf('finance') !== -1 || groups.indexOf('allmail') !== -1) {
        if (!notified[em]) {
          try {
            GmailApp.sendEmail(em, subject + ' — ' + churchName, body + footer);
            notified[em] = true;
          } catch (err) {
            console.log('[notifyFinance_] sendEmail failed for ' + em + ': ' + String(err));
          }
        }
      }
    });
  } catch (e) {
    console.log('[notifyFinance_] ERROR: ' + String(e));
  }
}

/**
 * Look up a member's primary email address and display name from Members by member ID.
 * Returns null if not found.
 */
function getCaregiverEmail_(memberId) {
  if (!memberId) return null;
  try {
    var sheet = getTab(MEM_TAB);
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow < 2) return null;
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MEM.EMAIL1 + 1).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      if (String(data[i][MEM.ID]).trim() === String(memberId).trim()) {
        var email = normalizeEmail(String(data[i][MEM.EMAIL1] || ''));
        if (!email) return null;
        var firstName = String(data[i][MEM.FIRST] || '');
        var lastName  = String(data[i][MEM.LAST]  || '');
        return { email: email, name: (firstName + ' ' + lastName).trim() || email };
      }
    }
  } catch (_) {}
  return null;
}

/**
 * Returns true if the member (by member ID) has an active pastor role in AccessControl.
 * Used to determine whether a secondary caregiver assignment notification should be sent.
 */
function isCaregiverPastor_(memberId) {
  var cg = getCaregiverEmail_(memberId);
  if (!cg) return false;
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow < 2) return false;
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 8).getValues(); // A=Email … G=Role, H=Status
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      var em     = normalizeEmail(String(data[i][0] || ''));
      var role   = String(data[i][6] || '').toLowerCase();
      var status = String(data[i][7] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (em === cg.email && status === 'active' && (ROLE_LEVELS[role] || 0) >= 4) return true;
    }
  } catch (_) {}
  return false;
}

/**
 * Email the assigned caregiver directly when a care case is assigned or reassigned to them.
 * Includes full case details and clear call-to-action.
 */
function notifyCareAssignment_(caseRow, caregiverMemberId, isReassign) {
  if (getAppConfigValue_('NOTIFY_CARE_ASSIGNMENT', 'TRUE') !== 'TRUE') return;
  var cg = getCaregiverEmail_(caregiverMemberId);
  if (!cg) return;

  var churchName = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS');
  var careType   = String(caseRow[SCC.CARE_TYPE]  || 'Shepherding');
  var priority   = String(caseRow[SCC.PRIORITY]   || 'Normal');
  var memberId   = String(caseRow[SCC.MEMBER_ID]  || '');
  var memInfo    = getCaregiverEmail_(memberId);
  var memberName = memInfo ? memInfo.name : '(unknown — ID: ' + memberId + ')';
  var summary    = String(caseRow[SCC.SUMMARY]    || '(none)');
  var caseId     = String(caseRow[SCC.ID]         || '');
  var opened     = String(caseRow[SCC.OPENED]     || '');

  var subject = (isReassign ? 'Care Case Reassigned to You' : 'Care Case Assigned to You') + ' — ' + churchName;
  var body =
    (isReassign ? 'A care case has been reassigned to you.' : 'You have been assigned a new care case.') + '\n\n' +
    'CASE DETAILS\n' +
    '────────────────────────────────\n' +
    '  Case ID:    ' + caseId + '\n' +
    '  Care Type:  ' + careType + '\n' +
    '  Priority:   ' + priority + '\n' +
    '  Member:     ' + memberName + '\n' +
    '  Summary:    ' + summary + '\n' +
    '  Opened:     ' + opened + '\n' +
    '────────────────────────────────\n\n' +
    'NEXT STEPS\n' +
    '  1. Contact or visit this member within ' + (priority === 'Urgent' ? '24 hours' : priority === 'High' ? '48 hours' : '72 hours') + '.\n' +
    '  2. Log every contact as an Interaction in FlockOS (Love in Action → Care).\n' +
    '  3. Update the case status and notes after each visit.\n' +
    '  4. Report to the pastor if the situation changes or escalates.\n\n' +
    '"Carry each other\'s burdens, and in this way you will fulfill the law of Christ." — Galatians 6:2\n\n' +
    '— ' + churchName + (getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_APP_URL', '') ? '\n' + getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_APP_URL', '') : '');

  try {
    GmailApp.sendEmail(cg.email, subject, body);
  } catch (err) {
    writeAuthAudit_('notify_failed', cg.email,
      'notifyCareAssignment_ email failed: ' + String(err && err.message ? err.message : err));
  }
}

/**
 * Time-triggered function — run daily via Apps Script trigger.
 * Finds open care cases with no interaction logged in CARE_FOLLOWUP_DAYS days
 * and emails the primary caregiver a reminder. Also notifies pastors if the
 * case has been untouched for 2× the threshold.
 *
 * To activate: in GAS editor → Triggers → Add Trigger → careFollowUpReminder → Time-driven → Day timer
 */
function careFollowUpReminder() {
  var threshDays  = Number(getAppConfigValue_('CARE_FOLLOWUP_DAYS', '3')) || 3;
  var escalateDays = Number(getAppConfigValue_('CARE_ESCALATION_DAYS', String(threshDays * 2))) || (threshDays * 2);
  var churchName  = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS');
  var now         = new Date();

  // Load all open cases
  var caseSheet = getTab(SCC_TAB);
  var lastCaseRow = caseSheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastCaseRow < 2) return;
  var cases = caseSheet.getRange(2, 1, lastCaseRow - 1, SCC_NUM_COLS).getValues();

  // Load all interactions: we need the most recent date per case
  var ixSheet  = getTab('SpiritualCareInteractions');
  var lastIxRow = ixSheet.getLastRow();
  var latestIx = {}; // caseId → Date
  if (lastIxRow >= 2) {
    var ixData = ixSheet.getRange(2, 1, lastIxRow - 1, 4).getValues(); // A=ID, B=CaseID, C=Date
    ixData.forEach(function(r) {
      var cId = String(r[1] || '').trim();
      var d   = r[2] ? new Date(r[2]) : null;
      if (cId && d && !isNaN(d)) {
        if (!latestIx[cId] || d > latestIx[cId]) latestIx[cId] = d;
      }
    });
  }

  var TERMINAL = ['resolved','closed','archived','cancelled'];

  cases.forEach(function(row) {
    var status = String(row[SCC.STATUS] || '').toLowerCase();
    if (TERMINAL.indexOf(status) !== -1) return; // skip closed cases

    var caseId    = String(row[SCC.ID] || '').trim();
    var primaryCg = String(row[SCC.PRIMARY_CG] || '').trim();
    var careType  = String(row[SCC.CARE_TYPE]  || '');
    var priority  = String(row[SCC.PRIORITY]   || '');
    var memberId  = String(row[SCC.MEMBER_ID]  || '');
    var memInfo   = getCaregiverEmail_(memberId);
    var memberName = memInfo ? memInfo.name : '(unknown — ID: ' + memberId + ')';
    var opened    = row[SCC.OPENED] ? new Date(row[SCC.OPENED]) : null;

    // Determine reference date: latest interaction or case open date
    var lastContact = latestIx[caseId] || opened;
    if (!lastContact || isNaN(lastContact)) return;

    var daysSince = Math.floor((now - lastContact) / 86400000);
    if (daysSince < threshDays) return; // still within window

    var subject = '[Follow-Up Needed] ' + careType + ' (' + priority + ') — ' + churchName;
    var body =
      'A care case has had no logged contact for ' + daysSince + ' day' + (daysSince !== 1 ? 's' : '') + '.\n\n' +
      'CASE DETAILS\n' +
      '\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n' +
      '  Case ID:      ' + caseId + '\n' +
      '  Care Type:    ' + careType + '\n' +
      '  Priority:     ' + priority + '\n' +
      '  Member:       ' + memberName + '\n' +
      '  Status:       ' + row[SCC.STATUS] + '\n' +
      '  Last Contact: ' + lastContact.toISOString().substring(0, 10) + '\n' +
      '  Days Elapsed: ' + daysSince + '\n' +
      '\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\u2500\n\n' +
      'ACTION REQUIRED: Please make contact, log an Interaction in FlockOS, and update the case status.\n\n' +
      '"Be shepherds of God\'s flock that is under your care." — 1 Peter 5:2\n\n' +
      '— ' + churchName + (churchName && getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_APP_URL', '') ? '\n' + getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_APP_URL', '') : '');

    // Notify primary caregiver
    if (primaryCg) {
      var cg = getCaregiverEmail_(primaryCg);
      if (cg) {
        try { GmailApp.sendEmail(cg.email, subject, body); } catch (_) {}
      }
    }

    // Escalate to pastors if CARE_ESCALATION_DAYS threshold has passed
    if (daysSince >= escalateDays) {
      notifyPastorsOnly_(
        '[Escalation] Care Case — No Contact in ' + daysSince + ' Days',
        'A care case has exceeded the escalation threshold (' + escalateDays + ' days without contact).\n\n' + body,
        'careFollowUpReminder'
      );
    }
  });
}

// ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
/**
 * DAILY PASTORAL SUMMARY — 6:00 AM Pacific
 *
 * Sends a morning briefing email to all active pastors covering:
 *   1. Open spiritual care cases (sorted Urgent → High → Normal → Low)
 *   2. Open / in-progress prayer requests (New + In Progress, non-archived)
 *   3. Active missions prayer focus items
 *
 * To activate: GAS editor → Triggers → Add Trigger
 *   Function: dailyPastoralSummary
 *   Event source: Time-driven → Day timer → 6am to 7am
 *   Timezone: set GAS project timezone to America/Los_Angeles
 *
 * AppConfig key: DAILY_SUMMARY_ENABLED (default TRUE)
 */
function dailyPastoralSummary() {
  if (getAppConfigValue_('DAILY_SUMMARY_ENABLED', 'TRUE') !== 'TRUE') return;

  var churchName = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS');
  var today      = new Date();
  var tz         = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_TIMEZONE', 'America/Los_Angeles') || 'America/Los_Angeles';
  var dateStr    = Utilities.formatDate(today, tz, 'EEEE, MMMM d, yyyy');
  var PRIORITY_ORDER = { Urgent: 0, High: 1, Normal: 2, Low: 3 };
  var TERMINAL_CARE  = ['resolved', 'closed', 'archived', 'cancelled', 'referred'];

  // ── 1. Open Care Cases ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  var caseSheet  = getTab(SCC_TAB);
  var lastCaseRow = caseSheet.getLastRow();
  var openCases  = [];

  if (lastCaseRow >= 2) {
    var caseData = caseSheet.getRange(2, 1, lastCaseRow - 1, SCC_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    caseData.forEach(function(row) {
      var status = String(row[SCC.STATUS] || '').toLowerCase().trim();
      if (TERMINAL_CARE.indexOf(status) !== -1) return;
      var opened = row[SCC.OPENED] ? new Date(row[SCC.OPENED]) : null;
      var daysOpen = opened && !isNaN(opened)
        ? Math.floor((today - opened) / 86400000)
        : null;
      openCases.push({
        id:        String(row[SCC.ID]        || ''),
        memberId:  String(row[SCC.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
        careType:  String(row[SCC.CARE_TYPE] || ''),
        priority:  String(row[SCC.PRIORITY]  || 'Normal'),
        status:    String(row[SCC.STATUS]    || ''),
        summary:   String(row[SCC.SUMMARY]   || ''),
        primaryCg: String(row[SCC.PRIMARY_CG] || ''),
        daysOpen:  daysOpen
      });
    });
    openCases.sort(function(a, b) {
      var pa = PRIORITY_ORDER[a.priority] !== undefined ? PRIORITY_ORDER[a.priority] : 99;
      var pb = PRIORITY_ORDER[b.priority] !== undefined ? PRIORITY_ORDER[b.priority] : 99;
      return pa - pb;
    });
  }

  // ── 2. Open Prayer Requests ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  var prSheet   = getTab(PR_SUBMIT_TAB);
  var lastPrRow = prSheet.getLastRow();
  var openPrayer = [];

  if (lastPrRow >= 2) {
    var prData = prSheet.getRange(2, 1, lastPrRow - 1, PR_SUBMIT_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    prData.forEach(function(row) {
      var archived = String(row[PR_SUBMIT.ARCHIVED] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (archived === 'true' || archived === '1') return;
      var status = String(row[PR_SUBMIT.STATUS] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (status !== 'new' && status !== 'in progress') return;
      var submittedAt = row[PR_SUBMIT.SUBMITTED_AT] ? new Date(row[PR_SUBMIT.SUBMITTED_AT]) : null;
      var daysPending = submittedAt && !isNaN(submittedAt)
        ? Math.floor((today - submittedAt) / 86400000)
        : null;
      openPrayer.push({
        name:         String(row[PR_SUBMIT.NAME]         || 'Anonymous'),
        category:     String(row[PR_SUBMIT.CATEGORY]     || ''),
        status:       String(row[PR_SUBMIT.STATUS]       || ''),
        confidential: String(row[PR_SUBMIT.CONFIDENTIAL] || '').toLowerCase() === 'true',
        followUp:     String(row[PR_SUBMIT.FOLLOWUP_REQ] || '').toLowerCase() === 'true',
        assigned:     String(row[PR_SUBMIT.ASSIGNED]     || ''),
        daysPending:  daysPending,
        text:         String(row[PR_SUBMIT.TEXT] || '')
      });
    });
    openPrayer.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.daysPending || 0) - (a.daysPending || 0); });
  }

  // ── 3. Active Missions Prayer Focus ───────────────────────────────────────
  var mpfSheet   = getTab(MPF_TAB);
  var lastMpfRow = mpfSheet.getLastRow();
  var activeMpf  = [];

  if (lastMpfRow >= 2) {
    var mpfData = mpfSheet.getRange(2, 1, lastMpfRow - 1, MPF_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    mpfData.forEach(function(row) {
      if (String(row[MPF.STATUS] || '').toLowerCase() !== 'active') return;
      activeMpf.push({
        title:        String(row[MPF.TITLE]         || ''),
        peopleGroup:  String(row[MPF.PEOPLE_GROUP]  || ''),
        scripture:    String(row[MPF.SCRIPTURE]     || ''),
        prayerPoints: String(row[MPF.PRAYER_POINTS] || '')
      });
    });
  }

  // ── Build email body ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  var LINE = '────────────────────────────────────────\n';
  var body = churchName + ' — Daily Pastoral Summary\n' + dateStr + '\n\n';

  // Care Cases
  body += '┌─────────────────────────────────────────\n';
  body += '│  SPIRITUAL CARE CASES  (' + openCases.length + ' open)\n';
  body += '└─────────────────────────────────────────\n';
  if (openCases.length === 0) {
    body += '  No open care cases. ✓\n';
  } else {
    openCases.forEach(function(c, i) {
      var memLookup = getCaregiverEmail_(c.memberId);
      var memName  = memLookup ? memLookup.name : (c.memberId || 'N/A');
      var cgLookup = c.primaryCg ? getCaregiverEmail_(c.primaryCg) : null;
      var cgLine   = cgLookup ? ('Caregiver: ' + cgLookup.name) : (c.primaryCg ? ('Caregiver: ID ' + c.primaryCg) : 'No caregiver assigned');
      var dLine  = c.daysOpen !== null ? c.daysOpen + ' day' + (c.daysOpen !== 1 ? 's' : '') + ' open' : '';
      body += '\n  [' + (i + 1) + '] ' + c.priority.toUpperCase() + ' · ' + c.careType + '\n';
      body += '      Member: ' + memName + '\n';
      body += '      Status: ' + c.status + (dLine ? '  |  ' + dLine : '') + '\n';
      body += '      ' + cgLine + '\n';
      if (c.summary) body += '      Summary: ' + c.summary.substring(0, 120) + (c.summary.length > 120 ? '…' : '') + '\n';
    });
  }

  // Prayer Requests
  body += '\n\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────\n';
  body += '│  PRAYER REQUESTS  (' + openPrayer.length + ' active)\n';
  body += '└─────────────────────────────────────────\n';
  if (openPrayer.length === 0) {
    body += '  No active prayer requests. ✓\n';
  } else {
    openPrayer.forEach(function(p, i) {
      var nameField = p.confidential ? '[Confidential]' : p.name;
      var pending   = p.daysPending !== null ? p.daysPending + 'd pending' : '';
      var fu        = p.followUp ? '  ⚑ Follow-up requested' : '';
      var asgn      = p.assigned ? '  Assigned: ' + p.assigned : '  Unassigned';
      body += '\n  [' + (i + 1) + '] ' + nameField + '  |  ' + p.category + '  |  ' + p.status;
      if (pending) body += '  |  ' + pending;
      body += '\n      ' + asgn + fu + '\n';
      if (!p.confidential && p.text) {
        body += '      "' + p.text.substring(0, 150) + (p.text.length > 150 ? '…' : '') + '"\n';
      }
    });
  }

  // Missions Prayer Focus
  body += '\n\n┌─────────────────────────────────────────\n';
  body += '│  MISSIONS PRAYER FOCUS  (' + activeMpf.length + ' active)\n';
  body += '└─────────────────────────────────────────\n';
  if (activeMpf.length === 0) {
    body += '  No active missions prayer focus items.\n';
  } else {
    activeMpf.forEach(function(m, i) {
      body += '\n  [' + (i + 1) + '] ' + m.title;
      if (m.peopleGroup) body += '  (' + m.peopleGroup + ')';
      body += '\n';
      if (m.scripture)    body += '      Scripture: ' + m.scripture + '\n';
      if (m.prayerPoints) body += '      Prayer Points: ' + m.prayerPoints.substring(0, 200) + (m.prayerPoints.length > 200 ? '…' : '') + '\n';
    });
  }

  // Footer
  body += '\n\n' + LINE;
  body += '"The Lord is my shepherd; I shall not want." — Psalm 23:1\n';
  body += LINE;
  var appUrl = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_APP_URL', '');
  body += '— ' + churchName + ' FlockOS  |  Sent daily at 6:00 AM Pacific' + (appUrl ? '\n' + appUrl : '') + '\n';

  var urgentCount = openCases.filter(function(c) { return c.priority === 'Urgent'; }).length;
  var highCount   = openCases.filter(function(c) { return c.priority === 'High'; }).length;
  var subject = churchName + ' Daily Summary — ' + dateStr;
  if (urgentCount)      subject += ' | ' + urgentCount + ' Urgent';
  else if (highCount)   subject += ' | ' + highCount + ' High';

  notifyPastorsOnly_(subject, body, 'dailyPastoralSummary');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PROFILE UPDATE (self-service)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleExpProfileUpdate_(params, auth) {
  var sheet = getTab('UserProfiles');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  var rowIdx = -1;

  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var emails = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < emails.length; i++) {
      if (normalizeEmail(emails[i][0]) === auth.email) {
        rowIdx = i + 2;
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  var now = isoNow();
  if (rowIdx > 0) {
    // Update existing — batch read, mutate in-memory, single write
    var row = sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 1, 1, 10).getValues()[0];
    if (params.displayName != null)   row[1] = String(params.displayName);
    if (params.photoUrl != null)      row[2] = String(params.photoUrl);
    if (params.phone != null)         row[3] = String(params.phone);
    if (params.bio != null)           row[4] = String(params.bio);
    if (params.timezone != null)      row[5] = String(params.timezone);
    if (params.language != null)      row[6] = String(params.language);
    if (params.notifications != null) row[7] = String(params.notifications).toUpperCase();
    if (params.theme != null)         row[8] = String(params.theme);
    row[9] = now;
    sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 1, 1, 10).setValues([row]);
  } else {
    // Create new profile row
    sheet.appendRow([
      auth.email,
      String(params.displayName || auth.displayName || ''),
      String(params.photoUrl || ''),
      String(params.phone || ''),
      String(params.bio || ''),
      String(params.timezone || ''),
      String(params.language || 'en'),
      String(params.notifications || 'TRUE'),
      String(params.theme || 'Auto'),
      now
    ]);
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'profile.update', 'UserProfiles', '', auth.email);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Profile updated.' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ADMIN: USER MANAGEMENT
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleUsersList_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    rows.push({
      index:     i + 2,
      email:     normalizeEmail(data[i][0]),
      firstName: String(data[i][4] || ''),
      lastName:  String(data[i][5] || ''),
      role:      String(data[i][6] || 'readonly'),
      status:    String(data[i][7] || 'active'),
      createdAt: isoDate(data[i][8]),
      updatedAt: isoDate(data[i][9])
    });
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleUsersCreate_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || params.email);
  if (!email) return jsonErr('email is required.');

  // Check if already exists
  var existing = findExpUser_(email);
  if (existing) return jsonErr('User already exists: ' + email);

  var role = String(params.role || 'volunteer').toLowerCase();
  if (!EXP_ROLE_LEVELS.hasOwnProperty(role)) return jsonErr('Invalid role.');

  var passcode = String(params.passcode || '').trim();
  var minLen = Number(getAppConfigValue_('MIN_PASSCODE_LENGTH', '6'));
  if (!passcode || passcode.length < minLen) return jsonErr('Passcode must be at least ' + minLen + ' characters.');

  var now = isoNow();

  // Write to AuthUsers (salt+pepper hashed)
  var usersSheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var creds = createSecurePassword(passcode);
  usersSheet.appendRow([
    email,
    '',                        // plain passcode — leave blank, use hash
    creds.hash,                // SHA-256(pepper + salt + passcode)
    creds.salt,                // per-user salt
    String(params.firstName || ''),
    String(params.lastName || ''),
    role,
    'active',
    now,
    now
  ]);

  // Write to AccessControl
  var acSheet = getTab('AccessControl');
  acSheet.appendRow([
    email,
    role,
    ((params.firstName || '') + ' ' + (params.lastName || '')).trim(),
    String(params.groups || ''),
    'TRUE',
    'Created by admin: ' + auth.email,
    now,
    ''
  ]);
  invalidateAcCache_();

  writeAudit(auth, 'users.create', 'AuthUsers', '', email + ' → ' + role);
  writeAuthAudit_('user_created', auth.email, 'Created user: ' + email);

  return jsonOk({ message: 'User created: ' + email + ' with role ' + role + '.' });
}

function handleUsersUpdate_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || '');
  if (!email) return jsonErr('targetEmail is required.');

  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('User not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === email) {
      var rowIdx = i + 2;
      var row = data[i].slice();  // work on in-memory copy
      var cascadeChanges = {};
      if (params.firstName != null) {
        row[4] = String(params.firstName);
        cascadeChanges.firstName = row[4];
      }
      if (params.lastName != null) {
        row[5] = String(params.lastName);
        cascadeChanges.lastName = row[5];
      }
      if (params.role != null) {
        var role = String(params.role).toLowerCase();
        if (!EXP_ROLE_LEVELS.hasOwnProperty(role)) return jsonErr('Invalid role.');
        row[6] = role;
        updateAccessControlRole_(email, role);
      }
      if (params.status != null) row[7] = String(params.status).toLowerCase();
      if (params.phone != null) cascadeChanges.phone = String(params.phone);
      if (params.photoUrl != null) cascadeChanges.photoUrl = String(params.photoUrl);
      row[9] = isoNow();
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 1, 1, 10).setValues([row]);   // single batch write

      // Cascade shared-field changes to Members, MemberCards, etc.
      var hasChanges = Object.keys(cascadeChanges).length > 0;
      if (hasChanges) {
        cascadeUpdate_(email, cascadeChanges, auth);
      }

      writeAudit(auth, 'users.update', 'AuthUsers', rowIdx, email + (hasChanges ? ' (cascaded)' : ''));
      return jsonOk({ message: 'User updated: ' + email });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('User not found.');
}

function handleUsersDeactivate_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || '');
  if (!email) return jsonErr('targetEmail is required.');
  if (email === auth.email) return jsonErr('Cannot deactivate your own account.');

  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('User not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === email) {
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, 8).setValue('inactive');
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, 10).setValue(isoNow());

      // Also deactivate in AccessControl
      var acSheet = getTab('AccessControl');
      var acLast = acSheet.getLastRow();
      if (acLast >= 2) {
        var acEmails = acSheet.getRange(2, 1, acLast - 1, 1).getValues();
        for (var j = 0; j < acEmails.length; j++) {
          if (normalizeEmail(acEmails[j][0]) === email) {
            acSheet.getRange(j + 2, 5).setValue('FALSE');
            invalidateAcCache_();
            break;
          }
        }
      }

      writeAudit(auth, 'users.deactivate', 'AuthUsers', '', email);
      writeAuthAudit_('user_deactivated', auth.email, 'Deactivated: ' + email);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'User deactivated: ' + email });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('User not found.');
}

function handleUsersDelete_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || '');
  if (!email) return jsonErr('targetEmail is required.');
  if (email === auth.email) return jsonErr('Cannot delete your own account.');

  var deleted = [];

  // 1. Delete from AuthUsers
  var auSheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var auLast = auSheet.getLastRow();
  if (auLast >= 2) {
    var auData = auSheet.getRange(2, 1, auLast - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var i = auData.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      if (normalizeEmail(auData[i][0]) === email) {
        auSheet.deleteRow(i + 2);
        deleted.push('AuthUsers');
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  // 2. Delete from AccessControl
  var acSheet = getTab('AccessControl');
  var acLast = acSheet.getLastRow();
  if (acLast >= 2) {
    var acData = acSheet.getRange(2, 1, acLast - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var j = acData.length - 1; j >= 0; j--) {
      if (normalizeEmail(acData[j][0]) === email) {
        acSheet.deleteRow(j + 2);
        invalidateAcCache_();
        deleted.push('AccessControl');
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  // 3. Delete from UserProfiles
  try {
    var upSheet = getTab('UserProfiles');
    var upLast = upSheet.getLastRow();
    if (upLast >= 2) {
      var upData = upSheet.getRange(2, 1, upLast - 1, 1).getValues();
      for (var k = upData.length - 1; k >= 0; k--) {
        if (normalizeEmail(upData[k][0]) === email) {
          upSheet.deleteRow(k + 2);
          deleted.push('UserProfiles');
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (_) { /* UserProfiles tab may not exist */ }

  // 4. Delete from Members (match on primary email)
  try {
    var memSheet = getTab(MEM_TAB);
    var memLast = memSheet.getLastRow();
    if (memLast >= 2) {
      var memData = memSheet.getRange(2, 1, memLast - 1, MEM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
      for (var m = memData.length - 1; m >= 0; m--) {
        if (normalizeEmail(memData[m][MEM.EMAIL1]) === email) {
          memSheet.deleteRow(m + 2);
          deleted.push('Members');
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (_) { /* Members tab may not exist */ }

  // 5. Delete from Permissions
  try {
    var permSheet = getTab('Permissions');
    var permLast = permSheet.getLastRow();
    if (permLast >= 2) {
      var permData = permSheet.getRange(2, 1, permLast - 1, 1).getValues();
      for (var p = permData.length - 1; p >= 0; p--) {
        if (normalizeEmail(permData[p][0]) === email) {
          permSheet.deleteRow(p + 2);
          deleted.push('Permissions');
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (_) { /* Permissions tab may not exist */ }

  if (deleted.length === 0) return jsonErr('User not found in any table.');

  writeAudit(auth, 'users.delete', 'AuthUsers', '', email + ' (deleted from: ' + deleted.join(', ') + ')');
  writeAuthAudit_('user_deleted', auth.email, 'Deleted: ' + email + ' from ' + deleted.join(', '));
  return jsonOk({ message: 'User deleted from: ' + deleted.join(', '), deleted: deleted });
}

function handleUsersResetPasscode_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || '');
  var newPasscode = String(params.newPasscode || '').trim();
  if (!email) return jsonErr('targetEmail is required.');

  var minLen = Number(getAppConfigValue_('MIN_PASSCODE_LENGTH', '6'));
  if (!newPasscode || newPasscode.length < minLen) {
    return jsonErr('newPasscode must be at least ' + minLen + ' characters.');
  }

  var ok = writeExpPasscode_(email, newPasscode);
  if (!ok) return jsonErr('User not found.');

  writeAudit(auth, 'users.resetPasscode', 'AuthUsers', '', email);
  writeAuthAudit_('passcode_reset', auth.email, 'Admin reset passcode for: ' + email);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Passcode reset for ' + email + '.' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// APP CONFIG (end-user configurable settings)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleConfigList_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab('AppConfig');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 6).getValues();
  var category = String(params.category || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var row = {
      index:       i + 2,
      key:         String(data[i][0] || ''),
      value:       String(data[i][1] || ''),
      description: String(data[i][2] || ''),
      category:    String(data[i][3] || ''),
      updatedBy:   String(data[i][4] || ''),
      updatedAt:   isoDate(data[i][5])
    };
    if (category && row.category !== category) continue;
    rows.push(row);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleConfigGet_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var key = String(params.key || '').trim();
  if (!key) return jsonErr('key is required.');

  var value = getAppConfigValue_(key, null);
  if (value === null) return jsonErr('Config key not found: ' + key);
  return jsonOk({ key: key, value: value });
}

function handleConfigSet_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var key = String(params.key || '').trim();
  var value = String(params.value != null ? params.value : '');
  if (!key) return jsonErr('key is required.');

  var sheet = getTab('AppConfig');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();

  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var keys = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
      if (String(keys[i][0]).trim() === key) {
        var rowIdx = i + 2;
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 2).setValue(value);
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 5).setValue(auth.email);
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 6).setValue(isoNow());
        invalidateAppConfigCache_();
        writeAudit(auth, 'config.set', 'AppConfig', rowIdx, key + ' = ' + value);
        return jsonOk({ key: key, value: value, message: 'Config updated.' });
      }
    }
  }

  // Key not found — create it
  sheet.appendRow([
    key, value,
    String(params.description || ''),
    String(params.category || 'General'),
    auth.email, isoNow()
  ]);
  invalidateAppConfigCache_();
  writeAudit(auth, 'config.set', 'AppConfig', '', key + ' = ' + value + ' (new)');
  return jsonOk({ key: key, value: value, message: 'Config created.' });
}

/**
 * Returns rows from the AuditLog tab. Admin-only.
 * Supports optional ?limit= (default 200) and ?email= filter.
 */
function handleAuditList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var sheet = getTab('AuditLog');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var limit = parseInt(params.limit, 10) || 200;
  var filterEmail = String(params.email || '').trim().toLowerCase();

  // Read most-recent rows first (up to limit)
  var startRow = Math.max(2, lastRow - limit + 1);
  var numRows  = lastRow - startRow + 1;
  var data = sheet.getRange(startRow, 1, numRows, 7).getValues();

  var rows = [];
  for (var i = data.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    var row = {
      timestamp: isoDate(data[i][0]) || String(data[i][0] || ''),
      email:     String(data[i][1] || ''),
      role:      String(data[i][2] || ''),
      action:    String(data[i][3] || ''),
      tab:       String(data[i][4] || ''),
      rowRef:    String(data[i][5] || ''),
      details:   String(data[i][6] || ''),
    };
    if (filterEmail && row.email.toLowerCase() !== filterEmail) continue;
    rows.push(row);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

/**
 * Reads a config value from the AppConfig tab.
 * Used internally by other modules.
 */
var _APP_CONFIG_CACHE_KEY = 'flockos_appcfg_v1';
var _appConfigMemCache = null;  // in-process cache (lives for the duration of one execution)

function getAppConfigData_() {
  // 1. In-process cache — fastest, avoids repeated CacheService hits within one execution
  if (_appConfigMemCache) return _appConfigMemCache;
  // 2. CacheService — shared across concurrent executions, 60s TTL
  try {
    var cache = CacheService.getScriptCache();
    var raw = cache.get(_APP_CONFIG_CACHE_KEY);
    if (raw) {
      _appConfigMemCache = JSON.parse(raw);
      return _appConfigMemCache;
    }
  } catch (e) { /* cache miss */ }
  // 3. Live Sheets read — only happens on cache miss
  var result = {};
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('AppConfig');
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow >= 2) {
      var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 2).getValues();
      for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
        var k = String(data[i][0]).trim();
        if (!k) continue;
        var v = data[i][1];
        // Normalize booleans: Sheets stores TRUE/FALSE as booleans or mixed-case strings.
        // Always store as uppercase 'TRUE'/'FALSE' so all === 'TRUE' checks work.
        if (v === true  || String(v).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE')  v = 'TRUE';
        else if (v === false || String(v).toUpperCase() === 'FALSE') v = 'FALSE';
        else v = String(v);
        result[k] = v;
      }
    }
  } catch (e) { /* tab might not exist yet */ }
  try { CacheService.getScriptCache().put(_APP_CONFIG_CACHE_KEY, JSON.stringify(result), 60); } catch (e) {}
  _appConfigMemCache = result;
  return result;
}

function invalidateAppConfigCache_() {
  _appConfigMemCache = null;
  try { CacheService.getScriptCache().remove(_APP_CONFIG_CACHE_KEY); } catch (e) {}
}

function getAppConfigValue_(key, defaultVal) {
  var data = getAppConfigData_();
  return data.hasOwnProperty(key) ? data[key] : (defaultVal !== undefined ? defaultVal : '');
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CALENDAR: iCal Feed & Share Token
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Serves calendar events as an iCalendar (.ics) feed.
 * Public feed: returns all public-visibility events.
 * Authenticated feed: pass ?shareToken=xxx&role=ROLE to include tiered events.
 * Personal feed: pass ?shareToken=xxx&ownerEmail=EMAIL for delegated private calendars.
 * Returns ContentService with ICAL MIME type for external calendar apps.
 */
function handleCalendarIcsFeed_(params) {
  var shareToken = String(params.shareToken || '').trim();
  var feedRole = 'readonly'; // default: public only
  var feedOwnerEmail = ''; // for delegation
  var calName = getAppConfigValue_('ORG_NAME', 'FlockOS Church') + ' Calendar';

  // Validate share token for elevated access
  if (shareToken) {
    var storedToken = getAppConfigValue_('CAL_SHARE_TOKEN', '');
    if (storedToken && storedToken === shareToken) {
      feedRole = String(params.role || 'admin').toLowerCase();
      calName += ' (' + feedRole.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + feedRole.slice(1) + ')';
      // Delegation: if ownerEmail is specified and viewer has delegation
      feedOwnerEmail = String(params.ownerEmail || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    }
  }

  // Fetch events
  var evSheet, rows = [];
  try {
    evSheet = getTab(EV_TAB);
    var lastRow = evSheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow >= 2) {
      var data = evSheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, EV_NUM_COLS).getValues();
      for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
        rows.push(eventRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
      }
    }
  } catch (e) { /* Events tab may not exist */ }

  // Fetch service plans
  var spRows = [];
  try {
    var spSheet = getTab(SP_TAB);
    var spLastRow = spSheet.getLastRow();
    if (spLastRow >= 2) {
      var spData = spSheet.getRange(2, 1, spLastRow - 1, SP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
      for (var si = 0; si < spData.length; si++) {
        spRows.push(planRowToObject(spData[si], si + 2));
      }
    }
  } catch (e) { /* ServicePlans tab may not exist */ }

  // Filter events by visibility tier
  var ROLE_NUMS = { readonly: 0, volunteer: 1, care: 2, deacon: 2, leader: 3, treasurer: 3, pastor: 4, admin: 5 };
  var VIS_ROLE = {
    'public': 'readonly', 'members': 'volunteer', 'leaders': 'leader',
    'deacons': 'deacon', 'pastors': 'pastor', 'admins': 'admin'
  };
  var feedLevel = ROLE_NUMS[feedRole] || 0;

  var filtered = [];
  for (var fi = 0; fi < rows.length; fi++) {
    var ev = rows[fi];
    if (ev.status === 'cancelled') continue;
    var vis = String(ev.visibility || 'public').toLowerCase();
    if (vis === 'private') {
      // Private events: only show if delegated or same owner
      if (feedOwnerEmail && feedOwnerEmail === ev.createdBy.toLowerCase()) {
        filtered.push(ev);
      }
      continue;
    }
    var requiredRole = VIS_ROLE[vis] || 'readonly';
    var requiredLevel = ROLE_NUMS[requiredRole] || 0;
    if (feedLevel >= requiredLevel) filtered.push(ev);
  }

  // Build iCalendar output
  var ical = 'BEGIN:VCALENDAR\r\n';
  ical += 'VERSION:2.0\r\n';
  ical += 'PRODID:-//FlockOS//Church CRM Calendar//EN\r\n';
  ical += 'CALSCALE:GREGORIAN\r\n';
  ical += 'METHOD:PUBLISH\r\n';
  ical += 'X-WR-CALNAME:' + icsEscape_(calName) + '\r\n';
  ical += 'X-WR-TIMEZONE:America/New_York\r\n';

  // Add events
  for (var ei = 0; ei < filtered.length; ei++) {
    ical += buildVEvent_(filtered[ei]);
  }

  // Add service plans as events
  for (var spi = 0; spi < spRows.length; spi++) {
    var sp = spRows[spi];
    if (sp.status === 'cancelled') continue;
    ical += buildVEventFromPlan_(sp);
  }

  ical += 'END:VCALENDAR\r\n';

  return ContentService.createTextOutput(ical)
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.ICAL);
}

/**
 * Build a VEVENT block from an event row object.
 */
function buildVEvent_(ev) {
  var uid = (ev.id || Utilities.getUuid()) + '@flockos';
  var dtStart = icsDateValue_(ev.startDate, ev.startTime);
  var dtEnd   = icsDateValue_(ev.endDate || ev.startDate, ev.endTime || ev.startTime);

  // If no time, use date-only (all-day event)
  var isAllDay = !ev.startTime;

  var v = 'BEGIN:VEVENT\r\n';
  v += 'UID:' + uid + '\r\n';
  if (isAllDay) {
    v += 'DTSTART;VALUE=DATE:' + icsDateOnly_(ev.startDate) + '\r\n';
    v += 'DTEND;VALUE=DATE:' + icsDateOnly_(ev.endDate || ev.startDate) + '\r\n';
  } else {
    v += 'DTSTART:' + dtStart + '\r\n';
    if (dtEnd) v += 'DTEND:' + dtEnd + '\r\n';
  }

  // Add RRULE for recurring events
  var rrule = buildRRule_(ev.recurring, ev.recurringUntil);
  if (rrule) v += 'RRULE:' + rrule + '\r\n';

  v += 'SUMMARY:' + icsEscape_(ev.title || 'Untitled Event') + '\r\n';
  if (ev.location)    v += 'LOCATION:' + icsEscape_(ev.location) + '\r\n';
  if (ev.description) v += 'DESCRIPTION:' + icsEscape_(ev.description) + '\r\n';
  if (ev.eventType)   v += 'CATEGORIES:' + icsEscape_(ev.eventType) + '\r\n';
  v += 'STATUS:' + (ev.status === 'cancelled' ? 'CANCELLED' : 'CONFIRMED') + '\r\n';
  if (ev.createdAt) v += 'CREATED:' + icsTimestamp_(ev.createdAt) + '\r\n';
  if (ev.updatedAt) v += 'LAST-MODIFIED:' + icsTimestamp_(ev.updatedAt) + '\r\n';
  v += 'DTSTAMP:' + icsTimestamp_(new Date().toISOString()) + '\r\n';
  v += 'END:VEVENT\r\n';
  return v;
}

/**
 * Build a VEVENT block from a service plan.
 */
function buildVEventFromPlan_(sp) {
  var uid = 'sp-' + (sp.id || Utilities.getUuid()) + '@flockos';
  var dateStr = String(sp.serviceDate || '').substring(0, 10);
  if (!dateStr) return '';

  var title = (sp.serviceType || 'Service') + (sp.theme ? ': ' + sp.theme : '');

  var v = 'BEGIN:VEVENT\r\n';
  v += 'UID:' + uid + '\r\n';
  v += 'DTSTART;VALUE=DATE:' + dateStr.replace(/-/g, '') + '\r\n';
  v += 'DTEND;VALUE=DATE:' + dateStr.replace(/-/g, '') + '\r\n';
  v += 'SUMMARY:' + icsEscape_(title) + '\r\n';
  if (sp.sermonTitle)  v += 'DESCRIPTION:' + icsEscape_('Sermon: ' + sp.sermonTitle) + '\r\n';
  v += 'CATEGORIES:Service\r\n';
  v += 'STATUS:CONFIRMED\r\n';
  v += 'DTSTAMP:' + icsTimestamp_(new Date().toISOString()) + '\r\n';
  v += 'END:VEVENT\r\n';
  return v;
}

/**
 * Convert date + time to iCal datetime format (20250610T140000).
 */
function icsDateValue_(dateStr, timeStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '';
  var d = String(dateStr).substring(0, 10).replace(/-/g, '');
  if (!timeStr) return d;
  var t = String(timeStr).replace(/:/g, '');
  if (t.length === 4) t += '00'; // HH:MM → HHMM00
  return d + 'T' + t;
}

/**
 * Convert date to iCal date-only format (20250610).
 */
function icsDateOnly_(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '';
  return String(dateStr).substring(0, 10).replace(/-/g, '');
}

/**
 * Convert ISO timestamp to iCal format (20250610T140000Z).
 */
function icsTimestamp_(iso) {
  if (!iso) return '';
  return String(iso).replace(/[-:]/g, '').replace(/\.\d+/, '').substring(0, 15) + 'Z';
}

/**
 * Escape special iCal characters.
 */
function icsEscape_(str) {
  return String(str || '').replace(/\\/g, '\\\\').replace(/;/g, '\\;')
    .replace(/,/g, '\\,').replace(/\n/g, '\\n');
}

/**
 * Build an RFC 5545 RRULE string from FlockOS recurring values.
 * Supports: Daily, Weekly, Biweekly, Monthly, Yearly, and nth-weekday patterns.
 * @param {string} recurring - e.g., "Weekly", "First-Monday", "Last-Friday"
 * @param {string} recurringUntil - ISO date string for UNTIL
 * @returns {string|null} RRULE value (without "RRULE:" prefix) or null
 */
function buildRRule_(recurring, recurringUntil) {
  var rec = String(recurring || 'None');
  if (rec === 'None') return null;

  var until = '';
  if (recurringUntil) {
    until = ';UNTIL=' + String(recurringUntil).substring(0, 10).replace(/-/g, '') + 'T235959Z';
  }

  if (rec === 'Daily')    return 'FREQ=DAILY' + until;
  if (rec === 'Weekly')   return 'FREQ=WEEKLY' + until;
  if (rec === 'Biweekly') return 'FREQ=WEEKLY;INTERVAL=2' + until;
  if (rec === 'Monthly')  return 'FREQ=MONTHLY' + until;
  if (rec === 'Yearly')   return 'FREQ=YEARLY' + until;

  // Nth-weekday: "First-Monday" → FREQ=MONTHLY;BYDAY=1MO
  var parts = rec.split('-');
  if (parts.length === 2) {
    var ordMap = { First: '1', Second: '2', Third: '3', Fourth: '4', Last: '-1' };
    var dayMap = { Sunday: 'SU', Monday: 'MO', Tuesday: 'TU', Wednesday: 'WE',
                   Thursday: 'TH', Friday: 'FR', Saturday: 'SA' };
    var ordNum = ordMap[parts[0]];
    var dayAbbr = dayMap[parts[1]];
    if (ordNum && dayAbbr) {
      return 'FREQ=MONTHLY;BYDAY=' + ordNum + dayAbbr + until;
    }
  }

  return null;
}

/**
 * Generate or retrieve a calendar share token for the authenticated user.
 * Admins/pastors can get the org-wide share token.
 * The token enables subscribing to the full calendar (including private events).
 */
function handleCalendarShareToken_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var regenerate = String(params.regenerate || '').toUpperCase() === 'TRUE';

  var existing = getAppConfigValue_('CAL_SHARE_TOKEN', '');
  if (existing && !regenerate) {
    return jsonOk({ shareToken: existing });
  }

  // Generate new token
  var token = Utilities.getUuid();
  handleConfigSet_({ key: 'CAL_SHARE_TOKEN', value: token,
    description: 'Calendar subscription share token for full feed access',
    category: 'Calendar' }, auth);

  return jsonOk({ shareToken: token, regenerated: regenerate });
}


/**
 * Returns an object of all enabled modules (based on MODULE_* config keys).
 */
function getEnabledModules_() {
  var modules = {};
  var names = [
    'ATTENDANCE', 'EVENTS', 'SMALL_GROUPS', 'GIVING', 'VOLUNTEERS',
    'COMMUNICATIONS', 'CHECKIN', 'MINISTRIES', 'SERVICE_PLANS',
    'SPIRITUAL_CARE', 'OUTREACH'
  ];
  for (var i = 0; i < names.length; i++) {
    var val = getAppConfigValue_('MODULE_' + names[i], 'TRUE');
    modules[names[i].toLowerCase()] = (String(val).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE');
  }
  return modules;
}

/**
 * Checks if a specific module is enabled. Use from handlers to
 * gate access to disabled modules.
 */
function isModuleEnabled(moduleName) {
  var val = getAppConfigValue_('MODULE_' + String(moduleName).toUpperCase(), 'TRUE');
  return String(val).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE';
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// INTERNAL HELPERS — User / Profile Lookup
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function findExpUser_(email) {
  var sheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return null;

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  var target = normalizeEmail(email);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === target) {
      return {
        rowIndex:     i + 2,
        email:        normalizeEmail(data[i][0]),
        passcode:     String(data[i][1] || ''),
        passcodeHash: String(data[i][2] || ''),
        salt:         String(data[i][3] || ''),
        firstName:    String(data[i][4] || ''),
        lastName:     String(data[i][5] || ''),
        role:         String(data[i][6] || 'readonly'),
        status:       String(data[i][7] || 'active'),
        createdAt:    isoDate(data[i][8]),
        updatedAt:    isoDate(data[i][9])
      };
    }
  }
  return null;
}

function findExpProfile_(email) {
  var sheet;
  try { sheet = getTab('UserProfiles'); } catch (e) { return {}; }
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return {};

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  var target = normalizeEmail(email);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === target) {
      return {
        email:         normalizeEmail(data[i][0]),
        displayName:   String(data[i][1] || ''),
        photoUrl:      String(data[i][2] || ''),
        phone:         String(data[i][3] || ''),
        bio:           String(data[i][4] || ''),
        timezone:      String(data[i][5] || ''),
        language:      String(data[i][6] || 'en'),
        notifications: toBool(data[i][7]),
        theme:         String(data[i][8] || 'Auto')
      };
    }
  }
  return {};
}

function verifyExpPasscode_(user, passcode, email) {
  // Check plain text first (pre-migration users)
  var rawStored = String(user.passcode || '').trim();
  if (rawStored && rawStored === passcode) return true;

  // Delegate to salt-pepper-hash verifyPasscode (handles pepper + salt + legacy)
  var storedHash = String(user.passcodeHash || '').trim();
  if (!storedHash) return false;
  return verifyPasscode(passcode, storedHash, user.salt, email);
}

function writeExpPasscode_(email, newPasscode) {
  // Delegates to setSecurePassword (salt+pepper scheme from SaltPepperHash)
  return setSecurePassword(email, newPasscode);
}

function updateAccessControlRole_(email, role) {
  var sheet = getTab('AccessControl');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return;
  var emails = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < emails.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(emails[i][0]) === email) {
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, 2).setValue(role);
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, 8).setValue(isoNow());
      return;
    }
  }
}

function sha256Hex_(value) {
  var bytes = Utilities.computeDigest(
    Utilities.DigestAlgorithm.SHA_256,
    String(value || ''),
    Utilities.Charset.UTF_8
  );
  var out = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < bytes.length; i++) {
    var v = bytes[i];
    if (v < 0) v += 256;
    var hex = v.toString(16);
    out.push(hex.length === 1 ? '0' + hex : hex);
  }
  return out.join('');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ACCESS CONTROL LOOKUP
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Looks up a user's AccessControl row by email.
 * Returns { email, role, displayName, groups, active, notes } or null.
 */
function getAccessControlRow(email) {
  var data = getAccessControlData_();
  var target = normalizeEmail(email);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === target) {
      return {
        rowIndex:    i + 2,
        email:       normalizeEmail(data[i][0]),
        role:        String(data[i][1] || 'readonly'),
        displayName: String(data[i][2] || ''),
        groups:      String(data[i][3] || ''),
        active:      String(data[i][4] || 'FALSE'),
        notes:       String(data[i][5] || ''),
        createdAt:   isoDate(data[i][6]),
        updatedAt:   isoDate(data[i][7])
      };
    }
  }
  return null;
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ACCESS CONTROL API HANDLERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleAccessList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var data = getAccessControlData_();
  var rows = data
    .filter(function(r) { return String(r[0] || '').trim(); })
    .map(function(r, i) {
      return {
        rowIndex:    i + 2,
        email:       normalizeEmail(String(r[0] || '')),
        role:        String(r[1] || 'readonly'),
        displayName: String(r[2] || ''),
        groups:      String(r[3] || ''),
        active:      String(r[4] || 'FALSE'),
        notes:       String(r[5] || ''),
        createdAt:   isoDate(r[6]),
        updatedAt:   isoDate(r[7])
      };
    });
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleAccessSet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var email = normalizeEmail(String(params.email || '').trim());
  var role  = String(params.role || '').toLowerCase().trim();
  if (!email) return jsonErr('email required');
  if (!EXP_ROLE_LEVELS.hasOwnProperty(role)) return jsonErr('Invalid role');
  var sheet   = getTab('AccessControl');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  var data    = lastRow >= 2 ? sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 8).getValues() : [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(String(data[i][0] || '')) === email) {
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, 2).setValue(role);
      if (params.displayName !== undefined) sheet.getRange(i + 2, 3).setValue(String(params.displayName || ''));
      if (params.groups      !== undefined) sheet.getRange(i + 2, 4).setValue(String(params.groups      || ''));
      if (params.active      !== undefined) sheet.getRange(i + 2, 5).setValue(String(params.active      || 'TRUE'));
      if (params.notes       !== undefined) sheet.getRange(i + 2, 6).setValue(String(params.notes       || ''));
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, 8).setValue(isoNow());
      invalidateAcCache_();
      writeAudit(auth, 'access.set', 'AccessControl', i + 2, email + ' \u2192 ' + role);
      return jsonOk({ ok: true, email: email, role: role });
    }
  }
  // New row — append
  var now    = isoNow();
  var newRow = [
    email,
    role,
    String(params.displayName || ''),
    String(params.groups      || ''),
    String(params.active      !== undefined ? params.active : 'TRUE'),
    String(params.notes       || ''),
    now,
    now
  ];
  sheet.appendRow(newRow);
  invalidateAcCache_();
  writeAudit(auth, 'access.set', 'AccessControl', sheet.getLastRow(), email + ' \u2192 ' + role);
  return jsonOk({ ok: true, email: email, role: role });
}

function handleAccessRemove(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var email = normalizeEmail(String(params.email || '').trim());
  if (!email) return jsonErr('email required');
  var sheet   = getTab('AccessControl');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('User not found');
  var emails  = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < emails.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(String(emails[i][0] || '')) === email) {
      var rowNum = i + 2;
      sheet.deleteRow(rowNum);
      invalidateAcCache_();
      writeAudit(auth, 'access.remove', 'AccessControl', rowNum, email);
      return jsonOk({ ok: true, removed: email });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('User not found');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// AUTH AUDIT LOG
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function writeAuthAudit_(event, email, details) {
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('AuthAudit');
    if (!sheet) return;
    sheet.appendRow([
      isoNow(),
      String(event || ''),
      normalizeEmail(email),
      String(details || '')
    ]);
  } catch (err) { /* auth audit should never break the request */ }
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MODULE-LEVEL PERMISSIONS — Per-User GRANT/DENY Overrides
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Checks whether a user has access to a specific module.
 * Priority: per-user DENY → per-user GRANT → role default.
 *
 * @param {string} email      — user email
 * @param {number} roleLevel  — numeric role level (0–5)
