 * @param {string} moduleKey  — key from MODULE_PERMISSIONS
 * @returns {boolean}
 */
function hasModuleAccess(email, roleLevel, moduleKey) {
  var mod = MODULE_PERMISSIONS[moduleKey];
  if (!mod) return false; // unknown module → deny

  // Check Permissions sheet for per-user override
  var override = getPermissionOverride_(email, moduleKey);
  if (override === 'deny')  return false;
  if (override === 'grant') return true;

  // Fall back to role-level default
  return roleLevel >= mod.level;
}

/**
 * Throws if the user does not have module access. Use in API handlers.
 */
function requireModule(moduleKey, auth) {
  if (!hasModuleAccess(auth.email, auth.roleLevel, moduleKey)) {
    throw new Error('Access denied for module: ' + moduleKey);
  }
}

/**
 * Reads the Permissions sheet for a specific (email, module) override.
 * Returns 'grant', 'deny', or null.
 */
function getPermissionOverride_(email, moduleKey) {
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('Permissions');
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow < 2) return null;
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 3).getValues();
    var target = normalizeEmail(email);
    var mod = String(moduleKey).toLowerCase();
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === target && String(data[i][1]).toLowerCase() === mod) {
        return String(data[i][2]).toLowerCase(); // 'grant' or 'deny'
      }
    }
  } catch (err) { /* Permissions tab may not exist yet */ }
  return null;
}

/**
 * Gets all permission overrides for a user.
 * Returns array of { module, access, grantedBy, grantedAt, notes }.
 */
function getPermissionOverrides_(email) {
  var overrides = [];
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('Permissions');
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow < 2) return overrides;
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 6).getValues();
    var target = normalizeEmail(email);
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === target) {
        overrides.push({
          module:    String(data[i][1]),
          access:    String(data[i][2]),
          grantedBy: String(data[i][3]),
          grantedAt: isoDate(data[i][4]),
          notes:     String(data[i][5] || '')
        });
      }
    }
  } catch (err) { /* ignore */ }
  return overrides;
}

/**
 * Computes the full effective permissions map for a user.
 * Returns { moduleKey: true/false, ... } for every module.
 *
 * @param {string} email            — user email
 * @param {number} roleLevel        — numeric role level (0–5)
 * @param {Array}  [preloadedList]  — optional: result of getPermissionOverrides_(email).
 *                                    When supplied, skips the Permissions sheet read.
 */
function computePermissionsMap_(email, roleLevel, preloadedList) {
  // Build override map from pre-loaded list (avoids double Permissions sheet read)
  var overrides = {};
  if (preloadedList) {
    for (var j = 0; j < preloadedList.length; j++) {
      overrides[String(preloadedList[j].module).toLowerCase()] =
        String(preloadedList[j].access).toLowerCase();
    }
  } else {
    try {
      var sheet = getTab('Permissions');
      var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
      if (lastRow >= 2) {
        var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 3).getValues();
        var target = normalizeEmail(email);
        for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
          if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === target) {
            overrides[String(data[i][1]).toLowerCase()] = String(data[i][2]).toLowerCase();
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (err) { /* ignore */ }
  }

  // ── Role-based preset keys ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
  // Seeds the permission map with the standard grant set for this role level.
  // Overrides (grant / deny) are applied on top after seeding.
  var preset = {};

  // Level 0+ (member) — level-0 module nav items auto-granted for all
  // (handled below in the MODULE_PERMISSIONS loop)

  if (roleLevel >= 1) {
    // LEADER / VOLUNTEER baseline
    preset['my-flock'] = true;
    preset['care'] = true;
    preset['care.create'] = true;
    preset['care.edit'] = true;
    preset['care.interactions'] = true;
    preset['care.follow-ups'] = true;
    preset['prayer-admin.public'] = true;
    preset['compassion'] = true;
    preset['compassion.resources'] = true;
    preset['groups'] = true;
    preset['groups.manage'] = true;
    preset['attendance'] = true;
    preset['attendance.record'] = true;
    preset['outreach'] = true;
    preset['outreach.contacts'] = true;
    preset['outreach.follow-ups'] = true;
    preset['discipleship'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.paths'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.progress'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.goals'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.meetings'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.mentoring'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.resources'] = true;
    preset['volunteers'] = true;
    preset['volunteers.manage'] = true;
    preset['events.rsvp-list'] = true;
    preset['sermons.upload'] = true;
    preset['albums'] = true;
    preset['albums.manage'] = true;
    preset['calendar.create'] = true;
    preset['calendar.edit'] = true;
    preset['calendar.share'] = true;
    preset['songs'] = true;
    preset['songs.setlist'] = true;
  }

  if (roleLevel >= 2) {
    // DEACON / CARE baseline (adds onto leader)
    preset['directory'] = true;
    preset['directory.contact-details'] = true;
    preset['care.view-all'] = true;
    preset['prayer-admin.confidential'] = true;
    preset['compassion.approve'] = true;
    preset['compassion.amount'] = true;
    preset['compassion.log'] = true;
    preset['compassion.log.create'] = true;
    preset['giving'] = true;
    preset['giving.pledges'] = true;
    preset['services.edit'] = true;
    preset['songs.edit'] = true;
    preset['comms.send-group'] = true;
    preset['events.edit'] = true;
    preset['memberCards.directory'] = true;
    preset['memberCards.scan'] = true;
    preset['checkin.manage'] = true;
    preset['checkin.sessions'] = true;
    preset['volunteers.swap'] = true;
    preset['sermons.series'] = true;
    preset['outreach.contacts.edit'] = true;
  }

  if (roleLevel >= 3) {
    // ELDER baseline (adds onto deacon/care)
    preset['care.edit-all'] = true;
    preset['care.reassign'] = true;
    preset['care.close'] = true;
    preset['care.assignments'] = true;
    preset['compassion.notes'] = true;
    preset['compassion.resources.edit'] = true;
    preset['groups.create'] = true;
    preset['attendance.edit-past'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.enroll'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.advance'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.mentoring.edit'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.assessments'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.milestones'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.goals.review'] = true;
    preset['outreach.campaigns'] = true;
    preset['outreach.campaigns.edit'] = true;
    preset['reports'] = true;
    preset['statistics'] = true;
    preset['giving.individual'] = true;
    preset['ministry'] = true;
    preset['calendar.delete'] = true;
  }

  if (roleLevel >= 4) {
    // PASTOR / TIMOTHY baseline (adds onto elder)
    preset['my-flock.full-directory'] = true;
    preset['my-flock.add-edit-members'] = true;
    preset['my-flock.remove-members'] = true;
    preset['directory.export'] = true;
    preset['comms'] = true;
    preset['comms.send-individual'] = true;
    preset['comms.send-all'] = true;
    preset['comms.channels'] = true;
    preset['comms.templates'] = true;
    preset['content-admin'] = true;
    preset['content-admin.publish'] = true;
    preset['sermons.edit'] = true;
    preset['sermons.approve'] = true;
    preset['missions'] = true;
    preset['missions.registry'] = true;
    preset['missions.registry.edit'] = true;
    preset['missions.partners'] = true;
    preset['missions.partners.edit'] = true;
    preset['missions.regions'] = true;
    preset['missions.prayer'] = true;
    preset['missions.prayer.edit'] = true;
    preset['missions.updates'] = true;
    preset['missions.updates.edit'] = true;
    preset['memberCards'] = true;
    preset['memberCards.create'] = true;
    preset['memberCards.edit'] = true;
    preset['giving.enter'] = true;
    preset['giving.statements'] = true;
    preset['giving.pledges.edit'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.paths.edit'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.steps.edit'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.certificates'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.certificates.issue'] = true;
    preset['reports.sensitive'] = true;
    preset['users.edit'] = true;
    preset['users.permissions'] = true;
    preset['audit'] = true;
    preset['care.notes'] = true;
    preset['prayer-admin'] = true;
    preset['prayer-admin.notes'] = true;
  }

  if (roleLevel >= 5) {
    // ADMIN baseline (adds onto pastor)
    preset['users'] = true;
    preset['users.create'] = true;
    preset['users.deactivate'] = true;
    preset['config'] = true;
    preset['config.edit'] = true;
    preset['access'] = true;
    preset['access.approve'] = true;
    preset['bulk'] = true;
    preset['bulk.import'] = true;
    preset['bulk.export'] = true;
    preset['church'] = true;
    preset['church.edit'] = true;
    preset['giving.edit'] = true;
    preset['memberCards.archive'] = true;
    preset['memberCards.links'] = true;
    preset['memberCards.views'] = true;
    preset['memberCards.bulk'] = true;
    preset['reports.export'] = true;
    preset['calendar.delegate'] = true;
    preset['comms.delete'] = true;
    preset['discipleship.resources.edit'] = true;
  }

  // Build the map: start with preset, then apply level-0 auto-grants,
  // then layer on per-user overrides (grant / deny).
  var map = {};
  for (var key in MODULE_PERMISSIONS) {
    if (!MODULE_PERMISSIONS.hasOwnProperty(key)) continue;
    var override = overrides[key];
    if (override === 'deny') {
      // Admin (level 5) cannot be denied via overrides — group is a notification profile only
      if (roleLevel >= 5) { override = undefined; } else { map[key] = false; continue; }
    }
    if (override === 'grant') {
      // Ceiling: can only grant up to the user's role level
      map[key] = roleLevel >= MODULE_PERMISSIONS[key].level;
      continue;
    }
    // No override — use preset if set, otherwise auto-grant level-0 items only
    if (preset[key] === true) {
      map[key] = roleLevel >= MODULE_PERMISSIONS[key].level;
    } else {
      map[key] = MODULE_PERMISSIONS[key].level === 0;
    }
  }
  return map;
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PERMISSION CRUD HANDLERS (admin-only)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * permissions.get — returns overrides + effective map for a user.
 * Params: targetEmail
 */
function handlePermissionsGet_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || '');
  if (!email) return jsonErr('targetEmail is required.');

  var ac = getAccessControlRow(email);
  var roleLevel = ac ? (EXP_ROLE_LEVELS[String(ac.role).toLowerCase()] || 0) : 0;
  // Load overrides once and pass to computePermissionsMap_ to avoid a second Permissions sheet read
  var overrides = getPermissionOverrides_(email);
  var effective = computePermissionsMap_(email, roleLevel, overrides);

  return jsonOk({ email: email, role: ac ? ac.role : 'unknown', overrides: overrides, permissions: effective });
}

/**
 * permissions.set — grant or deny a module for a user, or clear override.
 * Params: targetEmail, module, access ('grant'|'deny'|'clear')
 */
function handlePermissionsSet_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || '');
  var moduleKey = String(params.module || '').toLowerCase();
  var access = String(params.access || '').toLowerCase();

  if (!email) return jsonErr('targetEmail is required.');
  if (!MODULE_PERMISSIONS[moduleKey]) return jsonErr('Invalid module: ' + moduleKey);
  if (access !== 'grant' && access !== 'deny' && access !== 'clear') {
    return jsonErr('access must be grant, deny, or clear.');
  }

  // ── Church-Office cap guard ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  // A church-office user may edit permissions but cannot grant keys they don't
  // hold themselves, and cannot elevate anyone to admin-level role.
  if (isChurchOffice_(auth) && !isSeedAdmin_(auth)) {
    // Block granting any key the caller's own computed permissions don't include
    if (access === 'grant') {
      var callerPerms = computePermissionsMap_(auth.email, EXP_ROLE_LEVELS[String(auth.role || '').toLowerCase()] || 0);
      if (!callerPerms[moduleKey]) {
        return jsonErr('Church-office users cannot grant permissions they do not hold themselves: ' + moduleKey);
      }
    }
    // Block setting role to admin on the target user
    if (params.role && (String(params.role).toLowerCase() === 'admin' || (EXP_ROLE_LEVELS[String(params.role).toLowerCase()] || 0) >= 5)) {
      return jsonErr('Church-office users cannot elevate a user to admin level.');
    }
  }

  var sheet = getTab('Permissions');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();

  // Find existing override
  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 6).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === email && String(data[i][1]).toLowerCase() === moduleKey) {
        if (access === 'clear') {
          sheet.deleteRow(i + 2);
          writeAudit(auth, 'permissions.clear', 'Permissions', '', email + ' / ' + moduleKey);
          return jsonOk({ message: 'Override cleared for ' + email + ' / ' + moduleKey });
        }
        // Update existing row
        sheet.getRange(i + 2, 3).setValue(access);
        sheet.getRange(i + 2, 4).setValue(auth.email);
        sheet.getRange(i + 2, 5).setValue(isoNow());
        if (params.notes != null) sheet.getRange(i + 2, 6).setValue(String(params.notes));
        writeAudit(auth, 'permissions.set', 'Permissions', '', email + ' / ' + moduleKey + ' → ' + access);
        return jsonOk({ message: moduleKey + ' → ' + access + ' for ' + email });
      }
    }
  }

  // Clear on a non-existent override is a no-op
  if (access === 'clear') return jsonOk({ message: 'No override to clear.' });

  // Create new override row
  sheet.appendRow([email, moduleKey, access, auth.email, isoNow(), String(params.notes || '')]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'permissions.set', 'Permissions', '', email + ' / ' + moduleKey + ' → ' + access + ' (new)');
  return jsonOk({ message: moduleKey + ' → ' + access + ' for ' + email });
}

/**
 * permissions.copy — clone all overrides from one user to another.
 * Params: fromEmail, toEmail
 */
function handlePermissionsCopy_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var from = normalizeEmail(params.fromEmail || '');
  var to   = normalizeEmail(params.toEmail || '');
  if (!from) return jsonErr('fromEmail is required.');
  if (!to)   return jsonErr('toEmail is required.');
  if (from === to) return jsonErr('Cannot copy permissions to the same user.');

  var sourceOverrides = getPermissionOverrides_(from);
  if (sourceOverrides.length === 0) return jsonOk({ message: 'Source user has no overrides. Nothing copied.', copied: 0 });

  // Remove existing overrides for the target
  var sheet = getTab('Permissions');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var i = data.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
      if (normalizeEmail(data[i][0]) === to) sheet.deleteRow(i + 2);
    }
  }

  // Write new overrides for target
  var now = isoNow();
  var rows = [];
  for (var s = 0; s < sourceOverrides.length; s++) {
    rows.push([to, sourceOverrides[s].module, sourceOverrides[s].access, auth.email, now, 'Copied from ' + from]);
  }
  if (rows.length > 0) {
    sheet.getRange(sheet.getLastRow() + 1, 1, rows.length, 6).setValues(rows);
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'permissions.copy', 'Permissions', '', from + ' → ' + to + ' (' + rows.length + ' overrides)');
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Copied ' + rows.length + ' permission overrides from ' + from + ' to ' + to + '.', copied: rows.length });
}

/**
 * permissions.list — returns the MODULE_PERMISSIONS map (module keys + defaults).
 */
function handlePermissionsList_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  return jsonOk({ modules: MODULE_PERMISSIONS });
}

/**
 * permissions.setAll — replace ALL permission overrides for a user atomically.
 * Clears existing overrides and writes the supplied grants in one transaction.
 * Params: targetEmail, grants (array of module/capability keys to grant)
 * Requires: pastor role (level 4+). Seed admin and Lead Pastor are protected from modification.
 */
function handlePermissionsSetAll_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.targetEmail || '');
  if (!email) return jsonErr('targetEmail is required.');

  // Protect seed admin and Lead Pastor — their access is always full and cannot be stripped
  if (isSeedAdmin_({ email: email })) {
    return jsonErr('Cannot modify permissions for the Seed Admin.');
  }
  var targetAc = getAccessControlRow(email);
  if (targetAc && isLeadPastor_({ groups: String(targetAc.groups || '').toLowerCase() })) {
    return jsonErr('Cannot modify permissions for a Lead Pastor. Their access is always full.');
  }

  var grants = Array.isArray(params.grants) ? params.grants : [];
  var denies = Array.isArray(params.denies) ? params.denies : [];

  // ── Church-Office cap guard ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (isChurchOffice_(auth) && !isSeedAdmin_(auth)) {
    var callerPerms = computePermissionsMap_(auth.email, EXP_ROLE_LEVELS[String(auth.role || '').toLowerCase()] || 0);
    for (var g = 0; g < grants.length; g++) {
      if (!callerPerms[grants[g]]) {
        return jsonErr('Church-office users cannot grant permissions they do not hold themselves: ' + grants[g]);
      }
    }
  }

  // Validate all supplied keys
  for (var i = 0; i < grants.length; i++) {
    if (!MODULE_PERMISSIONS[grants[i]]) return jsonErr('Invalid capability key: ' + grants[i]);
  }
  for (var j = 0; j < denies.length; j++) {
    if (!MODULE_PERMISSIONS[denies[j]]) return jsonErr('Invalid capability key: ' + denies[j]);
  }

  // Delete ALL existing overrides for this user (batch — avoids per-row deleteRow calls)
  var sheet = getTab('Permissions');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var all  = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).getValues();
    var keep = all.filter(function(r) { return normalizeEmail(r[0]) !== email; });
    sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, sheet.getLastColumn()).clearContent();
    if (keep.length > 0) {
      sheet.getRange(2, 1, keep.length, keep[0].length).setValues(keep);
    }
  }

  // Write new rows
  var now = isoNow();
  var rows = [];
  grants.forEach(function(key) { rows.push([email, key, 'grant', auth.email, now, '']); });
  denies.forEach(function(key) { rows.push([email, key, 'deny',  auth.email, now, '']); });
  if (rows.length > 0) {
    sheet.getRange(sheet.getLastRow() + 1, 1, rows.length, 6).setValues(rows);
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'permissions.setAll', 'Permissions', '', email + ' \u2014 ' + grants.length + ' grants, ' + denies.length + ' denies');
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Permissions updated for ' + email + '.', grants: grants.length, denies: denies.length });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CASCADING UPDATE — Atomic Multi-Table Sync
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Cascades shared-field changes across all linked tables in one pass.
 * Call from any handler that edits name, email, phone, or photo.
 *
 * @param {string} email     — current email of the person
 * @param {Object} changes   — { firstName, lastName, newEmail, phone, photoUrl }
 * @param {Object} auth      — authenticated user context
 */
function cascadeUpdate_(email, changes, auth) {
  var target = normalizeEmail(email);
  if (!target) return;
  var now = isoNow();

  // Reuse cached spreadsheet from getTab() if available, else open once
  var ss = _ssCache || SpreadsheetApp.openById(
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID')
  );

  // ── AuthUsers (cols: A=email, E=firstName, F=lastName) ──────────
  try {
    var auSheet = ss.getSheetByName('AuthUsers');
    if (auSheet && auSheet.getLastRow() >= 2) {
      var auData = auSheet.getRange(2, 1, auSheet.getLastRow() - 1, 10).getValues();
      for (var a = 0; a < auData.length; a++) {
        if (normalizeEmail(auData[a][0]) === target) {
          var auRow = auData[a].slice();
          if (changes.firstName != null) auRow[4] = changes.firstName;
          if (changes.lastName != null)  auRow[5] = changes.lastName;
          if (changes.newEmail)          auRow[0] = normalizeEmail(changes.newEmail);
          auRow[9] = now;
          auSheet.getRange(a + 2, 1, 1, 10).setValues([auRow]);
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (e) { /* skip */ }

  // ── AccessControl (cols: A=email, C=displayName) ────────────────
  try {
    var acSheet = ss.getSheetByName('AccessControl');
    if (acSheet && acSheet.getLastRow() >= 2) {
      var acData = acSheet.getRange(2, 1, acSheet.getLastRow() - 1, 8).getValues();
      for (var b = 0; b < acData.length; b++) {
        if (normalizeEmail(acData[b][0]) === target) {
          var acRow = acData[b].slice();
          if (changes.newEmail) acRow[0] = normalizeEmail(changes.newEmail);
          if (changes.firstName != null || changes.lastName != null) {
            var fn = changes.firstName != null ? changes.firstName : String(acRow[2] || '').split(' ')[0];
            var ln = changes.lastName != null ? changes.lastName : (String(acRow[2] || '').split(' ').slice(1).join(' '));
            acRow[2] = (fn + ' ' + ln).trim();
          }
          acRow[7] = now;
          acSheet.getRange(b + 2, 1, 1, 8).setValues([acRow]);
          invalidateAcCache_();
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (e) { /* skip */ }

  // ── Members (cols: B=first, C=last, H=photo, I=email, K=cell) ──
  try {
    var mSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Members');
    if (mSheet && mSheet.getLastRow() >= 2) {
      var mCols = mSheet.getLastColumn();
      var mAllData = mSheet.getRange(2, 1, mSheet.getLastRow() - 1, mCols).getValues();
      for (var m = 0; m < mAllData.length; m++) {
        if (normalizeEmail(mAllData[m][8]) === target) {  // col I (0-indexed: 8)
          var mRow = mAllData[m].slice();
          if (changes.firstName != null) mRow[1]  = changes.firstName;
          if (changes.lastName != null)  mRow[2]  = changes.lastName;
          if (changes.photoUrl != null)  mRow[7]  = changes.photoUrl;
          if (changes.newEmail)          mRow[8]  = normalizeEmail(changes.newEmail);
          if (changes.phone != null)     mRow[10] = changes.phone;
          mRow[46] = auth.email;  // AU = Updated By (0-indexed)
          mRow[47] = now;         // AV = Updated At (0-indexed)
          mSheet.getRange(m + 2, 1, 1, mCols).setValues([mRow]);
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (e) { /* skip */ }

  // ── MemberCards (cols: C=email, D=first, E=last, H=photo, M=phone) ──
  try {
    var mcSheet = ss.getSheetByName('MemberCards');
    if (mcSheet && mcSheet.getLastRow() >= 2) {
      var mcCols = mcSheet.getLastColumn();
      var mcAllData = mcSheet.getRange(2, 1, mcSheet.getLastRow() - 1, mcCols).getValues();
      for (var c = 0; c < mcAllData.length; c++) {
        if (normalizeEmail(mcAllData[c][2]) === target) {  // col C (0-indexed: 2)
          var mcRow = mcAllData[c].slice();
          if (changes.firstName != null) mcRow[3]  = changes.firstName;
          if (changes.lastName != null)  mcRow[4]  = changes.lastName;
          if (changes.photoUrl != null)  mcRow[7]  = changes.photoUrl;
          if (changes.newEmail)          mcRow[2]  = normalizeEmail(changes.newEmail);
          if (changes.phone != null)     mcRow[12] = changes.phone;
          mcRow[29] = now;  // col 30 (0-indexed: 29) = Updated At
          mcSheet.getRange(c + 2, 1, 1, mcCols).setValues([mcRow]);
          break;
        }
      }
    }
  } catch (e) { /* skip */ }

  // ── UserProfiles (col A=email) ──────────────────────────────────
  if (changes.newEmail) {
    try {
      var upSheet = ss.getSheetByName('UserProfiles');
      if (upSheet && upSheet.getLastRow() >= 2) {
        var upData = upSheet.getRange(2, 1, upSheet.getLastRow() - 1, 1).getValues();
        for (var u = 0; u < upData.length; u++) {
          if (normalizeEmail(upData[u][0]) === target) {
            upSheet.getRange(u + 2, 1).setValue(normalizeEmail(changes.newEmail));
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (e) { /* skip */ }
  }

  // ── Permissions (col A=email) ───────────────────────────────────
  if (changes.newEmail) {
    try {
      var pSheet = ss.getSheetByName('Permissions');
      if (pSheet && pSheet.getLastRow() >= 2) {
        var pData = pSheet.getRange(2, 1, pSheet.getLastRow() - 1, 1).getValues();
        var newE = normalizeEmail(changes.newEmail);
        for (var p = 0; p < pData.length; p++) {
          if (normalizeEmail(pData[p][0]) === target) {
            pSheet.getRange(p + 2, 1).setValue(newE);
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (e) { /* skip */ }
  }

  // ── VolunteerSchedule (col B=email) ─────────────────────────────
  if (changes.newEmail) {
    try {
      var vsSheet = ss.getSheetByName('VolunteerSchedule');
      if (vsSheet && vsSheet.getLastRow() >= 2) {
        var vsData = vsSheet.getRange(2, 2, vsSheet.getLastRow() - 1, 1).getValues();
        for (var v = 0; v < vsData.length; v++) {
          if (normalizeEmail(vsData[v][0]) === target) {
            vsSheet.getRange(v + 2, 2).setValue(normalizeEmail(changes.newEmail));
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (e) { /* skip */ }
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'cascade.update', 'Multi', '', target + ' → ' + JSON.stringify(changes));
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Database.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: DATABASE — CRUD Handlers for New Tabs
// Follows the same patterns as members.gs, prayer.gs, contacts.gs, todo.gs
// in pastoral-server-v2. Uses the same helper functions (getTab, generateId,
// toBool, isoDate, isoNow, requireRole, hasRole, writeAudit, jsonOk, jsonErr,
// normalizeEmail, filterMemberForRole).
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PRAYER REQUESTS (PUBLIC SUBMIT)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var PR_SUBMIT_TAB = 'PrayerRequests';
var PR_SUBMIT_NUM_COLS = 18;

var PR_SUBMIT = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, NAME: 2, EMAIL: 3, PHONE: 4,
  TEXT: 5, CATEGORY: 6, CONFIDENTIAL: 7, FOLLOWUP_REQ: 8,
  STATUS: 9, ADMIN_NOTES: 10, ASSIGNED: 11,
  SUBMITTED_AT: 12, LAST_UPDATED: 13, UPDATED_BY: 14,
  ARCHIVED: 15, AUTO_LOG: 16, GROUP_ID: 17
};

function prayerSubmitBool_(value, defaultValue) {
  if (value === undefined || value === null || value === '') return !!defaultValue;
  var s = String(value).trim().toLowerCase();
  if (s === 'true' || s === '1' || s === 'yes' || s === 'y' || s === 'on') return true;
  if (s === 'false' || s === '0' || s === 'no' || s === 'n' || s === 'off') return false;
  return !!defaultValue;
}

function handlePrayerSubmitPublic_(params) {
  var submitterName = String(params.submitterName || '').trim();
  var submitterEmail = normalizeEmail(params.submitterEmail || params.email);
  var submitterPhone = String(params.submitterPhone || '').trim();
  var prayerText = String(params.prayerText || '').trim();
  var followUpMethod = String(params.followUpMethod || '').trim();
  var category = validateEnum(
    params.category,
    ['Health', 'Family', 'Financial', 'Spiritual', 'Grief', 'Praise', 'Other'],
    'Other'
  );

  if (!submitterName) return jsonErr('submitterName is required.');
  if (!prayerText) return jsonErr('prayerText is required.');
  if (!submitterEmail) return jsonErr('submitterEmail is required.');
  if (!isValidEmail(submitterEmail)) return jsonErr('submitterEmail is invalid.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(PR_SUBMIT_NUM_COLS);

  row[PR_SUBMIT.ID]           = generateId();
  row[PR_SUBMIT.MEMBER_ID]    = String(params.memberId || '');
  row[PR_SUBMIT.NAME]         = submitterName;
  row[PR_SUBMIT.EMAIL]        = submitterEmail;
  row[PR_SUBMIT.PHONE]        = submitterPhone;
  row[PR_SUBMIT.TEXT]         = prayerText;
  row[PR_SUBMIT.CATEGORY]     = category;
  row[PR_SUBMIT.CONFIDENTIAL] = prayerSubmitBool_(params.isConfidential, true);
  row[PR_SUBMIT.FOLLOWUP_REQ] = prayerSubmitBool_(params.followUpRequested, true);
  row[PR_SUBMIT.STATUS]       = 'New';
  row[PR_SUBMIT.ADMIN_NOTES]  = followUpMethod ? ('Follow-up method: ' + followUpMethod) : '';
  row[PR_SUBMIT.ASSIGNED]     = '';
  row[PR_SUBMIT.SUBMITTED_AT] = now;
  row[PR_SUBMIT.LAST_UPDATED] = now;
  row[PR_SUBMIT.UPDATED_BY]   = 'public-submit';
  row[PR_SUBMIT.ARCHIVED]     = false;
  row[PR_SUBMIT.AUTO_LOG]     = 'Submitted via API at ' + now;
  row[PR_SUBMIT.GROUP_ID]     = String(params.groupId || '');

  var sheet = getTab(PR_SUBMIT_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);

  writeAudit({ email: submitterEmail || 'anonymous', role: 'public' },
    'prayer.submit', PR_SUBMIT_TAB, row[PR_SUBMIT.ID],
    'Public prayer request from ' + submitterName);

  // Notify all pastors and admins if enabled
  if (String(getAppConfigValue_('NOTIFY_PRAYER_REQUEST', 'TRUE')).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE') {
    notifyPastorsAndAdmins_(
      'New Prayer Request',
      'A new prayer request has been submitted.\n\n' +
      '  Name:     ' + submitterName + '\n' +
      '  Email:    ' + (submitterEmail || '(not provided)') + '\n' +
      '  Phone:    ' + (submitterPhone || '(not provided)') + '\n' +
      '  Category: ' + (row[PR_SUBMIT.CATEGORY] || '') + '\n' +
      '  Follow-up requested: ' + (row[PR_SUBMIT.FOLLOWUP_REQ] ? 'Yes' : 'No') + '\n\n' +
      'Request ID: ' + row[PR_SUBMIT.ID],
      'prayer.submit',
      'NOTIF_PRAYER'
    );
  }

  return jsonOk({
    message: 'Prayer request submitted.',
    requestId: row[PR_SUBMIT.ID]
  });
}


/**
 * Public prayer list — returns only non-confidential, non-archived requests.
 * Strips sensitive columns (email, phone, admin notes, assigned).
 */
function handlePrayerListPublic_(params) {
  var sheet = getTab(PR_SUBMIT_TAB);
  var data  = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
  if (data.length < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var limit = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(params.limit, 10) || 50, 1), 200);
  var rows  = [];

  for (var i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
    var r = data[i];
    if (String(r[PR_SUBMIT.CONFIDENTIAL]).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE') continue;
    if (String(r[PR_SUBMIT.ARCHIVED]).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE') continue;

    rows.push({
      id:            r[PR_SUBMIT.ID],
      submitterName: r[PR_SUBMIT.NAME],
      prayerText:    r[PR_SUBMIT.TEXT],
      category:      r[PR_SUBMIT.CATEGORY],
      status:        r[PR_SUBMIT.STATUS],
      submittedAt:   r[PR_SUBMIT.SUBMITTED_AT]
    });

    if (rows.length >= limit) break;
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PRAYER REQUESTS (ADMIN — AUTHENTICATED)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function prayerRowToObject_(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:            rowIndex,
    id:               String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.ID] || ''),
    memberId:         String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    'Submitter Name': String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.NAME] || ''),
    submitterName:    String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.NAME] || ''),
    'Submitter Email':String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.EMAIL] || ''),
    submitterEmail:   String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.EMAIL] || ''),
    'Submitter Phone':String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.PHONE] || ''),
    submitterPhone:   String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.PHONE] || ''),
    'Prayer Text':    String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.TEXT] || ''),
    prayerText:       String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.TEXT] || ''),
    'Category':       String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.CATEGORY] || ''),
    category:         String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.CATEGORY] || ''),
    'Confidential':   String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.CONFIDENTIAL] || ''),
    isConfidential:   String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.CONFIDENTIAL] || ''),
    followUpRequested:String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.FOLLOWUP_REQ] || ''),
    status:           String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.STATUS] || ''),
    adminNotes:       String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.ADMIN_NOTES] || ''),
    assignedTo:       String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.ASSIGNED] || ''),
    submittedAt:      isoDate(vals[PR_SUBMIT.SUBMITTED_AT]),
    lastUpdated:      isoDate(vals[PR_SUBMIT.LAST_UPDATED]),
    updatedBy:        String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.UPDATED_BY] || ''),
    archived:         String(vals[PR_SUBMIT.ARCHIVED] || 'FALSE')
  };
}

function handlePrayerList_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  var sheet   = getTab(PR_SUBMIT_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data  = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, PR_SUBMIT_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var limit = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(params.limit, 10) || 300, 1), 1000);
  var rows  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][PR_SUBMIT.ARCHIVED]).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE') continue;
    rows.push(stripPrayerNotes_(prayerRowToObject_(data[i], i + 2), auth));
    if (rows.length >= limit) break;
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handlePrayerGet_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');
  var sheet   = getTab(PR_SUBMIT_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Not found.');
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, PR_SUBMIT_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][PR_SUBMIT.ID]) === params.id) {
      return jsonOk(stripPrayerNotes_(prayerRowToObject_(data[i], i + 2), auth));
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Prayer request not found.');
}

function handlePrayerUpdate_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');
  var sheet   = getTab(PR_SUBMIT_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Not found.');
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, PR_SUBMIT_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][PR_SUBMIT.ID]) === params.id) {
      var rowNum = i + 2;
      if (params.status)     sheet.getRange(rowNum, PR_SUBMIT.STATUS + 1).setValue(params.status);
      if (params.assignedTo !== undefined) sheet.getRange(rowNum, PR_SUBMIT.ASSIGNED + 1).setValue(params.assignedTo);
      if (params.adminNotes !== undefined) sheet.getRange(rowNum, PR_SUBMIT.ADMIN_NOTES + 1).setValue(params.adminNotes);
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, PR_SUBMIT.LAST_UPDATED + 1).setValue(isoNow());
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, PR_SUBMIT.UPDATED_BY + 1).setValue(auth.email || 'admin');
      writeAudit(auth, 'prayer.update', PR_SUBMIT_TAB, params.id, 'Status: ' + (params.status || 'unchanged'));
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Prayer request updated.', id: params.id });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Prayer request not found.');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ATTENDANCE  (aggregate per-service model: adults / children / total)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var ATT_TAB = 'Attendance';
var ATT_NUM_COLS = 9;

var ATT = {
  ID: 0, DATE: 1, SERVICE_TYPE: 2, ADULTS: 3,
  CHILDREN: 4, TOTAL: 5, NOTES: 6,
  RECORDED_BY: 7, CREATED_AT: 8
};

function attendanceRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  var adults   = Number(vals[ATT.ADULTS]   || 0);
  var children = Number(vals[ATT.CHILDREN] || 0);
  var total    = Number(vals[ATT.TOTAL]    || 0) || (adults + children);
  return {
    index:       rowIndex,
    id:          String(vals[ATT.ID] || ''),
    date:        isoDate(vals[ATT.DATE]),
    serviceType: String(vals[ATT.SERVICE_TYPE] || ''),
    adults:      adults,
    children:    children,
    total:       total,
    notes:       String(vals[ATT.NOTES] || ''),
    recordedBy:  String(vals[ATT.RECORDED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:   isoDate(vals[ATT.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleAttendanceList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab(ATT_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, ATT_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var dateFrom    = String(params.dateFrom    || '').trim();
  var dateTo      = String(params.dateTo      || '').trim();
  var serviceType = String(params.serviceType || '').trim();
  var limit       = Number(params.limit) || 0;
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = data.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    var obj = attendanceRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (serviceType && obj.serviceType !== serviceType) continue;
    if (dateFrom && obj.date && obj.date < dateFrom) continue;
    if (dateTo   && obj.date && obj.date > dateTo)   continue;
    rows.push(obj);
    if (limit && rows.length >= limit) break;
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleAttendanceGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');
  var sheet = getTab(ATT_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Attendance record not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, ATT_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][ATT.ID]) === String(params.id)) {
      return jsonOk({ row: attendanceRowToObject(data[i], i + 2) });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Attendance record not found.');
}

function handleAttendanceCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.date && !params.serviceDate) return jsonErr('date is required.');

  var now      = isoNow();
  var adults   = Number(params.adults   || 0);
  var children = Number(params.children || 0);
  var total    = Number(params.total    || 0) || (adults + children);
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    params.date || params.serviceDate || now.substring(0, 10),
    String(params.serviceType || 'Sunday AM'),
    adults,
    children,
    total,
    String(params.notes || ''),
    auth.email,
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(ATT_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'attendance.create', ATT_TAB, newIndex,
    (params.serviceType || 'Sunday AM') + ' — ' + total + ' total');

  return jsonOk({ row: attendanceRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleAttendanceUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(ATT_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Attendance record not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, ATT_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][ATT.ID]) === String(params.id)) {
      var rowNum = i + 2;
      if (params.date        !== undefined) data[i][ATT.DATE]         = params.date;
      if (params.serviceDate !== undefined) data[i][ATT.DATE]         = params.serviceDate;
      if (params.serviceType !== undefined) data[i][ATT.SERVICE_TYPE] = params.serviceType;
      if (params.adults      !== undefined) data[i][ATT.ADULTS]       = Number(params.adults);
      if (params.children    !== undefined) data[i][ATT.CHILDREN]     = Number(params.children);
      if (params.notes       !== undefined) data[i][ATT.NOTES]        = params.notes;
      // Recalculate total
      var adults   = Number(data[i][ATT.ADULTS]   || 0);
      var children = Number(data[i][ATT.CHILDREN] || 0);
      data[i][ATT.TOTAL] = Number(params.total || 0) || (adults + children);

      sheet.getRange(rowNum, 1, 1, ATT_NUM_COLS).setValues([data[i]]);

      writeAudit(auth, 'attendance.update', ATT_TAB, rowNum,
        'Updated: ' + (data[i][ATT.SERVICE_TYPE] || '') + ' on ' + (data[i][ATT.DATE] || ''));

      return jsonOk({ row: attendanceRowToObject(data[i], rowNum) });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Attendance record not found.');
}

function handleAttendanceBulkCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var records;
  try { records = typeof params.records === 'string' ? JSON.parse(params.records) : params.records; }
  catch (_) { records = null; }
  if (!Array.isArray(records) || !records.length) return jsonErr('records (array) is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var sheet = getTab(ATT_TAB);
  var batch = [];
  var created = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < records.length; i++) {
    var r = records[i];
    var adults   = Number(r.adults   || 0);
    var children = Number(r.children || 0);
    var total    = Number(r.total    || 0) || (adults + children);
    var row = [
      generateId(),
      r.date || r.serviceDate || now.substring(0, 10),
      String(r.serviceType || 'Sunday AM'),
      adults, children, total,
      String(r.notes || ''),
      auth.email,
      now
    ];
    batch.push(row);
    created.push(attendanceRowToObject(row, sheet.getLastRow() + i + 1));
  }
  if (batch.length) {
    sheet.getRange(sheet.getLastRow() + 1, 1, batch.length, ATT_NUM_COLS).setValues(batch);
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'attendance.bulkCreate', ATT_TAB, '',
    batch.length + ' records imported');

  return jsonOk({ rows: created, count: created.length });
}

function handleAttendanceSummary(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab(ATT_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ summary: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, ATT_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || '').trim();
  var dateTo   = String(params.dateTo   || '').trim();

  // Group by month
  var buckets = {};
  var grandAdults = 0, grandChildren = 0, grandTotal = 0, grandCount = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var d = isoDate(data[i][ATT.DATE]).substring(0, 10);
    if (dateFrom && d < dateFrom) continue;
    if (dateTo   && d > dateTo)   continue;
    var month = d.substring(0, 7); // YYYY-MM
    if (!buckets[month]) buckets[month] = { month: month, services: 0, adults: 0, children: 0, total: 0 };
    var adults   = Number(data[i][ATT.ADULTS]   || 0);
    var children = Number(data[i][ATT.CHILDREN] || 0);
    var total    = Number(data[i][ATT.TOTAL]    || 0) || (adults + children);
    buckets[month].services++;
    buckets[month].adults   += adults;
    buckets[month].children += children;
    buckets[month].total    += total;
    grandAdults   += adults;
    grandChildren += children;
    grandTotal    += total;
    grandCount++;
  }

  var summary = [];
  for (var k in buckets) {
    if (buckets.hasOwnProperty(k)) {
      var b = buckets[k];
      b.avgPerService = b.services ? Math.round(b.total / b.services) : 0;
      summary.push(b);
    }
  }
  summary.sort(function(a, b) { return a.month > b.month ? -1 : a.month < b.month ? 1 : 0; });

  return jsonOk({
    summary: summary,
    totals: { services: grandCount, adults: grandAdults, children: grandChildren, total: grandTotal,
              avgPerService: grandCount ? Math.round(grandTotal / grandCount) : 0 }
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EVENTS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var EV_TAB = 'Events';
var EV_NUM_COLS = 22;

var EV = {
  ID: 0, TITLE: 1, DESCRIPTION: 2, TYPE: 3, LOCATION: 4,
  START_DATE: 5, END_DATE: 6, START_TIME: 7, END_TIME: 8,
  RECURRING: 9, RECURRING_UNTIL: 10, CAPACITY: 11, RSVP_REQ: 12,
  MINISTRY: 13, CONTACT: 14, STATUS: 15, VISIBILITY: 16, NOTES: 17,
  CREATED_BY: 18, CREATED_AT: 19, UPDATED_BY: 20, UPDATED_AT: 21
};

// Visibility levels (hierarchical — higher role sees more)
var VIS_LEVELS = {
  'public': 0, 'members': 1, 'leaders': 2,
  'deacons': 3, 'pastors': 4, 'admins': 5, 'private': 6
};
var VIS_ROLE_MAP = {
  'public': 'readonly', 'members': 'volunteer', 'leaders': 'leader',
  'deacons': 'deacon', 'pastors': 'pastor', 'admins': 'admin', 'private': null
};

function eventRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[EV.ID] || ''),
    title:          String(vals[EV.TITLE] || ''),
    description:    String(vals[EV.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    eventType:      String(vals[EV.TYPE] || ''),
    location:       String(vals[EV.LOCATION] || ''),
    startDate:      isoDate(vals[EV.START_DATE]),
    endDate:        isoDate(vals[EV.END_DATE]),
    startTime:      String(vals[EV.START_TIME] || ''),
    endTime:        String(vals[EV.END_TIME] || ''),
    recurring:      String(vals[EV.RECURRING] || 'None'),
    recurringUntil: isoDate(vals[EV.RECURRING_UNTIL]),
    capacity:       Number(vals[EV.CAPACITY] || 0),
    rsvpRequired:   toBool(vals[EV.RSVP_REQ]),
    ministryTeam:   String(vals[EV.MINISTRY] || ''),
    contactPerson:  String(vals[EV.CONTACT] || ''),
    status:         String(vals[EV.STATUS] || ''),
    visibility:     String(vals[EV.VISIBILITY] || 'public').toLowerCase(),
    notes:          String(vals[EV.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:      String(vals[EV.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[EV.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedBy:      String(vals[EV.UPDATED_BY] || ''),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[EV.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// Public (no-auth) — returns only events whose visibility is 'public'
function handleEventsPublic(params) {
  var sheet = getTab(EV_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, EV_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = eventRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (String(obj.visibility || 'public').toLowerCase() !== 'public') continue;
    // Strip any fields that should only be visible to members
    delete obj.createdBy;
    delete obj.updatedBy;
    rows.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleEventsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = getTab(EV_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, EV_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var status = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var eventType = String(params.eventType || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = eventRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    if (eventType && obj.eventType !== eventType) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleEventsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var eventId = String(params.id || params.eventId || '').trim();
  if (!eventId) return jsonErr('id or eventId is required.');

  var hit = findRowById(db(), EV_TAB, EV_NUM_COLS, eventId);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Event not found.');
  return jsonOk({ row: eventRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex) });
}

function handleEventsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.title) return jsonErr('title is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(EV_NUM_COLS);

  row[EV.ID]              = generateId();
  row[EV.TITLE]           = String(params.title || '');
  row[EV.DESCRIPTION]     = String(params.description || '');
  row[EV.TYPE]            = String(params.eventType || 'Other');
  row[EV.LOCATION]        = String(params.location || '');
  row[EV.START_DATE]      = params.startDate || '';
  row[EV.END_DATE]        = params.endDate || '';
  row[EV.START_TIME]      = String(params.startTime || '');
  row[EV.END_TIME]        = String(params.endTime || '');
  row[EV.RECURRING]       = String(params.recurring || 'None');
  row[EV.RECURRING_UNTIL] = params.recurringUntil || '';
  row[EV.CAPACITY]        = Number(params.capacity || 0);
  row[EV.RSVP_REQ]        = toBool(params.rsvpRequired);
  row[EV.MINISTRY]        = String(params.ministryTeam || '');
  row[EV.CONTACT]         = String(params.contactPerson || auth.email);
  row[EV.STATUS]          = String(params.status || 'Planned');
  row[EV.VISIBILITY]      = String(params.visibility || 'public').toLowerCase();
  row[EV.NOTES]           = String(params.notes || '');
  row[EV.CREATED_BY]      = auth.email;
  row[EV.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  row[EV.UPDATED_BY]      = auth.email;
  row[EV.UPDATED_AT]      = now;

  var sheet = getTab(EV_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'events.create', EV_TAB, newIndex, params.title || '');
  return jsonOk({ row: eventRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleEventsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), EV_TAB, EV_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(EV_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  var now = isoNow();

  if (params.title != null)          existing[EV.TITLE]           = String(params.title);
  if (params.description != null)    existing[EV.DESCRIPTION]     = String(params.description);
  if (params.eventType != null)      existing[EV.TYPE]            = String(params.eventType);
  if (params.location != null)       existing[EV.LOCATION]        = String(params.location);
  if (params.startDate != null)      existing[EV.START_DATE]      = params.startDate;
  if (params.endDate != null)        existing[EV.END_DATE]        = params.endDate;
  if (params.startTime != null)      existing[EV.START_TIME]      = String(params.startTime);
  if (params.endTime != null)        existing[EV.END_TIME]        = String(params.endTime);
  if (params.recurring != null)      existing[EV.RECURRING]       = String(params.recurring);
  if (params.recurringUntil != null) existing[EV.RECURRING_UNTIL] = params.recurringUntil;
  if (params.capacity != null)       existing[EV.CAPACITY]        = Number(params.capacity || 0);
  if (params.rsvpRequired != null)   existing[EV.RSVP_REQ]        = toBool(params.rsvpRequired);
  if (params.ministryTeam != null)   existing[EV.MINISTRY]        = String(params.ministryTeam);
  if (params.contactPerson != null)  existing[EV.CONTACT]         = String(params.contactPerson);
  if (params.status != null)         existing[EV.STATUS]          = String(params.status);
  if (params.visibility != null)     existing[EV.VISIBILITY]      = String(params.visibility).toLowerCase();
  if (params.notes != null)          existing[EV.NOTES]           = String(params.notes);

  existing[EV.UPDATED_BY] = auth.email;
  existing[EV.UPDATED_AT] = now;

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, EV_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'events.update', EV_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[EV.TITLE] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: eventRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleEventsCancel(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), EV_TAB, EV_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(EV_TAB);

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, EV.STATUS + 1).setValue('Cancelled');
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, EV.UPDATED_BY + 1).setValue(auth.email);
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, EV.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(isoNow());

  var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, EV_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
  writeAudit(auth, 'events.cancel', EV_TAB, rowIndex, String(fresh[EV.TITLE] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: eventRowToObject(fresh, rowIndex) });
}

// ── Event RSVPs ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

var RSVP_TAB = 'EventRSVPs';
var RSVP_NUM_COLS = 8;

var RSVP = {
  ID: 0, EVENT_ID: 1, MEMBER_ID: 2, RESPONSE: 3,
  GUEST_COUNT: 4, NOTES: 5, RESPONDED_AT: 6, UPDATED_AT: 7
};

function rsvpRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:       rowIndex,
    id:          String(vals[RSVP.ID] || ''),
    eventId:     String(vals[RSVP.EVENT_ID] || ''),
    memberId:    String(vals[RSVP.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    response:    String(vals[RSVP.RESPONSE] || ''),
    guestCount:  Number(vals[RSVP.GUEST_COUNT] || 0),
    notes:       String(vals[RSVP.NOTES] || ''),
    respondedAt: isoDate(vals[RSVP.RESPONDED_AT]),
    updatedAt:   isoDate(vals[RSVP.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleEventsRsvp(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.eventId) return jsonErr('eventId is required.');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');
  if (!params.response) return jsonErr('response is required (Yes/No/Maybe).');

  var now = isoNow();
  var sheet = getTab(RSVP_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();

  // Check for existing RSVP and update it
  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, RSVP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      if (String(data[i][RSVP.EVENT_ID]) === String(params.eventId) &&
          String(data[i][RSVP.MEMBER_ID]) === String(params.memberId)) {
        var rowIdx = i + 2;
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, RSVP.RESPONSE + 1).setValue(String(params.response));
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, RSVP.GUEST_COUNT + 1).setValue(Number(params.guestCount || 0));
        if (params.notes != null) sheet.getRange(rowIdx, RSVP.NOTES + 1).setValue(String(params.notes));
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, RSVP.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(now);
        var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 1, 1, RSVP_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
        return jsonOk({ row: rsvpRowToObject(fresh, rowIdx), updated: true });
      }
    }
  }

  // New RSVP
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.eventId),
    String(params.memberId),
    String(params.response),
    Number(params.guestCount || 0),
    String(params.notes || ''),
    now,
    now
  ];

  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();
  writeAudit(auth, 'events.rsvp', RSVP_TAB, newIndex,
    'Event: ' + params.eventId + ' — ' + params.response);
  return jsonOk({ row: rsvpRowToObject(row, newIndex), updated: false });
}

function handleEventsRsvpList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.eventId) return jsonErr('eventId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(RSVP_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, RSVP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][RSVP.EVENT_ID]) !== String(params.eventId)) continue;
    rows.push(rsvpRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CALENDAR DELEGATION
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DEL_TAB = 'CalendarDelegation';
var DEL_NUM_COLS = 7;

var DEL = {
  ID: 0, OWNER_EMAIL: 1, DELEGATE_EMAIL: 2, PERMISSION: 3,
  GRANTED_AT: 4, EXPIRES_AT: 5, STATUS: 6
};

function delegationRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:         rowIndex,
    id:            String(vals[DEL.ID] || ''),
    ownerEmail:    String(vals[DEL.OWNER_EMAIL] || ''),
    delegateEmail: String(vals[DEL.DELEGATE_EMAIL] || ''),
    permission:    String(vals[DEL.PERMISSION] || 'view'),
    grantedAt:     isoDate(vals[DEL.GRANTED_AT]),
    expiresAt:     isoDate(vals[DEL.EXPIRES_AT]),
    status:        String(vals[DEL.STATUS] || 'active')
  };
}

function handleDelegationList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = getTab(DEL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, DEL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var email = auth.email.toLowerCase();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = delegationRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status !== 'active') continue;
    // Return delegations I own or that delegate to me
    if (obj.ownerEmail.toLowerCase() === email || obj.delegateEmail.toLowerCase() === email) {
      rows.push(obj);
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleDelegationGrant(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var delegateEmail = String(params.delegateEmail || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  if (!delegateEmail) return jsonErr('delegateEmail is required.');
  if (delegateEmail === auth.email.toLowerCase()) return jsonErr('Cannot delegate to yourself.');

  var permission = String(params.permission || 'view').toLowerCase();
  if (permission !== 'view' && permission !== 'manage') permission = 'view';

  // Check delegate exists in Users tab
  var usersSheet = getTab('Users');
  var uLastRow = usersSheet.getLastRow();
  var found = false;
  if (uLastRow >= 2) {
    var uData = usersSheet.getRange(2, 1, uLastRow - 1, 5).getValues();
    for (var u = 0; u < uData.length; u++) {
      if (String(uData[u][1] || '').toLowerCase() === delegateEmail) { found = true; break; }
    }
  }
  if (!found) return jsonErr('User not found: ' + delegateEmail);

  // Remove existing delegation if any
  var sheet = getTab(DEL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, DEL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      if (String(data[i][DEL.OWNER_EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === auth.email.toLowerCase() &&
          String(data[i][DEL.DELEGATE_EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === delegateEmail &&
          String(data[i][DEL.STATUS]) === 'active') {
        sheet.getRange(i + 2, DEL.STATUS + 1).setValue('revoked');
      }
    }
  }

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    auth.email.toLowerCase(),
    delegateEmail,
    permission,
    now,
    params.expiresAt || '',
    'active'
  ];
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();
  writeAudit(auth, 'delegation.grant', DEL_TAB, newIndex, 'Delegated to ' + delegateEmail);
  return jsonOk({ row: delegationRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleDelegationRevoke(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var delegationId = String(params.id || params.delegationId || '').trim();
  if (!delegationId) return jsonErr('id is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(DEL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Delegation not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, DEL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][DEL.ID]) === delegationId) {
      // Only owner or admin can revoke
      if (String(data[i][DEL.OWNER_EMAIL]).toLowerCase() !== auth.email.toLowerCase() &&
          !hasRole(auth, 'admin')) {
        return jsonErr('Forbidden: only the owner or admin can revoke.');
      }
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, DEL.STATUS + 1).setValue('revoked');
      writeAudit(auth, 'delegation.revoke', DEL_TAB, i + 2, 'Revoked delegation ' + delegationId);
      return jsonOk({ revoked: true });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Delegation not found.');
}

function handleDelegationDelegatedCalendars(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = getTab(DEL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var email = auth.email.toLowerCase();
  var owners = [];
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, DEL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][DEL.DELEGATE_EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === email &&
        String(data[i][DEL.STATUS]) === 'active') {
      // Check expiry
      var exp = String(data[i][DEL.EXPIRES_AT] || '').trim();
      if (exp && new Date(exp) < new Date()) continue;
      owners.push({
        ownerEmail: String(data[i][DEL.OWNER_EMAIL]),
        permission: String(data[i][DEL.PERMISSION] || 'view'),
        delegationId: String(data[i][DEL.ID])
      });
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: owners });
}

/**
 * Check if viewer has delegation access to ownerEmail's private events.
 */
function hasDelegation_(viewerEmail, ownerEmail) {
  try {
    var sheet = getTab(DEL_TAB);
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow < 2) return false;
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, DEL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      if (String(data[i][DEL.OWNER_EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === ownerEmail.toLowerCase() &&
          String(data[i][DEL.DELEGATE_EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === viewerEmail.toLowerCase() &&
          String(data[i][DEL.STATUS]) === 'active') {
        var exp = String(data[i][DEL.EXPIRES_AT] || '').trim();
        if (exp && new Date(exp) < new Date()) continue;
        return true;
      }
    }
  } catch (_) {}
  return false;
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SMALL GROUPS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SG_TAB = 'SmallGroups';
var SG_NUM_COLS = 16;

var SG = {
  ID: 0, NAME: 1, DESCRIPTION: 2, TYPE: 3,
  LEADER_ID: 4, CO_LEADER_ID: 5, MEETING_DAY: 6, MEETING_TIME: 7,
  LOCATION: 8, CAPACITY: 9, STATUS: 10, SEMESTER: 11,
  NOTES: 12, CREATED_BY: 13, CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function groupRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:        rowIndex,
    id:           String(vals[SG.ID] || ''),
    groupName:    String(vals[SG.NAME] || ''),
    description:  String(vals[SG.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    groupType:    String(vals[SG.TYPE] || ''),
    leaderId:     String(vals[SG.LEADER_ID] || ''),
    coLeaderId:   String(vals[SG.CO_LEADER_ID] || ''),
    meetingDay:   String(vals[SG.MEETING_DAY] || ''),
    meetingTime:  String(vals[SG.MEETING_TIME] || ''),
    location:     String(vals[SG.LOCATION] || ''),
    capacity:     Number(vals[SG.CAPACITY] || 0),
    status:       String(vals[SG.STATUS] || ''),
    semester:     String(vals[SG.SEMESTER] || ''),
    notes:        String(vals[SG.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:    String(vals[SG.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:    isoDate(vals[SG.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:    isoDate(vals[SG.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleGroupsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = getTab(SG_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SG_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var status = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = groupRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleGroupsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var groupId = String(params.groupId || '').trim();
  if (!groupId) return jsonErr('groupId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SG_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Group not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SG_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SG.ID]) === groupId) {
      return jsonOk({ row: groupRowToObject(data[i], i + 2) });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Group not found.');
}

function handleGroupsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.groupName) return jsonErr('groupName is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(SG_NUM_COLS);

  row[SG.ID]            = generateId();
  row[SG.NAME]          = String(params.groupName || '');
  row[SG.DESCRIPTION]   = String(params.description || '');
  row[SG.TYPE]          = String(params.groupType || 'Other');
  row[SG.LEADER_ID]     = String(params.leaderId || '');
  row[SG.CO_LEADER_ID]  = String(params.coLeaderId || '');
  row[SG.MEETING_DAY]   = String(params.meetingDay || '');
  row[SG.MEETING_TIME]  = String(params.meetingTime || '');
  row[SG.LOCATION]      = String(params.location || '');
  row[SG.CAPACITY]      = Number(params.capacity || 0);
  row[SG.STATUS]        = String(params.status || 'Active');
  row[SG.SEMESTER]      = String(params.semester || '');
  row[SG.NOTES]         = String(params.notes || '');
  row[SG.CREATED_BY]    = auth.email;
  row[SG.CREATED_AT]    = now;
  row[SG.UPDATED_AT]    = now;

  var sheet = getTab(SG_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'groups.create', SG_TAB, newIndex, params.groupName || '');
  return jsonOk({ row: groupRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleGroupsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SG_TAB, SG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SG_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.groupName != null)   existing[SG.NAME]          = String(params.groupName);
  if (params.description != null) existing[SG.DESCRIPTION]   = String(params.description);
  if (params.groupType != null)   existing[SG.TYPE]          = String(params.groupType);
  if (params.leaderId != null)    existing[SG.LEADER_ID]     = String(params.leaderId);
  if (params.coLeaderId != null)  existing[SG.CO_LEADER_ID]  = String(params.coLeaderId);
  if (params.meetingDay != null)  existing[SG.MEETING_DAY]   = String(params.meetingDay);
  if (params.meetingTime != null) existing[SG.MEETING_TIME]  = String(params.meetingTime);
  if (params.location != null)    existing[SG.LOCATION]      = String(params.location);
  if (params.capacity != null)    existing[SG.CAPACITY]      = Number(params.capacity || 0);
  if (params.status != null)      existing[SG.STATUS]        = String(params.status);
  if (params.semester != null)    existing[SG.SEMESTER]      = String(params.semester);
  if (params.notes != null)       existing[SG.NOTES]         = String(params.notes);
  existing[SG.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SG_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'groups.update', SG_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[SG.NAME] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: groupRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

// ── Small Group Membership ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

var SGM_TAB = 'SmallGroupMembers';
var SGM_NUM_COLS = 9;

var SGM = {
  ID: 0, GROUP_ID: 1, MEMBER_ID: 2, ROLE: 3,
  JOINED: 4, LEFT: 5, STATUS: 6, NOTES: 7, CREATED_AT: 8
};

function sgMemberRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:      rowIndex,
    id:         String(vals[SGM.ID] || ''),
    groupId:    String(vals[SGM.GROUP_ID] || ''),
    memberId:   String(vals[SGM.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    role:       String(vals[SGM.ROLE] || ''),
    joinedDate: isoDate(vals[SGM.JOINED]),
    leftDate:   isoDate(vals[SGM.LEFT]),
    status:     String(vals[SGM.STATUS] || ''),
    notes:      String(vals[SGM.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:  isoDate(vals[SGM.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleGroupsAddMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.groupId) return jsonErr('groupId is required.');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.groupId),
    String(params.memberId),
    String(params.role || 'Member'),
    params.joinedDate || now.substring(0, 10),
    '',
    'Active',
    String(params.notes || ''),
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(SGM_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'groups.addMember', SGM_TAB, newIndex,
    'Group: ' + params.groupId + ' + Member: ' + params.memberId);
  return jsonOk({ row: sgMemberRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleGroupsRemoveMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.groupId) return jsonErr('groupId is required.');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SGM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Membership not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SGM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SGM.GROUP_ID]) === String(params.groupId) &&
        String(data[i][SGM.MEMBER_ID]) === String(params.memberId) &&
        String(data[i][SGM.STATUS]) === 'Active') {
      var rowIdx = i + 2;
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, SGM.LEFT + 1).setValue(isoNow().substring(0, 10));
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, SGM.STATUS + 1).setValue('Inactive');
      var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 1, 1, SGM_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
      writeAudit(auth, 'groups.removeMember', SGM_TAB, rowIdx,
        'Group: ' + params.groupId + ' - Member: ' + params.memberId);
      return jsonOk({ row: sgMemberRowToObject(fresh, rowIdx) });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Active membership not found.');
}

function handleGroupsMembers(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.groupId) return jsonErr('groupId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SGM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SGM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var activeOnly = String(params.activeOnly || 'true').toUpperCase() !== 'FALSE';
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SGM.GROUP_ID]) !== String(params.groupId)) continue;
    var obj = sgMemberRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (activeOnly && obj.status !== 'Active') continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// GIVING / CONTRIBUTIONS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var GV_TAB = 'Giving';
var GV_NUM_COLS = 15;

var GV = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, DONOR_NAME: 2, AMOUNT: 3, CURRENCY: 4,
  DATE: 5, FUND: 6, METHOD: 7, CHECK_NUM: 8, TRANSACTION_REF: 9,
  TAX_DEDUCTIBLE: 10, NOTES: 11, RECORDED_BY: 12,
  CREATED_AT: 13, UPDATED_AT: 14
};

function givingRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[GV.ID] || ''),
    memberId:       String(vals[GV.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    donorName:      String(vals[GV.DONOR_NAME] || ''),
    amount:         Number(vals[GV.AMOUNT] || 0),
    currency:       String(vals[GV.CURRENCY] || 'USD'),
    date:           isoDate(vals[GV.DATE]),
    fund:           String(vals[GV.FUND] || ''),
    method:         String(vals[GV.METHOD] || ''),
    checkNumber:    String(vals[GV.CHECK_NUM] || ''),
    transactionRef: String(vals[GV.TRANSACTION_REF] || ''),
    isTaxDeductible:toBool(vals[GV.TAX_DEDUCTIBLE]),
    notes:          String(vals[GV.NOTES] || ''),
    recordedBy:     String(vals[GV.RECORDED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[GV.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[GV.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleGivingList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'treasurer');
  var sheet = getTab(GV_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, GV_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var memberId = String(params.memberId || '').trim();
  var fund = String(params.fund || '').trim();
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || '').trim();
  var dateTo = String(params.dateTo || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = givingRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (memberId && obj.memberId !== memberId) continue;
    if (fund && obj.fund !== fund) continue;
    if (dateFrom && obj.date && obj.date < dateFrom) continue;
    if (dateTo && obj.date && obj.date > dateTo) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleGivingCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'treasurer');
  if (!params.amount) return jsonErr('amount is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.memberId || ''),
    String(params.donorName || ''),
    Number(params.amount || 0),
    String(params.currency || 'USD'),
    params.date || now.substring(0, 10),
    String(params.fund || 'General'),
    String(params.method || 'Cash'),
    String(params.checkNumber || ''),
    String(params.transactionRef || ''),
    toBool(params.isTaxDeductible !== undefined ? params.isTaxDeductible : true),
    String(params.notes || ''),
    auth.email,
    now,
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(GV_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'giving.create', GV_TAB, newIndex,
    '$' + Number(params.amount || 0).toFixed(2) + ' — ' + (params.fund || 'General'));
  return jsonOk({ row: givingRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleGivingUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'treasurer');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), GV_TAB, GV_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(GV_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.memberId != null)       existing[GV.MEMBER_ID]       = String(params.memberId);
  if (params.donorName != null)      existing[GV.DONOR_NAME]      = String(params.donorName);
  if (params.amount != null)         existing[GV.AMOUNT]          = Number(params.amount);
  if (params.currency != null)       existing[GV.CURRENCY]        = String(params.currency);
  if (params.date != null)           existing[GV.DATE]            = params.date;
  if (params.fund != null)           existing[GV.FUND]            = String(params.fund);
  if (params.method != null)         existing[GV.METHOD]          = String(params.method);
  if (params.checkNumber != null)    existing[GV.CHECK_NUM]       = String(params.checkNumber);
  if (params.transactionRef != null) existing[GV.TRANSACTION_REF] = String(params.transactionRef);
  if (params.isTaxDeductible != null)existing[GV.TAX_DEDUCTIBLE]  = toBool(params.isTaxDeductible);
  if (params.notes != null)          existing[GV.NOTES]           = String(params.notes);
  existing[GV.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, GV_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'giving.update', GV_TAB, rowIndex,
    '$' + Number(existing[GV.AMOUNT] || 0).toFixed(2));
  return jsonOk({ row: givingRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleGivingSummary(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'treasurer');
  var sheet = getTab(GV_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ summary: { total: 0, byFund: {} } });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, GV_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || '').trim();
  var dateTo = String(params.dateTo || '').trim();
  var total = 0;
  var byFund = {};

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var date = isoDate(data[i][GV.DATE]).substring(0, 10);
    if (dateFrom && date < dateFrom) continue;
    if (dateTo && date > dateTo) continue;
    var amount = Number(data[i][GV.AMOUNT] || 0);
    var fund = String(data[i][GV.FUND] || 'Unspecified');
    total += amount;
    byFund[fund] = (byFund[fund] || 0) + amount;
  }

  return jsonOk({ summary: { total: total, byFund: byFund } });
}

function handleGivingMemberStatement(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'treasurer');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(GV_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ memberId: params.memberId, totalGiven: 0, records: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, GV_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var year = String(params.year || new Date().getFullYear());
  var records = [];
  var totalGiven = 0;

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][GV.MEMBER_ID]) !== String(params.memberId)) continue;
    var date = isoDate(data[i][GV.DATE]);
    if (year && date && !date.startsWith(year)) continue;
    var amount = Number(data[i][GV.AMOUNT] || 0);
    totalGiven += amount;
    records.push(givingRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }

  return jsonOk({ memberId: params.memberId, year: year, totalGiven: totalGiven, records: records });
}

// ── Pledges ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

var GP_TAB = 'GivingPledges';
var GP_NUM_COLS = 14;

var GP = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, FUND: 2, PLEDGE_AMOUNT: 3, FREQUENCY: 4,
  START_DATE: 5, END_DATE: 6, TOTAL_PLEDGED: 7, TOTAL_GIVEN: 8,
  STATUS: 9, NOTES: 10, CREATED_BY: 11, CREATED_AT: 12, UPDATED_AT: 13
};

function pledgeRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[GP.ID] || ''),
    memberId:       String(vals[GP.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    fund:           String(vals[GP.FUND] || ''),
    pledgeAmount:   Number(vals[GP.PLEDGE_AMOUNT] || 0),
    frequency:      String(vals[GP.FREQUENCY] || ''),
    startDate:      isoDate(vals[GP.START_DATE]),
    endDate:        isoDate(vals[GP.END_DATE]),
    totalPledged:   Number(vals[GP.TOTAL_PLEDGED] || 0),
    totalGiven:     Number(vals[GP.TOTAL_GIVEN] || 0),
    status:         String(vals[GP.STATUS] || ''),
    notes:          String(vals[GP.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:      String(vals[GP.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[GP.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[GP.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleGivingPledgesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'treasurer');
  var sheet = getTab(GP_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, GP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var memberId = String(params.memberId || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (memberId && String(data[i][GP.MEMBER_ID]) !== memberId) continue;
    rows.push(pledgeRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleGivingPledgesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'treasurer');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');
  if (!params.pledgeAmount) return jsonErr('pledgeAmount is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.memberId),
    String(params.fund || 'General'),
    Number(params.pledgeAmount || 0),
    String(params.frequency || 'Monthly'),
    params.startDate || now.substring(0, 10),
    params.endDate || '',
    Number(params.totalPledged || 0),
    0,
    'Active',
    String(params.notes || ''),
    auth.email,
    now,
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(GP_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'giving.pledges.create', GP_TAB, newIndex,
    'Member: ' + params.memberId + ' — $' + Number(params.pledgeAmount || 0).toFixed(2));
  return jsonOk({ row: pledgeRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// VOLUNTEER SCHEDULE
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var VS_TAB = 'VolunteerSchedule';
var VS_NUM_COLS = 13;

var VS = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MINISTRY: 2, ROLE: 3,
  SCHEDULED_DATE: 4, SERVICE_TYPE: 5, STATUS: 6,
  SWAP_REQUESTED: 7, SWAP_WITH: 8, NOTES: 9,
  SCHEDULED_BY: 10, CREATED_AT: 11, UPDATED_AT: 12
};

function volunteerRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[VS.ID] || ''),
