    memberId:       String(vals[VS.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    ministryTeam:   String(vals[VS.MINISTRY] || ''),
    role:           String(vals[VS.ROLE] || ''),
    scheduledDate:  isoDate(vals[VS.SCHEDULED_DATE]),
    serviceType:    String(vals[VS.SERVICE_TYPE] || ''),
    status:         String(vals[VS.STATUS] || ''),
    swapRequested:  toBool(vals[VS.SWAP_REQUESTED]),
    swapWith:       String(vals[VS.SWAP_WITH] || ''),
    notes:          String(vals[VS.NOTES] || ''),
    scheduledBy:    String(vals[VS.SCHEDULED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[VS.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[VS.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleVolunteersList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab(VS_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, VS_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var memberId = String(params.memberId || '').trim();
  var ministry = String(params.ministryTeam || '').trim();
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || '').trim();
  var dateTo = String(params.dateTo || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = volunteerRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (memberId && obj.memberId !== memberId) continue;
    if (ministry && obj.ministryTeam !== ministry) continue;
    if (dateFrom && obj.scheduledDate && obj.scheduledDate < dateFrom) continue;
    if (dateTo && obj.scheduledDate && obj.scheduledDate > dateTo) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleVolunteersSchedule(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || '').trim();
  var dateTo = String(params.dateTo || '').trim();
  if (!dateFrom || !dateTo) return jsonErr('dateFrom and dateTo are required.');

  var sheet = getTab(VS_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ schedule: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, VS_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var schedule = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = volunteerRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.scheduledDate && obj.scheduledDate >= dateFrom && obj.scheduledDate <= dateTo) {
      schedule.push(obj);
    }
  }

  schedule.sort(function(a, b) {
    return a.scheduledDate > b.scheduledDate ? 1 : a.scheduledDate < b.scheduledDate ? -1 : 0;
  });

  return jsonOk({ schedule: schedule });
}

function handleVolunteersCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');
  if (!params.scheduledDate) return jsonErr('scheduledDate is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.memberId),
    String(params.ministryTeam || 'Other'),
    String(params.role || ''),
    params.scheduledDate,
    String(params.serviceType || 'Sunday AM'),
    'Scheduled',
    false,
    '',
    String(params.notes || ''),
    auth.email,
    now,
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(VS_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'volunteers.create', VS_TAB, newIndex,
    'Member: ' + params.memberId + ' — ' + (params.ministryTeam || 'Other'));
  return jsonOk({ row: volunteerRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleVolunteersUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), VS_TAB, VS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(VS_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.ministryTeam != null)   existing[VS.MINISTRY]       = String(params.ministryTeam);
  if (params.role != null)           existing[VS.ROLE]            = String(params.role);
  if (params.scheduledDate != null)  existing[VS.SCHEDULED_DATE]  = params.scheduledDate;
  if (params.serviceType != null)    existing[VS.SERVICE_TYPE]    = String(params.serviceType);
  if (params.status != null)         existing[VS.STATUS]          = String(params.status);
  if (params.swapRequested != null)  existing[VS.SWAP_REQUESTED]  = toBool(params.swapRequested);
  if (params.swapWith != null)       existing[VS.SWAP_WITH]       = String(params.swapWith);
  if (params.notes != null)          existing[VS.NOTES]           = String(params.notes);
  existing[VS.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, VS_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'volunteers.update', VS_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ row: volunteerRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleVolunteersSwap(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), VS_TAB, VS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(VS_TAB);

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, VS.SWAP_REQUESTED + 1).setValue(true);
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, VS.SWAP_WITH + 1).setValue(String(params.swapWith || ''));
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, VS.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(isoNow());

  var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, VS_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
  writeAudit(auth, 'volunteers.swap', VS_TAB, rowIndex, 'Swap requested');
  return jsonOk({ row: volunteerRowToObject(fresh, rowIndex) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMUNICATIONS LOG
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CM_TAB = 'Communications';
var CM_NUM_COLS = 13;

var CM = {
  ID: 0, TYPE: 1, SUBJECT: 2, BODY: 3, AUDIENCE: 4,
  AUDIENCE_FILTER: 5, SENT_AT: 6, SENT_BY: 7,
  RECIPIENT_COUNT: 8, STATUS: 9, SCHEDULED_FOR: 10,
  NOTES: 11, CREATED_AT: 12
};

function commsRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[CM.ID] || ''),
    type:           String(vals[CM.TYPE] || ''),
    subject:        String(vals[CM.SUBJECT] || ''),
    body:           String(vals[CM.BODY] || ''),
    audience:       String(vals[CM.AUDIENCE] || ''),
    audienceFilter: String(vals[CM.AUDIENCE_FILTER] || ''),
    sentAt:         isoDate(vals[CM.SENT_AT]),
    sentBy:         String(vals[CM.SENT_BY] || ''),
    recipientCount: Number(vals[CM.RECIPIENT_COUNT] || 0),
    status:         String(vals[CM.STATUS] || ''),
    scheduledFor:   isoDate(vals[CM.SCHEDULED_FOR]),
    notes:          String(vals[CM.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[CM.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleCommsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab(CM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    rows.push(commsRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleCommsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.subject) return jsonErr('subject is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.type || 'Announcement'),
    String(params.subject || ''),
    String(params.body || ''),
    String(params.audience || 'All'),
    String(params.audienceFilter || ''),
    '',
    '',
    0,
    'Draft',
    params.scheduledFor || '',
    String(params.notes || ''),
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(CM_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'comms.create', CM_TAB, newIndex, params.subject || '');
  return jsonOk({ row: commsRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleCommsSend(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), CM_TAB, CM_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(CM_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  var audience = String(existing[CM.AUDIENCE] || 'All');
  var filter = String(existing[CM.AUDIENCE_FILTER] || '');

  // Resolve recipients from Members tab
  var recipientEmails = resolveAudienceEmails(audience, filter);
  var sentCount = 0;

  // Send via GmailApp (basic email blast)
  var subject = String(existing[CM.SUBJECT] || 'Church Update');
  var body = String(existing[CM.BODY] || '');

  for (var i = 0; i < recipientEmails.length; i++) {
    try {
      GmailApp.sendEmail(recipientEmails[i], subject, body);
      sentCount++;
    } catch (err) {
      // Log but don't fail the whole batch
    }
  }

  var now = isoNow();
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, CM.SENT_AT + 1).setValue(now);
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, CM.SENT_BY + 1).setValue(auth.email);
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, CM.RECIPIENT_COUNT + 1).setValue(sentCount);
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, CM.STATUS + 1).setValue('Sent');

  writeAudit(auth, 'comms.send', CM_TAB, rowIndex,
    'Sent to ' + sentCount + ' recipients');

  var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, CM_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
  return jsonOk({ row: commsRowToObject(fresh, rowIndex), sentCount: sentCount });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// JOURNAL ENTRIES
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var JE_TAB = 'JournalEntries';
var JE_NUM_COLS = 10;

var JE = {
  ID: 0, USER_EMAIL: 1, TITLE: 2, ENTRY: 3, CATEGORY: 4,
  SCRIPTURE_REF: 5, MOOD: 6, PRIVATE: 7, CREATED_AT: 8, UPDATED_AT: 9
};

function journalRowToObject_(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:        rowIndex,
    id:           String(vals[JE.ID] || ''),
    userEmail:    String(vals[JE.USER_EMAIL] || ''),
    title:        String(vals[JE.TITLE] || ''),
    entry:        String(vals[JE.ENTRY] || ''),
    category:     String(vals[JE.CATEGORY] || ''),
    scriptureRef: String(vals[JE.SCRIPTURE_REF] || ''),
    mood:         String(vals[JE.MOOD] || ''),
    isPrivate:    String(vals[JE.PRIVATE] || 'TRUE').toUpperCase() === 'TRUE',
    createdAt:    isoDate(vals[JE.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:    isoDate(vals[JE.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleJournalList_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet   = getTab(JE_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data  = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, JE_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var limit = Math.min(Math.max(parseInt(params.limit, 10) || 200, 1), 1000);
  var email = normalizeEmail(auth.email);
  var rows  = [];
  for (var i = data.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if (normalizeEmail(data[i][JE.USER_EMAIL]) !== email) continue;
    rows.push(journalRowToObject_(data[i], i + 2));
    if (rows.length >= limit) break;
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleJournalGet_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');
  var sheet   = getTab(JE_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Not found.');
  var data  = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, JE_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var email = normalizeEmail(auth.email);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][JE.ID]) === params.id) {
      if (normalizeEmail(data[i][JE.USER_EMAIL]) !== email && !hasRole(auth, 'pastor')) {
        return jsonErr('Access denied.');
      }
      return jsonOk(journalRowToObject_(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Journal entry not found.');
}

function handleJournalCreate_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var title = String(params.title || '').trim();
  var entry = String(params.entry || '').trim();
  if (!entry) return jsonErr('Entry text is required.');

  var category = validateEnum(
    params.category,
    ['Prayer', 'Devotional', 'Study', 'Reflection', 'Gratitude', 'Other'],
    'Reflection'
  );
  var mood = validateEnum(
    params.mood,
    ['Grateful', 'Joyful', 'Peaceful', 'Struggling', 'Seeking', 'Hopeful', ''],
    ''
  );
  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(JE_NUM_COLS);
  row[JE.ID]            = generateId();
  row[JE.USER_EMAIL]    = normalizeEmail(auth.email);
  row[JE.TITLE]         = title || 'Untitled';
  row[JE.ENTRY]         = entry;
  row[JE.CATEGORY]      = category;
  row[JE.SCRIPTURE_REF] = String(params.scriptureRef || '').trim();
  row[JE.MOOD]          = mood;
  row[JE.PRIVATE]       = params.isPrivate === false ? false : true;
  row[JE.CREATED_AT]    = now;
  row[JE.UPDATED_AT]    = now;

  var sheet = getTab(JE_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);

  writeAudit(auth, 'journal.create', JE_TAB, row[JE.ID], title || 'Untitled');
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Journal entry created.', id: row[JE.ID] });
}

function handleJournalUpdate_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');
  var sheet   = getTab(JE_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Not found.');
  var data  = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, JE_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var email = normalizeEmail(auth.email);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][JE.ID]) === params.id) {
      if (normalizeEmail(data[i][JE.USER_EMAIL]) !== email) return jsonErr('Access denied.');
      var rowNum = i + 2;
      if (params.title !== undefined)       sheet.getRange(rowNum, JE.TITLE + 1).setValue(params.title);
      if (params.entry !== undefined)       sheet.getRange(rowNum, JE.ENTRY + 1).setValue(params.entry);
      if (params.category !== undefined)    sheet.getRange(rowNum, JE.CATEGORY + 1).setValue(params.category);
      if (params.scriptureRef !== undefined) sheet.getRange(rowNum, JE.SCRIPTURE_REF + 1).setValue(params.scriptureRef);
      if (params.mood !== undefined)        sheet.getRange(rowNum, JE.MOOD + 1).setValue(params.mood);
      if (params.isPrivate !== undefined)   sheet.getRange(rowNum, JE.PRIVATE + 1).setValue(params.isPrivate);
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, JE.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(isoNow());
      writeAudit(auth, 'journal.update', JE_TAB, params.id, params.title || 'updated');
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Journal entry updated.', id: params.id });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Journal entry not found.');
}

function handleJournalDelete_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');
  var sheet   = getTab(JE_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Not found.');
  var data  = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, JE_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var email = normalizeEmail(auth.email);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][JE.ID]) === params.id) {
      if (normalizeEmail(data[i][JE.USER_EMAIL]) !== email) return jsonErr('Access denied.');
      var title = String(data[i][JE.TITLE] || '');
      sheet.deleteRow(i + 2);
      writeAudit(auth, 'journal.delete', JE_TAB, params.id, title);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Journal entry deleted.', id: params.id });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Journal entry not found.');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CHECK-IN SESSIONS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CI_TAB = 'CheckInSessions';
var CI_NUM_COLS = 10;

var CI = {
  ID: 0, EVENT_ID: 1, NAME: 2, DATE: 3,
  OPENED_AT: 4, CLOSED_AT: 5, TOTAL: 6,
  OPENED_BY: 7, NOTES: 8, CREATED_AT: 9
};

function checkInRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:       rowIndex,
    id:          String(vals[CI.ID] || ''),
    eventId:     String(vals[CI.EVENT_ID] || ''),
    sessionName: String(vals[CI.NAME] || ''),
    date:        isoDate(vals[CI.DATE]),
    openedAt:    isoDate(vals[CI.OPENED_AT]),
    closedAt:    isoDate(vals[CI.CLOSED_AT]),
    totalCheckIns: Number(vals[CI.TOTAL] || 0),
    openedBy:    String(vals[CI.OPENED_BY] || ''),
    notes:       String(vals[CI.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:   isoDate(vals[CI.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleCheckInOpen(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var now = isoNow();
  var sessionName = String(params.sessionName || 'Service — ' + now.substring(0, 10));

  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.eventId || ''),
    sessionName,
    now.substring(0, 10),
    now,
    '',
    0,
    auth.email,
    String(params.notes || ''),
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(CI_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'checkin.open', CI_TAB, newIndex, sessionName);
  return jsonOk({ row: checkInRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleCheckInClose(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), CI_TAB, CI_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(CI_TAB);
  var row = hit.vals.slice();
  row[CI.CLOSED_AT] = isoNow();

  // Count attendance records for this session date
  var sessionDate = String(row[CI.DATE] || '');
  var attSheet = getTab(ATT_TAB);
  var attLastRow = attSheet.getLastRow();
  var count = 0;
  if (attLastRow >= 2) {
    var dates = attSheet.getRange(2, ATT.SERVICE_DATE + 1, attLastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < dates.length; i++) {
      if (isoDate(dates[i][0]).substring(0, 10) === sessionDate.substring(0, 10)) count++;
    }
  }
  row[CI.TOTAL] = count;
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, CI_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write

  writeAudit(auth, 'checkin.close', CI_TAB, rowIndex, 'Total: ' + count);
  return jsonOk({ row: checkInRowToObject(row, rowIndex) });
}

function handleCheckInRecord(params, auth) {
  // Alias: creates an attendance record during an active session
  return handleAttendanceCreate(params, auth);
}

function handleCheckInSessions(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab(CI_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CI_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    rows.push(checkInRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CALENDAR EVENTS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CAL_TAB = 'CalendarEvents';
var CAL_NUM_COLS = 18;

var CAL = {
  EVENT_ID: 0, EMAIL: 1, TITLE: 2, DESCRIPTION: 3,
  START: 4, END: 5, LOCATION: 6, ATTENDEES: 7,
  COLOR: 8, IS_ALL_DAY: 9, RECURRENCE: 10, VISIBILITY: 11,
  SHARED_WITH: 12, DELEGATED_TO: 13,
  CREATED_AT: 14, CREATED_BY: 15, UPDATED_AT: 16, UPDATED_BY: 17
};

function calEventToObject_(row, rowNum) {
  return {
    rowNum: rowNum,
    EventID:       row[CAL.EVENT_ID],
    Email:         row[CAL.EMAIL],
    Title:         row[CAL.TITLE],
    Description:   row[CAL.DESCRIPTION],
    StartDateTime: row[CAL.START] instanceof Date ? row[CAL.START].toISOString() : String(row[CAL.START] || ''),
    EndDateTime:   row[CAL.END]   instanceof Date ? row[CAL.END].toISOString()   : String(row[CAL.END] || ''),
    Location:      row[CAL.LOCATION],
    Attendees:     row[CAL.ATTENDEES],
    Color:         row[CAL.COLOR],
    IsAllDay:      String(row[CAL.IS_ALL_DAY]).toLowerCase() === 'true',
    RecurrenceRule:row[CAL.RECURRENCE],
    Visibility:    row[CAL.VISIBILITY],
    SharedWith:    row[CAL.SHARED_WITH],
    DelegatedTo:   row[CAL.DELEGATED_TO],
    CreatedAt:     row[CAL.CREATED_AT] instanceof Date ? row[CAL.CREATED_AT].toISOString() : String(row[CAL.CREATED_AT] || ''),
    CreatedBy:     row[CAL.CREATED_BY],
    UpdatedAt:     row[CAL.UPDATED_AT] instanceof Date ? row[CAL.UPDATED_AT].toISOString() : String(row[CAL.UPDATED_AT] || ''),
    UpdatedBy:     row[CAL.UPDATED_BY]
  };
}

function handleCalendarEventsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = getTab(CAL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CAL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  var email = normalizeEmail(auth.email);
  var from = params.from || '';
  var to = params.to || '';

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = calEventToObject_(data[i], i + 2);
    // Date range filter
    if (from && obj.StartDateTime < from) continue;
    if (to && obj.StartDateTime > to) continue;
    // Visibility filter: private events only visible to owner, shared, or admin
    if (obj.Visibility === 'private') {
      if (normalizeEmail(obj.Email) !== email &&
          (obj.SharedWith || '').toLowerCase().indexOf(email) === -1 &&
          !hasRole(auth, 'admin')) continue;
    }
    rows.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleCalendarEventsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var eventId = params.eventId || params.EventID || '';
  if (!eventId) return jsonErr('eventId required');

  var sheet = getTab(CAL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Event not found');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CAL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (data[i][CAL.EVENT_ID] === eventId) {
      return jsonOk(calEventToObject_(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Event not found');
}

function handleCalendarEventsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(CAL_TAB);
  var now = isoNow();
  var eventId = generateId();

  var row = new Array(CAL_NUM_COLS);
  row[CAL.EVENT_ID]   = eventId;
  row[CAL.EMAIL]       = normalizeEmail(auth.email);
  row[CAL.TITLE]       = String(params.Title || params.title || '').trim();
  row[CAL.DESCRIPTION] = String(params.Description || params.description || '');
  row[CAL.START]       = params.StartDateTime || params.start || '';
  row[CAL.END]         = params.EndDateTime || params.end || '';
  row[CAL.LOCATION]    = String(params.Location || params.location || '');
  row[CAL.ATTENDEES]   = String(params.Attendees || params.attendees || '');
  row[CAL.COLOR]       = String(params.Color || params.color || '#6366f1');
  row[CAL.IS_ALL_DAY]  = params.IsAllDay === true || String(params.IsAllDay || '').toLowerCase() === 'true' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[CAL.RECURRENCE]  = String(params.RecurrenceRule || params.recurrence || '');
  row[CAL.VISIBILITY]  = String(params.Visibility || params.visibility || 'authenticated');
  row[CAL.SHARED_WITH] = String(params.SharedWith || '');
  row[CAL.DELEGATED_TO]= String(params.DelegatedTo || '');
  row[CAL.CREATED_AT]  = now;
  row[CAL.CREATED_BY]  = normalizeEmail(auth.email);
  row[CAL.UPDATED_AT]  = now;
  row[CAL.UPDATED_BY]  = normalizeEmail(auth.email);

  if (!row[CAL.TITLE]) return jsonErr('Title is required');

  sheet.appendRow(row);
  writeAudit(auth, 'calendar.create', CAL_TAB, eventId, 'Created: ' + row[CAL.TITLE]);
  return jsonOk({ EventID: eventId, message: 'Event created' });
}

function handleCalendarEventsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var eventId = params.eventId || params.EventID || '';
  if (!eventId) return jsonErr('eventId required');

  var sheet = getTab(CAL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Event not found');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CAL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var email = normalizeEmail(auth.email);

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (data[i][CAL.EVENT_ID] === eventId) {
      // Only owner, delegates, or admin can edit
      if (normalizeEmail(data[i][CAL.EMAIL]) !== email &&
          (data[i][CAL.DELEGATED_TO] || '').toLowerCase().indexOf(email) === -1 &&
          !hasRole(auth, 'admin')) {
        return jsonErr('Permission denied');
      }

      var r = i + 2;
      var row = data[i].slice();  // mutate in-memory
      if (params.Title !== undefined)         row[CAL.TITLE]       = params.Title;
      if (params.Description !== undefined)   row[CAL.DESCRIPTION] = params.Description;
      if (params.StartDateTime !== undefined) row[CAL.START]       = params.StartDateTime;
      if (params.EndDateTime !== undefined)   row[CAL.END]         = params.EndDateTime;
      if (params.Location !== undefined)      row[CAL.LOCATION]    = params.Location;
      if (params.Attendees !== undefined)     row[CAL.ATTENDEES]   = params.Attendees;
      if (params.Color !== undefined)         row[CAL.COLOR]       = params.Color;
      if (params.IsAllDay !== undefined)      row[CAL.IS_ALL_DAY]  = (params.IsAllDay === true || String(params.IsAllDay).toLowerCase() === 'true' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE');
      if (params.RecurrenceRule !== undefined) row[CAL.RECURRENCE]  = params.RecurrenceRule;
      if (params.Visibility !== undefined)    row[CAL.VISIBILITY]  = params.Visibility;
      if (params.SharedWith !== undefined)    row[CAL.SHARED_WITH] = params.SharedWith;
      if (params.DelegatedTo !== undefined)   row[CAL.DELEGATED_TO]= params.DelegatedTo;
      row[CAL.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();
      row[CAL.UPDATED_BY] = email;
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, CAL_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write

      writeAudit(auth, 'calendar.update', CAL_TAB, eventId, 'Updated event');
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Event updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Event not found');
}

function handleCalendarEventsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var eventId = params.eventId || params.EventID || '';
  if (!eventId) return jsonErr('eventId required');

  var sheet = getTab(CAL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Event not found');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CAL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var email = normalizeEmail(auth.email);

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (data[i][CAL.EVENT_ID] === eventId) {
      // Only owner or admin can delete
      if (normalizeEmail(data[i][CAL.EMAIL]) !== email && !hasRole(auth, 'admin')) {
        return jsonErr('Permission denied');
      }
      sheet.deleteRow(i + 2);
      writeAudit(auth, 'calendar.delete', CAL_TAB, eventId, 'Deleted event');
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Event deleted' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Event not found');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MEMBERS (pastoral roster — 51 columns)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MEM_TAB = 'Members';
var MEM_NUM_COLS = 51;

var MEM = {
  ID: 0, FIRST: 1, LAST: 2, PREFERRED: 3, SUFFIX: 4, DOB: 5, GENDER: 6,
  PHOTO: 7, EMAIL1: 8, EMAIL2: 9, CELL: 10, HOME_PH: 11, WORK_PH: 12,
  PREF_CONTACT: 13, ADDR1: 14, ADDR2: 15, CITY: 16, STATE: 17, ZIP: 18,
  COUNTRY: 19, STATUS: 20, MEMBER_SINCE: 21, FOUND_VIA: 22, BAPTISM: 23,
  SALVATION: 24, DEATH: 25, HOUSEHOLD: 26, FAMILY_ROLE: 27, MARITAL: 28,
  SPOUSE: 29, EMERG_NAME: 30, EMERG_PHONE: 31, MINISTRY_TEAMS: 32,
  VOL_ROLES: 33, GIFTS: 34, SMALL_GROUP: 35, PASTORAL_NOTES: 36,
  LAST_CONTACT: 37, NEXT_FOLLOWUP: 38, FOLLOWUP_PRI: 39, ASSIGNED_TO: 40,
  TAGS: 41, ARCHIVED: 42, ARCHIVE_REASON: 43, CREATED_BY: 44, CREATED_AT: 45,
  UPDATED_BY: 46, UPDATED_AT: 47, WEBSITE: 48, COLOR: 49, BG: 50
};

function memberToObject_(row, rowNum) {
  return {
    rowNum:           rowNum,
    id:               row[MEM.ID],
    firstName:        String(row[MEM.FIRST] || ''),
    lastName:         String(row[MEM.LAST] || ''),
    preferredName:    String(row[MEM.PREFERRED] || ''),
    suffix:           String(row[MEM.SUFFIX] || ''),
    dateOfBirth:      isoDate(row[MEM.DOB]),
    gender:           String(row[MEM.GENDER] || ''),
    photoUrl:         String(row[MEM.PHOTO] || ''),
    primaryEmail:     String(row[MEM.EMAIL1] || ''),
    secondaryEmail:   String(row[MEM.EMAIL2] || ''),
    cellPhone:        String(row[MEM.CELL] || ''),
    homePhone:        String(row[MEM.HOME_PH] || ''),
    workPhone:        String(row[MEM.WORK_PH] || ''),
    preferredContact: String(row[MEM.PREF_CONTACT] || ''),
    address1:         String(row[MEM.ADDR1] || ''),
    address2:         String(row[MEM.ADDR2] || ''),
    city:             String(row[MEM.CITY] || ''),
    state:            String(row[MEM.STATE] || ''),
    zip:              String(row[MEM.ZIP] || ''),
    country:          String(row[MEM.COUNTRY] || ''),
    membershipStatus: String(row[MEM.STATUS] || ''),
    memberSince:      isoDate(row[MEM.MEMBER_SINCE]),
    howTheyFoundUs:   String(row[MEM.FOUND_VIA] || ''),
    baptismDate:      isoDate(row[MEM.BAPTISM]),
    salvationDate:    isoDate(row[MEM.SALVATION]),
    dateOfDeath:      isoDate(row[MEM.DEATH]),
    householdId:      String(row[MEM.HOUSEHOLD] || ''),
    familyRole:       String(row[MEM.FAMILY_ROLE] || ''),
    maritalStatus:    String(row[MEM.MARITAL] || ''),
    spouseName:       String(row[MEM.SPOUSE] || ''),
    emergencyContact: String(row[MEM.EMERG_NAME] || ''),
    emergencyPhone:   String(row[MEM.EMERG_PHONE] || ''),
    ministryTeams:    String(row[MEM.MINISTRY_TEAMS] || ''),
    volunteerRoles:   String(row[MEM.VOL_ROLES] || ''),
    spiritualGifts:   String(row[MEM.GIFTS] || ''),
    smallGroup:       String(row[MEM.SMALL_GROUP] || ''),
    pastoralNotes:    String(row[MEM.PASTORAL_NOTES] || ''),
    lastContactDate:  isoDate(row[MEM.LAST_CONTACT]),
    nextFollowUp:     isoDate(row[MEM.NEXT_FOLLOWUP]),
    followUpPriority: String(row[MEM.FOLLOWUP_PRI] || ''),
    assignedTo:       String(row[MEM.ASSIGNED_TO] || ''),
    tags:             String(row[MEM.TAGS] || ''),
    archived:         String(row[MEM.ARCHIVED]).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE',
    archiveReason:    String(row[MEM.ARCHIVE_REASON] || ''),
    createdBy:        String(row[MEM.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:        isoDate(row[MEM.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedBy:        String(row[MEM.UPDATED_BY] || ''),
    updatedAt:        isoDate(row[MEM.UPDATED_AT]),
    website:          String(row[MEM.WEBSITE] || ''),
    colorScheme:      String(row[MEM.COLOR] || ''),
    bgScheme:         String(row[MEM.BG] || '')
  };
}

function handleMembersList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  var sheet = getTab(MEM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MEM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  var showArchived = String(params.showArchived || '').toLowerCase() === 'true';

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = memberToObject_(data[i], i + 2);
    if (!showArchived && obj.archived) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleMembersGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  var id = params.id || params.memberId || '';
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.email || '');
  if (!id && !email) return jsonErr('id or email required');

  var sheet = getTab(MEM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Member not found');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MEM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    // Match by ID first (exact UUID); only fall back to email when no ID supplied
    if ((id && data[i][MEM.ID] === id) ||
        (!id && email && normalizeEmail(data[i][MEM.EMAIL1]) === email)) {
      return jsonOk(memberToObject_(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Member not found');
}

function handleMembersCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  var sheet = getTab(MEM_TAB);
  var now = isoNow();
  var id = generateId();

  var row = new Array(MEM_NUM_COLS);
  row[MEM.ID]             = id;
  row[MEM.FIRST]          = String(params.firstName || '').trim();
  row[MEM.LAST]           = String(params.lastName || '').trim();
  row[MEM.PREFERRED]      = String(params.preferredName || '');
  row[MEM.SUFFIX]         = String(params.suffix || '');
  row[MEM.DOB]            = params.dateOfBirth || '';
  row[MEM.GENDER]         = String(params.gender || '');
  row[MEM.PHOTO]          = String(params.photoUrl || '');
  row[MEM.EMAIL1]         = String(params.primaryEmail || '');
  row[MEM.EMAIL2]         = String(params.secondaryEmail || '');
  row[MEM.CELL]           = String(params.cellPhone || params.phone || '');
  row[MEM.HOME_PH]        = String(params.homePhone || '');
  row[MEM.WORK_PH]        = String(params.workPhone || '');
  row[MEM.PREF_CONTACT]   = String(params.preferredContact || 'Email');
  row[MEM.ADDR1]          = String(params.address1 || '');
  row[MEM.ADDR2]          = String(params.address2 || '');
  row[MEM.CITY]           = String(params.city || '');
  row[MEM.STATE]          = String(params.state || '');
  row[MEM.ZIP]            = String(params.zip || '');
  row[MEM.COUNTRY]        = String(params.country || '');
  row[MEM.STATUS]         = String(params.membershipStatus || 'Active');
  row[MEM.MEMBER_SINCE]   = params.memberSince || now.substring(0, 10);
  row[MEM.FOUND_VIA]      = String(params.howTheyFoundUs || '');
  row[MEM.BAPTISM]        = params.baptismDate || '';
  row[MEM.SALVATION]      = params.salvationDate || '';
  row[MEM.DEATH]          = params.dateOfDeath || '';
  row[MEM.HOUSEHOLD]      = String(params.householdId || '');
  row[MEM.FAMILY_ROLE]    = String(params.familyRole || '');
  row[MEM.MARITAL]        = String(params.maritalStatus || '');
  row[MEM.SPOUSE]         = String(params.spouseName || '');
  row[MEM.EMERG_NAME]     = String(params.emergencyContact || '');
  row[MEM.EMERG_PHONE]    = String(params.emergencyPhone || '');
  row[MEM.MINISTRY_TEAMS] = String(params.ministryTeams || '');
  row[MEM.VOL_ROLES]      = String(params.volunteerRoles || '');
  row[MEM.GIFTS]          = String(params.spiritualGifts || '');
  row[MEM.SMALL_GROUP]    = String(params.smallGroup || '');
  row[MEM.PASTORAL_NOTES] = String(params.pastoralNotes || '');
  row[MEM.LAST_CONTACT]   = params.lastContactDate || '';
  row[MEM.NEXT_FOLLOWUP]  = params.nextFollowUp || '';
  row[MEM.FOLLOWUP_PRI]   = String(params.followUpPriority || 'Low');
  row[MEM.ASSIGNED_TO]    = String(params.assignedTo || '');
  row[MEM.TAGS]           = String(params.tags || '');
  row[MEM.ARCHIVED]       = 'FALSE';
  row[MEM.ARCHIVE_REASON] = '';
  row[MEM.CREATED_BY]     = auth.email;
  row[MEM.CREATED_AT]     = now;
  row[MEM.UPDATED_BY]     = auth.email;
  row[MEM.UPDATED_AT]     = now;
  row[MEM.WEBSITE]        = String(params.website || '');
  row[MEM.COLOR]          = String(params.colorScheme || '');
  row[MEM.BG]             = String(params.bgScheme || '');

  if (!row[MEM.FIRST] && !row[MEM.LAST]) return jsonErr('First or Last name required');

  sheet.appendRow(row);
  writeAudit(auth, 'members.create', MEM_TAB, id, row[MEM.FIRST] + ' ' + row[MEM.LAST]);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Member created' });
}

function handleMembersUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  var id = params.id || params.memberId || '';
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.email || '');
  if (!id && !email) return jsonErr('id or email required');

  var sheet = getTab(MEM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Member not found');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MEM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    // Match by ID first (exact UUID); only fall back to email when no ID supplied
    if ((id && data[i][MEM.ID] === id) ||
        (!id && email && normalizeEmail(data[i][MEM.EMAIL1]) === email)) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var fieldMap = {
        firstName: MEM.FIRST, lastName: MEM.LAST, preferredName: MEM.PREFERRED,
        suffix: MEM.SUFFIX, dateOfBirth: MEM.DOB, gender: MEM.GENDER,
        photoUrl: MEM.PHOTO, primaryEmail: MEM.EMAIL1, secondaryEmail: MEM.EMAIL2,
        cellPhone: MEM.CELL, homePhone: MEM.HOME_PH, workPhone: MEM.WORK_PH,
        preferredContact: MEM.PREF_CONTACT,
        address1: MEM.ADDR1, address2: MEM.ADDR2, city: MEM.CITY,
        state: MEM.STATE, zip: MEM.ZIP, country: MEM.COUNTRY,
        membershipStatus: MEM.STATUS, memberSince: MEM.MEMBER_SINCE,
        howTheyFoundUs: MEM.FOUND_VIA, baptismDate: MEM.BAPTISM,
        salvationDate: MEM.SALVATION, dateOfDeath: MEM.DEATH,
        householdId: MEM.HOUSEHOLD, familyRole: MEM.FAMILY_ROLE,
        maritalStatus: MEM.MARITAL, spouseName: MEM.SPOUSE,
        emergencyContact: MEM.EMERG_NAME, emergencyPhone: MEM.EMERG_PHONE,
        ministryTeams: MEM.MINISTRY_TEAMS, volunteerRoles: MEM.VOL_ROLES,
        spiritualGifts: MEM.GIFTS, smallGroup: MEM.SMALL_GROUP,
        pastoralNotes: MEM.PASTORAL_NOTES,
        lastContactDate: MEM.LAST_CONTACT, nextFollowUp: MEM.NEXT_FOLLOWUP,
        followUpPriority: MEM.FOLLOWUP_PRI, assignedTo: MEM.ASSIGNED_TO,
        tags: MEM.TAGS, archived: MEM.ARCHIVED, archiveReason: MEM.ARCHIVE_REASON,
        website: MEM.WEBSITE, colorScheme: MEM.COLOR, bgScheme: MEM.BG
      };
      var row = data[i].slice();   // work on in-memory copy
      for (var key in fieldMap) {
        if (params[key] !== undefined) {
          row[fieldMap[key]] = key === 'archived' ? (params[key] === true || String(params[key]).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE') : params[key];
        }
      }
      row[MEM.UPDATED_BY] = auth.email;
      row[MEM.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, MEM_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);   // single batch write

      // ── Cascade shared fields to AuthUsers, MemberCards, etc. ──
      // FIX: Always derive cascade email from the matched DB row, not params.email
      // (params.email may be the admin's session email injected by _call())
      var memberEmail = normalizeEmail(data[i][MEM.EMAIL1]);
      var cascadeFields = {};
      if (params.firstName !== undefined) cascadeFields.firstName = params.firstName;
      if (params.lastName !== undefined)  cascadeFields.lastName  = params.lastName;
      if (params.photoUrl !== undefined)  cascadeFields.photoUrl  = params.photoUrl;
      if (params.cellPhone !== undefined) cascadeFields.phone     = params.cellPhone;
      if (params.primaryEmail !== undefined && normalizeEmail(params.primaryEmail) !== memberEmail) {
        cascadeFields.newEmail = params.primaryEmail;
      }
      if (Object.keys(cascadeFields).length > 0) {
        try { cascadeUpdate_(memberEmail, cascadeFields, auth); } catch (_) {}
      }

      writeAudit(auth, 'members.update', MEM_TAB, data[i][MEM.ID], 'Updated member');
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Member updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Member not found');
}

function handleMembersDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var id = params.id || params.memberId || '';
  var email = normalizeEmail(params.email || params.targetEmail || '');
  if (!id && !email) return jsonErr('id or email required');

  var sheet = getTab(MEM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Member not found');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MEM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = data.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    if ((id && data[i][MEM.ID] === id) ||
        (!id && email && normalizeEmail(data[i][MEM.EMAIL1]) === email)) {
      var memberId = data[i][MEM.ID];
      var memberName = (data[i][MEM.FIRST] + ' ' + data[i][MEM.LAST]).trim();
      sheet.deleteRow(i + 2);
      writeAudit(auth, 'members.delete', MEM_TAB, memberId, 'Deleted member: ' + memberName);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Member deleted: ' + memberName });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Member not found');
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Api.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: API ROUTING LAYER
// Routes all expansion module actions.
// If using the self-contained auth (auth.gs), call via:
//   function doGet(e) { return expansionDoGet(e); }
//   function doPost(e) { return expansionDoPost(e); }
// If integrating into existing code.gs, add the integration block at the bottom.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function routeExpansionAction(action, params, auth) {
  // ── ToDo (Cross-Entity Task Management) ────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'todo.list')                return handleTodoList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.create')              return handleTodoCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.update')              return handleTodoUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.delete')              return handleTodoDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.archive')             return handleTodoArchive(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.unarchive')           return handleTodoUnarchive(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.complete')            return handleTodoComplete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.forEntity')           return handleTodoForEntity(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.myTasks')             return handleTodoMyTasks(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.overdue')             return handleTodoOverdue(params, auth);
  if (action === 'todo.dashboard')           return handleTodoDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── Attendance ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'attendance.list')          return handleAttendanceList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'attendance.get')           return handleAttendanceGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'attendance.create')        return handleAttendanceCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'attendance.update')        return handleAttendanceUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'attendance.bulkCreate')    return handleAttendanceBulkCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'attendance.summary')       return handleAttendanceSummary(params, auth);

  // ── Events ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'events.public')            return handleEventsPublic(params);   // no auth — public events only
  if (action === 'events.list')              return handleEventsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'events.get')               return handleEventsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'events.create')            return handleEventsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'events.update')            return handleEventsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'events.cancel')            return handleEventsCancel(params, auth);
  if (action === 'events.rsvp')              return handleEventsRsvp(params, auth);
  if (action === 'events.rsvpList')          return handleEventsRsvpList(params, auth);

  // ── Calendar Delegation ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'delegation.list')           return handleDelegationList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'delegation.grant')          return handleDelegationGrant(params, auth);
  if (action === 'delegation.revoke')         return handleDelegationRevoke(params, auth);
  if (action === 'delegation.calendars')      return handleDelegationDelegatedCalendars(params, auth);

  // ── Small Groups ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'groups.list')              return handleGroupsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'groups.get')               return handleGroupsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'groups.create')            return handleGroupsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'groups.update')            return handleGroupsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'groups.addMember')         return handleGroupsAddMember(params, auth);
  if (action === 'groups.removeMember')      return handleGroupsRemoveMember(params, auth);
  if (action === 'groups.members')           return handleGroupsMembers(params, auth);

  // ── Giving ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'giving.list')              return handleGivingList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'giving.create')            return handleGivingCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'giving.update')            return handleGivingUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'giving.summary')           return handleGivingSummary(params, auth);
  if (action === 'giving.memberStatement')   return handleGivingMemberStatement(params, auth);
  if (action === 'giving.pledges.list')      return handleGivingPledgesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'giving.pledges.create')    return handleGivingPledgesCreate(params, auth);

  // ── Volunteer Schedule ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'volunteers.list')          return handleVolunteersList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'volunteers.schedule')      return handleVolunteersSchedule(params, auth);
  if (action === 'volunteers.create')        return handleVolunteersCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'volunteers.update')        return handleVolunteersUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'volunteers.swap')          return handleVolunteersSwap(params, auth);

  // ── Communications (legacy) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'comms.list')               return handleCommsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.create')             return handleCommsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.send')               return handleCommsSend(params, auth);

  // ── Communications Hub: Messages ───────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'comms.messages.list')      return handleCommsMessagesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.messages.get')       return handleCommsMessagesGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.messages.send')      return handleCommsMessagesSend(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.messages.update')    return handleCommsMessagesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.messages.delete')    return handleCommsMessagesDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.messages.inbox')     return handleCommsMessagesInbox(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.messages.sent')      return handleCommsMessagesSent(params, auth);

  // ── Communications Hub: Threads ────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'comms.threads.list')       return handleCommsThreadsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.threads.get')        return handleCommsThreadsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.threads.create')     return handleCommsThreadsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.threads.update')     return handleCommsThreadsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.threads.archive')    return handleCommsThreadsArchive(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.threads.mute')       return handleCommsThreadsMute(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.threads.unmute')     return handleCommsThreadsUnmute(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.threads.addParticipant') return handleCommsThreadsAddParticipant(params, auth);

  // ── Communications Hub: Notifications ──────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'comms.notifications.list')        return handleCommsNotificationsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.notifications.unreadCount') return handleCommsNotificationsUnreadCount(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.notifications.markRead')    return handleCommsNotificationsMarkRead(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.notifications.dismiss')     return handleCommsNotificationsDismiss(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.notifications.create')      return handleCommsNotificationsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.notifications.broadcast')   return handleCommsNotificationsBroadcast(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.notifications.testEmail')    return handleCommsNotificationsTestEmail(params, auth);

  // ── Communications Hub: Notification Preferences ───────────────────────────
  if (action === 'comms.notifPrefs.get')    return handleCommsNotifPrefsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.notifPrefs.update') return handleCommsNotifPrefsUpdate(params, auth);

  // ── Communications Hub: Channels ───────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'comms.channels.list')     return handleCommsChannelsList(params, auth);

  // ── Communications Hub: Templates ──────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'comms.templates.list')    return handleCommsTemplatesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.templates.get')     return handleCommsTemplatesGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.templates.create')  return handleCommsTemplatesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.templates.update')  return handleCommsTemplatesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.templates.delete')  return handleCommsTemplatesDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'comms.templates.use')     return handleCommsTemplatesUse(params, auth);

  // ── Communications Hub: Read Receipts ──────────────────────────────────────

  // ── Communications Hub: Broadcast Log ──────────────────────────────────────

  // ── SMS Gateway (Twilio) ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

  // ── Communications Hub: Dashboard ──────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'comms.dashboard')         return handleCommsDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── Firebase (The Upper Room) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'firebase.token')          return handleFirebaseToken(params, auth);

  // ── User Preferences (theme sync) ─────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'user.preferences.get')    return handleUserPreferencesGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'user.preferences.update') return handleUserPreferencesUpdate(params, auth);

  // ── Check-In ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'checkin.open')             return handleCheckInOpen(params, auth);
  if (action === 'checkin.close')            return handleCheckInClose(params, auth);

  // ── Ministries ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'ministries.list')          return handleMinistriesList(params, auth);

  // ── Spiritual Care ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  if (action === 'care.interactions.list')   return handleCareInteractionsList(params, auth);

  if (action === 'care.interactions.followUpDone') return handleCareInteractionsFollowUpDone(params, auth);
  if (action === 'care.followUps.due')       return handleCareFollowUpsDue(params, auth);
  if (action === 'care.assignments.list')    return handleCareAssignmentsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'care.assignments.forMember') return handleCareAssignmentsForMember(params, auth);
  if (action === 'care.assignments.myFlock') return handleCareAssignmentsMyFlock(params, auth);

  if (action === 'care.assignments.reassign') return handleCareAssignmentsReassign(params, auth);
  if (action === 'care.caregivers.list')     return handleCareCaregiversList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'care.dashboard')           return handleCareDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── Outreach ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'outreach.contacts.list')   return handleOutreachContactsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'outreach.contacts.get')    return handleOutreachContactsGet(params, auth);

  if (action === 'outreach.campaigns.list')  return handleOutreachCampaignsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'outreach.campaigns.get')   return handleOutreachCampaignsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'outreach.campaigns.create') return handleOutreachCampaignsCreate(params, auth);

  if (action === 'outreach.followUps.list')  return handleOutreachFollowUpsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'outreach.followUps.create') return handleOutreachFollowUpsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'outreach.followUps.done')  return handleOutreachFollowUpsDone(params, auth);

  // ── Sermons & Preaching ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  if (action === 'compassion.requests.deny')    return handleCompassionRequestsDeny(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.requests.resolve') return handleCompassionRequestsResolve(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.followUps.due')    return handleCompassionFollowUpsDue(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.resources.list')   return handleCompassionResourcesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.resources.create') return handleCompassionResourcesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.resources.update') return handleCompassionResourcesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.resources.low')    return handleCompassionResourcesLow(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.log.create')       return handleCompassionLogCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.log.list')         return handleCompassionLogList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.log.recent')       return handleCompassionLogRecent(params, auth);
  if (action === 'compassion.dashboard')        return handleCompassionDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── Discipleship ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'discipleship.paths.list')          return handleDiscipleshipPathsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.paths.get')           return handleDiscipleshipPathsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.paths.create')        return handleDiscipleshipPathsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.paths.update')        return handleDiscipleshipPathsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.paths.publish')       return handleDiscipleshipPathsPublish(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.paths.archive')       return handleDiscipleshipPathsArchive(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.steps.list')          return handleDiscipleshipStepsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.steps.get')           return handleDiscipleshipStepsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.steps.create')        return handleDiscipleshipStepsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.steps.update')        return handleDiscipleshipStepsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.steps.delete')        return handleDiscipleshipStepsDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.steps.reorder')       return handleDiscipleshipStepsReorder(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.enrollments.list')    return handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.enrollments.get')     return handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.enrollments.create')  return handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.enrollments.update')  return handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.enrollments.advance') return handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsAdvance(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.enrollments.forMember') return handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsForMember(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.enrollments.complete') return handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsComplete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.mentoring.list')      return handleDiscipleshipMentoringList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.mentoring.get')       return handleDiscipleshipMentoringGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.mentoring.create')    return handleDiscipleshipMentoringCreate(params, auth);

  if (action === 'discipleship.mentoring.end')       return handleDiscipleshipMentoringEnd(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.mentoring.forMentor') return handleDiscipleshipMentoringForMentor(params, auth);

  if (action === 'discipleship.meetings.create')     return handleDiscipleshipMeetingsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.meetings.update')     return handleDiscipleshipMeetingsUpdate(params, auth);

  if (action === 'discipleship.resources.get')       return handleDiscipleshipResourcesGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.resources.create')    return handleDiscipleshipResourcesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.resources.update')    return handleDiscipleshipResourcesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.milestones.list')     return handleDiscipleshipMilestonesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.milestones.forMember') return handleDiscipleshipMilestonesForMember(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.milestones.create')   return handleDiscipleshipMilestonesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.milestones.update')   return handleDiscipleshipMilestonesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.goals.list')          return handleDiscipleshipGoalsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.goals.forMember')     return handleDiscipleshipGoalsForMember(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.goals.create')        return handleDiscipleshipGoalsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.goals.update')        return handleDiscipleshipGoalsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.goals.complete')      return handleDiscipleshipGoalsComplete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.goals.review')        return handleDiscipleshipGoalsReview(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.goals.overdue')       return handleDiscipleshipGoalsOverdue(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.certificates.list')   return handleDiscipleshipCertificatesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.certificates.forMember') return handleDiscipleshipCertificatesForMember(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.certificates.issue')  return handleDiscipleshipCertificatesIssue(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.certificates.revoke') return handleDiscipleshipCertificatesRevoke(params, auth);
  if (action === 'discipleship.dashboard')           return handleDiscipleshipDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── Learning (Sermon-Based Education) ──────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'learning.topics.list')             return handleLearningTopicsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.topics.get')              return handleLearningTopicsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.topics.create')           return handleLearningTopicsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.topics.update')           return handleLearningTopicsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.topics.delete')           return handleLearningTopicsDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.topics.tree')             return handleLearningTopicsTree(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlists.list')          return handleLearningPlaylistsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlists.get')           return handleLearningPlaylistsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlists.create')        return handleLearningPlaylistsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlists.update')        return handleLearningPlaylistsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlists.delete')        return handleLearningPlaylistsDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlists.subscribe')     return handleLearningPlaylistsSubscribe(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlistItems.list')      return handleLearningPlaylistItemsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlistItems.create')    return handleLearningPlaylistItemsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlistItems.update')    return handleLearningPlaylistItemsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlistItems.delete')    return handleLearningPlaylistItemsDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.playlistItems.reorder')   return handleLearningPlaylistItemsReorder(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.progress.list')           return handleLearningProgressList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.progress.get')            return handleLearningProgressGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.progress.update')         return handleLearningProgressUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.progress.complete')       return handleLearningProgressComplete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.progress.stats')          return handleLearningProgressStats(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.notes.list')              return handleLearningNotesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.notes.get')               return handleLearningNotesGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.notes.create')            return handleLearningNotesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.notes.update')            return handleLearningNotesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.notes.delete')            return handleLearningNotesDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.bookmarks.list')          return handleLearningBookmarksList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.bookmarks.create')        return handleLearningBookmarksCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.bookmarks.update')        return handleLearningBookmarksUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.bookmarks.delete')        return handleLearningBookmarksDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.recommendations.list')    return handleLearningRecommendationsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.recommendations.create')  return handleLearningRecommendationsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.recommendations.dismiss') return handleLearningRecommendationsDismiss(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.recommendations.accept')  return handleLearningRecommendationsAccept(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.recommendations.generate')return handleLearningRecommendationsGenerate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.quizzes.list')            return handleLearningQuizzesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.quizzes.get')             return handleLearningQuizzesGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.quizzes.create')          return handleLearningQuizzesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.quizzes.update')          return handleLearningQuizzesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.quizzes.publish')         return handleLearningQuizzesPublish(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.quizzes.delete')          return handleLearningQuizzesDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.quizResults.list')        return handleLearningQuizResultsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.quizResults.submit')      return handleLearningQuizResultsSubmit(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.certificates.list')       return handleLearningCertificatesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.certificates.forMember')  return handleLearningCertificatesForMember(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.certificates.issue')      return handleLearningCertificatesIssue(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.certificates.revoke')     return handleLearningCertificatesRevoke(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.sermons.search')          return handleLearningSermonSearch(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.sermons.topics')          return handleLearningSermonTopics(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.sermons.preachers')       return handleLearningSermonPreachers(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.sermons.scriptures')      return handleLearningSermonScriptures(params, auth);
  if (action === 'learning.dashboard')               return handleLearningDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── [MOVED TO MARK — Uncomment to rollback] ────────────────────────────────
  // All 40 missions routes now live in Mark's Code.gs.
  // Frontend routes via _m() → MISSIONS_URL (Mark).
  // To rollback: uncomment these lines and change _m() back to _f() in the_true_vine.js.
  //
  // if (action === 'missions.registry.list')           return handleMissionsRegistryList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.registry.get')            return handleMissionsRegistryGet(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.registry.create')         return handleMissionsRegistryCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.registry.update')         return handleMissionsRegistryUpdate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.registry.delete')         return handleMissionsRegistryDelete(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.registry.1040')           return handleMissionsRegistry1040(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.regions.list')            return handleMissionsRegionsList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.regions.get')             return handleMissionsRegionsGet(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.regions.create')          return handleMissionsRegionsCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.regions.update')          return handleMissionsRegionsUpdate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.regions.delete')          return handleMissionsRegionsDelete(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.regions.forCountry')      return handleMissionsRegionsForCountry(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.cities.list')             return handleMissionsCitiesList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.cities.get')              return handleMissionsCitiesGet(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.cities.create')           return handleMissionsCitiesCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.cities.update')           return handleMissionsCitiesUpdate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.cities.delete')           return handleMissionsCitiesDelete(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.cities.forCountry')       return handleMissionsCitiesForCountry(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.partners.list')           return handleMissionsPartnersList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.partners.get')            return handleMissionsPartnersGet(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.partners.create')         return handleMissionsPartnersCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.partners.update')         return handleMissionsPartnersUpdate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.partners.delete')         return handleMissionsPartnersDelete(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.prayerFocus.list')        return handleMissionsPrayerFocusList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.prayerFocus.create')      return handleMissionsPrayerFocusCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.prayerFocus.update')      return handleMissionsPrayerFocusUpdate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.prayerFocus.respond')     return handleMissionsPrayerFocusRespond(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.updates.list')            return handleMissionsUpdatesList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.updates.get')             return handleMissionsUpdatesGet(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.updates.create')          return handleMissionsUpdatesCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.updates.publish')         return handleMissionsUpdatesPublish(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.teams.list')              return handleMissionsTeamsList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.teams.get')               return handleMissionsTeamsGet(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.teams.create')            return handleMissionsTeamsCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.teams.update')            return handleMissionsTeamsUpdate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.metrics.list')            return handleMissionsMetricsList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.metrics.create')          return handleMissionsMetricsCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.metrics.update')          return handleMissionsMetricsUpdate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.metrics.compare')         return handleMissionsMetricsCompare(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'missions.dashboard')               return handleMissionsDashboard(params, auth);
  // ── [END MOVED TO MARK] ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  // ── Theology: Categories ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'theology.categories.list')          return handleTheologyCategoriesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.categories.get')           return handleTheologyCategoriesGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.categories.create')        return handleTheologyCategoriesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.categories.update')        return handleTheologyCategoriesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.categories.delete')        return handleTheologyCategoriesDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.categories.reorder')       return handleTheologyCategoriesReorder(params, auth);

  // ── Theology: Sections (Doctrinal Statements) ─────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'theology.sections.list')            return handleTheologySectionsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.sections.get')             return handleTheologySectionsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.sections.create')          return handleTheologySectionsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.sections.update')          return handleTheologySectionsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.sections.delete')          return handleTheologySectionsDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.sections.approve')         return handleTheologySectionsApprove(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.sections.reorder')         return handleTheologySectionsReorder(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.sections.forCategory')     return handleTheologySectionsForCategory(params, auth);

  // ── Theology: Scriptures (Supporting References) ───────────────────────────
  if (action === 'theology.scriptures.list')          return handleTheologyScripturesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.scriptures.create')        return handleTheologyScripturesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.scriptures.update')        return handleTheologyScripturesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.scriptures.delete')        return handleTheologyScripturesDelete(params, auth);

  // ── Theology: Revisions (Audit Trail) ──────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'theology.revisions.list')           return handleTheologyRevisionsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.revisions.get')            return handleTheologyRevisionsGet(params, auth);

  // ── Theology: Composite / Utility ──────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'theology.flat')                     return handleTheologyFlat(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.full')                     return handleTheologyFull(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.search')                   return handleTheologySearch(params, auth);
  if (action === 'theology.dashboard')                return handleTheologyDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── Member Cards: CRUD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'memberCards.list')                  return handleMemberCardsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.get')                   return handleMemberCardsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.byNumber')              return handleMemberCardsByNumber(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.create')                return handleMemberCardsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.update')                return handleMemberCardsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.archive')               return handleMemberCardsArchive(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.mine')                  return handleMemberCardsMine(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.search')                return handleMemberCardsSearch(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.bulkProvision')         return handleMemberCardsBulkProvision(params, auth);

  // ── Member Cards: Public Endpoints ─────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'memberCards.public')                return handleMemberCardsPublic(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.publicFull')            return handleMemberCardsPublicFull(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.vcard')                 return handleMemberCardsVcard(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.directory')             return handleMemberCardsDirectory(params, auth);

  // ── Member Cards: Links ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'memberCards.links.list')            return handleMemberCardLinksList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.links.create')          return handleMemberCardLinksCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.links.update')          return handleMemberCardLinksUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.links.delete')          return handleMemberCardLinksDelete(params, auth);

  // ── Member Cards: View Analytics ───────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'memberCards.views.list')            return handleMemberCardViewsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'memberCards.views.mine')            return handleMemberCardViewsMine(params, auth);

  // ── Member Cards: Dashboard ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'memberCards.dashboard')             return handleMemberCardsDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── [MOVED TO LUKE — Uncomment to rollback] ────────────────────────────────
  // All 19 statistics routes now live in Luke's Code.gs.
  // Frontend routes via _x() → EXTRA_URL (Luke).
  // To rollback: uncomment these lines and change _x() back to _f() in the_true_vine.js.
  //
  // if (action === 'statistics.config.list')            return handleStatisticsConfigList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.config.get')             return handleStatisticsConfigGet(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.config.create')          return handleStatisticsConfigCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.config.update')          return handleStatisticsConfigUpdate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.config.delete')          return handleStatisticsConfigDelete(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.list')         return handleStatisticsSnapshotsList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.get')          return handleStatisticsSnapshotsGet(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.create')       return handleStatisticsSnapshotsCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.delete')       return handleStatisticsSnapshotsDelete(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.latest')       return handleStatisticsSnapshotsLatest(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.compute')                return handleStatisticsCompute(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.views.list')             return handleStatisticsViewsList(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.views.get')              return handleStatisticsViewsGet(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.views.create')           return handleStatisticsViewsCreate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.views.update')           return handleStatisticsViewsUpdate(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.views.delete')           return handleStatisticsViewsDelete(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.dashboard')              return handleStatisticsDashboard(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.trends')                 return handleStatisticsTrends(params, auth);
  // if (action === 'statistics.export')                 return handleStatisticsExport(params, auth);
  // ── [END MOVED TO LUKE] ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  // ── Reports / Analytics ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'reports.memberGrowth')     return handleReportMemberGrowth(params, auth);
  if (action === 'reports.attendanceTrend')  return handleReportAttendanceTrend(params, auth);
  if (action === 'reports.givingSummary')    return handleReportGivingSummary(params, auth);
  if (action === 'reports.prayerOverview')   return handleReportPrayerOverview(params, auth);
  if (action === 'reports.dashboard')        return handleReportDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── Prayer Requests (admin) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'prayer.list')              return handlePrayerList_(params, auth);
  if (action === 'prayer.get')               return handlePrayerGet_(params, auth);
  if (action === 'prayer.update')            return handlePrayerUpdate_(params, auth);

  // ── Journal ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'journal.list')             return handleJournalList_(params, auth);
  if (action === 'journal.get')              return handleJournalGet_(params, auth);
  if (action === 'journal.create')           return handleJournalCreate_(params, auth);
  if (action === 'journal.update')           return handleJournalUpdate_(params, auth);
  if (action === 'journal.delete')           return handleJournalDelete_(params, auth);

  // ── Multi-Church (advanced) ────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'church.create')            return handleChurchCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'church.update')            return handleChurchUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'church.setup')             return handleChurchSetup(params, auth);
  if (action === 'church.configs')           return handleChurchConfigs(params, auth);
  if (action === 'church.list')              return handleChurchList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'church.delete')            return handleChurchDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'church.config.list')       return asJson(handleChurchConfigList_(params, auth));
  if (action === 'church.config.set')        return asJson(handleChurchConfigSet_(params, auth));

  // ── Calendar Events (CalendarEvents sheet) ──────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'calendar.list')            return handleCalendarEventsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'calendar.get')             return handleCalendarEventsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'calendar.create')          return handleCalendarEventsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'calendar.update')          return handleCalendarEventsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'calendar.delete')          return handleCalendarEventsDelete(params, auth);

  // ── Members (pastoral roster) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'members.list')             return handleMembersList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'members.get')              return handleMembersGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'members.create')           return handleMembersCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'members.update')           return handleMembersUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'members.delete')           return handleMembersDelete(params, auth);

  // ── Batch Operations (advanced) ────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'bulk.membersImport')       return handleBulkMembersImport(params, auth);
  if (action === 'bulk.dataExport')          return handleDataExport(params, auth);

  // ── Matthew APP Content — Admin Write Operations ──────────────────────────
  if (action.indexOf('app.') === 0)          return handleAppWrite_(action, params, auth);

  return jsonErr('Unknown action: ' + action);
}
