        // Look up group membership from SmallGroupMembers tab
        var isMember = checkGroupMembership(String(data[i][0] || ''), filter);
        if (!isMember) continue;
        break;

      case 'Custom':
        // filter should be a comma-separated list of emails
        if (!filter) continue;
        var allowed = filter.toLowerCase().split(',').map(function(s) { return s.trim(); });
        if (allowed.indexOf(email) === -1) continue;
        break;

      // "All" — no filtering
    }

    emails.push(email);
  }

  return emails;
}

/**
 * Checks if a memberId belongs to a specific small group.
 */
function checkGroupMembership(memberId, groupId) {
  if (!memberId || !groupId) return false;
  var sheet = getTab('SmallGroupMembers');
  if (!sheet) return false;
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return false;

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 7).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][1]) === groupId &&
        String(data[i][2]) === memberId &&
        String(data[i][6] || '').trim() === 'Active') {
      return true;
    }
  }
  return false;
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DATE / TIME HELPERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Returns a date string for "today minus N days".
 */
function daysAgo(n) {
  var d = new Date();
  d.setDate(d.getDate() - Number(n || 0));
  return Utilities.formatDate(d, Session.getScriptTimeZone(), 'yyyy-MM-dd');
}

/**
 * Returns the ISO week number for a date.
 */
function isoWeekNumber(dateStr) {
  var d = new Date(dateStr);
  d.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  d.setDate(d.getDate() + 3 - (d.getDay() + 6) % 7);
  var week1 = new Date(d.getFullYear(), 0, 4);
  return 1 + Math.round(((d - week1) / 86400000 - 3 + (week1.getDay() + 6) % 7) / 7);
}

/**
 * Returns the first day (Monday) of the ISO week for a given date.
 */
function weekStart(dateStr) {
  var d = new Date(dateStr);
  var day = d.getDay() || 7;
  d.setDate(d.getDate() - day + 1);
  return Utilities.formatDate(d, Session.getScriptTimeZone(), 'yyyy-MM-dd');
}

/**
 * Returns "YYYY-MM" from a date/ISO string.
 */
function yearMonth(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '';
  var s = isoDate(dateStr);
  return s.length >= 7 ? s.substring(0, 7) : '';
}

/**
 * Returns the quarter string (e.g., "2025-Q1") for a date.
 */
function yearQuarter(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return '';
  var s = isoDate(dateStr);
  if (s.length < 7) return '';
  var month = parseInt(s.substring(5, 7), 10);
  var quarter = Math.ceil(month / 3);
  return s.substring(0, 4) + '-Q' + quarter;
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// VALIDATION HELPERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Validates that a value is one of the allowed values.
 * Returns the value if valid, or defaultVal if not.
 */
function validateEnum(value, allowed, defaultVal) {
  if (!value) return defaultVal || '';
  var v = String(value).trim();
  for (var i = 0; i < allowed.length; i++) {
    if (allowed[i].toLowerCase() === v.toLowerCase()) return allowed[i];
  }
  return defaultVal || '';
}

/**
 * Validates a monetary amount (non-negative number).
 * Returns the number or throws.
 */
function validateAmount(value) {
  var n = Number(value);
  if (isNaN(n) || n < 0) throw new Error('Invalid amount: ' + String(value));
  return Math.round(n * 100) / 100;  // Round to cents
}

/**
 * Validates an email loosely (basic format check).
 */
function isValidEmail(email) {
  if (!email) return false;
  var s = String(email).trim();
  return /^[^\s@]+@[^\s@]+\.[^\s@]+$/.test(s);
}

/**
 * Validates a date string (YYYY-MM-DD).
 */
function isValidDate(dateStr) {
  if (!dateStr) return false;
  var s = String(dateStr).trim();
  return /^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(s) && !isNaN(new Date(s).getTime());
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// REPORT HELPERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Generates an attendance summary report for a date range.
 * Aggregates by week, showing counts and unique members.
 */
function generateAttendanceReport(dateFrom, dateTo) {
  var sheet = getTab('Attendance');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return { weeks: [], totalServices: 0, avgAttendance: 0 };

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 9).getValues();
  var weeks = {};
  var totalCount = 0;
  var totalServices = 0;
  var serviceKeys = {};

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var date = isoDate(data[i][2]).substring(0, 10);  // SERVICE_DATE
    if (dateFrom && date < dateFrom) continue;
    if (dateTo && date > dateTo) continue;

    var wk = weekStart(date);
    if (!weeks[wk]) weeks[wk] = { week: wk, count: 0, uniqueMembers: {} };
    weeks[wk].count++;
    weeks[wk].uniqueMembers[String(data[i][1] || '')] = true;
    totalCount++;

    var svcKey = date + '|' + String(data[i][3] || '');
    serviceKeys[svcKey] = true;
  }

  totalServices = Object.keys(serviceKeys).length;
  var weekList = [];
  for (var w in weeks) {
    if (weeks.hasOwnProperty(w)) {
      weekList.push({
        week: weeks[w].week,
        checkIns: weeks[w].count,
        uniqueMembers: Object.keys(weeks[w].uniqueMembers).length
      });
    }
  }
  weekList.sort(function(a, b) { return a.week > b.week ? 1 : a.week < b.week ? -1 : 0; });

  return {
    weeks: weekList,
    totalServices: totalServices,
    totalCheckIns: totalCount,
    avgAttendance: totalServices > 0 ? Math.round(totalCount / totalServices) : 0
  };
}

/**
 * Generates a giving summary report.
 * Aggregates by month and by fund.
 */
function generateGivingReport(dateFrom, dateTo) {
  var sheet = getTab('Giving');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return { months: [], byFund: {}, total: 0 };

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 15).getValues();
  var months = {};
  var byFund = {};
  var total = 0;

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var date = isoDate(data[i][5]).substring(0, 10);  // DATE
    if (dateFrom && date < dateFrom) continue;
    if (dateTo && date > dateTo) continue;

    var amount = Number(data[i][3] || 0);  // AMOUNT
    var fund = String(data[i][6] || 'General');  // FUND
    var ym = yearMonth(date);

    total += amount;
    byFund[fund] = (byFund[fund] || 0) + amount;

    if (!months[ym]) months[ym] = { month: ym, total: 0, count: 0 };
    months[ym].total += amount;
    months[ym].count++;
  }

  var monthList = [];
  for (var m in months) {
    if (months.hasOwnProperty(m)) monthList.push(months[m]);
  }
  monthList.sort(function(a, b) { return a.month > b.month ? 1 : a.month < b.month ? -1 : 0; });

  return { months: monthList, byFund: byFund, total: total };
}

/**
 * Generates a membership growth snapshot.
 * Counts new members per month over the date range.
 */
function generateMembershipGrowthReport(dateFrom, dateTo) {
  var sheet = getTab('Members');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return { months: [], totalNew: 0 };

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 51).getValues();
  var months = {};
  var totalNew = 0;

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    // DATE_JOINED is column index 14 in the Members tab
    var joined = isoDate(data[i][14]).substring(0, 10);
    if (!joined) continue;
    if (dateFrom && joined < dateFrom) continue;
    if (dateTo && joined > dateTo) continue;

    var ym = yearMonth(joined);
    if (!months[ym]) months[ym] = { month: ym, count: 0 };
    months[ym].count++;
    totalNew++;
  }

  var monthList = [];
  for (var m in months) {
    if (months.hasOwnProperty(m)) monthList.push(months[m]);
  }
  monthList.sort(function(a, b) { return a.month > b.month ? 1 : a.month < b.month ? -1 : 0; });

  return { months: monthList, totalNew: totalNew };
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// REPORT ACTION HANDLERS (called from api.gs routing)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleReportAttendance(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || daysAgo(90)).trim();
  var dateTo = String(params.dateTo || isoNow().substring(0, 10)).trim();
  return jsonOk({ report: generateAttendanceReport(dateFrom, dateTo) });
}

function handleReportGiving(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || daysAgo(365)).trim();
  var dateTo = String(params.dateTo || isoNow().substring(0, 10)).trim();
  return jsonOk({ report: generateGivingReport(dateFrom, dateTo) });
}

function handleReportGrowth(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || daysAgo(365)).trim();
  var dateTo = String(params.dateTo || isoNow().substring(0, 10)).trim();
  return jsonOk({ report: generateMembershipGrowthReport(dateFrom, dateTo) });
}

function handleReportDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var now = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
  var thirtyAgo = daysAgo(30);
  var ninetyAgo = daysAgo(90);

  // Mini-summary of each area
  var attendance = generateAttendanceReport(thirtyAgo, now);
  var giving = hasRole(auth, 'admin') ? generateGivingReport(thirtyAgo, now) : null;
  var growth = generateMembershipGrowthReport(ninetyAgo, now);

  // Active member count
  var membersSheet = getTab('Members');
  var mLastRow = membersSheet.getLastRow();
  var activeMembers = 0;
  if (mLastRow >= 2) {
    var statuses = membersSheet.getRange(2, 11, mLastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < statuses.length; i++) {
      var s = String(statuses[i][0] || '').trim();
      if (s === 'Active' || s === 'Member') activeMembers++;
    }
  }

  // Active small groups count
  var groupsSheet = getTab('SmallGroups');
  var gLastRow = groupsSheet.getLastRow();
  var activeGroups = 0;
  if (gLastRow >= 2) {
    var gStatuses = groupsSheet.getRange(2, 11, gLastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var j = 0; j < gStatuses.length; j++) {
      if (String(gStatuses[j][0] || '').trim() === 'Active') activeGroups++;
    }
  }

  return jsonOk({
    dashboard: {
      activeMembers: activeMembers,
      activeSmallGroups: activeGroups,
      attendance30d: {
        totalCheckIns: attendance.totalCheckIns,
        avgPerService: attendance.avgAttendance
      },
      giving30d: giving ? { total: giving.total } : null,
      membership90d: {
        newMembers: growth.totalNew
      }
    }
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BATCH / PAGINATION UTILITIES
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Applies pagination (offset + limit) to an array of result rows.
 * Returns { rows, total, offset, limit }.
 */
function paginate(rows, params) {
  var total = rows.length;
  var offset = Math.max(0, Number(params.offset || 0));
  var limit = Math.min(Math.max(1, Number(params.limit || 100)), 500);
  var sliced = rows.slice(offset, offset + limit);
  return { rows: sliced, total: total, offset: offset, limit: limit };
}

/**
 * Sorts an array of objects by a given key.
 * direction: 'asc' or 'desc'.
 */
function sortBy(rows, key, direction) {
  var desc = String(direction || 'asc').toLowerCase() === 'desc';
  rows.sort(function(a, b) {
    var av = a[key] || '';
    var bv = b[key] || '';
    if (av > bv) return desc ? -1 : 1;
    if (av < bv) return desc ? 1 : -1;
    return 0;
  });
  return rows;
}


// ── Tab / Sheet helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/**
 * Applies dropdown (data-validation) rules to columns in a tab.
 * dropdownMap is an object where keys are column letters (e.g. 'G')
 * and values are arrays of allowed strings.
 * @param {Spreadsheet} ss - SpreadsheetApp spreadsheet object
 * @param {string} tabName - tab name
 * @param {Object} dropdownMap - { 'G': ['Male','Female','—'], ... }
 */
function addDropdowns(ss, tabName, dropdownMap) {
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(tabName);
  if (!sheet) return;
  var lastRow = Math.max(sheet.getMaxRows(), 100);
  for (var col in dropdownMap) {
    if (!dropdownMap.hasOwnProperty(col)) continue;
    var colIndex = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < col.length; i++) {
      colIndex = colIndex * 26 + (col.charCodeAt(i) - 64);
    }
    var rule = SpreadsheetApp.newDataValidation()
      .requireValueInList(dropdownMap[col], true)
      .setAllowInvalid(false)
      .build();
    sheet.getRange(2, colIndex, lastRow - 1, 1).setDataValidation(rule);
  }
}

// ── openTab_ alias ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Discipleship.gs and other modules use openTab_(name) as shorthand for getTab.

function openTab_(name) { return getTab(name); }


// ── Report handler aliases ───────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Api.gs routes to these names; the real implementations are above.

function handleReportMemberGrowth(params, auth)    { return handleReportGrowth(params, auth); }
function handleReportAttendanceTrend(params, auth) { return handleReportAttendance(params, auth); }
function handleReportGivingSummary(params, auth)   { return handleReportGiving(params, auth); }

function handleReportPrayerOverview(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab('PrayerRequests');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ open: 0, answered: 0, rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  var open = 0, answered = 0;
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var status = String(data[i][4] || '').trim();
    if (status === 'Answered') { answered++; } else { open++; }
    rows.push({
      request: String(data[i][2] || ''),
      requestedBy: String(data[i][1] || ''),
      status: status,
      date: isoDate(data[i][3])
    });
  }
  return jsonOk({ open: open, answered: answered, rows: rows });
}


/**
 * Ensures a tab exists in the spreadsheet with all expected headers.
 * - If the tab is missing: creates it with the full header row.
 * - If the tab exists: appends any columns that are present in `headers`
 *   but missing from row 1, without touching any existing data.
 * Safe to re-run on any sheet at any time.
 *
 * @param {Spreadsheet} ss - SpreadsheetApp spreadsheet object
 * @param {string} name - tab name
 * @param {string[]} headers - expected column header labels
 * @returns {Sheet}
 */
function ensureTab(ss, name, headers) {
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(name);

  if (!sheet) {
    // Tab doesn't exist — create it fresh
    sheet = ss.insertSheet(name);
    if (headers && headers.length) {
      sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, headers.length).setValues([headers]);
      sheet.setFrozenRows(1);
    }
    Logger.log('Created tab: ' + name);
    return sheet;
  }

  // Tab exists — check for missing columns and append them
  if (!headers || !headers.length) {
    Logger.log('Tab exists (no header check): ' + name);
    return sheet;
  }

  var lastCol = sheet.getLastColumn();
  var existingHeaders = lastCol > 0
    ? sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, lastCol).getValues()[0].map(function(h) {
        return String(h).trim().toLowerCase();
      })
    : [];

  var missing = [];
  headers.forEach(function(h) {
    if (existingHeaders.indexOf(String(h).trim().toLowerCase()) === -1) {
      missing.push(h);
    }
  });

  if (missing.length > 0) {
    var startCol = lastCol + 1;
    sheet.getRange(1, startCol, 1, missing.length).setValues([missing]);
    Logger.log('Tab exists — added ' + missing.length + ' missing column(s) to ' + name + ': ' + missing.join(', '));
  } else {
    Logger.log('Tab exists (schema current): ' + name);
  }

  return sheet;
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Cards.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: MEMBER CARDS — Dynamic Contact Cards via Member Number
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//
// Every member gets a unique member number (FlockOS-0001, FlockOS-0002, …) that
// drives a shareable, dynamic contact card.
//
// Architecture:
//   MemberCards      Public card profile per member (what's visible on the card)
//   MemberCardLinks  Social / action links per card (call, text, email, etc.)
//   MemberCardViews  View analytics — who viewed which card when
//
// The frontend calls /card?m=FlockOS-0042 which triggers memberCards.public
// and renders a contact card dynamically. No auth required for the public
// subset; authenticated viewers get richer data based on their role.
//
// Members control which fields appear on their card via memberCards.update.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 1. MEMBER CARDS (public card profile)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MC_TAB      = 'MemberCards';
var MC_NUM_COLS = 30;

var MC = {
  ID: 0,
  MEMBER_NUMBER: 1,      // FlockOS-0001 — human-readable, sequential, never reused
  EMAIL: 2,              // links to AuthUsers / pastoral Members
  FIRST_NAME: 3,
  LAST_NAME: 4,
  PREFERRED_NAME: 5,
  SUFFIX: 6,
  PHOTO_URL: 7,
  CARD_TITLE: 8,         // role/title shown on card (e.g. "Youth Pastor")
  CARD_BIO: 9,           // short public bio
  MINISTRY: 10,          // ministry affiliation
  SMALL_GROUP: 11,
  PHONE: 12,             // public-facing phone
  PHONE_VISIBLE: 13,     // TRUE/FALSE
  EMAIL_VISIBLE: 14,     // TRUE/FALSE (whether email shows on card)
  WEBSITE_URL: 15,       // personal/ministry website
  SCHEDULE_URL: 16,      // booking/calendar link
  COLOR_SCHEME: 17,      // card accent color (gold, cyan, magenta, etc.)
  BG_SCHEME: 18,         // card background variant
  CARD_ICON: 19,         // emoji or icon for card seal
  SHOW_DAILY_BREAD: 20,  // TRUE/FALSE — include Daily Bread snapshot
  SHOW_PRAYER_TICKER: 21,// TRUE/FALSE — include prayer ticker
  CARD_FOOTER: 22,       // custom footer text
  VISIBILITY: 23,        // public / authenticated / private
  VIEW_COUNT: 24,        // auto-maintained counter
  ACTIVE: 25,            // TRUE/FALSE
  STATUS: 26,            // Active / Suspended / Archived
  CREATED_BY: 27,
  CREATED_AT: 28,
  UPDATED_AT: 29
};

function memberCardRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[MC.ID] || ''),
    memberNumber:    String(vals[MC.MEMBER_NUMBER] || ''),
    email:           String(vals[MC.EMAIL] || ''),
    firstName:       String(vals[MC.FIRST_NAME] || ''),
    lastName:        String(vals[MC.LAST_NAME] || ''),
    preferredName:   String(vals[MC.PREFERRED_NAME] || ''),
    suffix:          String(vals[MC.SUFFIX] || ''),
    photoUrl:        String(vals[MC.PHOTO_URL] || ''),
    cardTitle:       String(vals[MC.CARD_TITLE] || ''),
    cardBio:         String(vals[MC.CARD_BIO] || ''),
    ministry:        String(vals[MC.MINISTRY] || ''),
    smallGroup:      String(vals[MC.SMALL_GROUP] || ''),
    phone:           String(vals[MC.PHONE] || ''),
    phoneVisible:    String(vals[MC.PHONE_VISIBLE] || 'TRUE'),
    emailVisible:    String(vals[MC.EMAIL_VISIBLE] || 'TRUE'),
    websiteUrl:      String(vals[MC.WEBSITE_URL] || ''),
    scheduleUrl:     String(vals[MC.SCHEDULE_URL] || ''),
    colorScheme:     String(vals[MC.COLOR_SCHEME] || 'gold'),
    bgScheme:        String(vals[MC.BG_SCHEME] || ''),
    cardIcon:        String(vals[MC.CARD_ICON] || '✝️'),
    showDailyBread:  String(vals[MC.SHOW_DAILY_BREAD] || 'FALSE'),
    showPrayerTicker:String(vals[MC.SHOW_PRAYER_TICKER] || 'FALSE'),
    cardFooter:      String(vals[MC.CARD_FOOTER] || ''),
    visibility:      String(vals[MC.VISIBILITY] || 'authenticated'),
    viewCount:       Number(vals[MC.VIEW_COUNT] || 0),
    active:          String(vals[MC.ACTIVE] || 'TRUE').toUpperCase(),
    status:          String(vals[MC.STATUS] || ''),
    createdBy:       String(vals[MC.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[MC.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:       isoDate(vals[MC.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

/** Strip sensitive/internal fields for the public card view */
function memberCardToPublicView(card) {
  var pub = {
    memberNumber:  card.memberNumber,
    firstName:     card.firstName,
    lastName:      card.lastName,
    preferredName: card.preferredName,
    suffix:        card.suffix,
    photoUrl:      card.photoUrl,
    cardTitle:     card.cardTitle,
    cardBio:       card.cardBio,
    ministry:      card.ministry,
    websiteUrl:    card.websiteUrl,
    scheduleUrl:   card.scheduleUrl,
    colorScheme:   card.colorScheme,
    bgScheme:      card.bgScheme,
    cardIcon:      card.cardIcon,
    showDailyBread:  card.showDailyBread,
    showPrayerTicker:card.showPrayerTicker,
    cardFooter:    card.cardFooter
  };
  // Only include contact fields if member opted in
  if (card.phoneVisible === 'TRUE' && card.phone)  pub.phone = card.phone;
  if (card.emailVisible === 'TRUE' && card.email)   pub.email = card.email;
  return pub;
}


// ── Member Number Generator ──────────────────────────────────────────────────

/** Returns a unique random member number using the configurable CARD_PREFIX (default FlockOS). */
function nextMemberNumber_(ss) {
  var prefix = getAppConfigValue_('CARD_PREFIX', 'FlockOS');
  var escaped = prefix.replace(/[.*+?^${}()|[\]\\]/g, '\\$&');
  var re = new RegExp('^' + escaped + '-(\\d+)$');
  var data = allRows(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);

  // Collect all existing numbers into a set for collision check
  var existing = {};
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var mn = String(data[i][MC.MEMBER_NUMBER] || '');
    var match = mn.match(re);
    if (match) existing[parseInt(match[1], 10)] = true;
  }

  // Generate a random 4-digit number (1000–9999) that doesn't collide
  var num;
  var attempts = 0;
  do {
    num = Math.floor(Math.random() * 9000) + 1000;
    attempts++;
    if (attempts > 500) throw new Error('Unable to generate unique member number — pool exhausted');
  } while (existing[num]);

  return prefix + '-' + String(num);
}


// ── Card Handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleMemberCardsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1); // volunteer+ to see card list
  var data = allRows(db(), MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = memberCardRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (params.activeOnly && obj.active !== 'TRUE') continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.memberNumber.localeCompare(b.memberNumber); });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleMemberCardsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Card not found');
  return jsonOk(memberCardRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

/** Lookup by member number (FlockOS-0042) */
function handleMemberCardsByNumber(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.memberNumber) return jsonErr('memberNumber required');
  var data = allRows(db(), MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MC.MEMBER_NUMBER]) === params.memberNumber) {
      var obj = memberCardRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      if (obj.status === 'Archived') return jsonErr('Card not available');
      return jsonOk(obj);
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Member not found');
}

function handleMemberCardsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+ to create cards
  if (!params.email && !params.firstName) return jsonErr('email or firstName required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var memberNumber = nextMemberNumber_(ss);

  var row = blankRow(MC_NUM_COLS);
  row[MC.ID]               = id;
  row[MC.MEMBER_NUMBER]    = memberNumber;
  row[MC.EMAIL]            = String(params.email || '');
  row[MC.FIRST_NAME]       = String(params.firstName || '');
  row[MC.LAST_NAME]        = String(params.lastName || '');
  row[MC.PREFERRED_NAME]   = String(params.preferredName || '');
  row[MC.SUFFIX]           = String(params.suffix || '');
  row[MC.PHOTO_URL]        = String(params.photoUrl || '');
  row[MC.CARD_TITLE]       = String(params.cardTitle || '');
  row[MC.CARD_BIO]         = String(params.cardBio || '');
  row[MC.MINISTRY]         = String(params.ministry || '');
  row[MC.SMALL_GROUP]      = String(params.smallGroup || '');
  row[MC.PHONE]            = String(params.phone || '');
  row[MC.PHONE_VISIBLE]    = (params.phoneVisible === false || params.phoneVisible === 'FALSE') ? 'FALSE' : 'TRUE';
  row[MC.EMAIL_VISIBLE]    = (params.emailVisible === false || params.emailVisible === 'FALSE') ? 'FALSE' : 'TRUE';
  row[MC.WEBSITE_URL]      = String(params.websiteUrl || '');
  row[MC.SCHEDULE_URL]     = String(params.scheduleUrl || '');
  row[MC.COLOR_SCHEME]     = String(params.colorScheme || 'gold');
  row[MC.BG_SCHEME]        = String(params.bgScheme || '');
  row[MC.CARD_ICON]        = String(params.cardIcon || '✝️');
  row[MC.SHOW_DAILY_BREAD] = (params.showDailyBread === true || params.showDailyBread === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[MC.SHOW_PRAYER_TICKER] = (params.showPrayerTicker === true || params.showPrayerTicker === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[MC.CARD_FOOTER]      = String(params.cardFooter || '');
  row[MC.VISIBILITY]       = String(params.visibility || 'authenticated');
  row[MC.VIEW_COUNT]       = 0;
  row[MC.ACTIVE]           = 'TRUE';
  row[MC.STATUS]           = 'Active';
  row[MC.CREATED_BY]       = auth.email;
  row[MC.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[MC.UPDATED_AT]       = now;

  appendRow(ss, MC_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'memberCards.create', MC_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, memberNumber: memberNumber, message: 'Member card created' });
}

function handleMemberCardsUpdate(params, auth) {
  // Members can update their own card; leaders can update anyone's
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Card not found');
  var v = hit.vals;

  var isOwnCard = String(v[MC.EMAIL]) === auth.email;
  if (!isOwnCard) requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+ for others' cards

  if (params.firstName !== undefined)       v[MC.FIRST_NAME]       = String(params.firstName);
  if (params.lastName !== undefined)        v[MC.LAST_NAME]        = String(params.lastName);
  if (params.preferredName !== undefined)   v[MC.PREFERRED_NAME]   = String(params.preferredName);
  if (params.suffix !== undefined)          v[MC.SUFFIX]           = String(params.suffix);
  if (params.photoUrl !== undefined)        v[MC.PHOTO_URL]        = String(params.photoUrl);
  if (params.cardTitle !== undefined)       v[MC.CARD_TITLE]       = String(params.cardTitle);
  if (params.cardBio !== undefined)         v[MC.CARD_BIO]         = String(params.cardBio);
  if (params.ministry !== undefined)        v[MC.MINISTRY]         = String(params.ministry);
  if (params.smallGroup !== undefined)      v[MC.SMALL_GROUP]      = String(params.smallGroup);
  if (params.phone !== undefined)           v[MC.PHONE]            = String(params.phone);
  if (params.phoneVisible !== undefined)    v[MC.PHONE_VISIBLE]    = (params.phoneVisible === true || params.phoneVisible === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.emailVisible !== undefined)    v[MC.EMAIL_VISIBLE]    = (params.emailVisible === true || params.emailVisible === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.websiteUrl !== undefined)      v[MC.WEBSITE_URL]      = String(params.websiteUrl);
  if (params.scheduleUrl !== undefined)     v[MC.SCHEDULE_URL]     = String(params.scheduleUrl);
  if (params.colorScheme !== undefined)     v[MC.COLOR_SCHEME]     = String(params.colorScheme);
  if (params.bgScheme !== undefined)        v[MC.BG_SCHEME]        = String(params.bgScheme);
  if (params.cardIcon !== undefined)        v[MC.CARD_ICON]        = String(params.cardIcon);
  if (params.showDailyBread !== undefined)  v[MC.SHOW_DAILY_BREAD] = (params.showDailyBread === true || params.showDailyBread === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.showPrayerTicker !== undefined) v[MC.SHOW_PRAYER_TICKER] = (params.showPrayerTicker === true || params.showPrayerTicker === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.cardFooter !== undefined)      v[MC.CARD_FOOTER]      = String(params.cardFooter);
  if (params.visibility !== undefined)      v[MC.VISIBILITY]       = String(params.visibility);
  // Active/Status changes require leader+
  if (params.active !== undefined) {
    requireRole(auth, 2);
    v[MC.ACTIVE] = (params.active === true || params.active === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  }
  if (params.status !== undefined) {
    requireRole(auth, 2);
    v[MC.STATUS] = String(params.status);
  }

  v[MC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MC_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);

  // ── Cascade shared fields to AuthUsers, Members, etc. ──
  var cardEmail = normalizeEmail(String(v[MC.EMAIL]));
  if (cardEmail) {
    var cascadeFields = {};
    if (params.firstName !== undefined) cascadeFields.firstName = params.firstName;
    if (params.lastName !== undefined)  cascadeFields.lastName  = params.lastName;
    if (params.photoUrl !== undefined)  cascadeFields.photoUrl  = params.photoUrl;
    if (params.phone !== undefined)     cascadeFields.phone     = params.phone;
    if (Object.keys(cascadeFields).length > 0) {
      try { cascadeUpdate_(cardEmail, cascadeFields, auth); } catch (_) {}
    }
  }

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'memberCards.update', MC_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Card updated' });
}

function handleMemberCardsArchive(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3); // pastor+ to archive
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Card not found');
  hit.vals[MC.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[MC.ACTIVE]     = 'FALSE';
  hit.vals[MC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MC_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'memberCards.archive', MC_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Card archived' });
}

/** Get own card (for the logged-in member) */
function handleMemberCardsMine(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MC.EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === auth.email.toLowerCase()) {
      return jsonOk(memberCardRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('No card found for your account');
}

/** Search cards by name or member number */
function handleMemberCardsSearch(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.q) return jsonErr('q (search query) required');
  var q    = String(params.q).toLowerCase();
  var data = allRows(db(), MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = memberCardRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Archived' || obj.active !== 'TRUE') continue;
    var hay = [obj.memberNumber, obj.firstName, obj.lastName, obj.preferredName,
               obj.cardTitle, obj.ministry, obj.email].join(' ').toLowerCase();
    if (hay.indexOf(q) !== -1) out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.memberNumber.localeCompare(b.memberNumber); });
  return jsonOk(out);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PUBLIC CARD ENDPOINT — The core feature
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//
// Called as: ?action=memberCards.public&memberNumber=FlockOS-0042
//
// Returns the public-safe subset of the member's card.
// If the viewer is authenticated AND has a higher role, additional
// fields (phone, email) may be included regardless of visibility settings.
//
// NO AUTH REQUIRED for cards with visibility='public'.
// Cards with visibility='authenticated' require a valid session.
// Cards with visibility='private' are only visible to the card owner + leaders.

function handleMemberCardsPublic(params, authOrNull) {
  if (!params.memberNumber && !params.id) return jsonErr('memberNumber or id required');
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
  var card = null;
  var rowIndex = -1;

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (params.memberNumber && String(data[i][MC.MEMBER_NUMBER]) === params.memberNumber) {
      card = memberCardRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      rowIndex = i + 2;
      break;
    }
    if (params.id && String(data[i][MC.ID]) === params.id) {
      card = memberCardRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      rowIndex = i + 2;
      break;
    }
  }

  if (!card || card.status === 'Archived' || card.active !== 'TRUE') {
    return jsonErr('Card not found or inactive');
  }

  // Visibility check
  var viewerRole = (authOrNull && typeof authOrNull.role !== 'undefined') ? Number(authOrNull.role) : -1;
  var viewerEmail = (authOrNull && authOrNull.email) ? String(authOrNull.email).toLowerCase() : '';
  var isOwner = viewerEmail === card.email.toLowerCase();

  if (card.visibility === 'private' && !isOwner && viewerRole < 2) {
    return jsonErr('This card is private');
  }
  if (card.visibility === 'authenticated' && viewerRole < 0) {
    return jsonErr('Authentication required to view this card');
  }

  // Increment view count (fire-and-forget)
  try {
    data[rowIndex - 2][MC.VIEW_COUNT] = Number(data[rowIndex - 2][MC.VIEW_COUNT] || 0) + 1;
    writeRow(ss, MC_TAB, rowIndex, data[rowIndex - 2]);
  } catch (e) { /* non-critical */ }

  // Record view analytics
  if (viewerEmail || params.viewerRef) {
    recordCardView_(ss, card.id, card.memberNumber, viewerEmail || String(params.viewerRef || ''));
  }

  // Build response — owners and leaders get full data, others get public view
  if (isOwner || viewerRole >= 2) {
    return jsonOk(card);
  }
  return jsonOk(memberCardToPublicView(card));
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BULK CARD PROVISIONING — Create cards for all existing members
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Provision cards for members who don't have one yet.
 * Accepts an array of member objects with { email, firstName, lastName, ... }
 * Auto-assigns member numbers.
 */
function handleMemberCardsBulkProvision(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3); // pastor+
  if (!params.members || !Array.isArray(params.members)) {
    return jsonErr('members array required');
  }

  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
  var now  = new Date();

  // Build lookup of existing emails
  var existingEmails = {};
  for (var e = 0; e < data.length; e++) {
    existingEmails[String(data[e][MC.EMAIL]).toLowerCase()] = true;
  }

  var created = 0;
  var skipped = 0;

  for (var m = 0; m < params.members.length; m++) {
    var mem = params.members[m];
    var email = String(mem.email || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    if (email && existingEmails[email]) { skipped++; continue; }

    var id  = newId();
    var mn  = nextMemberNumber_(ss);
    var row = blankRow(MC_NUM_COLS);
    row[MC.ID]               = id;
    row[MC.MEMBER_NUMBER]    = mn;
    row[MC.EMAIL]            = email;
    row[MC.FIRST_NAME]       = String(mem.firstName || '');
    row[MC.LAST_NAME]        = String(mem.lastName || '');
    row[MC.PREFERRED_NAME]   = String(mem.preferredName || '');
    row[MC.SUFFIX]           = String(mem.suffix || '');
    row[MC.PHOTO_URL]        = String(mem.photoUrl || '');
    row[MC.CARD_TITLE]       = String(mem.cardTitle || mem.ministryTeams || '');
    row[MC.CARD_BIO]         = '';
    row[MC.MINISTRY]         = String(mem.ministry || mem.ministryTeams || '');
    row[MC.SMALL_GROUP]      = String(mem.smallGroup || '');
    row[MC.PHONE]            = String(mem.phone || mem.cellPhone || '');
    row[MC.PHONE_VISIBLE]    = 'TRUE';
    row[MC.EMAIL_VISIBLE]    = 'TRUE';
    row[MC.WEBSITE_URL]      = String(mem.websiteLink || mem.websiteUrl || '');
    row[MC.SCHEDULE_URL]     = '';
    row[MC.COLOR_SCHEME]     = String(mem.colorScheme || 'gold');
    row[MC.BG_SCHEME]        = String(mem.bgScheme || '');
    row[MC.CARD_ICON]        = '✝️';
    row[MC.SHOW_DAILY_BREAD] = 'FALSE';
    row[MC.SHOW_PRAYER_TICKER] = 'FALSE';
    row[MC.CARD_FOOTER]      = '';
    row[MC.VISIBILITY]       = 'authenticated';
    row[MC.VIEW_COUNT]       = 0;
    row[MC.ACTIVE]           = 'TRUE';
    row[MC.STATUS]           = 'Active';
    row[MC.CREATED_BY]       = auth.email;
    row[MC.CREATED_AT]       = now;
    row[MC.UPDATED_AT]       = now;

    appendRow(ss, MC_TAB, row);
    if (email) existingEmails[email] = true;
    created++;
  }

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'memberCards.bulkProvision', MC_TAB, 'created:' + created);
  return jsonOk({ created: created, skipped: skipped, message: created + ' cards provisioned, ' + skipped + ' skipped (already exist)' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 2. MEMBER CARD LINKS (action buttons per card)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MCL_TAB      = 'MemberCardLinks';
var MCL_NUM_COLS = 12;

var MCL = {
  ID: 0,
  CARD_ROW_ID: 1,        // FK to MemberCards.ID
  LINK_TYPE: 2,           // phone / sms / email / website / schedule / social / custom
  LABEL: 3,               // display label
  ICON: 4,                // emoji icon
  URL: 5,                 // the action URL or value
  SORT_ORDER: 6,
  VISIBLE: 7,
  PLATFORM: 8,            // optional: instagram, twitter, facebook, linkedin, youtube, tiktok
  STATUS: 9,
  CREATED_AT: 10,
  UPDATED_AT: 11
};

function memberCardLinkRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:      rowIndex,
    id:         String(vals[MCL.ID] || ''),
    cardRowId:  String(vals[MCL.CARD_ROW_ID] || ''),
    linkType:   String(vals[MCL.LINK_TYPE] || ''),
    label:      String(vals[MCL.LABEL] || ''),
    icon:       String(vals[MCL.ICON] || ''),
    url:        String(vals[MCL.URL] || ''),
    sortOrder:  Number(vals[MCL.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    visible:    String(vals[MCL.VISIBLE] || 'TRUE'),
    platform:   String(vals[MCL.PLATFORM] || ''),
    status:     String(vals[MCL.STATUS] || ''),
    createdAt:  isoDate(vals[MCL.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:  isoDate(vals[MCL.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Link Handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleMemberCardLinksList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.cardRowId) return jsonErr('cardRowId required');
  var data = allRows(db(), MCL_TAB, MCL_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MCL.CARD_ROW_ID]) !== params.cardRowId) continue;
    var obj = memberCardLinkRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Archived') continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleMemberCardLinksCreate(params, auth) {
  // Own card links or leader+
  var ss  = db();
  var cardHit = findRowById(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS, params.cardRowId);
  if (!cardHit) return jsonErr('Card not found');
  var isOwnCard = String(cardHit.vals[MC.EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === auth.email.toLowerCase();
  if (!isOwnCard) requireRole(auth, 2);

  if (!params.linkType || !params.url) return jsonErr('linkType and url required');
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(MCL_NUM_COLS);
  row[MCL.ID]          = id;
  row[MCL.CARD_ROW_ID] = String(params.cardRowId);
  row[MCL.LINK_TYPE]   = String(params.linkType);
  row[MCL.LABEL]       = String(params.label || params.linkType);
  row[MCL.ICON]        = String(params.icon || '🔗');
  row[MCL.URL]         = String(params.url);
  row[MCL.SORT_ORDER]  = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[MCL.VISIBLE]     = 'TRUE';
  row[MCL.PLATFORM]    = String(params.platform || '');
  row[MCL.STATUS]      = 'Active';
  row[MCL.CREATED_AT]  = now;
  row[MCL.UPDATED_AT]  = now;
  appendRow(ss, MCL_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'memberCards.links.create', MCL_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Link added' });
}

function handleMemberCardLinksUpdate(params, auth) {
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MCL_TAB, MCL_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Link not found');

  // Check ownership
  var cardHit = findRowById(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS, String(hit.vals[MCL.CARD_ROW_ID]));
  var isOwnCard = cardHit && String(cardHit.vals[MC.EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === auth.email.toLowerCase();
  if (!isOwnCard) requireRole(auth, 2);

  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.linkType !== undefined)   v[MCL.LINK_TYPE]   = String(params.linkType);
  if (params.label !== undefined)      v[MCL.LABEL]       = String(params.label);
  if (params.icon !== undefined)       v[MCL.ICON]        = String(params.icon);
  if (params.url !== undefined)        v[MCL.URL]         = String(params.url);
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)  v[MCL.SORT_ORDER]  = Number(params.sortOrder);
  if (params.visible !== undefined)    v[MCL.VISIBLE]     = (params.visible === true || params.visible === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.platform !== undefined)   v[MCL.PLATFORM]    = String(params.platform);
  if (params.status !== undefined)     v[MCL.STATUS]      = String(params.status);
  v[MCL.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MCL_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'memberCards.links.update', MCL_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Link updated' });
}

function handleMemberCardLinksDelete(params, auth) {
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MCL_TAB, MCL_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Link not found');

  var cardHit = findRowById(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS, String(hit.vals[MCL.CARD_ROW_ID]));
  var isOwnCard = cardHit && String(cardHit.vals[MC.EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === auth.email.toLowerCase();
  if (!isOwnCard) requireRole(auth, 2);

  hit.vals[MCL.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[MCL.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MCL_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'memberCards.links.delete', MCL_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Link removed' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 3. MEMBER CARD VIEWS (analytics)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MCV_TAB      = 'MemberCardViews';
var MCV_NUM_COLS = 8;

var MCV = {
  ID: 0,
  CARD_ROW_ID: 1,
  MEMBER_NUMBER: 2,
  VIEWER_EMAIL: 3,      // who viewed (or 'anonymous' for public)
  VIEW_SOURCE: 4,       // direct / qr / directory / share
  USER_AGENT: 5,
  IP_HASH: 6,           // hashed for privacy, not raw IP
  VIEWED_AT: 7
};

function memberCardViewRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:        rowIndex,
    id:           String(vals[MCV.ID] || ''),
    cardRowId:    String(vals[MCV.CARD_ROW_ID] || ''),
    memberNumber: String(vals[MCV.MEMBER_NUMBER] || ''),
    viewerEmail:  String(vals[MCV.VIEWER_EMAIL] || ''),
    viewSource:   String(vals[MCV.VIEW_SOURCE] || ''),
    userAgent:    String(vals[MCV.USER_AGENT] || ''),
    ipHash:       String(vals[MCV.IP_HASH] || ''),
    viewedAt:     isoDate(vals[MCV.VIEWED_AT])
  };
}

/** Internal: record a card view */
function recordCardView_(ss, cardRowId, memberNumber, viewerEmail) {
  var row = blankRow(MCV_NUM_COLS);
  row[MCV.ID]            = newId();
  row[MCV.CARD_ROW_ID]   = String(cardRowId);
  row[MCV.MEMBER_NUMBER] = String(memberNumber);
  row[MCV.VIEWER_EMAIL]  = String(viewerEmail || 'anonymous');
  row[MCV.VIEW_SOURCE]   = 'direct';
  row[MCV.VIEWED_AT]     = new Date();
  appendRow(ss, MCV_TAB, row);
}

function handleMemberCardViewsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+ to see view analytics
  var data = allRows(db(), MCV_TAB, MCV_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = memberCardViewRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.cardRowId && obj.cardRowId !== params.cardRowId) continue;
    if (params.memberNumber && obj.memberNumber !== params.memberNumber) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) {
    return (b.viewedAt || '').localeCompare(a.viewedAt || '');
  });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

/** View stats for own card (any authenticated user) */
function handleMemberCardViewsMine(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  // Find my card first
  var cardData = allRows(db(), MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
  var myCardId = null;
  for (var c = 0; c < cardData.length; c++) {
    if (String(cardData[c][MC.EMAIL]).toLowerCase() === auth.email.toLowerCase()) {
      myCardId = String(cardData[c][MC.ID]);
      break;
    }
  }
  if (!myCardId) return jsonErr('No card found for your account');

  var data = allRows(db(), MCV_TAB, MCV_NUM_COLS);
  var views = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MCV.CARD_ROW_ID]) === myCardId) {
      views.push(memberCardViewRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  views.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.viewedAt || '').localeCompare(a.viewedAt || ''); });
  return jsonOk({ totalViews: views.length, recentViews: views.slice(0, 50) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PUBLIC CARD WITH LINKS — Full card + all visible links in one call
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleMemberCardsPublicFull(params, authOrNull) {
  // Get the card
  var cardResult = handleMemberCardsPublic(params, authOrNull);
  var parsed;
  try {
    parsed = JSON.parse(cardResult.getContent());
  } catch (e) {
    return cardResult; // pass through error
  }
  if (!parsed.ok) return cardResult;

  var cardData = parsed.data;
  var cardId = cardData.id;
  if (!cardId) return cardResult; // public view doesn't have id

  // Get visible links
  var linkData = allRows(db(), MCL_TAB, MCL_NUM_COLS);
  var links = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < linkData.length; i++) {
    if (String(linkData[i][MCL.CARD_ROW_ID]) !== cardId) continue;
    if (String(linkData[i][MCL.STATUS]) === 'Archived') continue;
    if (String(linkData[i][MCL.VISIBLE]) !== 'TRUE') continue;
    links.push(memberCardLinkRowToObject(linkData[i], i + 2));
  }
  links.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });

  cardData.links = links;
  return jsonOk(cardData);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// VCARD GENERATION — Download a contact as .vcf
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleMemberCardsVcard(params, authOrNull) {
  if (!params.memberNumber && !params.id) return jsonErr('memberNumber or id required');
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
  var card = null;

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (params.memberNumber && String(data[i][MC.MEMBER_NUMBER]) === params.memberNumber) {
      card = memberCardRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      break;
    }
    if (params.id && String(data[i][MC.ID]) === params.id) {
      card = memberCardRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      break;
    }
  }

  if (!card || card.status === 'Archived' || card.active !== 'TRUE') {
    return jsonErr('Card not found');
  }

  // Visibility check
  var viewerRole = (authOrNull && typeof authOrNull.role !== 'undefined') ? Number(authOrNull.role) : -1;
  if (card.visibility === 'private' && viewerRole < 2) return jsonErr('Card is private');
  if (card.visibility === 'authenticated' && viewerRole < 0) return jsonErr('Authentication required');

  var lines = [
    'BEGIN:VCARD',
    'VERSION:3.0',
    'N:' + vcfEscape_(card.lastName) + ';' + vcfEscape_(card.firstName) + ';;;' + vcfEscape_(card.suffix),
    'FN:' + vcfEscape_((card.preferredName || card.firstName) + ' ' + card.lastName)
  ];

  if (card.cardTitle)  lines.push('TITLE:' + vcfEscape_(card.cardTitle));
  if (card.ministry)   lines.push('ORG:' + vcfEscape_(card.ministry));
  if (card.phoneVisible === 'TRUE' && card.phone) {
    lines.push('TEL;TYPE=CELL:' + vcfEscape_(card.phone));
  }
  if (card.emailVisible === 'TRUE' && card.email) {
    lines.push('EMAIL:' + vcfEscape_(card.email));
  }
  if (card.websiteUrl)  lines.push('URL:' + vcfEscape_(card.websiteUrl));
  if (card.photoUrl)    lines.push('PHOTO;VALUE=URI:' + vcfEscape_(card.photoUrl));

  lines.push('NOTE:Member ' + vcfEscape_(card.memberNumber));
  lines.push('END:VCARD');

  return ContentService.createTextOutput(lines.join('\r\n'))
    .setMimeType(ContentService.MimeType.TEXT);
}

/** Escape special characters for vCard */
function vcfEscape_(str) {
  return String(str || '').replace(/[\\;,\n]/g, function(c) {
    if (c === '\n') return '\\n';
    return '\\' + c;
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DIRECTORY — Public-facing member directory (card-based)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleMemberCardsDirectory(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);

  // Use getTab() — the same proven accessor used by login, user list, approve
  var sheet;
  try { sheet = getTab('AuthUsers'); } catch (e) {
    return jsonErr('AuthUsers tab not found: ' + e.message);
  }

  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('AuthUsers has no data rows (lastRow=' + lastRow + ')');

  var authData = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  var out = [];
  for (var a = 0; a < authData.length; a++) {
    var aEmail  = normalizeEmail(String(authData[a][0] || ''));
    var aStatus = String(authData[a][7] || '').trim().toLowerCase();
    if (!aEmail || aStatus !== 'active') continue;
    out.push({
      id:            aEmail,
      email:         aEmail,
      memberNumber:  '',
      firstName:     String(authData[a][4] || ''),
      lastName:      String(authData[a][5] || ''),
      preferredName: '',
      photoUrl:      '',
      cardTitle:     '',
      ministry:      '',
      smallGroup:    '',
      cardIcon:      '',
      colorScheme:   '',
      visibility:    'authenticated'
    });
  }

  // Enrich with MemberCard data where available (photo, preferredName, etc.)
  try {
    var ss = db();
    var cardData = allRows(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
    var cardByEmail = {};
    for (var c = 0; c < cardData.length; c++) {
      var ce = normalizeEmail(String(cardData[c][MC.EMAIL] || ''));
      if (ce) cardByEmail[ce] = memberCardRowToObject(cardData[c], c + 2);
    }
    for (var i = 0; i < out.length; i++) {
      var card = cardByEmail[out[i].email];
      if (card) {
        out[i].id            = card.id;
        out[i].memberNumber  = card.memberNumber;
        out[i].firstName     = card.firstName || out[i].firstName;
        out[i].lastName      = card.lastName || out[i].lastName;
        out[i].preferredName = card.preferredName;
        out[i].photoUrl      = card.photoUrl;
        out[i].cardTitle     = card.cardTitle;
        out[i].ministry      = card.ministry;
        out[i].smallGroup    = card.smallGroup;
        out[i].cardIcon      = card.cardIcon;
        out[i].colorScheme   = card.colorScheme;
        out[i].visibility    = card.visibility;
      }
    }
  } catch (_) { /* enrichment is optional — directory still works without card data */ }

  out.sort(function(a, b) {
    var aName = ((a.lastName || '') + (a.firstName || '')).toLowerCase();
    var bName = ((b.lastName || '') + (b.firstName || '')).toLowerCase();
    return aName.localeCompare(bName);
  });

  return jsonOk(out);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DASHBOARD — Summary stats
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleMemberCardsDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var ss = db();

  var cards = allRows(ss, MC_TAB, MC_NUM_COLS);
  var active = 0, total = 0, publicCount = 0, authCount = 0, privateCount = 0;
  var totalViews = 0;
  for (var c = 0; c < cards.length; c++) {
    if (String(cards[c][MC.STATUS]) === 'Archived') continue;
    total++;
    if (String(cards[c][MC.ACTIVE]) === 'TRUE') active++;
    var vis = String(cards[c][MC.VISIBILITY] || '');
    if (vis === 'public') publicCount++;
    else if (vis === 'authenticated') authCount++;
    else if (vis === 'private') privateCount++;
    totalViews += Number(cards[c][MC.VIEW_COUNT] || 0);
  }

  var views = allRows(ss, MCV_TAB, MCV_NUM_COLS);

  return jsonOk({
    totalCards:     total,
    activeCards:    active,
    publicCards:    publicCount,
    authCards:      authCount,
    privateCards:   privateCount,
    totalViews:     totalViews,
    viewRecords:    views.length
  });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Care.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: SPIRITUAL CARE — Shepherding & Care Tracking
// Tabs: SpiritualCareCases, SpiritualCareInteractions, SpiritualCareAssignments
//
// This module tracks how the church shepherds its people:
//   - Cases: individual care situations (grief, crisis, new believer, etc.)
//   - Interactions: follow-up log entries against each case
//   - Assignments: persistent shepherd-to-sheep relationships
//
// Confidential cases (Confidential=TRUE) are restricted to pastor+ roles.
// Links to the Ministries module via Assigned Team ID (e.g. "Spiritual Care" ministry).
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SPIRITUAL CARE CASES
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SCC_TAB = 'SpiritualCareCases';
var SCC_NUM_COLS = 19;

var SCC = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, CARE_TYPE: 2, PRIORITY: 3, STATUS: 4,
  SUMMARY: 5, TEAM_ID: 6, PRIMARY_CG: 7, SECONDARY_CG: 8,
  OPENED: 9, TARGET_DATE: 10, RESOLVED: 11, REFERRAL: 12,
  CONFIDENTIAL: 13, NOTES: 14, CREATED_BY: 15, CREATED_AT: 16,
  UPDATED_BY: 17, UPDATED_AT: 18
};

// Canonical values that match the Google Sheet data-validation rules.
// Any write-back of a row must pass through normalizeCareRow_() so
// dirty values stored by earlier code don't trigger validation errors.
var SCC_VALID_PRIORITY = { low:'Low', normal:'Normal', high:'High', urgent:'Urgent' };
var SCC_VALID_STATUS   = { open:'Open', 'in progress':'In Progress', 'in-progress':'In Progress',
                           'follow-up':'Follow-Up', followup:'Follow-Up',
                           resolved:'Resolved', referred:'Referred', closed:'Closed' };
var SCC_VALID_CARE_TYPE = {
  shepherding:'Shepherding', 'elder care':'Elder Care', eldercare:'Elder Care',
  crisis:'Crisis', grief:'Grief', marriage:'Marriage',
  addiction:'Addiction', 'hospital visit':'Hospital Visit', hospitalvisit:'Hospital Visit',
  'new believer':'New Believer', newbeliever:'New Believer', restoration:'Restoration',
  counseling:'Counseling', discipleship:'Discipleship', family:'Family',
  financial:'Financial', medical:'Medical', other:'Other',
  // New care types
  'abuse / domestic violence':'Abuse / Domestic Violence', 'abuse/dv':'Abuse / Domestic Violence', dv:'Abuse / Domestic Violence',
  'immigration / deportation':'Immigration / Deportation', immigration:'Immigration / Deportation', deportation:'Immigration / Deportation',
  'incarceration & re-entry':'Incarceration & Re-Entry', incarceration:'Incarceration & Re-Entry', reentry:'Incarceration & Re-Entry', 're-entry':'Incarceration & Re-Entry',
  'pregnancy & infant loss':'Pregnancy & Infant Loss', 'pregnancy loss':'Pregnancy & Infant Loss', miscarriage:'Pregnancy & Infant Loss', stillbirth:'Pregnancy & Infant Loss',
  'pre-marriage':'Pre-Marriage', premarriage:'Pre-Marriage', 'pre marriage':'Pre-Marriage', premarital:'Pre-Marriage',
  'pornography / sexual addiction':'Pornography / Sexual Addiction', pornography:'Pornography / Sexual Addiction', 'sexual addiction':'Pornography / Sexual Addiction',
  'terminal illness / end of life':'Terminal Illness / End of Life', 'terminal illness':'Terminal Illness / End of Life', hospice:'Terminal Illness / End of Life', terminal:'Terminal Illness / End of Life',
  'new member integration':'New Member Integration', 'new member':'New Member Integration', integration:'New Member Integration',
  'mental health':'Mental Health', mentalhealth:'Mental Health',
  'gender identity / sexuality':'Gender Identity / Sexuality', 'gender identity':'Gender Identity / Sexuality', sexuality:'Gender Identity / Sexuality',
  // Legacy normalization
  bereavement:'Grief', spiritual:'Shepherding', relationship:'Marriage'
};

function normalizeCareRow_(row) {
  var p = String(row[SCC.PRIORITY] || '').toLowerCase();
  if (SCC_VALID_PRIORITY[p]) row[SCC.PRIORITY] = SCC_VALID_PRIORITY[p];
  else if (p === 'critical') row[SCC.PRIORITY] = 'Urgent';

  var s = String(row[SCC.STATUS] || '').toLowerCase();
  if (SCC_VALID_STATUS[s]) row[SCC.STATUS] = SCC_VALID_STATUS[s];

  var c = String(row[SCC.CARE_TYPE] || '').toLowerCase();
  if (SCC_VALID_CARE_TYPE[c]) row[SCC.CARE_TYPE] = SCC_VALID_CARE_TYPE[c];
  return row;
}

function caseRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:              rowIndex,
    id:                 String(vals[SCC.ID] || ''),
    memberId:           String(vals[SCC.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    careType:           String(vals[SCC.CARE_TYPE] || ''),
    priority:           String(vals[SCC.PRIORITY] || ''),
    status:             String(vals[SCC.STATUS] || ''),
    summary:            String(vals[SCC.SUMMARY] || ''),
    assignedTeamId:     String(vals[SCC.TEAM_ID] || ''),
    primaryCaregiverId: String(vals[SCC.PRIMARY_CG] || ''),
    secondaryCaregiverId: String(vals[SCC.SECONDARY_CG] || ''),
    openedDate:         isoDate(vals[SCC.OPENED]),
    targetResolveDate:  isoDate(vals[SCC.TARGET_DATE]),
    resolvedDate:       isoDate(vals[SCC.RESOLVED]),
    referralInfo:       String(vals[SCC.REFERRAL] || ''),
    confidential:       toBool(vals[SCC.CONFIDENTIAL]),
    notes:              String(vals[SCC.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:          String(vals[SCC.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:          isoDate(vals[SCC.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedBy:          String(vals[SCC.UPDATED_BY] || ''),
    updatedAt:          isoDate(vals[SCC.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

/**
 * Determines whether the caller can see a case.
 * Confidential cases require pastor+ role.
 * Non-confidential: care+ can see all; volunteers can see cases assigned to them.
 */
function canSeeCase_(caseObj, auth) {
  if (caseObj.confidential && !hasRole(auth, 'pastor')) return false;
  if (hasRole(auth, 'care')) return true;
  // Volunteers can only see cases where they are a caregiver
  return (caseObj.primaryCaregiverId === auth.email ||
          caseObj.secondaryCaregiverId === auth.email);
}

function handleCareList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(SCC_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SCC_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var memberId = String(params.memberId || '').trim();
  var status = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var careType = String(params.careType || '').trim();
  var priority = String(params.priority || '').trim();
  var teamId = String(params.teamId || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = caseRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (!canSeeCase_(obj, auth)) continue;
    if (memberId && obj.memberId !== memberId) continue;
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    if (careType && obj.careType !== careType) continue;
    if (priority && obj.priority !== priority) continue;
    if (teamId && obj.assignedTeamId !== teamId) continue;
    stripCareNotes_(obj, auth);
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleCareGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var caseId = String(params.caseId || '').trim();
  if (!caseId) return jsonErr('caseId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SCC_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Case not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SCC_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SCC.ID]) === caseId) {
      var obj = caseRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      if (!canSeeCase_(obj, auth)) return jsonErr('Access denied — confidential case.');
      stripCareNotes_(obj, auth);
      // Attach interactions
      obj.interactions = getCareInteractions_(caseId, auth);
      return jsonOk({ row: obj });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Case not found.');
}

/**
 * Returns a pastoral action plan object for the given care type.
 * Each plan has:
 *   - deadline: response window
 *   - steps: ordered immediate action steps
 *   - plan: the ongoing pastoral care plan
 *   - scripture: an anchor verse
 */
function getCareActionPlan_(careType) {
  var plans = {
    'Shepherding': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Reach out personally — call or visit.', 'Listen without judgment. Be fully present.', 'Pray with them before you leave or hang up.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Maintain regular check-ins (weekly or bi-weekly). Identify any unmet practical needs. Connect them to a small group or community if isolated. Monitor spiritual health over time.',
      scripture: '"I am the good shepherd. The good shepherd lays down his life for the sheep." — John 10:11'
    },
    'Elder Care': {
      deadline: '48 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact — visit in person if possible.', 'Assess their physical, emotional, and spiritual needs.', 'Identify family or support network involvement.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Schedule consistent visits. Coordinate with family members where appropriate. Arrange practical assistance (meals, transportation). Provide regular communion and prayer.',
      scripture: '"Gray hair is a crown of glory; it is gained in a righteous life." — Proverbs 16:31'
    },
    'Crisis': {
      deadline: '24 hours',
      steps: ['Make immediate contact. Do not wait.', 'Assess for safety — is anyone in danger?', 'If there is a safety risk, involve appropriate authorities.', 'Stay with them or arrange someone to be present.', 'Log the interaction and all safety details in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Daily check-ins until the acute crisis has passed. Connect to professional counseling immediately. Assign a secondary caregiver. Debrief with pastoral team. Review weekly.',
      scripture: '"God is our refuge and strength, an ever-present help in trouble." — Psalm 46:1'
    },
    'Abuse / Domestic Violence': {
      deadline: '24 hours',
      steps: ['Make confidential contact. Do not involve the abuser.', 'Listen and believe. Do not minimize or question their account.', 'Assess immediate safety — do they need to leave?', 'Connect to a local shelter or DV hotline (1-800-799-7233).', 'Involve church leadership. Log everything in FlockOS (mark confidential).'],
      plan: 'Do not attempt to mediate between victim and abuser. Maintain a safety plan. Provide ongoing trauma-informed support. Connect to legal and professional resources. This case requires senior pastoral oversight.',
      scripture: '"The Lord is a refuge for the oppressed, a stronghold in times of trouble." — Psalm 9:9'
    },
    'Immigration / Deportation': {
      deadline: '48 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact and establish trust.', 'Assess the urgency — is there an active legal proceeding?', 'Connect to immigration legal resources immediately if needed.', 'Assess the needs of any children or dependents.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Connect to an immigration attorney or legal aid organization. Provide practical support (housing, transportation, finances). Pray consistently with the family. Keep the broader pastoral team informed.',
      scripture: '"The foreigner residing among you must be treated as your native-born." — Leviticus 19:34'
    },
    'Incarceration & Re-Entry': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Make contact — letter, call, or visit depending on situation.', 'Affirm dignity and God\'s love without conditions.', 'Identify family members who may also need support.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Maintain consistent communication throughout incarceration. Plan for re-entry needs: housing, employment, community. Connect to a re-entry ministry if available. Do not abandon upon release — this is the most critical moment.',
      scripture: '"I was in prison and you came to visit me." — Matthew 25:36'
    },
    'Grief': {
      deadline: '24 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact immediately — presence is the ministry.', 'Do not offer explanations. Simply be with them in their pain.', 'Ask about practical needs (meals, childcare, arrangements).', 'Pray with them.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Show up consistently — grief does not resolve quickly. Check in at the 1-week, 1-month, and 1-year marks specifically. Grief often intensifies at holidays and anniversaries. Do not rush the process.',
      scripture: '"Blessed are those who mourn, for they will be comforted." — Matthew 5:4'
    },
    'Pregnancy & Infant Loss': {
      deadline: '24 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact immediately. Come in person if possible.', 'Do not offer explanations or theological rationale for the loss.', 'Acknowledge the full reality of their child\'s life and death.', 'Ask how you can serve them practically right now.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS (mark confidential).'],
      plan: 'Follow up at 1 week, 1 month, and at the due date or anniversary. Include both partners — fathers often grieve silently and unseen. Consider connecting to a pregnancy loss support group.',
      scripture: '"He heals the brokenhearted and binds up their wounds." — Psalm 147:3'
    },
    'Marriage': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Make contact with the couple or the individual who reached out.', 'Schedule an initial meeting with both spouses if possible.', 'Listen to understand, not to judge.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS (mark confidential).'],
      plan: 'Provide structured marriage counseling or refer to a licensed Christian therapist. Do not take sides. Set clear boundaries and expectations. Reassess at 30, 60, and 90 days.',
      scripture: '"Love is patient, love is kind... it always protects, always trusts, always hopes, always perseveres." — 1 Corinthians 13:4,7'
    },
    'Pre-Marriage': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Schedule an initial meeting with the couple.', 'Share the church\'s premarital process and expectations.', 'Begin assessment of their readiness and any concerns.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Walk through a structured premarital curriculum (Prepare/Enrich or equivalent). Cover: communication, finances, family of origin, conflict, expectations, theology of marriage. Minimum 6 sessions before marriage.',
      scripture: '"Therefore a man shall leave his father and his mother and hold fast to his wife, and they shall become one flesh." — Genesis 2:24'
    },
    'Addiction': {
      deadline: '48 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact. Express care, not condemnation.', 'Assess the level of danger — is detox needed? Is there a safety risk?', 'Identify who else knows and who is providing support.', 'Connect to a professional counselor or recovery program.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS (mark confidential).'],
      plan: 'Do not try to manage this alone. Connect to an addiction counselor and/or recovery community (AA, Celebrate Recovery, etc.). Provide accountability and consistent pastoral presence. Set clear, compassionate boundaries with enabling behaviors.',
      scripture: '"It is for freedom that Christ has set us free." — Galatians 5:1'
    },
    'Pornography / Sexual Addiction': {
      deadline: '48 hours',
      steps: ['Create a safe, non-shaming environment for disclosure.', 'Assess impact on a spouse or family if applicable.', 'Connect to a trained counselor or accountability program.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS (mark confidential — do not share broadly).'],
      plan: 'Assign a same-gender pastoral accountability partner. Connect to Covenant Eyes, Pure Desire, or similar program. Check in bi-weekly. Address root causes: shame, trauma, isolation. Involve a licensed therapist for deeper work.',
      scripture: '"Flee from sexual immorality... you were bought at a price. Therefore honor God with your bodies." — 1 Corinthians 6:18,20'
    },
    'Hospital Visit': {
      deadline: '24 hours',
      steps: ['Visit in person as soon as possible.', 'Bring presence, prayer, and Scripture — not advice.', 'Identify the family\'s emotional and practical needs.', 'Coordinate with other pastors or elders to ensure coverage.', 'Log the visit in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Maintain regular visits for extended stays. Pray over them and anoint with oil if appropriate (James 5:14). Keep the congregation praying. Follow up after discharge.',
      scripture: '"I was sick and you looked after me." — Matthew 25:36'
    },
    'Medical': {
      deadline: '48 hours',
      steps: ['Reach out personally to express care.', 'Ask about the nature of the diagnosis and their emotional state.', 'Pray with them.', 'Identify any practical needs.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Follow up consistently throughout treatment. Coordinate meals, transportation, and childcare through the care team where appropriate. Keep the person connected to community — isolation compounds suffering.',
      scripture: '"The Lord sustains them on their sickbed and restores them from their bed of illness." — Psalm 41:3'
    },
    'Terminal Illness / End of Life': {
      deadline: '24 hours',
      steps: ['Visit in person as soon as possible.', 'Be fully present. Do not fill the silence.', 'Ask what they need most from you right now.', 'Address any spiritual fears or unfinished business with gentleness.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Work with the family to provide consistent pastoral presence. Offer Communion. Help them complete any spiritual legacy they wish to leave. Support the family in anticipatory grief. Be there at the end if invited.',
      scripture: '"Even though I walk through the darkest valley, I will fear no evil, for you are with me." — Psalm 23:4'
    },
    'New Believer': {
      deadline: '48 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact to celebrate and affirm their decision.', 'Schedule a follow-up meeting to explain next steps.', 'Connect them to a small group and a mentor.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Walk them through the basics of the faith over 6–8 weeks: assurance of salvation, prayer, Bible reading, baptism, community. Assign a discipleship mentor. Set a baptism date.',
      scripture: '"Therefore, if anyone is in Christ, the new creation has come: The old has gone, the new is here!" — 2 Corinthians 5:17'
    },
    'New Member Integration': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Reach out personally to welcome them.', 'Schedule a membership or connection meeting.', 'Identify their spiritual gifts and areas of interest.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Walk through the membership process. Connect them to a small group within 2 weeks. Find a place of service within 60 days. Follow up at 30 and 90 days to check on their sense of belonging.',
      scripture: '"Consequently, you are no longer foreigners and strangers, but fellow citizens with God\'s people." — Ephesians 2:19'
    },
    'Restoration': {
      deadline: '48 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact with gentleness and humility.', 'Listen to their story fully before responding.', 'Establish that restoration is possible and desired.', 'Clarify the process: repentance, accountability, time.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS (mark confidential).'],
      plan: 'Restoration is a process, not an event. Set clear milestones and accountability structures. Involve only those who need to know. Protect the dignity of the individual throughout. Seek elder oversight for any restoration involving leadership.',
      scripture: '"Brothers and sisters, if someone is caught in a sin, you who live by the Spirit should restore that person gently." — Galatians 6:1'
    },
    'Counseling': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Schedule an initial intake meeting.', 'Clarify scope — pastoral counseling vs. licensed therapy referral.', 'Identify the primary presenting concern.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS (mark confidential).'],
      plan: 'Provide up to 3–4 pastoral counseling sessions. For ongoing or clinical needs, refer to a licensed Christian counselor. Maintain pastoral support alongside professional counseling. Do not overextend beyond your training.',
      scripture: '"Plans fail for lack of counsel, but with many advisers they succeed." — Proverbs 15:22'
    },
    'Mental Health': {
      deadline: '48 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact. Approach with compassion, not fear.', 'Assess for safety — any thoughts of self-harm or suicide?', 'If there is a safety risk, do not leave them alone. Call for help if needed (988 Suicide & Crisis Lifeline).', 'Connect to a licensed mental health professional immediately.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS (mark confidential).'],
      plan: 'Do not attempt to provide therapy — provide pastoral presence and support. Maintain consistent check-ins alongside professional treatment. Reduce stigma by normalizing care. Pray consistently. Do not promise more than you can deliver.',
      scripture: '"Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you." — 1 Peter 5:7'
    },
    'Gender Identity / Sexuality': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Create a safe, non-reactive space for honest conversation.', 'Listen to understand — do not immediately correct or debate.', 'Affirm your commitment to their dignity and your relationship.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS (mark confidential — senior pastoral only).'],
      plan: 'This conversation requires patience, theological clarity, and deep relational trust. Do not rush to resolution. Walk with them over time. Senior pastoral oversight is required. Connect to specialized resources as appropriate.',
      scripture: '"My command is this: Love each other as I have loved you." — John 15:12'
    },
    'Discipleship': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Schedule a meeting to assess their spiritual stage and goals.', 'Identify a discipleship path or mentor.', 'Establish a meeting rhythm.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Match to an appropriate discipleship track in FlockOS. Assign a mentor. Set measurable 90-day goals. Review at the 30, 60, and 90-day marks.',
      scripture: '"And the things you have heard me say... entrust to reliable people who will also be qualified to teach others." — 2 Timothy 2:2'
    },
    'Family': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact with the individual or family.', 'Understand the specific nature of the situation.', 'Identify who in the family needs care and how.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Provide consistent pastoral presence. Connect to family counseling resources as needed. Monitor for escalation. Keep family members in prayer by name.',
      scripture: '"As for me and my household, we will serve the Lord." — Joshua 24:15'
    },
    'Financial': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Meet in person to understand the situation fully.', 'Assess the nature: temporary hardship vs. ongoing pattern.', 'Connect to the Compassion/Benevolence team for practical assistance.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Address immediate needs through the Compassion fund. Connect to a financial counseling resource (Crown Financial, Dave Ramsey, etc.). Provide accountability and a plan. Address any spiritual or behavioral root causes with gentleness.',
      scripture: '"And my God will meet all your needs according to the riches of his glory in Christ Jesus." — Philippians 4:19'
    },
    'Other': {
      deadline: '72 hours',
      steps: ['Make personal contact to understand the need.', 'Assess what kind of care is most appropriate.', 'Assign a caregiver and establish a follow-up rhythm.', 'Log the interaction in FlockOS.'],
      plan: 'Provide consistent pastoral presence and prayer. Reassess the care type at the first follow-up and update if a more specific category applies.',
      scripture: '"Carry each other\'s burdens, and in this way you will fulfill the law of Christ." — Galatians 6:2'
    }
  };
  return plans[careType] || plans['Other'];
}

function handleCareCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(SCC_NUM_COLS);

  row[SCC.ID]           = generateId();
  row[SCC.MEMBER_ID]    = String(params.memberId);
  row[SCC.CARE_TYPE]    = String(params.careType || 'Shepherding');
  row[SCC.PRIORITY]     = String(params.priority || 'Normal');
  row[SCC.STATUS]       = 'Open';
  row[SCC.SUMMARY]      = String(params.summary || '');
  row[SCC.TEAM_ID]      = String(params.teamId || '');

  // Auto-assign to lead pastor if no primary caregiver is specified
  var leadPastorId = getAppConfigValue_('LEAD_PASTOR_MEMBER_ID', '');
  row[SCC.PRIMARY_CG]   = String(params.primaryCaregiverId || leadPastorId || '');
  row[SCC.SECONDARY_CG] = String(params.secondaryCaregiverId || '');
  row[SCC.OPENED]       = params.openedDate || now.substring(0, 10);
  row[SCC.TARGET_DATE]  = params.targetResolveDate || '';
  row[SCC.RESOLVED]     = '';
  row[SCC.REFERRAL]     = String(params.referralInfo || '');
  row[SCC.CONFIDENTIAL] = toBool(params.confidential);
  row[SCC.NOTES]        = String(params.notes || '');
  row[SCC.CREATED_BY]   = auth.email;
  row[SCC.CREATED_AT]   = now;
  row[SCC.UPDATED_BY]   = auth.email;
  row[SCC.UPDATED_AT]   = now;

  var sheet = getTab(SCC_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'care.create', SCC_TAB, newIndex,
    'Member: ' + params.memberId + ' — ' + (params.careType || 'Shepherding') +
    (row[SCC.PRIMARY_CG] ? ' — Assigned to: ' + row[SCC.PRIMARY_CG] : ''));

  // Notify pastors when a new care case is opened — single clean email, names not IDs
  var _notifyFlag = getAppConfigValue_('NOTIFY_CARE_CASE', 'TRUE');
  console.log('[handleCareCreate_] NOTIFY_CARE_CASE=' + _notifyFlag);
  if (String(_notifyFlag).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE') {
    try {
      var _careType   = String(row[SCC.CARE_TYPE]  || 'Shepherding');
      var _priority   = String(row[SCC.PRIORITY]   || 'Normal');
      var _summary    = String(row[SCC.SUMMARY] || '(none)');
      var _targetDate = String(row[SCC.TARGET_DATE] || '');
      var _memId      = String(row[SCC.MEMBER_ID] || '');
      var _memInfo    = getCaregiverEmail_(_memId);
      var _memName    = _memInfo ? _memInfo.name : '(unknown — ID: ' + _memId + ')';
      var _cgId       = String(row[SCC.PRIMARY_CG] || '');
