      var _cgInfo     = _cgId ? getCaregiverEmail_(_cgId) : null;
      var _assignedTo = _cgInfo ? _cgInfo.name : (_cgId ? '(ID: ' + _cgId + ')' : 'Unassigned');
      var _plan       = getCareActionPlan_(_careType);

      var _stepsText = '';
      for (var _s = 0; _s < _plan.steps.length; _s++) {
        _stepsText += '\n  ' + (_s + 1) + '. ' + _plan.steps[_s];
      }

      console.log('[handleCareCreate_] About to call notifyPastorsAndAdmins_ for careType=' + _careType + ' memName=' + _memName);

      notifyPastorsAndAdmins_(
        'New Care Case: ' + _memName + ' (' + _careType + ' · ' + _priority + ')',
        'A new care case has been opened and needs your attention.\n\n' +

        'MEMBER\n' +
        '  ' + _memName + '\n\n' +

        'CASE\n' +
        '  Type:        ' + _careType + '\n' +
        '  Priority:    ' + _priority + '\n' +
        '  Assigned to: ' + _assignedTo + '\n' +
        (_targetDate ? '  Target Date: ' + _targetDate + '\n' : '') +
        '  Opened by:   ' + auth.email + '\n' +
        '  Case ID:     ' + row[SCC.ID] + '\n\n' +

        'SUMMARY\n' +
        '  ' + _summary + '\n\n' +

        'IMMEDIATE STEPS (respond within ' + _plan.deadline + ')' +
        _stepsText + '\n\n' +

        'PASTORAL ACTION PLAN\n' +
        '  ' + _plan.plan + '\n\n' +

        _plan.scripture,
        'care.create',
        'NOTIF_CARE'
      );
      console.log('[handleCareCreate_] notifyPastorsAndAdmins_ completed');
    } catch (notifyErr) {
      console.log('[handleCareCreate_] NOTIFICATION FAILED: ' + String(notifyErr));
    }
  }

  return jsonOk({ row: caseRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleCareUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');

  // Use ONE sheet reference for both read and write
  var sheet = getTab(SCC_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Case not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SCC_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var target = String(params.id || '').trim();
  if (!target) return jsonErr('Missing case id.');

  var rowIndex = -1;
  var existing = null;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][0]).trim() === target) {
      rowIndex = i + 2;
      existing = data[i];
      break;
    }
  }
  if (!existing) return jsonErr('Case not found: ' + target);

  var now = isoNow();

  // Confidential cases require pastor+ to modify
  if (toBool(existing[SCC.CONFIDENTIAL])) requireRole(auth, 'pastor');

  // Capture previous caregivers before any updates for reassignment detection
  var prevPrimaryCg   = String(existing[SCC.PRIMARY_CG]   || '');
  var prevSecondaryCg = String(existing[SCC.SECONDARY_CG] || '');

  if (params.careType != null)            existing[SCC.CARE_TYPE]    = String(params.careType);
  if (params.priority != null)            existing[SCC.PRIORITY]     = String(params.priority);
  if (params.status != null)              existing[SCC.STATUS]       = String(params.status);
  if (params.summary != null)             existing[SCC.SUMMARY]      = String(params.summary);
  if (params.teamId != null)              existing[SCC.TEAM_ID]      = String(params.teamId);
  if (params.primaryCaregiverId != null)  existing[SCC.PRIMARY_CG]   = String(params.primaryCaregiverId);
  if (params.secondaryCaregiverId != null)existing[SCC.SECONDARY_CG] = String(params.secondaryCaregiverId);
  if (params.targetResolveDate != null)   existing[SCC.TARGET_DATE]  = params.targetResolveDate;
  if (params.referralInfo != null)        existing[SCC.REFERRAL]     = String(params.referralInfo);
  if (params.confidential != null)        existing[SCC.CONFIDENTIAL] = toBool(params.confidential);
  if (params.notes != null)               existing[SCC.NOTES]        = String(params.notes);

  // Auto-set resolved date when status changes to Resolved/Closed
  if (params.status === 'Resolved' || params.status === 'Closed') {
    if (!existing[SCC.RESOLVED]) existing[SCC.RESOLVED] = now.substring(0, 10);
  }

  existing[SCC.UPDATED_BY] = auth.email;
  existing[SCC.UPDATED_AT] = now;

  normalizeCareRow_(existing);
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SCC_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  SpreadsheetApp.flush();

  var newPrimaryCg = String(existing[SCC.PRIMARY_CG] || '');
  var auditDetail  = String(existing[SCC.STATUS]);
  if (newPrimaryCg && newPrimaryCg !== prevPrimaryCg) {
    auditDetail += ' — Reassigned from ' + (prevPrimaryCg || 'none') + ' to ' + newPrimaryCg;
  }
  writeAudit(auth, 'care.update', SCC_TAB, rowIndex, auditDetail);

  // Notify new caregiver if the primary caregiver changed
  if (newPrimaryCg && newPrimaryCg !== prevPrimaryCg) {
    notifyCareAssignment_(existing, newPrimaryCg, !!prevPrimaryCg);
  }

  // Notify secondary caregiver if assigned/changed and they are not a pastor
  var newSecondaryCg = String(existing[SCC.SECONDARY_CG] || '');
  if (newSecondaryCg && newSecondaryCg !== prevSecondaryCg && !isCaregiverPastor_(newSecondaryCg)) {
    notifyCareAssignment_(existing, newSecondaryCg, !!prevSecondaryCg);
  }

  return jsonOk({ row: caseRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleCareResolve(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');

  // Use ONE sheet reference for both read and write (avoids db()/getTab split)
  var sheet = getTab(SCC_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Case not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SCC_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var target = String(params.id || '').trim();
  if (!target) return jsonErr('Missing case id.');

  var rowIndex = -1;
  var existing = null;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][0]).trim() === target) {
      rowIndex = i + 2;
      existing = data[i];
      break;
    }
  }
  if (!existing) return jsonErr('Case not found: ' + target);

  if (toBool(existing[SCC.CONFIDENTIAL])) requireRole(auth, 'pastor');

  var now = isoNow();
  existing[SCC.STATUS]     = 'Resolved';
  existing[SCC.RESOLVED]   = now.substring(0, 10);
  existing[SCC.UPDATED_BY] = auth.email;
  existing[SCC.UPDATED_AT] = now;
  if (params.notes != null) existing[SCC.NOTES] = String(params.notes);

  normalizeCareRow_(existing);
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SCC_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  SpreadsheetApp.flush();

  // Verify the write actually persisted
  var verify = String(sheet.getRange(rowIndex, SCC.STATUS + 1).getValue());
  if (verify !== 'Resolved') {
    return jsonErr('Write did not persist — status is still "' + verify + '". Check sheet protection or data validation on column ' + (SCC.STATUS + 1) + '.');
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'care.resolve', SCC_TAB, rowIndex,
    'Member: ' + String(existing[SCC.MEMBER_ID]));
  return jsonOk({ row: caseRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SPIRITUAL CARE INTERACTIONS (follow-up log per case)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SCI_TAB = 'SpiritualCareInteractions';
var SCI_NUM_COLS = 12;

var SCI = {
  ID: 0, CASE_ID: 1, DATE: 2, TYPE: 3, CAREGIVER_ID: 4,
  DURATION: 5, SUMMARY: 6, FOLLOWUP_NEEDED: 7,
  FOLLOWUP_DATE: 8, FOLLOWUP_DONE: 9, CONFIDENTIAL: 10, CREATED_AT: 11
};

function interactionRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[SCI.ID] || ''),
    caseId:         String(vals[SCI.CASE_ID] || ''),
    interactionDate:isoDate(vals[SCI.DATE]),
    type:           String(vals[SCI.TYPE] || ''),
    caregiverId:    String(vals[SCI.CAREGIVER_ID] || ''),
    durationMinutes:Number(vals[SCI.DURATION] || 0),
    summary:        String(vals[SCI.SUMMARY] || ''),
    followUpNeeded: toBool(vals[SCI.FOLLOWUP_NEEDED]),
    followUpDate:   isoDate(vals[SCI.FOLLOWUP_DATE]),
    followUpDone:   toBool(vals[SCI.FOLLOWUP_DONE]),
    confidential:   toBool(vals[SCI.CONFIDENTIAL]),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[SCI.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

/**
 * Internal: fetch interactions for a case, filtering confidential ones by role.
 */
function getCareInteractions_(caseId, auth) {
  var sheet = getTab(SCI_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return [];

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SCI_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SCI.CASE_ID]) !== String(caseId)) continue;
    var obj = interactionRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.confidential && !hasRole(auth, 'pastor')) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }
  rows.sort(function(a, b) {
    return a.interactionDate > b.interactionDate ? -1 :
           a.interactionDate < b.interactionDate ? 1 : 0;
  });
  return rows;
}

function handleCareInteractionsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.caseId) return jsonErr('caseId is required.');
  return jsonOk({ rows: getCareInteractions_(params.caseId, auth) });
}

function handleCareInteractionsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.caseId) return jsonErr('caseId is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.caseId),
    params.interactionDate || now.substring(0, 10),
    String(params.type || 'Visit'),
    String(params.caregiverId || auth.email),
    Number(params.durationMinutes || 0),
    String(params.summary || ''),
    toBool(params.followUpNeeded),
    params.followUpDate || '',
    false,
    toBool(params.confidential),
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(SCI_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'care.interaction.create', SCI_TAB, newIndex,
    'Case: ' + params.caseId + ' — ' + (params.type || 'Visit'));
  return jsonOk({ row: interactionRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleCareInteractionsFollowUpDone(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SCI_TAB, SCI_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Interaction not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SCI_TAB);

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, SCI.FOLLOWUP_DONE + 1).setValue(true);
  var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SCI_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
  writeAudit(auth, 'care.interaction.followUpDone', SCI_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ row: interactionRowToObject(fresh, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Returns all interactions needing follow-up (across all cases the caller can see).
 */
function handleCareFollowUpsDue(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');

  var sheet = getTab(SCI_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SCI_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var today = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = interactionRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (!obj.followUpNeeded || obj.followUpDone) continue;
    if (obj.confidential && !hasRole(auth, 'pastor')) continue;
    // Include all pending follow-ups (past, today, and upcoming)
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  rows.sort(function(a, b) {
    return a.followUpDate > b.followUpDate ? 1 :
           a.followUpDate < b.followUpDate ? -1 : 0;
  });

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SPIRITUAL CARE ASSIGNMENTS (persistent shepherd → sheep relationships)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SCA_TAB = 'SpiritualCareAssignments';
var SCA_NUM_COLS = 11;

var SCA = {
  ID: 0, CAREGIVER_ID: 1, MEMBER_ID: 2, MINISTRY_ID: 3,
  ROLE: 4, START_DATE: 5, END_DATE: 6, STATUS: 7,
  NOTES: 8, CREATED_BY: 9, CREATED_AT: 10
};

function assignmentRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:       rowIndex,
    id:          String(vals[SCA.ID] || ''),
    caregiverId: String(vals[SCA.CAREGIVER_ID] || ''),
    memberId:    String(vals[SCA.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    ministryId:  String(vals[SCA.MINISTRY_ID] || ''),
    role:        String(vals[SCA.ROLE] || ''),
    startDate:   isoDate(vals[SCA.START_DATE]),
    endDate:     isoDate(vals[SCA.END_DATE]),
    status:      String(vals[SCA.STATUS] || ''),
    notes:       String(vals[SCA.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:   String(vals[SCA.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:   isoDate(vals[SCA.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleCareAssignmentsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  var sheet = getTab(SCA_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SCA_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var caregiverId = String(params.caregiverId || '').trim();
  var memberId = String(params.memberId || '').trim();
  var ministryId = String(params.ministryId || '').trim();
  var activeOnly = String(params.activeOnly || 'true').toUpperCase() !== 'FALSE';
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = assignmentRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (caregiverId && obj.caregiverId !== caregiverId) continue;
    if (memberId && obj.memberId !== memberId) continue;
    if (ministryId && obj.ministryId !== ministryId) continue;
    if (activeOnly && obj.status !== 'Active') continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

/**
 * "Who is shepherding this person?" — given a memberId, returns their caregivers.
 */
function handleCareAssignmentsForMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SCA_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SCA_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SCA.MEMBER_ID]) !== String(params.memberId)) continue;
    var obj = assignmentRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status !== 'Active') continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

/**
 * "Who am I shepherding?" — given a caregiverId, returns their flock.
 */
function handleCareAssignmentsMyFlock(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var caregiverId = String(params.caregiverId || '').trim();
  if (!caregiverId) return jsonErr('caregiverId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SCA_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SCA_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SCA.CAREGIVER_ID]) !== caregiverId) continue;
    var obj = assignmentRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status !== 'Active') continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleCareAssignmentsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.caregiverId) return jsonErr('caregiverId is required.');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.caregiverId),
    String(params.memberId),
    String(params.ministryId || ''),
    String(params.role || 'Shepherd'),
    params.startDate || now.substring(0, 10),
    '',
    'Active',
    String(params.notes || ''),
    auth.email,
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(SCA_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'care.assignments.create', SCA_TAB, newIndex,
    'Caregiver: ' + params.caregiverId + ' → Member: ' + params.memberId);
  return jsonOk({ row: assignmentRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

/**
 * Returns all active users with care, leader, pastor, or admin roles.
 * Accessible to any care+ user so caregivers can be picked in a dropdown.
 */
function handleCareCaregiversList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');
  var sheet = getTab('AccessControl');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 8).getValues();
  var eligible = ['care', 'leader', 'pastor', 'admin'];
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var role   = String(data[i][1] || '').toLowerCase();
    var active = String(data[i][4] || 'FALSE').toUpperCase();
    if (active !== 'TRUE') continue;
    if (eligible.indexOf(role) === -1) continue;
    rows.push({
      email:       normalizeEmail(String(data[i][0] || '')),
      displayName: String(data[i][2] || ''),
      role:        role,
      groups:      String(data[i][3] || '')
    });
  }
  rows.sort(function(a, b) { return a.displayName.localeCompare(b.displayName); });
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleCareAssignmentsEnd(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SCA_TAB, SCA_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Assignment not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SCA_TAB);

  var now = isoNow();
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, SCA.END_DATE + 1).setValue(now.substring(0, 10));
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, SCA.STATUS + 1).setValue('Inactive');

  var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SCA_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
  writeAudit(auth, 'care.assignments.end', SCA_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ row: assignmentRowToObject(fresh, rowIndex) });
}

function handleCareAssignmentsReassign(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var newCaregiverId = String(params.newCaregiverId || '').trim();
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SCA_TAB, SCA_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Assignment not found.');
  if (!newCaregiverId) return jsonErr('newCaregiverId is required.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SCA_TAB);

  // End the old assignment
  var now = isoNow();
  var existing = sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SCA_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, SCA.END_DATE + 1).setValue(now.substring(0, 10));
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, SCA.STATUS + 1).setValue('Reassigned');

  // Create a new assignment with the new caregiver
  var newRow = [
    generateId(),
    newCaregiverId,
    String(existing[SCA.MEMBER_ID]),
    String(existing[SCA.MINISTRY_ID]),
    String(params.role || existing[SCA.ROLE] || 'Shepherd'),
    now.substring(0, 10),
    '',
    'Active',
    String(params.notes || 'Reassigned from ' + String(existing[SCA.CAREGIVER_ID])),
    auth.email,
    now
  ];

  sheet.appendRow(newRow);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'care.assignments.reassign', SCA_TAB, newIndex,
    'From: ' + String(existing[SCA.CAREGIVER_ID]) + ' → To: ' + newCaregiverId);
  return jsonOk({ row: assignmentRowToObject(newRow, newIndex) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SPIRITUAL CARE DASHBOARD / SUMMARY
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleCareDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'care');

  // Open cases by priority
  var caseSheet = getTab(SCC_TAB);
  var cLastRow = caseSheet.getLastRow();
  var openCases = { total: 0, byPriority: {}, byType: {}, overdue: 0 };

  if (cLastRow >= 2) {
    var cData = caseSheet.getRange(2, 1, cLastRow - 1, SCC_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    var today = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
    for (var i = 0; i < cData.length; i++) {
      var status = String(cData[i][SCC.STATUS] || '');
      if (status === 'Resolved' || status === 'Closed') continue;
      if (toBool(cData[i][SCC.CONFIDENTIAL]) && !hasRole(auth, 'pastor')) continue;

      openCases.total++;
      var pri = String(cData[i][SCC.PRIORITY] || 'Normal');
      var ct = String(cData[i][SCC.CARE_TYPE] || 'Other');
      openCases.byPriority[pri] = (openCases.byPriority[pri] || 0) + 1;
      openCases.byType[ct] = (openCases.byType[ct] || 0) + 1;

      var target = isoDate(cData[i][SCC.TARGET_DATE]).substring(0, 10);
      if (target && target < today) openCases.overdue++;
    }
  }

  // Follow-ups due
  var intSheet = getTab(SCI_TAB);
  var iLastRow = intSheet.getLastRow();
  var followUpsDue = 0;
  if (iLastRow >= 2) {
    var iData = intSheet.getRange(2, 1, iLastRow - 1, SCI_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    var todayStr = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
    for (var j = 0; j < iData.length; j++) {
      if (!toBool(iData[j][SCI.FOLLOWUP_NEEDED])) continue;
      if (toBool(iData[j][SCI.FOLLOWUP_DONE])) continue;
      var fDate = isoDate(iData[j][SCI.FOLLOWUP_DATE]).substring(0, 10);
      if (fDate && fDate <= todayStr) followUpsDue++;
    }
  }

  // Active assignments count
  var asgSheet = getTab(SCA_TAB);
  var aLastRow = asgSheet.getLastRow();
  var activeAssignments = 0;
  var uniqueCaregivers = {};
  if (aLastRow >= 2) {
    var aData = asgSheet.getRange(2, 1, aLastRow - 1, SCA_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var k = 0; k < aData.length; k++) {
      if (String(aData[k][SCA.STATUS]) === 'Active') {
        activeAssignments++;
        uniqueCaregivers[String(aData[k][SCA.CAREGIVER_ID])] = true;
      }
    }
  }

  return jsonOk({
    dashboard: {
      openCases: openCases,
      followUpsDue: followUpsDue,
      activeAssignments: activeAssignments,
      activeCaregivers: Object.keys(uniqueCaregivers).length
    }
  });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Communications.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: COMMUNICATIONS HUB — Messaging, Notifications & Announcements
// Tabs: CommsMessages, CommsThreads, CommsNotifications,
//       CommsNotificationPrefs, CommsChannels, CommsTemplates,
//       CommsReadReceipts, CommsBroadcastLog
//
// Full communications suite: inter-member messaging (1-to-1 and group),
// threaded conversations, system and custom notifications with per-user
// preference controls, announcement channels, reusable templates, and
// read-receipt tracking. Builds on and replaces the basic Communications
// tab from database.gs.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMS MESSAGES (direct and group messages between members)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CMG_TAB      = 'CommsMessages';
var CMG_NUM_COLS = 22;

var CMG = {
  ID: 0, THREAD_ID: 1,
  SENDER_ID: 2, SENDER_NAME: 3, SENDER_EMAIL: 4,
  RECIPIENT_TYPE: 5, RECIPIENT_ID: 6, RECIPIENT_NAME: 7,
  MESSAGE_TYPE: 8, SUBJECT: 9, BODY: 10,
  PRIORITY: 11, ATTACHMENT_URL: 12, ATTACHMENT_NAME: 13,
  REPLY_TO_ID: 14,
  STATUS: 15, SENT_AT: 16, EDITED_AT: 17,
  READ_COUNT: 18, FLAGGED: 19,
  CREATED_AT: 20, UPDATED_AT: 21
};

function commsMessageRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[CMG.ID] || ''),
    threadId:       String(vals[CMG.THREAD_ID] || ''),
    senderId:       String(vals[CMG.SENDER_ID] || ''),
    senderName:     String(vals[CMG.SENDER_NAME] || ''),
    senderEmail:    String(vals[CMG.SENDER_EMAIL] || ''),
    recipientType:  String(vals[CMG.RECIPIENT_TYPE] || ''),
    recipientId:    String(vals[CMG.RECIPIENT_ID] || ''),
    recipientName:  String(vals[CMG.RECIPIENT_NAME] || ''),
    messageType:    String(vals[CMG.MESSAGE_TYPE] || ''),
    subject:        String(vals[CMG.SUBJECT] || ''),
    body:           String(vals[CMG.BODY] || ''),
    priority:       String(vals[CMG.PRIORITY] || 'Normal'),
    attachmentUrl:  String(vals[CMG.ATTACHMENT_URL] || ''),
    attachmentName: String(vals[CMG.ATTACHMENT_NAME] || ''),
    replyToId:      String(vals[CMG.REPLY_TO_ID] || ''),
    status:         String(vals[CMG.STATUS] || ''),
    sentAt:         isoDate(vals[CMG.SENT_AT]),
    editedAt:       isoDate(vals[CMG.EDITED_AT]),
    readCount:      Number(vals[CMG.READ_COUNT] || 0),
    flagged:        String(vals[CMG.FLAGGED] || 'FALSE'),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[CMG.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[CMG.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Messages CRUD ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleCommsMessagesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, CMG_TAB, CMG_NUM_COLS);
  var myId = auth.memberId || auth.email;
  var out  = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = commsMessageRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    // Show messages where user is sender or direct recipient
    var isSender    = obj.senderEmail === auth.email || obj.senderId === myId;
    var isRecipient = obj.recipientId === myId || obj.recipientId === auth.email;
    // For group messages, check if user is in the group (simplified: show all group messages for now)
    var isGroupMsg  = obj.recipientType === 'Group' || obj.recipientType === 'Ministry' || obj.recipientType === 'Channel';

    if (!isSender && !isRecipient && !isGroupMsg && auth.roleLevel < 3) continue;

    if (params.threadId && obj.threadId !== params.threadId) continue;
    if (params.recipientId && obj.recipientId !== params.recipientId) continue;
    if (params.messageType && obj.messageType !== params.messageType) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    if (params.flagged && obj.flagged !== 'TRUE') continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }

  out.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.sentAt || b.createdAt || '') > (a.sentAt || a.createdAt || '') ? 1 : -1; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleCommsMessagesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), CMG_TAB, CMG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Message not found');
  return jsonOk(commsMessageRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleCommsMessagesSend(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.body && !params.subject) return jsonErr('Message body or subject required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();

  // Auto-create or use existing thread
  var threadId = params.threadId || '';
  if (!threadId) {
    threadId = newId();
    // Create thread record
    var threadRow = blankRow(CTH_NUM_COLS);
    threadRow[CTH.ID]               = threadId;
    threadRow[CTH.SUBJECT]          = String(params.subject || '(No Subject)');
    threadRow[CTH.THREAD_TYPE]      = params.recipientType === 'Member' ? 'Direct' : 'Group';
    threadRow[CTH.CREATOR_ID]       = auth.memberId || '';
    threadRow[CTH.CREATOR_NAME]     = auth.displayName || auth.email;
    threadRow[CTH.PARTICIPANT_IDS]  = [auth.memberId || auth.email, params.recipientId || ''].join(',');
    threadRow[CTH.PARTICIPANT_NAMES]= [auth.displayName || auth.email, params.recipientName || ''].join(',');
    threadRow[CTH.PARTICIPANT_COUNT]= 2;
    threadRow[CTH.MESSAGE_COUNT]    = 0;
    threadRow[CTH.LAST_MESSAGE_AT]  = now;
    threadRow[CTH.LAST_MESSAGE_BY]  = auth.displayName || auth.email;
    threadRow[CTH.LAST_SNIPPET]     = String(params.body || params.subject || '').substring(0, 100);
    threadRow[CTH.STATUS]           = 'Active';
    threadRow[CTH.PINNED]           = 'FALSE';
    threadRow[CTH.MUTED_BY]         = '';
    threadRow[CTH.CREATED_AT]       = now;
    threadRow[CTH.UPDATED_AT]       = now;
    appendRow(ss, CTH_TAB, threadRow);
  }

  var row = blankRow(CMG_NUM_COLS);
  row[CMG.ID]              = id;
  row[CMG.THREAD_ID]       = threadId;
  row[CMG.SENDER_ID]       = auth.memberId || '';
  row[CMG.SENDER_NAME]     = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[CMG.SENDER_EMAIL]    = auth.email;
  row[CMG.RECIPIENT_TYPE]  = String(params.recipientType || 'Member');
  row[CMG.RECIPIENT_ID]    = String(params.recipientId || '');
  row[CMG.RECIPIENT_NAME]  = String(params.recipientName || '');
  row[CMG.MESSAGE_TYPE]    = String(params.messageType || 'Text');
  row[CMG.SUBJECT]         = String(params.subject || '');
  row[CMG.BODY]            = String(params.body || '');
  row[CMG.PRIORITY]        = String(params.priority || 'Normal');
  row[CMG.ATTACHMENT_URL]  = String(params.attachmentUrl || '');
  row[CMG.ATTACHMENT_NAME] = String(params.attachmentName || '');
  row[CMG.REPLY_TO_ID]     = String(params.replyToId || '');
  row[CMG.STATUS]          = 'Sent';
  row[CMG.SENT_AT]         = now;
  row[CMG.READ_COUNT]      = 0;
  row[CMG.FLAGGED]         = 'FALSE';
  row[CMG.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  row[CMG.UPDATED_AT]      = now;
  appendRow(ss, CMG_TAB, row);

  // Update thread metadata
  var th = findRowById(ss, CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS, threadId);
  if (th) {
    th.vals[CTH.MESSAGE_COUNT]   = Number(th.vals[CTH.MESSAGE_COUNT] || 0) + 1;
    th.vals[CTH.LAST_MESSAGE_AT] = now;
    th.vals[CTH.LAST_MESSAGE_BY] = auth.displayName || auth.email;
    th.vals[CTH.LAST_SNIPPET]    = String(params.body || params.subject || '').substring(0, 100);
    th.vals[CTH.UPDATED_AT]      = now;
    writeRow(ss, CTH_TAB, th.rowIndex, th.vals);
  }

  // Auto-create notification for recipient
  if (params.recipientId && params.recipientType === 'Member') {
    createNotification_(ss, auth, {
      recipientId:   params.recipientId,
      recipientName: params.recipientName || '',
      title:         'New message from ' + (auth.displayName || auth.email),
      body:          String(params.body || params.subject || '').substring(0, 200),
      notifType:     'Message',
      priority:      params.priority || 'Normal',
      entityType:    'CommsMessages',
      entityId:      id,
      actionUrl:     'messages/' + threadId
    });

    // Email notification — recipientId is the member's email address
    var recipEmail = String(params.recipientId || '');
    if (recipEmail.indexOf('@') > -1 && String(getAppConfigValue_('NOTIFY_DIRECT_MESSAGE', 'TRUE')).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE') {
      var senderLabel = auth.displayName || auth.email;
      var snippet     = String(params.body || params.subject || '').substring(0, 300);
      sendNotificationEmail_(
        recipEmail,
        'New message from ' + senderLabel,
        senderLabel + ' sent you a message:\n\n' + snippet + '\n\nLog in to FlockOS to view and reply.',
        '<p><strong>' + senderLabel + '</strong> sent you a message:</p>'
        + '<blockquote style="border-left:3px solid #4a90d9;padding:8px 12px;margin:12px 0;color:#555;">' + snippet + '</blockquote>'
        + '<p><a href="#">Log in to FlockOS</a> to view and reply.</p>'
      );
    }
  }

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.messages.send', CMG_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, threadId: threadId, message: 'Message sent' });
}

function handleCommsMessagesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CMG_TAB, CMG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Message not found');
  if (String(hit.vals[CMG.SENDER_EMAIL]) !== auth.email && auth.roleLevel < 3)
    return jsonErr('Can only edit your own messages');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.body !== undefined)     v[CMG.BODY]     = String(params.body);
  if (params.subject !== undefined)  v[CMG.SUBJECT]  = String(params.subject);
  if (params.flagged !== undefined)  v[CMG.FLAGGED]  = params.flagged === true || params.flagged === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.status !== undefined)   v[CMG.STATUS]   = String(params.status);
  v[CMG.EDITED_AT]  = new Date();
  v[CMG.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CMG_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.messages.update', CMG_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Message updated' });
}

function handleCommsMessagesDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CMG_TAB, CMG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Message not found');
  if (String(hit.vals[CMG.SENDER_EMAIL]) !== auth.email && auth.roleLevel < 3)
    return jsonErr('Can only delete your own messages');
  // Soft-delete: mark as Deleted
  hit.vals[CMG.STATUS]     = 'Deleted';
  hit.vals[CMG.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CMG_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.messages.delete', CMG_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Message deleted' });
}

/** Get user's inbox (messages where they are the recipient) */
function handleCommsMessagesInbox(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), CMG_TAB, CMG_NUM_COLS);
  var myId = auth.memberId || auth.email;
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = commsMessageRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Deleted') continue;
    if (obj.recipientId !== myId && obj.recipientId !== auth.email) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.sentAt || '') > (a.sentAt || '') ? 1 : -1; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

/** Get user's sent messages */
function handleCommsMessagesSent(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), CMG_TAB, CMG_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = commsMessageRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.senderEmail !== auth.email) continue;
    if (obj.status === 'Deleted') continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.sentAt || '') > (a.sentAt || '') ? 1 : -1; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMS THREADS (conversation threading for messages)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CTH_TAB      = 'CommsThreads';
var CTH_NUM_COLS = 18;

var CTH = {
  ID: 0, SUBJECT: 1, THREAD_TYPE: 2,
  CREATOR_ID: 3, CREATOR_NAME: 4,
  PARTICIPANT_IDS: 5, PARTICIPANT_NAMES: 6,
  PARTICIPANT_COUNT: 7, MESSAGE_COUNT: 8,
  LAST_MESSAGE_AT: 9, LAST_MESSAGE_BY: 10, LAST_SNIPPET: 11,
  STATUS: 12, PINNED: 13, MUTED_BY: 14,
  CHANNEL_ID: 15,
  CREATED_AT: 16, UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function commsThreadRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:            rowIndex,
    id:               String(vals[CTH.ID] || ''),
    subject:          String(vals[CTH.SUBJECT] || ''),
    threadType:       String(vals[CTH.THREAD_TYPE] || ''),
    creatorId:        String(vals[CTH.CREATOR_ID] || ''),
    creatorName:      String(vals[CTH.CREATOR_NAME] || ''),
    participantIds:   String(vals[CTH.PARTICIPANT_IDS] || ''),
    participantNames: String(vals[CTH.PARTICIPANT_NAMES] || ''),
    participantCount: Number(vals[CTH.PARTICIPANT_COUNT] || 0),
    messageCount:     Number(vals[CTH.MESSAGE_COUNT] || 0),
    lastMessageAt:    isoDate(vals[CTH.LAST_MESSAGE_AT]),
    lastMessageBy:    String(vals[CTH.LAST_MESSAGE_BY] || ''),
    lastSnippet:      String(vals[CTH.LAST_SNIPPET] || ''),
    status:           String(vals[CTH.STATUS] || ''),
    pinned:           String(vals[CTH.PINNED] || 'FALSE'),
    mutedBy:          String(vals[CTH.MUTED_BY] || ''),
    channelId:        String(vals[CTH.CHANNEL_ID] || ''),
    createdAt:        isoDate(vals[CTH.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:        isoDate(vals[CTH.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Threads handlers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleCommsThreadsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS);
  var myId = auth.memberId || auth.email;
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = commsThreadRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    // Show threads user participates in, or channel threads
    var participants = obj.participantIds.split(',');
    var isParticipant = false;
    for (var p = 0; p < participants.length; p++) {
      if (participants[p].trim() === myId || participants[p].trim() === auth.email) {
        isParticipant = true; break;
      }
    }
    if (!isParticipant && obj.threadType !== 'Channel' && auth.roleLevel < 3) continue;
    if (params.threadType && obj.threadType !== params.threadType) continue;
    if (params.channelId && obj.channelId !== params.channelId) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.lastMessageAt || b.createdAt || '') > (a.lastMessageAt || a.createdAt || '') ? 1 : -1; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleCommsThreadsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Thread not found');
  var obj = commsThreadRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex);

  // Also fetch messages in this thread
  var msgs = allRows(ss, CMG_TAB, CMG_NUM_COLS);
  var threadMsgs = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < msgs.length; i++) {
    if (String(msgs[i][CMG.THREAD_ID]) === obj.id && String(msgs[i][CMG.STATUS]) !== 'Deleted') {
      threadMsgs.push(commsMessageRowToObject(msgs[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  threadMsgs.sort(function(a, b) { return (a.sentAt || a.createdAt || '') > (b.sentAt || b.createdAt || '') ? 1 : -1; });
  obj.messages = threadMsgs;
  return jsonOk(obj);
}

function handleCommsThreadsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(CTH_NUM_COLS);
  row[CTH.ID]                = id;
  row[CTH.SUBJECT]           = String(params.subject || '(No Subject)');
  row[CTH.THREAD_TYPE]       = String(params.threadType || 'Direct');
  row[CTH.CREATOR_ID]        = auth.memberId || '';
  row[CTH.CREATOR_NAME]      = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[CTH.PARTICIPANT_IDS]   = String(params.participantIds || (auth.memberId || auth.email));
  row[CTH.PARTICIPANT_NAMES] = String(params.participantNames || (auth.displayName || auth.email));
  row[CTH.PARTICIPANT_COUNT] = (String(params.participantIds || '').split(',').length) || 1;
  row[CTH.MESSAGE_COUNT]     = 0;
  row[CTH.LAST_MESSAGE_AT]   = now;
  row[CTH.LAST_MESSAGE_BY]   = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[CTH.LAST_SNIPPET]      = '';
  row[CTH.STATUS]            = 'Active';
  row[CTH.PINNED]            = 'FALSE';
  row[CTH.MUTED_BY]          = '';
  row[CTH.CHANNEL_ID]        = String(params.channelId || '');
  row[CTH.CREATED_AT]        = now;
  row[CTH.UPDATED_AT]        = now;
  appendRow(ss, CTH_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.threads.create', CTH_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Thread created' });
}

function handleCommsThreadsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Thread not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.subject !== undefined)          v[CTH.SUBJECT]          = String(params.subject);
  if (params.participantIds !== undefined)   v[CTH.PARTICIPANT_IDS]  = String(params.participantIds);
  if (params.participantNames !== undefined) v[CTH.PARTICIPANT_NAMES]= String(params.participantNames);
  if (params.participantCount !== undefined) v[CTH.PARTICIPANT_COUNT]= Number(params.participantCount);
  if (params.status !== undefined)           v[CTH.STATUS]           = String(params.status);
  if (params.pinned !== undefined)           v[CTH.PINNED]           = params.pinned === true || params.pinned === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  v[CTH.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CTH_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.threads.update', CTH_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Thread updated' });
}

function handleCommsThreadsArchive(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Thread not found');
  hit.vals[CTH.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[CTH.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CTH_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.threads.archive', CTH_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Thread archived' });
}

function handleCommsThreadsMute(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Thread not found');
  var myId    = auth.memberId || auth.email;
  var mutedBy = String(hit.vals[CTH.MUTED_BY] || '');
  var muted   = mutedBy ? mutedBy.split(',') : [];
  if (muted.indexOf(myId) === -1) muted.push(myId);
  hit.vals[CTH.MUTED_BY]   = muted.join(',');
  hit.vals[CTH.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CTH_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Thread muted' });
}

function handleCommsThreadsUnmute(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Thread not found');
  var myId    = auth.memberId || auth.email;
  var mutedBy = String(hit.vals[CTH.MUTED_BY] || '');
  var muted   = mutedBy ? mutedBy.split(',') : [];
  muted = muted.filter(function(m) { return m !== myId; });
  hit.vals[CTH.MUTED_BY]   = muted.join(',');
  hit.vals[CTH.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CTH_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Thread unmuted' });
}

/** Add a participant to an existing thread */
function handleCommsThreadsAddParticipant(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  if (!params.id || !params.participantId) return jsonErr('id and participantId required');
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Thread not found');
  var ids   = String(hit.vals[CTH.PARTICIPANT_IDS] || '').split(',').map(function(s) { return s.trim(); });
  var names = String(hit.vals[CTH.PARTICIPANT_NAMES] || '').split(',').map(function(s) { return s.trim(); });
  if (ids.indexOf(params.participantId) === -1) {
    ids.push(String(params.participantId));
    names.push(String(params.participantName || params.participantId));
  }
  hit.vals[CTH.PARTICIPANT_IDS]   = ids.join(',');
  hit.vals[CTH.PARTICIPANT_NAMES] = names.join(',');
  hit.vals[CTH.PARTICIPANT_COUNT] = ids.length;
  hit.vals[CTH.UPDATED_AT]        = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CTH_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.threads.addParticipant', CTH_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Participant added' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMS NOTIFICATIONS (system and custom notifications)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CN_TAB      = 'CommsNotifications';
var CN_NUM_COLS = 20;

var CN = {
  ID: 0, RECIPIENT_ID: 1, RECIPIENT_NAME: 2, RECIPIENT_EMAIL: 3,
  TITLE: 4, BODY: 5, NOTIF_TYPE: 6,
  PRIORITY: 7, ENTITY_TYPE: 8, ENTITY_ID: 9,
  ACTION_URL: 10, ICON: 11,
  STATUS: 12, READ_AT: 13, DISMISSED_AT: 14,
  SENT_VIA: 15, SENDER_EMAIL: 16,
  EXPIRES_AT: 17,
  CREATED_AT: 18, UPDATED_AT: 19
};

function commsNotificationRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[CN.ID] || ''),
    recipientId:    String(vals[CN.RECIPIENT_ID] || ''),
    recipientName:  String(vals[CN.RECIPIENT_NAME] || ''),
    recipientEmail: String(vals[CN.RECIPIENT_EMAIL] || ''),
    title:          String(vals[CN.TITLE] || ''),
    body:           String(vals[CN.BODY] || ''),
    notifType:      String(vals[CN.NOTIF_TYPE] || ''),
    priority:       String(vals[CN.PRIORITY] || 'Normal'),
    entityType:     String(vals[CN.ENTITY_TYPE] || ''),
    entityId:       String(vals[CN.ENTITY_ID] || ''),
    actionUrl:      String(vals[CN.ACTION_URL] || ''),
    icon:           String(vals[CN.ICON] || ''),
    status:         String(vals[CN.STATUS] || ''),
    readAt:         isoDate(vals[CN.READ_AT]),
    dismissedAt:    isoDate(vals[CN.DISMISSED_AT]),
    sentVia:        String(vals[CN.SENT_VIA] || ''),
    senderEmail:    String(vals[CN.SENDER_EMAIL] || ''),
    expiresAt:      isoDate(vals[CN.EXPIRES_AT]),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[CN.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[CN.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


/** Internal helper: create a notification (called from other module functions) */
function createNotification_(ss, auth, opts) {
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(CN_NUM_COLS);
  row[CN.ID]              = id;
  row[CN.RECIPIENT_ID]    = String(opts.recipientId || '');
  row[CN.RECIPIENT_NAME]  = String(opts.recipientName || '');
  row[CN.RECIPIENT_EMAIL] = String(opts.recipientEmail || '');
  row[CN.TITLE]           = String(opts.title || '');
  row[CN.BODY]            = String(opts.body || '');
  row[CN.NOTIF_TYPE]      = String(opts.notifType || 'System');
  row[CN.PRIORITY]        = String(opts.priority || 'Normal');
  row[CN.ENTITY_TYPE]     = String(opts.entityType || '');
  row[CN.ENTITY_ID]       = String(opts.entityId || '');
  row[CN.ACTION_URL]      = String(opts.actionUrl || '');
  row[CN.ICON]            = String(opts.icon || '');
  row[CN.STATUS]          = 'Unread';
  row[CN.SENT_VIA]        = String(opts.sentVia || 'In-App');
  row[CN.SENDER_EMAIL]    = auth ? auth.email : 'SYSTEM';
  row[CN.EXPIRES_AT]      = opts.expiresAt || '';
  row[CN.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  row[CN.UPDATED_AT]      = now;
  appendRow(ss, CN_TAB, row);
  return id;
}


// ── Notifications handlers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleCommsNotificationsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), CN_TAB, CN_NUM_COLS);
  var myId = auth.memberId || auth.email;
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = commsNotificationRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    // Only show notifications for this user (unless admin)
    if (obj.recipientId !== myId && obj.recipientEmail !== auth.email && auth.roleLevel < 4) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    if (params.notifType && obj.notifType !== params.notifType) continue;
    if (params.unreadOnly && obj.status !== 'Unread') continue;
    // Skip expired
    if (obj.expiresAt && new Date(obj.expiresAt) < new Date()) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.createdAt || '') > (a.createdAt || '') ? 1 : -1; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleCommsNotificationsUnreadCount(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data  = allRows(db(), CN_TAB, CN_NUM_COLS);
  var myId  = auth.memberId || auth.email;
  var count = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var rid   = String(data[i][CN.RECIPIENT_ID] || '');
    var rmail = String(data[i][CN.RECIPIENT_EMAIL] || '');
    var st    = String(data[i][CN.STATUS] || '');
    if ((rid === myId || rmail === auth.email) && st === 'Unread') count++;
  }
  return jsonOk({ unreadCount: count });
}

function handleCommsNotificationsMarkRead(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  try {
    var ss  = db();
    var now = new Date();

    if (params.id) {
      // Mark single notification read — write only the 3 changed columns
      var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(CN_TAB);
      if (!sheet) return jsonErr('Notification not found');
      var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
      if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Notification not found');
      var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CN_NUM_COLS).getValues();
      var target = String(params.id).trim();
      var found = false;
      for (var r = 0; r < data.length; r++) {
        if (String(data[r][0]).trim() === target) {
          var row = r + 2;
          sheet.getRange(row, CN.STATUS + 1).setValue('Read');
          sheet.getRange(row, CN.READ_AT + 1).setValue(now);
          sheet.getRange(row, CN.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(now);
          found = true;
          break;
        }
      }
      if (!found) return jsonErr('Notification not found');
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Notification marked as read' });
    }

    // Mark all read — write ONLY the 3 changed columns to avoid
    // triggering data validation on NOTIF_TYPE (col G)
    var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(CN_TAB);
    if (!sheet) return jsonOk({ message: '0 notifications marked as read', count: 0 });
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ message: '0 notifications marked as read', count: 0 });

    var numRows = lastRow - 1;
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, numRows, CN_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    var myId = auth.memberId || auth.email;

    // Read the 3 target columns into arrays we'll write back
    var statusCol    = sheet.getRange(2, CN.STATUS + 1, numRows, 1).getValues();
    var readAtCol    = sheet.getRange(2, CN.READ_AT + 1, numRows, 1).getValues();
    var updatedAtCol = sheet.getRange(2, CN.UPDATED_AT + 1, numRows, 1).getValues();

    var marked = 0;
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      var rid   = String(data[i][CN.RECIPIENT_ID] || '');
      var rmail = String(data[i][CN.RECIPIENT_EMAIL] || '');
      if ((rid === myId || rmail === auth.email) && String(data[i][CN.STATUS]) === 'Unread') {
        statusCol[i][0]    = 'Read';
        readAtCol[i][0]    = now;
        updatedAtCol[i][0] = now;
        marked++;
      }
    }

    if (marked > 0) {
      sheet.getRange(2, CN.STATUS + 1, numRows, 1).setValues(statusCol);
      sheet.getRange(2, CN.READ_AT + 1, numRows, 1).setValues(readAtCol);
      sheet.getRange(2, CN.UPDATED_AT + 1, numRows, 1).setValues(updatedAtCol);
    }

    return jsonOk({ message: marked + ' notifications marked as read', count: marked });
  } catch (e) {
    return jsonErr('markRead error: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : String(e)));
  }
}

function handleCommsNotificationsDismiss(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(CN_TAB);
  if (!sheet) return jsonErr('Notification not found');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Notification not found');
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CN_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var target = String(params.id).trim();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][0]).trim() === target) {
      var row = i + 2;
      var now = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(row, CN.STATUS + 1).setValue('Dismissed');
      sheet.getRange(row, CN.DISMISSED_AT + 1).setValue(now);
      sheet.getRange(row, CN.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(now);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Notification dismissed' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Notification not found');
}

function handleCommsNotificationsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss = db();
  var id = createNotification_(ss, auth, {
    recipientId:    params.recipientId,
    recipientName:  params.recipientName || '',
    recipientEmail: params.recipientEmail || '',
    title:          params.title,
    body:           params.body || '',
    notifType:      params.notifType || 'Custom',
    priority:       params.priority || 'Normal',
    entityType:     params.entityType || '',
    entityId:       params.entityId || '',
    actionUrl:      params.actionUrl || '',
    icon:           params.icon || '',
    sentVia:        params.sentVia || 'In-App',
    expiresAt:      params.expiresAt || ''
  });
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.notifications.create', CN_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Notification created' });
}

/** Send a notification to all members (broadcast) */
function handleCommsNotificationsBroadcast(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  if (!params.title) return jsonErr('title required');
  var ss      = db();
  var members = allRows(ss, 'Members', 1); // just need member IDs
  var now     = new Date();
  var created = 0;

  // Get member data for IDs and names
  var memberData = allRows(ss, 'Members', 10);
  for (var i = 0; i < memberData.length; i++) {
    var mid   = String(memberData[i][0] || '');
    var mname = String(memberData[i][1] || '') + ' ' + String(memberData[i][2] || '');
    var meml  = String(memberData[i][3] || '');
    if (!mid) continue;

    createNotification_(ss, auth, {
      recipientId:    mid,
      recipientName:  mname.trim(),
      recipientEmail: meml,
      title:          params.title,
      body:           params.body || '',
      notifType:      'Broadcast',
      priority:       params.priority || 'Normal',
      entityType:     params.entityType || '',
      entityId:       params.entityId || '',
      actionUrl:      params.actionUrl || '',
      icon:           params.icon || '',
      sentVia:        'In-App',
      expiresAt:      params.expiresAt || ''
    });
    created++;
  }

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.notifications.broadcast', CN_TAB, 'broadcast');
  return jsonOk({ created: created, message: created + ' notifications sent' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMS NOTIFICATION PREFERENCES (per-user notification settings)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CNP_TAB      = 'CommsNotificationPrefs';
var CNP_NUM_COLS = 16;

var CNP = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_EMAIL: 2,
  EMAIL_ENABLED: 3, EMAIL_DIGEST: 4,
  IN_APP_ENABLED: 5,
  QUIET_HOURS_START: 6, QUIET_HOURS_END: 7,
  NOTIF_MESSAGES: 8, NOTIF_ANNOUNCEMENTS: 9,
  NOTIF_EVENTS: 10, NOTIF_PRAYER: 11,
  NOTIF_CARE: 12, NOTIF_SYSTEM: 13,
  CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function commsNotifPrefRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:              rowIndex,
    id:                 String(vals[CNP.ID] || ''),
    memberId:           String(vals[CNP.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberEmail:        String(vals[CNP.MEMBER_EMAIL] || ''),
    emailEnabled:       String(vals[CNP.EMAIL_ENABLED] || 'FALSE'),
    emailDigest:        String(vals[CNP.EMAIL_DIGEST] || 'Instant'),
    inAppEnabled:       String(vals[CNP.IN_APP_ENABLED] || 'FALSE'),
    quietHoursStart:    String(vals[CNP.QUIET_HOURS_START] || ''),
    quietHoursEnd:      String(vals[CNP.QUIET_HOURS_END] || ''),
    notifMessages:      String(vals[CNP.NOTIF_MESSAGES] || 'FALSE'),
    notifAnnouncements: String(vals[CNP.NOTIF_ANNOUNCEMENTS] || 'FALSE'),
    notifEvents:        String(vals[CNP.NOTIF_EVENTS] || 'FALSE'),
    notifPrayer:        String(vals[CNP.NOTIF_PRAYER] || 'FALSE'),
    notifCare:          String(vals[CNP.NOTIF_CARE] || 'FALSE'),
    notifSystem:        String(vals[CNP.NOTIF_SYSTEM] || 'FALSE'),
    createdAt:          isoDate(vals[CNP.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:          isoDate(vals[CNP.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MIGRATION — Run once on existing deployments before deploying code that
// changes CNP defaults from TRUE → FALSE.
//
// Scans AuthUsers for every active user at level ≥ 4 (pastor, elder, admin)
// who has no CommsNotificationPrefs row and creates one with:
//   • Email delivery ON
//   • In-App delivery ON
//   • NOTIF_CARE, NOTIF_PRAYER, NOTIF_SYSTEM all ON  (their previous behavior)
//   • All other type toggles OFF
//
// Safe to run multiple times — skips users who already have a prefs row.
// Run from GAS editor: Run → migrateNotifPrefs_
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function migrateNotifPrefs_() {
  var ss  = db();
  var now = new Date();

  // Build a set of emails that already have a CNP row
  var existing = {};
  try {
    var cnpSheet = getTab(CNP_TAB);
    var cnpLast  = cnpSheet.getLastRow();
    if (cnpLast >= 2) {
      cnpSheet.getRange(2, 1, cnpLast - 1, CNP_NUM_COLS).getValues().forEach(function(r) {
        var em = normalizeEmail(String(r[CNP.MEMBER_EMAIL] || ''));
        if (em) existing[em] = true;
      });
    }
  } catch (e) {
    Logger.log('migrateNotifPrefs_: could not read CNP — ' + e);
    return;
  }

  // Scan AuthUsers for active level-4+ users with no CNP row
  var created = 0;
  try {
    var authSheet = getTab('AuthUsers');
    var authLast  = authSheet.getLastRow();
    if (authLast < 2) { Logger.log('migrateNotifPrefs_: no AuthUsers rows'); return; }
    var authData  = authSheet.getRange(2, 1, authLast - 1, 8).getValues();

    authData.forEach(function(r) {
      var em     = normalizeEmail(String(r[0] || ''));
      var memId  = String(r[1] || '');
      var role   = String(r[6] || '').toLowerCase();
      var status = String(r[7] || '').toLowerCase();
      var level  = ROLE_LEVELS[role] || 0;

      if (!em || status !== 'active' || level < 4) return;
      if (existing[em]) {
        Logger.log('  SKIP (already has prefs): ' + em);
        return;
      }

      var row = blankRow(CNP_NUM_COLS);
      row[CNP.ID]                  = newId();
      row[CNP.MEMBER_ID]           = memId;
      row[CNP.MEMBER_EMAIL]        = em;
      row[CNP.EMAIL_ENABLED]       = 'TRUE';
      row[CNP.EMAIL_DIGEST]        = 'Instant';
      row[CNP.IN_APP_ENABLED]      = 'TRUE';
      row[CNP.QUIET_HOURS_START]   = '';
      row[CNP.QUIET_HOURS_END]     = '';
      row[CNP.NOTIF_MESSAGES]      = 'FALSE';
      row[CNP.NOTIF_ANNOUNCEMENTS] = 'FALSE';
      row[CNP.NOTIF_EVENTS]        = 'FALSE';
      row[CNP.NOTIF_PRAYER]        = 'TRUE';
      row[CNP.NOTIF_CARE]          = 'TRUE';
      row[CNP.NOTIF_SYSTEM]        = 'TRUE';
      row[CNP.CREATED_AT]          = now;
      row[CNP.UPDATED_AT]          = now;

      appendRow(ss, CNP_TAB, row);
      existing[em] = true;
      created++;
      Logger.log('  CREATED prefs for: ' + em + ' (' + role + ')');
    });
  } catch (e) {
    Logger.log('migrateNotifPrefs_: error scanning AuthUsers — ' + e);
    return;
  }

  Logger.log('');
  Logger.log('migrateNotifPrefs_ complete — ' + created + ' row(s) created.');
  Logger.log('These users will now receive Care, Prayer, and System notifications');
  Logger.log('via Email + In-App, matching their behaviour before this update.');
  Logger.log('Adjust individual rows in CommsNotificationPrefs as needed.');
}

function handleCommsNotifPrefsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), CNP_TAB, CNP_NUM_COLS);
  var myEmail = auth.email;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][CNP.MEMBER_EMAIL] || '').toLowerCase() === myEmail.toLowerCase()) {
      return jsonOk(commsNotifPrefRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  // Return defaults if no preference record exists
  return jsonOk({
    emailEnabled: 'FALSE', emailDigest: 'Instant', inAppEnabled: 'FALSE',
    quietHoursStart: '', quietHoursEnd: '',
    notifMessages: 'FALSE', notifAnnouncements: 'FALSE', notifEvents: 'FALSE',
    notifPrayer: 'FALSE', notifCare: 'FALSE', notifSystem: 'FALSE'
  });
}

function handleCommsNotifPrefsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, CNP_TAB, CNP_NUM_COLS);
  var myEmail = auth.email;
  var now  = new Date();
  var hit  = null;

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][CNP.MEMBER_EMAIL] || '').toLowerCase() === myEmail.toLowerCase()) {
      hit = { vals: data[i], rowIndex: i + 2 };
      break;
    }
  }

  if (!hit) {
    // Create preferences row
    var id  = newId();
    var row = blankRow(CNP_NUM_COLS);
    row[CNP.ID]                  = id;
    row[CNP.MEMBER_ID]           = auth.memberId || '';
    row[CNP.MEMBER_EMAIL]        = auth.email;
    row[CNP.EMAIL_ENABLED]       = toBoolStr(params.emailEnabled, 'FALSE');
    row[CNP.EMAIL_DIGEST]        = String(params.emailDigest || 'Instant');
    row[CNP.IN_APP_ENABLED]      = toBoolStr(params.inAppEnabled, 'FALSE');
    row[CNP.QUIET_HOURS_START]   = String(params.quietHoursStart || '');
    row[CNP.QUIET_HOURS_END]     = String(params.quietHoursEnd || '');
    row[CNP.NOTIF_MESSAGES]      = toBoolStr(params.notifMessages, 'FALSE');
    row[CNP.NOTIF_ANNOUNCEMENTS] = toBoolStr(params.notifAnnouncements, 'FALSE');
    row[CNP.NOTIF_EVENTS]        = toBoolStr(params.notifEvents, 'FALSE');
    row[CNP.NOTIF_PRAYER]        = toBoolStr(params.notifPrayer, 'FALSE');
    row[CNP.NOTIF_CARE]          = toBoolStr(params.notifCare, 'FALSE');
    row[CNP.NOTIF_SYSTEM]        = toBoolStr(params.notifSystem, 'FALSE');
    row[CNP.CREATED_AT]          = now;
    row[CNP.UPDATED_AT]          = now;
    appendRow(ss, CNP_TAB, row);
    auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.notifPrefs.create', CNP_TAB, id);
    return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Notification preferences saved' });
  }

  // Update existing
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.emailEnabled !== undefined)       v[CNP.EMAIL_ENABLED]       = toBoolStr(params.emailEnabled, 'FALSE');
  if (params.emailDigest !== undefined)        v[CNP.EMAIL_DIGEST]        = String(params.emailDigest);
  if (params.inAppEnabled !== undefined)       v[CNP.IN_APP_ENABLED]      = toBoolStr(params.inAppEnabled, 'FALSE');
  if (params.quietHoursStart !== undefined)    v[CNP.QUIET_HOURS_START]   = String(params.quietHoursStart);
  if (params.quietHoursEnd !== undefined)      v[CNP.QUIET_HOURS_END]     = String(params.quietHoursEnd);
  if (params.notifMessages !== undefined)      v[CNP.NOTIF_MESSAGES]      = toBoolStr(params.notifMessages, 'FALSE');
  if (params.notifAnnouncements !== undefined) v[CNP.NOTIF_ANNOUNCEMENTS] = toBoolStr(params.notifAnnouncements, 'FALSE');
  if (params.notifEvents !== undefined)        v[CNP.NOTIF_EVENTS]        = toBoolStr(params.notifEvents, 'FALSE');
  if (params.notifPrayer !== undefined)        v[CNP.NOTIF_PRAYER]        = toBoolStr(params.notifPrayer, 'FALSE');
  if (params.notifCare !== undefined)          v[CNP.NOTIF_CARE]          = toBoolStr(params.notifCare, 'FALSE');
  if (params.notifSystem !== undefined)        v[CNP.NOTIF_SYSTEM]        = toBoolStr(params.notifSystem, 'FALSE');
  v[CNP.UPDATED_AT] = now;
  writeRow(ss, CNP_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.notifPrefs.update', CNP_TAB, String(v[CNP.ID]));
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Notification preferences updated' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMS CHANNELS (announcement & topic channels)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CCH_TAB      = 'CommsChannels';
var CCH_NUM_COLS = 18;

var CCH = {
  ID: 0, CHANNEL_NAME: 1, SLUG: 2, DESCRIPTION: 3,
  CHANNEL_TYPE: 4, ICON: 5, COLOR_HEX: 6,
  CREATOR_ID: 7, CREATOR_NAME: 8,
  SUBSCRIBER_COUNT: 9, MESSAGE_COUNT: 10,
  VISIBILITY: 11, POST_PERMISSION: 12,
  PINNED_MESSAGE_ID: 13,
  STATUS: 14, SORT_ORDER: 15,
  CREATED_AT: 16, UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function commsChannelRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:            rowIndex,
    id:               String(vals[CCH.ID] || ''),
    channelName:      String(vals[CCH.CHANNEL_NAME] || ''),
    slug:             String(vals[CCH.SLUG] || ''),
    description:      String(vals[CCH.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    channelType:      String(vals[CCH.CHANNEL_TYPE] || ''),
    icon:             String(vals[CCH.ICON] || ''),
    colorHex:         String(vals[CCH.COLOR_HEX] || ''),
    creatorId:        String(vals[CCH.CREATOR_ID] || ''),
    creatorName:      String(vals[CCH.CREATOR_NAME] || ''),
    subscriberCount:  Number(vals[CCH.SUBSCRIBER_COUNT] || 0),
    messageCount:     Number(vals[CCH.MESSAGE_COUNT] || 0),
    visibility:       String(vals[CCH.VISIBILITY] || ''),
    postPermission:   String(vals[CCH.POST_PERMISSION] || ''),
    pinnedMessageId:  String(vals[CCH.PINNED_MESSAGE_ID] || ''),
    status:           String(vals[CCH.STATUS] || ''),
    sortOrder:        Number(vals[CCH.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    createdAt:        isoDate(vals[CCH.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:        isoDate(vals[CCH.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Channels handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleCommsChannelsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), CCH_TAB, CCH_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = commsChannelRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.visibility === 'Leaders Only' && auth.roleLevel < 2) continue;
    if (params.channelType && obj.channelType !== params.channelType) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleCommsChannelsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CCH_TAB, CCH_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Channel not found');
  var obj = commsChannelRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex);

  // Also fetch recent threads for this channel
  var threads = allRows(ss, CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS);
  var channelThreads = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < threads.length; i++) {
    if (String(threads[i][CTH.CHANNEL_ID]) === obj.id) {
      channelThreads.push(commsThreadRowToObject(threads[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  channelThreads.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.lastMessageAt || '') > (a.lastMessageAt || '') ? 1 : -1; });
  obj.threads = channelThreads;
  return jsonOk(obj);
}

function handleCommsChannelsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(CCH_NUM_COLS);
  row[CCH.ID]               = id;
  row[CCH.CHANNEL_NAME]     = String(params.channelName || '');
  row[CCH.SLUG]             = String(params.slug || slugify(params.channelName || ''));
  row[CCH.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description || '');
  row[CCH.CHANNEL_TYPE]     = String(params.channelType || 'Announcement');
  row[CCH.ICON]             = String(params.icon || '');
  row[CCH.COLOR_HEX]        = String(params.colorHex || '');
  row[CCH.CREATOR_ID]       = auth.memberId || '';
  row[CCH.CREATOR_NAME]     = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[CCH.SUBSCRIBER_COUNT] = 0;
  row[CCH.MESSAGE_COUNT]    = 0;
  row[CCH.VISIBILITY]       = String(params.visibility || 'Public');
  row[CCH.POST_PERMISSION]  = String(params.postPermission || 'Leaders');
  row[CCH.STATUS]           = 'Active';
  row[CCH.SORT_ORDER]       = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[CCH.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[CCH.UPDATED_AT]       = now;
  appendRow(ss, CCH_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.channels.create', CCH_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Channel created' });
}

function handleCommsChannelsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CCH_TAB, CCH_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Channel not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.channelName !== undefined)    v[CCH.CHANNEL_NAME]    = String(params.channelName);
  if (params.slug !== undefined)           v[CCH.SLUG]            = String(params.slug);
  if (params.description !== undefined)    v[CCH.DESCRIPTION]     = String(params.description);
  if (params.channelType !== undefined)    v[CCH.CHANNEL_TYPE]    = String(params.channelType);
  if (params.icon !== undefined)           v[CCH.ICON]            = String(params.icon);
  if (params.colorHex !== undefined)       v[CCH.COLOR_HEX]       = String(params.colorHex);
  if (params.visibility !== undefined)     v[CCH.VISIBILITY]      = String(params.visibility);
  if (params.postPermission !== undefined) v[CCH.POST_PERMISSION] = String(params.postPermission);
  if (params.pinnedMessageId !== undefined)v[CCH.PINNED_MESSAGE_ID] = String(params.pinnedMessageId);
  if (params.status !== undefined)         v[CCH.STATUS]          = String(params.status);
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)      v[CCH.SORT_ORDER]      = Number(params.sortOrder);
  v[CCH.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CCH_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.channels.update', CCH_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Channel updated' });
}

function handleCommsChannelsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CCH_TAB, CCH_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Channel not found');
  hit.vals[CCH.STATUS]     = 'Deleted';
  hit.vals[CCH.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CCH_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.channels.delete', CCH_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Channel deleted' });
}

/** Post to a channel (creates a thread + message in that channel) */
function handleCommsChannelsPost(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  if (!params.channelId) return jsonErr('channelId required');
  var ss = db();

  // Check channel permissions
  var channel = findRowById(ss, CCH_TAB, CCH_NUM_COLS, params.channelId);
  if (!channel) return jsonErr('Channel not found');
  var perm = String(channel.vals[CCH.POST_PERMISSION] || 'Leaders');
  if (perm === 'Leaders' && auth.roleLevel < 2) return jsonErr('Only leaders can post in this channel');
  if (perm === 'Pastors' && auth.roleLevel < 3) return jsonErr('Only pastors can post in this channel');
  if (perm === 'Admins' && auth.roleLevel < 4)  return jsonErr('Only admins can post in this channel');

  // Create thread in channel
  params.threadType = 'Channel';
  var threadResult = handleCommsThreadsCreate(params, auth);

  // Create message in thread
  var threadData = threadResult.data || {};
  var msgParams = {
    threadId:      threadData.id || '',
    recipientType: 'Channel',
    recipientId:   params.channelId,
    recipientName: String(channel.vals[CCH.CHANNEL_NAME] || ''),
    messageType:   'Announcement',
    subject:       params.subject || '',
    body:          params.body || '',
    priority:      params.priority || 'Normal'
  };
  var msgResult = handleCommsMessagesSend(msgParams, auth);

  // Update channel message count
  channel.vals[CCH.MESSAGE_COUNT] = Number(channel.vals[CCH.MESSAGE_COUNT] || 0) + 1;
  channel.vals[CCH.UPDATED_AT]    = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CCH_TAB, channel.rowIndex, channel.vals);

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.channels.post', CCH_TAB, params.channelId);
  return jsonOk({ threadId: threadData.id, message: 'Posted to channel' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMS TEMPLATES (reusable message templates)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CTM_TAB      = 'CommsTemplates';
var CTM_NUM_COLS = 16;

var CTM = {
  ID: 0, TEMPLATE_NAME: 1, TEMPLATE_TYPE: 2,
  SUBJECT: 3, BODY: 4, BODY_HTML: 5,
  CATEGORY: 6, VARIABLES: 7,
  USE_COUNT: 8, LAST_USED_AT: 9,
  VISIBILITY: 10, STATUS: 11,
  CREATED_BY: 12, CREATED_BY_NAME: 13,
  CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function commsTemplateRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:         rowIndex,
    id:            String(vals[CTM.ID] || ''),
    templateName:  String(vals[CTM.TEMPLATE_NAME] || ''),
    templateType:  String(vals[CTM.TEMPLATE_TYPE] || ''),
    subject:       String(vals[CTM.SUBJECT] || ''),
    body:          String(vals[CTM.BODY] || ''),
    bodyHtml:      String(vals[CTM.BODY_HTML] || ''),
    category:      String(vals[CTM.CATEGORY] || ''),
    variables:     String(vals[CTM.VARIABLES] || ''),
    useCount:      Number(vals[CTM.USE_COUNT] || 0),
    lastUsedAt:    isoDate(vals[CTM.LAST_USED_AT]),
    visibility:    String(vals[CTM.VISIBILITY] || ''),
    status:        String(vals[CTM.STATUS] || ''),
    createdBy:     String(vals[CTM.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdByName: String(vals[CTM.CREATED_BY_NAME] || ''),
    createdAt:     isoDate(vals[CTM.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:     isoDate(vals[CTM.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Templates handlers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleCommsTemplatesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var data = allRows(db(), CTM_TAB, CTM_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = commsTemplateRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.templateType && obj.templateType !== params.templateType) continue;
    if (params.category && obj.category !== params.category) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleCommsTemplatesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), CTM_TAB, CTM_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Template not found');
  return jsonOk(commsTemplateRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleCommsTemplatesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(CTM_NUM_COLS);
  row[CTM.ID]              = id;
  row[CTM.TEMPLATE_NAME]   = String(params.templateName || '');
  row[CTM.TEMPLATE_TYPE]   = String(params.templateType || 'Email');
  row[CTM.SUBJECT]         = String(params.subject || '');
  row[CTM.BODY]            = String(params.body || '');
  row[CTM.BODY_HTML]       = String(params.bodyHtml || '');
  row[CTM.CATEGORY]        = String(params.category || 'General');
  row[CTM.VARIABLES]       = String(params.variables || '');
  row[CTM.USE_COUNT]       = 0;
  row[CTM.VISIBILITY]      = String(params.visibility || 'Shared');
  row[CTM.STATUS]          = 'Active';
  row[CTM.CREATED_BY]      = auth.email;
  row[CTM.CREATED_BY_NAME] = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[CTM.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  row[CTM.UPDATED_AT]      = now;
  appendRow(ss, CTM_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.templates.create', CTM_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Template created' });
}

function handleCommsTemplatesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CTM_TAB, CTM_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Template not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.templateName !== undefined)  v[CTM.TEMPLATE_NAME]  = String(params.templateName);
  if (params.templateType !== undefined)  v[CTM.TEMPLATE_TYPE]  = String(params.templateType);
  if (params.subject !== undefined)       v[CTM.SUBJECT]        = String(params.subject);
  if (params.body !== undefined)          v[CTM.BODY]           = String(params.body);
  if (params.bodyHtml !== undefined)      v[CTM.BODY_HTML]      = String(params.bodyHtml);
  if (params.category !== undefined)      v[CTM.CATEGORY]       = String(params.category);
  if (params.variables !== undefined)     v[CTM.VARIABLES]      = String(params.variables);
  if (params.visibility !== undefined)    v[CTM.VISIBILITY]     = String(params.visibility);
  if (params.status !== undefined)        v[CTM.STATUS]         = String(params.status);
  v[CTM.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CTM_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.templates.update', CTM_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Template updated' });
}

function handleCommsTemplatesDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CTM_TAB, CTM_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Template not found');
  deleteRow(ss, CTM_TAB, hit.rowIndex);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.templates.delete', CTM_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Template deleted' });
}

/** Send a message using a template (with variable substitution) */
function handleCommsTemplatesUse(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  if (!params.templateId)  return jsonErr('templateId required');
  if (!params.recipientId) return jsonErr('recipientId required');

  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CTM_TAB, CTM_NUM_COLS, params.templateId);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Template not found');
  var tpl = commsTemplateRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex);

  // Variable substitution
  var subject = tpl.subject;
  var body    = tpl.body;
  var vars    = params.variables || {};
  for (var key in vars) {
    if (vars.hasOwnProperty(key)) {
      var placeholder = '{{' + key + '}}';
      subject = subject.split(placeholder).join(String(vars[key]));
      body    = body.split(placeholder).join(String(vars[key]));
    }
  }

  // Increment use count
  hit.vals[CTM.USE_COUNT]   = Number(hit.vals[CTM.USE_COUNT] || 0) + 1;
  hit.vals[CTM.LAST_USED_AT]= new Date();
  hit.vals[CTM.UPDATED_AT]  = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, CTM_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);

  // Send message via the messages handler
  return handleCommsMessagesSend({
    recipientType: params.recipientType || 'Member',
    recipientId:   params.recipientId,
    recipientName: params.recipientName || '',
    messageType:   tpl.templateType,
    subject:       subject,
    body:          body,
    priority:      params.priority || 'Normal'
  }, auth);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMS READ RECEIPTS (tracking who has read messages/announcements)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CRR_TAB      = 'CommsReadReceipts';
var CRR_NUM_COLS = 10;

var CRR = {
  ID: 0, MESSAGE_ID: 1, THREAD_ID: 2,
  READER_ID: 3, READER_NAME: 4, READER_EMAIL: 5,
  READ_AT: 6, DEVICE: 7,
  CREATED_AT: 8, UPDATED_AT: 9
};

function commsReadReceiptRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:       rowIndex,
    id:          String(vals[CRR.ID] || ''),
    messageId:   String(vals[CRR.MESSAGE_ID] || ''),
    threadId:    String(vals[CRR.THREAD_ID] || ''),
    readerId:    String(vals[CRR.READER_ID] || ''),
    readerName:  String(vals[CRR.READER_NAME] || ''),
    readerEmail: String(vals[CRR.READER_EMAIL] || ''),
    readAt:      isoDate(vals[CRR.READ_AT]),
    device:      String(vals[CRR.DEVICE] || ''),
    createdAt:   isoDate(vals[CRR.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:   isoDate(vals[CRR.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleCommsReadReceiptsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.messageId) return jsonErr('messageId required');
  var ss  = db();
  var now = new Date();

  // Check if already read by this user
  var data = allRows(ss, CRR_TAB, CRR_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][CRR.MESSAGE_ID]) === params.messageId &&
        String(data[i][CRR.READER_EMAIL]) === auth.email) {
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Already recorded', id: String(data[i][CRR.ID]) });
    }
  }

  var id  = newId();
  var row = blankRow(CRR_NUM_COLS);
  row[CRR.ID]           = id;
  row[CRR.MESSAGE_ID]   = String(params.messageId);
  row[CRR.THREAD_ID]    = String(params.threadId || '');
  row[CRR.READER_ID]    = auth.memberId || '';
  row[CRR.READER_NAME]  = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[CRR.READER_EMAIL] = auth.email;
  row[CRR.READ_AT]      = now;
  row[CRR.DEVICE]       = String(params.device || '');
  row[CRR.CREATED_AT]   = now;
  row[CRR.UPDATED_AT]   = now;
  appendRow(ss, CRR_TAB, row);

  // Update message read count
  var msg = findRowById(ss, CMG_TAB, CMG_NUM_COLS, params.messageId);
  if (msg) {
    msg.vals[CMG.READ_COUNT]  = Number(msg.vals[CMG.READ_COUNT] || 0) + 1;
    msg.vals[CMG.UPDATED_AT]  = now;
    writeRow(ss, CMG_TAB, msg.rowIndex, msg.vals);
  }

  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Read receipt recorded' });
}

function handleCommsReadReceiptsForMessage(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  if (!params.messageId) return jsonErr('messageId required');
  var data = allRows(db(), CRR_TAB, CRR_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][CRR.MESSAGE_ID]) === params.messageId) {
      out.push(commsReadReceiptRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMS BROADCAST LOG (enhanced version of the old Communications tab)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CBL_TAB      = 'CommsBroadcastLog';
var CBL_NUM_COLS = 18;

var CBL = {
  ID: 0, TYPE: 1, SUBJECT: 2, BODY: 3, BODY_HTML: 4,
  AUDIENCE: 5, AUDIENCE_FILTER: 6,
  TEMPLATE_ID: 7, CHANNEL_ID: 8,
  SENT_AT: 9, SENT_BY: 10, SENT_BY_NAME: 11,
  RECIPIENT_COUNT: 12, DELIVERED_COUNT: 13, FAILED_COUNT: 14,
  STATUS: 15, SCHEDULED_FOR: 16,
  CREATED_AT: 17
};

function commsBroadcastLogRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[CBL.ID] || ''),
    type:           String(vals[CBL.TYPE] || ''),
    subject:        String(vals[CBL.SUBJECT] || ''),
    body:           String(vals[CBL.BODY] || ''),
