    bodyHtml:       String(vals[CBL.BODY_HTML] || ''),
    audience:       String(vals[CBL.AUDIENCE] || ''),
    audienceFilter: String(vals[CBL.AUDIENCE_FILTER] || ''),
    templateId:     String(vals[CBL.TEMPLATE_ID] || ''),
    channelId:      String(vals[CBL.CHANNEL_ID] || ''),
    sentAt:         isoDate(vals[CBL.SENT_AT]),
    sentBy:         String(vals[CBL.SENT_BY] || ''),
    sentByName:     String(vals[CBL.SENT_BY_NAME] || ''),
    recipientCount: Number(vals[CBL.RECIPIENT_COUNT] || 0),
    deliveredCount: Number(vals[CBL.DELIVERED_COUNT] || 0),
    failedCount:    Number(vals[CBL.FAILED_COUNT] || 0),
    status:         String(vals[CBL.STATUS] || ''),
    scheduledFor:   isoDate(vals[CBL.SCHEDULED_FOR]),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[CBL.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleCommsBroadcastLogList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var data = allRows(db(), CBL_TAB, CBL_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = commsBroadcastLogRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.type && obj.type !== params.type) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.createdAt || '') > (a.createdAt || '') ? 1 : -1; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleCommsBroadcastLogCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  if (!params.subject) return jsonErr('subject required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(CBL_NUM_COLS);
  row[CBL.ID]              = id;
  row[CBL.TYPE]            = String(params.type || 'Email');
  row[CBL.SUBJECT]         = String(params.subject || '');
  row[CBL.BODY]            = String(params.body || '');
  row[CBL.BODY_HTML]       = String(params.bodyHtml || '');
  row[CBL.AUDIENCE]        = String(params.audience || 'All');
  row[CBL.AUDIENCE_FILTER] = String(params.audienceFilter || '');
  row[CBL.TEMPLATE_ID]     = String(params.templateId || '');
  row[CBL.CHANNEL_ID]      = String(params.channelId || '');
  row[CBL.SENT_BY]         = auth.email;
  row[CBL.SENT_BY_NAME]    = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[CBL.RECIPIENT_COUNT] = 0;
  row[CBL.DELIVERED_COUNT] = 0;
  row[CBL.FAILED_COUNT]    = 0;
  row[CBL.STATUS]          = 'Draft';
  row[CBL.SCHEDULED_FOR]   = params.scheduledFor || '';
  row[CBL.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  appendRow(ss, CBL_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.broadcast.create', CBL_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Broadcast draft created' });
}

function handleCommsBroadcastLogSend(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, CBL_TAB, CBL_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Broadcast not found');
  var v   = hit.vals;
  var now = new Date();

  var audience = String(v[CBL.AUDIENCE] || 'All');
  var filter   = String(v[CBL.AUDIENCE_FILTER] || '');
  var subject  = String(v[CBL.SUBJECT] || 'Church Update');
  var body     = String(v[CBL.BODY] || '');
  var bodyHtml = String(v[CBL.BODY_HTML] || '');

  // Resolve recipients
  var recipientEmails = resolveAudienceEmails(audience, filter);
  var sentCount  = 0;
  var failCount  = 0;

  for (var i = 0; i < recipientEmails.length; i++) {
    try {
      if (bodyHtml) {
        GmailApp.sendEmail(recipientEmails[i], subject, body, { htmlBody: bodyHtml });
      } else {
        GmailApp.sendEmail(recipientEmails[i], subject, body);
      }
      sentCount++;
    } catch (err) {
      failCount++;
    }
  }

  v[CBL.SENT_AT]          = now;
  v[CBL.RECIPIENT_COUNT]  = recipientEmails.length;
  v[CBL.DELIVERED_COUNT]  = sentCount;
  v[CBL.FAILED_COUNT]     = failCount;
  v[CBL.STATUS]           = 'Sent';
  writeRow(ss, CBL_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'comms.broadcast.send', CBL_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ delivered: sentCount, failed: failCount, message: 'Broadcast sent to ' + sentCount + ' recipients' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMMS DASHBOARD (overview stats)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleCommsDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss = db();

  var messages = allRows(ss, CMG_TAB, CMG_NUM_COLS);
  var totalMsgs = 0, sentToday = 0;
  var today = new Date().toISOString().substring(0, 10);
  for (var m = 0; m < messages.length; m++) {
    if (String(messages[m][CMG.STATUS]) !== 'Deleted') totalMsgs++;
    var sa = isoDate(messages[m][CMG.SENT_AT]);
    if (sa && String(sa).substring(0, 10) === today) sentToday++;
  }

  var threads  = allRows(ss, CTH_TAB, CTH_NUM_COLS);
  var activeThreads = 0;
  for (var t = 0; t < threads.length; t++) if (String(threads[t][CTH.STATUS]) === 'Active') activeThreads++;

  var notifs   = allRows(ss, CN_TAB, CN_NUM_COLS);
  var unread   = 0;
  var myId     = auth.memberId || auth.email;
  for (var n = 0; n < notifs.length; n++) {
    var rid = String(notifs[n][CN.RECIPIENT_ID] || '');
    var re  = String(notifs[n][CN.RECIPIENT_EMAIL] || '');
    if ((rid === myId || re === auth.email) && String(notifs[n][CN.STATUS]) === 'Unread') unread++;
  }

  var channels = allRows(ss, CCH_TAB, CCH_NUM_COLS);
  var activeCh = 0;
  for (var c = 0; c < channels.length; c++) if (String(channels[c][CCH.STATUS]) === 'Active') activeCh++;

  var templates = allRows(ss, CTM_TAB, CTM_NUM_COLS);
  var activeTpl = 0;
  for (var tp = 0; tp < templates.length; tp++) if (String(templates[tp][CTM.STATUS]) === 'Active') activeTpl++;

  var broadcasts = allRows(ss, CBL_TAB, CBL_NUM_COLS);

  return jsonOk({
    totalMessages:   totalMsgs,
    messagesSentToday: sentToday,
    activeThreads:   activeThreads,
    unreadNotifs:    unread,
    activeChannels:  activeCh,
    activeTemplates: activeTpl,
    totalBroadcasts: broadcasts.length
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FIREBASE — THE UPPER ROOM (Custom Token Minting)
// Mints a Firebase custom token so the client can authenticate to Firestore.
// Requires Script Properties: FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL, FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleFirebaseToken(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);  // any authenticated user

  var email    = auth.email;
  // Resolve churchId: client param > Script Property > auth fallback
  var churchId = (params && params.churchId) || PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('FIRESTORE_CHURCH_ID') || auth.churchId || 'FlockOS';
  var role     = auth.role || 'readonly';

  var props      = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties();
  var saEmail, privateKey;

  // Preferred: full service account JSON stored as FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT
  var saJson = props.getProperty('FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT');
  if (saJson) {
    try {
      var sa = JSON.parse(saJson);
      saEmail    = sa.client_email;
      privateKey = sa.private_key;  // JSON.parse gives real newlines — no fixup needed
    } catch (e) {
      return jsonErr('FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT is not valid JSON');
    }
  } else {
    // Fallback: individual properties
    saEmail    = props.getProperty('FIREBASE_CLIENT_EMAIL');
    privateKey = props.getProperty('FIREBASE_PRIVATE_KEY');
    if (privateKey) privateKey = privateKey.replace(/\\n/g, '\n');
  }

  if (!saEmail || !privateKey) {
    return jsonErr('Firebase service account not configured. Set FIREBASE_SERVICE_ACCOUNT in Script Properties.');
  }

  var now = Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000);

  // JWT Header
  var header = { alg: 'RS256', typ: 'JWT' };

  // JWT Claims — Firebase Custom Token format
  var claims = {
    iss:    saEmail,
    sub:    saEmail,
    aud:    'https://identitytoolkit.googleapis.com/google.identity.identitytoolkit.v1.IdentityToolkit',
    iat:    now,
    exp:    now + 3600,  // 1 hour
    uid:    email.replace(/[^a-zA-Z0-9._-]/g, '_'),  // Firebase UID (safe chars)
    claims: {
      email:    email,
      churchId: churchId,
      role:     role
    }
  };

  // Base64url encode
  var b64Header = Utilities.base64EncodeWebSafe(JSON.stringify(header)).replace(/=+$/, '');
  var b64Claims = Utilities.base64EncodeWebSafe(JSON.stringify(claims)).replace(/=+$/, '');
  var sigInput  = b64Header + '.' + b64Claims;

  // Sign with RSA-SHA256 using the service account private key
  var signature = Utilities.computeRsaSha256Signature(sigInput, privateKey);
  var b64Sig    = Utilities.base64EncodeWebSafe(signature).replace(/=+$/, '');

  var customToken = sigInput + '.' + b64Sig;

  return jsonOk({ token: customToken });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// USER PREFERENCES SYNC (theme + settings sync across devices)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Get the current user's full preference bundle (theme, notifications, locale).
 * Called on app start so the frontend immediately applies the right theme.
 */
function handleUserPreferencesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var profile = findExpProfile_(auth.email);
  return jsonOk({
    email:              auth.email,
    theme:              profile.theme || 'Auto',
    language:           profile.language || 'en',
    timezone:           profile.timezone || '',
    notifications:      profile.notifications !== undefined ? profile.notifications : true,
    displayName:        profile.displayName || auth.displayName || '',
    photoUrl:           profile.photoUrl || '',
    // Notification preferences
    notifPrefs:         getNotifPrefsForUser_(auth)
  });
}

/**
 * Update user preferences (theme, language, timezone, notifications).
 * This is the endpoint the frontend calls when the user changes their theme
 * in a settings panel — the value is persisted and returned on next login.
 */
function handleUserPreferencesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss    = db();
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName('UserProfiles');
  if (!sheet) return jsonErr('UserProfiles tab not found');

  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  var rowIdx  = -1;
  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var emails = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < emails.length; i++) {
      if (String(emails[i][0] || '').toLowerCase().trim() === auth.email.toLowerCase().trim()) {
        rowIdx = i + 2; break;
      }
    }
  }

  var now = new Date();
  if (rowIdx > 0) {
    if (params.theme !== undefined)         sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 9).setValue(String(params.theme));
    if (params.language !== undefined)       sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 7).setValue(String(params.language));
    if (params.timezone !== undefined)       sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 6).setValue(String(params.timezone));
    if (params.notifications !== undefined)  sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 8).setValue(String(params.notifications).toUpperCase());
    if (params.displayName !== undefined)    sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 2).setValue(String(params.displayName));
    if (params.photoUrl !== undefined)       sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 3).setValue(String(params.photoUrl));
    sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 10).setValue(now);
  } else {
    // Create profile row on the fly
    sheet.appendRow([
      auth.email,
      String(params.displayName || auth.displayName || ''),
      String(params.photoUrl || ''),
      '',
      '',
      String(params.timezone || ''),
      String(params.language || 'en'),
      String(params.notifications || 'TRUE'),
      String(params.theme || 'Auto'),
      now
    ]);
  }

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'user.preferences.update', 'UserProfiles', auth.email);
  return jsonOk({
    message: 'Preferences saved',
    theme:   String(params.theme || 'Auto'),
    synced:  true
  });
}

/** Internal helper — get notification prefs for a user */
function getNotifPrefsForUser_(auth) {
  var data = allRows(db(), CNP_TAB, CNP_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][CNP.MEMBER_EMAIL] || '').toLowerCase() === auth.email.toLowerCase()) {
      return commsNotifPrefRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    }
  }
  return { emailEnabled: 'TRUE', inAppEnabled: 'TRUE', notifMessages: 'TRUE', notifAnnouncements: 'TRUE', notifEvents: 'TRUE', notifPrayer: 'TRUE', notifCare: 'TRUE', notifSystem: 'TRUE' };
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// UTILITY: Convert param to TRUE/FALSE string with default
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function toBoolStr(val, defaultVal) {
  if (val === undefined || val === null) return defaultVal || 'TRUE';
  if (val === true || val === 'TRUE' || val === 'true' || val === '1') return 'TRUE';
  if (val === false || val === 'FALSE' || val === 'false' || val === '0') return 'FALSE';
  return defaultVal || 'TRUE';
}


// ── Legacy action-name aliases (routed by Api.gs for backward compatibility) ─
// These map the old generic action names to their current full-name equivalents.

function handleCommsList(params, auth) {
  return handleCommsThreadsList(params, auth);
}

function handleCommsCreate(params, auth) {
  return handleCommsThreadsCreate(params, auth);
}

function handleCommsSend(params, auth) {
  return handleCommsMessagesSend(params, auth);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TWILIO SMS GATEWAY
// Sends SMS via Twilio REST API when TWILIO_ENABLED is TRUE in AppConfig.
// Script Properties required: TWILIO_SID, TWILIO_TOKEN, TWILIO_NUMBER
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleSmsSend(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');

  var enabled = getAppConfigValue_('TWILIO_ENABLED', 'FALSE');
  if (enabled !== 'TRUE') return jsonErr('SMS gateway is not enabled. Turn it on in Control Panel.');

  var phone   = String(params.phone || '').replace(/[^\d+]/g, '');
  var message = String(params.message || '').trim();
  if (!phone)   return jsonErr('Phone number is required.');
  if (!message) return jsonErr('Message body is required.');

  var props = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties();
  var sid   = props.getProperty('TWILIO_SID');
  var token = props.getProperty('TWILIO_TOKEN');
  var from  = props.getProperty('TWILIO_NUMBER');

  if (!sid || !token || !from) {
    return jsonErr('Twilio credentials are not configured. Set TWILIO_SID, TWILIO_TOKEN, and TWILIO_NUMBER in Script Properties.');
  }

  try {
    var resp = UrlFetchApp.fetch(
      'https://api.twilio.com/2010-04-01/Accounts/' + sid + '/Messages.json',
      {
        method: 'post',
        headers: { 'Authorization': 'Basic ' + Utilities.base64Encode(sid + ':' + token) },
        payload: { To: phone, From: from, Body: message },
        muteHttpExceptions: true
      }
    );

    var code = resp.getResponseCode();
    var body = JSON.parse(resp.getContentText());

    if (code >= 200 && code < 300) {
      writeAudit(auth, 'sms.send', 'Twilio', 0, 'To: ' + phone + ' SID: ' + (body.sid || ''));
      return jsonOk({ sid: body.sid, status: body.status, to: phone });
    } else {
      return jsonErr('Twilio error: ' + (body.message || resp.getContentText()));
    }
  } catch (err) {
    return jsonErr('SMS send failed: ' + err.message);
  }
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EMAIL NOTIFICATION  (direct GmailApp — runs under the deploying account)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Send an email with optional HTML body via the deploying Gmail account.
 * Wraps GmailApp.sendEmail so callers that used the old relay signature
 * (to, subject, body, htmlBody) continue to work without changes.
 */
function sendNotificationEmail_(to, subject, body, htmlBody) {
  if (!to) { console.log('sendNotificationEmail_: no recipient'); return; }
  try {
    var opts = { name: getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS') };
    if (htmlBody) opts.htmlBody = htmlBody;
    GmailApp.sendEmail(to, subject, body || '', opts);
  } catch (e) {
    console.log('sendNotificationEmail_ error: ' + (e && e.message ? e.message : String(e)));
  }
}


/**
 * Diagnostic: test the email notification configuration.
 * Sends a real test email to the caller's address via GmailApp.
 */
function handleCommsNotificationsTestEmail(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3); // pastor+ to test

  var diag = {
    recipientEmail:  auth.email,
    method: 'GmailApp.sendEmail'
  };

  try {
    var church = getAppConfigValue_('CHURCH_NAME', 'FlockOS');
    GmailApp.sendEmail(auth.email,
      'FlockOS Email Test — ' + church,
      'If you received this, FlockOS email notifications are working.',
      {
        name: church,
        htmlBody: '<p>If you received this, <strong>FlockOS email notifications</strong> are working.</p>'
      }
    );
    diag.sent = true;
  } catch (e) {
    diag.error = e && e.message ? e.message : String(e);
    diag.sent  = false;
  }
  return jsonOk(diag);
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Compassion.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: COMPASSION — Benevolence & Compassion Teams Ministry
// Tabs: CompassionRequests, CompassionResources, CompassionTeamLog
//
// Tracks benevolence/compassion requests from members and the community,
// manages resource inventory (food pantry, financial aid, clothing, etc.),
// and logs team activities (visits, deliveries, follow-ups).
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMPASSION REQUESTS (needs submitted by or on behalf of individuals)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CR_TAB     = 'CompassionRequests';
var CR_NUM_COLS = 21;

var CR = {
  ID: 0, REQUESTER_NAME: 1, REQUESTER_PHONE: 2, REQUESTER_EMAIL: 3,
  IS_MEMBER: 4, MEMBER_ID: 5, REQUEST_TYPE: 6, DESCRIPTION: 7,
  URGENCY: 8, AMOUNT_REQUESTED: 9, AMOUNT_APPROVED: 10,
  STATUS: 11, ASSIGNED_TEAM: 12, ASSIGNED_TO: 13,
  FOLLOW_UP_DATE: 14, RESOLUTION_NOTES: 15,
  CONFIDENTIAL: 16, SUBMITTED_BY: 17,
  APPROVED_BY: 18, CREATED_AT: 19, UPDATED_AT: 20
};

function compassionReqRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:            rowIndex,
    id:               String(vals[CR.ID] || ''),
    requesterName:    String(vals[CR.REQUESTER_NAME] || ''),
    requesterPhone:   String(vals[CR.REQUESTER_PHONE] || ''),
    requesterEmail:   String(vals[CR.REQUESTER_EMAIL] || ''),
    isMember:         String(vals[CR.IS_MEMBER] || 'FALSE'),
    memberId:         String(vals[CR.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    requestType:      String(vals[CR.REQUEST_TYPE] || ''),
    description:      String(vals[CR.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    urgency:          String(vals[CR.URGENCY] || ''),
    amountRequested:  Number(vals[CR.AMOUNT_REQUESTED] || 0),
    amountApproved:   Number(vals[CR.AMOUNT_APPROVED] || 0),
    status:           String(vals[CR.STATUS] || ''),
    assignedTeam:     String(vals[CR.ASSIGNED_TEAM] || ''),
    assignedTo:       String(vals[CR.ASSIGNED_TO] || ''),
    followUpDate:     isoDate(vals[CR.FOLLOW_UP_DATE]),
    resolutionNotes:  String(vals[CR.RESOLUTION_NOTES] || ''),
    confidential:     String(vals[CR.CONFIDENTIAL] || 'FALSE'),
    submittedBy:      String(vals[CR.SUBMITTED_BY] || ''),
    approvedBy:       String(vals[CR.APPROVED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:        isoDate(vals[CR.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:        isoDate(vals[CR.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMPASSION RESOURCES (inventory: food, clothing, financial aid capacity)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CRS_TAB     = 'CompassionResources';
var CRS_NUM_COLS = 12;

var CRS = {
  ID: 0, RESOURCE_NAME: 1, CATEGORY: 2, DESCRIPTION: 3,
  QUANTITY_ON_HAND: 4, UNIT: 5, REORDER_LEVEL: 6,
  LOCATION: 7, DONATED_BY: 8, STATUS: 9,
  CREATED_AT: 10, UPDATED_AT: 11
};

function compassionResourceToObj_(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[CRS.ID] || ''),
    resourceName:   String(vals[CRS.RESOURCE_NAME] || ''),
    category:       String(vals[CRS.CATEGORY] || ''),
    description:    String(vals[CRS.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    quantityOnHand: Number(vals[CRS.QUANTITY_ON_HAND] || 0),
    unit:           String(vals[CRS.UNIT] || ''),
    reorderLevel:   Number(vals[CRS.REORDER_LEVEL] || 0),
    location:       String(vals[CRS.LOCATION] || ''),
    donatedBy:      String(vals[CRS.DONATED_BY] || ''),
    status:         String(vals[CRS.STATUS] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[CRS.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[CRS.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMPASSION TEAM LOG (visits, deliveries, follow-ups)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var CTL_TAB     = 'CompassionTeamLog';
var CTL_NUM_COLS = 12;

var CTL = {
  ID: 0, REQUEST_ID: 1, DATE: 2, ACTIVITY_TYPE: 3,
  TEAM_MEMBER_ID: 4, TEAM_MEMBER_NAME: 5, DESCRIPTION: 6,
  RESOURCES_USED: 7, AMOUNT_DISBURSED: 8,
  FOLLOW_UP_NEEDED: 9, NOTES: 10, CREATED_AT: 11
};

function teamLogRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[CTL.ID] || ''),
    requestId:      String(vals[CTL.REQUEST_ID] || ''),
    date:           isoDate(vals[CTL.DATE]),
    activityType:   String(vals[CTL.ACTIVITY_TYPE] || ''),
    teamMemberId:   String(vals[CTL.TEAM_MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    teamMemberName: String(vals[CTL.TEAM_MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    description:    String(vals[CTL.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    resourcesUsed:  String(vals[CTL.RESOURCES_USED] || ''),
    amountDisbursed:Number(vals[CTL.AMOUNT_DISBURSED] || 0),
    followUpNeeded: String(vals[CTL.FOLLOW_UP_NEEDED] || 'FALSE'),
    notes:          String(vals[CTL.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[CTL.CREATED_AT])
  };
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMPASSION REQUEST HANDLERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * List compassion requests with filters.
 * Confidential requests are only visible to pastor+ roles.
 */
function handleCompassionRequestsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(CR_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data       = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CR_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var status     = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var reqType    = String(params.requestType || '').trim();
  var urgency    = String(params.urgency || '').trim();
  var assignedTo = String(params.assignedTo || '').trim();

  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = compassionReqRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.confidential === 'TRUE' && !hasRole(auth, 'pastor')) continue;
    if (status     && obj.status      !== status)     continue;
    if (reqType    && obj.requestType !== reqType)     continue;
    if (urgency    && obj.urgency     !== urgency)     continue;
    if (assignedTo && obj.assignedTo  !== assignedTo)  continue;
    stripCompassionNotes_(obj, auth);
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

/**
 * Get a single request + its activity log.
 */
function handleCompassionRequestsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var requestId = String(params.requestId || '').trim();
  if (!requestId) return jsonErr('requestId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(CR_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Request not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CR_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][CR.ID]) === requestId) {
      var req = compassionReqRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      if (req.confidential === 'TRUE' && !hasRole(auth, 'pastor')) return jsonErr('Access denied.');
      stripCompassionNotes_(req, auth);
      req.activityLog = getRequestActivityLog_(requestId);
      return jsonOk({ row: req });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Request not found.');
}

/**
 * Create a new compassion request.
 */
function handleCompassionRequestsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.requesterName) return jsonErr('requesterName is required.');
  if (!params.requestType)   return jsonErr('requestType is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(CR_NUM_COLS);
  row[CR.ID]                = generateId();
  row[CR.REQUESTER_NAME]    = String(params.requesterName);
  row[CR.REQUESTER_PHONE]   = String(params.requesterPhone || '');
  row[CR.REQUESTER_EMAIL]   = String(params.requesterEmail || '');
  row[CR.IS_MEMBER]         = String(params.isMember || 'FALSE').toUpperCase();
  row[CR.MEMBER_ID]         = String(params.memberId || '');
  row[CR.REQUEST_TYPE]      = String(params.requestType);
  row[CR.DESCRIPTION]       = String(params.description || '');
  row[CR.URGENCY]           = String(params.urgency || 'Normal');
  row[CR.AMOUNT_REQUESTED]  = Number(params.amountRequested || 0);
  row[CR.AMOUNT_APPROVED]   = 0;
  row[CR.STATUS]            = String(params.status || 'pending');
  row[CR.ASSIGNED_TEAM]     = String(params.assignedTeam || '');
  row[CR.ASSIGNED_TO]       = String(params.assignedTo || '');
  row[CR.FOLLOW_UP_DATE]    = String(params.followUpDate || '');
  row[CR.RESOLUTION_NOTES]  = '';
  row[CR.CONFIDENTIAL]      = String(params.confidential || 'FALSE').toUpperCase();
  row[CR.SUBMITTED_BY]      = auth.email;
  row[CR.APPROVED_BY]       = '';
  row[CR.CREATED_AT]        = now;
  row[CR.UPDATED_AT]        = now;

  var sheet = getTab(CR_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'compassion.requests.create', CR_TAB, newIndex, params.requesterName + ' — ' + params.requestType);
  return jsonOk({ row: compassionReqRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

/**
 * Update a compassion request.
 */
function handleCompassionRequestsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), CR_TAB, CR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(CR_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.requesterName   != null) existing[CR.REQUESTER_NAME]   = String(params.requesterName);
  if (params.requesterPhone  != null) existing[CR.REQUESTER_PHONE]  = String(params.requesterPhone);
  if (params.requesterEmail  != null) existing[CR.REQUESTER_EMAIL]  = String(params.requesterEmail);
  if (params.isMember        != null) existing[CR.IS_MEMBER]        = String(params.isMember).toUpperCase();
  if (params.memberId        != null) existing[CR.MEMBER_ID]        = String(params.memberId);
  if (params.requestType     != null) existing[CR.REQUEST_TYPE]     = String(params.requestType);
  if (params.description     != null) existing[CR.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description);
  if (params.urgency         != null) existing[CR.URGENCY]          = String(params.urgency);
  if (params.amountRequested != null) existing[CR.AMOUNT_REQUESTED] = Number(params.amountRequested);
  if (params.status          != null) existing[CR.STATUS]           = String(params.status);
  if (params.assignedTeam    != null) existing[CR.ASSIGNED_TEAM]    = String(params.assignedTeam);
  if (params.assignedTo      != null) existing[CR.ASSIGNED_TO]      = String(params.assignedTo);
  if (params.followUpDate    != null) existing[CR.FOLLOW_UP_DATE]   = String(params.followUpDate);
  if (params.resolutionNotes != null) existing[CR.RESOLUTION_NOTES] = String(params.resolutionNotes);
  if (params.confidential    != null) existing[CR.CONFIDENTIAL]     = String(params.confidential).toUpperCase();
  existing[CR.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, CR_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'compassion.requests.update', CR_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[CR.REQUESTER_NAME] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: compassionReqRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Approve a compassion request — sets approved amount and status.
 */
function handleCompassionRequestsApprove(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), CR_TAB, CR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(CR_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  existing[CR.AMOUNT_APPROVED] = Number(params.amountApproved || existing[CR.AMOUNT_REQUESTED]);
  existing[CR.STATUS]          = 'Approved';
  existing[CR.APPROVED_BY]     = auth.email;
  existing[CR.UPDATED_AT]      = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, CR_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'compassion.requests.approve', CR_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[CR.REQUESTER_NAME] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: compassionReqRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Deny a compassion request.
 */
function handleCompassionRequestsDeny(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), CR_TAB, CR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(CR_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  existing[CR.STATUS]          = 'Denied';
  existing[CR.RESOLUTION_NOTES] = String(params.resolutionNotes || existing[CR.RESOLUTION_NOTES] || 'Denied by pastor');
  existing[CR.APPROVED_BY]     = auth.email;
  existing[CR.UPDATED_AT]      = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, CR_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'compassion.requests.deny', CR_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[CR.REQUESTER_NAME] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: compassionReqRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Resolve / close a compassion request.
 */
function handleCompassionRequestsResolve(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), CR_TAB, CR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(CR_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  existing[CR.STATUS]          = 'Resolved';
  if (params.resolutionNotes != null) existing[CR.RESOLUTION_NOTES] = String(params.resolutionNotes);
  existing[CR.UPDATED_AT]     = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, CR_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'compassion.requests.resolve', CR_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[CR.REQUESTER_NAME] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: compassionReqRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * List requests with overdue follow-ups.
 */
function handleCompassionFollowUpsDue(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(CR_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var today = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CR_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = compassionReqRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.confidential === 'TRUE' && !hasRole(auth, 'pastor')) continue;
    if (obj.status === 'Resolved' || obj.status === 'Denied') continue;
    if (obj.followUpDate && obj.followUpDate <= today) rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// RESOURCE HANDLERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleCompassionResourcesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(CRS_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data     = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CRS_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var category = String(params.category || '').trim();
  var status   = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var rows     = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = compassionResourceToObj_(data[i], i + 2);
    if (category && obj.category !== category) continue;
    if (status   && obj.status   !== status)   continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleCompassionResourcesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.resourceName) return jsonErr('resourceName is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(CRS_NUM_COLS);
  row[CRS.ID]               = generateId();
  row[CRS.RESOURCE_NAME]    = String(params.resourceName);
  row[CRS.CATEGORY]         = String(params.category || 'General');
  row[CRS.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description || '');
  row[CRS.QUANTITY_ON_HAND] = Number(params.quantityOnHand || 0);
  row[CRS.UNIT]             = String(params.unit || 'items');
  row[CRS.REORDER_LEVEL]    = Number(params.reorderLevel || 0);
  row[CRS.LOCATION]         = String(params.location || '');
  row[CRS.DONATED_BY]       = String(params.donatedBy || '');
  row[CRS.STATUS]           = 'Available';
  row[CRS.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[CRS.UPDATED_AT]       = now;

  var sheet = getTab(CRS_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'compassion.resources.create', CRS_TAB, newIndex, params.resourceName);
  return jsonOk({ row: compassionResourceToObj_(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleCompassionResourcesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), CRS_TAB, CRS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(CRS_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.resourceName   != null) existing[CRS.RESOURCE_NAME]    = String(params.resourceName);
  if (params.category       != null) existing[CRS.CATEGORY]         = String(params.category);
  if (params.description    != null) existing[CRS.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description);
  if (params.quantityOnHand != null) existing[CRS.QUANTITY_ON_HAND] = Number(params.quantityOnHand);
  if (params.unit           != null) existing[CRS.UNIT]             = String(params.unit);
  if (params.reorderLevel   != null) existing[CRS.REORDER_LEVEL]    = Number(params.reorderLevel);
  if (params.location       != null) existing[CRS.LOCATION]         = String(params.location);
  if (params.donatedBy      != null) existing[CRS.DONATED_BY]       = String(params.donatedBy);
  if (params.status         != null) existing[CRS.STATUS]           = String(params.status);
  existing[CRS.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, CRS_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'compassion.resources.update', CRS_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[CRS.RESOURCE_NAME] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: compassionResourceToObj_(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * List resources that are at or below reorder level.
 */
function handleCompassionResourcesLow(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab(CRS_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CRS_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = compassionResourceToObj_(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Available' && obj.quantityOnHand <= obj.reorderLevel) {
      rows.push(obj);
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TEAM LOG HANDLERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Log a compassion team activity (visit, delivery, phone call, etc.).
 */
function handleCompassionLogCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.requestId)    return jsonErr('requestId is required.');
  if (!params.activityType) return jsonErr('activityType is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.requestId),
    String(params.date || now.substring(0, 10)),
    String(params.activityType),
    String(params.teamMemberId || auth.email),
    String(params.teamMemberName || ''),
    String(params.description || ''),
    String(params.resourcesUsed || ''),
    Number(params.amountDisbursed || 0),
    String(params.followUpNeeded || 'FALSE').toUpperCase(),
    String(params.notes || ''),
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(CTL_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'compassion.log.create', CTL_TAB, newIndex, params.activityType + ' for request ' + params.requestId);
  return jsonOk({ row: teamLogRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

/**
 * List activity log for a request.
 */
function handleCompassionLogList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.requestId) return jsonErr('requestId is required.');
  return jsonOk({ rows: getRequestActivityLog_(params.requestId) });
}

/**
 * List all recent team activities (across all requests).
 */
function handleCompassionLogRecent(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab(CTL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data     = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CTL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var limit    = Number(params.limit || 50);
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || '').trim();
  var rows     = [];

  for (var i = data.length - 1; i >= 0 && rows.length < limit; i--) {
    var obj = teamLogRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (dateFrom && obj.date < dateFrom) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// INTERNAL HELPERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function getRequestActivityLog_(requestId) {
  var sheet = getTab(CTL_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return [];

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, CTL_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][CTL.REQUEST_ID]) === String(requestId)) {
      rows.push(teamLogRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return rows;
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DASHBOARD
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleCompassionDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');

  var crSheet  = getTab(CR_TAB);
  var crLast   = crSheet.getLastRow();
  var crsSheet = getTab(CRS_TAB);
  var crsLast  = crsSheet.getLastRow();

  var totalRequests     = crLast  >= 2 ? crLast  - 1 : 0;
  var totalResources    = crsLast >= 2 ? crsLast - 1 : 0;
  var byStatus          = {};
  var byType            = {};
  var totalDisbursed    = 0;
  var openCount         = 0;
  var lowStockResources = 0;

  if (crLast >= 2) {
    var crData = crSheet.getRange(2, 1, crLast - 1, CR_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < crData.length; i++) {
      var s = String(crData[i][CR.STATUS] || 'New');
      var t = String(crData[i][CR.REQUEST_TYPE] || 'Other');
      byStatus[s] = (byStatus[s] || 0) + 1;
      byType[t]   = (byType[t]   || 0) + 1;
      totalDisbursed += Number(crData[i][CR.AMOUNT_APPROVED] || 0);
      if (s !== 'Resolved' && s !== 'Denied') openCount++;
    }
  }

  if (crsLast >= 2) {
    var crsData = crsSheet.getRange(2, 1, crsLast - 1, CRS_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var j = 0; j < crsData.length; j++) {
      if (String(crsData[j][CRS.STATUS]) === 'Available' &&
          Number(crsData[j][CRS.QUANTITY_ON_HAND] || 0) <= Number(crsData[j][CRS.REORDER_LEVEL] || 0)) {
        lowStockResources++;
      }
    }
  }

  return jsonOk({
    totalRequests:     totalRequests,
    openRequests:      openCount,
    totalResources:    totalResources,
    lowStockResources: lowStockResources,
    totalDisbursed:    totalDisbursed,
    byStatus:          byStatus,
    byType:            byType
  });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Create_First_Admin.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CreateFirstAdmin.gs
// Run ONCE after a fresh sheet reset to bootstrap your
// admin account. Delete or clear credentials after use.
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var ADMIN_EMAIL      = 'flockos.notify@gmail.com';  // ← your email
var ADMIN_FIRST      = 'System';                     // ← your first name
var ADMIN_LAST       = 'Admin';                  // ← your last name
var ADMIN_PASSWORD   = '7kR2nP4m9vL1sW6jQ0x8!z&2';             // ← your new password

function createFirstAdmin() {
  if (!ADMIN_EMAIL || !ADMIN_PASSWORD) {
    Logger.log('ERROR: Fill in all four constants first.');
    return;
  }

  var ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID')
  );

  var email = normalizeEmail(ADMIN_EMAIL);
  var now   = new Date().toISOString();

  // ── 1. Check AuthUsers doesn't already have this email ──────────────────
  var authSheet = ss.getSheetByName('AuthUsers');
  if (!authSheet) { Logger.log('ERROR: AuthUsers tab not found. Run setupFlockOS() first.'); return; }
  var existing = authSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
  for (var i = 1; i < existing.length; i++) {
    if (normalizeEmail(existing[i][0]) === email) {
      Logger.log('ERROR: ' + email + ' already exists in AuthUsers. Aborting.');
      return;
    }
  }

  // ── 2. Generate salt+pepper hash ────────────────────────────────────────
  var creds = createSecurePassword(ADMIN_PASSWORD);

  // ── 3. Write AuthUsers row ───────────────────────────────────────────────
  authSheet.appendRow([
    email,          // A: Email
    '',             // B: Passcode (plain) — leave blank, using hash
    creds.hash,     // C: Passcode Hash
    creds.salt,     // D: Salt
    ADMIN_FIRST,    // E: First Name
    ADMIN_LAST,     // F: Last Name
    'admin',        // G: Role
    'active',       // H: Status
    now,            // I: Created At
    now             // J: Updated At
  ]);
  Logger.log('AuthUsers row created for ' + email);

  // ── 4. Write AccessControl row ───────────────────────────────────────────
  var acSheet = ss.getSheetByName('AccessControl');
  if (!acSheet) { Logger.log('ERROR: AccessControl tab not found.'); return; }
  acSheet.appendRow([
    email,                          // A: Email
    'admin',                        // B: Role
    ADMIN_FIRST + ' ' + ADMIN_LAST, // C: Display Name
    '',                             // D: Groups
    'TRUE',                         // E: Active
    'Bootstrap admin account',      // F: Notes
    now,                            // G: Created At
    now                             // H: Updated At
  ]);
  Logger.log('AccessControl row created — role: admin, active: TRUE');

  // ── 5. Write UserProfiles row ────────────────────────────────────────────
  var profSheet = ss.getSheetByName('UserProfiles');
  if (profSheet) {
    profSheet.appendRow([
      email,                          // A: Email
      ADMIN_FIRST + ' ' + ADMIN_LAST, // B: Display Name
      '',                             // C: Photo URL
      '',                             // D: Phone
      '',                             // E: Bio
      'America/Chicago',              // F: Timezone
      'en',                           // G: Language
      'TRUE',                         // H: Notifications
      'Auto',                         // I: Theme
      now                             // J: Updated At
    ]);
    Logger.log('UserProfiles row created');
  }

  Logger.log('');
  Logger.log('SUCCESS — ' + email + ' is ready to log in as admin.');
  Logger.log('IMPORTANT: Clear ADMIN_PASSWORD from this file now.');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Discipleship.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: DISCIPLESHIP — Comprehensive Discipleship & Spiritual Growth
// Tabs: DiscipleshipPaths, DiscipleshipSteps, DiscipleshipEnrollments,
//       DiscipleshipMentoring, DiscipleshipMeetings, DiscipleshipAssessments,
//       DiscipleshipResources, DiscipleshipMilestones, DiscipleshipGoals,
//       DiscipleshipCertificates
//
// A full-featured discipleship tracking system covering pathways (curriculum),
// individual lessons/steps, enrollment & progress, mentor-mentee pairings,
// meeting logs, spiritual assessments, resource libraries, personal milestones,
// goal-setting & accountability, and completion certificates.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP PATHS (curriculum / pathway definitions)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DP_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipPaths';
var DP_NUM_COLS = 18;

var DP = {
  ID: 0, NAME: 1, DESCRIPTION: 2, CATEGORY: 3,
  TARGET_AUDIENCE: 4, DIFFICULTY_LEVEL: 5,
  ESTIMATED_WEEKS: 6, TOTAL_STEPS: 7,
  PREREQUISITE_PATH_ID: 8, REQUIRED_FOR_LEADERSHIP: 9,
  FACILITATOR_GUIDE_URL: 10, STUDENT_GUIDE_URL: 11,
  STATUS: 12, VISIBILITY: 13,
  CREATED_BY: 14, APPROVED_BY: 15,
  CREATED_AT: 16, UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function pathRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:                rowIndex,
    id:                   String(vals[DP.ID] || ''),
    name:                 String(vals[DP.NAME] || ''),
    description:          String(vals[DP.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    category:             String(vals[DP.CATEGORY] || ''),
    targetAudience:       String(vals[DP.TARGET_AUDIENCE] || ''),
    difficultyLevel:      String(vals[DP.DIFFICULTY_LEVEL] || ''),
    estimatedWeeks:       Number(vals[DP.ESTIMATED_WEEKS] || 0),
    totalSteps:           Number(vals[DP.TOTAL_STEPS] || 0),
    prerequisitePathId:   String(vals[DP.PREREQUISITE_PATH_ID] || ''),
    requiredForLeadership: String(vals[DP.REQUIRED_FOR_LEADERSHIP] || 'FALSE'),
    facilitatorGuideUrl:  String(vals[DP.FACILITATOR_GUIDE_URL] || ''),
    studentGuideUrl:      String(vals[DP.STUDENT_GUIDE_URL] || ''),
    status:               String(vals[DP.STATUS] || ''),
    visibility:           String(vals[DP.VISIBILITY] || ''),
    createdBy:            String(vals[DP.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    approvedBy:           String(vals[DP.APPROVED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:            isoDate(vals[DP.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:            isoDate(vals[DP.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Paths list ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipPathsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = openTab_(DP_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DP_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    var obj = pathRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
    if (params.category && obj.category !== params.category) continue;
    if (params.status   && obj.status   !== params.status)   continue;
    if (params.audience && obj.targetAudience !== params.audience) continue;
    list.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ paths: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Paths get ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipPathsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DP_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DP_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DP.ID]) === params.id) {
      var path = pathRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
      // also fetch steps for this path
      var stepsSheet = openTab_(DS_TAB);
      var stepsRows  = getDataRows(stepsSheet, DS_NUM_COLS);
      var steps = [];
      for (var s = 0; s < stepsRows.length; s++) {
        if (String(stepsRows[s][DS.PATH_ID]) === params.id) {
          steps.push(stepRowToObject(stepsRows[s], s + 2));
        }
      }
      steps.sort(function(a, b) { return a.stepOrder - b.stepOrder; });
      path.steps = steps;
      return jsonOk(path);
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Path not found');
}

// ── Paths create ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipPathsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.name) return jsonErr('name required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DP_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  var row   = new Array(DP_NUM_COLS);
  row[DP.ID]                       = id;
  row[DP.NAME]                     = params.name;
  row[DP.DESCRIPTION]              = params.description || '';
  row[DP.CATEGORY]                 = params.category || 'Foundations';
  row[DP.TARGET_AUDIENCE]          = params.targetAudience || 'All';
  row[DP.DIFFICULTY_LEVEL]         = params.difficultyLevel || 'Beginner';
  row[DP.ESTIMATED_WEEKS]          = Number(params.estimatedWeeks || 0);
  row[DP.TOTAL_STEPS]              = Number(params.totalSteps || 0);
  row[DP.PREREQUISITE_PATH_ID]     = params.prerequisitePathId || '';
  row[DP.REQUIRED_FOR_LEADERSHIP]  = params.requiredForLeadership || 'FALSE';
  row[DP.FACILITATOR_GUIDE_URL]    = params.facilitatorGuideUrl || '';
  row[DP.STUDENT_GUIDE_URL]        = params.studentGuideUrl || '';
  row[DP.STATUS]                   = 'Draft';
  row[DP.VISIBILITY]               = params.visibility || 'Members Only';
  row[DP.CREATED_BY]               = auth.email;
  row[DP.APPROVED_BY]              = '';
  row[DP.CREATED_AT]               = now;
  row[DP.UPDATED_AT]               = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.paths.create', DP_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Path created' });
}

// ── Paths update ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipPathsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DP_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DP_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DP.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var fieldMap = {
        name: DP.NAME, description: DP.DESCRIPTION, category: DP.CATEGORY,
        targetAudience: DP.TARGET_AUDIENCE, difficultyLevel: DP.DIFFICULTY_LEVEL,
        prerequisitePathId: DP.PREREQUISITE_PATH_ID, requiredForLeadership: DP.REQUIRED_FOR_LEADERSHIP,
        facilitatorGuideUrl: DP.FACILITATOR_GUIDE_URL, studentGuideUrl: DP.STUDENT_GUIDE_URL,
        status: DP.STATUS, visibility: DP.VISIBILITY
      };
      var numFields = { estimatedWeeks: DP.ESTIMATED_WEEKS, totalSteps: DP.TOTAL_STEPS };
      for (var key in fieldMap) { if (params[key] !== undefined) row[fieldMap[key]] = params[key]; }
      for (var nk in numFields) { if (params[nk] !== undefined) row[numFields[nk]] = Number(params[nk]); }
      row[DP.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DP_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.paths.update', DP_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Path updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Path not found');
}

// ── Paths publish (Draft → Active) ──────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipPathsPublish(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DP_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DP_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DP.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      row[DP.STATUS] = 'Active';
      row[DP.APPROVED_BY] = auth.email;
      row[DP.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DP_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.paths.publish', DP_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Path published' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Path not found');
}

// ── Paths archive ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipPathsArchive(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DP_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DP_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DP.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      row[DP.STATUS] = 'Archived';
      row[DP.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DP_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.paths.archive', DP_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Path archived' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Path not found');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP STEPS (individual lessons / milestones within a path)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DS_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipSteps';
var DS_NUM_COLS = 18;

var DS = {
  ID: 0, PATH_ID: 1, STEP_ORDER: 2, TITLE: 3,
  DESCRIPTION: 4, STEP_TYPE: 5, DURATION_MINUTES: 6,
  SCRIPTURE_REFS: 7, LEARNING_OBJECTIVES: 8,
  CONTENT_URL: 9, VIDEO_URL: 10, HOMEWORK_DESC: 11,
  ASSESSMENT_REQUIRED: 12, PASSING_SCORE: 13,
  FACILITATOR_NOTES: 14, RESOURCE_IDS: 15,
  CREATED_AT: 16, UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function stepRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:              rowIndex,
    id:                 String(vals[DS.ID] || ''),
    pathId:             String(vals[DS.PATH_ID] || ''),
    stepOrder:          Number(vals[DS.STEP_ORDER] || 0),
    title:              String(vals[DS.TITLE] || ''),
    description:        String(vals[DS.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    stepType:           String(vals[DS.STEP_TYPE] || ''),
    durationMinutes:    Number(vals[DS.DURATION_MINUTES] || 0),
    scriptureRefs:      String(vals[DS.SCRIPTURE_REFS] || ''),
    learningObjectives: String(vals[DS.LEARNING_OBJECTIVES] || ''),
    contentUrl:         String(vals[DS.CONTENT_URL] || ''),
    videoUrl:           String(vals[DS.VIDEO_URL] || ''),
    homeworkDesc:       String(vals[DS.HOMEWORK_DESC] || ''),
    assessmentRequired: String(vals[DS.ASSESSMENT_REQUIRED] || 'FALSE'),
    passingScore:       Number(vals[DS.PASSING_SCORE] || 0),
    facilitatorNotes:   String(vals[DS.FACILITATOR_NOTES] || ''),
    resourceIds:        String(vals[DS.RESOURCE_IDS] || ''),
    createdAt:          isoDate(vals[DS.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:          isoDate(vals[DS.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Steps list (for a path) ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipStepsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.pathId) return jsonErr('pathId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DS_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DS_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DS.PATH_ID]) === params.pathId) {
      list.push(stepRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  list.sort(function(a, b) { return a.stepOrder - b.stepOrder; });
  return jsonOk({ steps: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Steps get ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipStepsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DS_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DS_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DS.ID]) === params.id) {
      return jsonOk(stepRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Step not found');
}

// ── Steps create ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipStepsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.pathId || !params.title) return jsonErr('pathId and title required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DS_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  var row   = new Array(DS_NUM_COLS);
  row[DS.ID]                   = id;
  row[DS.PATH_ID]              = params.pathId;
  row[DS.STEP_ORDER]           = Number(params.stepOrder || 1);
  row[DS.TITLE]                = params.title;
  row[DS.DESCRIPTION]          = params.description || '';
  row[DS.STEP_TYPE]            = params.stepType || 'Lesson';
  row[DS.DURATION_MINUTES]     = Number(params.durationMinutes || 60);
  row[DS.SCRIPTURE_REFS]       = params.scriptureRefs || '';
  row[DS.LEARNING_OBJECTIVES]  = params.learningObjectives || '';
  row[DS.CONTENT_URL]          = params.contentUrl || '';
  row[DS.VIDEO_URL]            = params.videoUrl || '';
  row[DS.HOMEWORK_DESC]        = params.homeworkDesc || '';
  row[DS.ASSESSMENT_REQUIRED]  = params.assessmentRequired || 'FALSE';
  row[DS.PASSING_SCORE]        = Number(params.passingScore || 0);
  row[DS.FACILITATOR_NOTES]    = params.facilitatorNotes || '';
  row[DS.RESOURCE_IDS]         = params.resourceIds || '';
  row[DS.CREATED_AT]           = now;
  row[DS.UPDATED_AT]           = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.steps.create', DS_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Step created' });
}

// ── Steps update ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipStepsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DS_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DS_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DS.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var fieldMap = {
        title: DS.TITLE, description: DS.DESCRIPTION, stepType: DS.STEP_TYPE,
        scriptureRefs: DS.SCRIPTURE_REFS, learningObjectives: DS.LEARNING_OBJECTIVES,
        contentUrl: DS.CONTENT_URL, videoUrl: DS.VIDEO_URL, homeworkDesc: DS.HOMEWORK_DESC,
        assessmentRequired: DS.ASSESSMENT_REQUIRED, facilitatorNotes: DS.FACILITATOR_NOTES,
        resourceIds: DS.RESOURCE_IDS
      };
      var numFields = { stepOrder: DS.STEP_ORDER, durationMinutes: DS.DURATION_MINUTES, passingScore: DS.PASSING_SCORE };
      for (var key in fieldMap) { if (params[key] !== undefined) row[fieldMap[key]] = params[key]; }
      for (var nk in numFields) { if (params[nk] !== undefined) row[numFields[nk]] = Number(params[nk]); }
      row[DS.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DS_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.steps.update', DS_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Step updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Step not found');
}

// ── Steps delete ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipStepsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DS_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DS_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DS.ID]) === params.id) {
      sheet.deleteRow(i + 2);
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.steps.delete', DS_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Step deleted' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Step not found');
}

// ── Steps reorder (JSON array of {id, stepOrder}) ───────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipStepsReorder(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.items) return jsonErr('items required (JSON array of {id, stepOrder})');
  var items;
  try { items = JSON.parse(params.items); } catch (e) { return jsonErr('Invalid JSON in items'); }
  var sheet = openTab_(DS_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DS_NUM_COLS);
  var idMap = {};
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    idMap[String(rows[i][DS.ID])] = i + 2;
  }
  var now = new Date();
  for (var j = 0; j < items.length; j++) {
    var rowNum = idMap[items[j].id];
    if (rowNum) {
      rows[rowNum - 2][DS.STEP_ORDER] = Number(items[j].stepOrder);
      rows[rowNum - 2][DS.UPDATED_AT] = now;
    }
  }
  if (rows.length > 0) {
    sheet.getRange(2, 1, rows.length, DS_NUM_COLS).setValues(rows);  // single batch write
  }
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.steps.reorder', DS_TAB, params.pathId || '');
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Steps reordered', count: items.length });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP ENROLLMENTS (participant tracking & progress)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DE_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipEnrollments';
var DE_NUM_COLS = 22;

var DE = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2, PATH_ID: 3, PATH_NAME: 4,
  ENROLLED_DATE: 5, TARGET_COMPLETION: 6, ACTUAL_COMPLETION: 7,
  CURRENT_STEP_ID: 8, STEPS_COMPLETED: 9, TOTAL_STEPS: 10,
  PERCENT_COMPLETE: 11, STATUS: 12,
  FACILITATOR_ID: 13, FACILITATOR_NAME: 14,
  GROUP_COHORT: 15, MEETING_DAY: 16, MEETING_TIME: 17,
  NOTES: 18, ENROLLED_BY: 19,
  CREATED_AT: 20, UPDATED_AT: 21
};

function enrollmentRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:             rowIndex,
    id:                String(vals[DE.ID] || ''),
    memberId:          String(vals[DE.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:        String(vals[DE.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    pathId:            String(vals[DE.PATH_ID] || ''),
    pathName:          String(vals[DE.PATH_NAME] || ''),
    enrolledDate:      isoDate(vals[DE.ENROLLED_DATE]),
    targetCompletion:  isoDate(vals[DE.TARGET_COMPLETION]),
    actualCompletion:  isoDate(vals[DE.ACTUAL_COMPLETION]),
    currentStepId:     String(vals[DE.CURRENT_STEP_ID] || ''),
    stepsCompleted:    Number(vals[DE.STEPS_COMPLETED] || 0),
    totalSteps:        Number(vals[DE.TOTAL_STEPS] || 0),
    percentComplete:   Number(vals[DE.PERCENT_COMPLETE] || 0),
    status:            String(vals[DE.STATUS] || ''),
    facilitatorId:     String(vals[DE.FACILITATOR_ID] || ''),
    facilitatorName:   String(vals[DE.FACILITATOR_NAME] || ''),
    groupCohort:       String(vals[DE.GROUP_COHORT] || ''),
    meetingDay:        String(vals[DE.MEETING_DAY] || ''),
    meetingTime:       String(vals[DE.MEETING_TIME] || ''),
    notes:             String(vals[DE.NOTES] || ''),
    enrolledBy:        String(vals[DE.ENROLLED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:         isoDate(vals[DE.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:         isoDate(vals[DE.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Enrollments list ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = openTab_(DE_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DE_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    var obj = enrollmentRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
    if (params.memberId && obj.memberId !== params.memberId) continue;
    if (params.pathId   && obj.pathId   !== params.pathId)   continue;
    if (params.status   && obj.status   !== params.status)   continue;
    if (params.cohort   && obj.groupCohort !== params.cohort) continue;
    if (params.facilitatorId && obj.facilitatorId !== params.facilitatorId) continue;
    list.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ enrollments: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Enrollments get ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DE_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DE_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DE.ID]) === params.id) {
      return jsonOk(enrollmentRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Enrollment not found');
}

// ── Enrollments create (enroll a member in a path) ───────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.memberId || !params.pathId) return jsonErr('memberId and pathId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DE_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  var row   = new Array(DE_NUM_COLS);
  row[DE.ID]                 = id;
  row[DE.MEMBER_ID]          = params.memberId;
  row[DE.MEMBER_NAME]        = params.memberName || '';
  row[DE.PATH_ID]            = params.pathId;
  row[DE.PATH_NAME]          = params.pathName || '';
  row[DE.ENROLLED_DATE]      = now;
  row[DE.TARGET_COMPLETION]  = params.targetCompletion || '';
  row[DE.ACTUAL_COMPLETION]  = '';
  row[DE.CURRENT_STEP_ID]    = '';
  row[DE.STEPS_COMPLETED]    = 0;
  row[DE.TOTAL_STEPS]        = Number(params.totalSteps || 0);
  row[DE.PERCENT_COMPLETE]   = 0;
  row[DE.STATUS]             = 'Enrolled';
  row[DE.FACILITATOR_ID]     = params.facilitatorId || '';
  row[DE.FACILITATOR_NAME]   = params.facilitatorName || '';
  row[DE.GROUP_COHORT]       = params.groupCohort || '';
  row[DE.MEETING_DAY]        = params.meetingDay || '';
  row[DE.MEETING_TIME]       = params.meetingTime || '';
  row[DE.NOTES]              = params.notes || '';
  row[DE.ENROLLED_BY]        = auth.email;
  row[DE.CREATED_AT]         = now;
  row[DE.UPDATED_AT]         = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.enrollments.create', DE_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Member enrolled in path' });
}

// ── Enrollments update ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DE_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DE_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DE.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var fieldMap = {
        currentStepId: DE.CURRENT_STEP_ID, status: DE.STATUS,
        facilitatorId: DE.FACILITATOR_ID, facilitatorName: DE.FACILITATOR_NAME,
        groupCohort: DE.GROUP_COHORT, meetingDay: DE.MEETING_DAY,
        meetingTime: DE.MEETING_TIME, targetCompletion: DE.TARGET_COMPLETION,
        notes: DE.NOTES
      };
      var numFields = { stepsCompleted: DE.STEPS_COMPLETED, totalSteps: DE.TOTAL_STEPS, percentComplete: DE.PERCENT_COMPLETE };
      for (var key in fieldMap) { if (params[key] !== undefined) row[fieldMap[key]] = params[key]; }
      for (var nk in numFields) { if (params[nk] !== undefined) row[numFields[nk]] = Number(params[nk]); }
      row[DE.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DE_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.enrollments.update', DE_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Enrollment updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Enrollment not found');
}

// ── Enrollments advance step ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsAdvance(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DE_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DE_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DE.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var completed = Number(row[DE.STEPS_COMPLETED] || 0) + 1;
      var total     = Number(row[DE.TOTAL_STEPS] || 1);
      var pct       = Math.round((completed / total) * 100);
      if (pct > 100) pct = 100;
      row[DE.STEPS_COMPLETED] = completed;
      row[DE.PERCENT_COMPLETE] = pct;
      if (params.nextStepId) row[DE.CURRENT_STEP_ID] = params.nextStepId;
      if (completed >= total) {
        row[DE.STATUS] = 'Completed';
        row[DE.ACTUAL_COMPLETION] = new Date();
      } else {
        row[DE.STATUS] = 'In Progress';
      }
      row[DE.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DE_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.enrollments.advance', DE_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Step advanced', stepsCompleted: completed, percentComplete: pct });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Enrollment not found');
}

// ── Enrollments for member (all paths a person is on) ────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsForMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DE_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DE_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DE.MEMBER_ID]) === params.memberId) {
      list.push(enrollmentRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ enrollments: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Enrollments complete (mark as fully completed) ───────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipEnrollmentsComplete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DE_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DE_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DE.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var total = Number(row[DE.TOTAL_STEPS] || 0);
      row[DE.STATUS] = 'Completed';
      row[DE.STEPS_COMPLETED] = total;
      row[DE.PERCENT_COMPLETE] = 100;
      row[DE.ACTUAL_COMPLETION] = new Date();
      row[DE.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DE_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.enrollments.complete', DE_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Enrollment marked complete' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Enrollment not found');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP MENTORING (mentor-mentee pairings)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DM_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipMentoring';
var DM_NUM_COLS = 18;

var DM = {
  ID: 0, MENTOR_ID: 1, MENTOR_NAME: 2,
  MENTEE_ID: 3, MENTEE_NAME: 4,
  RELATIONSHIP_TYPE: 5, FOCUS_AREA: 6,
  START_DATE: 7, END_DATE: 8,
  MEETING_FREQUENCY: 9, MEETING_DAY: 10, MEETING_LOCATION: 11,
  STATUS: 12, GOALS: 13,
  NOTES: 14, CREATED_BY: 15,
  CREATED_AT: 16, UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function mentoringRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:             rowIndex,
    id:                String(vals[DM.ID] || ''),
    mentorId:          String(vals[DM.MENTOR_ID] || ''),
    mentorName:        String(vals[DM.MENTOR_NAME] || ''),
    menteeId:          String(vals[DM.MENTEE_ID] || ''),
    menteeName:        String(vals[DM.MENTEE_NAME] || ''),
    relationshipType:  String(vals[DM.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE] || ''),
    focusArea:         String(vals[DM.FOCUS_AREA] || ''),
    startDate:         isoDate(vals[DM.START_DATE]),
    endDate:           isoDate(vals[DM.END_DATE]),
    meetingFrequency:  String(vals[DM.MEETING_FREQUENCY] || ''),
    meetingDay:        String(vals[DM.MEETING_DAY] || ''),
    meetingLocation:   String(vals[DM.MEETING_LOCATION] || ''),
    status:            String(vals[DM.STATUS] || ''),
    goals:             String(vals[DM.GOALS] || ''),
    notes:             String(vals[DM.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:         String(vals[DM.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:         isoDate(vals[DM.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:         isoDate(vals[DM.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Mentoring list ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMentoringList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = openTab_(DM_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DM_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    var obj = mentoringRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
    if (params.mentorId && obj.mentorId !== params.mentorId) continue;
    if (params.menteeId && obj.menteeId !== params.menteeId) continue;
    if (params.status   && obj.status   !== params.status)   continue;
    if (params.relationshipType && obj.relationshipType !== params.relationshipType) continue;
    list.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ pairings: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Mentoring get ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMentoringGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DM_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DM_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DM.ID]) === params.id) {
      var pairing = mentoringRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
      // Also fetch meetings for this pairing
      var mtgSheet = openTab_(DMT_TAB);
      var mtgRows  = getDataRows(mtgSheet, DMT_NUM_COLS);
      var meetings = [];
      for (var m = 0; m < mtgRows.length; m++) {
        if (String(mtgRows[m][DMT.MENTORING_ID]) === params.id) {
          meetings.push(meetingRowToObject(mtgRows[m], m + 2));
        }
      }
      pairing.meetings = meetings;
      return jsonOk(pairing);
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Pairing not found');
}

// ── Mentoring create ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMentoringCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.mentorId || !params.menteeId) return jsonErr('mentorId and menteeId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DM_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  var row   = new Array(DM_NUM_COLS);
  row[DM.ID]                 = id;
  row[DM.MENTOR_ID]          = params.mentorId;
  row[DM.MENTOR_NAME]        = params.mentorName || '';
  row[DM.MENTEE_ID]          = params.menteeId;
  row[DM.MENTEE_NAME]        = params.menteeName || '';
  row[DM.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE]  = params.relationshipType || 'Discipleship';
  row[DM.FOCUS_AREA]         = params.focusArea || 'General Spiritual Growth';
  row[DM.START_DATE]         = now;
  row[DM.END_DATE]           = params.endDate || '';
  row[DM.MEETING_FREQUENCY]  = params.meetingFrequency || 'Weekly';
  row[DM.MEETING_DAY]        = params.meetingDay || '';
  row[DM.MEETING_LOCATION]   = params.meetingLocation || '';
  row[DM.STATUS]             = 'Active';
  row[DM.GOALS]              = params.goals || '';
  row[DM.NOTES]              = params.notes || '';
  row[DM.CREATED_BY]         = auth.email;
  row[DM.CREATED_AT]         = now;
  row[DM.UPDATED_AT]         = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.mentoring.create', DM_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Mentoring pairing created' });
}

// ── Mentoring update ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMentoringUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DM_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DM_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DM.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var fieldMap = {
        relationshipType: DM.RELATIONSHIP_TYPE, focusArea: DM.FOCUS_AREA,
        meetingFrequency: DM.MEETING_FREQUENCY, meetingDay: DM.MEETING_DAY,
        meetingLocation: DM.MEETING_LOCATION, status: DM.STATUS,
        goals: DM.GOALS, notes: DM.NOTES, endDate: DM.END_DATE
      };
      for (var key in fieldMap) { if (params[key] !== undefined) row[fieldMap[key]] = params[key]; }
      row[DM.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DM_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.mentoring.update', DM_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Mentoring pairing updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Pairing not found');
}

// ── Mentoring end ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMentoringEnd(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DM_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DM_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DM.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      row[DM.STATUS] = 'Completed';
      row[DM.END_DATE] = new Date();
      row[DM.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DM_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.mentoring.end', DM_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Mentoring relationship ended' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Pairing not found');
}

// ── Mentoring for mentor (all mentees for a person) ──────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMentoringForMentor(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.mentorId) return jsonErr('mentorId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DM_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DM_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DM.MENTOR_ID]) === params.mentorId) {
      list.push(mentoringRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ pairings: list, total: list.length });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP MEETINGS (session logs for mentoring pairs)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DMT_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipMeetings';
var DMT_NUM_COLS = 16;

var DMT = {
  ID: 0, MENTORING_ID: 1, MEETING_DATE: 2, MEETING_TIME: 3,
  DURATION_MINUTES: 4, LOCATION: 5, MEETING_TYPE: 6,
  TOPICS_COVERED: 7, SCRIPTURE_DISCUSSED: 8,
  HOMEWORK_ASSIGNED: 9, HOMEWORK_COMPLETED: 10,
  PRAYER_REQUESTS: 11, ACTION_ITEMS: 12,
  NOTES: 13, CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function meetingRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:               rowIndex,
    id:                  String(vals[DMT.ID] || ''),
    mentoringId:         String(vals[DMT.MENTORING_ID] || ''),
    meetingDate:         isoDate(vals[DMT.MEETING_DATE]),
    meetingTime:         String(vals[DMT.MEETING_TIME] || ''),
    durationMinutes:     Number(vals[DMT.DURATION_MINUTES] || 0),
    location:            String(vals[DMT.LOCATION] || ''),
    meetingType:         String(vals[DMT.MEETING_TYPE] || ''),
    topicsCovered:       String(vals[DMT.TOPICS_COVERED] || ''),
    scriptureDiscussed:  String(vals[DMT.SCRIPTURE_DISCUSSED] || ''),
    homeworkAssigned:    String(vals[DMT.HOMEWORK_ASSIGNED] || ''),
    homeworkCompleted:   String(vals[DMT.HOMEWORK_COMPLETED] || 'FALSE'),
    prayerRequests:      String(vals[DMT.PRAYER_REQUESTS] || ''),
    actionItems:         String(vals[DMT.ACTION_ITEMS] || ''),
    notes:               String(vals[DMT.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:           isoDate(vals[DMT.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:           isoDate(vals[DMT.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Meetings list ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMeetingsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.mentoringId) return jsonErr('mentoringId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DMT_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DMT_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DMT.MENTORING_ID]) === params.mentoringId) {
      list.push(meetingRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ meetings: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Meetings create ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
