function handleDiscipleshipMeetingsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.mentoringId) return jsonErr('mentoringId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DMT_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  var row   = new Array(DMT_NUM_COLS);
  row[DMT.ID]                  = id;
  row[DMT.MENTORING_ID]        = params.mentoringId;
  row[DMT.MEETING_DATE]        = params.meetingDate || now;
  row[DMT.MEETING_TIME]        = params.meetingTime || '';
  row[DMT.DURATION_MINUTES]    = Number(params.durationMinutes || 60);
  row[DMT.LOCATION]            = params.location || '';
  row[DMT.MEETING_TYPE]        = params.meetingType || 'In Person';
  row[DMT.TOPICS_COVERED]      = params.topicsCovered || '';
  row[DMT.SCRIPTURE_DISCUSSED] = params.scriptureDiscussed || '';
  row[DMT.HOMEWORK_ASSIGNED]   = params.homeworkAssigned || '';
  row[DMT.HOMEWORK_COMPLETED]  = params.homeworkCompleted || 'FALSE';
  row[DMT.PRAYER_REQUESTS]     = params.prayerRequests || '';
  row[DMT.ACTION_ITEMS]        = params.actionItems || '';
  row[DMT.NOTES]               = params.notes || '';
  row[DMT.CREATED_AT]          = now;
  row[DMT.UPDATED_AT]          = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.meetings.create', DMT_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Meeting logged' });
}

// ── Meetings update ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMeetingsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DMT_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DMT_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DMT.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var fieldMap = {
        topicsCovered: DMT.TOPICS_COVERED, scriptureDiscussed: DMT.SCRIPTURE_DISCUSSED,
        homeworkAssigned: DMT.HOMEWORK_ASSIGNED, homeworkCompleted: DMT.HOMEWORK_COMPLETED,
        prayerRequests: DMT.PRAYER_REQUESTS, actionItems: DMT.ACTION_ITEMS,
        notes: DMT.NOTES
      };
      var numFields = { durationMinutes: DMT.DURATION_MINUTES };
      for (var key in fieldMap) { if (params[key] !== undefined) row[fieldMap[key]] = params[key]; }
      for (var nk in numFields) { if (params[nk] !== undefined) row[numFields[nk]] = Number(params[nk]); }
      row[DMT.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DMT_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.meetings.update', DMT_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Meeting updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Meeting not found');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP ASSESSMENTS (spiritual gifts, growth evaluations, surveys)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DA_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipAssessments';
var DA_NUM_COLS = 22;

var DA = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2,
  ASSESSMENT_TYPE: 3, ASSESSMENT_NAME: 4, DESCRIPTION: 5,
  DATE_TAKEN: 6, ASSESSED_BY: 7,
  SCORE_TOTAL: 8, SCORE_MAX: 9, SCORE_PERCENT: 10,
  RESULTS_JSON: 11, TOP_GIFTS: 12, TOP_STRENGTHS: 13,
  GROWTH_AREAS: 14, RECOMMENDATIONS: 15,
  ENROLLMENT_ID: 16, PATH_ID: 17,
  STATUS: 18, NOTES: 19,
  CREATED_AT: 20, UPDATED_AT: 21
};

function assessmentRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:            rowIndex,
    id:               String(vals[DA.ID] || ''),
    memberId:         String(vals[DA.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:       String(vals[DA.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    assessmentType:   String(vals[DA.ASSESSMENT_TYPE] || ''),
    assessmentName:   String(vals[DA.ASSESSMENT_NAME] || ''),
    description:      String(vals[DA.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    dateTaken:        isoDate(vals[DA.DATE_TAKEN]),
    assessedBy:       String(vals[DA.ASSESSED_BY] || ''),
    scoreTotal:       Number(vals[DA.SCORE_TOTAL] || 0),
    scoreMax:         Number(vals[DA.SCORE_MAX] || 0),
    scorePercent:     Number(vals[DA.SCORE_PERCENT] || 0),
    resultsJson:      String(vals[DA.RESULTS_JSON] || ''),
    topGifts:         String(vals[DA.TOP_GIFTS] || ''),
    topStrengths:     String(vals[DA.TOP_STRENGTHS] || ''),
    growthAreas:      String(vals[DA.GROWTH_AREAS] || ''),
    recommendations:  String(vals[DA.RECOMMENDATIONS] || ''),
    enrollmentId:     String(vals[DA.ENROLLMENT_ID] || ''),
    pathId:           String(vals[DA.PATH_ID] || ''),
    status:           String(vals[DA.STATUS] || ''),
    notes:            String(vals[DA.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:        isoDate(vals[DA.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:        isoDate(vals[DA.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Assessments list ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipAssessmentsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = openTab_(DA_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DA_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    var obj = assessmentRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
    if (params.memberId       && obj.memberId       !== params.memberId)       continue;
    if (params.assessmentType && obj.assessmentType !== params.assessmentType) continue;
    if (params.pathId         && obj.pathId         !== params.pathId)         continue;
    if (params.enrollmentId   && obj.enrollmentId   !== params.enrollmentId)   continue;
    list.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ assessments: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Assessments get ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipAssessmentsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DA_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DA_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DA.ID]) === params.id) {
      return jsonOk(assessmentRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Assessment not found');
}

// ── Assessments create ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipAssessmentsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.memberId || !params.assessmentType) return jsonErr('memberId and assessmentType required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DA_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  var row   = new Array(DA_NUM_COLS);
  row[DA.ID]               = id;
  row[DA.MEMBER_ID]        = params.memberId;
  row[DA.MEMBER_NAME]      = params.memberName || '';
  row[DA.ASSESSMENT_TYPE]  = params.assessmentType;
  row[DA.ASSESSMENT_NAME]  = params.assessmentName || '';
  row[DA.DESCRIPTION]      = params.description || '';
  row[DA.DATE_TAKEN]       = params.dateTaken || now;
  row[DA.ASSESSED_BY]      = auth.email;
  row[DA.SCORE_TOTAL]      = Number(params.scoreTotal || 0);
  row[DA.SCORE_MAX]        = Number(params.scoreMax || 0);
  row[DA.SCORE_PERCENT]    = Number(params.scorePercent || 0);
  row[DA.RESULTS_JSON]     = params.resultsJson || '';
  row[DA.TOP_GIFTS]        = params.topGifts || '';
  row[DA.TOP_STRENGTHS]    = params.topStrengths || '';
  row[DA.GROWTH_AREAS]     = params.growthAreas || '';
  row[DA.RECOMMENDATIONS]  = params.recommendations || '';
  row[DA.ENROLLMENT_ID]    = params.enrollmentId || '';
  row[DA.PATH_ID]          = params.pathId || '';
  row[DA.STATUS]           = 'Completed';
  row[DA.NOTES]            = params.notes || '';
  row[DA.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[DA.UPDATED_AT]       = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.assessments.create', DA_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Assessment recorded' });
}

// ── Assessments update ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipAssessmentsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DA_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DA_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DA.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var fieldMap = {
        resultsJson: DA.RESULTS_JSON, topGifts: DA.TOP_GIFTS,
        topStrengths: DA.TOP_STRENGTHS, growthAreas: DA.GROWTH_AREAS,
        recommendations: DA.RECOMMENDATIONS, notes: DA.NOTES, status: DA.STATUS
      };
      var numFields = { scoreTotal: DA.SCORE_TOTAL, scoreMax: DA.SCORE_MAX, scorePercent: DA.SCORE_PERCENT };
      for (var key in fieldMap) { if (params[key] !== undefined) row[fieldMap[key]] = params[key]; }
      for (var nk in numFields) { if (params[nk] !== undefined) row[numFields[nk]] = Number(params[nk]); }
      row[DA.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DA_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.assessments.update', DA_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Assessment updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Assessment not found');
}

// ── Assessments for member (history of all assessments) ──────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipAssessmentsForMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DA_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DA_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DA.MEMBER_ID]) === params.memberId) {
      list.push(assessmentRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ assessments: list, total: list.length });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP RESOURCES (study materials, books, videos, links)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DR_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipResources';
var DR_NUM_COLS = 16;

var DR = {
  ID: 0, TITLE: 1, DESCRIPTION: 2, RESOURCE_TYPE: 3,
  AUTHOR: 4, URL: 5, DRIVE_FILE_ID: 6,
  CATEGORY: 7, TOPIC_TAGS: 8,
  DIFFICULTY_LEVEL: 9, ESTIMATED_TIME: 10,
  PATH_IDS: 11, STEP_IDS: 12,
  VISIBILITY: 13, CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function discipleshipResourceToObj_(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[DR.ID] || ''),
    title:           String(vals[DR.TITLE] || ''),
    description:     String(vals[DR.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    resourceType:    String(vals[DR.RESOURCE_TYPE] || ''),
    author:          String(vals[DR.AUTHOR] || ''),
    url:             String(vals[DR.URL] || ''),
    driveFileId:     String(vals[DR.DRIVE_FILE_ID] || ''),
    category:        String(vals[DR.CATEGORY] || ''),
    topicTags:       String(vals[DR.TOPIC_TAGS] || ''),
    difficultyLevel: String(vals[DR.DIFFICULTY_LEVEL] || ''),
    estimatedTime:   String(vals[DR.ESTIMATED_TIME] || ''),
    pathIds:         String(vals[DR.PATH_IDS] || ''),
    stepIds:         String(vals[DR.STEP_IDS] || ''),
    visibility:      String(vals[DR.VISIBILITY] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[DR.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:       isoDate(vals[DR.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Resources list ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipResourcesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = openTab_(DR_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DR_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    var obj = discipleshipResourceToObj_(rows[i], i + 2);
    if (params.resourceType && obj.resourceType !== params.resourceType) continue;
    if (params.category     && obj.category     !== params.category)     continue;
    if (params.pathId       && obj.pathIds.indexOf(params.pathId) === -1) continue;
    if (params.difficulty   && obj.difficultyLevel !== params.difficulty) continue;
    list.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ resources: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Resources get ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipResourcesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DR_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DR_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DR.ID]) === params.id) {
      return jsonOk(discipleshipResourceToObj_(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Resource not found');
}

// ── Resources create ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipResourcesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.title || !params.resourceType) return jsonErr('title and resourceType required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DR_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  var row   = new Array(DR_NUM_COLS);
  row[DR.ID]               = id;
  row[DR.TITLE]            = params.title;
  row[DR.DESCRIPTION]      = params.description || '';
  row[DR.RESOURCE_TYPE]    = params.resourceType;
  row[DR.AUTHOR]           = params.author || '';
  row[DR.URL]              = params.url || '';
  row[DR.DRIVE_FILE_ID]    = params.driveFileId || '';
  row[DR.CATEGORY]         = params.category || 'General';
  row[DR.TOPIC_TAGS]       = params.topicTags || '';
  row[DR.DIFFICULTY_LEVEL] = params.difficultyLevel || 'Beginner';
  row[DR.ESTIMATED_TIME]   = params.estimatedTime || '';
  row[DR.PATH_IDS]         = params.pathIds || '';
  row[DR.STEP_IDS]         = params.stepIds || '';
  row[DR.VISIBILITY]       = params.visibility || 'Members Only';
  row[DR.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[DR.UPDATED_AT]       = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.resources.create', DR_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Resource created' });
}

// ── Resources update ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipResourcesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DR_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DR_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DR.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var fieldMap = {
        title: DR.TITLE, description: DR.DESCRIPTION, resourceType: DR.RESOURCE_TYPE,
        author: DR.AUTHOR, url: DR.URL, driveFileId: DR.DRIVE_FILE_ID,
        category: DR.CATEGORY, topicTags: DR.TOPIC_TAGS,
        difficultyLevel: DR.DIFFICULTY_LEVEL, estimatedTime: DR.ESTIMATED_TIME,
        pathIds: DR.PATH_IDS, stepIds: DR.STEP_IDS, visibility: DR.VISIBILITY
      };
      for (var key in fieldMap) { if (params[key] !== undefined) row[fieldMap[key]] = params[key]; }
      row[DR.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DR_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.resources.update', DR_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Resource updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Resource not found');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP MILESTONES (personal spiritual milestones per member)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DMI_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipMilestones';
var DMI_NUM_COLS = 16;

var DMI = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2,
  MILESTONE_TYPE: 3, MILESTONE_NAME: 4, DESCRIPTION: 5,
  DATE_ACHIEVED: 6, VERIFIED_BY: 7,
  ENROLLMENT_ID: 8, PATH_ID: 9,
  CERTIFICATE_ID: 10, CEREMONY_DATE: 11,
  WITNESS: 12, NOTES: 13,
  CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function milestoneRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[DMI.ID] || ''),
    memberId:       String(vals[DMI.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:     String(vals[DMI.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    milestoneType:  String(vals[DMI.MILESTONE_TYPE] || ''),
    milestoneName:  String(vals[DMI.MILESTONE_NAME] || ''),
    description:    String(vals[DMI.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    dateAchieved:   isoDate(vals[DMI.DATE_ACHIEVED]),
    verifiedBy:     String(vals[DMI.VERIFIED_BY] || ''),
    enrollmentId:   String(vals[DMI.ENROLLMENT_ID] || ''),
    pathId:         String(vals[DMI.PATH_ID] || ''),
    certificateId:  String(vals[DMI.CERTIFICATE_ID] || ''),
    ceremonyDate:   isoDate(vals[DMI.CEREMONY_DATE]),
    witness:        String(vals[DMI.WITNESS] || ''),
    notes:          String(vals[DMI.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[DMI.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[DMI.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Milestones list ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMilestonesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = openTab_(DMI_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DMI_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    var obj = milestoneRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
    if (params.memberId      && obj.memberId      !== params.memberId)      continue;
    if (params.milestoneType && obj.milestoneType !== params.milestoneType) continue;
    if (params.pathId        && obj.pathId        !== params.pathId)        continue;
    list.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ milestones: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Milestones for member ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMilestonesForMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DMI_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DMI_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DMI.MEMBER_ID]) === params.memberId) {
      list.push(milestoneRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ milestones: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Milestones create ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMilestonesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.memberId || !params.milestoneType) return jsonErr('memberId and milestoneType required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DMI_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  var row   = new Array(DMI_NUM_COLS);
  row[DMI.ID]              = id;
  row[DMI.MEMBER_ID]       = params.memberId;
  row[DMI.MEMBER_NAME]     = params.memberName || '';
  row[DMI.MILESTONE_TYPE]  = params.milestoneType;
  row[DMI.MILESTONE_NAME]  = params.milestoneName || params.milestoneType;
  row[DMI.DESCRIPTION]     = params.description || '';
  row[DMI.DATE_ACHIEVED]   = params.dateAchieved || now;
  row[DMI.VERIFIED_BY]     = auth.email;
  row[DMI.ENROLLMENT_ID]   = params.enrollmentId || '';
  row[DMI.PATH_ID]         = params.pathId || '';
  row[DMI.CERTIFICATE_ID]  = params.certificateId || '';
  row[DMI.CEREMONY_DATE]   = params.ceremonyDate || '';
  row[DMI.WITNESS]         = params.witness || '';
  row[DMI.NOTES]           = params.notes || '';
  row[DMI.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  row[DMI.UPDATED_AT]      = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.milestones.create', DMI_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Milestone recorded' });
}

// ── Milestones update ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipMilestonesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DMI_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DMI_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DMI.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var fieldMap = {
        milestoneName: DMI.MILESTONE_NAME, description: DMI.DESCRIPTION,
        dateAchieved: DMI.DATE_ACHIEVED, certificateId: DMI.CERTIFICATE_ID,
        ceremonyDate: DMI.CEREMONY_DATE, witness: DMI.WITNESS, notes: DMI.NOTES
      };
      for (var key in fieldMap) { if (params[key] !== undefined) row[fieldMap[key]] = params[key]; }
      row[DMI.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DMI_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.milestones.update', DMI_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Milestone updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Milestone not found');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP GOALS (personal spiritual goals & accountability)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DG_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipGoals';
var DG_NUM_COLS = 20;

var DG = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2,
  GOAL_CATEGORY: 3, GOAL_TITLE: 4, DESCRIPTION: 5,
  TARGET_DATE: 6, COMPLETION_DATE: 7,
  STATUS: 8, PROGRESS_PERCENT: 9,
  MEASUREMENT_TYPE: 10, TARGET_VALUE: 11, CURRENT_VALUE: 12,
  ACCOUNTABILITY_PARTNER_ID: 13, ACCOUNTABILITY_PARTNER_NAME: 14,
  REVIEW_FREQUENCY: 15, LAST_REVIEWED: 16,
  NOTES: 17, CREATED_AT: 18, UPDATED_AT: 19
};

function goalRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:                    rowIndex,
    id:                       String(vals[DG.ID] || ''),
    memberId:                 String(vals[DG.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:               String(vals[DG.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    goalCategory:             String(vals[DG.GOAL_CATEGORY] || ''),
    goalTitle:                String(vals[DG.GOAL_TITLE] || ''),
    description:              String(vals[DG.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    targetDate:               isoDate(vals[DG.TARGET_DATE]),
    completionDate:           isoDate(vals[DG.COMPLETION_DATE]),
    status:                   String(vals[DG.STATUS] || ''),
    progressPercent:          Number(vals[DG.PROGRESS_PERCENT] || 0),
    measurementType:          String(vals[DG.MEASUREMENT_TYPE] || ''),
    targetValue:              String(vals[DG.TARGET_VALUE] || ''),
    currentValue:             String(vals[DG.CURRENT_VALUE] || ''),
    accountabilityPartnerId:  String(vals[DG.ACCOUNTABILITY_PARTNER_ID] || ''),
    accountabilityPartnerName: String(vals[DG.ACCOUNTABILITY_PARTNER_NAME] || ''),
    reviewFrequency:          String(vals[DG.REVIEW_FREQUENCY] || ''),
    lastReviewed:             isoDate(vals[DG.LAST_REVIEWED]),
    notes:                    String(vals[DG.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:                isoDate(vals[DG.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:                isoDate(vals[DG.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Goals list ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipGoalsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = openTab_(DG_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DG_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    var obj = goalRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
    if (params.memberId     && obj.memberId     !== params.memberId)     continue;
    if (params.goalCategory && obj.goalCategory !== params.goalCategory) continue;
    if (params.status       && obj.status       !== params.status)       continue;
    list.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ goals: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Goals for member ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipGoalsForMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DG_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DG_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DG.MEMBER_ID]) === params.memberId) {
      list.push(goalRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ goals: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Goals create ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipGoalsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.memberId || !params.goalTitle) return jsonErr('memberId and goalTitle required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DG_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  var row   = new Array(DG_NUM_COLS);
  row[DG.ID]                           = id;
  row[DG.MEMBER_ID]                    = params.memberId;
  row[DG.MEMBER_NAME]                  = params.memberName || '';
  row[DG.GOAL_CATEGORY]                = params.goalCategory || 'Spiritual Discipline';
  row[DG.GOAL_TITLE]                   = params.goalTitle;
  row[DG.DESCRIPTION]                  = params.description || '';
  row[DG.TARGET_DATE]                  = params.targetDate || '';
  row[DG.COMPLETION_DATE]              = '';
  row[DG.STATUS]                       = 'Active';
  row[DG.PROGRESS_PERCENT]             = 0;
  row[DG.MEASUREMENT_TYPE]             = params.measurementType || 'Subjective';
  row[DG.TARGET_VALUE]                 = params.targetValue || '';
  row[DG.CURRENT_VALUE]                = params.currentValue || '0';
  row[DG.ACCOUNTABILITY_PARTNER_ID]    = params.accountabilityPartnerId || '';
  row[DG.ACCOUNTABILITY_PARTNER_NAME]  = params.accountabilityPartnerName || '';
  row[DG.REVIEW_FREQUENCY]             = params.reviewFrequency || 'Weekly';
  row[DG.LAST_REVIEWED]                = '';
  row[DG.NOTES]                        = params.notes || '';
  row[DG.CREATED_AT]                   = now;
  row[DG.UPDATED_AT]                   = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.goals.create', DG_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Goal created' });
}

// ── Goals update ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipGoalsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DG_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DG_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DG.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var fieldMap = {
        goalTitle: DG.GOAL_TITLE, description: DG.DESCRIPTION,
        goalCategory: DG.GOAL_CATEGORY, targetDate: DG.TARGET_DATE,
        status: DG.STATUS, measurementType: DG.MEASUREMENT_TYPE,
        targetValue: DG.TARGET_VALUE, currentValue: DG.CURRENT_VALUE,
        accountabilityPartnerId: DG.ACCOUNTABILITY_PARTNER_ID,
        accountabilityPartnerName: DG.ACCOUNTABILITY_PARTNER_NAME,
        reviewFrequency: DG.REVIEW_FREQUENCY, notes: DG.NOTES
      };
      var numFields = { progressPercent: DG.PROGRESS_PERCENT };
      for (var key in fieldMap) { if (params[key] !== undefined) row[fieldMap[key]] = params[key]; }
      for (var nk in numFields) { if (params[nk] !== undefined) row[numFields[nk]] = Number(params[nk]); }
      row[DG.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DG_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.goals.update', DG_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Goal updated' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Goal not found');
}

// ── Goals complete ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipGoalsComplete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DG_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DG_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DG.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      row[DG.STATUS] = 'Completed';
      row[DG.PROGRESS_PERCENT] = 100;
      row[DG.COMPLETION_DATE] = new Date();
      row[DG.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DG_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.goals.complete', DG_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Goal completed' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Goal not found');
}

// ── Goals review (log an accountability check-in) ────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipGoalsReview(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DG_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DG_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DG.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      var now = new Date();
      row[DG.LAST_REVIEWED] = now;
      if (params.currentValue !== undefined) row[DG.CURRENT_VALUE] = params.currentValue;
      if (params.progressPercent !== undefined) row[DG.PROGRESS_PERCENT] = Number(params.progressPercent);
      if (params.notes !== undefined) row[DG.NOTES] = params.notes;
      row[DG.UPDATED_AT] = now;
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DG_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.goals.review', DG_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Goal reviewed' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Goal not found');
}

// ── Goals overdue (all goals past target date and not completed) ─────────────
function handleDiscipleshipGoalsOverdue(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = openTab_(DG_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DG_NUM_COLS);
  var today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    var obj = goalRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Completed' || obj.status === 'Abandoned') continue;
    if (obj.targetDate && obj.targetDate < today) {
      list.push(obj);
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ overdueGoals: list, total: list.length });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP CERTIFICATES (completion records for paths)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var DC_TAB      = 'DiscipleshipCertificates';
var DC_NUM_COLS = 14;

var DC = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2,
  PATH_ID: 3, PATH_NAME: 4,
  ENROLLMENT_ID: 5, CERTIFICATE_NUMBER: 6,
  ISSUE_DATE: 7, ISSUED_BY: 8,
  EXPIRY_DATE: 9, STATUS: 10,
  NOTES: 11, CREATED_AT: 12, UPDATED_AT: 13
};

function certificateRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:              rowIndex,
    id:                 String(vals[DC.ID] || ''),
    memberId:           String(vals[DC.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:         String(vals[DC.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    pathId:             String(vals[DC.PATH_ID] || ''),
    pathName:           String(vals[DC.PATH_NAME] || ''),
    enrollmentId:       String(vals[DC.ENROLLMENT_ID] || ''),
    certificateNumber:  String(vals[DC.CERTIFICATE_NUMBER] || ''),
    issueDate:          isoDate(vals[DC.ISSUE_DATE]),
    issuedBy:           String(vals[DC.ISSUED_BY] || ''),
    expiryDate:         isoDate(vals[DC.EXPIRY_DATE]),
    status:             String(vals[DC.STATUS] || ''),
    notes:              String(vals[DC.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:          isoDate(vals[DC.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:          isoDate(vals[DC.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Certificates list ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipCertificatesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = openTab_(DC_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DC_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    var obj = certificateRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2);
    if (params.memberId && obj.memberId !== params.memberId) continue;
    if (params.pathId   && obj.pathId   !== params.pathId)   continue;
    if (params.status   && obj.status   !== params.status)   continue;
    list.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ certificates: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Certificates for member ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipCertificatesForMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DC_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DC_NUM_COLS);
  var list  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DC.MEMBER_ID]) === params.memberId) {
      list.push(certificateRowToObject(rows[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ certificates: list, total: list.length });
}

// ── Certificates issue (create a completion certificate) ─────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipCertificatesIssue(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.memberId || !params.pathId) return jsonErr('memberId and pathId required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DC_TAB);
  var now   = new Date();
  var id    = Utilities.getUuid();
  // Generate certificate number: CERT-YYYYMMDD-XXXX
  var certNum = 'CERT-' + Utilities.formatDate(now, 'UTC', 'yyyyMMdd') + '-' + id.slice(0, 4).toUpperCase();
  var row   = new Array(DC_NUM_COLS);
  row[DC.ID]                 = id;
  row[DC.MEMBER_ID]          = params.memberId;
  row[DC.MEMBER_NAME]        = params.memberName || '';
  row[DC.PATH_ID]            = params.pathId;
  row[DC.PATH_NAME]          = params.pathName || '';
  row[DC.ENROLLMENT_ID]      = params.enrollmentId || '';
  row[DC.CERTIFICATE_NUMBER] = certNum;
  row[DC.ISSUE_DATE]         = now;
  row[DC.ISSUED_BY]          = auth.email;
  row[DC.EXPIRY_DATE]        = params.expiryDate || '';
  row[DC.STATUS]             = 'Issued';
  row[DC.NOTES]              = params.notes || '';
  row[DC.CREATED_AT]         = now;
  row[DC.UPDATED_AT]         = now;
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.certificates.issue', DC_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, certificateNumber: certNum, message: 'Certificate issued' });
}

// ── Certificates revoke ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function handleDiscipleshipCertificatesRevoke(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id required');
  var sheet = openTab_(DC_TAB);
  var rows  = getDataRows(sheet, DC_NUM_COLS);
  for (var i = 0; i < rows.length; i++) {
    if (String(rows[i][DC.ID]) === params.id) {
      var r = i + 2;
      var row = rows[i].slice();
      row[DC.STATUS] = 'Revoked';
      row[DC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      sheet.getRange(r, 1, 1, DC_NUM_COLS).setValues([row]);  // single batch write
      auditLog_(auth, 'discipleship.certificates.revoke', DC_TAB, params.id);
      return jsonOk({ message: 'Certificate revoked' });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Certificate not found');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DISCIPLESHIP DASHBOARD (summary analytics)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleDiscipleshipDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');

  // Paths summary
  var pathSheet = openTab_(DP_TAB);
  var pathRows  = getDataRows(pathSheet, DP_NUM_COLS);
  var pathsByStatus = {};
  for (var p = 0; p < pathRows.length; p++) {
    var pStatus = String(pathRows[p][DP.STATUS] || 'Draft');
    pathsByStatus[pStatus] = (pathsByStatus[pStatus] || 0) + 1;
  }

  // Enrollments summary
  var enrSheet = openTab_(DE_TAB);
  var enrRows  = getDataRows(enrSheet, DE_NUM_COLS);
  var enrollByStatus = {};
  var activeEnrollments = 0;
  var completedEnrollments = 0;
  var avgProgress = 0;
  var progressSum = 0;
  var progressCount = 0;
  for (var e = 0; e < enrRows.length; e++) {
    var eStatus = String(enrRows[e][DE.STATUS] || '');
    enrollByStatus[eStatus] = (enrollByStatus[eStatus] || 0) + 1;
    if (eStatus === 'Enrolled' || eStatus === 'In Progress') {
      activeEnrollments++;
      progressSum += Number(enrRows[e][DE.PERCENT_COMPLETE] || 0);
      progressCount++;
    }
    if (eStatus === 'Completed') completedEnrollments++;
  }
  if (progressCount > 0) avgProgress = Math.round(progressSum / progressCount);

  // Mentoring summary
  var menSheet = openTab_(DM_TAB);
  var menRows  = getDataRows(menSheet, DM_NUM_COLS);
  var activeMentoring = 0;
  for (var m = 0; m < menRows.length; m++) {
    if (String(menRows[m][DM.STATUS]) === 'Active') activeMentoring++;
  }

  // Goals summary
  var goalSheet = openTab_(DG_TAB);
  var goalRows  = getDataRows(goalSheet, DG_NUM_COLS);
  var activeGoals = 0;
  var overdueGoals = 0;
  var today = new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10);
  for (var g = 0; g < goalRows.length; g++) {
    var gStatus = String(goalRows[g][DG.STATUS] || '');
    if (gStatus === 'Active' || gStatus === 'In Progress') {
      activeGoals++;
      var tDate = isoDate(goalRows[g][DG.TARGET_DATE]);
      if (tDate && tDate < today) overdueGoals++;
    }
  }

  // Milestones summary
  var milSheet = openTab_(DMI_TAB);
  var milRows  = getDataRows(milSheet, DMI_NUM_COLS);
  var milByType = {};
  for (var mi = 0; mi < milRows.length; mi++) {
    var mType = String(milRows[mi][DMI.MILESTONE_TYPE] || 'Other');
    milByType[mType] = (milByType[mType] || 0) + 1;
  }

  // Certificates summary
  var certSheet = openTab_(DC_TAB);
  var certRows  = getDataRows(certSheet, DC_NUM_COLS);
  var issuedCerts = 0;
  for (var c = 0; c < certRows.length; c++) {
    if (String(certRows[c][DC.STATUS]) === 'Issued') issuedCerts++;
  }

  return jsonOk({
    paths: {
      total: pathRows.length,
      byStatus: pathsByStatus
    },
    enrollments: {
      total: enrRows.length,
      active: activeEnrollments,
      completed: completedEnrollments,
      averageProgress: avgProgress,
      byStatus: enrollByStatus
    },
    mentoring: {
      total: menRows.length,
      active: activeMentoring
    },
    goals: {
      active: activeGoals,
      overdue: overdueGoals
    },
    milestones: {
      total: milRows.length,
      byType: milByType
    },
    certificates: {
      issued: issuedCerts,
      total: certRows.length
    }
  });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Expansions.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: NEXT-LEVEL — Scalability, Multi-Church, Scheduled Triggers,
// Batch Operations, and Advanced Analytics Framework
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MULTI-CHURCH / DATA PARTITIONING
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Multi-church architecture: each church gets its OWN Google Sheet.
 * A central "Registry" sheet stores {churchId, sheetId, name, plan, status}.
 * All data operations route through resolveChurchSheet() so a single
 * GAS deployment can serve N churches.
 *
 * Steps to activate:
 *   1. Create a "ChurchRegistry" tab in the master spreadsheet.
 *   2. Populate it: ChurchID | SheetID | Name | Plan | Status | CreatedAt
 *   3. Replace getTab() calls with resolveChurchTab(churchId, tabName)
 *      in production code when multi-tenancy is enabled.
 */

var REGISTRY_TAB  = 'ChurchRegistry';
var TRUTH_DB_ID   = DEPLOY_CONFIG.truthDbId;
var REGISTRY_COLS = {
  ID: 0, SHEET_ID: 1, NAME: 2, PLAN: 3, STATUS: 4, CREATED: 5,
  SHORT_NAME: 6, BRAND_NAME: 7, TAGLINE: 8,
  THEME_COLOR: 9, BG_COLOR: 10, DB_URL: 11,
  PHOTOS_URL: 12, ADMIN_EMAIL: 13, ANALYTICS_ID: 14,
  FAVICON: 15, PORTRAIT: 16, VERSION: 17, FIREBASE_CONFIG: 18
};

/**
 * Opens the spreadsheet belonging to a specific church.
 * Returns a SpreadsheetApp object or throws if not found / inactive.
 */
function resolveChurchSheet(churchId) {
  if (!churchId) throw new Error('churchId is required for multi-church mode.');

  var cacheKey = 'church_sheet:' + churchId;
  var cache = CacheService.getScriptCache();
  var cached = cache.get(cacheKey);
  if (cached) {
    return SpreadsheetApp.openById(cached);
  }

  var registry = getTab(REGISTRY_TAB);
  if (!registry) throw new Error('ChurchRegistry tab not found. Multi-church not configured.');

  var lastRow = registry.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) throw new Error('No churches registered.');

  var data = registry.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 19).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.ID]) === String(churchId)) {
      if (String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.STATUS]) !== 'Active') {
        throw new Error('Church account is inactive.');
      }
      var sheetId = String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.SHEET_ID]);
      cache.put(cacheKey, sheetId, 3600);  // Cache for 1 hour
      return SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    }
  }
  throw new Error('Church not found: ' + churchId);
}

/**
 * Gets a specific tab from a church's spreadsheet.
 */
function resolveChurchTab(churchId, tabName) {
  var ss = resolveChurchSheet(churchId);
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(tabName);
  if (!sheet) throw new Error('Tab "' + tabName + '" not found for church ' + churchId + '.');
  return sheet;
}

/**
 * Creates a new church in the registry and initializes its spreadsheet.
 * Admin-only action.
 */
function handleChurchCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  if (!params.churchName) return jsonErr('churchName is required.');
  if (!params.shortName)  return jsonErr('shortName is required.');

  // Derive a stable churchId from shortName for predictable URL slugs
  var churchId = String(params.shortName).toLowerCase().replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-').replace(/^-|-$/g, '');

  // Create a new Google Sheet for this church's data
  var newSS = SpreadsheetApp.create('FlockOS CRM — ' + String(params.churchName));
  var sheetId = newSS.getId();

  // Move the new sheet into the designated Church Databases Drive folder
  if (DEPLOY_CONFIG.churchFolderId) {
    try {
      var file   = DriveApp.getFileById(sheetId);
      var folder = DriveApp.getFolderById(DEPLOY_CONFIG.churchFolderId);
      folder.addFile(file);
      DriveApp.getRootFolder().removeFile(file);
    } catch(e) {
      Logger.log('Warning: could not move sheet to church folder: ' + e.message);
    }
  }

  // Register in the central registry (19 columns A–S)
  var registry = getTab(REGISTRY_TAB);
  registry.appendRow([
    churchId,                                                           // A ChurchID
    sheetId,                                                            // B SheetID
    String(params.churchName),                                          // C Name
    '',                                                                 // D Plan (unused)
    'Active',                                                           // E Status
    isoNow(),                                                           // F CreatedAt
    String(params.shortName   || ''),                                   // G ShortName
    String(params.brandName   || 'FlockOS'),                            // H BrandName
    String(params.tagline     || 'Church Management & Ministry Platform'), // I Tagline
    String(params.themeColor  || '#e8a838'),                            // J ThemeColor
    String(params.bgColor     || '#1a1a2e'),                            // K BackgroundColor
    String(params.databaseUrl || ''),                                   // L DatabaseUrl
    String(params.photosUrl   || ''),                                   // M PhotosUrl
    String(params.adminEmail  || ''),                                   // N AdminEmail
    String(params.analyticsId || ''),                                   // O AnalyticsId
    String(params.favicon     || 'Favicon.png'),                        // P Favicon
    String(params.portrait    || 'FlockOS_Portrait.png'),               // Q Portrait
    String(params.version     || '1.0'),                                // R Version
    String(params.firebaseConfig || '')                                  // S FirebaseConfig (JSON)
  ]);

  writeAudit(auth, 'church.create', REGISTRY_TAB, '', params.churchName);

  return jsonOk({
    churchId:   churchId,
    sheetId:    sheetId,
    churchName: String(params.churchName),
    message:    'Church registered. Click \"Setup Database\" to provision spreadsheet tabs, then deploy a GAS Web App and save the DatabaseUrl.'
  });
}

function handleChurchUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  if (!params.churchId) return jsonErr('churchId is required.');
  var registry;
  try { registry = getTab(REGISTRY_TAB); } catch (e) { return jsonErr('ChurchRegistry tab not found.'); }
  var lastRow = registry.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('No churches registered.');

  var data = registry.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 19).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][0]) !== String(params.churchId)) continue;
    var rowNum = i + 2; // 1-based + header row
    var colMap = [
      [3,  params.churchName],                      [5,  params.status],
      [7,  params.shortName],    [8,  params.brandName],  [9,  params.tagline],
      [10, params.themeColor],   [11, params.bgColor],    [12, params.databaseUrl],
      [13, params.photosUrl],    [14, params.adminEmail], [15, params.analyticsId],
      [16, params.favicon],      [17, params.portrait],   [18, params.version],
      [19, params.firebaseConfig]
    ];
    colMap.forEach(function(pair) {
      if (pair[1] !== undefined && pair[1] !== null && String(pair[1]).length > 0)
        registry.getRange(rowNum, pair[0]).setValue(String(pair[1]));
    });
    writeAudit(auth, 'church.update', REGISTRY_TAB, String(rowNum), params.churchId);
    return jsonOk({ updated: true, churchId: params.churchId });
  }
  return jsonErr('Church not found: ' + params.churchId);
}

function handleChurchSetup(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  if (!params.churchId) return jsonErr('churchId is required.');
  var registry;
  try { registry = getTab(REGISTRY_TAB); } catch (e) { return jsonErr('ChurchRegistry tab not found.'); }
  var lastRow = registry.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Church not found.');

  var data = registry.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 19).getValues();
  var sheetId = null, churchName = '';
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.ID]) === String(params.churchId)) {
      sheetId    = String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.SHEET_ID]);
      churchName = String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.NAME]);
      break;
    }
  }
  if (!sheetId) return jsonErr('Church not found: ' + params.churchId);
  var copyResult;
  try {
    var churchSS = SpreadsheetApp.openById(sheetId);
    setupFlockOS(churchSS);
    copyResult = copyTruthDatabase_(churchSS);
  } catch (err) {
    return jsonErr('Setup failed: ' + err.message);
  }
  writeAudit(auth, 'church.setup', REGISTRY_TAB, '', churchName);
  return jsonOk({
    setup: true, churchId: params.churchId, churchName: churchName,
    contentCopied: copyResult ? copyResult.copied : 0,
    contentSkipped: copyResult ? copyResult.skipped : [],
    message: 'Database provisioned and Truth Database content loaded. Now deploy a GAS Web App for this sheet and save the DatabaseUrl.'
  });
}

function copyTruthDatabase_(targetSS) {
  var truthDB;
  try {
    truthDB = SpreadsheetApp.openById(TRUTH_DB_ID);
  } catch(e) {
    Logger.log('Could not open Truth Database: ' + e.message);
    return { copied: 0, skipped: ['(could not open Truth Database: ' + e.message + ')'] };
  }
  var copied = 0, skipped = [];
  var truthSheets = truthDB.getSheets();
  truthSheets.forEach(function(truthSheet) {
    var tabName = truthSheet.getName();
    var targetSheet = targetSS.getSheetByName(tabName);
    if (!targetSheet) { skipped.push(tabName); return; }
    var data = truthSheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    if (!data || data.length === 0) return;
    targetSheet.clearContents();
    targetSheet.getRange(1, 1, data.length, data[0].length).setValues(data);
    copied++;
  });
  return { copied: copied, skipped: skipped };
}

function handleChurchDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  if (!params.churchId) return jsonErr('churchId is required.');
  var registry;
  try { registry = getTab(REGISTRY_TAB); } catch (e) { return jsonErr('ChurchRegistry tab not found.'); }
  var lastRow = registry.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('No churches registered.');

  var data = registry.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 19).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][0]) !== String(params.churchId)) continue;
    var rowNum = i + 2; // 1-based + header row
    // Soft delete: set Status column (col 5) to 'Deleted'
    registry.getRange(rowNum, 5).setValue('Deleted');
    writeAudit(auth, 'church.delete', REGISTRY_TAB, String(rowNum), params.churchId);
    return jsonOk({ deleted: true, churchId: params.churchId });
  }
  return jsonErr('Church not found: ' + params.churchId);
}

// ── Cross-Church AppConfig Proxy (seed admin only) ────────────────────────

function handleChurchConfigList_(params, auth) {
  if (!isSeedAdmin_(auth)) return jsonErr('Seed admin only.');
  if (!params.churchId) return jsonErr('churchId is required.');
  var ss;
  try { ss = resolveChurchSheet(params.churchId); } catch (e) { return jsonErr('Cannot open church sheet: ' + e.message); }
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName('AppConfig');
  if (!sheet) return jsonErr('AppConfig tab not found for church: ' + params.churchId);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 6).getValues();
  var category = String(params.category || '').trim();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var row = {
      index:       i + 2,
      key:         String(data[i][0] || ''),
      value:       String(data[i][1] || ''),
      description: String(data[i][2] || ''),
      category:    String(data[i][3] || ''),
      updatedBy:   String(data[i][4] || ''),
      updatedAt:   isoDate(data[i][5])
    };
    if (category && row.category !== category) continue;
    if (!row.key) continue;
    rows.push(row);
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleChurchConfigSet_(params, auth) {
  if (!isSeedAdmin_(auth)) return jsonErr('Seed admin only.');
  if (!params.churchId) return jsonErr('churchId is required.');
  var key   = String(params.key   || '').trim();
  var value = String(params.value != null ? params.value : '');
  if (!key) return jsonErr('key is required.');
  var ss;
  try { ss = resolveChurchSheet(params.churchId); } catch (e) { return jsonErr('Cannot open church sheet: ' + e.message); }
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName('AppConfig');
  if (!sheet) return jsonErr('AppConfig tab not found for church: ' + params.churchId);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var keys = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
      if (String(keys[i][0]).trim() === key) {
        var rowIdx = i + 2;
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 2).setValue(value);
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 5).setValue(auth.email + ' (seed)');
        sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 6).setValue(isoNow());
        writeAudit(auth, 'church.config.set', 'AppConfig@' + params.churchId, rowIdx, key + ' = ' + value);
        return jsonOk({ key: key, value: value, message: 'Config updated.' });
      }
    }
  }
  sheet.appendRow([
    key, value,
    String(params.description || ''),
    String(params.category || 'General'),
    auth.email + ' (seed)', isoNow()
  ]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'church.config.set', 'AppConfig@' + params.churchId, '', key + ' = ' + value + ' (new)');
  return jsonOk({ key: key, value: value, message: 'Config created.' });
}

function handleChurchConfigs(params, auth) {
  // Public endpoint — returns branding/config only, no sensitive data
  var registry;
  try { registry = getTab(REGISTRY_TAB); } catch (e) { return jsonOk({ configs: [] }); }
  var lastRow = registry.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ configs: [] });

  var data = registry.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 19).getValues();
  var configs = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.STATUS]) !== 'Active') continue;
    configs.push({
      id:              String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.ID]           || ''),
      name:            String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.NAME]         || ''),
      shortName:       String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.SHORT_NAME]   || ''),
      brandName:       String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.BRAND_NAME]   || 'FlockOS'),
      tagline:         String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.TAGLINE]       || ''),
      themeColor:      String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.THEME_COLOR]  || '#e8a838'),
      backgroundColor: String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.BG_COLOR]     || '#1a1a2e'),
      databaseUrl:     String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.DB_URL]       || ''),
      photosUrl:       String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.PHOTOS_URL]   || ''),
      adminEmail:      String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.ADMIN_EMAIL]  || ''),
      analyticsId:     String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.ANALYTICS_ID] || ''),
      favicon:         String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.FAVICON]      || 'Favicon.png'),
      portrait:        String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.PORTRAIT]     || 'FlockOS_Portrait.png'),
      version:         String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.VERSION]      || '1.0'),
      firebaseConfig:  (function() { try { var v = String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.FIREBASE_CONFIG] || ''); return v ? JSON.parse(v) : null; } catch(_) { return null; } })()
    });
  }
  return jsonOk({ configs: configs });
}

function handleChurchList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var registry;
  try { registry = getTab(REGISTRY_TAB); } catch (e) { return jsonOk({ rows: [] }); }
  var lastRow = registry.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = registry.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 19).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    rows.push({
      churchId:    String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.ID]           || ''),
      sheetId:     String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.SHEET_ID]     || ''),
      churchName:  String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.NAME]         || ''),
      plan:        String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.PLAN]         || ''),
      status:      String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.STATUS]       || ''),
      createdAt:   String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.CREATED]      || ''),
      shortName:   String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.SHORT_NAME]   || ''),
      brandName:   String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.BRAND_NAME]   || ''),
      tagline:     String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.TAGLINE]       || ''),
      themeColor:  String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.THEME_COLOR]  || ''),
      bgColor:     String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.BG_COLOR]     || ''),
      databaseUrl: String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.DB_URL]       || ''),
      photosUrl:   String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.PHOTOS_URL]   || ''),
      adminEmail:  String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.ADMIN_EMAIL]  || ''),
      analyticsId: String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.ANALYTICS_ID] || ''),
      favicon:     String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.FAVICON]      || ''),
      portrait:    String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.PORTRAIT]     || ''),
      version:     String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.VERSION]      || ''),
      firebaseConfig: (function() { try { var v = String(data[i][REGISTRY_COLS.FIREBASE_CONFIG] || ''); return v ? JSON.parse(v) : null; } catch(_) { return null; } })()
    });
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SCHEDULED TRIGGERS (TIME-DRIVEN)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Install scheduled triggers. Run this once from the Apps Script editor.
 *
 * Triggers installed:
 *   - Daily: cleanup stale check-in sessions, attendance reminders
 *   - Weekly: volunteer schedule reminders, giving summary to admin
 *   - Monthly: pledge progress check, membership snapshot
 */
function installScheduledTriggers() {
  // Remove any existing expansion triggers first
  removeExpansionTriggers_();

  // Daily at 6:00 AM
  ScriptApp.newTrigger('triggerDailyTasks')
    .timeBased()
    .everyDays(1)
    .atHour(6)
    .create();

  // Weekly on Monday at 8:00 AM
  ScriptApp.newTrigger('triggerWeeklyTasks')
    .timeBased()
    .onWeekDay(ScriptApp.WeekDay.MONDAY)
    .atHour(8)
    .create();

  // Monthly on the 1st at 7:00 AM
  ScriptApp.newTrigger('triggerMonthlyTasks')
    .timeBased()
    .onMonthDay(1)
    .atHour(7)
    .create();

  Logger.log('Expansion triggers installed.');
}

function removeExpansionTriggers_() {
  var triggers = ScriptApp.getProjectTriggers();
  var expansionFns = ['triggerDailyTasks', 'triggerWeeklyTasks', 'triggerMonthlyTasks'];
  for (var i = 0; i < triggers.length; i++) {
    if (expansionFns.indexOf(triggers[i].getHandlerFunction()) !== -1) {
      ScriptApp.deleteTrigger(triggers[i]);
    }
  }
}

function triggerDailyTasks() {
  try {
    closeStaleCheckInSessions_();
  } catch (e) {
    logTriggerError_('triggerDailyTasks', e);
  }
}

function triggerWeeklyTasks() {
  try {
    sendVolunteerReminders_();
  } catch (e) {
    logTriggerError_('triggerWeeklyTasks', e);
  }
}

function triggerMonthlyTasks() {
  try {
    snapshotMembershipCounts_();
  } catch (e) {
    logTriggerError_('triggerMonthlyTasks', e);
  }
  try {
    checkPledgeProgress_();
  } catch (e) {
    logTriggerError_('triggerMonthlyTasks/pledges', e);
  }
}

function logTriggerError_(triggerName, err) {
  try {
    var sheet = getTab('AuditLog');
    sheet.appendRow([
      isoNow(), 'SYSTEM', 'trigger', 'trigger.error',
      triggerName, '', String(err && err.message ? err.message : err)
    ]);
  } catch (e) { /* do not throw inside error handler */ }
}


// ── Daily: Close stale check-in sessions ─────────────────────────────────────

function closeStaleCheckInSessions_() {
  var sheet = getTab('CheckInSessions');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return;

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 10).getValues();
  var today = isoNow().substring(0, 10);

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var date = isoDate(data[i][3]).substring(0, 10);     // DATE
    var closedAt = String(data[i][5] || '').trim();       // CLOSED_AT
    if (!closedAt && date < today) {
      // Auto-close sessions from previous days
      var rowIdx = i + 2;
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 6).setValue(isoNow());  // CLOSED_AT column
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 9).setValue('Auto-closed by system');  // NOTES column
    }
  }
}


// ── Weekly: Volunteer schedule reminders ──────────────────────────────────────

function sendVolunteerReminders_() {
  if (String(getAppConfigValue_('NOTIFY_VOLUNTEER_REMINDER', 'TRUE')).toUpperCase() !== 'TRUE') return;
  var daysAhead = Number(getAppConfigValue_('VOLUNTEER_REMINDER_DAYS_AHEAD', '7')) || 7;

  var sheet = getTab('VolunteerSchedule');
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return;

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 13).getValues();
  var today = new Date();
  var nextWeekEnd = new Date(today);
  nextWeekEnd.setDate(today.getDate() + daysAhead);
  var dateTo = Utilities.formatDate(nextWeekEnd, Session.getScriptTimeZone(), 'yyyy-MM-dd');
  var dateFrom = Utilities.formatDate(today, Session.getScriptTimeZone(), 'yyyy-MM-dd');

  var memberIds = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var schedDate = isoDate(data[i][4]).substring(0, 10);  // SCHEDULED_DATE
    var status = String(data[i][6] || '').trim();           // STATUS
    if (schedDate >= dateFrom && schedDate <= dateTo && status === 'Scheduled') {
      memberIds.push(String(data[i][1] || ''));  // MEMBER_ID
    }
  }

  if (!memberIds.length) return;

  // Look up emails from Members tab
  var membersSheet = getTab('Members');
  var mLastRow = membersSheet.getLastRow();
  if (mLastRow < 2) return;
  var mData = membersSheet.getRange(2, 1, mLastRow - 1, 8).getValues();

  for (var j = 0; j < mData.length; j++) {
    var mid = String(mData[j][0] || '');
    if (memberIds.indexOf(mid) === -1) continue;
    var email = normalizeEmail(mData[j][7]);
    if (!email) continue;
    try {
      GmailApp.sendEmail(email,
        'Volunteer Reminder — Upcoming Service',
        'Hello! This is a reminder that you are scheduled to serve this week. ' +
        'Please check the volunteer schedule for your specific assignment. ' +
        'If you need to swap, please request a swap through the system. Thank you!'
      );
    } catch (err) { /* skip invalid emails */ }
  }
}


// ── Monthly: Membership snapshot ─────────────────────────────────────────────

function snapshotMembershipCounts_() {
  var membersSheet = getTab('Members');
  var lastRow = membersSheet.getLastRow();
  var counts = { total: 0, active: 0, inactive: 0, visitor: 0 };

  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var data = membersSheet.getRange(2, 11, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();  // MEMBERSHIP_STATUS
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      var s = String(data[i][0] || '').trim();
      counts.total++;
      if (s === 'Active' || s === 'Member') counts.active++;
      else if (s === 'Inactive') counts.inactive++;
      else if (s === 'Visitor' || s === 'Guest') counts.visitor++;
    }
  }

  // Log to AuditLog as a snapshot record
  var sheet = getTab('AuditLog');
  sheet.appendRow([
    isoNow(), 'SYSTEM', 'trigger', 'membership.snapshot',
    'Members', '',
    'Total:' + counts.total + ' Active:' + counts.active +
    ' Inactive:' + counts.inactive + ' Visitors:' + counts.visitor
  ]);
}


// ── Monthly: Pledge progress check ───────────────────────────────────────────

function checkPledgeProgress_() {
  var pledgesSheet = getTab('GivingPledges');
  var pLastRow = pledgesSheet.getLastRow();
  if (pLastRow < 2) return;

  var givingSheet = getTab('Giving');
  var gLastRow = givingSheet.getLastRow();

  var pledges = pledgesSheet.getRange(2, 1, pLastRow - 1, 14).getValues();
  var givings = gLastRow >= 2 ? givingSheet.getRange(2, 1, gLastRow - 1, 15).getValues() : [];

  // Build a map of total giving by memberId+fund
  var givenMap = {};
  for (var g = 0; g < givings.length; g++) {
    var key = String(givings[g][1] || '') + '|' + String(givings[g][6] || '');
    givenMap[key] = (givenMap[key] || 0) + Number(givings[g][3] || 0);
  }

  // Update TotalGiven on each active pledge
  for (var p = 0; p < pledges.length; p++) {
    if (String(pledges[p][9] || '') !== 'Active') continue;  // STATUS
    var pKey = String(pledges[p][1] || '') + '|' + String(pledges[p][2] || '');
    var totalGiven = givenMap[pKey] || 0;
    var rowIdx = p + 2;
    pledgesSheet.getRange(rowIdx, 9).setValue(totalGiven);          // TOTAL_GIVEN
    pledgesSheet.getRange(rowIdx, 14).setValue(isoNow());           // UPDATED_AT
  }
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BATCH OPERATIONS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Bulk import members from a JSON array.
 * Each item should match the members.gs column structure.
 * Admin-only, with audit logging.
 */
function handleBulkMembersImport(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var records;
  try {
    records = JSON.parse(params.records);
  } catch (e) {
    return jsonErr('records must be valid JSON array.');
  }
  if (!Array.isArray(records) || records.length === 0) {
    return jsonErr('records must be a non-empty array.');
  }
  if (records.length > 200) {
    return jsonErr('Maximum 200 records per batch.');
  }

  var sheet = getTab('Members');
  var created = 0;
  var errors = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < records.length; i++) {
    try {
      var r = records[i];
      if (!r.firstName || !r.lastName) {
        errors.push({ index: i, error: 'Missing firstName or lastName.' });
        continue;
      }
      // Build minimal member row — delegates to handleMembersCreate logic
      var result = handleMembersCreate(r, auth);
      if (result && result.ok) {
        created++;
      } else {
        errors.push({ index: i, error: result.message || 'Unknown error.' });
      }
    } catch (err) {
      errors.push({ index: i, error: String(err && err.message ? err.message : err) });
    }
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'members.bulkImport', 'Members', '',
    'Created: ' + created + ', Errors: ' + errors.length);

  return jsonOk({ created: created, errors: errors });
}

/**
 * Bulk import giving records from a JSON array.
 * Admin-only.
 */
function handleBulkGivingImport(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var records;
  try {
    records = JSON.parse(params.records);
  } catch (e) {
    return jsonErr('records must be valid JSON array.');
  }
  if (!Array.isArray(records) || records.length === 0) {
    return jsonErr('records must be a non-empty array.');
  }
  if (records.length > 500) {
    return jsonErr('Maximum 500 records per batch.');
  }

  var created = 0;
  var errors = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < records.length; i++) {
    try {
      var r = records[i];
      if (!r.amount) {
        errors.push({ index: i, error: 'Missing amount.' });
        continue;
      }
      var result = handleGivingCreate(r, auth);
      if (result && result.ok) {
        created++;
      } else {
        errors.push({ index: i, error: result.message || 'Unknown error.' });
      }
    } catch (err) {
      errors.push({ index: i, error: String(err && err.message ? err.message : err) });
    }
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'giving.bulkImport', 'Giving', '',
    'Created: ' + created + ', Errors: ' + errors.length);

  return jsonOk({ created: created, errors: errors });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DATA EXPORT
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Exports all data from a given tab as a JSON array.
 * Admin-only. Useful for backups and data portability.
 */
function handleDataExport(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  var tabName = String(params.tab || '').trim();
  if (!tabName) return jsonErr('tab parameter is required.');

  // Whitelist of exportable tabs
  var allowed = [
    'Members', 'PrayerRequests', 'ContactLog', 'PastoralNotes', 'Milestones',
    'Households', 'ToDo', 'Attendance', 'Events', 'EventRSVPs', 'SmallGroups',
    'SmallGroupMembers', 'Giving', 'GivingPledges', 'VolunteerSchedule',
    'Communications', 'CheckInSessions'
  ];

  var found = false;
  for (var i = 0; i < allowed.length; i++) {
    if (allowed[i] === tabName) { found = true; break; }
  }
  if (!found) return jsonErr('Export not allowed for tab: ' + tabName);

  var sheet = getTab(tabName);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  var lastCol = sheet.getLastColumn();
  if (lastRow < 1) return jsonOk({ tab: tabName, headers: [], rows: [] });

  var headers = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, lastCol).getValues()[0].map(function(h) {
    return String(h || '');
  });

  var rows = [];
  if (lastRow >= 2) {
    var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, lastCol).getValues();
    for (var r = 0; r < data.length; r++) {
      var obj = {};
      for (var c = 0; c < headers.length; c++) {
        obj[headers[c]] = data[r][c];
      }
      rows.push(obj);
    }
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'data.export', tabName, '', rows.length + ' rows exported');
  return jsonOk({ tab: tabName, headers: headers, rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CONFIG / FEATURE FLAGS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Reads a config value from the Config tab, falling back to a default.
 * The Config tab has two columns: Key | Value.
 * This wraps getConfig() (from code.gs) for expansion-specific keys.
 */
var EXPANSION_FEATURE_DEFAULTS = {
  MULTI_CHURCH_ENABLED:     'false',
  GIVING_MODULE_ENABLED:    'true',
  VOLUNTEER_MODULE_ENABLED: 'true',
  COMMS_MODULE_ENABLED:     'true',
  MAX_BULK_IMPORT:          '200',
  DEFAULT_CURRENCY:         'USD',
  REPORT_CACHE_TTL:         '300'
};

function getExpansionConfig(key) {
  var val = getConfig(key, null);
  if (val !== null && val !== undefined && val !== '') return val;
  return EXPANSION_FEATURE_DEFAULTS[key] || '';
}

/**
 * Checks if a feature module is enabled.
 */
function isExpansionModuleEnabled_(moduleName) {
  var key = String(moduleName).toUpperCase().replace(/[^A-Z0-9]/g, '_') + '_MODULE_ENABLED';
  return String(getExpansionConfig(key)).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE';
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// INTEGRATION NOTES — HOW TO ACTIVATE NEXT-LEVEL FEATURES
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//
// 1. MULTI-CHURCH:
//    - Create a "ChurchRegistry" tab in the master sheet.
//    - Headers: ChurchID | SheetID | Name | Plan | Status | CreatedAt
//    - Set MULTI_CHURCH_ENABLED = true in Config tab.
//    - Add "churchId" parameter to API calls; modify doGet() routing to call
//      resolveChurchTab() instead of getTab() when churchId is present.
//
// 2. SCHEDULED TRIGGERS:
//    - Run installScheduledTriggers() once from the Apps Script editor.
//    - Triggers are project-level; they run even when no user is connected.
//    - Daily: stale check-in cleanup
//    - Weekly: volunteer reminders
//    - Monthly: membership snapshot + pledge progress
//
// 3. BATCH OPERATIONS:
//    - Add these routes to api.gs:
//      'bulk.members.import'  → handleBulkMembersImport
//      'bulk.giving.import'   → handleBulkGivingImport
//    - Maximum batch sizes are enforced (200 members, 500 giving records).
//
// 4. DATA EXPORT:
//    - Add 'data.export' route to api.gs → handleDataExport
//    - Only whitelisted tabs can be exported.
//    - Useful for church data portability and backup.
//
// 5. FEATURE FLAGS:
//    - Add keys to the Config tab (Key | Value) to enable/disable modules.
//    - Check with isExpansionModuleEnabled_('giving'), isExpansionModuleEnabled_('volunteer'), etc.
//    - Wrap route handlers in if(isExpansionModuleEnabled_(...)) guards if needed.
//
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Learning.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: LEARNING — Sermon-Based Learning Module
// Tabs: LearningTopics, LearningPlaylists, LearningPlaylistItems,
//       LearningProgress, LearningNotes, LearningBookmarks,
//       LearningRecommendations, LearningQuizzes, LearningQuizResults,
//       LearningCertificates
//
// Organises existing Sermons for education & spiritual growth.
// Members browse sermons by topic, preacher, scripture passage, or curated
// playlists; track listening/viewing progress; take personal notes; bookmark
// favourites; receive recommendations; and complete quizzes for deeper study.
// FK references go to Sermons.ID, SermonSeries.ID, and Members.ID.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING TOPICS (hierarchical taxonomy for sermon categorisation)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LT_TAB      = 'LearningTopics';
var LT_NUM_COLS = 16;

var LT = {
  ID: 0, TOPIC_NAME: 1, SLUG: 2, DESCRIPTION: 3,
  PARENT_TOPIC_ID: 4, LEVEL: 5, SORT_ORDER: 6,
  ICON_URL: 7, COLOR_HEX: 8, FEATURED: 9,
  SERMON_COUNT: 10, SUBSCRIBER_COUNT: 11,
  STATUS: 12, CREATED_BY: 13, CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function learningTopicRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[LT.ID] || ''),
    topicName:       String(vals[LT.TOPIC_NAME] || ''),
    slug:            String(vals[LT.SLUG] || ''),
    description:     String(vals[LT.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    parentTopicId:   String(vals[LT.PARENT_TOPIC_ID] || ''),
    level:           Number(vals[LT.LEVEL] || 0),
    sortOrder:       Number(vals[LT.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    iconUrl:         String(vals[LT.ICON_URL] || ''),
    colorHex:        String(vals[LT.COLOR_HEX] || ''),
    featured:        String(vals[LT.FEATURED] || 'FALSE'),
    sermonCount:     Number(vals[LT.SERMON_COUNT] || 0),
    subscriberCount: Number(vals[LT.SUBSCRIBER_COUNT] || 0),
    status:          String(vals[LT.STATUS] || ''),
    createdBy:       String(vals[LT.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[LT.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:       isoDate(vals[LT.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Topics CRUD ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningTopicsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, LT_TAB, LT_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) out.push(learningTopicRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  if (params.parentId) out = out.filter(function(t) { return t.parentTopicId === params.parentId; });
  if (params.featured) out = out.filter(function(t) { return t.featured === 'TRUE'; });
  if (params.status)   out = out.filter(function(t) { return t.status === params.status; });
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningTopicsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var row = findRowById(db(), LT_TAB, LT_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!row) return jsonErr('Topic not found');
  return jsonOk(learningTopicRowToObject(row.vals, row.rowIndex));
}

function handleLearningTopicsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(LT_NUM_COLS);
  row[LT.ID]               = id;
  row[LT.TOPIC_NAME]       = String(params.topicName || '');
  row[LT.SLUG]             = String(params.slug || slugify(params.topicName || ''));
  row[LT.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description || '');
  row[LT.PARENT_TOPIC_ID]  = String(params.parentTopicId || '');
  row[LT.LEVEL]            = Number(params.level || 0);
  row[LT.SORT_ORDER]       = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[LT.ICON_URL]         = String(params.iconUrl || '');
  row[LT.COLOR_HEX]        = String(params.colorHex || '');
  row[LT.FEATURED]         = params.featured === true || params.featured === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[LT.SERMON_COUNT]     = 0;
  row[LT.SUBSCRIBER_COUNT] = 0;
  row[LT.STATUS]           = 'Active';
  row[LT.CREATED_BY]       = auth.email;
  row[LT.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[LT.UPDATED_AT]       = now;
  appendRow(ss, LT_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.topics.create', LT_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Topic created' });
}

function handleLearningTopicsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LT_TAB, LT_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Topic not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.topicName !== undefined)     v[LT.TOPIC_NAME]      = String(params.topicName);
  if (params.slug !== undefined)          v[LT.SLUG]            = String(params.slug);
  if (params.description !== undefined)   v[LT.DESCRIPTION]     = String(params.description);
  if (params.parentTopicId !== undefined) v[LT.PARENT_TOPIC_ID] = String(params.parentTopicId);
  if (params.level !== undefined)         v[LT.LEVEL]           = Number(params.level);
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)     v[LT.SORT_ORDER]      = Number(params.sortOrder);
  if (params.iconUrl !== undefined)       v[LT.ICON_URL]        = String(params.iconUrl);
  if (params.colorHex !== undefined)      v[LT.COLOR_HEX]       = String(params.colorHex);
  if (params.featured !== undefined)      v[LT.FEATURED]        = params.featured === true || params.featured === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.status !== undefined)        v[LT.STATUS]          = String(params.status);
  v[LT.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LT_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.topics.update', LT_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Topic updated' });
}

function handleLearningTopicsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LT_TAB, LT_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Topic not found');
  deleteRow(ss, LT_TAB, hit.rowIndex);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.topics.delete', LT_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Topic deleted' });
}

/** Returns hierarchical tree structure of all topics */
function handleLearningTopicsTree(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, LT_TAB, LT_NUM_COLS);
  var all  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) all.push(learningTopicRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  all = all.filter(function(t) { return t.status === 'Active'; });
  all.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });

  var roots = [];
  var map   = {};
  for (var j = 0; j < all.length; j++) { all[j].children = []; map[all[j].id] = all[j]; }
  for (var k = 0; k < all.length; k++) {
    if (all[k].parentTopicId && map[all[k].parentTopicId]) {
      map[all[k].parentTopicId].children.push(all[k]);
    } else {
      roots.push(all[k]);
    }
  }
  return jsonOk(roots);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING PLAYLISTS (curated collections of sermons)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LP_TAB      = 'LearningPlaylists';
var LP_NUM_COLS = 22;

var LP = {
  ID: 0, TITLE: 1, DESCRIPTION: 2, COVER_IMAGE_URL: 3,
  CURATOR_ID: 4, CURATOR_NAME: 5,
  TOPIC_IDS: 6, TOPIC_NAMES: 7,
  PREACHER_FILTER: 8, SCRIPTURE_FILTER: 9,
  DIFFICULTY_LEVEL: 10, ESTIMATED_HOURS: 11,
  ITEM_COUNT: 12, SUBSCRIBER_COUNT: 13,
  VISIBILITY: 14, FEATURED: 15,
  SORT_ORDER: 16, TAGS: 17,
  STATUS: 18,
  CREATED_BY: 19, CREATED_AT: 20, UPDATED_AT: 21
};

function learningPlaylistRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[LP.ID] || ''),
    title:           String(vals[LP.TITLE] || ''),
    description:     String(vals[LP.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    coverImageUrl:   String(vals[LP.COVER_IMAGE_URL] || ''),
    curatorId:       String(vals[LP.CURATOR_ID] || ''),
    curatorName:     String(vals[LP.CURATOR_NAME] || ''),
    topicIds:        String(vals[LP.TOPIC_IDS] || ''),
    topicNames:      String(vals[LP.TOPIC_NAMES] || ''),
    preacherFilter:  String(vals[LP.PREACHER_FILTER] || ''),
    scriptureFilter: String(vals[LP.SCRIPTURE_FILTER] || ''),
    difficultyLevel: String(vals[LP.DIFFICULTY_LEVEL] || ''),
    estimatedHours:  Number(vals[LP.ESTIMATED_HOURS] || 0),
    itemCount:       Number(vals[LP.ITEM_COUNT] || 0),
    subscriberCount: Number(vals[LP.SUBSCRIBER_COUNT] || 0),
    visibility:      String(vals[LP.VISIBILITY] || ''),
    featured:        String(vals[LP.FEATURED] || 'FALSE'),
    sortOrder:       Number(vals[LP.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    tags:            String(vals[LP.TAGS] || ''),
    status:          String(vals[LP.STATUS] || ''),
    createdBy:       String(vals[LP.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[LP.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:       isoDate(vals[LP.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Playlists CRUD ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningPlaylistsPublic_(params) {
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, LP_TAB, LP_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningPlaylistRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.visibility === 'Private') continue;  // never expose private playlists publicly
    out.push(obj);
  }
  if (params.topicId)    out = out.filter(function(p) { return p.topicIds.indexOf(params.topicId) !== -1; });
  if (params.featured)   out = out.filter(function(p) { return p.featured === 'TRUE'; });
  if (params.difficulty) out = out.filter(function(p) { return p.difficultyLevel === params.difficulty; });
