  if (params.status)     out = out.filter(function(p) { return p.status === params.status; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningTopicsPublic_(params) {
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, LT_TAB, LT_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) out.push(learningTopicRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  if (params.parentId) out = out.filter(function(t) { return t.parentTopicId === params.parentId; });
  if (params.featured) out = out.filter(function(t) { return t.featured === 'TRUE'; });
  if (params.status)   out = out.filter(function(t) { return t.status === params.status; });
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningPlaylistsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, LP_TAB, LP_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningPlaylistRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.visibility === 'Private' && obj.createdBy !== auth.email) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  if (params.topicId)    out = out.filter(function(p) { return p.topicIds.indexOf(params.topicId) !== -1; });
  if (params.preacher)   out = out.filter(function(p) { return p.preacherFilter.toLowerCase().indexOf(params.preacher.toLowerCase()) !== -1; });
  if (params.featured)   out = out.filter(function(p) { return p.featured === 'TRUE'; });
  if (params.difficulty) out = out.filter(function(p) { return p.difficultyLevel === params.difficulty; });
  if (params.status)     out = out.filter(function(p) { return p.status === params.status; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningPlaylistsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LP_TAB, LP_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Playlist not found');
  var obj = learningPlaylistRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex);

  // also fetch items
  var items = allRows(ss, LPI_TAB, LPI_NUM_COLS);
  var playlistItems = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
    var it = learningPlaylistItemRowToObject(items[i], i + 2);
    if (it.playlistId === obj.id) playlistItems.push(it);
  }
  playlistItems.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });
  obj.items = playlistItems;
  return jsonOk(obj);
}

function handleLearningPlaylistsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(LP_NUM_COLS);
  row[LP.ID]               = id;
  row[LP.TITLE]            = String(params.title || '');
  row[LP.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description || '');
  row[LP.COVER_IMAGE_URL]  = String(params.coverImageUrl || '');
  row[LP.CURATOR_ID]       = auth.memberId || '';
  row[LP.CURATOR_NAME]     = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[LP.TOPIC_IDS]        = String(params.topicIds || '');
  row[LP.TOPIC_NAMES]      = String(params.topicNames || '');
  row[LP.PREACHER_FILTER]  = String(params.preacherFilter || '');
  row[LP.SCRIPTURE_FILTER] = String(params.scriptureFilter || '');
  row[LP.DIFFICULTY_LEVEL] = String(params.difficultyLevel || 'Beginner');
  row[LP.ESTIMATED_HOURS]  = Number(params.estimatedHours || 0);
  row[LP.ITEM_COUNT]       = 0;
  row[LP.SUBSCRIBER_COUNT] = 0;
  row[LP.VISIBILITY]       = String(params.visibility || 'Public');
  row[LP.FEATURED]         = params.featured === true || params.featured === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[LP.SORT_ORDER]       = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[LP.TAGS]             = String(params.tags || '');
  row[LP.STATUS]           = 'Active';
  row[LP.CREATED_BY]       = auth.email;
  row[LP.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[LP.UPDATED_AT]       = now;
  appendRow(ss, LP_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.playlists.create', LP_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Playlist created' });
}

function handleLearningPlaylistsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LP_TAB, LP_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Playlist not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (String(v[LP.CREATED_BY]) !== auth.email && auth.roleLevel < 2) return jsonErr('Cannot edit another user\'s playlist');
  if (params.title !== undefined)           v[LP.TITLE]            = String(params.title);
  if (params.description !== undefined)     v[LP.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description);
  if (params.coverImageUrl !== undefined)   v[LP.COVER_IMAGE_URL]  = String(params.coverImageUrl);
  if (params.topicIds !== undefined)        v[LP.TOPIC_IDS]        = String(params.topicIds);
  if (params.topicNames !== undefined)      v[LP.TOPIC_NAMES]      = String(params.topicNames);
  if (params.preacherFilter !== undefined)  v[LP.PREACHER_FILTER]  = String(params.preacherFilter);
  if (params.scriptureFilter !== undefined) v[LP.SCRIPTURE_FILTER] = String(params.scriptureFilter);
  if (params.difficultyLevel !== undefined) v[LP.DIFFICULTY_LEVEL] = String(params.difficultyLevel);
  if (params.estimatedHours !== undefined)  v[LP.ESTIMATED_HOURS]  = Number(params.estimatedHours);
  if (params.visibility !== undefined)      v[LP.VISIBILITY]       = String(params.visibility);
  if (params.featured !== undefined)        v[LP.FEATURED]         = params.featured === true || params.featured === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)       v[LP.SORT_ORDER]       = Number(params.sortOrder);
  if (params.tags !== undefined)            v[LP.TAGS]             = String(params.tags);
  if (params.status !== undefined)          v[LP.STATUS]           = String(params.status);
  v[LP.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LP_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.playlists.update', LP_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Playlist updated' });
}

function handleLearningPlaylistsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LP_TAB, LP_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Playlist not found');
  deleteRow(ss, LP_TAB, hit.rowIndex);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.playlists.delete', LP_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Playlist deleted' });
}

function handleLearningPlaylistsSubscribe(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LP_TAB, LP_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Playlist not found');
  hit.vals[LP.SUBSCRIBER_COUNT] = Number(hit.vals[LP.SUBSCRIBER_COUNT] || 0) + 1;
  hit.vals[LP.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LP_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.playlists.subscribe', LP_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Subscribed to playlist' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING PLAYLIST ITEMS (individual sermons within playlists, ordered)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LPI_TAB      = 'LearningPlaylistItems';
var LPI_NUM_COLS = 16;

var LPI = {
  ID: 0, PLAYLIST_ID: 1, SERMON_ID: 2,
  SERMON_TITLE: 3, PREACHER_NAME: 4, SCRIPTURE_REFS: 5,
  SORT_ORDER: 6, SECTION_LABEL: 7,
  NOTES_FOR_LEARNER: 8, DURATION_MINS: 9,
  REQUIRED: 10, BONUS: 11,
  DISCUSSION_QUESTIONS: 12,
  ADDED_BY: 13, CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function learningPlaylistItemRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:               rowIndex,
    id:                  String(vals[LPI.ID] || ''),
    playlistId:          String(vals[LPI.PLAYLIST_ID] || ''),
    sermonId:            String(vals[LPI.SERMON_ID] || ''),
    sermonTitle:         String(vals[LPI.SERMON_TITLE] || ''),
    preacherName:        String(vals[LPI.PREACHER_NAME] || ''),
    scriptureRefs:       String(vals[LPI.SCRIPTURE_REFS] || ''),
    sortOrder:           Number(vals[LPI.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    sectionLabel:        String(vals[LPI.SECTION_LABEL] || ''),
    notesForLearner:     String(vals[LPI.NOTES_FOR_LEARNER] || ''),
    durationMins:        Number(vals[LPI.DURATION_MINS] || 0),
    required:            String(vals[LPI.REQUIRED] || 'TRUE'),
    bonus:               String(vals[LPI.BONUS] || 'FALSE'),
    discussionQuestions: String(vals[LPI.DISCUSSION_QUESTIONS] || ''),
    addedBy:             String(vals[LPI.ADDED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:           isoDate(vals[LPI.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:           isoDate(vals[LPI.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Playlist Items CRUD ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningPlaylistItemsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.playlistId) return jsonErr('playlistId required');
  var data = allRows(db(), LPI_TAB, LPI_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningPlaylistItemRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.playlistId === params.playlistId) out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningPlaylistItemsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(LPI_NUM_COLS);
  row[LPI.ID]                   = id;
  row[LPI.PLAYLIST_ID]          = String(params.playlistId || '');
  row[LPI.SERMON_ID]            = String(params.sermonId || '');
  row[LPI.SERMON_TITLE]         = String(params.sermonTitle || '');
  row[LPI.PREACHER_NAME]        = String(params.preacherName || '');
  row[LPI.SCRIPTURE_REFS]       = String(params.scriptureRefs || '');
  row[LPI.SORT_ORDER]           = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[LPI.SECTION_LABEL]        = String(params.sectionLabel || '');
  row[LPI.NOTES_FOR_LEARNER]    = String(params.notesForLearner || '');
  row[LPI.DURATION_MINS]        = Number(params.durationMins || 0);
  row[LPI.REQUIRED]             = params.required === false || params.required === 'FALSE' ? 'FALSE' : 'TRUE';
  row[LPI.BONUS]                = params.bonus === true || params.bonus === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[LPI.DISCUSSION_QUESTIONS] = String(params.discussionQuestions || '');
  row[LPI.ADDED_BY]             = auth.email;
  row[LPI.CREATED_AT]           = now;
  row[LPI.UPDATED_AT]           = now;
  appendRow(ss, LPI_TAB, row);

  // increment playlist item count
  var pl = findRowById(ss, LP_TAB, LP_NUM_COLS, params.playlistId);
  if (pl) {
    pl.vals[LP.ITEM_COUNT] = Number(pl.vals[LP.ITEM_COUNT] || 0) + 1;
    pl.vals[LP.UPDATED_AT] = now;
    writeRow(ss, LP_TAB, pl.rowIndex, pl.vals);
  }

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.playlistItems.create', LPI_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Item added to playlist' });
}

function handleLearningPlaylistItemsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LPI_TAB, LPI_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Playlist item not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.sermonId !== undefined)            v[LPI.SERMON_ID]            = String(params.sermonId);
  if (params.sermonTitle !== undefined)         v[LPI.SERMON_TITLE]         = String(params.sermonTitle);
  if (params.preacherName !== undefined)        v[LPI.PREACHER_NAME]        = String(params.preacherName);
  if (params.scriptureRefs !== undefined)       v[LPI.SCRIPTURE_REFS]       = String(params.scriptureRefs);
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)           v[LPI.SORT_ORDER]           = Number(params.sortOrder);
  if (params.sectionLabel !== undefined)        v[LPI.SECTION_LABEL]        = String(params.sectionLabel);
  if (params.notesForLearner !== undefined)     v[LPI.NOTES_FOR_LEARNER]    = String(params.notesForLearner);
  if (params.durationMins !== undefined)        v[LPI.DURATION_MINS]        = Number(params.durationMins);
  if (params.required !== undefined)            v[LPI.REQUIRED]             = params.required === false || params.required === 'FALSE' ? 'FALSE' : 'TRUE';
  if (params.bonus !== undefined)               v[LPI.BONUS]                = params.bonus === true || params.bonus === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.discussionQuestions !== undefined) v[LPI.DISCUSSION_QUESTIONS] = String(params.discussionQuestions);
  v[LPI.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LPI_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.playlistItems.update', LPI_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Playlist item updated' });
}

function handleLearningPlaylistItemsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LPI_TAB, LPI_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Playlist item not found');
  var plId = String(hit.vals[LPI.PLAYLIST_ID]);
  deleteRow(ss, LPI_TAB, hit.rowIndex);

  // decrement playlist item count
  var pl = findRowById(ss, LP_TAB, LP_NUM_COLS, plId);
  if (pl) {
    pl.vals[LP.ITEM_COUNT] = Math.max(0, Number(pl.vals[LP.ITEM_COUNT] || 0) - 1);
    pl.vals[LP.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
    writeRow(ss, LP_TAB, pl.rowIndex, pl.vals);
  }

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.playlistItems.delete', LPI_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Playlist item removed' });
}

function handleLearningPlaylistItemsReorder(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  if (!params.playlistId || !params.orderedIds) return jsonErr('playlistId and orderedIds required');
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, LPI_TAB, LPI_NUM_COLS);
  var ids  = params.orderedIds;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var id  = String(data[i][LPI.ID]);
    var idx = ids.indexOf(id);
    if (idx !== -1 && String(data[i][LPI.PLAYLIST_ID]) === params.playlistId) {
      data[i][LPI.SORT_ORDER] = idx + 1;
      data[i][LPI.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      writeRow(ss, LPI_TAB, i + 2, data[i]);
    }
  }
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.playlistItems.reorder', LPI_TAB, params.playlistId);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Items reordered' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING PROGRESS (per-user sermon listening/viewing tracking)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LPROG_TAB      = 'LearningProgress';
var LPROG_NUM_COLS = 20;

var LPROG = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2,
  SERMON_ID: 3, SERMON_TITLE: 4,
  PLAYLIST_ID: 5, PLAYLIST_TITLE: 6,
  STATUS: 7, PROGRESS_PERCENT: 8,
  LAST_POSITION_SECS: 9, TOTAL_DURATION_SECS: 10,
  STARTED_AT: 11, COMPLETED_AT: 12,
  LISTEN_COUNT: 13, LAST_LISTENED_AT: 14,
  RATING: 15, DEVICE: 16,
  NOTES: 17,
  CREATED_AT: 18, UPDATED_AT: 19
};

function learningProgressRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:             rowIndex,
    id:                String(vals[LPROG.ID] || ''),
    memberId:          String(vals[LPROG.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:        String(vals[LPROG.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    sermonId:          String(vals[LPROG.SERMON_ID] || ''),
    sermonTitle:       String(vals[LPROG.SERMON_TITLE] || ''),
    playlistId:        String(vals[LPROG.PLAYLIST_ID] || ''),
    playlistTitle:     String(vals[LPROG.PLAYLIST_TITLE] || ''),
    status:            String(vals[LPROG.STATUS] || ''),
    progressPercent:   Number(vals[LPROG.PROGRESS_PERCENT] || 0),
    lastPositionSecs:  Number(vals[LPROG.LAST_POSITION_SECS] || 0),
    totalDurationSecs: Number(vals[LPROG.TOTAL_DURATION_SECS] || 0),
    startedAt:         isoDate(vals[LPROG.STARTED_AT]),
    completedAt:       isoDate(vals[LPROG.COMPLETED_AT]),
    listenCount:       Number(vals[LPROG.LISTEN_COUNT] || 0),
    lastListenedAt:    isoDate(vals[LPROG.LAST_LISTENED_AT]),
    rating:            Number(vals[LPROG.RATING] || 0),
    device:            String(vals[LPROG.DEVICE] || ''),
    notes:             String(vals[LPROG.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:         isoDate(vals[LPROG.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:         isoDate(vals[LPROG.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Progress handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningProgressList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), LPROG_TAB, LPROG_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  var targetMember = params.memberId || (auth.memberId || '');
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningProgressRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (auth.roleLevel < 2 && obj.memberId !== targetMember) continue;
    if (params.memberId && obj.memberId !== params.memberId) continue;
    if (params.sermonId && obj.sermonId !== params.sermonId) continue;
    if (params.playlistId && obj.playlistId !== params.playlistId) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningProgressGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), LPROG_TAB, LPROG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Progress record not found');
  var obj = learningProgressRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex);
  if (auth.roleLevel < 2 && obj.memberId !== (auth.memberId || '')) return jsonErr('Access denied');
  return jsonOk(obj);
}

function handleLearningProgressUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var now = new Date();

  // Find or create a progress record for this sermon + member
  var memberId = auth.memberId || '';
  var data     = allRows(ss, LPROG_TAB, LPROG_NUM_COLS);
  var hit      = null;

  if (params.id) {
    hit = findRowById(ss, LPROG_TAB, LPROG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  } else if (params.sermonId) {
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      if (String(data[i][LPROG.MEMBER_ID]) === memberId &&
          String(data[i][LPROG.SERMON_ID]) === params.sermonId &&
          (!params.playlistId || String(data[i][LPROG.PLAYLIST_ID]) === params.playlistId)) {
        hit = { vals: data[i], rowIndex: i + 2 };
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  if (!hit) {
    // Auto-create if first time
    var id  = newId();
    var row = blankRow(LPROG_NUM_COLS);
    row[LPROG.ID]                 = id;
    row[LPROG.MEMBER_ID]          = memberId;
    row[LPROG.MEMBER_NAME]        = auth.displayName || auth.email;
    row[LPROG.SERMON_ID]          = String(params.sermonId || '');
    row[LPROG.SERMON_TITLE]       = String(params.sermonTitle || '');
    row[LPROG.PLAYLIST_ID]        = String(params.playlistId || '');
    row[LPROG.PLAYLIST_TITLE]     = String(params.playlistTitle || '');
    row[LPROG.STATUS]             = 'In Progress';
    row[LPROG.PROGRESS_PERCENT]   = Number(params.progressPercent || 0);
    row[LPROG.LAST_POSITION_SECS] = Number(params.lastPositionSecs || 0);
    row[LPROG.TOTAL_DURATION_SECS]= Number(params.totalDurationSecs || 0);
    row[LPROG.STARTED_AT]         = now;
    row[LPROG.LISTEN_COUNT]       = 1;
    row[LPROG.LAST_LISTENED_AT]   = now;
    row[LPROG.RATING]             = Number(params.rating || 0);
    row[LPROG.DEVICE]             = String(params.device || '');
    row[LPROG.NOTES]              = String(params.notes || '');
    row[LPROG.CREATED_AT]         = now;
    row[LPROG.UPDATED_AT]         = now;
    appendRow(ss, LPROG_TAB, row);
    auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.progress.create', LPROG_TAB, id);
    return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Progress started' });
  }

  // Update existing
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (auth.roleLevel < 2 && String(v[LPROG.MEMBER_ID]) !== memberId) return jsonErr('Access denied');
  if (params.progressPercent !== undefined)  v[LPROG.PROGRESS_PERCENT]   = Number(params.progressPercent);
  if (params.lastPositionSecs !== undefined) v[LPROG.LAST_POSITION_SECS] = Number(params.lastPositionSecs);
  if (params.totalDurationSecs !== undefined)v[LPROG.TOTAL_DURATION_SECS]= Number(params.totalDurationSecs);
  if (params.rating !== undefined)           v[LPROG.RATING]             = Number(params.rating);
  if (params.device !== undefined)           v[LPROG.DEVICE]             = String(params.device);
  if (params.notes !== undefined)            v[LPROG.NOTES]              = String(params.notes);
  v[LPROG.LISTEN_COUNT]    = Number(v[LPROG.LISTEN_COUNT] || 0) + 1;
  v[LPROG.LAST_LISTENED_AT]= now;
  v[LPROG.UPDATED_AT]      = now;

  // Auto-complete at 100%
  if (Number(v[LPROG.PROGRESS_PERCENT]) >= 100) {
    v[LPROG.STATUS]       = 'Completed';
    v[LPROG.COMPLETED_AT] = now;
    v[LPROG.PROGRESS_PERCENT] = 100;
  } else {
    v[LPROG.STATUS] = 'In Progress';
  }

  writeRow(ss, LPROG_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.progress.update', LPROG_TAB, String(v[LPROG.ID]));
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Progress updated', status: String(v[LPROG.STATUS]) });
}

/** Mark a sermon as completed */
function handleLearningProgressComplete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  params.progressPercent = 100;
  return handleLearningProgressUpdate(params, auth);
}

/** Get user's overall learning stats */
function handleLearningProgressStats(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var memberId = params.memberId || (auth.memberId || '');
  if (auth.roleLevel < 2 && memberId !== (auth.memberId || '')) return jsonErr('Access denied');
  var data = allRows(db(), LPROG_TAB, LPROG_NUM_COLS);
  var completed = 0, inProgress = 0, totalListens = 0, totalMins = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][LPROG.MEMBER_ID]) !== memberId) continue;
    var s = String(data[i][LPROG.STATUS]);
    if (s === 'Completed') completed++;
    else if (s === 'In Progress') inProgress++;
    totalListens += Number(data[i][LPROG.LISTEN_COUNT] || 0);
    totalMins    += Math.round(Number(data[i][LPROG.TOTAL_DURATION_SECS] || 0) / 60);
  }
  return jsonOk({
    memberId:      memberId,
    completed:     completed,
    inProgress:    inProgress,
    totalSermons:  completed + inProgress,
    totalListens:  totalListens,
    totalMinutes:  totalMins
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING NOTES (personal notes on sermons)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LN_TAB      = 'LearningNotes';
var LN_NUM_COLS = 16;

var LN = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2,
  SERMON_ID: 3, SERMON_TITLE: 4,
  PLAYLIST_ID: 5,
  NOTE_TYPE: 6, TITLE: 7, CONTENT: 8,
  TIMESTAMP_SECS: 9, SCRIPTURE_REF: 10,
  HIGHLIGHT_TEXT: 11,
  SHARED: 12, PINNED: 13,
  CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function learningNoteRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[LN.ID] || ''),
    memberId:       String(vals[LN.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:     String(vals[LN.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    sermonId:       String(vals[LN.SERMON_ID] || ''),
    sermonTitle:    String(vals[LN.SERMON_TITLE] || ''),
    playlistId:     String(vals[LN.PLAYLIST_ID] || ''),
    noteType:       String(vals[LN.NOTE_TYPE] || ''),
    title:          String(vals[LN.TITLE] || ''),
    content:        String(vals[LN.CONTENT] || ''),
    timestampSecs:  Number(vals[LN.TIMESTAMP_SECS] || 0),
    scriptureRef:   String(vals[LN.SCRIPTURE_REF] || ''),
    highlightText:  String(vals[LN.HIGHLIGHT_TEXT] || ''),
    shared:         String(vals[LN.SHARED] || 'FALSE'),
    pinned:         String(vals[LN.PINNED] || 'FALSE'),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[LN.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[LN.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Notes CRUD ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningNotesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var memberId = auth.memberId || '';
  var data = allRows(db(), LN_TAB, LN_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningNoteRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    // own notes + shared notes visible
    if (obj.memberId !== memberId && obj.shared !== 'TRUE' && auth.roleLevel < 2) continue;
    if (params.sermonId && obj.sermonId !== params.sermonId) continue;
    if (params.playlistId && obj.playlistId !== params.playlistId) continue;
    if (params.noteType && obj.noteType !== params.noteType) continue;
    if (params.pinned && obj.pinned !== 'TRUE') continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningNotesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), LN_TAB, LN_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Note not found');
  var obj = learningNoteRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex);
  if (obj.memberId !== (auth.memberId || '') && obj.shared !== 'TRUE' && auth.roleLevel < 2)
    return jsonErr('Access denied');
  return jsonOk(obj);
}

function handleLearningNotesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(LN_NUM_COLS);
  row[LN.ID]             = id;
  row[LN.MEMBER_ID]      = auth.memberId || '';
  row[LN.MEMBER_NAME]    = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[LN.SERMON_ID]      = String(params.sermonId || '');
  row[LN.SERMON_TITLE]   = String(params.sermonTitle || '');
  row[LN.PLAYLIST_ID]    = String(params.playlistId || '');
  row[LN.NOTE_TYPE]      = String(params.noteType || 'General');
  row[LN.TITLE]          = String(params.title || '');
  row[LN.CONTENT]        = String(params.content || '');
  row[LN.TIMESTAMP_SECS] = Number(params.timestampSecs || 0);
  row[LN.SCRIPTURE_REF]  = String(params.scriptureRef || '');
  row[LN.HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]  = String(params.highlightText || '');
  row[LN.SHARED]         = params.shared === true || params.shared === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[LN.PINNED]         = params.pinned === true || params.pinned === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[LN.CREATED_AT]     = now;
  row[LN.UPDATED_AT]     = now;
  appendRow(ss, LN_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.notes.create', LN_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Note created' });
}

function handleLearningNotesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LN_TAB, LN_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Note not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (String(v[LN.MEMBER_ID]) !== (auth.memberId || '') && auth.roleLevel < 3)
    return jsonErr('Cannot edit another user\'s note');
  if (params.noteType !== undefined)      v[LN.NOTE_TYPE]      = String(params.noteType);
  if (params.title !== undefined)         v[LN.TITLE]          = String(params.title);
  if (params.content !== undefined)       v[LN.CONTENT]        = String(params.content);
  if (params.timestampSecs !== undefined) v[LN.TIMESTAMP_SECS] = Number(params.timestampSecs);
  if (params.scriptureRef !== undefined)  v[LN.SCRIPTURE_REF]  = String(params.scriptureRef);
  if (params.highlightText !== undefined) v[LN.HIGHLIGHT_TEXT]  = String(params.highlightText);
  if (params.shared !== undefined)        v[LN.SHARED]         = params.shared === true || params.shared === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.pinned !== undefined)        v[LN.PINNED]         = params.pinned === true || params.pinned === 'TRUE' ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  v[LN.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LN_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.notes.update', LN_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Note updated' });
}

function handleLearningNotesDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LN_TAB, LN_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Note not found');
  if (String(hit.vals[LN.MEMBER_ID]) !== (auth.memberId || '') && auth.roleLevel < 3)
    return jsonErr('Cannot delete another user\'s note');
  deleteRow(ss, LN_TAB, hit.rowIndex);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.notes.delete', LN_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Note deleted' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING BOOKMARKS (save sermons for later)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LB_TAB      = 'LearningBookmarks';
var LB_NUM_COLS = 14;

var LB = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2,
  SERMON_ID: 3, SERMON_TITLE: 4, PREACHER_NAME: 5,
  COLLECTION: 6, TAGS: 7, NOTES: 8,
  POSITION_SECS: 9, PRIORITY: 10,
  REMINDER_DATE: 11,
  CREATED_AT: 12, UPDATED_AT: 13
};

function learningBookmarkRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:        rowIndex,
    id:           String(vals[LB.ID] || ''),
    memberId:     String(vals[LB.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:   String(vals[LB.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    sermonId:     String(vals[LB.SERMON_ID] || ''),
    sermonTitle:  String(vals[LB.SERMON_TITLE] || ''),
    preacherName: String(vals[LB.PREACHER_NAME] || ''),
    collection:   String(vals[LB.COLLECTION] || ''),
    tags:         String(vals[LB.TAGS] || ''),
    notes:        String(vals[LB.NOTES] || ''),
    positionSecs: Number(vals[LB.POSITION_SECS] || 0),
    priority:     String(vals[LB.PRIORITY] || 'Normal'),
    reminderDate: isoDate(vals[LB.REMINDER_DATE]),
    createdAt:    isoDate(vals[LB.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:    isoDate(vals[LB.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Bookmarks CRUD ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningBookmarksList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var memberId = params.memberId || (auth.memberId || '');
  if (auth.roleLevel < 2 && memberId !== (auth.memberId || '')) return jsonErr('Access denied');
  var data = allRows(db(), LB_TAB, LB_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningBookmarkRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.memberId !== memberId) continue;
    if (params.collection && obj.collection !== params.collection) continue;
    if (params.tag) {
      var tags = obj.tags.toLowerCase().split(',');
      if (tags.indexOf(params.tag.toLowerCase()) === -1) continue;
    }
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningBookmarksCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(LB_NUM_COLS);
  row[LB.ID]            = id;
  row[LB.MEMBER_ID]     = auth.memberId || '';
  row[LB.MEMBER_NAME]   = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[LB.SERMON_ID]     = String(params.sermonId || '');
  row[LB.SERMON_TITLE]  = String(params.sermonTitle || '');
  row[LB.PREACHER_NAME] = String(params.preacherName || '');
  row[LB.COLLECTION]    = String(params.collection || 'Watch Later');
  row[LB.TAGS]          = String(params.tags || '');
  row[LB.NOTES]         = String(params.notes || '');
  row[LB.POSITION_SECS] = Number(params.positionSecs || 0);
  row[LB.PRIORITY]      = String(params.priority || 'Normal');
  row[LB.REMINDER_DATE] = params.reminderDate || '';
  row[LB.CREATED_AT]    = now;
  row[LB.UPDATED_AT]    = now;
  appendRow(ss, LB_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.bookmarks.create', LB_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Bookmark created' });
}

function handleLearningBookmarksUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LB_TAB, LB_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Bookmark not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (String(v[LB.MEMBER_ID]) !== (auth.memberId || '') && auth.roleLevel < 3)
    return jsonErr('Cannot edit another user\'s bookmark');
  if (params.collection !== undefined)   v[LB.COLLECTION]    = String(params.collection);
  if (params.tags !== undefined)         v[LB.TAGS]          = String(params.tags);
  if (params.notes !== undefined)        v[LB.NOTES]         = String(params.notes);
  if (params.positionSecs !== undefined) v[LB.POSITION_SECS] = Number(params.positionSecs);
  if (params.priority !== undefined)     v[LB.PRIORITY]      = String(params.priority);
  if (params.reminderDate !== undefined) v[LB.REMINDER_DATE] = params.reminderDate;
  v[LB.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LB_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.bookmarks.update', LB_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Bookmark updated' });
}

function handleLearningBookmarksDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LB_TAB, LB_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Bookmark not found');
  if (String(hit.vals[LB.MEMBER_ID]) !== (auth.memberId || '') && auth.roleLevel < 3)
    return jsonErr('Cannot delete another user\'s bookmark');
  deleteRow(ss, LB_TAB, hit.rowIndex);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.bookmarks.delete', LB_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Bookmark removed' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING RECOMMENDATIONS (suggested sermons for members)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LR_TAB      = 'LearningRecommendations';
var LR_NUM_COLS = 18;

var LR = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2,
  SERMON_ID: 3, SERMON_TITLE: 4, PREACHER_NAME: 5,
  REASON_TYPE: 6, REASON_TEXT: 7,
  TOPIC_MATCH: 8, SCRIPTURE_MATCH: 9,
  SCORE: 10, PRIORITY: 11,
  STATUS: 12, DISMISSED_AT: 13,
  RECOMMENDED_BY: 14, RECOMMENDED_BY_NAME: 15,
  CREATED_AT: 16, UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function learningRecommendationRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:             rowIndex,
    id:                String(vals[LR.ID] || ''),
    memberId:          String(vals[LR.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:        String(vals[LR.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    sermonId:          String(vals[LR.SERMON_ID] || ''),
    sermonTitle:       String(vals[LR.SERMON_TITLE] || ''),
    preacherName:      String(vals[LR.PREACHER_NAME] || ''),
    reasonType:        String(vals[LR.REASON_TYPE] || ''),
    reasonText:        String(vals[LR.REASON_TEXT] || ''),
    topicMatch:        String(vals[LR.TOPIC_MATCH] || ''),
    scriptureMatch:    String(vals[LR.SCRIPTURE_MATCH] || ''),
    score:             Number(vals[LR.SCORE] || 0),
    priority:          String(vals[LR.PRIORITY] || 'Normal'),
    status:            String(vals[LR.STATUS] || ''),
    dismissedAt:       isoDate(vals[LR.DISMISSED_AT]),
    recommendedBy:     String(vals[LR.RECOMMENDED_BY] || ''),
    recommendedByName: String(vals[LR.RECOMMENDED_BY_NAME] || ''),
    createdAt:         isoDate(vals[LR.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:         isoDate(vals[LR.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Recommendations handlers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningRecommendationsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var memberId = params.memberId || (auth.memberId || '');
  if (auth.roleLevel < 2 && memberId !== (auth.memberId || '')) return jsonErr('Access denied');
  var data = allRows(db(), LR_TAB, LR_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningRecommendationRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.memberId !== memberId) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    if (!params.includeDismissed && obj.status === 'Dismissed') continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return b.score - a.score; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningRecommendationsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(LR_NUM_COLS);
  row[LR.ID]                  = id;
  row[LR.MEMBER_ID]           = String(params.memberId || '');
  row[LR.MEMBER_NAME]         = String(params.memberName || '');
  row[LR.SERMON_ID]           = String(params.sermonId || '');
  row[LR.SERMON_TITLE]        = String(params.sermonTitle || '');
  row[LR.PREACHER_NAME]       = String(params.preacherName || '');
  row[LR.REASON_TYPE]         = String(params.reasonType || 'Manual');
  row[LR.REASON_TEXT]         = String(params.reasonText || '');
  row[LR.TOPIC_MATCH]         = String(params.topicMatch || '');
  row[LR.SCRIPTURE_MATCH]     = String(params.scriptureMatch || '');
  row[LR.SCORE]               = Number(params.score || 50);
  row[LR.PRIORITY]            = String(params.priority || 'Normal');
  row[LR.STATUS]              = 'Active';
  row[LR.RECOMMENDED_BY]      = auth.email;
  row[LR.RECOMMENDED_BY_NAME] = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[LR.CREATED_AT]          = now;
  row[LR.UPDATED_AT]          = now;
  appendRow(ss, LR_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.recommendations.create', LR_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Recommendation created' });
}

function handleLearningRecommendationsDismiss(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LR_TAB, LR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Recommendation not found');
  if (String(hit.vals[LR.MEMBER_ID]) !== (auth.memberId || '') && auth.roleLevel < 2)
    return jsonErr('Access denied');
  hit.vals[LR.STATUS]       = 'Dismissed';
  hit.vals[LR.DISMISSED_AT] = new Date();
  hit.vals[LR.UPDATED_AT]   = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LR_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.recommendations.dismiss', LR_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Recommendation dismissed' });
}

function handleLearningRecommendationsAccept(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LR_TAB, LR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Recommendation not found');
  if (String(hit.vals[LR.MEMBER_ID]) !== (auth.memberId || '') && auth.roleLevel < 2)
    return jsonErr('Access denied');
  hit.vals[LR.STATUS]     = 'Accepted';
  hit.vals[LR.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LR_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.recommendations.accept', LR_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Recommendation accepted' });
}

/** Auto-generate recommendations based on a member's listening history & topics */
function handleLearningRecommendationsGenerate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var ss       = db();
  var memberId = params.memberId || (auth.memberId || '');

  // Collect member's completed sermon IDs and topics
  var progress = allRows(ss, LPROG_TAB, LPROG_NUM_COLS);
  var listenedSermonIds = {};
  var topicFreq = {};
  var preacherFreq = {};

  for (var p = 0; p < progress.length; p++) {
    if (String(progress[p][LPROG.MEMBER_ID]) !== memberId) continue;
    var sid = String(progress[p][LPROG.SERMON_ID]);
    listenedSermonIds[sid] = true;
  }

  // Pull sermon metadata for listened sermons
  var sermons = allRows(ss, 'Sermons', 22);
  for (var s = 0; s < sermons.length; s++) {
    var sermonId = String(sermons[s][0]);
    if (!listenedSermonIds[sermonId]) continue;
    var topics = String(sermons[s][9] || '').split(',');
    for (var t = 0; t < topics.length; t++) {
      var topic = topics[t].trim();
      if (topic) topicFreq[topic] = (topicFreq[topic] || 0) + 1;
    }
    var preacher = String(sermons[s][3] || '').trim();
    if (preacher) preacherFreq[preacher] = (preacherFreq[preacher] || 0) + 1;
  }

  // Score sermons they haven't heard
  var candidates = [];
  for (var c = 0; c < sermons.length; c++) {
    var cid = String(sermons[c][0]);
    if (listenedSermonIds[cid]) continue;
    if (String(sermons[c][17]) !== 'Published' && String(sermons[c][17]) !== 'Delivered') continue;
    var score     = 0;
    var reasons   = [];
    var cTopics   = String(sermons[c][9] || '').split(',');
    for (var ct = 0; ct < cTopics.length; ct++) {
      var cTopic = cTopics[ct].trim();
      if (cTopic && topicFreq[cTopic]) {
        score += topicFreq[cTopic] * 10;
        reasons.push('topic: ' + cTopic);
      }
    }
    var cPreacher = String(sermons[c][3] || '').trim();
    if (cPreacher && preacherFreq[cPreacher]) {
      score += preacherFreq[cPreacher] * 5;
      reasons.push('preacher: ' + cPreacher);
    }
    if (score > 0) {
      candidates.push({
        sermonId:      cid,
        sermonTitle:   String(sermons[c][1] || ''),
        preacherName:  cPreacher,
        score:         score,
        topicMatch:    reasons.filter(function(r) { return r.indexOf('topic:') === 0; }).join(', '),
        scriptureMatch:String(sermons[c][8] || ''),
        reasonText:    reasons.join('; ')
      });
    }
  }

  candidates.sort(function(a, b) { return b.score - a.score; });
  var limit = Number(params.limit || 10);
  candidates = candidates.slice(0, limit);

  // Write recommendations
  var created = 0;
  var now = new Date();
  for (var r = 0; r < candidates.length; r++) {
    var rec  = candidates[r];
    var rId  = newId();
    var rRow = blankRow(LR_NUM_COLS);
    rRow[LR.ID]                  = rId;
    rRow[LR.MEMBER_ID]           = memberId;
    rRow[LR.MEMBER_NAME]         = params.memberName || '';
    rRow[LR.SERMON_ID]           = rec.sermonId;
    rRow[LR.SERMON_TITLE]        = rec.sermonTitle;
    rRow[LR.PREACHER_NAME]       = rec.preacherName;
    rRow[LR.REASON_TYPE]         = 'Auto-Generated';
    rRow[LR.REASON_TEXT]         = rec.reasonText;
    rRow[LR.TOPIC_MATCH]         = rec.topicMatch;
    rRow[LR.SCRIPTURE_MATCH]     = rec.scriptureMatch;
    rRow[LR.SCORE]               = rec.score;
    rRow[LR.PRIORITY]            = 'Normal';
    rRow[LR.STATUS]              = 'Active';
    rRow[LR.RECOMMENDED_BY]      = 'SYSTEM';
    rRow[LR.RECOMMENDED_BY_NAME] = 'Auto-Recommend';
    rRow[LR.CREATED_AT]          = now;
    rRow[LR.UPDATED_AT]          = now;
    appendRow(ss, LR_TAB, rRow);
    created++;
  }

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.recommendations.generate', LR_TAB, memberId);
  return jsonOk({ created: created, message: created + ' recommendations generated' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING QUIZZES (comprehension checks on sermons)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LQ_TAB      = 'LearningQuizzes';
var LQ_NUM_COLS = 18;

var LQ = {
  ID: 0, SERMON_ID: 1, SERMON_TITLE: 2,
  PLAYLIST_ID: 3, TITLE: 4, DESCRIPTION: 5,
  DIFFICULTY: 6, PASS_PERCENT: 7,
  QUESTIONS_JSON: 8, QUESTION_COUNT: 9,
  TIME_LIMIT_MINS: 10, ATTEMPTS_ALLOWED: 11,
  TOPIC_TAGS: 12, SCRIPTURE_REFS: 13,
  STATUS: 14, CREATED_BY: 15,
  CREATED_AT: 16, UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function learningQuizRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[LQ.ID] || ''),
    sermonId:        String(vals[LQ.SERMON_ID] || ''),
    sermonTitle:     String(vals[LQ.SERMON_TITLE] || ''),
    playlistId:      String(vals[LQ.PLAYLIST_ID] || ''),
    title:           String(vals[LQ.TITLE] || ''),
    description:     String(vals[LQ.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    difficulty:      String(vals[LQ.DIFFICULTY] || ''),
    passPercent:     Number(vals[LQ.PASS_PERCENT] || 70),
    questionsJson:   String(vals[LQ.QUESTIONS_JSON] || '[]'),
    questionCount:   Number(vals[LQ.QUESTION_COUNT] || 0),
    timeLimitMins:   Number(vals[LQ.TIME_LIMIT_MINS] || 0),
    attemptsAllowed: Number(vals[LQ.ATTEMPTS_ALLOWED] || 3),
    topicTags:       String(vals[LQ.TOPIC_TAGS] || ''),
    scriptureRefs:   String(vals[LQ.SCRIPTURE_REFS] || ''),
    status:          String(vals[LQ.STATUS] || ''),
    createdBy:       String(vals[LQ.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[LQ.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:       isoDate(vals[LQ.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Quiz CRUD ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningQuizzesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), LQ_TAB, LQ_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningQuizRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.sermonId && obj.sermonId !== params.sermonId) continue;
    if (params.playlistId && obj.playlistId !== params.playlistId) continue;
    if (params.difficulty && obj.difficulty !== params.difficulty) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningQuizzesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), LQ_TAB, LQ_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Quiz not found');
  return jsonOk(learningQuizRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleLearningQuizzesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(LQ_NUM_COLS);
  row[LQ.ID]               = id;
  row[LQ.SERMON_ID]        = String(params.sermonId || '');
  row[LQ.SERMON_TITLE]     = String(params.sermonTitle || '');
  row[LQ.PLAYLIST_ID]      = String(params.playlistId || '');
  row[LQ.TITLE]            = String(params.title || '');
  row[LQ.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description || '');
  row[LQ.DIFFICULTY]       = String(params.difficulty || 'Beginner');
  row[LQ.PASS_PERCENT]     = Number(params.passPercent || 70);
  row[LQ.QUESTIONS_JSON]   = String(params.questionsJson || '[]');
  row[LQ.QUESTION_COUNT]   = Number(params.questionCount || 0);
  row[LQ.TIME_LIMIT_MINS]  = Number(params.timeLimitMins || 0);
  row[LQ.ATTEMPTS_ALLOWED] = Number(params.attemptsAllowed || 3);
  row[LQ.TOPIC_TAGS]       = String(params.topicTags || '');
  row[LQ.SCRIPTURE_REFS]   = String(params.scriptureRefs || '');
  row[LQ.STATUS]           = 'Draft';
  row[LQ.CREATED_BY]       = auth.email;
  row[LQ.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[LQ.UPDATED_AT]       = now;
  appendRow(ss, LQ_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.quizzes.create', LQ_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Quiz created' });
}

function handleLearningQuizzesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LQ_TAB, LQ_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Quiz not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.title !== undefined)           v[LQ.TITLE]            = String(params.title);
  if (params.description !== undefined)     v[LQ.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description);
  if (params.difficulty !== undefined)      v[LQ.DIFFICULTY]       = String(params.difficulty);
  if (params.passPercent !== undefined)     v[LQ.PASS_PERCENT]     = Number(params.passPercent);
  if (params.questionsJson !== undefined)   v[LQ.QUESTIONS_JSON]   = String(params.questionsJson);
  if (params.questionCount !== undefined)   v[LQ.QUESTION_COUNT]   = Number(params.questionCount);
  if (params.timeLimitMins !== undefined)   v[LQ.TIME_LIMIT_MINS]  = Number(params.timeLimitMins);
  if (params.attemptsAllowed !== undefined) v[LQ.ATTEMPTS_ALLOWED] = Number(params.attemptsAllowed);
  if (params.topicTags !== undefined)       v[LQ.TOPIC_TAGS]       = String(params.topicTags);
  if (params.scriptureRefs !== undefined)   v[LQ.SCRIPTURE_REFS]   = String(params.scriptureRefs);
  if (params.status !== undefined)          v[LQ.STATUS]           = String(params.status);
  v[LQ.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LQ_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.quizzes.update', LQ_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Quiz updated' });
}

function handleLearningQuizzesPublish(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LQ_TAB, LQ_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Quiz not found');
  hit.vals[LQ.STATUS]     = 'Published';
  hit.vals[LQ.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LQ_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.quizzes.publish', LQ_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Quiz published' });
}

function handleLearningQuizzesDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LQ_TAB, LQ_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Quiz not found');
  deleteRow(ss, LQ_TAB, hit.rowIndex);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.quizzes.delete', LQ_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Quiz deleted' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING QUIZ RESULTS (member quiz attempts & scores)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LQR_TAB      = 'LearningQuizResults';
var LQR_NUM_COLS = 18;

var LQR = {
  ID: 0, QUIZ_ID: 1, QUIZ_TITLE: 2,
  MEMBER_ID: 3, MEMBER_NAME: 4,
  SERMON_ID: 5, ATTEMPT_NUMBER: 6,
  STARTED_AT: 7, COMPLETED_AT: 8,
  TIME_TAKEN_SECS: 9,
  ANSWERS_JSON: 10, CORRECT_COUNT: 11,
  TOTAL_QUESTIONS: 12, SCORE_PERCENT: 13,
  PASSED: 14, FEEDBACK: 15,
  CREATED_AT: 16, UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function learningQuizResultRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[LQR.ID] || ''),
    quizId:         String(vals[LQR.QUIZ_ID] || ''),
    quizTitle:      String(vals[LQR.QUIZ_TITLE] || ''),
    memberId:       String(vals[LQR.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:     String(vals[LQR.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    sermonId:       String(vals[LQR.SERMON_ID] || ''),
    attemptNumber:  Number(vals[LQR.ATTEMPT_NUMBER] || 1),
    startedAt:      isoDate(vals[LQR.STARTED_AT]),
    completedAt:    isoDate(vals[LQR.COMPLETED_AT]),
    timeTakenSecs:  Number(vals[LQR.TIME_TAKEN_SECS] || 0),
    answersJson:    String(vals[LQR.ANSWERS_JSON] || '[]'),
    correctCount:   Number(vals[LQR.CORRECT_COUNT] || 0),
    totalQuestions:  Number(vals[LQR.TOTAL_QUESTIONS] || 0),
    scorePercent:   Number(vals[LQR.SCORE_PERCENT] || 0),
    passed:         String(vals[LQR.PASSED] || 'FALSE'),
    feedback:       String(vals[LQR.FEEDBACK] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[LQR.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[LQR.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Quiz Results handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningQuizResultsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var memberId = params.memberId || (auth.memberId || '');
  if (auth.roleLevel < 2 && memberId !== (auth.memberId || '')) return jsonErr('Access denied');
  var data = allRows(db(), LQR_TAB, LQR_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningQuizResultRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.memberId !== memberId) continue;
    if (params.quizId && obj.quizId !== params.quizId) continue;
    if (params.sermonId && obj.sermonId !== params.sermonId) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningQuizResultsSubmit(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var now = new Date();

  // Validate quiz exists
  var quiz = findRowById(ss, LQ_TAB, LQ_NUM_COLS, params.quizId);
  if (!quiz) return jsonErr('Quiz not found');
  var quizObj = learningQuizRowToObject(quiz.vals, quiz.rowIndex);
  if (quizObj.status !== 'Published') return jsonErr('Quiz not available');

  // Check attempt count
  var memberId = auth.memberId || '';
  var existingResults = allRows(ss, LQR_TAB, LQR_NUM_COLS);
  var attemptCount = 0;
  for (var e = 0; e < existingResults.length; e++) {
    if (String(existingResults[e][LQR.QUIZ_ID]) === params.quizId &&
        String(existingResults[e][LQR.MEMBER_ID]) === memberId) {
      attemptCount++;
    }
  }
  if (quizObj.attemptsAllowed > 0 && attemptCount >= quizObj.attemptsAllowed) {
    return jsonErr('Maximum attempts reached (' + quizObj.attemptsAllowed + ')');
  }

  // Grade the answers
  var questions = [];
  try { questions = JSON.parse(quizObj.questionsJson); } catch(ex) { /* ignore */ }
  var answers   = params.answers || [];
  var correct   = 0;
  for (var q = 0; q < questions.length; q++) {
    if (answers[q] !== undefined && String(answers[q]) === String(questions[q].correctAnswer)) {
      correct++;
    }
  }
  var total       = questions.length || 1;
  var scorePct    = Math.round((correct / total) * 100);
  var passed      = scorePct >= quizObj.passPercent;

  var id  = newId();
  var row = blankRow(LQR_NUM_COLS);
  row[LQR.ID]              = id;
  row[LQR.QUIZ_ID]         = params.quizId;
  row[LQR.QUIZ_TITLE]      = quizObj.title;
  row[LQR.MEMBER_ID]       = memberId;
  row[LQR.MEMBER_NAME]     = auth.displayName || auth.email;
  row[LQR.SERMON_ID]       = quizObj.sermonId;
  row[LQR.ATTEMPT_NUMBER]  = attemptCount + 1;
  row[LQR.STARTED_AT]      = params.startedAt || now;
  row[LQR.COMPLETED_AT]    = now;
  row[LQR.TIME_TAKEN_SECS] = Number(params.timeTakenSecs || 0);
  row[LQR.ANSWERS_JSON]    = JSON.stringify(answers);
  row[LQR.CORRECT_COUNT]   = correct;
  row[LQR.TOTAL_QUESTIONS]  = total;
  row[LQR.SCORE_PERCENT]   = scorePct;
  row[LQR.PASSED]          = passed ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[LQR.FEEDBACK]        = '';
  row[LQR.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  row[LQR.UPDATED_AT]      = now;
  appendRow(ss, LQR_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.quizResults.submit', LQR_TAB, id);

  return jsonOk({
    id:            id,
    scorePercent:  scorePct,
    correctCount:  correct,
    totalQuestions: total,
    passed:        passed,
    attemptNumber: attemptCount + 1,
    message:       passed ? 'Congratulations! You passed.' : 'Try again — you need ' + quizObj.passPercent + '% to pass.'
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING CERTIFICATES (issued on playlist / quiz completion)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var LC_TAB      = 'LearningCertificates';
var LC_NUM_COLS = 16;

var LC = {
  ID: 0, MEMBER_ID: 1, MEMBER_NAME: 2,
  CERTIFICATE_TYPE: 3, PLAYLIST_ID: 4, PLAYLIST_TITLE: 5,
  QUIZ_ID: 6, QUIZ_TITLE: 7,
  CERTIFICATE_NUMBER: 8, ISSUE_DATE: 9,
  ISSUED_BY: 10, EXPIRY_DATE: 11,
  STATUS: 12, NOTES: 13,
  CREATED_AT: 14, UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function learningCertificateRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:             rowIndex,
    id:                String(vals[LC.ID] || ''),
    memberId:          String(vals[LC.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    memberName:        String(vals[LC.MEMBER_NAME] || ''),
    certificateType:   String(vals[LC.CERTIFICATE_TYPE] || ''),
    playlistId:        String(vals[LC.PLAYLIST_ID] || ''),
    playlistTitle:     String(vals[LC.PLAYLIST_TITLE] || ''),
    quizId:            String(vals[LC.QUIZ_ID] || ''),
    quizTitle:         String(vals[LC.QUIZ_TITLE] || ''),
    certificateNumber: String(vals[LC.CERTIFICATE_NUMBER] || ''),
    issueDate:         isoDate(vals[LC.ISSUE_DATE]),
    issuedBy:          String(vals[LC.ISSUED_BY] || ''),
    expiryDate:        isoDate(vals[LC.EXPIRY_DATE]),
    status:            String(vals[LC.STATUS] || ''),
    notes:             String(vals[LC.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:         isoDate(vals[LC.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:         isoDate(vals[LC.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Certificates handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleLearningCertificatesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var memberId = params.memberId || (auth.memberId || '');
  if (auth.roleLevel < 2 && memberId !== (auth.memberId || '')) return jsonErr('Access denied');
  var data = allRows(db(), LC_TAB, LC_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = learningCertificateRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.memberId !== memberId) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleLearningCertificatesForMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  params.memberId = params.memberId || (auth.memberId || '');
  return handleLearningCertificatesList(params, auth);
}

function handleLearningCertificatesIssue(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss   = db();
  var id   = newId();
  var now  = new Date();
  var cert = 'LCERT-' + Utilities.formatDate(now, 'UTC', 'yyyyMMdd') + '-' + id.substring(0, 4).toUpperCase();
  var row  = blankRow(LC_NUM_COLS);
  row[LC.ID]                 = id;
  row[LC.MEMBER_ID]          = String(params.memberId || '');
  row[LC.MEMBER_NAME]        = String(params.memberName || '');
  row[LC.CERTIFICATE_TYPE]   = String(params.certificateType || 'Playlist Completion');
  row[LC.PLAYLIST_ID]        = String(params.playlistId || '');
  row[LC.PLAYLIST_TITLE]     = String(params.playlistTitle || '');
  row[LC.QUIZ_ID]            = String(params.quizId || '');
  row[LC.QUIZ_TITLE]         = String(params.quizTitle || '');
  row[LC.CERTIFICATE_NUMBER] = cert;
  row[LC.ISSUE_DATE]         = now;
  row[LC.ISSUED_BY]          = auth.email;
  row[LC.EXPIRY_DATE]        = params.expiryDate || '';
  row[LC.STATUS]             = 'Issued';
  row[LC.NOTES]              = String(params.notes || '');
  row[LC.CREATED_AT]         = now;
  row[LC.UPDATED_AT]         = now;
  appendRow(ss, LC_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.certificates.issue', LC_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, certificateNumber: cert, message: 'Certificate issued' });
}

function handleLearningCertificatesRevoke(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, LC_TAB, LC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Certificate not found');
  hit.vals[LC.STATUS]     = 'Revoked';
  hit.vals[LC.NOTES]      = String(hit.vals[LC.NOTES] || '') + ' | Revoked by ' + auth.email + ' on ' + new Date().toISOString();
  hit.vals[LC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, LC_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'learning.certificates.revoke', LC_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Certificate revoked' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SERMON SEARCH — Browse & filter the Sermons tab for learning
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/** Multi-faceted sermon search (topic, preacher, scripture, date range, series) */
function handleLearningSermonSearch(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var sermons = allRows(db(), 'Sermons', 22);
  var out = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < sermons.length; i++) {
    var s = sermons[i];
    // Only published / delivered sermons
    var status = String(s[17] || '');
    if (status !== 'Published' && status !== 'Delivered') continue;
    // Visibility check
    var vis = String(s[18] || '');
    if (vis === 'Private' && auth.roleLevel < 2) continue;

    // Filters
    if (params.topic) {
      var topics = String(s[9] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (topics.indexOf(params.topic.toLowerCase()) === -1) continue;
    }
    if (params.preacher) {
      var preacher = String(s[3] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (preacher.indexOf(params.preacher.toLowerCase()) === -1) continue;
    }
    if (params.scripture) {
      var refs = String(s[8] || '').toLowerCase();
      if (refs.indexOf(params.scripture.toLowerCase()) === -1) continue;
    }
    if (params.seriesId) {
      if (String(s[6] || '') !== params.seriesId) continue;
    }
    if (params.dateFrom) {
      var dt = isoDate(s[4]);
      if (dt && dt < params.dateFrom) continue;
    }
    if (params.dateTo) {
      var dt2 = isoDate(s[4]);
      if (dt2 && dt2 > params.dateTo) continue;
    }
    if (params.keyword) {
      var haystack = (String(s[1]) + ' ' + String(s[10]) + ' ' + String(s[9]) + ' ' + String(s[8])).toLowerCase();
      if (haystack.indexOf(params.keyword.toLowerCase()) === -1) continue;
    }

    out.push({
      id:            String(s[0] || ''),
      title:         String(s[1] || ''),
      preacherId:    String(s[2] || ''),
      preacherName:  String(s[3] || ''),
      date:          isoDate(s[4]),
      serviceType:   String(s[5] || ''),
      seriesId:      String(s[6] || ''),
      scriptureRefs: String(s[8] || ''),
      topicTags:     String(s[9] || ''),
      summary:       String(s[10] || ''),
      fileUrl:       String(s[12] || ''),
      fileType:      String(s[14] || ''),
      status:        status
    });
  }

  // Sort by date descending
  out.sort(function(a, b) {
    return (b.date || '') > (a.date || '') ? 1 : -1;
  });

  return jsonOk(out);
}

/** Get all unique topics from the Sermons tab */
function handleLearningSermonTopics(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var sermons = allRows(db(), 'Sermons', 22);
  var topicSet = {};
  for (var i = 0; i < sermons.length; i++) {
    if (String(sermons[i][17] || '') !== 'Published' && String(sermons[i][17] || '') !== 'Delivered') continue;
    var tags = String(sermons[i][9] || '').split(',');
    for (var t = 0; t < tags.length; t++) {
      var tag = tags[t].trim();
      if (tag) topicSet[tag] = (topicSet[tag] || 0) + 1;
    }
  }
  var result = [];
  for (var key in topicSet) {
    result.push({ topic: key, count: topicSet[key] });
  }
  result.sort(function(a, b) { return b.count - a.count; });
  return jsonOk(result);
}

/** Get all unique preachers from the Sermons tab */
function handleLearningSermonPreachers(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var sermons = allRows(db(), 'Sermons', 22);
  var preacherSet = {};
  for (var i = 0; i < sermons.length; i++) {
    if (String(sermons[i][17] || '') !== 'Published' && String(sermons[i][17] || '') !== 'Delivered') continue;
    var name = String(sermons[i][3] || '').trim();
    var pid  = String(sermons[i][2] || '').trim();
    if (name) {
      if (!preacherSet[name]) preacherSet[name] = { id: pid, count: 0 };
      preacherSet[name].count++;
    }
  }
  var result = [];
  for (var key in preacherSet) {
    result.push({ name: key, preacherId: preacherSet[key].id, count: preacherSet[key].count });
  }
  result.sort(function(a, b) { return b.count - a.count; });
  return jsonOk(result);
}

/** Get all unique scripture references from the Sermons tab */
function handleLearningSermonScriptures(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var sermons = allRows(db(), 'Sermons', 22);
  var refSet = {};
  for (var i = 0; i < sermons.length; i++) {
    if (String(sermons[i][17] || '') !== 'Published' && String(sermons[i][17] || '') !== 'Delivered') continue;
    var refs = String(sermons[i][8] || '').split(',');
    for (var r = 0; r < refs.length; r++) {
      var ref = refs[r].trim();
      if (ref) refSet[ref] = (refSet[ref] || 0) + 1;
    }
  }
  var result = [];
  for (var key in refSet) {
    result.push({ scripture: key, count: refSet[key] });
  }
  result.sort(function(a, b) { return b.count - a.count; });
  return jsonOk(result);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LEARNING DASHBOARD (overview stats for admin / member)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleLearningDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss = db();

  // Topic counts
  var topics    = allRows(ss, LT_TAB, LT_NUM_COLS);
  var activeTpc = 0;
  for (var t = 0; t < topics.length; t++) if (String(topics[t][LT.STATUS]) === 'Active') activeTpc++;

  // Playlist counts
  var playlists = allRows(ss, LP_TAB, LP_NUM_COLS);
  var activePl  = 0, totalItems = 0;
  for (var p = 0; p < playlists.length; p++) {
    if (String(playlists[p][LP.STATUS]) === 'Active') activePl++;
    totalItems += Number(playlists[p][LP.ITEM_COUNT] || 0);
  }

  // Progress stats
  var progress     = allRows(ss, LPROG_TAB, LPROG_NUM_COLS);
  var totalProg    = progress.length;
  var completedCnt = 0;
  var activeLearners = {};
  for (var pr = 0; pr < progress.length; pr++) {
    if (String(progress[pr][LPROG.STATUS]) === 'Completed') completedCnt++;
    var mid = String(progress[pr][LPROG.MEMBER_ID]);
    if (mid) activeLearners[mid] = true;
  }

  // Quiz stats
  var quizzes         = allRows(ss, LQ_TAB, LQ_NUM_COLS);
  var publishedQuiz   = 0;
  for (var q = 0; q < quizzes.length; q++) if (String(quizzes[q][LQ.STATUS]) === 'Published') publishedQuiz++;

  var results      = allRows(ss, LQR_TAB, LQR_NUM_COLS);
  var totalAttempts = results.length;
  var passedCnt     = 0;
  for (var qr = 0; qr < results.length; qr++) if (String(results[qr][LQR.PASSED]) === 'TRUE') passedCnt++;

  // Notes & Bookmarks
  var notes     = allRows(ss, LN_TAB, LN_NUM_COLS);
  var bookmarks = allRows(ss, LB_TAB, LB_NUM_COLS);
  var certs     = allRows(ss, LC_TAB, LC_NUM_COLS);

  return jsonOk({
    topics:             activeTpc,
    playlists:          activePl,
    playlistItems:      totalItems,
    progressRecords:    totalProg,
    completedSermons:   completedCnt,
    activeLearners:     Object.keys(activeLearners).length,
    publishedQuizzes:   publishedQuiz,
    quizAttempts:       totalAttempts,
    quizPassRate:       totalAttempts > 0 ? Math.round((passedCnt / totalAttempts) * 100) : 0,
    totalNotes:         notes.length,
    totalBookmarks:     bookmarks.length,
    certificatesIssued: certs.length
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// UTILITY: slugify helper (if not already in utilities.gs)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function slugify(text) {
  return String(text || '')
    .toLowerCase()
    .replace(/[^a-z0-9]+/g, '-')
    .replace(/^-+|-+$/g, '');
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Ministries.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: MINISTRIES — 20+ Ministry Team Tracking
// Tabs: Ministries, MinistryMembers
//
// Unlike SmallGroups (which are semester-based study/fellowship circles),
// Ministries are the operational teams of the church: Spiritual Care, Worship,
// Children, Youth, Outreach, Greeters, Sound/AV, Prayer, Missions, etc.
// Each Ministry can have a lead, co-lead, multiple members in various roles,
// and optional sub-ministries via the ReportingTo field.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MINISTRIES (the teams themselves)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MIN_TAB = 'Ministries';
var MIN_NUM_COLS = 17;

var MIN = {
  ID: 0, NAME: 1, CATEGORY: 2, DESCRIPTION: 3,
  LEAD_ID: 4, CO_LEAD_ID: 5, CONTACT_EMAIL: 6,
  MEETING_DAY: 7, MEETING_TIME: 8, MEETING_LOCATION: 9,
  BUDGET: 10, STATUS: 11, REPORTING_TO: 12,
  NOTES: 13, CREATED_BY: 14, CREATED_AT: 15, UPDATED_AT: 16
};

function ministryRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[MIN.ID] || ''),
    ministryName:    String(vals[MIN.NAME] || ''),
    category:        String(vals[MIN.CATEGORY] || ''),
    description:     String(vals[MIN.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    leadId:          String(vals[MIN.LEAD_ID] || ''),
    coLeadId:        String(vals[MIN.CO_LEAD_ID] || ''),
    contactEmail:    String(vals[MIN.CONTACT_EMAIL] || ''),
    meetingDay:      String(vals[MIN.MEETING_DAY] || ''),
    meetingTime:     String(vals[MIN.MEETING_TIME] || ''),
    meetingLocation: String(vals[MIN.MEETING_LOCATION] || ''),
    budgetAllocated: Number(vals[MIN.BUDGET] || 0),
    status:          String(vals[MIN.STATUS] || ''),
    reportingTo:     String(vals[MIN.REPORTING_TO] || ''),
    notes:           String(vals[MIN.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:       String(vals[MIN.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[MIN.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:       isoDate(vals[MIN.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleMinistriesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = getTab(MIN_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MIN_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var status = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var category = String(params.category || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = ministryRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    if (category && obj.category !== category) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleMinistriesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var ministryId = String(params.ministryId || '').trim();
  if (!ministryId) return jsonErr('ministryId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(MIN_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Ministry not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MIN_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MIN.ID]) === ministryId) {
      var ministry = ministryRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      // Attach member roster
      ministry.members = getMinistryMembers_(ministryId, true);
      return jsonOk({ row: ministry });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Ministry not found.');
}

function handleMinistriesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  if (!params.ministryName) return jsonErr('ministryName is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(MIN_NUM_COLS);

  row[MIN.ID]               = generateId();
  row[MIN.NAME]             = String(params.ministryName);
  row[MIN.CATEGORY]         = String(params.category || 'Other');
  row[MIN.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description || '');
  row[MIN.LEAD_ID]          = String(params.leadId || '');
  row[MIN.CO_LEAD_ID]       = String(params.coLeadId || '');
  row[MIN.CONTACT_EMAIL]    = String(params.contactEmail || '');
  row[MIN.MEETING_DAY]      = String(params.meetingDay || 'As Needed');
  row[MIN.MEETING_TIME]     = String(params.meetingTime || '');
  row[MIN.MEETING_LOCATION] = String(params.meetingLocation || '');
  row[MIN.BUDGET]           = Number(params.budgetAllocated || 0);
  row[MIN.STATUS]           = 'Active';
  row[MIN.REPORTING_TO]     = String(params.reportingTo || '');
  row[MIN.NOTES]            = String(params.notes || '');
  row[MIN.CREATED_BY]       = auth.email;
  row[MIN.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[MIN.UPDATED_AT]       = now;

  var sheet = getTab(MIN_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'ministries.create', MIN_TAB, newIndex, params.ministryName);
  return jsonOk({ row: ministryRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleMinistriesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), MIN_TAB, MIN_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(MIN_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.ministryName != null)    existing[MIN.NAME]             = String(params.ministryName);
  if (params.category != null)        existing[MIN.CATEGORY]         = String(params.category);
  if (params.description != null)     existing[MIN.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description);
  if (params.leadId != null)          existing[MIN.LEAD_ID]          = String(params.leadId);
  if (params.coLeadId != null)        existing[MIN.CO_LEAD_ID]       = String(params.coLeadId);
  if (params.contactEmail != null)    existing[MIN.CONTACT_EMAIL]    = String(params.contactEmail);
  if (params.meetingDay != null)      existing[MIN.MEETING_DAY]      = String(params.meetingDay);
  if (params.meetingTime != null)     existing[MIN.MEETING_TIME]     = String(params.meetingTime);
  if (params.meetingLocation != null) existing[MIN.MEETING_LOCATION] = String(params.meetingLocation);
  if (params.budgetAllocated != null) existing[MIN.BUDGET]           = Number(params.budgetAllocated);
  if (params.status != null)          existing[MIN.STATUS]           = String(params.status);
  if (params.reportingTo != null)     existing[MIN.REPORTING_TO]     = String(params.reportingTo);
  if (params.notes != null)           existing[MIN.NOTES]            = String(params.notes);
  existing[MIN.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, MIN_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'ministries.update', MIN_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[MIN.NAME] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: ministryRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Returns the hierarchy tree: top-level ministries + their sub-ministries.
 */
function handleMinistriesTree(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = getTab(MIN_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ tree: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MIN_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var all = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    all.push(ministryRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }

  // Build tree: top-level = no reportingTo, children nested
  var childMap = {};
  var topLevel = [];
  for (var j = 0; j < all.length; j++) {
    var m = all[j];
    if (m.reportingTo) {
      if (!childMap[m.reportingTo]) childMap[m.reportingTo] = [];
      childMap[m.reportingTo].push(m);
    } else {
      topLevel.push(m);
    }
  }

  for (var k = 0; k < topLevel.length; k++) {
    topLevel[k].subMinistries = childMap[topLevel[k].id] || [];
  }

  return jsonOk({ tree: topLevel });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MINISTRY MEMBERS (who serves in which ministry)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MM_TAB = 'MinistryMembers';
var MM_NUM_COLS = 10;

var MM = {
  ID: 0, MINISTRY_ID: 1, MEMBER_ID: 2, ROLE: 3,
  START_DATE: 4, END_DATE: 5, STATUS: 6,
  HOURS: 7, NOTES: 8, CREATED_AT: 9
};

function mmRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:         rowIndex,
    id:            String(vals[MM.ID] || ''),
    ministryId:    String(vals[MM.MINISTRY_ID] || ''),
    memberId:      String(vals[MM.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    role:          String(vals[MM.ROLE] || ''),
    startDate:     isoDate(vals[MM.START_DATE]),
    endDate:       isoDate(vals[MM.END_DATE]),
    status:        String(vals[MM.STATUS] || ''),
    hoursPerMonth: Number(vals[MM.HOURS] || 0),
    notes:         String(vals[MM.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:     isoDate(vals[MM.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

/**
 * Internal: fetch ministry members, optionally active-only.
 */
function getMinistryMembers_(ministryId, activeOnly) {
  var sheet = getTab(MM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return [];

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MM.MINISTRY_ID]) !== String(ministryId)) continue;
    var obj = mmRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (activeOnly && obj.status !== 'Active') continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }
  return rows;
}

function handleMinistryMembersList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.ministryId) return jsonErr('ministryId is required.');
  var activeOnly = String(params.activeOnly || 'true').toUpperCase() !== 'FALSE';
  return jsonOk({ rows: getMinistryMembers_(params.ministryId, activeOnly) });
}

/**
 * List ALL ministries a given member belongs to.
 */
function handleMinistryMembersForMember(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(MM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var activeOnly = String(params.activeOnly || 'true').toUpperCase() !== 'FALSE';
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MM.MEMBER_ID]) !== String(params.memberId)) continue;
    var obj = mmRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (activeOnly && obj.status !== 'Active') continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleMinistryMembersAdd(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.ministryId) return jsonErr('ministryId is required.');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.ministryId),
    String(params.memberId),
    String(params.role || 'Member'),
    params.startDate || now.substring(0, 10),
    '',
    'Active',
    Number(params.hoursPerMonth || 0),
    String(params.notes || ''),
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(MM_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'ministryMembers.add', MM_TAB, newIndex,
    'Ministry: ' + params.ministryId + ' + Member: ' + params.memberId);
  return jsonOk({ row: mmRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleMinistryMembersUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), MM_TAB, MM_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(MM_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.role != null)          existing[MM.ROLE]       = String(params.role);
  if (params.status != null)        existing[MM.STATUS]     = String(params.status);
  if (params.endDate != null)       existing[MM.END_DATE]   = params.endDate;
  if (params.hoursPerMonth != null) existing[MM.HOURS]      = Number(params.hoursPerMonth);
  if (params.notes != null)         existing[MM.NOTES]      = String(params.notes);

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, MM_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'ministryMembers.update', MM_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ row: mmRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleMinistryMembersRemove(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.ministryId) return jsonErr('ministryId is required.');
  if (!params.memberId) return jsonErr('memberId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(MM_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Membership not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, MM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MM.MINISTRY_ID]) === String(params.ministryId) &&
        String(data[i][MM.MEMBER_ID]) === String(params.memberId) &&
        String(data[i][MM.STATUS]) === 'Active') {
      var rowIdx = i + 2;
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, MM.END_DATE + 1).setValue(isoNow().substring(0, 10));
      sheet.getRange(rowIdx, MM.STATUS + 1).setValue('Inactive');
      var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIdx, 1, 1, MM_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
      writeAudit(auth, 'ministryMembers.remove', MM_TAB, rowIdx,
        'Ministry: ' + params.ministryId + ' − Member: ' + params.memberId);
      return jsonOk({ row: mmRowToObject(fresh, rowIdx) });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Active membership not found.');
}

/**
 * Ministry Summary — counts of active members per ministry.
 */
function handleMinistriesSummary(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');

  // Get all ministries
  var minSheet = getTab(MIN_TAB);
  var minLast = minSheet.getLastRow();
  if (minLast < 2) return jsonOk({ summary: [] });
  var minData = minSheet.getRange(2, 1, minLast - 1, MIN_NUM_COLS).getValues();

  // Count members per ministry
  var mmSheet = getTab(MM_TAB);
  var mmLast = mmSheet.getLastRow();
  var counts = {};
  if (mmLast >= 2) {
    var mmData = mmSheet.getRange(2, 1, mmLast - 1, MM_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < mmData.length; i++) {
      if (String(mmData[i][MM.STATUS]) !== 'Active') continue;
      var mid = String(mmData[i][MM.MINISTRY_ID]);
      counts[mid] = (counts[mid] || 0) + 1;
    }
  }

  var summary = [];
  for (var j = 0; j < minData.length; j++) {
    var m = ministryRowToObject(minData[j], j + 2);
    summary.push({
      ministryId:   m.id,
      ministryName: m.ministryName,
      category:     m.category,
      status:       m.status,
      leadId:       m.leadId,
      activeMembers: counts[m.id] || 0
    });
  }

  return jsonOk({ summary: summary });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Missions.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: WORLD MISSIONS — Persecution Data, 10/40 Window Focus
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//
// Architecture: "Table of Contents" pattern
// ──────────────────────────────────────────
//   MissionsRegistry     Master index of all tracked countries/missions
//   MissionsRegions      Country-level summary data (10/40 Window, UPGs, etc.)
