//   MissionsCities       City/region-level persecution & risk data
//   MissionsPartners     Missionary organizations / field workers
//   MissionsPrayerFocus  Rotating prayer targets linked to countries/cities
//   MissionsUpdates      Field intelligence / situation reports
//   MissionsTeams        Local church mission teams & trip planning
//   MissionsMetrics      Per-country aggregated metrics (persecution index, etc.)
//
// This module is designed to be deployable as its OWN separate Web App
// (separate API / separate spreadsheet) due to the sheer volume of
// country-level data sheets.  However it follows the same patterns
// (column maps, row helpers, requireRole, auditLog) so it integrates
// seamlessly into the unified CRM when kept in the same project.
//
// 10/40 Window countries are pre-seeded in MissionsRegistry via the
// seedMissionsRegistry_() helper.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 1. MISSIONS REGISTRY  (Table of Contents)
//    Master index: one row per tracked country/mission field
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MR_TAB      = 'MissionsRegistry';
var MR_NUM_COLS = 28;

var MR = {
  ID: 0,
  COUNTRY_NAME: 1,
  ISO_CODE: 2,
  ICON: 3,
  TAB_NAME: 4,
  REGION_1040: 5,
  CONTINENT: 6,
  POPULATION: 7,
  CAPITAL: 8,
  OFFICIAL_LANGUAGE: 9,
  DOMINANT_RELIGION: 10,
  PERSECUTION_RANK: 11,
  PERSECUTION_SCORE: 12,
  PERSECUTION_LEVEL: 13,
  GOSPEL_ACCESS: 14,
  UNREACHED_PEOPLE_GROUPS: 15,
  TOTAL_PEOPLE_GROUPS: 16,
  PCT_EVANGELICAL: 17,
  PCT_CHRISTIAN: 18,
  FREEDOM_INDEX: 19,
  REGION_COUNT: 20,
  CITY_COUNT: 21,
  PARTNER_COUNT: 22,
  LAST_UPDATE_AT: 23,
  STATUS: 24,
  SORT_ORDER: 25,
  CREATED_AT: 26,
  UPDATED_AT: 27
};

function missionsRegistryRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:                rowIndex,
    id:                   String(vals[MR.ID] || ''),
    countryName:          String(vals[MR.COUNTRY_NAME] || ''),
    isoCode:              String(vals[MR.ISO_CODE] || ''),
    icon:                 String(vals[MR.ICON] || ''),
    tabName:              String(vals[MR.TAB_NAME] || ''),
    region1040:           String(vals[MR.REGION_1040] || 'FALSE'),
    continent:            String(vals[MR.CONTINENT] || ''),
    population:           Number(vals[MR.POPULATION] || 0),
    capital:              String(vals[MR.CAPITAL] || ''),
    officialLanguage:     String(vals[MR.OFFICIAL_LANGUAGE] || ''),
    dominantReligion:     String(vals[MR.DOMINANT_RELIGION] || ''),
    persecutionRank:      Number(vals[MR.PERSECUTION_RANK] || 0),
    persecutionScore:     Number(vals[MR.PERSECUTION_SCORE] || 0),
    persecutionLevel:     String(vals[MR.PERSECUTION_LEVEL] || ''),
    gospelAccess:         String(vals[MR.GOSPEL_ACCESS] || ''),
    unreachedPeopleGroups:Number(vals[MR.UNREACHED_PEOPLE_GROUPS] || 0),
    totalPeopleGroups:    Number(vals[MR.TOTAL_PEOPLE_GROUPS] || 0),
    pctEvangelical:       String(vals[MR.PCT_EVANGELICAL] || ''),
    pctChristian:         String(vals[MR.PCT_CHRISTIAN] || ''),
    freedomIndex:         String(vals[MR.FREEDOM_INDEX] || ''),
    regionCount:          Number(vals[MR.REGION_COUNT] || 0),
    cityCount:            Number(vals[MR.CITY_COUNT] || 0),
    partnerCount:         Number(vals[MR.PARTNER_COUNT] || 0),
    lastUpdateAt:         isoDate(vals[MR.LAST_UPDATE_AT]),
    status:               String(vals[MR.STATUS] || ''),
    sortOrder:            Number(vals[MR.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    createdAt:            isoDate(vals[MR.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:            isoDate(vals[MR.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Registry Handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

/** List all tracked countries (table of contents) */
function handleMissionsRegistryList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), MR_TAB, MR_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = missionsRegistryRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.region1040 && obj.region1040 !== 'TRUE') continue;
    if (params.continent && obj.continent !== params.continent) continue;
    if (params.persecutionLevel && obj.persecutionLevel !== params.persecutionLevel) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    if (params.dominantReligion && obj.dominantReligion !== params.dominantReligion) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder || a.countryName.localeCompare(b.countryName); });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

/** Get single country entry with summary */
function handleMissionsRegistryGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MR_TAB, MR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Country not found');
  return jsonOk(missionsRegistryRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

/** Create new country entry */
function handleMissionsRegistryCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  if (!params.countryName) return jsonErr('countryName required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(MR_NUM_COLS);
  row[MR.ID]                      = id;
  row[MR.COUNTRY_NAME]            = String(params.countryName);
  row[MR.ISO_CODE]                = String(params.isoCode || '');
  row[MR.ICON]                    = String(params.icon || '');
  row[MR.TAB_NAME]                = String(params.tabName || params.countryName.replace(/\s+/g, ''));
  row[MR.REGION_1040]             = (params.region1040 === true || params.region1040 === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[MR.CONTINENT]               = String(params.continent || '');
  row[MR.POPULATION]              = Number(params.population || 0);
  row[MR.CAPITAL]                 = String(params.capital || '');
  row[MR.OFFICIAL_LANGUAGE]       = String(params.officialLanguage || '');
  row[MR.DOMINANT_RELIGION]       = String(params.dominantReligion || '');
  row[MR.PERSECUTION_RANK]        = Number(params.persecutionRank || 0);
  row[MR.PERSECUTION_SCORE]       = Number(params.persecutionScore || 0);
  row[MR.PERSECUTION_LEVEL]       = String(params.persecutionLevel || '');
  row[MR.GOSPEL_ACCESS]           = String(params.gospelAccess || '');
  row[MR.UNREACHED_PEOPLE_GROUPS] = Number(params.unreachedPeopleGroups || 0);
  row[MR.TOTAL_PEOPLE_GROUPS]     = Number(params.totalPeopleGroups || 0);
  row[MR.PCT_EVANGELICAL]         = String(params.pctEvangelical || '');
  row[MR.PCT_CHRISTIAN]           = String(params.pctChristian || '');
  row[MR.FREEDOM_INDEX]           = String(params.freedomIndex || '');
  row[MR.REGION_COUNT]            = 0;
  row[MR.CITY_COUNT]              = 0;
  row[MR.PARTNER_COUNT]           = 0;
  row[MR.STATUS]                  = 'Active';
  row[MR.SORT_ORDER]              = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[MR.CREATED_AT]              = now;
  row[MR.UPDATED_AT]              = now;
  appendRow(ss, MR_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.registry.create', MR_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Country added to registry' });
}

/** Update country entry */
function handleMissionsRegistryUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MR_TAB, MR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Country not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.countryName !== undefined)            v[MR.COUNTRY_NAME]            = String(params.countryName);
  if (params.isoCode !== undefined)                v[MR.ISO_CODE]                = String(params.isoCode);
  if (params.icon !== undefined)                   v[MR.ICON]                    = String(params.icon);
  if (params.tabName !== undefined)                v[MR.TAB_NAME]                = String(params.tabName);
  if (params.region1040 !== undefined)             v[MR.REGION_1040]             = (params.region1040 === true || params.region1040 === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.continent !== undefined)              v[MR.CONTINENT]               = String(params.continent);
  if (params.population !== undefined)             v[MR.POPULATION]              = Number(params.population);
  if (params.capital !== undefined)                v[MR.CAPITAL]                 = String(params.capital);
  if (params.officialLanguage !== undefined)       v[MR.OFFICIAL_LANGUAGE]       = String(params.officialLanguage);
  if (params.dominantReligion !== undefined)       v[MR.DOMINANT_RELIGION]       = String(params.dominantReligion);
  if (params.persecutionRank !== undefined)        v[MR.PERSECUTION_RANK]        = Number(params.persecutionRank);
  if (params.persecutionScore !== undefined)       v[MR.PERSECUTION_SCORE]       = Number(params.persecutionScore);
  if (params.persecutionLevel !== undefined)       v[MR.PERSECUTION_LEVEL]       = String(params.persecutionLevel);
  if (params.gospelAccess !== undefined)           v[MR.GOSPEL_ACCESS]           = String(params.gospelAccess);
  if (params.unreachedPeopleGroups !== undefined)  v[MR.UNREACHED_PEOPLE_GROUPS] = Number(params.unreachedPeopleGroups);
  if (params.totalPeopleGroups !== undefined)      v[MR.TOTAL_PEOPLE_GROUPS]     = Number(params.totalPeopleGroups);
  if (params.pctEvangelical !== undefined)         v[MR.PCT_EVANGELICAL]         = String(params.pctEvangelical);
  if (params.pctChristian !== undefined)           v[MR.PCT_CHRISTIAN]           = String(params.pctChristian);
  if (params.freedomIndex !== undefined)           v[MR.FREEDOM_INDEX]           = String(params.freedomIndex);
  if (params.status !== undefined)                 v[MR.STATUS]                  = String(params.status);
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)              v[MR.SORT_ORDER]              = Number(params.sortOrder);
  v[MR.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MR_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.registry.update', MR_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Country updated' });
}

/** Delete (soft) country from registry */
function handleMissionsRegistryDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MR_TAB, MR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Country not found');
  hit.vals[MR.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[MR.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MR_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.registry.delete', MR_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Country archived' });
}

/** 10/40 Window filter — returns only countries in the 10/40 Window */
function handleMissionsRegistry1040(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), MR_TAB, MR_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = missionsRegistryRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.region1040 !== 'TRUE') continue;
    if (obj.status === 'Archived') continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.persecutionRank - b.persecutionRank || a.countryName.localeCompare(b.countryName); });
  return jsonOk(out);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 2. MISSIONS REGIONS  (states / provinces / divisions within a country)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MREG_TAB      = 'MissionsRegions';
var MREG_NUM_COLS = 24;

var MREG = {
  ID: 0,
  COUNTRY_ID: 1,
  REGION_NAME: 2,
  REGION_TYPE: 3,
  POPULATION: 4,
  COORDINATES: 5,
  COLOR_HEX: 6,
  DOMINANT_RELIGION: 7,
  PCT_CHRISTIAN: 8,
  LITERACY_RATE: 9,
  PERSECUTION_LEVEL: 10,
  GOSPEL_ACCESS: 11,
  UNREACHED_GROUPS: 12,
  SECURITY_THREAT: 13,
  HUMANITARIAN_NEED: 14,
  MEDIA_RESTRICTION: 15,
  CHURCH_PRESENCE: 16,
  MISSIONARY_ACCESS: 17,
  PRIMARY_HURDLE: 18,
  NOTES: 19,
  STATUS: 20,
  SORT_ORDER: 21,
  CREATED_AT: 22,
  UPDATED_AT: 23
};

function missionsRegionRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:             rowIndex,
    id:                String(vals[MREG.ID] || ''),
    countryId:         String(vals[MREG.COUNTRY_ID] || ''),
    regionName:        String(vals[MREG.REGION_NAME] || ''),
    regionType:        String(vals[MREG.REGION_TYPE] || ''),
    population:        Number(vals[MREG.POPULATION] || 0),
    coordinates:       String(vals[MREG.COORDINATES] || ''),
    colorHex:          String(vals[MREG.COLOR_HEX] || '#00ffff'),
    dominantReligion:  String(vals[MREG.DOMINANT_RELIGION] || ''),
    pctChristian:      String(vals[MREG.PCT_CHRISTIAN] || ''),
    literacyRate:      String(vals[MREG.LITERACY_RATE] || ''),
    persecutionLevel:  String(vals[MREG.PERSECUTION_LEVEL] || ''),
    gospelAccess:      String(vals[MREG.GOSPEL_ACCESS] || ''),
    unreachedGroups:   Number(vals[MREG.UNREACHED_GROUPS] || 0),
    securityThreat:    String(vals[MREG.SECURITY_THREAT] || ''),
    humanitarianNeed:  String(vals[MREG.HUMANITARIAN_NEED] || ''),
    mediaRestriction:  String(vals[MREG.MEDIA_RESTRICTION] || ''),
    churchPresence:    String(vals[MREG.CHURCH_PRESENCE] || ''),
    missionaryAccess:  String(vals[MREG.MISSIONARY_ACCESS] || ''),
    primaryHurdle:     String(vals[MREG.PRIMARY_HURDLE] || ''),
    notes:             String(vals[MREG.NOTES] || ''),
    status:            String(vals[MREG.STATUS] || ''),
    sortOrder:         Number(vals[MREG.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    createdAt:         isoDate(vals[MREG.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:         isoDate(vals[MREG.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Regions Handlers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleMissionsRegionsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), MREG_TAB, MREG_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = missionsRegionRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.countryId && obj.countryId !== params.countryId) continue;
    if (params.persecutionLevel && obj.persecutionLevel !== params.persecutionLevel) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder || a.regionName.localeCompare(b.regionName); });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleMissionsRegionsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), MREG_TAB, MREG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Region not found');
  return jsonOk(missionsRegionRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleMissionsRegionsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  if (!params.countryId || !params.regionName) return jsonErr('countryId and regionName required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(MREG_NUM_COLS);
  row[MREG.ID]                = id;
  row[MREG.COUNTRY_ID]        = String(params.countryId);
  row[MREG.REGION_NAME]       = String(params.regionName);
  row[MREG.REGION_TYPE]       = String(params.regionType || 'State');
  row[MREG.POPULATION]        = Number(params.population || 0);
  row[MREG.COORDINATES]       = String(params.coordinates || '');
  row[MREG.COLOR_HEX]         = String(params.colorHex || '#00ffff');
  row[MREG.DOMINANT_RELIGION] = String(params.dominantReligion || '');
  row[MREG.PCT_CHRISTIAN]     = String(params.pctChristian || '');
  row[MREG.LITERACY_RATE]     = String(params.literacyRate || '');
  row[MREG.PERSECUTION_LEVEL] = String(params.persecutionLevel || '');
  row[MREG.GOSPEL_ACCESS]     = String(params.gospelAccess || '');
  row[MREG.UNREACHED_GROUPS]  = Number(params.unreachedGroups || 0);
  row[MREG.SECURITY_THREAT]   = String(params.securityThreat || '');
  row[MREG.HUMANITARIAN_NEED] = String(params.humanitarianNeed || '');
  row[MREG.MEDIA_RESTRICTION] = String(params.mediaRestriction || '');
  row[MREG.CHURCH_PRESENCE]   = String(params.churchPresence || '');
  row[MREG.MISSIONARY_ACCESS] = String(params.missionaryAccess || '');
  row[MREG.PRIMARY_HURDLE]    = String(params.primaryHurdle || '');
  row[MREG.NOTES]             = String(params.notes || '');
  row[MREG.STATUS]            = 'Active';
  row[MREG.SORT_ORDER]        = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[MREG.CREATED_AT]        = now;
  row[MREG.UPDATED_AT]        = now;
  appendRow(ss, MREG_TAB, row);

  // Increment parent country region count
  updateRegistryCount_(ss, params.countryId, MR.REGION_COUNT, 1);

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.regions.create', MREG_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Region created' });
}

function handleMissionsRegionsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MREG_TAB, MREG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Region not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.regionName !== undefined)       v[MREG.REGION_NAME]       = String(params.regionName);
  if (params.regionType !== undefined)       v[MREG.REGION_TYPE]       = String(params.regionType);
  if (params.population !== undefined)       v[MREG.POPULATION]        = Number(params.population);
  if (params.coordinates !== undefined)      v[MREG.COORDINATES]       = String(params.coordinates);
  if (params.colorHex !== undefined)         v[MREG.COLOR_HEX]         = String(params.colorHex);
  if (params.dominantReligion !== undefined) v[MREG.DOMINANT_RELIGION] = String(params.dominantReligion);
  if (params.pctChristian !== undefined)     v[MREG.PCT_CHRISTIAN]     = String(params.pctChristian);
  if (params.literacyRate !== undefined)     v[MREG.LITERACY_RATE]     = String(params.literacyRate);
  if (params.persecutionLevel !== undefined) v[MREG.PERSECUTION_LEVEL] = String(params.persecutionLevel);
  if (params.gospelAccess !== undefined)     v[MREG.GOSPEL_ACCESS]     = String(params.gospelAccess);
  if (params.unreachedGroups !== undefined)  v[MREG.UNREACHED_GROUPS]  = Number(params.unreachedGroups);
  if (params.securityThreat !== undefined)   v[MREG.SECURITY_THREAT]   = String(params.securityThreat);
  if (params.humanitarianNeed !== undefined) v[MREG.HUMANITARIAN_NEED] = String(params.humanitarianNeed);
  if (params.mediaRestriction !== undefined) v[MREG.MEDIA_RESTRICTION] = String(params.mediaRestriction);
  if (params.churchPresence !== undefined)   v[MREG.CHURCH_PRESENCE]   = String(params.churchPresence);
  if (params.missionaryAccess !== undefined) v[MREG.MISSIONARY_ACCESS] = String(params.missionaryAccess);
  if (params.primaryHurdle !== undefined)    v[MREG.PRIMARY_HURDLE]    = String(params.primaryHurdle);
  if (params.notes !== undefined)            v[MREG.NOTES]             = String(params.notes);
  if (params.status !== undefined)           v[MREG.STATUS]            = String(params.status);
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)        v[MREG.SORT_ORDER]        = Number(params.sortOrder);
  v[MREG.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MREG_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.regions.update', MREG_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Region updated' });
}

function handleMissionsRegionsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MREG_TAB, MREG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Region not found');
  var countryId = String(hit.vals[MREG.COUNTRY_ID] || '');
  hit.vals[MREG.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[MREG.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MREG_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  updateRegistryCount_(ss, countryId, MR.REGION_COUNT, -1);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.regions.delete', MREG_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Region archived' });
}

/** Get all regions for a specific country (the "open country" view) */
function handleMissionsRegionsForCountry(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.countryId) return jsonErr('countryId required');
  var data = allRows(db(), MREG_TAB, MREG_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MREG.COUNTRY_ID]) !== params.countryId) continue;
    if (String(data[i][MREG.STATUS]) === 'Archived') continue;
    out.push(missionsRegionRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder || a.regionName.localeCompare(b.regionName); });
  return jsonOk(out);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 3. MISSIONS CITIES  (city-level persecution & risk data)
//    This is where the granular persecution dossier data lives — each row
//    matches the cards rendered by the current Missions.js frontend
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MCITY_TAB      = 'MissionsCities';
var MCITY_NUM_COLS = 30;

var MCITY = {
  ID: 0,
  COUNTRY_ID: 1,
  REGION_ID: 2,
  CITY_NAME: 3,
  CITY_TYPE: 4,
  POPULATION: 5,
  COORDINATES: 6,
  COLOR_HEX: 7,
  LITERACY_RATE: 8,
  DOMINANT_RELIGION: 9,
  PCT_CHRISTIAN: 10,
  PERSECUTION_LEVEL: 11,
  VIOLENCE_LEVEL: 12,
  CHURCH_LIFE: 13,
  NATIONAL_LIFE: 14,
  SOCIAL_LIFE: 15,
  PRIVATE_LIFE: 16,
  FAMILY_LIFE: 17,
  GOSPEL_ACCESS: 18,
  MEDIA_RESTRICTION: 19,
  SECURITY_THREAT: 20,
  HUMANITARIAN_NEED: 21,
  MISSIONARY_ACCESS: 22,
  CHURCH_PRESENCE: 23,
  PRIMARY_HURDLE: 24,
  PRAYER_FOCUS: 25,
  NOTES: 26,
  STATUS: 27,
  CREATED_AT: 28,
  UPDATED_AT: 29
};

function missionsCityRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:             rowIndex,
    id:                String(vals[MCITY.ID] || ''),
    countryId:         String(vals[MCITY.COUNTRY_ID] || ''),
    regionId:          String(vals[MCITY.REGION_ID] || ''),
    cityName:          String(vals[MCITY.CITY_NAME] || ''),
    cityType:          String(vals[MCITY.CITY_TYPE] || ''),
    population:        Number(vals[MCITY.POPULATION] || 0),
    coordinates:       String(vals[MCITY.COORDINATES] || ''),
    colorHex:          String(vals[MCITY.COLOR_HEX] || '#00ffff'),
    literacyRate:      String(vals[MCITY.LITERACY_RATE] || ''),
    dominantReligion:  String(vals[MCITY.DOMINANT_RELIGION] || ''),
    pctChristian:      String(vals[MCITY.PCT_CHRISTIAN] || ''),
    persecutionLevel:  String(vals[MCITY.PERSECUTION_LEVEL] || ''),
    violenceLevel:     String(vals[MCITY.VIOLENCE_LEVEL] || ''),
    churchLife:        String(vals[MCITY.CHURCH_LIFE] || ''),
    nationalLife:      String(vals[MCITY.NATIONAL_LIFE] || ''),
    socialLife:        String(vals[MCITY.SOCIAL_LIFE] || ''),
    privateLife:       String(vals[MCITY.PRIVATE_LIFE] || ''),
    familyLife:        String(vals[MCITY.FAMILY_LIFE] || ''),
    gospelAccess:      String(vals[MCITY.GOSPEL_ACCESS] || ''),
    mediaRestriction:  String(vals[MCITY.MEDIA_RESTRICTION] || ''),
    securityThreat:    String(vals[MCITY.SECURITY_THREAT] || ''),
    humanitarianNeed:  String(vals[MCITY.HUMANITARIAN_NEED] || ''),
    missionaryAccess:  String(vals[MCITY.MISSIONARY_ACCESS] || ''),
    churchPresence:    String(vals[MCITY.CHURCH_PRESENCE] || ''),
    primaryHurdle:     String(vals[MCITY.PRIMARY_HURDLE] || ''),
    prayerFocus:       String(vals[MCITY.PRAYER_FOCUS] || ''),
    notes:             String(vals[MCITY.NOTES] || ''),
    status:            String(vals[MCITY.STATUS] || ''),
    createdAt:         isoDate(vals[MCITY.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:         isoDate(vals[MCITY.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Cities Handlers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleMissionsCitiesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), MCITY_TAB, MCITY_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = missionsCityRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.countryId && obj.countryId !== params.countryId) continue;
    if (params.regionId && obj.regionId !== params.regionId) continue;
    if (params.persecutionLevel && obj.persecutionLevel !== params.persecutionLevel) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.cityName.localeCompare(b.cityName); });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleMissionsCitiesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), MCITY_TAB, MCITY_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('City not found');
  return jsonOk(missionsCityRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleMissionsCitiesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  if (!params.countryId || !params.cityName) return jsonErr('countryId and cityName required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(MCITY_NUM_COLS);
  row[MCITY.ID]                = id;
  row[MCITY.COUNTRY_ID]        = String(params.countryId);
  row[MCITY.REGION_ID]         = String(params.regionId || '');
  row[MCITY.CITY_NAME]         = String(params.cityName);
  row[MCITY.CITY_TYPE]         = String(params.cityType || 'City');
  row[MCITY.POPULATION]        = Number(params.population || 0);
  row[MCITY.COORDINATES]       = String(params.coordinates || '');
  row[MCITY.COLOR_HEX]         = String(params.colorHex || '#00ffff');
  row[MCITY.LITERACY_RATE]     = String(params.literacyRate || '');
  row[MCITY.DOMINANT_RELIGION] = String(params.dominantReligion || '');
  row[MCITY.PCT_CHRISTIAN]     = String(params.pctChristian || '');
  row[MCITY.PERSECUTION_LEVEL] = String(params.persecutionLevel || '');
  row[MCITY.VIOLENCE_LEVEL]    = String(params.violenceLevel || '');
  row[MCITY.CHURCH_LIFE]       = String(params.churchLife || '');
  row[MCITY.NATIONAL_LIFE]     = String(params.nationalLife || '');
  row[MCITY.SOCIAL_LIFE]       = String(params.socialLife || '');
  row[MCITY.PRIVATE_LIFE]      = String(params.privateLife || '');
  row[MCITY.FAMILY_LIFE]       = String(params.familyLife || '');
  row[MCITY.GOSPEL_ACCESS]     = String(params.gospelAccess || '');
  row[MCITY.MEDIA_RESTRICTION] = String(params.mediaRestriction || '');
  row[MCITY.SECURITY_THREAT]   = String(params.securityThreat || '');
  row[MCITY.HUMANITARIAN_NEED] = String(params.humanitarianNeed || '');
  row[MCITY.MISSIONARY_ACCESS] = String(params.missionaryAccess || '');
  row[MCITY.CHURCH_PRESENCE]   = String(params.churchPresence || '');
  row[MCITY.PRIMARY_HURDLE]    = String(params.primaryHurdle || '');
  row[MCITY.PRAYER_FOCUS]      = String(params.prayerFocus || '');
  row[MCITY.NOTES]             = String(params.notes || '');
  row[MCITY.STATUS]            = 'Active';
  row[MCITY.CREATED_AT]        = now;
  row[MCITY.UPDATED_AT]        = now;
  appendRow(ss, MCITY_TAB, row);

  updateRegistryCount_(ss, params.countryId, MR.CITY_COUNT, 1);

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.cities.create', MCITY_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'City created' });
}

function handleMissionsCitiesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MCITY_TAB, MCITY_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('City not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.cityName !== undefined)         v[MCITY.CITY_NAME]         = String(params.cityName);
  if (params.cityType !== undefined)         v[MCITY.CITY_TYPE]         = String(params.cityType);
  if (params.regionId !== undefined)         v[MCITY.REGION_ID]         = String(params.regionId);
  if (params.population !== undefined)       v[MCITY.POPULATION]        = Number(params.population);
  if (params.coordinates !== undefined)      v[MCITY.COORDINATES]       = String(params.coordinates);
  if (params.colorHex !== undefined)         v[MCITY.COLOR_HEX]         = String(params.colorHex);
  if (params.literacyRate !== undefined)     v[MCITY.LITERACY_RATE]     = String(params.literacyRate);
  if (params.dominantReligion !== undefined) v[MCITY.DOMINANT_RELIGION] = String(params.dominantReligion);
  if (params.pctChristian !== undefined)     v[MCITY.PCT_CHRISTIAN]     = String(params.pctChristian);
  if (params.persecutionLevel !== undefined) v[MCITY.PERSECUTION_LEVEL] = String(params.persecutionLevel);
  if (params.violenceLevel !== undefined)    v[MCITY.VIOLENCE_LEVEL]    = String(params.violenceLevel);
  if (params.churchLife !== undefined)       v[MCITY.CHURCH_LIFE]       = String(params.churchLife);
  if (params.nationalLife !== undefined)     v[MCITY.NATIONAL_LIFE]     = String(params.nationalLife);
  if (params.socialLife !== undefined)       v[MCITY.SOCIAL_LIFE]       = String(params.socialLife);
  if (params.privateLife !== undefined)      v[MCITY.PRIVATE_LIFE]      = String(params.privateLife);
  if (params.familyLife !== undefined)       v[MCITY.FAMILY_LIFE]       = String(params.familyLife);
  if (params.gospelAccess !== undefined)     v[MCITY.GOSPEL_ACCESS]     = String(params.gospelAccess);
  if (params.mediaRestriction !== undefined) v[MCITY.MEDIA_RESTRICTION] = String(params.mediaRestriction);
  if (params.securityThreat !== undefined)   v[MCITY.SECURITY_THREAT]   = String(params.securityThreat);
  if (params.humanitarianNeed !== undefined) v[MCITY.HUMANITARIAN_NEED] = String(params.humanitarianNeed);
  if (params.missionaryAccess !== undefined) v[MCITY.MISSIONARY_ACCESS] = String(params.missionaryAccess);
  if (params.churchPresence !== undefined)   v[MCITY.CHURCH_PRESENCE]   = String(params.churchPresence);
  if (params.primaryHurdle !== undefined)    v[MCITY.PRIMARY_HURDLE]    = String(params.primaryHurdle);
  if (params.prayerFocus !== undefined)      v[MCITY.PRAYER_FOCUS]      = String(params.prayerFocus);
  if (params.notes !== undefined)            v[MCITY.NOTES]             = String(params.notes);
  if (params.status !== undefined)           v[MCITY.STATUS]            = String(params.status);
  v[MCITY.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MCITY_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.cities.update', MCITY_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'City updated' });
}

function handleMissionsCitiesDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MCITY_TAB, MCITY_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('City not found');
  var countryId = String(hit.vals[MCITY.COUNTRY_ID] || '');
  hit.vals[MCITY.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[MCITY.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MCITY_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  updateRegistryCount_(ss, countryId, MR.CITY_COUNT, -1);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.cities.delete', MCITY_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'City archived' });
}

/** Get full country dossier — country info + all regions + all cities */
function handleMissionsCitiesForCountry(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.countryId) return jsonErr('countryId required');
  var ss = db();

  // Country metadata
  var country = findRowById(ss, MR_TAB, MR_NUM_COLS, params.countryId);
  var countryObj = country ? missionsRegistryRowToObject(country.vals, country.rowIndex) : null;

  // Regions
  var regData = allRows(ss, MREG_TAB, MREG_NUM_COLS);
  var regions = [];
  for (var r = 0; r < regData.length; r++) {
    if (String(regData[r][MREG.COUNTRY_ID]) === params.countryId && String(regData[r][MREG.STATUS]) !== 'Archived') {
      regions.push(missionsRegionRowToObject(regData[r], r + 2));
    }
  }

  // Cities
  var cityData = allRows(ss, MCITY_TAB, MCITY_NUM_COLS);
  var cities   = [];
  for (var c = 0; c < cityData.length; c++) {
    if (String(cityData[c][MCITY.COUNTRY_ID]) === params.countryId && String(cityData[c][MCITY.STATUS]) !== 'Archived') {
      cities.push(missionsCityRowToObject(cityData[c], c + 2));
    }
  }

  cities.sort(function(a, b) { return a.cityName.localeCompare(b.cityName); });
  regions.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder || a.regionName.localeCompare(b.regionName); });

  return jsonOk({
    country:  countryObj,
    regions:  regions,
    cities:   cities,
    summary: {
      regionCount:    regions.length,
      cityCount:      cities.length,
      extremeCount:   cities.filter(function(c) { return c.persecutionLevel === 'Extreme'; }).length,
      highCount:      cities.filter(function(c) { return c.persecutionLevel === 'Very High' || c.persecutionLevel === 'High'; }).length
    }
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 4. MISSIONS PARTNERS  (missionary organizations / field workers)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MP_TAB      = 'MissionsPartners';
var MP_NUM_COLS = 20;

var MP = {
  ID: 0,
  ORGANIZATION_NAME: 1,
  PARTNER_TYPE: 2,
  COUNTRY_IDS: 3,
  CONTACT_NAME: 4,
  CONTACT_EMAIL: 5,
  CONTACT_PHONE: 6,
  WEBSITE: 7,
  FOCUS_AREA: 8,
  DESCRIPTION: 9,
  WORKERS_COUNT: 10,
  RELATIONSHIP_STATUS: 11,
  FINANCIAL_SUPPORT: 12,
  PRAYER_SUPPORT: 13,
  LAST_CONTACT_AT: 14,
  SECURITY_LEVEL: 15,
  NOTES: 16,
  STATUS: 17,
  CREATED_AT: 18,
  UPDATED_AT: 19
};

function missionsPartnerRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:              rowIndex,
    id:                 String(vals[MP.ID] || ''),
    organizationName:   String(vals[MP.ORGANIZATION_NAME] || ''),
    partnerType:        String(vals[MP.PARTNER_TYPE] || ''),
    countryIds:         String(vals[MP.COUNTRY_IDS] || ''),
    contactName:        String(vals[MP.CONTACT_NAME] || ''),
    contactEmail:       String(vals[MP.CONTACT_EMAIL] || ''),
    contactPhone:       String(vals[MP.CONTACT_PHONE] || ''),
    website:            String(vals[MP.WEBSITE] || ''),
    focusArea:          String(vals[MP.FOCUS_AREA] || ''),
    description:        String(vals[MP.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    workersCount:       Number(vals[MP.WORKERS_COUNT] || 0),
    relationshipStatus: String(vals[MP.RELATIONSHIP_STATUS] || ''),
    financialSupport:   String(vals[MP.FINANCIAL_SUPPORT] || ''),
    prayerSupport:      String(vals[MP.PRAYER_SUPPORT] || ''),
    lastContactAt:      isoDate(vals[MP.LAST_CONTACT_AT]),
    securityLevel:      String(vals[MP.SECURITY_LEVEL] || ''),
    notes:              String(vals[MP.NOTES] || ''),
    status:             String(vals[MP.STATUS] || ''),
    createdAt:          isoDate(vals[MP.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:          isoDate(vals[MP.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Partners Handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleMissionsPartnersList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var data = allRows(db(), MP_TAB, MP_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = missionsPartnerRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.partnerType && obj.partnerType !== params.partnerType) continue;
    if (params.countryId && obj.countryIds.indexOf(params.countryId) === -1) continue;
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleMissionsPartnersGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), MP_TAB, MP_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Partner not found');
  return jsonOk(missionsPartnerRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleMissionsPartnersCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  if (!params.organizationName) return jsonErr('organizationName required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(MP_NUM_COLS);
  row[MP.ID]                  = id;
  row[MP.ORGANIZATION_NAME]   = String(params.organizationName);
  row[MP.PARTNER_TYPE]        = String(params.partnerType || 'Organization');
  row[MP.COUNTRY_IDS]         = String(params.countryIds || '');
  row[MP.CONTACT_NAME]        = String(params.contactName || '');
  row[MP.CONTACT_EMAIL]       = String(params.contactEmail || '');
  row[MP.CONTACT_PHONE]       = String(params.contactPhone || '');
  row[MP.WEBSITE]             = String(params.website || '');
  row[MP.FOCUS_AREA]          = String(params.focusArea || '');
  row[MP.DESCRIPTION]         = String(params.description || '');
  row[MP.WORKERS_COUNT]       = Number(params.workersCount || 0);
  row[MP.RELATIONSHIP_STATUS] = String(params.relationshipStatus || 'Active');
  row[MP.FINANCIAL_SUPPORT]   = String(params.financialSupport || '');
  row[MP.PRAYER_SUPPORT]      = String(params.prayerSupport || 'TRUE');
  row[MP.SECURITY_LEVEL]      = String(params.securityLevel || 'Standard');
  row[MP.NOTES]               = String(params.notes || '');
  row[MP.STATUS]              = 'Active';
  row[MP.CREATED_AT]          = now;
  row[MP.UPDATED_AT]          = now;
  appendRow(ss, MP_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.partners.create', MP_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Partner created' });
}

function handleMissionsPartnersUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MP_TAB, MP_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Partner not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.organizationName !== undefined)   v[MP.ORGANIZATION_NAME]   = String(params.organizationName);
  if (params.partnerType !== undefined)        v[MP.PARTNER_TYPE]        = String(params.partnerType);
  if (params.countryIds !== undefined)         v[MP.COUNTRY_IDS]         = String(params.countryIds);
  if (params.contactName !== undefined)        v[MP.CONTACT_NAME]        = String(params.contactName);
  if (params.contactEmail !== undefined)       v[MP.CONTACT_EMAIL]       = String(params.contactEmail);
  if (params.contactPhone !== undefined)       v[MP.CONTACT_PHONE]       = String(params.contactPhone);
  if (params.website !== undefined)            v[MP.WEBSITE]             = String(params.website);
  if (params.focusArea !== undefined)          v[MP.FOCUS_AREA]          = String(params.focusArea);
  if (params.description !== undefined)        v[MP.DESCRIPTION]         = String(params.description);
  if (params.workersCount !== undefined)       v[MP.WORKERS_COUNT]       = Number(params.workersCount);
  if (params.relationshipStatus !== undefined) v[MP.RELATIONSHIP_STATUS] = String(params.relationshipStatus);
  if (params.financialSupport !== undefined)   v[MP.FINANCIAL_SUPPORT]   = String(params.financialSupport);
  if (params.prayerSupport !== undefined)      v[MP.PRAYER_SUPPORT]      = String(params.prayerSupport);
  if (params.securityLevel !== undefined)      v[MP.SECURITY_LEVEL]      = String(params.securityLevel);
  if (params.notes !== undefined)              v[MP.NOTES]               = String(params.notes);
  if (params.status !== undefined)             v[MP.STATUS]              = String(params.status);
  v[MP.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MP_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.partners.update', MP_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Partner updated' });
}

function handleMissionsPartnersDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MP_TAB, MP_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Partner not found');
  hit.vals[MP.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[MP.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MP_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.partners.delete', MP_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Partner archived' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 5. MISSIONS PRAYER FOCUS  (rotating prayer targets)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MPF_TAB      = 'MissionsPrayerFocus';
var MPF_NUM_COLS = 16;

var MPF = {
  ID: 0,
  COUNTRY_ID: 1,
  CITY_ID: 2,
  TITLE: 3,
  DESCRIPTION: 4,
  SCRIPTURE: 5,
  START_DATE: 6,
  END_DATE: 7,
  PRIORITY: 8,
  PEOPLE_GROUP: 9,
  PRAYER_POINTS: 10,
  RESPONSES_COUNT: 11,
  CREATED_BY: 12,
  STATUS: 13,
  CREATED_AT: 14,
  UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function missionsPrayerFocusRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[MPF.ID] || ''),
    countryId:      String(vals[MPF.COUNTRY_ID] || ''),
    cityId:         String(vals[MPF.CITY_ID] || ''),
    title:          String(vals[MPF.TITLE] || ''),
    description:    String(vals[MPF.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    scripture:      String(vals[MPF.SCRIPTURE] || ''),
    startDate:      isoDate(vals[MPF.START_DATE]),
    endDate:        isoDate(vals[MPF.END_DATE]),
    priority:       String(vals[MPF.PRIORITY] || 'Normal'),
    peopleGroup:    String(vals[MPF.PEOPLE_GROUP] || ''),
    prayerPoints:   String(vals[MPF.PRAYER_POINTS] || ''),
    responsesCount: Number(vals[MPF.RESPONSES_COUNT] || 0),
    createdBy:      String(vals[MPF.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    status:         String(vals[MPF.STATUS] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[MPF.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[MPF.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Prayer Focus Handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleMissionsPrayerFocusList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), MPF_TAB, MPF_NUM_COLS);
  var now  = new Date().toISOString().substring(0, 10);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = missionsPrayerFocusRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.countryId && obj.countryId !== params.countryId) continue;
    if (params.activeOnly) {
      if (obj.status !== 'Active') continue;
      if (obj.startDate && obj.startDate > now) continue;
      if (obj.endDate && obj.endDate < now) continue;
    }
    if (params.status && obj.status !== params.status) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleMissionsPrayerFocusCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  if (!params.title) return jsonErr('title required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(MPF_NUM_COLS);
  row[MPF.ID]               = id;
  row[MPF.COUNTRY_ID]       = String(params.countryId || '');
  row[MPF.CITY_ID]          = String(params.cityId || '');
  row[MPF.TITLE]            = String(params.title);
  row[MPF.DESCRIPTION]      = String(params.description || '');
  row[MPF.SCRIPTURE]        = String(params.scripture || '');
  row[MPF.START_DATE]       = params.startDate || now;
  row[MPF.END_DATE]         = params.endDate || '';
  row[MPF.PRIORITY]         = String(params.priority || 'Normal');
  row[MPF.PEOPLE_GROUP]     = String(params.peopleGroup || '');
  row[MPF.PRAYER_POINTS]    = String(params.prayerPoints || '');
  row[MPF.RESPONSES_COUNT]  = 0;
  row[MPF.CREATED_BY]       = auth.email;
  row[MPF.STATUS]           = 'Active';
  row[MPF.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[MPF.UPDATED_AT]       = now;
  appendRow(ss, MPF_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.prayerFocus.create', MPF_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Prayer focus created' });
}

function handleMissionsPrayerFocusUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MPF_TAB, MPF_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Prayer focus not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.title !== undefined)         v[MPF.TITLE]         = String(params.title);
  if (params.description !== undefined)   v[MPF.DESCRIPTION]   = String(params.description);
  if (params.scripture !== undefined)     v[MPF.SCRIPTURE]     = String(params.scripture);
  if (params.startDate !== undefined)     v[MPF.START_DATE]    = params.startDate;
  if (params.endDate !== undefined)       v[MPF.END_DATE]      = params.endDate;
  if (params.priority !== undefined)      v[MPF.PRIORITY]      = String(params.priority);
  if (params.peopleGroup !== undefined)   v[MPF.PEOPLE_GROUP]  = String(params.peopleGroup);
  if (params.prayerPoints !== undefined)  v[MPF.PRAYER_POINTS] = String(params.prayerPoints);
  if (params.status !== undefined)        v[MPF.STATUS]        = String(params.status);
  v[MPF.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MPF_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.prayerFocus.update', MPF_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Prayer focus updated' });
}

/** Record a prayer response (someone prayed for this focus) */
function handleMissionsPrayerFocusRespond(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MPF_TAB, MPF_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Prayer focus not found');
  hit.vals[MPF.RESPONSES_COUNT] = Number(hit.vals[MPF.RESPONSES_COUNT] || 0) + 1;
  hit.vals[MPF.UPDATED_AT]      = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MPF_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  return jsonOk({ responsesCount: hit.vals[MPF.RESPONSES_COUNT], message: 'Prayer recorded' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 6. MISSIONS UPDATES  (field intelligence / situation reports)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MU_TAB      = 'MissionsUpdates';
var MU_NUM_COLS = 16;

var MU = {
  ID: 0,
  COUNTRY_ID: 1,
  CITY_ID: 2,
  TITLE: 3,
  BODY: 4,
  UPDATE_TYPE: 5,
  SEVERITY: 6,
  SOURCE: 7,
  VERIFIED: 8,
  SECURITY_LEVEL: 9,
  PUBLISHED: 10,
  PUBLISHED_BY: 11,
  ATTACHMENT_URL: 12,
  NOTES: 13,
  CREATED_AT: 14,
  UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function missionsUpdateRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:         rowIndex,
    id:            String(vals[MU.ID] || ''),
    countryId:     String(vals[MU.COUNTRY_ID] || ''),
    cityId:        String(vals[MU.CITY_ID] || ''),
    title:         String(vals[MU.TITLE] || ''),
    body:          String(vals[MU.BODY] || ''),
    updateType:    String(vals[MU.UPDATE_TYPE] || ''),
    severity:      String(vals[MU.SEVERITY] || ''),
    source:        String(vals[MU.SOURCE] || ''),
    verified:      String(vals[MU.VERIFIED] || 'FALSE'),
    securityLevel: String(vals[MU.SECURITY_LEVEL] || ''),
    published:     String(vals[MU.PUBLISHED] || 'FALSE'),
    publishedBy:   String(vals[MU.PUBLISHED_BY] || ''),
    attachmentUrl: String(vals[MU.ATTACHMENT_URL] || ''),
    notes:         String(vals[MU.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:     isoDate(vals[MU.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:     isoDate(vals[MU.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Updates Handlers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleMissionsUpdatesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), MU_TAB, MU_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = missionsUpdateRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    // Only show published updates to non-leaders, or all to leaders+
    if (auth.roleLevel < 2 && obj.published !== 'TRUE') continue;
    // Security-restricted updates
    if (obj.securityLevel === 'Restricted' && auth.roleLevel < 3) continue;
    if (params.countryId && obj.countryId !== params.countryId) continue;
    if (params.updateType && obj.updateType !== params.updateType) continue;
    if (params.severity && obj.severity !== params.severity) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.createdAt || '') > (a.createdAt || '') ? 1 : -1; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleMissionsUpdatesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), MU_TAB, MU_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Update not found');
  var obj = missionsUpdateRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex);
  if (obj.securityLevel === 'Restricted' && auth.roleLevel < 3) return jsonErr('Access denied');
  return jsonOk(obj);
}

function handleMissionsUpdatesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  if (!params.title) return jsonErr('title required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(MU_NUM_COLS);
  row[MU.ID]             = id;
  row[MU.COUNTRY_ID]     = String(params.countryId || '');
  row[MU.CITY_ID]        = String(params.cityId || '');
  row[MU.TITLE]          = String(params.title);
  row[MU.BODY]           = String(params.body || '');
  row[MU.UPDATE_TYPE]    = String(params.updateType || 'Situation Report');
  row[MU.SEVERITY]       = String(params.severity || 'Normal');
  row[MU.SOURCE]         = String(params.source || '');
  row[MU.VERIFIED]       = (params.verified === true || params.verified === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[MU.SECURITY_LEVEL] = String(params.securityLevel || 'Standard');
  row[MU.PUBLISHED]      = 'FALSE';
  row[MU.ATTACHMENT_URL]  = String(params.attachmentUrl || '');
  row[MU.NOTES]          = String(params.notes || '');
  row[MU.CREATED_AT]     = now;
  row[MU.UPDATED_AT]     = now;
  appendRow(ss, MU_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.updates.create', MU_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Update created' });
}

function handleMissionsUpdatesPublish(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MU_TAB, MU_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Update not found');
  hit.vals[MU.PUBLISHED]    = 'TRUE';
  hit.vals[MU.PUBLISHED_BY] = auth.email;
  hit.vals[MU.UPDATED_AT]   = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MU_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);

  // Update parent country's last update timestamp
  var cid = String(hit.vals[MU.COUNTRY_ID] || '');
  if (cid) {
    var country = findRowById(ss, MR_TAB, MR_NUM_COLS, cid);
    if (country) {
      country.vals[MR.LAST_UPDATE_AT] = new Date();
      country.vals[MR.UPDATED_AT]     = new Date();
      writeRow(ss, MR_TAB, country.rowIndex, country.vals);
    }
  }

  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.updates.publish', MU_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Update published' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 7. MISSIONS TEAMS  (local church mission teams & trip planning)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MT_TAB      = 'MissionsTeams';
var MT_NUM_COLS = 20;

var MT = {
  ID: 0,
  TEAM_NAME: 1,
  COUNTRY_ID: 2,
  TEAM_LEAD_ID: 3,
  TEAM_LEAD_NAME: 4,
  MEMBER_IDS: 5,
  MEMBER_NAMES: 6,
  MEMBER_COUNT: 7,
  TRIP_TYPE: 8,
  START_DATE: 9,
  END_DATE: 10,
  BUDGET: 11,
  RAISED: 12,
  OBJECTIVES: 13,
  PARTNER_ID: 14,
  TRIP_STATUS: 15,
  DEBRIEF_NOTES: 16,
  NOTES: 17,
  CREATED_AT: 18,
  UPDATED_AT: 19
};

function missionsTeamRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:        rowIndex,
    id:           String(vals[MT.ID] || ''),
    teamName:     String(vals[MT.TEAM_NAME] || ''),
    countryId:    String(vals[MT.COUNTRY_ID] || ''),
    teamLeadId:   String(vals[MT.TEAM_LEAD_ID] || ''),
    teamLeadName: String(vals[MT.TEAM_LEAD_NAME] || ''),
    memberIds:    String(vals[MT.MEMBER_IDS] || ''),
    memberNames:  String(vals[MT.MEMBER_NAMES] || ''),
    memberCount:  Number(vals[MT.MEMBER_COUNT] || 0),
    tripType:     String(vals[MT.TRIP_TYPE] || ''),
    startDate:    isoDate(vals[MT.START_DATE]),
    endDate:      isoDate(vals[MT.END_DATE]),
    budget:       Number(vals[MT.BUDGET] || 0),
    raised:       Number(vals[MT.RAISED] || 0),
    objectives:   String(vals[MT.OBJECTIVES] || ''),
    partnerId:    String(vals[MT.PARTNER_ID] || ''),
    tripStatus:   String(vals[MT.TRIP_STATUS] || ''),
    debriefNotes: String(vals[MT.DEBRIEF_NOTES] || ''),
    notes:        String(vals[MT.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:    isoDate(vals[MT.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:    isoDate(vals[MT.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Teams Handlers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleMissionsTeamsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var data = allRows(db(), MT_TAB, MT_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = missionsTeamRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.countryId && obj.countryId !== params.countryId) continue;
    if (params.tripStatus && obj.tripStatus !== params.tripStatus) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleMissionsTeamsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 1);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), MT_TAB, MT_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Team not found');
  return jsonOk(missionsTeamRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleMissionsTeamsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  if (!params.teamName) return jsonErr('teamName required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(MT_NUM_COLS);
  row[MT.ID]             = id;
  row[MT.TEAM_NAME]      = String(params.teamName);
  row[MT.COUNTRY_ID]     = String(params.countryId || '');
  row[MT.TEAM_LEAD_ID]   = String(params.teamLeadId || auth.memberId || '');
  row[MT.TEAM_LEAD_NAME] = String(params.teamLeadName || auth.displayName || auth.email);
  row[MT.MEMBER_IDS]     = String(params.memberIds || '');
  row[MT.MEMBER_NAMES]   = String(params.memberNames || '');
  row[MT.MEMBER_COUNT]   = Number(params.memberCount || 0);
  row[MT.TRIP_TYPE]       = String(params.tripType || 'Short-Term');
  row[MT.START_DATE]     = params.startDate || '';
  row[MT.END_DATE]       = params.endDate || '';
  row[MT.BUDGET]         = Number(params.budget || 0);
  row[MT.RAISED]         = Number(params.raised || 0);
  row[MT.OBJECTIVES]     = String(params.objectives || '');
  row[MT.PARTNER_ID]     = String(params.partnerId || '');
  row[MT.TRIP_STATUS]    = 'Planning';
  row[MT.NOTES]          = String(params.notes || '');
  row[MT.CREATED_AT]     = now;
  row[MT.UPDATED_AT]     = now;
  appendRow(ss, MT_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.teams.create', MT_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Team created' });
}

function handleMissionsTeamsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MT_TAB, MT_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Team not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.teamName !== undefined)     v[MT.TEAM_NAME]      = String(params.teamName);
  if (params.countryId !== undefined)    v[MT.COUNTRY_ID]     = String(params.countryId);
  if (params.teamLeadId !== undefined)   v[MT.TEAM_LEAD_ID]   = String(params.teamLeadId);
  if (params.teamLeadName !== undefined) v[MT.TEAM_LEAD_NAME] = String(params.teamLeadName);
  if (params.memberIds !== undefined)    v[MT.MEMBER_IDS]     = String(params.memberIds);
  if (params.memberNames !== undefined)  v[MT.MEMBER_NAMES]   = String(params.memberNames);
  if (params.memberCount !== undefined)  v[MT.MEMBER_COUNT]   = Number(params.memberCount);
  if (params.tripType !== undefined)     v[MT.TRIP_TYPE]       = String(params.tripType);
  if (params.startDate !== undefined)    v[MT.START_DATE]     = params.startDate;
  if (params.endDate !== undefined)      v[MT.END_DATE]       = params.endDate;
  if (params.budget !== undefined)       v[MT.BUDGET]         = Number(params.budget);
  if (params.raised !== undefined)       v[MT.RAISED]         = Number(params.raised);
  if (params.objectives !== undefined)   v[MT.OBJECTIVES]     = String(params.objectives);
  if (params.partnerId !== undefined)    v[MT.PARTNER_ID]     = String(params.partnerId);
  if (params.tripStatus !== undefined)   v[MT.TRIP_STATUS]    = String(params.tripStatus);
  if (params.debriefNotes !== undefined) v[MT.DEBRIEF_NOTES]  = String(params.debriefNotes);
  if (params.notes !== undefined)        v[MT.NOTES]          = String(params.notes);
  v[MT.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MT_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.teams.update', MT_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Team updated' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 8. MISSIONS METRICS  (per-country aggregated persecution metrics)
//    Stores time-series data so you can track changes year over year
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var MMET_TAB      = 'MissionsMetrics';
var MMET_NUM_COLS = 20;

var MMET = {
  ID: 0,
  COUNTRY_ID: 1,
  YEAR: 2,
  PERSECUTION_RANK: 3,
  PERSECUTION_SCORE: 4,
  VIOLENCE_SCORE: 5,
  PRESSURE_SCORE: 6,
  CHURCH_LIFE_SCORE: 7,
  NATIONAL_LIFE_SCORE: 8,
  SOCIAL_LIFE_SCORE: 9,
  PRIVATE_LIFE_SCORE: 10,
  FAMILY_LIFE_SCORE: 11,
  POPULATION: 12,
  PCT_CHRISTIAN: 13,
  PCT_EVANGELICAL: 14,
  UNREACHED_GROUPS: 15,
  SOURCE: 16,
  NOTES: 17,
  CREATED_AT: 18,
  UPDATED_AT: 19
};

function missionsMetricRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:              rowIndex,
    id:                 String(vals[MMET.ID] || ''),
    countryId:          String(vals[MMET.COUNTRY_ID] || ''),
    year:               Number(vals[MMET.YEAR] || 0),
    persecutionRank:    Number(vals[MMET.PERSECUTION_RANK] || 0),
    persecutionScore:   Number(vals[MMET.PERSECUTION_SCORE] || 0),
    violenceScore:      Number(vals[MMET.VIOLENCE_SCORE] || 0),
    pressureScore:      Number(vals[MMET.PRESSURE_SCORE] || 0),
    churchLifeScore:    Number(vals[MMET.CHURCH_LIFE_SCORE] || 0),
    nationalLifeScore:  Number(vals[MMET.NATIONAL_LIFE_SCORE] || 0),
    socialLifeScore:    Number(vals[MMET.SOCIAL_LIFE_SCORE] || 0),
    privateLifeScore:   Number(vals[MMET.PRIVATE_LIFE_SCORE] || 0),
    familyLifeScore:    Number(vals[MMET.FAMILY_LIFE_SCORE] || 0),
    population:         Number(vals[MMET.POPULATION] || 0),
    pctChristian:       String(vals[MMET.PCT_CHRISTIAN] || ''),
    pctEvangelical:     String(vals[MMET.PCT_EVANGELICAL] || ''),
    unreachedGroups:    Number(vals[MMET.UNREACHED_GROUPS] || 0),
    source:             String(vals[MMET.SOURCE] || ''),
    notes:              String(vals[MMET.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:          isoDate(vals[MMET.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:          isoDate(vals[MMET.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Metrics Handlers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleMissionsMetricsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), MMET_TAB, MMET_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = missionsMetricRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.countryId && obj.countryId !== params.countryId) continue;
    if (params.year && obj.year !== Number(params.year)) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return b.year - a.year; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleMissionsMetricsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  if (!params.countryId || !params.year) return jsonErr('countryId and year required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(MMET_NUM_COLS);
  row[MMET.ID]                  = id;
  row[MMET.COUNTRY_ID]          = String(params.countryId);
  row[MMET.YEAR]                = Number(params.year);
  row[MMET.PERSECUTION_RANK]    = Number(params.persecutionRank || 0);
  row[MMET.PERSECUTION_SCORE]   = Number(params.persecutionScore || 0);
  row[MMET.VIOLENCE_SCORE]      = Number(params.violenceScore || 0);
  row[MMET.PRESSURE_SCORE]      = Number(params.pressureScore || 0);
  row[MMET.CHURCH_LIFE_SCORE]   = Number(params.churchLifeScore || 0);
  row[MMET.NATIONAL_LIFE_SCORE] = Number(params.nationalLifeScore || 0);
  row[MMET.SOCIAL_LIFE_SCORE]   = Number(params.socialLifeScore || 0);
  row[MMET.PRIVATE_LIFE_SCORE]  = Number(params.privateLifeScore || 0);
  row[MMET.FAMILY_LIFE_SCORE]   = Number(params.familyLifeScore || 0);
  row[MMET.POPULATION]          = Number(params.population || 0);
  row[MMET.PCT_CHRISTIAN]       = String(params.pctChristian || '');
  row[MMET.PCT_EVANGELICAL]     = String(params.pctEvangelical || '');
  row[MMET.UNREACHED_GROUPS]    = Number(params.unreachedGroups || 0);
  row[MMET.SOURCE]              = String(params.source || '');
  row[MMET.NOTES]               = String(params.notes || '');
  row[MMET.CREATED_AT]          = now;
  row[MMET.UPDATED_AT]          = now;
  appendRow(ss, MMET_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.metrics.create', MMET_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Metrics recorded' });
}

function handleMissionsMetricsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MMET_TAB, MMET_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Metrics record not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.persecutionRank !== undefined)    v[MMET.PERSECUTION_RANK]    = Number(params.persecutionRank);
  if (params.persecutionScore !== undefined)   v[MMET.PERSECUTION_SCORE]   = Number(params.persecutionScore);
  if (params.violenceScore !== undefined)      v[MMET.VIOLENCE_SCORE]      = Number(params.violenceScore);
  if (params.pressureScore !== undefined)      v[MMET.PRESSURE_SCORE]      = Number(params.pressureScore);
  if (params.churchLifeScore !== undefined)    v[MMET.CHURCH_LIFE_SCORE]   = Number(params.churchLifeScore);
  if (params.nationalLifeScore !== undefined)  v[MMET.NATIONAL_LIFE_SCORE] = Number(params.nationalLifeScore);
  if (params.socialLifeScore !== undefined)    v[MMET.SOCIAL_LIFE_SCORE]   = Number(params.socialLifeScore);
  if (params.privateLifeScore !== undefined)   v[MMET.PRIVATE_LIFE_SCORE]  = Number(params.privateLifeScore);
  if (params.familyLifeScore !== undefined)    v[MMET.FAMILY_LIFE_SCORE]   = Number(params.familyLifeScore);
  if (params.population !== undefined)         v[MMET.POPULATION]          = Number(params.population);
  if (params.pctChristian !== undefined)       v[MMET.PCT_CHRISTIAN]       = String(params.pctChristian);
  if (params.pctEvangelical !== undefined)     v[MMET.PCT_EVANGELICAL]     = String(params.pctEvangelical);
  if (params.unreachedGroups !== undefined)    v[MMET.UNREACHED_GROUPS]    = Number(params.unreachedGroups);
  if (params.source !== undefined)             v[MMET.SOURCE]              = String(params.source);
  if (params.notes !== undefined)              v[MMET.NOTES]               = String(params.notes);
  v[MMET.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MMET_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'missions.metrics.update', MMET_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Metrics updated' });
}

/** Compare metrics across years for a country */
function handleMissionsMetricsCompare(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.countryId) return jsonErr('countryId required');
  var data = allRows(db(), MMET_TAB, MMET_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][MMET.COUNTRY_ID]) === params.countryId) {
      out.push(missionsMetricRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.year - b.year; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MISSIONS DASHBOARD (aggregate overview)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleMissionsDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss = db();

  var registry = allRows(ss, MR_TAB, MR_NUM_COLS);
  var totalCountries = 0, window1040Count = 0, extreme = 0, veryHigh = 0;
  for (var i = 0; i < registry.length; i++) {
    if (String(registry[i][MR.STATUS]) === 'Archived') continue;
    totalCountries++;
    if (String(registry[i][MR.REGION_1040]) === 'TRUE') window1040Count++;
    var lvl = String(registry[i][MR.PERSECUTION_LEVEL] || '');
    if (lvl === 'Extreme') extreme++;
    if (lvl === 'Very High') veryHigh++;
  }

  var regions = allRows(ss, MREG_TAB, MREG_NUM_COLS);
  var activeRegions = 0;
  for (var r = 0; r < regions.length; r++) {
    if (String(regions[r][MREG.STATUS]) !== 'Archived') activeRegions++;
  }

  var cities = allRows(ss, MCITY_TAB, MCITY_NUM_COLS);
  var activeCities = 0;
  for (var c = 0; c < cities.length; c++) {
    if (String(cities[c][MCITY.STATUS]) !== 'Archived') activeCities++;
  }

  var partners = allRows(ss, MP_TAB, MP_NUM_COLS);
  var activePartners = 0;
  for (var p = 0; p < partners.length; p++) {
    if (String(partners[p][MP.STATUS]) === 'Active') activePartners++;
  }

  var teams = allRows(ss, MT_TAB, MT_NUM_COLS);
  var prayerFocii = allRows(ss, MPF_TAB, MPF_NUM_COLS);
  var activePrayer = 0;
  for (var pf = 0; pf < prayerFocii.length; pf++) {
    if (String(prayerFocii[pf][MPF.STATUS]) === 'Active') activePrayer++;
  }

  var updates = allRows(ss, MU_TAB, MU_NUM_COLS);

  return jsonOk({
    totalCountries:       totalCountries,
    window1040Countries:  window1040Count,
    extremePersecution:   extreme,
    veryHighPersecution:  veryHigh,
    totalRegions:         activeRegions,
    totalCities:          activeCities,
    activePartners:       activePartners,
    totalTeams:           teams.length,
    activePrayerFocii:    activePrayer,
    totalUpdates:         updates.length
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// HELPER: Update counter on MissionsRegistry
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function updateRegistryCount_(ss, countryId, colIndex, delta) {
  if (!countryId) return;
  var hit = findRowById(ss, MR_TAB, MR_NUM_COLS, countryId);
  if (!hit) return;
  hit.vals[colIndex]       = Math.max(0, Number(hit.vals[colIndex] || 0) + delta);
  hit.vals[MR.UPDATED_AT]  = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, MR_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SEED: Pre-populate MissionsRegistry with 10/40 Window countries
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function seedMissionsRegistry_(ss) {
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(MR_TAB);
  if (!sheet) return;
  if (sheet.getLastRow() >= 2) return; // Already seeded

  var now = new Date();
  var countries = [
    // ─── Core 10/40 Window nations ───────────────────────────────────────
    // Format: [name, iso, icon, tabName, continent, religion, persLvl]
    ['Afghanistan',   'AF', '🇦🇫', 'Afghanistan',   'Asia',    'Islam',       'Extreme'],
    ['Algeria',       'DZ', '🇩🇿', 'Algeria',       'Africa',  'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['Bahrain',       'BH', '🇧🇭', 'Bahrain',       'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Bangladesh',    'BD', '🇧🇩', 'Bangladesh',    'Asia',    'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['Bhutan',        'BT', '🇧🇹', 'Bhutan',        'Asia',    'Buddhism',    'High'],
    ['Brunei',        'BN', '🇧🇳', 'Brunei',        'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Cambodia',      'KH', '🇰🇭', 'Cambodia',      'Asia',    'Buddhism',    'Medium'],
    ['Chad',          'TD', '🇹🇩', 'Chad',          'Africa',  'Islam',       'High'],
    ['China',         'CN', '🇨🇳', 'China',         'Asia',    'Folk/Atheism','Very High'],
    ['Comoros',       'KM', '🇰🇲', 'Comoros',       'Africa',  'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Djibouti',      'DJ', '🇩🇯', 'Djibouti',      'Africa',  'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Egypt',         'EG', '🇪🇬', 'Egypt',         'Africa',  'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['Eritrea',       'ER', '🇪🇷', 'Eritrea',       'Africa',  'Islam/Christianity','Extreme'],
    ['Ethiopia',      'ET', '🇪🇹', 'Ethiopia',      'Africa',  'Christianity','Very High'],
    ['Gambia',        'GM', '🇬🇲', 'Gambia',        'Africa',  'Islam',       'Medium'],
    ['Guinea',        'GN', '🇬🇳', 'Guinea',        'Africa',  'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Guinea-Bissau', 'GW', '🇬🇼', 'GuineaBissau',  'Africa',  'Islam',       'Medium'],
    ['India',         'IN', '🇮🇳', 'India',         'Asia',    'Hinduism',    'Extreme'],
    ['Indonesia',     'ID', '🇮🇩', 'Indonesia',     'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Iran',          'IR', '🇮🇷', 'Iran',          'Asia',    'Islam',       'Extreme'],
    ['Iraq',          'IQ', '🇮🇶', 'Iraq',          'Asia',    'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['Israel',        'IL', '🇮🇱', 'Israel',        'Asia',    'Judaism',     'Medium'],
    ['Japan',         'JP', '🇯🇵', 'Japan',         'Asia',    'Shintoism/Buddhism','Low'],
    ['Jordan',        'JO', '🇯🇴', 'Jordan',        'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Kuwait',        'KW', '🇰🇼', 'Kuwait',        'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Kyrgyzstan',    'KG', '🇰🇬', 'Kyrgyzstan',    'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Laos',          'LA', '🇱🇦', 'Laos',          'Asia',    'Buddhism',    'Very High'],
    ['Lebanon',       'LB', '🇱🇧', 'Lebanon',       'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Libya',         'LY', '🇱🇾', 'Libya',         'Africa',  'Islam',       'Extreme'],
    ['Malaysia',      'MY', '🇲🇾', 'Malaysia',      'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Maldives',      'MV', '🇲🇻', 'Maldives',      'Asia',    'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['Mali',          'ML', '🇲🇱', 'Mali',          'Africa',  'Islam',       'Extreme'],
    ['Mauritania',    'MR', '🇲🇷', 'Mauritania',    'Africa',  'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['Morocco',       'MA', '🇲🇦', 'Morocco',       'Africa',  'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['Myanmar',       'MM', '🇲🇲', 'Myanmar',       'Asia',    'Buddhism',    'Extreme'],
    ['Nepal',         'NP', '🇳🇵', 'Nepal',         'Asia',    'Hinduism',    'High'],
    ['Niger',         'NE', '🇳🇪', 'Niger',         'Africa',  'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Nigeria',       'NG', '🇳🇬', 'Nigeria',       'Africa',  'Islam/Christianity','Extreme'],
    ['North Korea',   'KP', '🇰🇵', 'NKorea',        'Asia',    'Juche/Atheism','Extreme'],
    ['Oman',          'OM', '🇴🇲', 'Oman',          'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Pakistan',      'PK', '🇵🇰', 'Pakistan',      'Asia',    'Islam',       'Extreme'],
    ['Qatar',         'QA', '🇶🇦', 'Qatar',         'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Saudi Arabia',  'SA', '🇸🇦', 'Saudi',         'Asia',    'Islam',       'Extreme'],
    ['Senegal',       'SN', '🇸🇳', 'Senegal',       'Africa',  'Islam',       'Medium'],
    ['Somalia',       'SO', '🇸🇴', 'Somalia',       'Africa',  'Islam',       'Extreme'],
    ['Sri Lanka',     'LK', '🇱🇰', 'Sri',           'Asia',    'Buddhism',    'Very High'],
    ['Sudan',         'SD', '🇸🇩', 'Sudan',         'Africa',  'Islam',       'Extreme'],
    ['Syria',         'SY', '🇸🇾', 'Syria',         'Asia',    'Islam',       'Extreme'],
    ['Tajikistan',    'TJ', '🇹🇯', 'Tajikstan',     'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Thailand',      'TH', '🇹🇭', 'Thailand',      'Asia',    'Buddhism',    'Medium'],
    ['Tunisia',       'TN', '🇹🇳', 'Tunisia',       'Africa',  'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Turkey',        'TR', '🇹🇷', 'Turkey',        'Asia',    'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['Turkmenistan',  'TM', '🇹🇲', 'Turkmenistan',  'Asia',    'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['UAE',           'AE', '🇦🇪', 'UAE',           'Asia',    'Islam',       'High'],
    ['Uzbekistan',    'UZ', '🇺🇿', 'Uzbekistan',    'Asia',    'Islam',       'Very High'],
    ['Vietnam',       'VN', '🇻🇳', 'Vietnam',       'Asia',    'Folk/Buddhism','Very High'],
    ['Yemen',         'YE', '🇾🇪', 'Yemen',         'Asia',    'Islam',       'Extreme'],

    // ─── Additional tracked nations (outside strict 10/40 Window) ────────
    ['Belarus',       'BY', '🇧🇾', 'Belarus',       'Europe',  'Christianity','High'],
    ['Colombia',      'CO', '🇨🇴', 'Colombia',      'S.America','Christianity','High'],
    ['France',        'FR', '🇫🇷', 'France',        'Europe',  'Christianity','Low'],
    ['Germany',       'DE', '🇩🇪', 'Germany',       'Europe',  'Christianity','Low'],
    ['Guatemala',     'GT', '🇬🇹', 'Guatemala',     'C.America','Christianity','Medium'],
    ['Mexico',        'MX', '🇲🇽', 'Mexico',        'N.America','Christianity','High'],
    ['Russia',        'RU', '🇷🇺', 'Russia',        'Europe/Asia','Christianity','Very High'],
    ['UK',            'GB', '🇬🇧', 'UK',            'Europe',  'Christianity','Low']
  ];

  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < countries.length; i++) {
    var c   = countries[i];
    var is1040 = ['Asia', 'Africa'].indexOf(c[4]) !== -1 ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
    // Override: some Asian/African nations we list are not strictly 10/40 — but close enough
    rows.push([
      newId(),           // ID
      c[0],              // Country Name
      c[1],              // ISO Code
      c[2],              // Icon
      c[3],              // Tab Name
      is1040,            // 10/40 Window
      c[4],              // Continent
      0,                 // Population (to be filled)
      '',                // Capital
      '',                // Official Language
      c[5],              // Dominant Religion
      0,                 // Persecution Rank
      0,                 // Persecution Score
      c[6],              // Persecution Level
      '',                // Gospel Access
      0,                 // Unreached People Groups
      0,                 // Total People Groups
      '',                // % Evangelical
      '',                // % Christian
      '',                // Freedom Index
      0,                 // Region Count
      0,                 // City Count
      0,                 // Partner Count
      '',                // Last Update At
      'Active',          // Status
      i + 1,             // Sort Order
      now,               // Created At
      now                // Updated At
    ]);
  }

  if (rows.length > 0) {
    sheet.getRange(2, 1, rows.length, MR_NUM_COLS).setValues(rows);
  }
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Outreach.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: OUTREACH — Evangelism, Visitor Follow-Up, Community Engagement
// Tabs: OutreachContacts, OutreachCampaigns, OutreachFollowUps
//
// Tracks the church's outreach into the community:
//   - OutreachContacts: people the church is reaching out to (visitors,
//     community contacts, evangelism prospects — NOT yet Members)
//   - OutreachCampaigns: organized outreach efforts (door-to-door, events,
//     service projects, media campaigns, mission partnerships)
//   - OutreachFollowUps: interaction log for each contact
//
// When an outreach contact becomes a member, their OutreachContact record
// gets linked via the MemberID field and status changes to "Converted".
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// OUTREACH CONTACTS (people being reached)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var OC_TAB = 'OutreachContacts';
var OC_NUM_COLS = 22;

var OC = {
  ID: 0, FIRST: 1, LAST: 2, EMAIL: 3, PHONE: 4,
  ADDRESS: 5, CITY: 6, STATE: 7, ZIP: 8,
  SOURCE: 9, CAMPAIGN_ID: 10, STATUS: 11,
  INTEREST_LEVEL: 12, NOTES: 13, MEMBER_ID: 14,
  ASSIGNED_TO: 15, LAST_CONTACT: 16, NEXT_FOLLOWUP: 17,
  TAGS: 18, CREATED_BY: 19, CREATED_AT: 20, UPDATED_AT: 21
};

/** Resolve a sheet row number from either rowIndex or id (UUID). */
function resolveOutreachContactRow_(params) {
  var ri = Number(params.rowIndex || 0);
  if (ri >= 2) return ri;
  var id = String(params.id || '').trim();
  if (!id) return 0;
  var sheet = getTab(OC_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return 0;
  var ids = sheet.getRange(2, OC.ID + 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) {
    if (String(ids[i][0]) === id) return i + 2;
  }
  return 0;
}

function outreachContactRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[OC.ID] || ''),
    firstName:      String(vals[OC.FIRST] || ''),
    lastName:       String(vals[OC.LAST] || ''),
    email:          String(vals[OC.EMAIL] || ''),
    phone:          String(vals[OC.PHONE] || ''),
    address:        String(vals[OC.ADDRESS] || ''),
    city:           String(vals[OC.CITY] || ''),
    state:          String(vals[OC.STATE] || ''),
    zip:            String(vals[OC.ZIP] || ''),
    source:         String(vals[OC.SOURCE] || ''),
    campaignId:     String(vals[OC.CAMPAIGN_ID] || ''),
    status:         String(vals[OC.STATUS] || ''),
    interestLevel:  String(vals[OC.INTEREST_LEVEL] || ''),
    notes:          String(vals[OC.NOTES] || ''),
    memberId:       String(vals[OC.MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    assignedTo:     String(vals[OC.ASSIGNED_TO] || ''),
    lastContact:    isoDate(vals[OC.LAST_CONTACT]),
    nextFollowUp:   isoDate(vals[OC.NEXT_FOLLOWUP]),
    tags:           String(vals[OC.TAGS] || ''),
    createdBy:      String(vals[OC.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[OC.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[OC.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleOutreachContactsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(OC_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, OC_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var status = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var source = String(params.source || '').trim();
  var campaignId = String(params.campaignId || '').trim();
  var assignedTo = String(params.assignedTo || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = outreachContactRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    if (source && obj.source !== source) continue;
    if (campaignId && obj.campaignId !== campaignId) continue;
    if (assignedTo && obj.assignedTo !== assignedTo) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleOutreachContactsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var contactId = String(params.contactId || '').trim();
  if (!contactId) return jsonErr('contactId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(OC_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Contact not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, OC_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][OC.ID]) === contactId) {
      var obj = outreachContactRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      obj.followUps = getOutreachFollowUps_(contactId);
      return jsonOk({ row: obj });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Contact not found.');
}

/**
 * Public self-referral from the public Connect form (no token required).
 * Creates an OutreachContacts row with source='public-connect-form' and status='New'.
 * Params: firstName, lastName, email, phone, notes
 */
function handleOutreachContactPublic_(params) {
  var firstName = String(params.firstName || '').trim();
  var lastName  = String(params.lastName  || '').trim();
  var email     = normalizeEmail(params.email || '');
  var phone     = String(params.phone || '').trim();
  var notes     = String(params.notes || '').trim();

  if (!firstName) return jsonErr('firstName is required.');
  if (!email)     return jsonErr('email is required.');
  if (!isValidEmail(email)) return jsonErr('email is invalid.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(OC_NUM_COLS);

  row[OC.ID]            = generateId();
  row[OC.FIRST]         = firstName;
  row[OC.LAST]          = lastName;
  row[OC.EMAIL]         = email;
  row[OC.PHONE]         = phone;
  row[OC.ADDRESS]       = '';
  row[OC.CITY]          = '';
  row[OC.STATE]         = '';
  row[OC.ZIP]           = '';
  row[OC.SOURCE]        = 'public-connect-form';
  row[OC.CAMPAIGN_ID]   = '';
  row[OC.STATUS]        = 'New';
  row[OC.INTEREST_LEVEL]= 'Unknown';
  row[OC.NOTES]         = notes;
  row[OC.MEMBER_ID]     = '';
  row[OC.ASSIGNED_TO]   = '';
  row[OC.LAST_CONTACT]  = now.substring(0, 10);
  row[OC.NEXT_FOLLOWUP] = '';
  row[OC.TAGS]          = '';
  row[OC.CREATED_BY]    = 'public-submit';
  row[OC.CREATED_AT]    = now;
  row[OC.UPDATED_AT]    = now;

  var sheet = getTab(OC_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit({ email: email, role: 'public' },
    'outreach.contacts.submit', OC_TAB, newIndex,
    'Public connect form — ' + firstName + ' ' + lastName);

  // Notify all pastors and admins if enabled
  if (String(getAppConfigValue_('NOTIFY_CONNECT_FORM', 'TRUE')).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE') {
    notifyPastorsAndAdmins_(
      'New Connect Card Submitted',
      'Someone has filled out the public Connect form and would like to be contacted.\n\n' +
      '  Name:  ' + firstName + ' ' + lastName + '\n' +
      '  Email: ' + email + '\n' +
      '  Phone: ' + (phone || '(not provided)') + '\n' +
      (notes ? '  Note:  ' + notes + '\n' : '') +
      '\nID: ' + row[OC.ID],
      'outreach.contacts.submit',
      'NOTIF_SYSTEM'
