    );
  }

  return jsonOk({ message: 'Thank you! We will be in touch soon.', id: row[OC.ID] });
}

function handleOutreachContactsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.firstName && !params.lastName) return jsonErr('firstName or lastName is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(OC_NUM_COLS);

  row[OC.ID]            = generateId();
  row[OC.FIRST]         = String(params.firstName || '');
  row[OC.LAST]          = String(params.lastName || '');
  row[OC.EMAIL]         = String(params.email || '');
  row[OC.PHONE]         = String(params.phone || '');
  row[OC.ADDRESS]       = String(params.address || '');
  row[OC.CITY]          = String(params.city || '');
  row[OC.STATE]         = String(params.state || '');
  row[OC.ZIP]           = String(params.zip || '');
  row[OC.SOURCE]        = String(params.source || 'Walk-In');
  row[OC.CAMPAIGN_ID]   = String(params.campaignId || '');
  row[OC.STATUS]        = 'New';
  row[OC.INTEREST_LEVEL]= String(params.interestLevel || 'Unknown');
  row[OC.NOTES]         = String(params.notes || '');
  row[OC.MEMBER_ID]     = '';
  row[OC.ASSIGNED_TO]   = String(params.assignedTo || auth.email);
  row[OC.LAST_CONTACT]  = now.substring(0, 10);
  row[OC.NEXT_FOLLOWUP] = params.nextFollowUp || '';
  row[OC.TAGS]          = String(params.tags || '');
  row[OC.CREATED_BY]    = auth.email;
  row[OC.CREATED_AT]    = now;
  row[OC.UPDATED_AT]    = now;

  var sheet = getTab(OC_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'outreach.contacts.create', OC_TAB, newIndex,
    (params.firstName || '') + ' ' + (params.lastName || '') + ' — ' + (params.source || 'Walk-In'));
  return jsonOk({ row: outreachContactRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleOutreachContactsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var rowIndex = resolveOutreachContactRow_(params);
  if (!rowIndex || rowIndex < 2) return jsonErr('Valid rowIndex or id required.');

  var sheet = getTab(OC_TAB);
  if (rowIndex > sheet.getLastRow()) return jsonErr('Row not found.');

  var existing = sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, OC_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];

  if (params.firstName != null)     existing[OC.FIRST]          = String(params.firstName);
  if (params.lastName != null)      existing[OC.LAST]           = String(params.lastName);
  if (params.contactEmail != null)  existing[OC.EMAIL]          = String(params.contactEmail);
  if (params.phone != null)         existing[OC.PHONE]          = String(params.phone);
  if (params.address != null)       existing[OC.ADDRESS]        = String(params.address);
  if (params.city != null)          existing[OC.CITY]           = String(params.city);
  if (params.state != null)         existing[OC.STATE]          = String(params.state);
  if (params.zip != null)           existing[OC.ZIP]            = String(params.zip);
  if (params.source != null)        existing[OC.SOURCE]         = String(params.source);
  if (params.campaignId != null)    existing[OC.CAMPAIGN_ID]    = String(params.campaignId);
  if (params.status != null)        existing[OC.STATUS]         = String(params.status);
  if (params.interestLevel != null) existing[OC.INTEREST_LEVEL] = String(params.interestLevel);
  if (params.notes != null)         existing[OC.NOTES]          = String(params.notes);
  if (params.assignedTo != null)    existing[OC.ASSIGNED_TO]    = String(params.assignedTo);
  if (params.nextFollowUp != null)  existing[OC.NEXT_FOLLOWUP]  = params.nextFollowUp;
  if (params.tags != null)          existing[OC.TAGS]           = String(params.tags);
  existing[OC.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, OC_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'outreach.contacts.update', OC_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ row: outreachContactRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Convert an outreach contact to a full member.
 * Sets status to "Converted" and records the memberId link.
 */
function handleOutreachContactsConvert(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var rowIndex = resolveOutreachContactRow_(params);
  var memberId = String(params.memberId || '').trim();
  if (!rowIndex || rowIndex < 2) return jsonErr('Valid rowIndex or id required.');
  if (!memberId) return jsonErr('memberId (of the newly created member) is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(OC_TAB);
  if (rowIndex > sheet.getLastRow()) return jsonErr('Row not found.');

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, OC.STATUS + 1).setValue('Converted');
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, OC.MEMBER_ID + 1).setValue(memberId);
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, OC.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(isoNow());

  var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, OC_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
  writeAudit(auth, 'outreach.contacts.convert', OC_TAB, rowIndex,
    'Now Member: ' + memberId);
  return jsonOk({ row: outreachContactRowToObject(fresh, rowIndex) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// OUTREACH CAMPAIGNS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var OCAMP_TAB = 'OutreachCampaigns';
var OCAMP_NUM_COLS = 19;

var OCAMP = {
  ID: 0, NAME: 1, TYPE: 2, DESCRIPTION: 3,
  START_DATE: 4, END_DATE: 5, LOCATION: 6,
  MINISTRY_ID: 7, LEAD_ID: 8, BUDGET: 9,
  GOAL: 10, ACTUAL_REACHED: 11, DECISIONS: 12,
  STATUS: 13, NOTES: 14, TAGS: 15,
  CREATED_BY: 16, CREATED_AT: 17, UPDATED_AT: 18
};

function campaignRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[OCAMP.ID] || ''),
    campaignName:   String(vals[OCAMP.NAME] || ''),
    campaignType:   String(vals[OCAMP.TYPE] || ''),
    description:    String(vals[OCAMP.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    startDate:      isoDate(vals[OCAMP.START_DATE]),
    endDate:        isoDate(vals[OCAMP.END_DATE]),
    location:       String(vals[OCAMP.LOCATION] || ''),
    ministryId:     String(vals[OCAMP.MINISTRY_ID] || ''),
    leadId:         String(vals[OCAMP.LEAD_ID] || ''),
    budget:         Number(vals[OCAMP.BUDGET] || 0),
    goalReached:    Number(vals[OCAMP.GOAL] || 0),
    actualReached:  Number(vals[OCAMP.ACTUAL_REACHED] || 0),
    decisions:      Number(vals[OCAMP.DECISIONS] || 0),
    status:         String(vals[OCAMP.STATUS] || ''),
    notes:          String(vals[OCAMP.NOTES] || ''),
    tags:           String(vals[OCAMP.TAGS] || ''),
    createdBy:      String(vals[OCAMP.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[OCAMP.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[OCAMP.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleOutreachCampaignsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(OCAMP_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, OCAMP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var status = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var campaignType = String(params.campaignType || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = campaignRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    if (campaignType && obj.campaignType !== campaignType) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleOutreachCampaignsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var campaignId = String(params.campaignId || '').trim();
  if (!campaignId) return jsonErr('campaignId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(OCAMP_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Campaign not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, OCAMP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][OCAMP.ID]) === campaignId) {
      return jsonOk({ row: campaignRowToObject(data[i], i + 2) });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Campaign not found.');
}

function handleOutreachCampaignsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.campaignName) return jsonErr('campaignName is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(OCAMP_NUM_COLS);

  row[OCAMP.ID]              = generateId();
  row[OCAMP.NAME]            = String(params.campaignName);
  row[OCAMP.TYPE]            = String(params.campaignType || 'Other');
  row[OCAMP.DESCRIPTION]     = String(params.description || '');
  row[OCAMP.START_DATE]      = params.startDate || now.substring(0, 10);
  row[OCAMP.END_DATE]        = params.endDate || '';
  row[OCAMP.LOCATION]        = String(params.location || '');
  row[OCAMP.MINISTRY_ID]     = String(params.ministryId || '');
  row[OCAMP.LEAD_ID]         = String(params.leadId || '');
  row[OCAMP.BUDGET]          = Number(params.budget || 0);
  row[OCAMP.GOAL]            = Number(params.goalReached || 0);
  row[OCAMP.ACTUAL_REACHED]  = 0;
  row[OCAMP.DECISIONS]       = 0;
  row[OCAMP.STATUS]          = 'Planned';
  row[OCAMP.NOTES]           = String(params.notes || '');
  row[OCAMP.TAGS]            = String(params.tags || '');
  row[OCAMP.CREATED_BY]      = auth.email;
  row[OCAMP.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  row[OCAMP.UPDATED_AT]      = now;

  var sheet = getTab(OCAMP_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'outreach.campaigns.create', OCAMP_TAB, newIndex, params.campaignName);
  return jsonOk({ row: campaignRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleOutreachCampaignsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), OCAMP_TAB, OCAMP_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(OCAMP_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.campaignName != null)  existing[OCAMP.NAME]           = String(params.campaignName);
  if (params.campaignType != null)  existing[OCAMP.TYPE]           = String(params.campaignType);
  if (params.description != null)   existing[OCAMP.DESCRIPTION]    = String(params.description);
  if (params.startDate != null)     existing[OCAMP.START_DATE]     = params.startDate;
  if (params.endDate != null)       existing[OCAMP.END_DATE]       = params.endDate;
  if (params.location != null)      existing[OCAMP.LOCATION]       = String(params.location);
  if (params.ministryId != null)    existing[OCAMP.MINISTRY_ID]    = String(params.ministryId);
  if (params.leadId != null)        existing[OCAMP.LEAD_ID]        = String(params.leadId);
  if (params.budget != null)        existing[OCAMP.BUDGET]         = Number(params.budget);
  if (params.goalReached != null)   existing[OCAMP.GOAL]           = Number(params.goalReached);
  if (params.actualReached != null) existing[OCAMP.ACTUAL_REACHED] = Number(params.actualReached);
  if (params.decisions != null)     existing[OCAMP.DECISIONS]      = Number(params.decisions);
  if (params.status != null)        existing[OCAMP.STATUS]         = String(params.status);
  if (params.notes != null)         existing[OCAMP.NOTES]          = String(params.notes);
  if (params.tags != null)          existing[OCAMP.TAGS]           = String(params.tags);
  existing[OCAMP.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, OCAMP_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'outreach.campaigns.update', OCAMP_TAB, rowIndex,
    String(existing[OCAMP.NAME]));
  return jsonOk({ row: campaignRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// OUTREACH FOLLOW-UPS (interaction log per contact)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var OFU_TAB = 'OutreachFollowUps';
var OFU_NUM_COLS = 12;

var OFU = {
  ID: 0, CONTACT_ID: 1, DATE: 2, TYPE: 3,
  BY_ID: 4, SUMMARY: 5, RESPONSE: 6,
  FOLLOWUP_NEEDED: 7, NEXT_DATE: 8,
  FOLLOWUP_DONE: 9, NOTES: 10, CREATED_AT: 11
};

function followUpRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[OFU.ID] || ''),
    contactId:      String(vals[OFU.CONTACT_ID] || ''),
    date:           isoDate(vals[OFU.DATE]),
    type:           String(vals[OFU.TYPE] || ''),
    byId:           String(vals[OFU.BY_ID] || ''),
    summary:        String(vals[OFU.SUMMARY] || ''),
    response:       String(vals[OFU.RESPONSE] || ''),
    followUpNeeded: toBool(vals[OFU.FOLLOWUP_NEEDED]),
    nextDate:       isoDate(vals[OFU.NEXT_DATE]),
    followUpDone:   toBool(vals[OFU.FOLLOWUP_DONE]),
    notes:          String(vals[OFU.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[OFU.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

function getOutreachFollowUps_(contactId) {
  var sheet = getTab(OFU_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return [];

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, OFU_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][OFU.CONTACT_ID]) !== String(contactId)) continue;
    rows.push(followUpRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }
  rows.sort(function(a, b) {
    return a.date > b.date ? -1 : a.date < b.date ? 1 : 0;
  });
  return rows;
}

function handleOutreachFollowUpsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.contactId) return jsonErr('contactId is required.');
  return jsonOk({ rows: getOutreachFollowUps_(params.contactId) });
}

function handleOutreachFollowUpsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.contactId) return jsonErr('contactId is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.contactId),
    params.date || now.substring(0, 10),
    String(params.type || 'Phone'),
    String(params.byId || auth.email),
    String(params.summary || ''),
    String(params.response || ''),
    toBool(params.followUpNeeded),
    params.nextDate || '',
    false,
    String(params.notes || ''),
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(OFU_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  // Update the parent contact's lastContact date
  updateOutreachContactLastContact_(params.contactId, now.substring(0, 10));

  writeAudit(auth, 'outreach.followups.create', OFU_TAB, newIndex,
    'Contact: ' + params.contactId + ' — ' + (params.type || 'Phone'));
  return jsonOk({ row: followUpRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleOutreachFollowUpsDone(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), OFU_TAB, OFU_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(OFU_TAB);

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, OFU.FOLLOWUP_DONE + 1).setValue(true);
  var fresh = sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, OFU_NUM_COLS).getValues()[0];
  writeAudit(auth, 'outreach.followups.done', OFU_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ row: followUpRowToObject(fresh, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Internal: updates LastContact on the OutreachContacts row.
 */
function updateOutreachContactLastContact_(contactId, dateStr) {
  var sheet = getTab(OC_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return;
  var ids = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < ids.length; i++) {
    if (String(ids[i][0]) === String(contactId)) {
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, OC.LAST_CONTACT + 1).setValue(dateStr);
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, OC.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(isoNow());
      return;
    }
  }
}

/**
 * Returns outreach follow-ups that are due (across all contacts).
 */
function handleOutreachFollowUpsDue(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(OFU_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, OFU_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var today = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = followUpRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (!obj.followUpNeeded || obj.followUpDone) continue;
    if (obj.nextDate && obj.nextDate <= today) rows.push(obj);
  }

  rows.sort(function(a, b) {
    return a.nextDate > b.nextDate ? 1 : a.nextDate < b.nextDate ? -1 : 0;
  });

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// OUTREACH DASHBOARD / SUMMARY
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleOutreachDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');

  // Contacts summary
  var ocSheet = getTab(OC_TAB);
  var ocLast = ocSheet.getLastRow();
  var contacts = { total: 0, byStatus: {}, bySource: {}, needFollowUp: 0 };
  if (ocLast >= 2) {
    var ocData = ocSheet.getRange(2, 1, ocLast - 1, OC_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    var today = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
    for (var i = 0; i < ocData.length; i++) {
      contacts.total++;
      var st = String(ocData[i][OC.STATUS] || 'New');
      var src = String(ocData[i][OC.SOURCE] || 'Unknown');
      contacts.byStatus[st] = (contacts.byStatus[st] || 0) + 1;
      contacts.bySource[src] = (contacts.bySource[src] || 0) + 1;
      var nf = isoDate(ocData[i][OC.NEXT_FOLLOWUP]).substring(0, 10);
      if (nf && nf <= today) contacts.needFollowUp++;
    }
  }

  // Campaigns summary
  var campSheet = getTab(OCAMP_TAB);
  var campLast = campSheet.getLastRow();
  var campaigns = { total: 0, active: 0, totalReached: 0, totalDecisions: 0 };
  if (campLast >= 2) {
    var campData = campSheet.getRange(2, 1, campLast - 1, OCAMP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var j = 0; j < campData.length; j++) {
      campaigns.total++;
      if (String(campData[j][OCAMP.STATUS]) === 'Active') campaigns.active++;
      campaigns.totalReached += Number(campData[j][OCAMP.ACTUAL_REACHED] || 0);
      campaigns.totalDecisions += Number(campData[j][OCAMP.DECISIONS] || 0);
    }
  }

  // Follow-ups due
  var fuSheet = getTab(OFU_TAB);
  var fuLast = fuSheet.getLastRow();
  var followUpsDue = 0;
  if (fuLast >= 2) {
    var fuData = fuSheet.getRange(2, 1, fuLast - 1, OFU_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    var todayStr = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
    for (var k = 0; k < fuData.length; k++) {
      if (!toBool(fuData[k][OFU.FOLLOWUP_NEEDED])) continue;
      if (toBool(fuData[k][OFU.FOLLOWUP_DONE])) continue;
      var nd = isoDate(fuData[k][OFU.NEXT_DATE]).substring(0, 10);
      if (nd && nd <= todayStr) followUpsDue++;
    }
  }

  return jsonOk({
    dashboard: {
      contacts: contacts,
      campaigns: campaigns,
      followUpsDue: followUpsDue
    }
  });
}



// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  ResetUserData.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ResetUserData.gs
// Wipes all user/auth data rows (keeps headers), then
// re-seeds sheet structure to defaults. Run once.
// ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var USER_TABS_TO_WIPE = [
  'AuthUsers',
  'AccessControl',
  'AuthAudit',
  'AuditLog',
  'UserProfiles',
  'Permissions',
  'Members',
  'MemberCards',
];

function resetUserDataSheets() {
  var ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID')
  );

  USER_TABS_TO_WIPE.forEach(function(tabName) {
    var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(tabName);
    if (!sheet) {
      Logger.log('SKIP (not found): ' + tabName);
      return;
    }
    var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
    if (lastRow > 1) {
      sheet.deleteRows(2, lastRow - 1);
      Logger.log('WIPED: ' + tabName + ' (' + (lastRow - 1) + ' rows removed)');
    } else {
      Logger.log('ALREADY EMPTY: ' + tabName);
    }
  });

  // Re-run setup to restore headers/dropdowns on any tabs that got messy
  _buildCoreTabs_();

  Logger.log('Done. Run createFirstAdmin() next if you need a fresh admin account.');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Sermons.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: SERMONS — Preaching Module (Google Drive–backed)
// Tabs: Sermons, SermonSeries, SermonReviews
//
// Preachers upload sermon manuscripts, outlines, or media (audio/video/PDF)
// to a shared Google Drive folder. The Sermons tab stores metadata and review
// status. SermonSeries groups sermons into multi-week teaching series.
// SermonReviews provides a structured feedback/approval workflow.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SERMONS (individual sermon records)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SER_TAB     = 'Sermons';
var SER_NUM_COLS = 22;

var SER = {
  ID: 0, TITLE: 1, PREACHER_ID: 2, PREACHER_NAME: 3,
  DATE: 4, SERVICE_TYPE: 5, SERIES_ID: 6, SERIES_ORDER: 7,
  SCRIPTURE_REFS: 8, TOPIC_TAGS: 9, SUMMARY: 10,
  DRIVE_FILE_ID: 11, FILE_URL: 12, FILENAME: 13, FILE_TYPE: 14,
  AUDIO_DRIVE_ID: 15, VIDEO_DRIVE_ID: 16,
  STATUS: 17, VISIBILITY: 18,
  CREATED_BY: 19, CREATED_AT: 20, UPDATED_AT: 21
};

function sermonRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:         rowIndex,
    id:            String(vals[SER.ID] || ''),
    title:         String(vals[SER.TITLE] || ''),
    preacherId:    String(vals[SER.PREACHER_ID] || ''),
    preacherName:  String(vals[SER.PREACHER_NAME] || ''),
    date:          isoDate(vals[SER.DATE]),
    serviceType:   String(vals[SER.SERVICE_TYPE] || ''),
    seriesId:      String(vals[SER.SERIES_ID] || ''),
    seriesOrder:   Number(vals[SER.SERIES_ORDER] || 0),
    scriptureRefs: String(vals[SER.SCRIPTURE_REFS] || ''),
    topicTags:     String(vals[SER.TOPIC_TAGS] || ''),
    summary:       String(vals[SER.SUMMARY] || ''),
    driveFileId:   String(vals[SER.DRIVE_FILE_ID] || ''),
    fileUrl:       String(vals[SER.FILE_URL] || ''),
    filename:      String(vals[SER.FILENAME] || ''),
    fileType:      String(vals[SER.FILE_TYPE] || ''),
    audioDriveId:  String(vals[SER.AUDIO_DRIVE_ID] || ''),
    videoDriveId:  String(vals[SER.VIDEO_DRIVE_ID] || ''),
    status:        String(vals[SER.STATUS] || ''),
    visibility:    String(vals[SER.VISIBILITY] || ''),
    createdBy:     String(vals[SER.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:     isoDate(vals[SER.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:     isoDate(vals[SER.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SERMON SERIES (multi-week teaching themes)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SSERIES_TAB      = 'SermonSeries';
var SSERIES_NUM_COLS = 12;

var SSERIES = {
  ID: 0, SERIES_NAME: 1, DESCRIPTION: 2, THEME_SCRIPTURE: 3,
  START_DATE: 4, END_DATE: 5, PREACHER_ID: 6, STATUS: 7,
  COVER_IMAGE_URL: 8, SERMON_COUNT: 9,
  CREATED_AT: 10, UPDATED_AT: 11
};

function seriesRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[SSERIES.ID] || ''),
    seriesName:     String(vals[SSERIES.SERIES_NAME] || ''),
    description:    String(vals[SSERIES.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    themeScripture: String(vals[SSERIES.THEME_SCRIPTURE] || ''),
    startDate:      isoDate(vals[SSERIES.START_DATE]),
    endDate:        isoDate(vals[SSERIES.END_DATE]),
    preacherId:     String(vals[SSERIES.PREACHER_ID] || ''),
    status:         String(vals[SSERIES.STATUS] || ''),
    coverImageUrl:  String(vals[SSERIES.COVER_IMAGE_URL] || ''),
    sermonCount:    Number(vals[SSERIES.SERMON_COUNT] || 0),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[SSERIES.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[SSERIES.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SERMON REVIEWS (feedback / approval workflow)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SR_TAB      = 'SermonReviews';
var SR_NUM_COLS = 9;

var SR = {
  ID: 0, SERMON_ID: 1, REVIEWER_ID: 2, REVIEWER_NAME: 3,
  DECISION: 4, FEEDBACK: 5, REVIEWED_AT: 6,
  PRIVATE_NOTES: 7, CREATED_AT: 8
};

function reviewRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:        rowIndex,
    id:           String(vals[SR.ID] || ''),
    sermonId:     String(vals[SR.SERMON_ID] || ''),
    reviewerId:   String(vals[SR.REVIEWER_ID] || ''),
    reviewerName: String(vals[SR.REVIEWER_NAME] || ''),
    decision:     String(vals[SR.DECISION] || ''),
    feedback:     String(vals[SR.FEEDBACK] || ''),
    reviewedAt:   isoDate(vals[SR.REVIEWED_AT]),
    privateNotes: String(vals[SR.PRIVATE_NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:    isoDate(vals[SR.CREATED_AT])
  };
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DRIVE FOLDER HELPERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Returns the Google Drive folder for sermon files.
 * Uses SERMON_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID from AppConfig. If blank, auto-creates a
 * folder called "Church CRM Sermons" and saves the ID back to AppConfig.
 */
function getSermonFolder_() {
  var folderId = '';
  try { folderId = String(getAppConfigValue_('SERMON_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID') || '').trim(); } catch (_) {}

  if (folderId) {
    try { return DriveApp.getFolderById(folderId); } catch (_) {}
  }

  var folder = DriveApp.createFolder('Church CRM Sermons');
  folder.setSharing(DriveApp.Access.ANYONE_WITH_LINK, DriveApp.Permission.VIEW);

  try {
    var ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID'));
    var cfgSheet = ss.getSheetByName('AppConfig');
    if (cfgSheet) {
      var lastRow = cfgSheet.getLastRow();
      if (lastRow >= 2) {
        var keys = cfgSheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
        for (var i = 0; i < keys.length; i++) {
          if (String(keys[i][0]).trim() === 'SERMON_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID') {
            cfgSheet.getRange(i + 2, 2).setValue(folder.getId());
            cfgSheet.getRange(i + 2, 5).setValue('SYSTEM');
            cfgSheet.getRange(i + 2, 6).setValue(new Date());
            return folder;
          }
        }
      }
      cfgSheet.appendRow(['SERMON_DRIVE_FOLDER_ID', folder.getId(),
        'Google Drive folder ID for sermon files', 'General', 'SYSTEM', new Date()]);
    }
  } catch (_) {}

  return folder;
}

/**
 * Validates that the MIME type is an allowed sermon file format.
 */
function isAllowedSermonType_(mimeType) {
  var allowed = [
    'application/pdf',
    'application/msword',
    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document',
    'application/vnd.google-apps.document',
    'text/plain', 'text/rtf',
    'application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.presentationml.presentation',
    'application/vnd.ms-powerpoint',
    'audio/mpeg', 'audio/mp4', 'audio/wav', 'audio/ogg', 'audio/webm',
    'video/mp4', 'video/webm', 'video/quicktime',
    'image/jpeg', 'image/png'
  ];
  return allowed.indexOf(String(mimeType || '').toLowerCase()) !== -1;
}

/**
 * Max sermon file size (bytes). Default 50 MB for audio/video.
 */
function getMaxSermonBytes_() {
  var mb = 50;
  try { mb = Number(getAppConfigValue_('SERMON_MAX_SIZE_MB') || 50); } catch (_) {}
  if (mb < 1) mb = 1;
  if (mb > 100) mb = 100;
  return mb * 1024 * 1024;
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SERMON HANDLERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Create a sermon record (metadata only — no file yet).
 */
function handleSermonsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.title) return jsonErr('title is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(SER_NUM_COLS);
  row[SER.ID]             = generateId();
  row[SER.TITLE]          = String(params.title);
  row[SER.PREACHER_ID]    = String(params.preacherId || auth.email);
  row[SER.PREACHER_NAME]  = String(params.preacherName || '');
  row[SER.DATE]           = String(params.date || now.substring(0, 10));
  row[SER.SERVICE_TYPE]   = String(params.serviceType || 'Sunday AM');
  row[SER.SERIES_ID]      = String(params.seriesId || '');
  row[SER.SERIES_ORDER]   = Number(params.seriesOrder || 0);
  row[SER.SCRIPTURE_REFS] = String(params.scriptureRefs || '');
  row[SER.TOPIC_TAGS]     = String(params.topicTags || '');
  row[SER.SUMMARY]        = String(params.summary || '');
  row[SER.DRIVE_FILE_ID]  = '';
  row[SER.FILE_URL]       = '';
  row[SER.FILENAME]       = '';
  row[SER.FILE_TYPE]      = '';
  row[SER.AUDIO_DRIVE_ID] = '';
  row[SER.VIDEO_DRIVE_ID] = '';
  row[SER.STATUS]         = 'Draft';
  row[SER.VISIBILITY]     = String(params.visibility || 'Leaders Only');
  row[SER.CREATED_BY]     = auth.email;
  row[SER.CREATED_AT]     = now;
  row[SER.UPDATED_AT]     = now;

  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  // Update series sermon count
  if (row[SER.SERIES_ID]) updateSeriesSermonCount_(row[SER.SERIES_ID]);

  writeAudit(auth, 'sermons.create', SER_TAB, newIndex, params.title);
  return jsonOk({ row: sermonRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

/**
 * Upload / attach a manuscript file to an existing sermon.
 * POST with base64Data, mimeType, filename, sermonRowIndex.
 */
function handleSermonsUpload(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SER_TAB, SER_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var base64Data = String(params.base64Data || '').trim();
  var mimeType   = String(params.mimeType || '').trim();
  var filename   = String(params.filename || 'sermon').trim();

  if (!base64Data) return jsonErr('base64Data is required.');
  if (!mimeType)   return jsonErr('mimeType is required.');
  if (!isAllowedSermonType_(mimeType))
    return jsonErr('Unsupported file type: ' + mimeType + '. Allowed: PDF, Word, PPT, TXT, RTF, audio (MP3/M4A/WAV/OGG), video (MP4/WebM/MOV), images.');

  var decoded;
  try { decoded = Utilities.base64Decode(base64Data); } catch (e) {
    return jsonErr('Invalid base64 data: ' + e.message);
  }

  var maxBytes = getMaxSermonBytes_();
  if (decoded.length > maxBytes) {
    return jsonErr('File too large (' + Math.round(decoded.length / (1024 * 1024)) + ' MB). Max: ' + Math.round(maxBytes / (1024 * 1024)) + ' MB.');
  }

  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  // Save to Drive
  var folder = getSermonFolder_();
  var blob   = Utilities.newBlob(decoded, mimeType, filename);
  var file   = folder.createFile(blob);
  file.setSharing(DriveApp.Access.ANYONE_WITH_LINK, DriveApp.Permission.VIEW);

  var driveFileId = file.getId();
  var url = 'https://drive.google.com/file/d/' + driveFileId + '/view';

  // Determine which column to populate (manuscript, audio, or video)
  var isAudio = mimeType.indexOf('audio/') === 0;
  var isVideo = mimeType.indexOf('video/') === 0;

  if (isAudio) {
    existing[SER.AUDIO_DRIVE_ID] = driveFileId;
  } else if (isVideo) {
    existing[SER.VIDEO_DRIVE_ID] = driveFileId;
  } else {
    existing[SER.DRIVE_FILE_ID] = driveFileId;
    existing[SER.FILE_URL]      = url;
    existing[SER.FILENAME]      = filename;
    existing[SER.FILE_TYPE]     = mimeType;
  }
  existing[SER.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SER_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'sermons.upload', SER_TAB, rowIndex, filename + ' (' + mimeType + ')');
  return jsonOk({ row: sermonRowToObject(existing, rowIndex), driveFileId: driveFileId, url: url });
}

/**
 * List sermons with filters.
 */
function handleSermonsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data        = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SER_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var preacherId  = String(params.preacherId || '').trim();
  var seriesId    = String(params.seriesId || '').trim();
  var status      = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var dateFrom    = String(params.dateFrom || '').trim();
  var dateTo      = String(params.dateTo || '').trim();
  var tagFilter   = String(params.topicTags || '').trim().toLowerCase();

  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = sermonRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);

    // Visibility check: Leaders Only → leader+, Members Only → volunteer+
    if (obj.visibility === 'Leaders Only' && !hasRole(auth, 'leader')) continue;
    if (obj.visibility === 'Members Only' && !hasRole(auth, 'volunteer')) continue;

    if (preacherId && obj.preacherId !== preacherId) continue;
    if (seriesId   && obj.seriesId   !== seriesId)   continue;
    if (status     && obj.status     !== status)      continue;
    if (dateFrom   && obj.date < dateFrom)            continue;
    if (dateTo     && obj.date > dateTo)              continue;
    if (tagFilter  && obj.topicTags.toLowerCase().indexOf(tagFilter) === -1) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

/**
 * Get a single sermon + its reviews.
 */
function handleSermonsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sermonId = String(params.sermonId || '').trim();
  if (!sermonId) return jsonErr('sermonId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Sermon not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SER_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SER.ID]) === sermonId) {
      var sermon = sermonRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      if (sermon.visibility === 'Leaders Only' && !hasRole(auth, 'leader')) return jsonErr('Access denied.');
      if (sermon.visibility === 'Members Only' && !hasRole(auth, 'volunteer')) return jsonErr('Access denied.');
      sermon.reviews = getSermonReviews_(sermonId);
      return jsonOk({ row: sermon });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Sermon not found.');
}

/**
 * Update sermon metadata.
 */
function handleSermonsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SER_TAB, SER_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  var oldSeriesId = String(existing[SER.SERIES_ID] || '');

  if (params.title         != null) existing[SER.TITLE]          = String(params.title);
  if (params.preacherId    != null) existing[SER.PREACHER_ID]    = String(params.preacherId);
  if (params.preacherName  != null) existing[SER.PREACHER_NAME]  = String(params.preacherName);
  if (params.date          != null) existing[SER.DATE]           = String(params.date);
  if (params.serviceType   != null) existing[SER.SERVICE_TYPE]   = String(params.serviceType);
  if (params.seriesId      != null) existing[SER.SERIES_ID]      = String(params.seriesId);
  if (params.seriesOrder   != null) existing[SER.SERIES_ORDER]   = Number(params.seriesOrder);
  if (params.scriptureRefs != null) existing[SER.SCRIPTURE_REFS] = String(params.scriptureRefs);
  if (params.topicTags     != null) existing[SER.TOPIC_TAGS]     = String(params.topicTags);
  if (params.summary       != null) existing[SER.SUMMARY]        = String(params.summary);
  if (params.visibility    != null) existing[SER.VISIBILITY]     = String(params.visibility);
  existing[SER.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SER_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);

  // Update series counts if changed
  var newSeriesId = String(existing[SER.SERIES_ID] || '');
  if (oldSeriesId !== newSeriesId) {
    if (oldSeriesId) updateSeriesSermonCount_(oldSeriesId);
    if (newSeriesId) updateSeriesSermonCount_(newSeriesId);
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'sermons.update', SER_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[SER.TITLE] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: sermonRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Submit sermon for review — changes status from Draft to Under Review.
 */
function handleSermonsSubmit(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SER_TAB, SER_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  if (String(existing[SER.STATUS]) !== 'Draft') return jsonErr('Only Draft sermons can be submitted for review.');

  existing[SER.STATUS]     = 'Under Review';
  existing[SER.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SER_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);

  writeAudit(auth, 'sermons.submit', SER_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[SER.TITLE] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: sermonRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Approve a sermon — pastor+ only. Changes status to Approved.
 */
function handleSermonsApprove(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SER_TAB, SER_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  existing[SER.STATUS]     = 'Approved';
  existing[SER.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SER_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);

  writeAudit(auth, 'sermons.approve', SER_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[SER.TITLE] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: sermonRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Mark sermon as delivered — sets status to Delivered and visibility to Public.
 */
function handleSermonsDeliver(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SER_TAB, SER_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  existing[SER.STATUS]     = 'Delivered';
  existing[SER.VISIBILITY] = String(params.visibility || 'Public');
  existing[SER.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();
  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SER_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);

  writeAudit(auth, 'sermons.deliver', SER_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[SER.TITLE] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: sermonRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

/**
 * Delete a sermon — trashes Drive files and removes the row.
 */
function handleSermonsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SER_TAB, SER_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  var title    = String(existing[SER.TITLE] || '');
  var seriesId = String(existing[SER.SERIES_ID] || '');

  // Trash Drive files
  var ids = [existing[SER.DRIVE_FILE_ID], existing[SER.AUDIO_DRIVE_ID], existing[SER.VIDEO_DRIVE_ID]];
  for (var f = 0; f < ids.length; f++) {
    var fid = String(ids[f] || '');
    if (fid) { try { DriveApp.getFileById(fid).setTrashed(true); } catch (_) {} }
  }

  sheet.deleteRow(rowIndex);
  if (seriesId) updateSeriesSermonCount_(seriesId);

  writeAudit(auth, 'sermons.delete', SER_TAB, rowIndex, title);
  return jsonOk({ deleted: true, title: title });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SERMON SERIES HANDLERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleSermonSeriesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var sheet = getTab(SSERIES_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data   = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SSERIES_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var status = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var rows   = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = seriesRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleSermonSeriesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'readonly');
  var seriesId = String(params.seriesId || '').trim();
  if (!seriesId) return jsonErr('seriesId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SSERIES_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Series not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SSERIES_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SSERIES.ID]) === seriesId) {
      var series = seriesRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      series.sermons = getSeriesSermons_(seriesId, auth);
      return jsonOk({ row: series });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Series not found.');
}

function handleSermonSeriesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  if (!params.seriesName) return jsonErr('seriesName is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(SSERIES_NUM_COLS);
  row[SSERIES.ID]              = generateId();
  row[SSERIES.SERIES_NAME]     = String(params.seriesName);
  row[SSERIES.DESCRIPTION]     = String(params.description || '');
  row[SSERIES.THEME_SCRIPTURE]  = String(params.themeScripture || '');
  row[SSERIES.START_DATE]      = String(params.startDate || now.substring(0, 10));
  row[SSERIES.END_DATE]        = String(params.endDate || '');
  row[SSERIES.PREACHER_ID]     = String(params.preacherId || auth.email);
  row[SSERIES.STATUS]          = 'Active';
  row[SSERIES.COVER_IMAGE_URL] = String(params.coverImageUrl || '');
  row[SSERIES.SERMON_COUNT]    = 0;
  row[SSERIES.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  row[SSERIES.UPDATED_AT]      = now;

  var sheet = getTab(SSERIES_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'sermonSeries.create', SSERIES_TAB, newIndex, params.seriesName);
  return jsonOk({ row: seriesRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleSermonSeriesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SSERIES_TAB, SSERIES_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SSERIES_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.seriesName     != null) existing[SSERIES.SERIES_NAME]     = String(params.seriesName);
  if (params.description    != null) existing[SSERIES.DESCRIPTION]     = String(params.description);
  if (params.themeScripture != null) existing[SSERIES.THEME_SCRIPTURE] = String(params.themeScripture);
  if (params.startDate      != null) existing[SSERIES.START_DATE]      = String(params.startDate);
  if (params.endDate        != null) existing[SSERIES.END_DATE]        = String(params.endDate);
  if (params.preacherId     != null) existing[SSERIES.PREACHER_ID]     = String(params.preacherId);
  if (params.status         != null) existing[SSERIES.STATUS]          = String(params.status);
  if (params.coverImageUrl  != null) existing[SSERIES.COVER_IMAGE_URL] = String(params.coverImageUrl);
  existing[SSERIES.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SSERIES_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'sermonSeries.update', SSERIES_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[SSERIES.SERIES_NAME] || ''));
  return jsonOk({ row: seriesRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SERMON REVIEW HANDLERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Submit a review/feedback on a sermon.
 */
function handleSermonReviewsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  if (!params.sermonId) return jsonErr('sermonId is required.');
  if (!params.decision) return jsonErr('decision is required (Approved / Needs Revision / Feedback Only).');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.sermonId),
    auth.email,
    String(params.reviewerName || auth.displayName || auth.email),
    String(params.decision),
    String(params.feedback || ''),
    now,
    String(params.privateNotes || ''),
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(SR_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  // If decision is "Needs Revision", set sermon status back to Draft
  if (params.decision === 'Needs Revision') {
    updateSermonStatus_(params.sermonId, 'Revision Requested');
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'sermonReviews.create', SR_TAB, newIndex, params.sermonId + ' → ' + params.decision);
  return jsonOk({ row: reviewRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

/**
 * List reviews for a sermon.
 */
function handleSermonReviewsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.sermonId) return jsonErr('sermonId is required.');
  return jsonOk({ rows: getSermonReviews_(params.sermonId) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// INTERNAL HELPERS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function getSermonReviews_(sermonId) {
  var sheet = getTab(SR_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return [];

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SR_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SR.SERMON_ID]) === String(sermonId)) {
      rows.push(reviewRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return rows;
}

function getSeriesSermons_(seriesId, auth) {
  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return [];

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SER_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SER.SERIES_ID]) !== String(seriesId)) continue;
    var obj = sermonRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.visibility === 'Leaders Only' && !hasRole(auth, 'leader')) continue;
    if (obj.visibility === 'Members Only' && !hasRole(auth, 'volunteer')) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }
  // Sort by series order
  rows.sort(function(a, b) { return a.seriesOrder - b.seriesOrder; });
  return rows;
}

function updateSeriesSermonCount_(seriesId) {
  var serSheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var serLast  = serSheet.getLastRow();
  var count    = 0;
  if (serLast >= 2) {
    var serData = serSheet.getRange(2, 1, serLast - 1, SER_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < serData.length; i++) {
      if (String(serData[i][SER.SERIES_ID]) === String(seriesId)) count++;
    }
  }

  var ssSheet = getTab(SSERIES_TAB);
  var ssLast  = ssSheet.getLastRow();
  if (ssLast < 2) return;
  var ssData = ssSheet.getRange(2, 1, ssLast - 1, SSERIES_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var j = 0; j < ssData.length; j++) {
    if (String(ssData[j][SSERIES.ID]) === String(seriesId)) {
      ssSheet.getRange(j + 2, SSERIES.SERMON_COUNT + 1).setValue(count);
      ssSheet.getRange(j + 2, SSERIES.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(isoNow());
      break;
    }
  }
}

function updateSermonStatus_(sermonId, newStatus) {
  var sheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return;
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SER_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SER.ID]) === String(sermonId)) {
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, SER.STATUS + 1).setValue(newStatus);
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, SER.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(isoNow());
      break;
    }
  }
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DASHBOARD
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleSermonsDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');

  var serSheet = getTab(SER_TAB);
  var serLast  = serSheet.getLastRow();
  var ssSheet  = getTab(SSERIES_TAB);
  var ssLast   = ssSheet.getLastRow();

  var totalSermons = serLast >= 2 ? serLast - 1 : 0;
  var totalSeries  = ssLast  >= 2 ? ssLast  - 1 : 0;
  var byStatus     = {};
  var byPreacher   = {};

  if (serLast >= 2) {
    var data = serSheet.getRange(2, 1, serLast - 1, SER_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
      var s = String(data[i][SER.STATUS] || 'Draft');
      var p = String(data[i][SER.PREACHER_NAME] || data[i][SER.PREACHER_ID] || 'Unknown');
      byStatus[s]   = (byStatus[s]   || 0) + 1;
      byPreacher[p] = (byPreacher[p] || 0) + 1;
    }
  }

  return jsonOk({
    totalSermons: totalSermons,
    totalSeries:  totalSeries,
    byStatus:     byStatus,
    byPreacher:   byPreacher
  });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Services.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: SERVICE PLANNING — Weekly Service Order Builder
// Tabs: ServicePlans, ServicePlanItems
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SERVICE PLANS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SP_TAB = 'ServicePlans';
var SP_NUM_COLS = 14;

var SP = {
  ID: 0, SERVICE_DATE: 1, SERVICE_TYPE: 2, THEME: 3,
  SCRIPTURE: 4, SERMON_TITLE: 5, PREACHER_ID: 6, WORSHIP_LEADER_ID: 7,
  STATUS: 8, NOTES: 9, CREATED_BY: 10, CREATED_AT: 11,
  UPDATED_BY: 12, UPDATED_AT: 13
};

function planRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[SP.ID] || ''),
    serviceDate:     isoDate(vals[SP.SERVICE_DATE]),
    serviceType:     String(vals[SP.SERVICE_TYPE] || ''),
    theme:           String(vals[SP.THEME] || ''),
    scriptureFocus:  String(vals[SP.SCRIPTURE] || ''),
    sermonTitle:     String(vals[SP.SERMON_TITLE] || ''),
    preacherId:      String(vals[SP.PREACHER_ID] || ''),
    worshipLeaderId: String(vals[SP.WORSHIP_LEADER_ID] || ''),
    status:          String(vals[SP.STATUS] || ''),
    notes:           String(vals[SP.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:       String(vals[SP.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[SP.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedBy:       String(vals[SP.UPDATED_BY] || ''),
    updatedAt:       isoDate(vals[SP.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleServicePlansList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(SP_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var status = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var serviceType = String(params.serviceType || '').trim();
  var dateFrom = String(params.dateFrom || '').trim();
  var dateTo = String(params.dateTo || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = planRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    if (serviceType && obj.serviceType !== serviceType) continue;
    if (dateFrom && obj.serviceDate && obj.serviceDate < dateFrom) continue;
    if (dateTo && obj.serviceDate && obj.serviceDate > dateTo) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleServicePlansGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var planId = String(params.planId || '').trim();
  if (!planId) return jsonErr('planId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SP_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Plan not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SP.ID]) === planId) {
      // Also fetch the plan items
      var items = getItemsForPlan_(planId);
      var plan = planRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      plan.items = items;
      return jsonOk({ row: plan });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Plan not found.');
}

function handleServicePlansCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.serviceDate) return jsonErr('serviceDate is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(SP_NUM_COLS);

  row[SP.ID]                = generateId();
  row[SP.SERVICE_DATE]      = params.serviceDate;
  row[SP.SERVICE_TYPE]      = String(params.serviceType || 'Sunday AM');
  row[SP.THEME]             = String(params.theme || '');
  row[SP.SCRIPTURE]         = String(params.scriptureFocus || '');
  row[SP.SERMON_TITLE]      = String(params.sermonTitle || '');
  row[SP.PREACHER_ID]       = String(params.preacherId || '');
  row[SP.WORSHIP_LEADER_ID] = String(params.worshipLeaderId || '');
  row[SP.STATUS]            = 'Draft';
  row[SP.NOTES]             = String(params.notes || '');
  row[SP.CREATED_BY]        = auth.email;
  row[SP.CREATED_AT]        = now;
  row[SP.UPDATED_BY]        = auth.email;
  row[SP.UPDATED_AT]        = now;

  var sheet = getTab(SP_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'servicePlans.create', SP_TAB, newIndex,
    params.serviceDate + ' — ' + (params.serviceType || 'Sunday AM'));
  return jsonOk({ row: planRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleServicePlansUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SP_TAB, SP_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SP_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  var now = isoNow();

  if (params.serviceDate != null)      existing[SP.SERVICE_DATE]      = params.serviceDate;
  if (params.serviceType != null)      existing[SP.SERVICE_TYPE]      = String(params.serviceType);
  if (params.theme != null)            existing[SP.THEME]             = String(params.theme);
  if (params.scriptureFocus != null)   existing[SP.SCRIPTURE]         = String(params.scriptureFocus);
  if (params.sermonTitle != null)      existing[SP.SERMON_TITLE]      = String(params.sermonTitle);
  if (params.preacherId != null)       existing[SP.PREACHER_ID]       = String(params.preacherId);
  if (params.worshipLeaderId != null)  existing[SP.WORSHIP_LEADER_ID] = String(params.worshipLeaderId);
  if (params.status != null)           existing[SP.STATUS]            = String(params.status);
  if (params.notes != null)            existing[SP.NOTES]             = String(params.notes);

  existing[SP.UPDATED_BY] = auth.email;
  existing[SP.UPDATED_AT] = now;

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SP_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'servicePlans.update', SP_TAB, rowIndex,
    String(existing[SP.SERVICE_DATE]) + ' — ' + String(existing[SP.SERVICE_TYPE]));
  return jsonOk({ row: planRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleServicePlansDuplicate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sourcePlanId = String(params.planId || '').trim();
  var newDate = String(params.serviceDate || '').trim();
  if (!sourcePlanId) return jsonErr('planId (source) is required.');
  if (!newDate) return jsonErr('serviceDate (for the new plan) is required.');

  // Find source plan
  var sheet = getTab(SP_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Source plan not found.');
  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SP_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var source = null;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SP.ID]) === sourcePlanId) { source = data[i]; break; }
  }
  if (!source) return jsonErr('Source plan not found.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var newId = generateId();

  // Clone plan
  var newRow = new Array(SP_NUM_COLS);
  newRow[SP.ID]                = newId;
  newRow[SP.SERVICE_DATE]      = newDate;
  newRow[SP.SERVICE_TYPE]      = source[SP.SERVICE_TYPE];
  newRow[SP.THEME]             = String(params.theme || source[SP.THEME] || '');
  newRow[SP.SCRIPTURE]         = String(params.scriptureFocus || source[SP.SCRIPTURE] || '');
  newRow[SP.SERMON_TITLE]      = String(params.sermonTitle || '');
  newRow[SP.PREACHER_ID]       = String(params.preacherId || source[SP.PREACHER_ID] || '');
  newRow[SP.WORSHIP_LEADER_ID] = String(params.worshipLeaderId || source[SP.WORSHIP_LEADER_ID] || '');
  newRow[SP.STATUS]            = 'Draft';
  newRow[SP.NOTES]             = String(params.notes || '');
  newRow[SP.CREATED_BY]        = auth.email;
  newRow[SP.CREATED_AT]        = now;
  newRow[SP.UPDATED_BY]        = auth.email;
  newRow[SP.UPDATED_AT]        = now;

  sheet.appendRow(newRow);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  // Clone items + setlist links
  var sourceItems = getItemsForPlan_(sourcePlanId);
  var itemSheet = getTab(SPI_TAB);
  var slsSheet = getTab('SetlistSongs');
  var slsLast = slsSheet.getLastRow();
  var sourceSetlist = {};
  if (slsLast >= 2) {
    var slsData = slsSheet.getRange(2, 1, slsLast - 1, 10).getValues();
    for (var k = 0; k < slsData.length; k++) {
      if (String(slsData[k][1]) === sourcePlanId) {
        sourceSetlist[String(slsData[k][2])] = slsData[k]; // planItemId → row
      }
    }
  }
  for (var j = 0; j < sourceItems.length; j++) {
    var si = sourceItems[j];
    var newItemId = generateId();
    var itemRow = [
      newItemId,
      newId,
      si.order,
      si.itemType,
      si.title,
      si.description,
      si.durationMinutes,
      si.assignedToId,
      si.notes,
      now
    ];
    itemSheet.appendRow(itemRow);

    // Clone the setlist link if this item had one
    if (sourceSetlist[si.id]) {
      var sl = sourceSetlist[si.id];
      slsSheet.appendRow([
        generateId(), newId, newItemId,
        String(sl[3]), String(sl[4]), String(sl[5]),
        '', auth.email, now, now
      ]);
    }
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'servicePlans.duplicate', SP_TAB, newIndex,
    'Cloned from ' + sourcePlanId + ' to ' + newDate);

  var plan = planRowToObject(newRow, newIndex);
  plan.items = getItemsForPlan_(newId);
  return jsonOk({ row: plan, clonedItems: plan.items.length });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SERVICE PLAN ITEMS (elements within a service)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SPI_TAB = 'ServicePlanItems';
var SPI_NUM_COLS = 10;

var SPI = {
  ID: 0, PLAN_ID: 1, ORDER: 2, ITEM_TYPE: 3,
  TITLE: 4, DESCRIPTION: 5, DURATION: 6,
  ASSIGNED_TO: 7, NOTES: 8, CREATED_AT: 9
};

function itemRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[SPI.ID] || ''),
    planId:          String(vals[SPI.PLAN_ID] || ''),
    order:           Number(vals[SPI.ORDER] || 0),
    itemType:        String(vals[SPI.ITEM_TYPE] || ''),
    title:           String(vals[SPI.TITLE] || ''),
    description:     String(vals[SPI.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    durationMinutes: Number(vals[SPI.DURATION] || 0),
    assignedToId:    String(vals[SPI.ASSIGNED_TO] || ''),
    notes:           String(vals[SPI.NOTES] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[SPI.CREATED_AT])
  };
}

/**
 * Internal: fetches all items for a given plan, sorted by order.
 */
function getItemsForPlan_(planId) {
  var sheet = getTab(SPI_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return [];

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SPI_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var items = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SPI.PLAN_ID]) === String(planId)) {
      items.push(itemRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  items.sort(function(a, b) { return a.order - b.order; });
  return items;
}

function handleServiceItemsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.planId) return jsonErr('planId is required.');
  return jsonOk({ rows: getItemsForPlan_(params.planId) });
}

function handleServiceItemsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.planId) return jsonErr('planId is required.');
  if (!params.itemType) return jsonErr('itemType is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),
    String(params.planId),
    Number(params.order || 100),
    String(params.itemType || 'Other'),
    String(params.title || ''),
    String(params.description || ''),
    Number(params.durationMinutes || 0),
    String(params.assignedToId || ''),
    String(params.notes || ''),
    now
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(SPI_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'serviceItems.create', SPI_TAB, newIndex,
    'Plan: ' + params.planId + ' — ' + (params.itemType || 'Other'));
  return jsonOk({ row: itemRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleServiceItemsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SPI_TAB, SPI_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SPI_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.order != null)          existing[SPI.ORDER]       = Number(params.order);
  if (params.itemType != null)       existing[SPI.ITEM_TYPE]   = String(params.itemType);
  if (params.title != null)          existing[SPI.TITLE]       = String(params.title);
  if (params.description != null)    existing[SPI.DESCRIPTION] = String(params.description);
  if (params.durationMinutes != null)existing[SPI.DURATION]    = Number(params.durationMinutes);
  if (params.assignedToId != null)   existing[SPI.ASSIGNED_TO] = String(params.assignedToId);
  if (params.notes != null)          existing[SPI.NOTES]       = String(params.notes);

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SPI_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'serviceItems.update', SPI_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ row: itemRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleServiceItemsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SPI_TAB, SPI_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SPI_TAB);
  var deleted = hit.vals;
  sheet.deleteRow(rowIndex);

  writeAudit(auth, 'serviceItems.delete', SPI_TAB, rowIndex,
    'Deleted: ' + String(deleted[SPI.TITLE] || deleted[SPI.ITEM_TYPE]));
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Item deleted.' });
}

function handleServiceItemsReorder(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.planId) return jsonErr('planId is required.');

  // Expects params.order = JSON array of { itemId, order }
  var orderList;
  try {
    orderList = JSON.parse(params.order);
  } catch (e) {
    return jsonErr('order must be a JSON array of {itemId, order}.');
  }
  if (!Array.isArray(orderList)) return jsonErr('order must be an array.');

  var sheet = getTab(SPI_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ message: 'No items to reorder.' });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SPI_NUM_COLS).getValues();

  // Build a map of itemId → new order
  var orderMap = {};
  for (var j = 0; j < orderList.length; j++) {
    orderMap[String(orderList[j].itemId)] = Number(orderList[j].order || 0);
  }

  // Update the order column for matching items
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var itemId = String(data[i][SPI.ID]);
    if (String(data[i][SPI.PLAN_ID]) === String(params.planId) && orderMap.hasOwnProperty(itemId)) {
      sheet.getRange(i + 2, SPI.ORDER + 1).setValue(orderMap[itemId]);
    }
  }

  writeAudit(auth, 'serviceItems.reorder', SPI_TAB, '', 'Plan: ' + params.planId);
  return jsonOk({ items: getItemsForPlan_(params.planId) });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Songs.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: SONGS & MUSIC STAND
// Tabs: Songs, SongArrangements, SetlistSongs
//
// Songs        — master catalog of every song the church uses
// Arrangements — key-specific chord charts / lyrics per song
// SetlistSongs — links a ServicePlanItem (type "Song") to a specific arrangement
//
// Music Stand view: fetch the full setlist for a service plan, including
// chord charts, lyrics, key & tempo for each song in order.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SONGS — Master Catalog
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SONG_TAB = 'Songs';
var SONG_NUM_COLS = 18;

var SONG = {
  ID: 0, TITLE: 1, ARTIST: 2, CCLI_NUMBER: 3,
  DEFAULT_KEY: 4, TEMPO_BPM: 5, TIME_SIGNATURE: 6, DURATION_MIN: 7,
  GENRE: 8, TAGS: 9, LYRICS: 10, NOTES: 11,
  ACTIVE: 12, DRIVE_FILE_ID: 13,
  CREATED_BY: 14, CREATED_AT: 15, UPDATED_BY: 16, UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function songRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:         rowIndex,
    id:            String(vals[SONG.ID] || ''),
    title:         String(vals[SONG.TITLE] || ''),
    artist:        String(vals[SONG.ARTIST] || ''),
    ccliNumber:    String(vals[SONG.CCLI_NUMBER] || ''),
    defaultKey:    String(vals[SONG.DEFAULT_KEY] || ''),
    tempoBpm:      Number(vals[SONG.TEMPO_BPM] || 0),
    timeSignature: String(vals[SONG.TIME_SIGNATURE] || '4/4'),
    durationMin:   Number(vals[SONG.DURATION_MIN] || 0),
    genre:         String(vals[SONG.GENRE] || ''),
    tags:          String(vals[SONG.TAGS] || ''),
    lyrics:        String(vals[SONG.LYRICS] || ''),
    notes:         String(vals[SONG.NOTES] || ''),
    active:        String(vals[SONG.ACTIVE] || 'TRUE'),
    driveFileId:   String(vals[SONG.DRIVE_FILE_ID] || ''),
    createdBy:     String(vals[SONG.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:     isoDate(vals[SONG.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedBy:     String(vals[SONG.UPDATED_BY] || ''),
    updatedAt:     isoDate(vals[SONG.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Songs CRUD ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleSongsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(SONG_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SONG_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var genre = String(params.genre || '').trim();
  var tag   = String(params.tag || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  var q     = String(params.q || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  var activeOnly = String(params.activeOnly || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = songRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (activeOnly === 'true' && obj.active !== 'TRUE') continue;
    if (genre && obj.genre !== genre) continue;
    if (tag && obj.tags.toLowerCase().indexOf(tag) === -1) continue;
    if (q && obj.title.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) === -1 &&
             obj.artist.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) === -1) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleSongsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var songId = String(params.songId || '').trim();
  if (!songId) return jsonErr('songId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SONG_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Song not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SONG_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SONG.ID]) === songId) {
      var song = songRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      song.arrangements = getArrangementsForSong_(songId);
      return jsonOk({ row: song });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Song not found.');
}

function handleSongsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.title) return jsonErr('title is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(SONG_NUM_COLS);

  row[SONG.ID]             = generateId();
  row[SONG.TITLE]          = String(params.title);
  row[SONG.ARTIST]         = String(params.artist || '');
  row[SONG.CCLI_NUMBER]    = String(params.ccliNumber || '');
  row[SONG.DEFAULT_KEY]    = String(params.defaultKey || 'C');
  row[SONG.TEMPO_BPM]      = Number(params.tempoBpm || 0);
  row[SONG.TIME_SIGNATURE] = String(params.timeSignature || '4/4');
  row[SONG.DURATION_MIN]   = Number(params.durationMin || 0);
  row[SONG.GENRE]          = String(params.genre || '');
  row[SONG.TAGS]           = String(params.tags || '');
  row[SONG.LYRICS]         = String(params.lyrics || '');
  row[SONG.NOTES]          = String(params.notes || '');
  row[SONG.ACTIVE]         = 'TRUE';
  row[SONG.DRIVE_FILE_ID]  = String(params.driveFileId || '');
  row[SONG.CREATED_BY]     = auth.email;
  row[SONG.CREATED_AT]     = now;
  row[SONG.UPDATED_BY]     = auth.email;
  row[SONG.UPDATED_AT]     = now;

  var sheet = getTab(SONG_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'songs.create', SONG_TAB, newIndex, String(params.title));
  return jsonOk({ row: songRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleSongsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SONG_TAB, SONG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SONG_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;
  var now = isoNow();

  if (params.title != null)         existing[SONG.TITLE]          = String(params.title);
  if (params.artist != null)        existing[SONG.ARTIST]         = String(params.artist);
  if (params.ccliNumber != null)    existing[SONG.CCLI_NUMBER]    = String(params.ccliNumber);
  if (params.defaultKey != null)    existing[SONG.DEFAULT_KEY]    = String(params.defaultKey);
  if (params.tempoBpm != null)      existing[SONG.TEMPO_BPM]     = Number(params.tempoBpm);
  if (params.timeSignature != null) existing[SONG.TIME_SIGNATURE] = String(params.timeSignature);
  if (params.durationMin != null)   existing[SONG.DURATION_MIN]  = Number(params.durationMin);
  if (params.genre != null)         existing[SONG.GENRE]          = String(params.genre);
  if (params.tags != null)          existing[SONG.TAGS]           = String(params.tags);
  if (params.lyrics != null)        existing[SONG.LYRICS]         = String(params.lyrics);
  if (params.notes != null)         existing[SONG.NOTES]          = String(params.notes);
  if (params.active != null)        existing[SONG.ACTIVE]         = String(params.active);
  if (params.driveFileId != null)   existing[SONG.DRIVE_FILE_ID]  = String(params.driveFileId);

  existing[SONG.UPDATED_BY] = auth.email;
  existing[SONG.UPDATED_AT] = now;

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SONG_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'songs.update', SONG_TAB, rowIndex, String(existing[SONG.TITLE]));
  return jsonOk({ row: songRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleSongsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SONG_TAB, SONG_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SONG_TAB);
  var deleted = hit.vals;
  sheet.deleteRow(rowIndex);

  writeAudit(auth, 'songs.delete', SONG_TAB, rowIndex,
    'Deleted: ' + String(deleted[SONG.TITLE]));
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Song deleted.' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SONG ARRANGEMENTS — Key-specific chord charts / lead sheets
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var ARR_TAB = 'SongArrangements';
var ARR_NUM_COLS = 14;

var ARR = {
  ID: 0, SONG_ID: 1, NAME: 2, KEY: 3,
  CAPO: 4, CHORD_CHART: 5, LYRICS_WITH_CHORDS: 6, INSTRUMENT: 7,
  VOCAL_RANGE: 8, DRIVE_FILE_ID: 9, NOTES: 10,
  CREATED_BY: 11, CREATED_AT: 12, UPDATED_AT: 13
};

function arrRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[ARR.ID] || ''),
    songId:          String(vals[ARR.SONG_ID] || ''),
    name:            String(vals[ARR.NAME] || ''),
    key:             String(vals[ARR.KEY] || ''),
    capo:            Number(vals[ARR.CAPO] || 0),
    chordChart:      String(vals[ARR.CHORD_CHART] || ''),
    lyricsWithChords:String(vals[ARR.LYRICS_WITH_CHORDS] || ''),
    instrument:      String(vals[ARR.INSTRUMENT] || ''),
    vocalRange:      String(vals[ARR.VOCAL_RANGE] || ''),
    driveFileId:     String(vals[ARR.DRIVE_FILE_ID] || ''),
    notes:           String(vals[ARR.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:       String(vals[ARR.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[ARR.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:       isoDate(vals[ARR.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

/** Internal: fetch all arrangements for a song. */
function getArrangementsForSong_(songId) {
  var sheet = getTab(ARR_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return [];

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, ARR_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var items = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][ARR.SONG_ID]) === String(songId)) {
      items.push(arrRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return items;
}

function handleArrangementsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.songId) return jsonErr('songId is required.');
  return jsonOk({ rows: getArrangementsForSong_(params.songId) });
}

function handleArrangementsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var arrId = String(params.arrangementId || '').trim();
  if (!arrId) return jsonErr('arrangementId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(ARR_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Arrangement not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, ARR_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][ARR.ID]) === arrId) {
      return jsonOk({ row: arrRowToObject(data[i], i + 2) });
    }
  }
  return jsonErr('Arrangement not found.');
}

function handleArrangementsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.songId) return jsonErr('songId is required.');
  if (!params.key) return jsonErr('key is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(ARR_NUM_COLS);

  row[ARR.ID]               = generateId();
  row[ARR.SONG_ID]          = String(params.songId);
  row[ARR.NAME]             = String(params.name || 'Default');
  row[ARR.KEY]              = String(params.key);
  row[ARR.CAPO]             = Number(params.capo || 0);
  row[ARR.CHORD_CHART]      = String(params.chordChart || '');
  row[ARR.LYRICS_WITH_CHORDS] = String(params.lyricsWithChords || '');
  row[ARR.INSTRUMENT]       = String(params.instrument || 'Guitar');
  row[ARR.VOCAL_RANGE]      = String(params.vocalRange || '');
  row[ARR.DRIVE_FILE_ID]    = String(params.driveFileId || '');
  row[ARR.NOTES]            = String(params.notes || '');
  row[ARR.CREATED_BY]       = auth.email;
  row[ARR.CREATED_AT]       = now;
  row[ARR.UPDATED_AT]       = now;

  var sheet = getTab(ARR_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'arrangements.create', ARR_TAB, newIndex,
    'Song: ' + params.songId + ' / Key: ' + params.key);
  return jsonOk({ row: arrRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleArrangementsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), ARR_TAB, ARR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(ARR_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.name != null)             existing[ARR.NAME]             = String(params.name);
  if (params.key != null)              existing[ARR.KEY]              = String(params.key);
  if (params.capo != null)             existing[ARR.CAPO]             = Number(params.capo);
  if (params.chordChart != null)       existing[ARR.CHORD_CHART]      = String(params.chordChart);
  if (params.lyricsWithChords != null) existing[ARR.LYRICS_WITH_CHORDS] = String(params.lyricsWithChords);
  if (params.instrument != null)       existing[ARR.INSTRUMENT]       = String(params.instrument);
  if (params.vocalRange != null)       existing[ARR.VOCAL_RANGE]      = String(params.vocalRange);
  if (params.driveFileId != null)      existing[ARR.DRIVE_FILE_ID]    = String(params.driveFileId);
  if (params.notes != null)            existing[ARR.NOTES]            = String(params.notes);

  existing[ARR.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, ARR_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'arrangements.update', ARR_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ row: arrRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleArrangementsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), ARR_TAB, ARR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(ARR_TAB);
  var deleted = hit.vals;
  sheet.deleteRow(rowIndex);

  writeAudit(auth, 'arrangements.delete', ARR_TAB, rowIndex,
    'Deleted arrangement: ' + String(deleted[ARR.NAME]));
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Arrangement deleted.' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SETLIST SONGS — Links ServicePlanItems → Songs → SongArrangements
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SLS_TAB = 'SetlistSongs';
var SLS_NUM_COLS = 10;

var SLS = {
  ID: 0, PLAN_ID: 1, PLAN_ITEM_ID: 2, SONG_ID: 3,
  ARRANGEMENT_ID: 4, KEY_OVERRIDE: 5, NOTES: 6,
  CREATED_BY: 7, CREATED_AT: 8, UPDATED_AT: 9
};

function slsRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[SLS.ID] || ''),
    planId:         String(vals[SLS.PLAN_ID] || ''),
    planItemId:     String(vals[SLS.PLAN_ITEM_ID] || ''),
    songId:         String(vals[SLS.SONG_ID] || ''),
    arrangementId:  String(vals[SLS.ARRANGEMENT_ID] || ''),
    keyOverride:    String(vals[SLS.KEY_OVERRIDE] || ''),
    notes:          String(vals[SLS.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:      String(vals[SLS.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[SLS.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[SLS.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

function handleSetlistSongsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.planId) return jsonErr('planId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(SLS_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, SLS_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SLS.PLAN_ID]) === String(params.planId)) {
      rows.push(slsRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
    }
  }
  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}

function handleSetlistSongsAdd(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.planId)     return jsonErr('planId is required.');
  if (!params.songId)     return jsonErr('songId is required.');

  // Auto-create a ServicePlanItem if planItemId not provided
  var planItemId = String(params.planItemId || '').trim();
  if (!planItemId) {
    var songTitle = '';
    try {
      var songSheet = getTab(SONG_TAB);
      var songLast  = songSheet.getLastRow();
      if (songLast >= 2) {
        var songData = songSheet.getRange(2, 1, songLast - 1, SONG_NUM_COLS).getValues();
        for (var s = 0; s < songData.length; s++) {
          if (String(songData[s][SONG.ID]) === String(params.songId)) {
            songTitle = String(songData[s][SONG.TITLE] || '');
            break;
          }
        }
      }
    } catch (_) {}

    var itemNow = isoNow();
    var itemRow = [
      generateId(),
      String(params.planId),
      100,
      'Worship',
      songTitle || 'Song',
      '',
      0,
      '',
      '',
      itemNow
    ];
    var itemSheet = getTab(SPI_TAB);
    itemSheet.appendRow(itemRow);
    planItemId = String(itemRow[0]);
  }

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = new Array(SLS_NUM_COLS);

  row[SLS.ID]             = generateId();
  row[SLS.PLAN_ID]        = String(params.planId);
  row[SLS.PLAN_ITEM_ID]   = planItemId;
  row[SLS.SONG_ID]        = String(params.songId);
  row[SLS.ARRANGEMENT_ID] = String(params.arrangementId || '');
  row[SLS.KEY_OVERRIDE]   = String(params.keyOverride || '');
  row[SLS.NOTES]          = String(params.notes || '');
  row[SLS.CREATED_BY]     = auth.email;
