  row[SLS.CREATED_AT]     = now;
  row[SLS.UPDATED_AT]     = now;

  var sheet = getTab(SLS_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  writeAudit(auth, 'setlistSongs.add', SLS_TAB, newIndex,
    'Plan: ' + params.planId + ' / Song: ' + params.songId);
  return jsonOk({ row: slsRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}

function handleSetlistSongsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SLS_TAB, SLS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SLS_TAB);
  var existing = hit.vals;

  if (params.songId != null)         existing[SLS.SONG_ID]         = String(params.songId);
  if (params.arrangementId != null)  existing[SLS.ARRANGEMENT_ID]  = String(params.arrangementId);
  if (params.keyOverride != null)    existing[SLS.KEY_OVERRIDE]    = String(params.keyOverride);
  if (params.notes != null)          existing[SLS.NOTES]           = String(params.notes);

  existing[SLS.UPDATED_AT] = isoNow();

  sheet.getRange(rowIndex, 1, 1, SLS_NUM_COLS).setValues([existing]);
  writeAudit(auth, 'setlistSongs.update', SLS_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ row: slsRowToObject(existing, rowIndex) });
}

function handleSetlistSongsRemove(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SLS_TAB, SLS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Record not found.');
  var rowIndex = hit.rowIndex;

  var sheet = getTab(SLS_TAB);

  sheet.deleteRow(rowIndex);
  writeAudit(auth, 'setlistSongs.remove', SLS_TAB, rowIndex, '');
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Setlist song removed.' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MUSIC STAND — Full read-only setlist view for band members
// Returns the service plan with every song item enriched with its
// arrangement, chord chart, lyrics, key/tempo.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleMusicStandGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var planId = String(params.planId || '').trim();
  if (!planId) return jsonErr('planId is required.');

  // 1. Get service plan
  var planSheet = getTab('ServicePlans');
  var planLast = planSheet.getLastRow();
  if (planLast < 2) return jsonErr('Plan not found.');

  var planData = planSheet.getRange(2, 1, planLast - 1, 14).getValues();
  var plan = null;
  for (var p = 0; p < planData.length; p++) {
    if (String(planData[p][0]) === planId) {
      plan = {
        id:             String(planData[p][0]),
        serviceDate:    isoDate(planData[p][1]),
        serviceType:    String(planData[p][2] || ''),
        theme:          String(planData[p][3] || ''),
        worshipLeaderId:String(planData[p][7] || '')
      };
      break;
    }
  }
  if (!plan) return jsonErr('Plan not found.');

  // 2. Get all plan items sorted by order
  var items = getItemsForPlan_(planId);

  // 3. Load all setlist links for this plan
  var slsSheet = getTab(SLS_TAB);
  var slsLast = slsSheet.getLastRow();
  var setlistMap = {}; // planItemId → setlist entry
  if (slsLast >= 2) {
    var slsData = slsSheet.getRange(2, 1, slsLast - 1, SLS_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var s = 0; s < slsData.length; s++) {
      if (String(slsData[s][SLS.PLAN_ID]) === planId) {
        setlistMap[String(slsData[s][SLS.PLAN_ITEM_ID])] = slsRowToObject(slsData[s], s + 2);
      }
    }
  }

  // 4. Load all songs and arrangements (batch read for performance)
  var songSheet = getTab(SONG_TAB);
  var songLast = songSheet.getLastRow();
  var songMap = {};
  if (songLast >= 2) {
    var songData = songSheet.getRange(2, 1, songLast - 1, SONG_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < songData.length; i++) {
      songMap[String(songData[i][SONG.ID])] = songRowToObject(songData[i], i + 2);
    }
  }

  var arrSheet = getTab(ARR_TAB);
  var arrLast = arrSheet.getLastRow();
  var arrMap = {};
  if (arrLast >= 2) {
    var arrData = arrSheet.getRange(2, 1, arrLast - 1, ARR_NUM_COLS).getValues();
    for (var a = 0; a < arrData.length; a++) {
      arrMap[String(arrData[a][ARR.ID])] = arrRowToObject(arrData[a], a + 2);
    }
  }

  // 5. Build the enriched setlist
  var setlist = [];
  for (var j = 0; j < items.length; j++) {
    var item = items[j];
    var entry = {
      order:       item.order,
      itemType:    item.itemType,
      title:       item.title,
      description: item.description,
      duration:    item.durationMinutes,
      assignedTo:  item.assignedToId,
      notes:       item.notes
    };

    // Enrich song items with chord/lyric data
    if (item.itemType === 'Song' && setlistMap[item.id]) {
      var link = setlistMap[item.id];
      var song = songMap[link.songId];
      var arr  = link.arrangementId ? arrMap[link.arrangementId] : null;

      if (song) {
        entry.song = {
          id:            song.id,
          title:         song.title,
          artist:        song.artist,
          ccliNumber:    song.ccliNumber,
          defaultKey:    song.defaultKey,
          tempoBpm:      song.tempoBpm,
          timeSignature: song.timeSignature,
          lyrics:        song.lyrics
        };
      }

      if (arr) {
        entry.arrangement = {
          id:               arr.id,
          name:             arr.name,
          key:              link.keyOverride || arr.key,
          capo:             arr.capo,
          chordChart:       arr.chordChart,
          lyricsWithChords: arr.lyricsWithChords,
          instrument:       arr.instrument,
          vocalRange:       arr.vocalRange,
          driveFileId:      arr.driveFileId
        };
      }

      entry.keyOverride = link.keyOverride;
    }

    setlist.push(entry);
  }

  return jsonOk({
    plan: plan,
    setlist: setlist,
    songCount: setlist.filter(function(e) { return e.itemType === 'Song'; }).length
  });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Sql.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/* ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   SQL.gs — Cloud SQL (PostgreSQL) Connector for FlockOS
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   Uses Google Apps Script's built-in JDBC service to connect to Cloud SQL.

   AppConfig keys (stored via Control Panel → Section 11):
     SQL_ENABLED           TRUE | FALSE
     SQL_INSTANCE          project:region:instance  (Cloud SQL instance connection name)
     SQL_DATABASE          flockos
     SQL_USER              flockos_app

   Script Properties (recommended for credentials — checked first):
     SQL_INSTANCE          project:region:instance  (e.g. flockos-777:us-central1:flockos-db)
     SQL_DATABASE          flockos
     SQL_USER              flockos_app
     SQL_PASSWORD          The database password

   Connection method:
     Jdbc.getCloudSqlConnection() with jdbc:google:postgres:// protocol
     This uses Google's internal connector — no public IP or SSL config needed.

   Usage from other GAS files:
     var conn = FlockSQL.getConnection();
     var rows = FlockSQL.query('SELECT * FROM members WHERE archived = false');
     var id   = FlockSQL.insert('members', { first_name: 'John', last_name: 'Doe' });
     FlockSQL.update('members', id, { last_name: 'Smith' });
     FlockSQL.remove('members', id);
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

var FlockSQL = (function () {

  // ── Configuration Readers ────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /**
   * Check whether SQL mode is enabled via AppConfig.
   */
  function isEnabled() {
    return String(getAppConfigValue_('SQL_ENABLED', 'FALSE')).toUpperCase() === 'TRUE';
  }

  /**
   * Build the JDBC URL for Google Cloud SQL (PostgreSQL).
   * Uses Jdbc.getCloudSqlConnection() with jdbc:google:postgres:// protocol.
   * Checks Script Properties first, then AppConfig for SQL_INSTANCE.
   */
  function _jdbcUrl() {
    var props = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties();
    var instance = props.getProperty('SQL_INSTANCE')
                || getAppConfigValue_('SQL_INSTANCE', '');
    var database = props.getProperty('SQL_DATABASE')
                || getAppConfigValue_('SQL_DATABASE', 'flockos');
    if (!instance) throw new Error('SQL_INSTANCE not configured. Add SQL_INSTANCE to Script Properties with your connection name (e.g. flockos-777:us-central1:flockos-db).');
    return 'jdbc:google:postgres://' + instance + '/' + database;
  }

  /**
   * Read credentials. All values check Script Properties first, then AppConfig.
   */
  function _credentials() {
    var props = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties();
    var user = props.getProperty('SQL_USER')
            || getAppConfigValue_('SQL_USER', 'flockos_app');
    var password = props.getProperty('SQL_PASSWORD')
                || getAppConfigValue_('SQL_PASSWORD', '');
    return { user: user, password: password };
  }


  // ── Connection ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /**
   * Open a JDBC connection to Cloud SQL via Google's internal connector.
   * Caller MUST call conn.close() when done.
   */
  function getConnection() {
    var creds = _credentials();
    return Jdbc.getCloudSqlConnection(_jdbcUrl(), creds.user, creds.password);
  }


  // ── Query Helpers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /**
   * Execute a read query and return rows as an array of objects.
   * @param {string} sql       - SQL query with $1, $2 placeholders
   * @param {Array}  [values]  - Parameter values (optional)
   * @returns {Array<Object>}
   */
  function query(sql, values) {
    var conn = getConnection();
    try {
      var stmt;
      if (values && values.length) {
        stmt = conn.prepareStatement(sql);
        for (var i = 0; i < values.length; i++) {
          _bindParam(stmt, i + 1, values[i]);
        }
      } else {
        stmt = conn.prepareStatement(sql);
      }

      var rs   = stmt.executeQuery();
      var meta = rs.getMetaData();
      var cols = meta.getColumnCount();
      var colNames = [];
      for (var c = 1; c <= cols; c++) colNames.push(meta.getColumnName(c));

      var rows = [];
      while (rs.next()) {
        var row = {};
        for (var c = 1; c <= cols; c++) {
          row[colNames[c - 1]] = rs.getObject(c);
        }
        rows.push(row);
      }
      rs.close();
      stmt.close();
      return rows;
    } finally {
      conn.close();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Execute a write statement (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE) and return affected row count.
   * @param {string} sql       - SQL with $1, $2 placeholders
   * @param {Array}  [values]  - Parameter values
   * @returns {number}         - rows affected
   */
  function execute(sql, values) {
    var conn = getConnection();
    try {
      var stmt = conn.prepareStatement(sql);
      if (values && values.length) {
        for (var i = 0; i < values.length; i++) {
          _bindParam(stmt, i + 1, values[i]);
        }
      }
      var count = stmt.executeUpdate();
      stmt.close();
      return count;
    } finally {
      conn.close();
    }
  }

  /**
   * Insert a row into a table. Returns the generated UUID id.
   * @param {string} table  - Table name (e.g. 'members')
   * @param {Object} data   - Column→value map (snake_case keys)
   * @returns {string}      - The UUID of the new row
   */
  function insert(table, data) {
    var id = data.id || Utilities.getUuid();
    data.id = id;

    var cols = Object.keys(data);
    var placeholders = cols.map(function (_, i) { return '$' + (i + 1); });
    var sql = 'INSERT INTO ' + _ident(table) +
              ' (' + cols.map(_ident).join(', ') + ')' +
              ' VALUES (' + placeholders.join(', ') + ')';

    execute(sql, cols.map(function (c) { return data[c]; }));
    return id;
  }

  /**
   * Update a row by id.
   * @param {string} table   - Table name
   * @param {string} id      - UUID of the row
   * @param {Object} updates - Column→value map
   * @returns {number}       - rows affected (0 or 1)
   */
  function update(table, id, updates) {
    var cols = Object.keys(updates);
    if (!cols.length) return 0;

    var sets = cols.map(function (c, i) { return _ident(c) + ' = $' + (i + 1); });
    var sql = 'UPDATE ' + _ident(table) +
              ' SET ' + sets.join(', ') +
              ' WHERE id = $' + (cols.length + 1);
    var vals = cols.map(function (c) { return updates[c]; });
    vals.push(id);
    return execute(sql, vals);
  }

  /**
   * Delete a row by id.
   * @param {string} table - Table name
   * @param {string} id    - UUID
   * @returns {number}     - rows affected
   */
  function remove(table, id) {
    return execute('DELETE FROM ' + _ident(table) + ' WHERE id = $1', [id]);
  }

  /**
   * Count rows in a table with optional WHERE clause.
   * @param {string} table          - Table name
   * @param {string} [whereClause]  - e.g. "archived = false"
   * @returns {number}
   */
  function count(table, whereClause) {
    var sql = 'SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM ' + _ident(table);
    if (whereClause) sql += ' WHERE ' + whereClause;
    var rows = query(sql);
    return rows.length ? Number(rows[0].cnt) : 0;
  }


  // ── Test Connection ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /**
   * Test the SQL connection and return diagnostic info.
   * Called by the sql.test API route from the Settings page.
   */
  function testConnection() {
    var start = Date.now();
    try {
      var conn = getConnection();
      var stmt = conn.prepareStatement('SELECT version() AS ver, NOW() AS ts');
      var rs   = stmt.executeQuery();
      var ver  = '';
      var ts   = '';
      if (rs.next()) {
        ver = String(rs.getObject(1));
        ts  = String(rs.getObject(2));
      }
      rs.close();
      stmt.close();
      conn.close();
      var elapsed = Date.now() - start;
      return {
        ok: true,
        version: ver,
        server_time: ts,
        latency_ms: elapsed,
        instance: getAppConfigValue_('SQL_INSTANCE', '(not set)'),
        database: getAppConfigValue_('SQL_DATABASE', '(not set)')
      };
    } catch (e) {
      return {
        ok: false,
        error: e.message,
        latency_ms: Date.now() - start,
        instance: getAppConfigValue_('SQL_INSTANCE', '(not set)')
      };
    }
  }

  /**
   * Run the full schema from a SQL string (for initial provisioning).
   * Splits on semicolons, executes each statement.
   * @param {string} schemaSql - Complete CREATE TABLE ... script
   * @returns {{ ok: boolean, statements: number, errors: string[] }}
   */
  function runSchema(schemaSql) {
    var conn = getConnection();
    var stmts = schemaSql.split(';').map(function (s) { return s.trim(); }).filter(Boolean);
    var errors = [];
    var executed = 0;

    try {
      for (var i = 0; i < stmts.length; i++) {
        try {
          var stmt = conn.prepareStatement(stmts[i]);
          stmt.execute();
          stmt.close();
          executed++;
        } catch (e) {
          errors.push('Statement ' + (i + 1) + ': ' + e.message);
        }
      }
    } finally {
      conn.close();
    }

    return { ok: errors.length === 0, statements: executed, errors: errors };
  }


  // ── Internals ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  /** Safe identifier quoting (prevents SQL injection on table/column names). */
  function _ident(name) {
    // Only allow alphanumeric + underscores
    if (!/^[a-z_][a-z0-9_]*$/i.test(name)) {
      throw new Error('Invalid SQL identifier: ' + name);
    }
    return '"' + name + '"';
  }

  /** Bind a parameter value to a PreparedStatement with correct JDBC type. */
  function _bindParam(stmt, index, value) {
    if (value === null || value === undefined || value === '') {
      stmt.setNull(index, 0); // NULL
    } else if (typeof value === 'boolean') {
      stmt.setBoolean(index, value);
    } else if (typeof value === 'number') {
      if (Number.isInteger(value)) {
        stmt.setInt(index, value);
      } else {
        stmt.setDouble(index, value);
      }
    } else if (value instanceof Date) {
      stmt.setTimestamp(index, Jdbc.newTimestamp(value.getTime()));
    } else {
      stmt.setString(index, String(value));
    }
  }


  // ── Public API ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

  return {
    isEnabled:      isEnabled,
    getConnection:  getConnection,
    query:          query,
    execute:        execute,
    insert:         insert,
    update:         update,
    remove:         remove,
    count:          count,
    testConnection: testConnection,
    runSchema:      runSchema
  };

})();


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// API Handlers — called from Auth.gs dispatcher
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * sql.test — Test the Cloud SQL connection from the Settings page.
 * Requires admin role.
 */
function handleSqlTest_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  return FlockSQL.testConnection();
}

/**
 * sql.status — Return whether SQL mode is active + connection info (no connect).
 */
function handleSqlStatus_(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'admin');
  return {
    ok: true,
    enabled: FlockSQL.isEnabled(),
    instance: getAppConfigValue_('SQL_INSTANCE', ''),
    database: getAppConfigValue_('SQL_DATABASE', 'flockos'),
    user: getAppConfigValue_('SQL_USER', 'flockos_app')
  };
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Statistics.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: STATISTICS — Customizable Analytics & Metrics Framework
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//
// A flexible statistics engine with 50 generic metric slots (h1–h50) that
// can be mapped to ANY data source in the CRM. Admins define what each slot
// means; the system computes snapshots on demand or via scheduled triggers.
//
// Architecture:
//   StatisticsConfig       Metric definitions — what h1–h50 mean
//   StatisticsSnapshots    Computed data rows with all 50 metric slots
//   StatisticsCustomViews  Saved dashboard layouts & report configurations
//
// Workflow:
//   1. Admin defines metrics in StatisticsConfig
//        (e.g., h1 = "Weekly Attendance", sourceTab = "Attendance", calcType = "count")
//   2. Leader triggers statistics.compute → new snapshot row is created
//   3. Frontend reads statistics.snapshots.latest or statistics.trends
//   4. Custom views control which metrics appear in different dashboards
//
// Customization-first: every metric, label, data source, calculation type,
// display format, chart type, and dashboard layout is configurable via API
// or directly in the Google Sheet — no code changes needed.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 1. STATISTICS CONFIG (metric slot definitions)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SC_TAB      = 'StatisticsConfig';
var SC_NUM_COLS = 18;

var SC = {
  ID: 0,
  SLOT: 1,              // h1–h50
  LABEL: 2,             // human-readable metric name
  DESCRIPTION: 3,
  CATEGORY: 4,          // Attendance / Giving / Growth / Engagement / Spiritual / Custom
  SOURCE_TAB: 5,        // which sheet tab to pull data from
  SOURCE_COLUMN: 6,     // column index (0-based) or header name in that tab
  CALC_TYPE: 7,         // count / sum / avg / min / max / countDistinct / latest / custom
  FILTER_FIELD: 8,      // optional: column index/name to filter by
  FILTER_VALUE: 9,      // optional: value to match in filter field
  DATE_FIELD: 10,       // column holding dates for time-scoped calculations
  FORMAT_TYPE: 11,      // number / percent / currency / text / date
  UNIT_LABEL: 12,       // display unit ("$", "%", "members", etc.)
  DISPLAY_ORDER: 13,
  WIDGET_TYPE: 14,      // number / bar / line / pie / gauge / table
  ACTIVE: 15,
  CREATED_AT: 16,
  UPDATED_AT: 17
};

function statisticsConfigRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:        rowIndex,
    id:           String(vals[SC.ID] || ''),
    slot:         String(vals[SC.SLOT] || ''),
    label:        String(vals[SC.LABEL] || ''),
    description:  String(vals[SC.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    category:     String(vals[SC.CATEGORY] || ''),
    sourceTab:    String(vals[SC.SOURCE_TAB] || ''),
    sourceColumn: String(vals[SC.SOURCE_COLUMN] || ''),
    calcType:     String(vals[SC.CALC_TYPE] || 'count'),
    filterField:  String(vals[SC.FILTER_FIELD] || ''),
    filterValue:  String(vals[SC.FILTER_VALUE] || ''),
    dateField:    String(vals[SC.DATE_FIELD] || ''),
    formatType:   String(vals[SC.FORMAT_TYPE] || 'number'),
    unitLabel:    String(vals[SC.UNIT_LABEL] || ''),
    displayOrder: Number(vals[SC.DISPLAY_ORDER] || 0),
    widgetType:   String(vals[SC.WIDGET_TYPE] || 'number'),
    active:       String(vals[SC.ACTIVE] || 'TRUE'),
    createdAt:    isoDate(vals[SC.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:    isoDate(vals[SC.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Config Handlers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleStatisticsConfigList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+
  var data = allRows(db(), SC_TAB, SC_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = statisticsConfigRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.activeOnly && obj.active !== 'TRUE') continue;
    if (params.category && obj.category !== params.category) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.displayOrder - b.displayOrder; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleStatisticsConfigGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SC_TAB, SC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Config entry not found');
  return jsonOk(statisticsConfigRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleStatisticsConfigCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 4); // admin only
  if (!params.slot || !params.label) return jsonErr('slot and label required');

  // Validate slot format (h1–h50)
  var slotMatch = String(params.slot).match(/^h(\d+)$/);
  if (!slotMatch || Number(slotMatch[1]) < 1 || Number(slotMatch[1]) > 50) {
    return jsonErr('slot must be h1 through h50');
  }

  // Check for duplicate active slot
  var existing = allRows(db(), SC_TAB, SC_NUM_COLS);
  for (var e = 0; e < existing.length; e++) {
    if (String(existing[e][SC.SLOT]) === params.slot && String(existing[e][SC.ACTIVE]) === 'TRUE') {
      return jsonErr('Slot ' + params.slot + ' is already configured');
    }
  }

  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(SC_NUM_COLS);
  row[SC.ID]            = id;
  row[SC.SLOT]          = String(params.slot);
  row[SC.LABEL]         = String(params.label);
  row[SC.DESCRIPTION]   = String(params.description || '');
  row[SC.CATEGORY]      = String(params.category || 'Custom');
  row[SC.SOURCE_TAB]    = String(params.sourceTab || '');
  row[SC.SOURCE_COLUMN] = String(params.sourceColumn || '');
  row[SC.CALC_TYPE]     = String(params.calcType || 'count');
  row[SC.FILTER_FIELD]  = String(params.filterField || '');
  row[SC.FILTER_VALUE]  = String(params.filterValue || '');
  row[SC.DATE_FIELD]    = String(params.dateField || '');
  row[SC.FORMAT_TYPE]   = String(params.formatType || 'number');
  row[SC.UNIT_LABEL]    = String(params.unitLabel || '');
  row[SC.DISPLAY_ORDER] = Number(params.displayOrder || 0);
  row[SC.WIDGET_TYPE]   = String(params.widgetType || 'number');
  row[SC.ACTIVE]        = 'TRUE';
  row[SC.CREATED_AT]    = now;
  row[SC.UPDATED_AT]    = now;

  appendRow(ss, SC_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'statistics.config.create', SC_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Metric configured for slot ' + params.slot });
}

function handleStatisticsConfigUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 4); // admin only
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, SC_TAB, SC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Config entry not found');
  var v = hit.vals;

  if (params.label !== undefined)        v[SC.LABEL]         = String(params.label);
  if (params.description !== undefined)  v[SC.DESCRIPTION]   = String(params.description);
  if (params.category !== undefined)     v[SC.CATEGORY]      = String(params.category);
  if (params.sourceTab !== undefined)    v[SC.SOURCE_TAB]    = String(params.sourceTab);
  if (params.sourceColumn !== undefined) v[SC.SOURCE_COLUMN] = String(params.sourceColumn);
  if (params.calcType !== undefined)     v[SC.CALC_TYPE]     = String(params.calcType);
  if (params.filterField !== undefined)  v[SC.FILTER_FIELD]  = String(params.filterField);
  if (params.filterValue !== undefined)  v[SC.FILTER_VALUE]  = String(params.filterValue);
  if (params.dateField !== undefined)    v[SC.DATE_FIELD]    = String(params.dateField);
  if (params.formatType !== undefined)   v[SC.FORMAT_TYPE]   = String(params.formatType);
  if (params.unitLabel !== undefined)    v[SC.UNIT_LABEL]    = String(params.unitLabel);
  if (params.displayOrder !== undefined) v[SC.DISPLAY_ORDER] = Number(params.displayOrder);
  if (params.widgetType !== undefined)   v[SC.WIDGET_TYPE]   = String(params.widgetType);
  if (params.active !== undefined)       v[SC.ACTIVE]        = (params.active === true || params.active === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';

  v[SC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, SC_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'statistics.config.update', SC_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Config updated' });
}

function handleStatisticsConfigDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 4); // admin only
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, SC_TAB, SC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Config entry not found');
  hit.vals[SC.ACTIVE]     = 'FALSE';
  hit.vals[SC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, SC_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'statistics.config.delete', SC_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Metric deactivated' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 2. STATISTICS SNAPSHOTS (computed metric data)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SS_TAB      = 'StatisticsSnapshots';
var SS_NUM_COLS = 58;

// Layout: ID(0), SnapshotDate(1), PeriodType(2), PeriodLabel(3),
//         h1(4)…h50(53), Notes(54), CreatedBy(55), CreatedAt(56), Status(57)

var SS = {
  ID: 0,
  SNAPSHOT_DATE: 1,
  PERIOD_TYPE: 2,          // daily / weekly / monthly / quarterly / yearly / custom
  PERIOD_LABEL: 3,         // e.g., "March 2026", "Q1 2026", "Week 12"
  // h1 at index 4, h2 at index 5, ... h50 at index 53
  NOTES: 54,
  CREATED_BY: 55,
  CREATED_AT: 56,
  STATUS: 57               // Active / Archived
};

/** Maps slot name to column index: h1→4, h2→5, …, h50→53 */
function slotToCol_(slotName) {
  var m = String(slotName).match(/^h(\d+)$/);
  if (!m) return -1;
  var n = Number(m[1]);
  if (n < 1 || n > 50) return -1;
  return n + 3; // h1→4, h2→5, ..., h50→53
}

function statisticsSnapshotRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  var obj = {
    index:        rowIndex,
    id:           String(vals[SS.ID] || ''),
    snapshotDate: isoDate(vals[SS.SNAPSHOT_DATE]),
    periodType:   String(vals[SS.PERIOD_TYPE] || ''),
    periodLabel:  String(vals[SS.PERIOD_LABEL] || ''),
    notes:        String(vals[SS.NOTES] || ''),
    createdBy:    String(vals[SS.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:    isoDate(vals[SS.CREATED_AT]),
    status:       String(vals[SS.STATUS] || 'Active'),
    metrics: {}
  };
  // Extract h1–h50 into a metrics map (only non-empty slots)
  for (var h = 1; h <= 50; h++) {
    var val = vals[h + 3];
    if (val !== '' && val !== undefined && val !== null) {
      obj.metrics['h' + h] = val;
    }
  }
  return obj;
}


// ── Snapshot Handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleStatisticsSnapshotsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+
  var data = allRows(db(), SS_TAB, SS_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = statisticsSnapshotRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (params.periodType && obj.periodType !== params.periodType) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return (b.snapshotDate || '').localeCompare(a.snapshotDate || ''); });
  if (params.limit) out = out.slice(0, Number(params.limit));
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleStatisticsSnapshotsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SS_TAB, SS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Snapshot not found');
  return jsonOk(statisticsSnapshotRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

/** Manual snapshot creation — leader enters values directly */
function handleStatisticsSnapshotsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(SS_NUM_COLS);
  row[SS.ID]            = id;
  row[SS.SNAPSHOT_DATE] = params.snapshotDate ? new Date(params.snapshotDate) : now;
  row[SS.PERIOD_TYPE]   = String(params.periodType || 'custom');
  row[SS.PERIOD_LABEL]  = String(params.periodLabel || '');
  row[SS.NOTES]         = String(params.notes || '');
  row[SS.CREATED_BY]    = auth.email;
  row[SS.CREATED_AT]    = now;
  row[SS.STATUS]        = 'Active';

  // Accept metrics as a map: { h1: 42, h5: 100, h12: "text" }
  if (params.metrics && typeof params.metrics === 'object') {
    for (var key in params.metrics) {
      var col = slotToCol_(key);
      if (col >= 0) row[col] = params.metrics[key];
    }
  }
  // Also accept individual h1–h50 params directly
  for (var hh = 1; hh <= 50; hh++) {
    var hKey = 'h' + hh;
    if (params[hKey] !== undefined && (row[hh + 3] === '' || row[hh + 3] === undefined)) {
      row[hh + 3] = params[hKey];
    }
  }

  appendRow(ss, SS_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'statistics.snapshots.create', SS_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Snapshot created' });
}

function handleStatisticsSnapshotsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 4); // admin only
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, SS_TAB, SS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Snapshot not found');
  hit.vals[SS.STATUS] = 'Archived';
  writeRow(ss, SS_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'statistics.snapshots.delete', SS_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Snapshot archived' });
}

/** Get the most recent snapshot (optionally filtered by period type) */
function handleStatisticsSnapshotsLatest(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var data = allRows(db(), SS_TAB, SS_NUM_COLS);
  var best = null;
  var bestDate = '';
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SS.STATUS]) === 'Archived') continue;
    if (params.periodType && String(data[i][SS.PERIOD_TYPE]) !== params.periodType) continue;
    var d = isoDate(data[i][SS.SNAPSHOT_DATE]);
    if (d > bestDate) {
      bestDate = d;
      best = statisticsSnapshotRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    }
  }
  if (!best) return jsonErr('No snapshots found');
  return jsonOk(best);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMPUTE ENGINE — Auto-generate a snapshot from configured metrics
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Reads all active StatisticsConfig entries, pulls data from each
 * configured source tab, applies the calculation, and stores a new
 * snapshot row with all computed values.
 *
 * Params:
 *   periodType  — daily/weekly/monthly/quarterly/yearly/custom
 *   periodLabel — optional label override
 *   dateFrom    — optional start date for time-scoped calculations
 *   dateTo      — optional end date for time-scoped calculations
 *   notes       — optional notes
 */
function handleStatisticsCompute(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+
  var ss      = db();
  var configs = allRows(ss, SC_TAB, SC_NUM_COLS);
  var now     = new Date();
  var row     = blankRow(SS_NUM_COLS);
  var id      = newId();

  row[SS.ID]            = id;
  row[SS.SNAPSHOT_DATE] = now;
  row[SS.PERIOD_TYPE]   = String(params.periodType || 'custom');
  row[SS.PERIOD_LABEL]  = String(params.periodLabel || formatPeriodLabel_(now, params.periodType));
  row[SS.CREATED_BY]    = auth.email;
  row[SS.CREATED_AT]    = now;
  row[SS.STATUS]        = 'Active';
  row[SS.NOTES]         = String(params.notes || 'Auto-computed');

  var computed = 0;
  var errors   = [];

  // Cache tab data to avoid reading the same tab repeatedly
  var tabCache = {};

  for (var c = 0; c < configs.length; c++) {
    if (String(configs[c][SC.ACTIVE]) !== 'TRUE') continue;
    var cfg = statisticsConfigRowToObject(configs[c], c + 2);
    var col = slotToCol_(cfg.slot);
    if (col < 0) continue;

    try {
      var value = computeMetric_(ss, cfg, params, tabCache);
      row[col]  = value;
      computed++;
    } catch (err) {
      errors.push(cfg.slot + ': ' + err.message);
      row[col] = 'ERR';
    }
  }

  appendRow(ss, SS_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'statistics.compute', SS_TAB, id);

  var result = {
    id: id,
    computed: computed,
    message: computed + ' metrics computed'
  };
  if (errors.length > 0) result.errors = errors;
  return jsonOk(result);
}

/**
 * Compute a single metric value based on its configuration.
 * Supports: count, sum, avg, min, max, countDistinct, latest
 */
function computeMetric_(ss, cfg, params, tabCache) {
  if (!cfg.sourceTab) return '';

  // Use cached tab data if available
  var cacheKey = cfg.sourceTab;
  if (!tabCache[cacheKey]) {
    var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(cfg.sourceTab);
    if (!sheet) { tabCache[cacheKey] = { data: [], headers: [], numCols: 0 }; }
    else {
      var numCols = sheet.getLastColumn();
      var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
      tabCache[cacheKey] = {
        sheet:   sheet,
        headers: numCols > 0 ? sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, numCols).getValues()[0] : [],
        data:    lastRow > 1 ? sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, numCols).getValues() : [],
        numCols: numCols
      };
    }
  }

  var cached = tabCache[cacheKey];
  if (cached.data.length === 0) return 0;

  // Resolve column index from name or number
  var srcCol = resolveColumnIndex_(cached.headers, cfg.sourceColumn);
  if (srcCol < 0 && cfg.calcType !== 'count') return 'N/A';

  // Optional filter
  var filterCol = cfg.filterField ? resolveColumnIndex_(cached.headers, cfg.filterField) : -1;

  // Optional date filter
  var dateCol  = cfg.dateField ? resolveColumnIndex_(cached.headers, cfg.dateField) : -1;
  var dateFrom = params.dateFrom ? new Date(params.dateFrom) : null;
  var dateTo   = params.dateTo ? new Date(params.dateTo) : null;

  // Collect applicable values
  var values      = [];
  var distinctSet = {};
  var allCount    = 0;

  for (var r = 0; r < cached.data.length; r++) {
    // Apply field filter
    if (filterCol >= 0 && cfg.filterValue) {
      if (String(cached.data[r][filterCol]) !== cfg.filterValue) continue;
    }
    // Apply date filter
    if (dateCol >= 0 && (dateFrom || dateTo)) {
      var rowDate = new Date(cached.data[r][dateCol]);
      if (isNaN(rowDate.getTime())) continue;
      if (dateFrom && rowDate < dateFrom) continue;
      if (dateTo && rowDate > dateTo) continue;
    }

    allCount++;
    if (srcCol >= 0) {
      var raw = cached.data[r][srcCol];
      var num = Number(raw);
      if (!isNaN(num) && raw !== '' && raw !== null) {
        values.push(num);
      }
      if (cfg.calcType === 'countDistinct') {
        distinctSet[String(raw)] = true;
      }
    }
  }

  switch (cfg.calcType) {
    case 'count':
      return allCount;
    case 'sum':
      var s = 0; for (var i = 0; i < values.length; i++) s += values[i]; return s;
    case 'avg':
      if (values.length === 0) return 0;
      var a = 0; for (var j = 0; j < values.length; j++) a += values[j];
      return Math.round((a / values.length) * 100) / 100;
    case 'min':
      if (values.length === 0) return 0;
      var mn = values[0]; for (var k = 1; k < values.length; k++) { if (values[k] < mn) mn = values[k]; }
      return mn;
    case 'max':
      if (values.length === 0) return 0;
      var mx = values[0]; for (var l = 1; l < values.length; l++) { if (values[l] > mx) mx = values[l]; }
      return mx;
    case 'countDistinct':
      return Object.keys(distinctSet).length;
    case 'latest':
      if (values.length === 0) return '';
      return values[values.length - 1];
    default:
      return allCount;
  }
}

/** Resolve a column reference (header name or 0-based index) to a 0-based index */
function resolveColumnIndex_(headers, colRef) {
  var num = Number(colRef);
  if (!isNaN(num) && String(colRef) === String(num)) return num;
  var target = String(colRef).toLowerCase().trim();
  for (var h = 0; h < headers.length; h++) {
    if (String(headers[h]).toLowerCase().trim() === target) return h;
  }
  return -1;
}

/** Generate a default period label from a date */
function formatPeriodLabel_(date, periodType) {
  var months = ['Jan','Feb','Mar','Apr','May','Jun','Jul','Aug','Sep','Oct','Nov','Dec'];
  var y = date.getFullYear();
  var m = months[date.getMonth()];
  switch (periodType) {
    case 'daily':     return m + ' ' + date.getDate() + ', ' + y;
    case 'weekly':    return 'Week ' + getWeekNumber_(date) + ', ' + y;
    case 'monthly':   return m + ' ' + y;
    case 'quarterly': return 'Q' + (Math.floor(date.getMonth() / 3) + 1) + ' ' + y;
    case 'yearly':    return String(y);
    default:          return m + ' ' + date.getDate() + ', ' + y;
  }
}

function getWeekNumber_(d) {
  var oneJan = new Date(d.getFullYear(), 0, 1);
  return Math.ceil(((d - oneJan) / 86400000 + oneJan.getDay() + 1) / 7);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 3. CUSTOM VIEWS (saved dashboard layouts & report configurations)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var SV_TAB      = 'StatisticsCustomViews';
var SV_NUM_COLS = 14;

var SV = {
  ID: 0,
  VIEW_NAME: 1,
  DESCRIPTION: 2,
  LAYOUT_TYPE: 3,        // grid / list / dashboard / report
  SLOTS_INCLUDED: 4,     // comma-separated: "h1,h5,h12"
  CHART_TYPE: 5,         // bar / line / pie / mixed / none
  PERIOD_TYPE: 6,        // which snapshot period to show
  DATE_RANGE: 7,         // last30 / last90 / lastYear / allTime / custom
  ROLE_REQUIRED: 8,      // minimum role level to see this view
  IS_DEFAULT: 9,         // TRUE / FALSE
  SORT_BY: 10,           // displayOrder / label / value
  CREATED_BY: 11,
  CREATED_AT: 12,
  UPDATED_AT: 13
};

function statisticsViewRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:         rowIndex,
    id:            String(vals[SV.ID] || ''),
    viewName:      String(vals[SV.VIEW_NAME] || ''),
    description:   String(vals[SV.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    layoutType:    String(vals[SV.LAYOUT_TYPE] || 'grid'),
    slotsIncluded: String(vals[SV.SLOTS_INCLUDED] || ''),
    chartType:     String(vals[SV.CHART_TYPE] || 'none'),
    periodType:    String(vals[SV.PERIOD_TYPE] || ''),
    dateRange:     String(vals[SV.DATE_RANGE] || 'allTime'),
    roleRequired:  Number(vals[SV.ROLE_REQUIRED] || 0),
    isDefault:     String(vals[SV.IS_DEFAULT] || 'FALSE'),
    sortBy:        String(vals[SV.SORT_BY] || 'displayOrder'),
    createdBy:     String(vals[SV.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:     isoDate(vals[SV.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:     isoDate(vals[SV.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── View Handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleStatisticsViewsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0); // anybody authenticated
  var data = allRows(db(), SV_TAB, SV_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = statisticsViewRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (Number(auth.role) < obj.roleRequired) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleStatisticsViewsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), SV_TAB, SV_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('View not found');
  var obj = statisticsViewRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex);
  if (Number(auth.role) < obj.roleRequired) return jsonErr('Insufficient role for this view');
  return jsonOk(obj);
}

function handleStatisticsViewsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+
  if (!params.viewName) return jsonErr('viewName required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(SV_NUM_COLS);
  row[SV.ID]             = id;
  row[SV.VIEW_NAME]      = String(params.viewName);
  row[SV.DESCRIPTION]    = String(params.description || '');
  row[SV.LAYOUT_TYPE]    = String(params.layoutType || 'grid');
  row[SV.SLOTS_INCLUDED] = String(params.slotsIncluded || '');
  row[SV.CHART_TYPE]     = String(params.chartType || 'none');
  row[SV.PERIOD_TYPE]    = String(params.periodType || '');
  row[SV.DATE_RANGE]     = String(params.dateRange || 'allTime');
  row[SV.ROLE_REQUIRED]  = Number(params.roleRequired || 0);
  row[SV.IS_DEFAULT]     = (params.isDefault === true || params.isDefault === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[SV.SORT_BY]        = String(params.sortBy || 'displayOrder');
  row[SV.CREATED_BY]     = auth.email;
  row[SV.CREATED_AT]     = now;
  row[SV.UPDATED_AT]     = now;
  appendRow(ss, SV_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'statistics.views.create', SV_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'View created' });
}

function handleStatisticsViewsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, SV_TAB, SV_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('View not found');
  var v = hit.vals;

  if (params.viewName !== undefined)      v[SV.VIEW_NAME]      = String(params.viewName);
  if (params.description !== undefined)   v[SV.DESCRIPTION]    = String(params.description);
  if (params.layoutType !== undefined)    v[SV.LAYOUT_TYPE]    = String(params.layoutType);
  if (params.slotsIncluded !== undefined) v[SV.SLOTS_INCLUDED] = String(params.slotsIncluded);
  if (params.chartType !== undefined)     v[SV.CHART_TYPE]     = String(params.chartType);
  if (params.periodType !== undefined)    v[SV.PERIOD_TYPE]    = String(params.periodType);
  if (params.dateRange !== undefined)     v[SV.DATE_RANGE]     = String(params.dateRange);
  if (params.roleRequired !== undefined)  v[SV.ROLE_REQUIRED]  = Number(params.roleRequired);
  if (params.isDefault !== undefined)     v[SV.IS_DEFAULT]     = (params.isDefault === true || params.isDefault === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.sortBy !== undefined)        v[SV.SORT_BY]        = String(params.sortBy);

  v[SV.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, SV_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'statistics.views.update', SV_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'View updated' });
}

function handleStatisticsViewsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 4); // admin only
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, SV_TAB, SV_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('View not found');
  deleteRow(ss, SV_TAB, hit.rowIndex);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'statistics.views.delete', SV_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'View deleted' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DASHBOARD — Combined statistics overview
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleStatisticsDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+
  var ss = db();

  // Config summary
  var configs = allRows(ss, SC_TAB, SC_NUM_COLS);
  var activeConfigs = 0;
  var categories = {};
  for (var c = 0; c < configs.length; c++) {
    if (String(configs[c][SC.ACTIVE]) !== 'TRUE') continue;
    activeConfigs++;
    var cat = String(configs[c][SC.CATEGORY] || 'Uncategorized');
    categories[cat] = (categories[cat] || 0) + 1;
  }

  // Snapshot summary
  var snaps = allRows(ss, SS_TAB, SS_NUM_COLS);
  var totalSnaps = 0;
  var latestDate = '';
  for (var s = 0; s < snaps.length; s++) {
    if (String(snaps[s][SS.STATUS]) === 'Archived') continue;
    totalSnaps++;
    var d = isoDate(snaps[s][SS.SNAPSHOT_DATE]);
    if (d > latestDate) latestDate = d;
  }

  // Views summary
  var views = allRows(ss, SV_TAB, SV_NUM_COLS);

  return jsonOk({
    configuredMetrics: activeConfigs,
    metricCategories:  categories,
    totalSnapshots:    totalSnaps,
    latestSnapshot:    latestDate || null,
    savedViews:        views.length
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TRENDS — Time-series data for specific metric slots
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleStatisticsTrends(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+
  if (!params.slots) return jsonErr('slots required (comma-separated, e.g., "h1,h5,h12")');

  var slotNames = String(params.slots).split(',');
  var slotCols  = [];
  for (var s = 0; s < slotNames.length; s++) {
    var col = slotToCol_(slotNames[s].trim());
    if (col >= 0) slotCols.push({ name: slotNames[s].trim(), col: col });
  }
  if (slotCols.length === 0) return jsonErr('No valid slots specified');

  var data = allRows(db(), SS_TAB, SS_NUM_COLS);
  var series = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SS.STATUS]) === 'Archived') continue;
    if (params.periodType && String(data[i][SS.PERIOD_TYPE]) !== params.periodType) continue;

    var point = {
      snapshotDate: isoDate(data[i][SS.SNAPSHOT_DATE]),
      periodLabel:  String(data[i][SS.PERIOD_LABEL] || '')
    };
    for (var sc = 0; sc < slotCols.length; sc++) {
      point[slotCols[sc].name] = data[i][slotCols[sc].col];
    }
    series.push(point);
  }

  series.sort(function(a, b) { return (a.snapshotDate || '').localeCompare(b.snapshotDate || ''); });
  return jsonOk(series);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPORT — Dump all snapshot data with slot labels
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleStatisticsExport(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 4); // admin only
  var ss = db();

  // Get config labels for header mapping
  var configs = allRows(ss, SC_TAB, SC_NUM_COLS);
  var slotLabels = {};
  for (var c = 0; c < configs.length; c++) {
    if (String(configs[c][SC.ACTIVE]) !== 'TRUE') continue;
    slotLabels[String(configs[c][SC.SLOT])] = String(configs[c][SC.LABEL]);
  }

  // Get snapshots
  var data = allRows(ss, SS_TAB, SS_NUM_COLS);
  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][SS.STATUS]) === 'Archived') continue;
    rows.push(statisticsSnapshotRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }
  rows.sort(function(a, b) { return (a.snapshotDate || '').localeCompare(b.snapshotDate || ''); });

  return jsonOk({
    slotLabels: slotLabels,
    snapshots:  rows,
    exportedAt: new Date().toISOString()
  });
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Theology.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: THEOLOGY — Statement of Faith & Doctrine
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//
// Stores the church's theological positions in the master CRM database,
// replacing the standalone "Theology" sheet tab the frontend currently reads.
//
// Architecture:
//   TheologyCategories  Groupings (Core Doctrine, Applied Theology, etc.)
//   TheologySections    Individual doctrinal statements per category
//   TheologyScriptures  Supporting scripture references per section
//   TheologyRevisions   Audit trail when positions are updated
//
// The frontend (Theology.js) currently fetches ?tab=Theology and gets flat
// rows with category_id, category_title, category_intro, section_id,
// section_title, content.  The theology.flat endpoint below returns data
// in that exact shape so the frontend works without changes.
//
// Edits require pastor+ role — doctrine is not casually changed.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function newId() { return Utilities.getUuid(); }

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 1. THEOLOGY CATEGORIES
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var TC_TAB      = 'TheologyCategories';
var TC_NUM_COLS = 12;

var TC = {
  ID: 0,
  CATEGORY_ID: 1,
  TITLE: 2,
  SUBTITLE: 3,
  INTRO: 4,
  ICON: 5,
  COLOR_VAR: 6,
  SORT_ORDER: 7,
  VISIBLE: 8,
  STATUS: 9,
  CREATED_AT: 10,
  UPDATED_AT: 11
};

function theologyCategoryRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:      rowIndex,
    id:         String(vals[TC.ID] || ''),
    categoryId: String(vals[TC.CATEGORY_ID] || ''),
    title:      String(vals[TC.TITLE] || ''),
    subtitle:   String(vals[TC.SUBTITLE] || ''),
    intro:      String(vals[TC.INTRO] || ''),
    icon:       String(vals[TC.ICON] || '📜'),
    colorVar:   String(vals[TC.COLOR_VAR] || 'var(--accent-cyan)'),
    sortOrder:  Number(vals[TC.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    visible:    String(vals[TC.VISIBLE] || 'TRUE'),
    status:     String(vals[TC.STATUS] || ''),
    createdAt:  isoDate(vals[TC.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:  isoDate(vals[TC.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Category Handlers ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleTheologyCategoriesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), TC_TAB, TC_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = theologyCategoryRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (params.visibleOnly && obj.visible !== 'TRUE') continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder || a.title.localeCompare(b.title); });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleTheologyCategoriesGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), TC_TAB, TC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Category not found');
  return jsonOk(theologyCategoryRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleTheologyCategoriesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3); // pastor+
  if (!params.categoryId || !params.title) return jsonErr('categoryId and title required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(TC_NUM_COLS);
  row[TC.ID]          = id;
  row[TC.CATEGORY_ID] = String(params.categoryId);
  row[TC.TITLE]       = String(params.title);
  row[TC.SUBTITLE]    = String(params.subtitle || '');
  row[TC.INTRO]       = String(params.intro || '');
  row[TC.ICON]        = String(params.icon || '📜');
  row[TC.COLOR_VAR]   = String(params.colorVar || 'var(--accent-cyan)');
  row[TC.SORT_ORDER]  = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[TC.VISIBLE]     = 'TRUE';
  row[TC.STATUS]      = 'Active';
  row[TC.CREATED_AT]  = now;
  row[TC.UPDATED_AT]  = now;
  appendRow(ss, TC_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.categories.create', TC_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Theology category created' });
}

function handleTheologyCategoriesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3); // pastor+
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, TC_TAB, TC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Category not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.categoryId !== undefined) v[TC.CATEGORY_ID] = String(params.categoryId);
  if (params.title !== undefined)      v[TC.TITLE]       = String(params.title);
  if (params.subtitle !== undefined)   v[TC.SUBTITLE]    = String(params.subtitle);
  if (params.intro !== undefined)      v[TC.INTRO]       = String(params.intro);
  if (params.icon !== undefined)       v[TC.ICON]        = String(params.icon);
  if (params.colorVar !== undefined)   v[TC.COLOR_VAR]   = String(params.colorVar);
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)  v[TC.SORT_ORDER]  = Number(params.sortOrder);
  if (params.visible !== undefined)    v[TC.VISIBLE]     = (params.visible === true || params.visible === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.status !== undefined)     v[TC.STATUS]      = String(params.status);
  v[TC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, TC_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.categories.update', TC_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Category updated' });
}

function handleTheologyCategoriesDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 4); // admin only — doctrine categories are serious
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, TC_TAB, TC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Category not found');
  hit.vals[TC.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[TC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, TC_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.categories.delete', TC_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Category archived' });
}

function handleTheologyCategoriesReorder(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  if (!params.ids) return jsonErr('ids array required');
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, TC_TAB, TC_NUM_COLS);
  var ids  = (typeof params.ids === 'string') ? params.ids.split(',') : params.ids;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var pos = ids.indexOf(String(data[i][TC.ID]));
    if (pos !== -1) {
      data[i][TC.SORT_ORDER] = pos + 1;
      data[i][TC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      writeRow(ss, TC_TAB, i + 2, data[i]);
    }
  }
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.categories.reorder', TC_TAB, '');
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Categories reordered' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 2. THEOLOGY SECTIONS  (individual doctrinal statements)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var TS_TAB      = 'TheologySections';
var TS_NUM_COLS = 16;

var TS = {
  ID: 0,
  CATEGORY_ROW_ID: 1,
  SECTION_ID: 2,
  TITLE: 3,
  CONTENT: 4,
  SUMMARY: 5,
  SCRIPTURE_REFS: 6,
  KEYWORDS: 7,
  SORT_ORDER: 8,
  VISIBLE: 9,
  APPROVED_BY: 10,
  APPROVED_AT: 11,
  VERSION: 12,
  STATUS: 13,
  CREATED_AT: 14,
  UPDATED_AT: 15
};

function theologySectionRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:          rowIndex,
    id:             String(vals[TS.ID] || ''),
    categoryRowId:  String(vals[TS.CATEGORY_ROW_ID] || ''),
    sectionId:      String(vals[TS.SECTION_ID] || ''),
    title:          String(vals[TS.TITLE] || ''),
    content:        String(vals[TS.CONTENT] || ''),
    summary:        String(vals[TS.SUMMARY] || ''),
    scriptureRefs:  String(vals[TS.SCRIPTURE_REFS] || ''),
    keywords:       String(vals[TS.KEYWORDS] || ''),
    sortOrder:      Number(vals[TS.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    visible:        String(vals[TS.VISIBLE] || 'TRUE'),
    approvedBy:     String(vals[TS.APPROVED_BY] || ''),
    approvedAt:     isoDate(vals[TS.APPROVED_AT]),
    version:        Number(vals[TS.VERSION] || 1),
    status:         String(vals[TS.STATUS] || ''),
    createdAt:      isoDate(vals[TS.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:      isoDate(vals[TS.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Section Handlers ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleTheologySectionsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = theologySectionRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (params.categoryRowId && obj.categoryRowId !== params.categoryRowId) continue;
    if (params.visibleOnly && obj.visible !== 'TRUE') continue;
    if (params.keyword) {
      var kw = params.keyword.toLowerCase();
      if (obj.keywords.toLowerCase().indexOf(kw) === -1 &&
          obj.title.toLowerCase().indexOf(kw) === -1 &&
          obj.content.toLowerCase().indexOf(kw) === -1) continue;
    }
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder || a.title.localeCompare(b.title); });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleTheologySectionsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Section not found');
  return jsonOk(theologySectionRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

function handleTheologySectionsCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3); // pastor+
  if (!params.categoryRowId || !params.title) return jsonErr('categoryRowId and title required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(TS_NUM_COLS);
  row[TS.ID]              = id;
  row[TS.CATEGORY_ROW_ID] = String(params.categoryRowId);
  row[TS.SECTION_ID]      = String(params.sectionId || id);
  row[TS.TITLE]           = String(params.title);
  row[TS.CONTENT]         = String(params.content || '');
  row[TS.SUMMARY]         = String(params.summary || '');
  row[TS.SCRIPTURE_REFS]  = String(params.scriptureRefs || '');
  row[TS.KEYWORDS]        = String(params.keywords || '');
  row[TS.SORT_ORDER]      = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[TS.VISIBLE]         = 'TRUE';
  row[TS.VERSION]         = 1;
  row[TS.STATUS]          = 'Draft';
  row[TS.CREATED_AT]      = now;
  row[TS.UPDATED_AT]      = now;
  appendRow(ss, TS_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.sections.create', TS_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Section created' });
}

function handleTheologySectionsUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3); // pastor+
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Section not found');
  var v   = hit.vals;
  var old = {
    title:   String(v[TS.TITLE] || ''),
    content: String(v[TS.CONTENT] || '')
  };

  if (params.title !== undefined)           v[TS.TITLE]           = String(params.title);
  if (params.content !== undefined)         v[TS.CONTENT]         = String(params.content);
  if (params.summary !== undefined)         v[TS.SUMMARY]         = String(params.summary);
  if (params.scriptureRefs !== undefined)   v[TS.SCRIPTURE_REFS]  = String(params.scriptureRefs);
  if (params.keywords !== undefined)        v[TS.KEYWORDS]        = String(params.keywords);
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)       v[TS.SORT_ORDER]      = Number(params.sortOrder);
  if (params.visible !== undefined)         v[TS.VISIBLE]         = (params.visible === true || params.visible === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.categoryRowId !== undefined)   v[TS.CATEGORY_ROW_ID] = String(params.categoryRowId);
  if (params.status !== undefined)          v[TS.STATUS]          = String(params.status);

  // If content or title changed, bump version and create revision
  var contentChanged = (params.content !== undefined && params.content !== old.content) ||
                       (params.title !== undefined && params.title !== old.title);
  if (contentChanged) {
    v[TS.VERSION] = Number(v[TS.VERSION] || 1) + 1;
    createTheologyRevision_(ss, auth, params.id, old.title, old.content, v[TS.VERSION] - 1);
  }

  v[TS.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, TS_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.sections.update', TS_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ version: Number(v[TS.VERSION]), message: 'Section updated' });
}

function handleTheologySectionsDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 4); // admin only
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Section not found');
  hit.vals[TS.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[TS.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, TS_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.sections.delete', TS_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Section archived' });
}

/** Approve a doctrinal section — marks it as officially adopted */
function handleTheologySectionsApprove(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3); // pastor+
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Section not found');
  hit.vals[TS.APPROVED_BY] = auth.email;
  hit.vals[TS.APPROVED_AT] = new Date();
  hit.vals[TS.STATUS]      = 'Approved';
  hit.vals[TS.UPDATED_AT]  = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, TS_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.sections.approve', TS_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Section approved' });
}

function handleTheologySectionsReorder(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  if (!params.ids) return jsonErr('ids array required');
  var ss   = db();
  var data = allRows(ss, TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS);
  var ids  = (typeof params.ids === 'string') ? params.ids.split(',') : params.ids;
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var pos = ids.indexOf(String(data[i][TS.ID]));
    if (pos !== -1) {
      data[i][TS.SORT_ORDER] = pos + 1;
      data[i][TS.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
      writeRow(ss, TS_TAB, i + 2, data[i]);
    }
  }
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.sections.reorder', TS_TAB, '');
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Sections reordered' });
}

/** Get all sections for a category */
function handleTheologySectionsForCategory(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.categoryRowId) return jsonErr('categoryRowId required');
  var data = allRows(db(), TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][TS.CATEGORY_ROW_ID]) !== params.categoryRowId) continue;
    if (String(data[i][TS.STATUS]) === 'Archived') continue;
    out.push(theologySectionRowToObject(data[i], i + 2));
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 3. THEOLOGY SCRIPTURES  (supporting references per section)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var TSC_TAB      = 'TheologyScriptures';
var TSC_NUM_COLS = 12;

var TSC = {
  ID: 0,
  SECTION_ROW_ID: 1,
  REFERENCE: 2,
  TEXT: 3,
  TRANSLATION: 4,
  CONTEXT_NOTE: 5,
  SORT_ORDER: 6,
  IS_PRIMARY: 7,
  STATUS: 8,
  CREATED_BY: 9,
  CREATED_AT: 10,
  UPDATED_AT: 11
};

function theologyScriptureRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:        rowIndex,
    id:           String(vals[TSC.ID] || ''),
    sectionRowId: String(vals[TSC.SECTION_ROW_ID] || ''),
    reference:    String(vals[TSC.REFERENCE] || ''),
    text:         String(vals[TSC.TEXT] || ''),
    translation:  String(vals[TSC.TRANSLATION] || ''),
    contextNote:  String(vals[TSC.CONTEXT_NOTE] || ''),
    sortOrder:    Number(vals[TSC.SORT_ORDER] || 0),
    isPrimary:    String(vals[TSC.IS_PRIMARY] || 'FALSE'),
    status:       String(vals[TSC.STATUS] || ''),
    createdBy:    String(vals[TSC.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:    isoDate(vals[TSC.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedAt:    isoDate(vals[TSC.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}

// ── Scriptures Handlers ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleTheologyScripturesList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var data = allRows(db(), TSC_TAB, TSC_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = theologyScriptureRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (obj.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (params.sectionRowId && obj.sectionRowId !== params.sectionRowId) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) {
    if (a.isPrimary !== b.isPrimary) return a.isPrimary === 'TRUE' ? -1 : 1;
    return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder;
  });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleTheologyScripturesCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  if (!params.sectionRowId || !params.reference) return jsonErr('sectionRowId and reference required');
  var ss  = db();
  var id  = newId();
  var now = new Date();
  var row = blankRow(TSC_NUM_COLS);
  row[TSC.ID]             = id;
  row[TSC.SECTION_ROW_ID] = String(params.sectionRowId);
  row[TSC.REFERENCE]      = String(params.reference);
  row[TSC.TEXT]           = String(params.text || '');
  row[TSC.TRANSLATION]   = String(params.translation || 'ESV');
  row[TSC.CONTEXT_NOTE]  = String(params.contextNote || '');
  row[TSC.SORT_ORDER]    = Number(params.sortOrder || 0);
  row[TSC.IS_PRIMARY]    = (params.isPrimary === true || params.isPrimary === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  row[TSC.STATUS]        = 'Active';
  row[TSC.CREATED_BY]    = auth.email;
  row[TSC.CREATED_AT]    = now;
  row[TSC.UPDATED_AT]    = now;
  appendRow(ss, TSC_TAB, row);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.scriptures.create', TSC_TAB, id);
  return jsonOk({ id: id, message: 'Scripture reference added' });
}

function handleTheologyScripturesUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, TSC_TAB, TSC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Scripture not found');
  var v = hit.vals;
  if (params.reference !== undefined)    v[TSC.REFERENCE]    = String(params.reference);
  if (params.text !== undefined)         v[TSC.TEXT]         = String(params.text);
  if (params.translation !== undefined)  v[TSC.TRANSLATION]  = String(params.translation);
  if (params.contextNote !== undefined)  v[TSC.CONTEXT_NOTE] = String(params.contextNote);
  if (params.sortOrder !== undefined)    v[TSC.SORT_ORDER]   = Number(params.sortOrder);
  if (params.isPrimary !== undefined)    v[TSC.IS_PRIMARY]   = (params.isPrimary === true || params.isPrimary === 'TRUE') ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
  if (params.status !== undefined)       v[TSC.STATUS]       = String(params.status);
  v[TSC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, TSC_TAB, hit.rowIndex, v);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.scriptures.update', TSC_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Scripture updated' });
}

function handleTheologyScripturesDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 3);
  var ss  = db();
  var hit = findRowById(ss, TSC_TAB, TSC_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Scripture not found');
  hit.vals[TSC.STATUS]     = 'Archived';
  hit.vals[TSC.UPDATED_AT] = new Date();
  writeRow(ss, TSC_TAB, hit.rowIndex, hit.vals);
  auditLog(ss, auth, 'theology.scriptures.delete', TSC_TAB, params.id);
  return jsonOk({ message: 'Scripture archived' });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// 4. THEOLOGY REVISIONS  (audit trail for doctrinal changes)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var TR_TAB      = 'TheologyRevisions';
var TR_NUM_COLS = 10;

var TR = {
  ID: 0,
  SECTION_ROW_ID: 1,
  VERSION: 2,
  PREVIOUS_TITLE: 3,
  PREVIOUS_CONTENT: 4,
  CHANGED_BY: 5,
  CHANGE_REASON: 6,
  APPROVED_BY: 7,
  STATUS: 8,
  CREATED_AT: 9
};

function theologyRevisionRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:           rowIndex,
    id:              String(vals[TR.ID] || ''),
    sectionRowId:    String(vals[TR.SECTION_ROW_ID] || ''),
    version:         Number(vals[TR.VERSION] || 0),
    previousTitle:   String(vals[TR.PREVIOUS_TITLE] || ''),
    previousContent: String(vals[TR.PREVIOUS_CONTENT] || ''),
    changedBy:       String(vals[TR.CHANGED_BY] || ''),
    changeReason:    String(vals[TR.CHANGE_REASON] || ''),
    approvedBy:      String(vals[TR.APPROVED_BY] || ''),
    status:          String(vals[TR.STATUS] || ''),
    createdAt:       isoDate(vals[TR.CREATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Revisions Handlers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function handleTheologyRevisionsList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2); // leader+ to view doctrinal change history
  var data = allRows(db(), TR_TAB, TR_NUM_COLS);
  var out  = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = theologyRevisionRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (params.sectionRowId && obj.sectionRowId !== params.sectionRowId) continue;
    out.push(obj);
  }
  out.sort(function(a, b) { return b.version - a.version; });
  return jsonOk(out);
}

function handleTheologyRevisionsGet(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 2);
  var hit = findRowById(db(), TR_TAB, TR_NUM_COLS, params.id);
  if (!hit) return jsonErr('Revision not found');
  return jsonOk(theologyRevisionRowToObject(hit.vals, hit.rowIndex));
}

/** Internal helper: auto-create revision when section content changes */
function createTheologyRevision_(ss, auth, sectionRowId, prevTitle, prevContent, prevVersion) {
  var id  = newId();
  var row = blankRow(TR_NUM_COLS);
  row[TR.ID]               = id;
  row[TR.SECTION_ROW_ID]   = String(sectionRowId);
  row[TR.VERSION]          = Number(prevVersion);
  row[TR.PREVIOUS_TITLE]   = String(prevTitle);
  row[TR.PREVIOUS_CONTENT] = String(prevContent);
  row[TR.CHANGED_BY]       = auth.email;
  row[TR.CHANGE_REASON]    = '';
  row[TR.STATUS]           = 'Recorded';
  row[TR.CREATED_AT]       = new Date();
  appendRow(ss, TR_TAB, row);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FLAT ENDPOINT — Returns data in the same shape the current frontend expects
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//
// The existing Theology.js fetches ?tab=Theology and expects flat rows with:
//   category_id, category_title, category_intro, section_id, section_title, content
//
// This endpoint merges categories + sections into that exact flat format
// so the frontend works without any changes.

function handleTheologyFlat(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss = db();

  // Load categories
  var catData = allRows(ss, TC_TAB, TC_NUM_COLS);
  var cats    = {};
  var catList = [];
  for (var c = 0; c < catData.length; c++) {
    var cat = theologyCategoryRowToObject(catData[c], c + 2);
    if (cat.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (cat.visible !== 'TRUE') continue;
    cats[cat.id] = cat;
    catList.push(cat);
  }
  catList.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });

  // Load sections
  var secData = allRows(ss, TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS);
  var secs    = [];
  for (var s = 0; s < secData.length; s++) {
    var sec = theologySectionRowToObject(secData[s], s + 2);
    if (sec.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (sec.visible !== 'TRUE') continue;
    secs.push(sec);
  }
  secs.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });

  // Build flat rows matching frontend expectations
  var flat = [];
  for (var ci = 0; ci < catList.length; ci++) {
    var cObj = catList[ci];
    var catSections = secs.filter(function(sec) { return sec.categoryRowId === cObj.id; });
    for (var si = 0; si < catSections.length; si++) {
      flat.push({
        category_id:    cObj.categoryId,
        category_title: cObj.title,
        category_intro: cObj.intro,
        section_id:     catSections[si].sectionId,
        section_title:  catSections[si].title,
        content:        catSections[si].content
      });
    }
  }

  return jsonOk(flat);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FULL ENDPOINT — Returns the structured tree (categories → sections → scriptures)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTheologyFull(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss = db();

  // Categories
  var catData = allRows(ss, TC_TAB, TC_NUM_COLS);
  var cats    = [];
  for (var c = 0; c < catData.length; c++) {
    var cat = theologyCategoryRowToObject(catData[c], c + 2);
    if (cat.status === 'Archived') continue;
    cats.push(cat);
  }
  cats.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });

  // Sections
  var secData = allRows(ss, TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS);
  var secs    = [];
  for (var s = 0; s < secData.length; s++) {
    var sec = theologySectionRowToObject(secData[s], s + 2);
    if (sec.status === 'Archived') continue;
    secs.push(sec);
  }

  // Scriptures
  var scrData = allRows(ss, TSC_TAB, TSC_NUM_COLS);
  var scrMap  = {}; // sectionRowId → [scriptures]
  for (var sc = 0; sc < scrData.length; sc++) {
    var scr = theologyScriptureRowToObject(scrData[sc], sc + 2);
    if (scr.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (!scrMap[scr.sectionRowId]) scrMap[scr.sectionRowId] = [];
    scrMap[scr.sectionRowId].push(scr);
  }

  // Assemble tree
  var tree = [];
  for (var ci = 0; ci < cats.length; ci++) {
    var cObj = cats[ci];
    var catSections = secs.filter(function(sec) { return sec.categoryRowId === cObj.id; });
    catSections.sort(function(a, b) { return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder; });
    var enriched = [];
    for (var si = 0; si < catSections.length; si++) {
      var secObj = catSections[si];
      secObj.scriptures = scrMap[secObj.id] || [];
      secObj.scriptures.sort(function(a, b) {
        if (a.isPrimary !== b.isPrimary) return a.isPrimary === 'TRUE' ? -1 : 1;
        return a.sortOrder - b.sortOrder;
      });
      enriched.push(secObj);
    }
    cObj.sections = enriched;
    tree.push(cObj);
  }

  return jsonOk(tree);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SEARCH — Full-text search across all theology content
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTheologySearch(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  if (!params.q) return jsonErr('q (search query) required');
  var q  = String(params.q).toLowerCase();
  var ss = db();

  // Search sections
  var secData = allRows(ss, TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS);
  var hits    = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < secData.length; i++) {
    var sec = theologySectionRowToObject(secData[i], i + 2);
    if (sec.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (sec.title.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1 ||
        sec.content.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1 ||
        sec.summary.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1 ||
        sec.scriptureRefs.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1 ||
        sec.keywords.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1) {
      hits.push(sec);
    }
  }

  // Search scriptures
  var scrData = allRows(ss, TSC_TAB, TSC_NUM_COLS);
  var scrHits = [];
  for (var s = 0; s < scrData.length; s++) {
    var scr = theologyScriptureRowToObject(scrData[s], s + 2);
    if (scr.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (scr.reference.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1 ||
        scr.text.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1 ||
        scr.contextNote.toLowerCase().indexOf(q) !== -1) {
      scrHits.push(scr);
    }
  }

  return jsonOk({ sections: hits, scriptures: scrHits });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DASHBOARD — Summary stats for theology content
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTheologyDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 0);
  var ss = db();

  var cats = allRows(ss, TC_TAB, TC_NUM_COLS);
  var activeCats = 0;
  for (var c = 0; c < cats.length; c++) {
    if (String(cats[c][TC.STATUS]) !== 'Archived') activeCats++;
  }

  var secs = allRows(ss, TS_TAB, TS_NUM_COLS);
  var totalSections = 0, approved = 0, draft = 0;
  for (var s = 0; s < secs.length; s++) {
    var st = String(secs[s][TS.STATUS] || '');
    if (st === 'Archived') continue;
    totalSections++;
    if (st === 'Approved') approved++;
    if (st === 'Draft') draft++;
  }

  var scrs = allRows(ss, TSC_TAB, TSC_NUM_COLS);
  var activeScriptures = 0;
  for (var sc = 0; sc < scrs.length; sc++) {
    if (String(scrs[sc][TSC.STATUS]) !== 'Archived') activeScriptures++;
  }

  var revs = allRows(ss, TR_TAB, TR_NUM_COLS);

  return jsonOk({
    totalCategories:  activeCats,
    totalSections:    totalSections,
    approvedSections: approved,
    draftSections:    draft,
    totalScriptures:  activeScriptures,
    totalRevisions:   revs.length
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SEED — Pre-populate with common Statement of Faith categories
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function seedTheologyCategories_(ss) {
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(TC_TAB);
  if (!sheet) return;
  if (sheet.getLastRow() >= 2) return; // Already seeded

  var now = new Date();
  var categories = [
    ['core',          'Core Doctrine',            'Essential beliefs of the Christian faith',       '📜', 'var(--accent-gold)'],
    ['applied',       'Applied Theology',         'How doctrine is lived out in daily life',        '📖', 'var(--accent-cyan)'],
    ['marriage_cov',  'Marriage & Covenant',       'The biblical view of marriage and covenants',    '💍', 'var(--accent-magenta)'],
    ['salvation',     'Salvation & Soteriology',   'The doctrine of salvation through Christ',       '✝️', 'var(--accent-gold)'],
    ['ecclesiology',  'Ecclesiology',              'The nature, purpose, and government of the church', '⛪', 'var(--accent-cyan)'],
    ['eschatology',   'Eschatology',               'End times and the return of Christ',             '🔮', 'var(--accent-magenta)'],
    ['pneumatology',  'Pneumatology',              'The person and work of the Holy Spirit',         '🕊️', 'var(--accent-gold)'],
    ['bibliology',    'Bibliology',                'The nature, authority, and sufficiency of Scripture', '📕', 'var(--accent-cyan)']
  ];

  var rows = [];
  for (var i = 0; i < categories.length; i++) {
    var c = categories[i];
    rows.push([
      generateId(),  // ID
      c[0],          // Category ID (slug)
      c[1],          // Title
      '',            // Subtitle
      c[2],          // Intro
      c[3],          // Icon
      c[4],          // Color Var
      i + 1,         // Sort Order
      'TRUE',        // Visible
      'Active',      // Status
      now,           // Created At
      now            // Updated At
    ]);
  }

  if (rows.length > 0) {
    sheet.getRange(2, 1, rows.length, TC_NUM_COLS).setValues(rows);
  }
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Todo.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXPANSION: TODO — Cross-Entity Task Management
// Tab: ToDo (19 columns, A–S)
//
// Tasks can be linked to ANY entity in FlockOS via Entity Type + Entity ID.
// Supports recurring tasks, assignment by email, filtering by entity, and
// overdue detection.
//
// Entity linkage means you can:
//   - Attach a follow-up task to a PrayerRequest
//   - Create a visit task against a SpiritualCareCase
//   - Schedule recurring admin tasks against a Ministry
//   - Link preparation tasks to an Event or ServicePlan
//   - Assign discipleship check-ins to a DiscipleshipEnrollment
//   - … anything with an ID in any tab
//
// RBAC: volunteer+ can see own tasks; leader+ can see all tasks.
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════


var TODO_TAB = 'ToDo';
var TODO_NUM_COLS = 19;

var TD = {
  ID: 0, TITLE: 1, DESCRIPTION: 2, ASSIGNED_TO: 3, ASSIGNED_MEMBER_ID: 4,
  DUE_DATE: 5, PRIORITY: 6, STATUS: 7, CATEGORY: 8,
  ENTITY_TYPE: 9, ENTITY_ID: 10, RECURRING: 11, RECURRENCE_RULE: 12,
  NOTES: 13, AUTO_LOG: 14, CREATED_BY: 15, CREATED_AT: 16,
  UPDATED_BY: 17, UPDATED_AT: 18
};

function todoRowToObject(vals, rowIndex) {
  return {
    index:            rowIndex,
    id:               String(vals[TD.ID] || ''),
    title:            String(vals[TD.TITLE] || ''),
