    description:      String(vals[TD.DESCRIPTION] || ''),
    assignedTo:       String(vals[TD.ASSIGNED_TO] || ''),
    assignedMemberId: String(vals[TD.ASSIGNED_MEMBER_ID] || ''),
    dueDate:          isoDate(vals[TD.DUE_DATE]),
    priority:         String(vals[TD.PRIORITY] || ''),
    status:           String(vals[TD.STATUS] || ''),
    category:         String(vals[TD.CATEGORY] || ''),
    entityType:       String(vals[TD.ENTITY_TYPE] || ''),
    entityId:         String(vals[TD.ENTITY_ID] || ''),
    recurring:        toBool(vals[TD.RECURRING]),
    recurrenceRule:   String(vals[TD.RECURRENCE_RULE] || ''),
    notes:            String(vals[TD.NOTES] || ''),
    autoLog:          String(vals[TD.AUTO_LOG] || ''),
    createdBy:        String(vals[TD.CREATED_BY] || ''),
    createdAt:        isoDate(vals[TD.CREATED_AT]),
    updatedBy:        String(vals[TD.UPDATED_BY] || ''),
    updatedAt:        isoDate(vals[TD.UPDATED_AT])
  };
}


// ── Visibility ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
// Leaders+ see everything.  Volunteers see only tasks assigned to them.
function canSeeTodo_(obj, auth) {
  if (hasRole(auth, 'leader')) return true;
  return normalizeEmail(obj.assignedTo) === normalizeEmail(auth.email);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// LIST — all tasks the caller can see, with optional filters
// Params: status, priority, category, assignedTo, memberId,
//         entityType, entityId, dueBefore, dueAfter
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoList(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var status     = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var priority   = String(params.priority || '').trim();
  var category   = String(params.category || '').trim();
  var assignedTo = String(params.assignedTo || '').trim().toLowerCase();
  var memberId   = String(params.memberId || '').trim();
  var entType    = String(params.entityType || '').trim();
  var entId      = String(params.entityId || '').trim();
  var dueBefore  = String(params.dueBefore || '').trim();
  var dueAfter   = String(params.dueAfter || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = todoRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (!canSeeTodo_(obj, auth)) continue;
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    if (priority && obj.priority !== priority) continue;
    if (category && obj.category !== category) continue;
    if (assignedTo && normalizeEmail(obj.assignedTo) !== assignedTo) continue;
    if (memberId && obj.assignedMemberId !== memberId) continue;
    if (entType && obj.entityType !== entType) continue;
    if (entId && obj.entityId !== entId) continue;
    if (dueBefore && obj.dueDate && obj.dueDate > dueBefore) continue;
    if (dueAfter && obj.dueDate && obj.dueDate < dueAfter) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CREATE — make a new task, optionally linked to an entity
// Required: title
// Optional: everything else
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoCreate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.title) return jsonErr('title is required.');

  var now = isoNow();
  var row = [
    generateId(),                                       // A  ID
    String(params.title || ''),                         // B  Title
    String(params.description || ''),                   // C  Description
    String(params.assignedTo || auth.email),             // D  Assigned To
    String(params.assignedMemberId || ''),               // E  Assigned Member ID
    params.dueDate || '',                                // F  Due Date
    String(params.priority || 'Medium'),                 // G  Priority
    String(params.status || 'Not Started'),              // H  Status
    String(params.category || 'Other'),                  // I  Category
    String(params.entityType || ''),                     // J  Entity Type
    String(params.entityId || ''),                       // K  Entity ID
    params.recurring ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE',                 // L  Recurring
    String(params.recurrenceRule || ''),                  // M  Recurrence Rule
    String(params.notes || ''),                          // N  Notes
    '',                                                  // O  Auto Log
    auth.email,                                          // P  Created By
    now,                                                 // Q  Created At
    auth.email,                                          // R  Updated By
    now                                                  // S  Updated At
  ];

  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  sheet.appendRow(row);
  var newIndex = sheet.getLastRow();

  var logMsg = 'Task: ' + params.title;
  if (params.entityType) logMsg += ' → ' + params.entityType + ':' + (params.entityId || '');
  writeAudit(auth, 'todo.create', TODO_TAB, newIndex, logMsg);

  return jsonOk({ row: todoRowToObject(row, newIndex) });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// UPDATE — modify any field by ID
// Required: id
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoUpdate(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Task not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var targetId = String(params.id).trim();

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][TD.ID]) === targetId) {
      var obj = todoRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      if (!canSeeTodo_(obj, auth)) return jsonErr('Access denied.');

      var now = isoNow();
      var rowNum = i + 2;
      var range = sheet.getRange(rowNum, 1, 1, TODO_NUM_COLS);
      var vals = range.getValues()[0];

      if (params.title !== undefined)            vals[TD.TITLE] = String(params.title);
      if (params.description !== undefined)      vals[TD.DESCRIPTION] = String(params.description);
      if (params.assignedTo !== undefined)        vals[TD.ASSIGNED_TO] = String(params.assignedTo);
      if (params.assignedMemberId !== undefined)  vals[TD.ASSIGNED_MEMBER_ID] = String(params.assignedMemberId);
      if (params.dueDate !== undefined)           vals[TD.DUE_DATE] = params.dueDate;
      if (params.priority !== undefined)          vals[TD.PRIORITY] = String(params.priority);
      if (params.status !== undefined)            vals[TD.STATUS] = String(params.status);
      if (params.category !== undefined)          vals[TD.CATEGORY] = String(params.category);
      if (params.entityType !== undefined)        vals[TD.ENTITY_TYPE] = String(params.entityType);
      if (params.entityId !== undefined)          vals[TD.ENTITY_ID] = String(params.entityId);
      if (params.recurring !== undefined)         vals[TD.RECURRING] = params.recurring ? 'TRUE' : 'FALSE';
      if (params.recurrenceRule !== undefined)    vals[TD.RECURRENCE_RULE] = String(params.recurrenceRule);
      if (params.notes !== undefined)             vals[TD.NOTES] = String(params.notes);
      vals[TD.UPDATED_BY] = auth.email;
      vals[TD.UPDATED_AT] = now;

      range.setValues([vals]);
      writeAudit(auth, 'todo.update', TODO_TAB, rowNum, 'Updated task: ' + vals[TD.TITLE]);

      return jsonOk({ row: todoRowToObject(vals, rowNum) });
    }
  }

  return jsonErr('Task not found: ' + targetId);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DELETE — hard delete by ID (leader+ only)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoDelete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Task not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var targetId = String(params.id).trim();

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][TD.ID]) === targetId) {
      var rowNum = i + 2;
      writeAudit(auth, 'todo.delete', TODO_TAB, rowNum, 'Deleted: ' + data[i][TD.TITLE]);
      sheet.deleteRow(rowNum);
      return jsonOk({ deleted: targetId });
    }
  }

  return jsonErr('Task not found: ' + targetId);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// ARCHIVE — soft-delete: sets status to Archived
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoArchive(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Task not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var targetId = String(params.id).trim();

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][TD.ID]) === targetId) {
      var obj = todoRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      if (!canSeeTodo_(obj, auth)) return jsonErr('Access denied.');

      var rowNum = i + 2;
      var now = isoNow();
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, TD.STATUS + 1).setValue('Archived');
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, TD.UPDATED_BY + 1).setValue(auth.email);
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, TD.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(now);

      writeAudit(auth, 'todo.archive', TODO_TAB, rowNum, 'Archived: ' + obj.title);
      obj.status = 'Archived';
      obj.updatedBy = auth.email;
      obj.updatedAt = now;
      return jsonOk({ row: obj });
    }
  }

  return jsonErr('Task not found: ' + targetId);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// UNARCHIVE — restore an archived task to Not Started
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoUnarchive(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Task not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var targetId = String(params.id).trim();

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][TD.ID]) === targetId) {
      var obj = todoRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      if (!canSeeTodo_(obj, auth)) return jsonErr('Access denied.');
      if (obj.status !== 'Archived') return jsonErr('Task is not archived.');

      var rowNum = i + 2;
      var newStatus = 'Not Started';
      var now = isoNow();
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, TD.STATUS + 1).setValue(newStatus);
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, TD.UPDATED_BY + 1).setValue(auth.email);
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, TD.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(now);

      writeAudit(auth, 'todo.unarchive', TODO_TAB, rowNum, 'Unarchived: ' + obj.title);
      obj.status = newStatus;
      obj.updatedBy = auth.email;
      obj.updatedAt = now;
      return jsonOk({ row: obj });
    }
  }

  return jsonErr('Task not found: ' + targetId);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FOR ENTITY — get all tasks linked to a specific entity
// Required: entityType, entityId
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoForEntity(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.entityType) return jsonErr('entityType is required.');
  if (!params.entityId) return jsonErr('entityId is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var entType = String(params.entityType).trim();
  var entId   = String(params.entityId).trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = todoRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (!canSeeTodo_(obj, auth)) continue;
    if (obj.entityType === entType && obj.entityId === entId) {
      rows.push(obj);
    }
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MY TASKS — tasks assigned to the current user
// Optional: status filter
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoMyTasks(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var email = normalizeEmail(auth.email);
  var status = String(params.status || '').trim();
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = todoRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (normalizeEmail(obj.assignedTo) !== email) continue;
    if (status && obj.status !== status) continue;
    rows.push(obj);
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// OVERDUE — tasks past due date that are not Done or Archived
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoOverdue(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var today = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
  var rows = [];

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var obj = todoRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
    if (!canSeeTodo_(obj, auth)) continue;
    if (obj.status === 'Done' || obj.status === 'Archived') continue;
    if (!obj.dueDate) continue;
    if (obj.dueDate.substring(0, 10) < today) {
      rows.push(obj);
    }
  }

  return jsonOk({ rows: rows });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// COMPLETE — marks a task Done; if recurring, spawns the next occurrence
// Required: id
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoComplete(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'volunteer');
  if (!params.id) return jsonErr('id is required.');

  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonErr('Task not found.');

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var targetId = String(params.id).trim();

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    if (String(data[i][TD.ID]) === targetId) {
      var obj = todoRowToObject(data[i], i + 2);
      if (!canSeeTodo_(obj, auth)) return jsonErr('Access denied.');

      var rowNum = i + 2;
      var now = isoNow();

      // Mark current task done
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, TD.STATUS + 1).setValue('Done');
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, TD.UPDATED_BY + 1).setValue(auth.email);
      sheet.getRange(rowNum, TD.UPDATED_AT + 1).setValue(now);
      obj.status = 'Done';
      obj.updatedBy = auth.email;
      obj.updatedAt = now;

      writeAudit(auth, 'todo.complete', TODO_TAB, rowNum, 'Completed: ' + obj.title);

      var nextRow = null;

      // If recurring, spawn the next occurrence
      if (obj.recurring && obj.recurrenceRule && obj.dueDate) {
        var nextDue = computeNextDueDate_(obj.dueDate, obj.recurrenceRule);
        if (nextDue) {
          var newRow = [
            generateId(),                                // A  ID
            obj.title,                                   // B  Title
            obj.description,                             // C  Description
            obj.assignedTo,                              // D  Assigned To
            obj.assignedMemberId,                        // E  Assigned Member ID
            nextDue,                                     // F  Due Date
            obj.priority,                                // G  Priority
            'Not Started',                               // H  Status
            obj.category,                                // I  Category
            obj.entityType,                              // J  Entity Type
            obj.entityId,                                // K  Entity ID
            'TRUE',                                      // L  Recurring
            obj.recurrenceRule,                           // M  Recurrence Rule
            obj.notes,                                   // N  Notes
            '',                                          // O  Auto Log
            auth.email,                                  // P  Created By
            now,                                         // Q  Created At
            auth.email,                                  // R  Updated By
            now                                          // S  Updated At
          ];
          sheet.appendRow(newRow);
          nextRow = todoRowToObject(newRow, sheet.getLastRow());

          writeAudit(auth, 'todo.create', TODO_TAB, sheet.getLastRow(),
            'Recurring spawn: ' + obj.title + ' → due ' + nextDue);
        }
      }

      return jsonOk({ row: obj, nextOccurrence: nextRow });
    }
  }

  return jsonErr('Task not found: ' + targetId);
}

// ── Recurrence Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────

function computeNextDueDate_(dueDateStr, rule) {
  var d = new Date(dueDateStr);
  if (isNaN(d.getTime())) return null;

  switch (rule) {
    case 'Daily':     d.setDate(d.getDate() + 1);   break;
    case 'Weekly':    d.setDate(d.getDate() + 7);   break;
    case 'Biweekly':  d.setDate(d.getDate() + 14);  break;
    case 'Monthly':   d.setMonth(d.getMonth() + 1); break;
    case 'Quarterly': d.setMonth(d.getMonth() + 3); break;
    case 'Yearly':    d.setFullYear(d.getFullYear() + 1); break;
    default: return null;
  }

  return d.toISOString().substring(0, 10);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DASHBOARD — summary stats for tasks
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTodoDashboard(params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'leader');
  var sheet = getTab(TODO_TAB);
  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  if (lastRow < 2) return jsonOk({ total: 0, byStatus: {}, byPriority: {}, byCategory: {}, byEntity: {}, overdue: 0 });

  var data = sheet.getRange(2, 1, lastRow - 1, TODO_NUM_COLS).getValues();
  var today = isoNow().substring(0, 10);
  var total = data.length;
  var byStatus = {}, byPriority = {}, byCategory = {}, byEntity = {};
  var overdue = 0;

  for (var i = 0; i < data.length; i++) {
    var s = String(data[i][TD.STATUS] || 'Unknown');
    var p = String(data[i][TD.PRIORITY] || 'Unknown');
    var c = String(data[i][TD.CATEGORY] || 'Unknown');
    var e = String(data[i][TD.ENTITY_TYPE] || 'Unlinked');

    byStatus[s] = (byStatus[s] || 0) + 1;
    byPriority[p] = (byPriority[p] || 0) + 1;
    byCategory[c] = (byCategory[c] || 0) + 1;
    byEntity[e] = (byEntity[e] || 0) + 1;

    if (s !== 'Done' && s !== 'Archived') {
      var due = isoDate(data[i][TD.DUE_DATE]);
      if (due && due.substring(0, 10) < today) overdue++;
    }
  }
  
  return jsonOk({
    total: total,
    byStatus: byStatus,
    byPriority: byPriority,
    byCategory: byCategory,
    byEntity: byEntity,
    overdue: overdue
  });
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SMOKE TESTS — Run from GAS editor after every paste to verify nothing broke
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

/**
 * Run this function from the GAS editor (select → ▶ Run) after pasting a new
 * version of John_Combined.gs.  Check the Execution Log for ✅ / ❌.
 *
 * Tests are READ-ONLY — they never write, create, or delete anything.
 * They verify that every major module loaded and core utilities work.
 */
function runSmokeTests() {
  var pass = 0, fail = 0;

  function check(label, fn) {
    try { fn(); Logger.log('✅ ' + label); pass++; }
    catch (e) { Logger.log('❌ ' + label + ' — ' + e.message); fail++; }
  }

  Logger.log('═══ John Smoke Tests (FLOCK API) ═══');

  // ── 1. Entry Points ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  check('doGet is defined', function () {
    if (typeof doGet !== 'function') throw new Error('missing');
  });

  check('doPost is defined', function () {
    if (typeof doPost !== 'function') throw new Error('missing');
  });

  check('doGet health check', function () {
    var out = doGet({ parameter: { action: 'health' } });
    var body = JSON.parse(out.getContent());
    if (!body.ok) throw new Error('ok was ' + body.ok);
  });

  check('doGet missing action returns error', function () {
    var out = doGet({ parameter: {} });
    var body = JSON.parse(out.getContent());
    if (body.ok !== false) throw new Error('Expected ok:false');
  });

  // ── 2. Core Utilities ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
  check('SHEET_ID property exists', function () {
    var id = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID');
    if (!id) throw new Error('SHEET_ID is not set');
  });

  check('normalizeEmail', function () {
    var r = normalizeEmail('  FOO@bar.COM  ');
    if (r !== 'foo@bar.com') throw new Error('got: ' + r);
  });

  check('generateId returns UUID', function () {
    var id = generateId();
    if (typeof id !== 'string' || id.length < 10) throw new Error('bad id: ' + id);
  });

  check('isoDate formats correctly', function () {
    var d = isoDate(new Date(2026, 0, 1));
    if (d.substring(0, 10) !== '2026-01-01') throw new Error('got: ' + d);
  });

  check('isoNow returns today', function () {
    var n = isoNow();
    if (n.substring(0, 4) !== '2026' && n.substring(0, 4) !== String(new Date().getFullYear()))
      throw new Error('got: ' + n);
  });

  check('toBool truthy/falsy', function () {
    if (toBool('yes') !== true)  throw new Error('yes failed');
    if (toBool('false') !== false) throw new Error('false failed');
  });

  check('jsonOk wraps data', function () {
    var r = jsonOk({ foo: 1 });
    if (!r.ok || r.foo !== 1) throw new Error(JSON.stringify(r));
  });

  check('jsonErr wraps message', function () {
    var r = jsonErr('test error');
    if (r.ok !== false || r.error !== 'test error') throw new Error(JSON.stringify(r));
  });

  // ── 3. Hash Module ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  check('hashPasscode is defined', function () {
    if (typeof hashPasscode !== 'function') throw new Error('missing');
  });

  check('verifyPasscode is defined', function () {
    if (typeof verifyPasscode !== 'function') throw new Error('missing');
  });

  check('createSecurePassword is defined', function () {
    if (typeof createSecurePassword !== 'function') throw new Error('missing');
  });

  // ── 4. Auth Module ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  check('expansionDoGet is defined', function () {
    if (typeof expansionDoGet !== 'function') throw new Error('missing');
  });

  check('expansionDoPost is defined', function () {
    if (typeof expansionDoPost !== 'function') throw new Error('missing');
  });

  // ── 5. Module Functions Exist (spot-check each .gs section) ────────────
  var modules = {
    'Auth':           'expansionDoGet',
    'Hash':           'hashPasscode',
    'Database':       'blankRow',
    'Setup':          'seedFirstAdmin',
    'Utilities':      'allRows',
    'Cards':          'handleMemberCardsPublic',
    'Care':           'handleCalendarIcsFeed_',
    'Communications': 'commsMessageRowToObject',
    'Compassion':     'compassionReqRowToObject',
    'Discipleship':   'pathRowToObject',
    'Learning':       'learningTopicRowToObject',
    'Ministries':     'handleMinistriesList',
    'Missions':       'missionsRegistryRowToObject',
    'Outreach':       'resolveOutreachContactRow_',
    'Sermons':        'handleSermonsGet',
    'Services':       'planRowToObject',
    'Songs':          'handleSongsGet',
    'Statistics':     'handleStatisticsDashboard',
    'Theology':       'handleTheologyFull',
    'Todo':           'handleTodoList'
  };

  for (var mod in modules) {
    (function (name, fnName) {
      check(name + ' module (' + fnName + ')', function () {
        if (typeof this[fnName] !== 'function') throw new Error(fnName + ' missing');
      });
    })(mod, modules[mod]);
  }

  // ── Summary ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  Logger.log('═══ Results: ' + pass + ' passed, ' + fail + ' failed ═══');
  if (fail > 0) Logger.log('⚠️  Fix failures before publishing a new deployment!');
}




// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// APP CONTENT TAB READER — Public (no auth required)
// Reads any tab by name and returns rows as JSON objects.
// Replaces Matthew's standalone doGet() — now routed via action=app.tab
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleAppTab_(params) {
  var tabName = String(params.tab || '').trim();
  if (!tabName) return jsonErr('Missing "tab" parameter.');

  try {
    var ss    = db();
    var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(tabName);
    if (!sheet) return jsonErr('Tab not found: ' + tabName);

    var data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    if (data.length < 2) return jsonOk({ tab: tabName, count: 0, rows: [] });

    var tz = ss.getSpreadsheetTimeZone();
    var headers = data[0];
    var rows = [];
    for (var i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
      var obj = {};
      for (var j = 0; j < headers.length; j++) {
        var val = data[i][j];
        if (val instanceof Date) {
          val = Utilities.formatDate(val, tz, 'yyyy-MM-dd');
        }
        obj[headers[j]] = val;
      }
      rows.push(obj);
    }
    return jsonOk({ tab: tabName, count: rows.length, rows: rows });
  } catch (err) {
    return jsonErr('Error reading tab: ' + (err.message || String(err)));
  }
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// APP WRITE — Pastor/Admin CRUD for Matthew public-content tabs
// Actions:  app.[tab].create  |  app.[tab].update  |  app.[tab].delete
// Tabs:     books, genealogy, counseling, devotionals, reading,
//           words, heart, mirror, quiz, apologetics
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

var APP_TAB_MAP_ = {
  books:       { tab: 'Books',       idField: 'Book Name'      },
  genealogy:   { tab: 'Genealogy',   idField: 'Name'           },
  counseling:  { tab: 'Counseling',  idField: 'Title'          },
  devotionals: { tab: 'Devotionals', idField: 'Date'           },
  reading:     { tab: 'Reading',     idField: '_rowIndex'      },
  words:       { tab: 'Words',       idField: 'Original'       },
  heart:       { tab: 'Heart',       idField: 'Question ID'    },
  mirror:      { tab: 'Mirror',      idField: 'Category Title' },
  quiz:        { tab: 'Quiz',        idField: 'Question'       },
  apologetics: { tab: 'Apologetics', idField: 'Short Title'    },
};

function handleAppWrite_(action, params, auth) {
  requireRole(auth, 'pastor');  // pastor (level 4) or admin (level 5) only

  // Parse:  app.books.create  →  tabKey='books', verb='create'
  var parts   = action.split('.');         // ['app', 'books', 'create']
  var tabKey  = parts[1];
  var verb    = parts[2];
  var tabMeta = APP_TAB_MAP_[tabKey];
  if (!tabMeta) return jsonErr('Unknown app tab: ' + tabKey);

  var ss    = db();
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(tabMeta.tab);
  if (!sheet) return jsonErr('Sheet tab not found: ' + tabMeta.tab);

  var data    = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
  var headers = data.length > 0 ? data[0] : [];

  // ── CREATE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (verb === 'create') {
    var newRow = headers.map(function(h) { return params[h] !== undefined ? params[h] : ''; });
    sheet.appendRow(newRow);
    writeAudit(auth, action, tabMeta.tab, params[tabMeta.idField] || 'new', 'Created row');
    return jsonOk({ created: true });
  }

  // ── UPDATE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (verb === 'update') {
    // Reading plan: use 1-based row index directly (rows have no natural unique key)
    if (tabMeta.idField === '_rowIndex') {
      var rowIdx = parseInt(params['_rowIndex'] || params['_origId'], 10);
      if (isNaN(rowIdx) || rowIdx < 1) return jsonErr('Invalid row index.');
      var sheetRow = rowIdx + 1; // +1 for header row
      headers.forEach(function(h, c) {
        if (h && params[h] !== undefined) sheet.getRange(sheetRow, c + 1).setValue(params[h]);
      });
      writeAudit(auth, action, tabMeta.tab, rowIdx, 'Updated row');
      return jsonOk({ updated: true });
    }

    // All other tabs: find by idField value
    // _origId allows the original value to be passed separately so renaming works
    var origId = String(params['_origId'] || params[tabMeta.idField] || '').trim();
    if (!origId) return jsonErr('Missing id field: ' + tabMeta.idField);
    var idCol  = headers.indexOf(tabMeta.idField);
    if (idCol < 0) return jsonErr('ID column not found: ' + tabMeta.idField);
    var found  = false;
    for (var r = 1; r < data.length; r++) {
      if (String(data[r][idCol]).trim() === origId) {
        headers.forEach(function(h, c) {
          if (h && params[h] !== undefined) sheet.getRange(r + 1, c + 1).setValue(params[h]);
        });
        found = true;
        writeAudit(auth, action, tabMeta.tab, origId, 'Updated row');
        break;
      }
    }
    if (!found) return jsonErr('Row not found: ' + origId);
    return jsonOk({ updated: true });
  }

  // ── DELETE ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (verb === 'delete') {
    if (tabMeta.idField === '_rowIndex') {
      var delIdx = parseInt(params['_rowIndex'], 10);
      if (isNaN(delIdx) || delIdx < 1) return jsonErr('Invalid row index.');
      sheet.deleteRow(delIdx + 1);
      writeAudit(auth, action, tabMeta.tab, delIdx, 'Deleted row');
      return jsonOk({ deleted: true });
    }

    var delId  = String(params[tabMeta.idField] || '').trim();
    if (!delId) return jsonErr('Missing id for delete.');
    var didCol = headers.indexOf(tabMeta.idField);
    if (didCol < 0) return jsonErr('ID column not found: ' + tabMeta.idField);
    var deleted = false;
    // Iterate bottom-up so row indices stay valid after deleteRow
    for (var dr = data.length - 1; dr >= 1; dr--) {
      if (String(data[dr][didCol]).trim() === delId) {
        sheet.deleteRow(dr + 1);
        deleted = true;
        writeAudit(auth, action, tabMeta.tab, delId, 'Deleted row');
        break;
      }
    }
    if (!deleted) return jsonErr('Row not found: ' + delId);
    return jsonOk({ deleted: true });
  }

  return jsonErr('Unknown verb: ' + verb);
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// APP API SETUP — Public Content (Books, Devotionals, Lexicon, Theology, Quiz)
// Run  setupAppApi()  once from the Script Editor to build all tabs.
//
// Creates:
//   • 12 public-content tabs — no authentication, read-only
//
// Total: 12 tabs
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function setupAppApi() {
  var ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID')
  );


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 1. BOOKS — 66 Books of the Bible (7 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Books', [
    'Book Name',              // A  — e.g. "Genesis"
    'Testament',              // B  — Old / New
    'Genre',                  // C  — Historical / Law / Poetry / Prophetic / Gospel / Epistle / Apocalyptic
    'Summary',                // D
    'Core Theology',          // E
    'Practical Application',  // F
    'ID / Book Number'        // G
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'Books', {
    'B': ['Old', 'New'],
    'C': ['Historical', 'Law', 'Poetry', 'Prophetic', 'Gospel', 'Epistle', 'Apocalyptic']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 2. GENEALOGY — Biblical Characters (8 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Genealogy', [
    'Name',                   // A  — Character name
    'Title',                  // B  — Role (e.g. "King of Israel")
    'Lifespan',               // C  — Years / dates
    'Meaning',                // D  — Etymology of name
    'Reference',              // E  — Scripture passage
    'Bio',                    // F  — Life summary
    'Children',               // G  — Comma-separated
    'ID'                      // H
  ]);


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 3. COUNSELING — Wisdom Protocols (7 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Counseling', [
    'Title',                  // A  — Protocol name (e.g. "Grief Support")
    'Icon',                   // B  — Emoji or icon code
    'Color',                  // C  — Hex color
    'Definition',             // D  — What the protocol addresses
    'Scriptures',             // E  — Bible passages
    'Steps',                  // F  — Tactical guidance
    'ID'                      // G
  ]);


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 4. DEVOTIONALS — Daily Devotions (7 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Devotionals', [
    'Date',                   // A  — Calendar date
    'Title',                  // B  — Devotional name
    'Theme',                  // C  — Daily focus
    'Scripture',              // D  — Bible passage for the day
    'Reflection',             // E  — Meditative content
    'Question',               // F  — Reflection prompt
    'Prayer'                  // G  — Closing prayer
  ]);


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 5. READING — Daily Reading Plan (4 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Reading', [
    'Old Testament',          // A  — OT reading passage
    'New Testament',          // B  — NT reading passage
    'Psalms',                 // C  — Psalm reading
    'Proverbs'                // D  — Proverbs reading
  ]);


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 6. WORDS — Biblical Lexicon (10 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Words', [
    'English',                // A  — English term
    "Strong's",               // B  — Strong's Concordance ID
    'Original',               // C  — Hebrew/Greek root
    'Transliteration',        // D
    'Definition',             // E
    'Nuance',                 // F  — Contextual significance
    'Testament',              // G  — Old / New
    'Theme',                  // H  — Theological category
    'Usage Count',            // I
    'Verses'                  // J  — Key passage references
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'Words', {
    'G': ['Old', 'New']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 7. HEART — Diagnostic Questions (6 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Heart', [
    'Question ID',            // A
    'Category',               // B  — Spiritual dimension (e.g. "Prayer Life")
    'Chart Axis',             // C  — Label for diagnostic radar chart
    'Question',               // D  — Diagnostic question text
    'Prescription',           // E  — Faith response / action
    'Verse Reference'         // F  — Supporting Scripture
  ]);


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 8. MIRROR — Triage Diagnostic (9 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Mirror', [
    'Category ID',            // A
    'Category Title',         // B
    'Color',                  // C  — Hex color code
    'Chart Label',            // D  — Radar chart axis label
    'Question ID',            // E
    'Question',               // F  — Triage question
    'Prescription',           // G  — Recommended action
    'Scripture',              // H  — Bible verse
    'Slug'                    // I  — URL-safe identifier
  ]);


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 9. THEOLOGY — Theology Data (6 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Theology', [
    'Category ID',            // A
    'Category Title',         // B
    'Category Intro',         // C  — Overview paragraph
    'Section ID',             // D
    'Section Title',          // E
    'Content'                 // F  — Full theological explanation
  ]);


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 10. CONFIG — App Config Key-Value (2 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Config', [
    'Key',                    // A
    'Value'                   // B
  ]);


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 11. QUIZ — Bible Quiz Questions (10 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Quiz', [
    'ID',                     // A
    'Question',               // B  — Quiz question text
    'Option A',               // C
    'Option B',               // D
    'Option C',               // E
    'Option D',               // F
    'Correct Answer',         // G  — a / b / c / d
    'Reference',              // H  — Scripture or source
    'Category',               // I  — Subject area
    'Difficulty'              // J  — Easy / Medium / Hard
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'Quiz', {
    'G': ['a', 'b', 'c', 'd'],
    'J': ['Easy', 'Medium', 'Hard']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 12. APOLOGETICS — Apologetics Q&A (11 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'Apologetics', [
    'Category ID',            // A
    'Category Title',         // B
    'Category Color',         // C  — Hex color
    'Category Intro',         // D
    'Question ID',            // E
    'Question Title',         // F
    'Short Title',            // G
    'Answer Content',         // H  — Biblical answer paragraph
    'Quote Text',             // I  — Key biblical quote
    'Reference Text',         // J  — Citation
    'Reference URL'           // K  — Link to source
  ]);


  SpreadsheetApp.flush();
  Logger.log('✅ APP API setup complete — 12 tabs created.');
  Logger.log('   Books (7), Genealogy (8), Counseling (7), Devotionals (7),');
  Logger.log('   Reading (4), Words (10), Heart (6), Mirror (9),');
  Logger.log('   Theology (6), Config (2), Quiz (10), Apologetics (11)');
  Logger.log('   Total: ~82 columns across 12 tabs.');
}




// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MISSIONS ROUTER (Mark) — Dispatches missions.* actions
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function routeMissions_(action, params, auth) {

  // ── Registry (Table of Contents) ───────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.registry.list')           return handleMissionsRegistryList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.registry.get')            return handleMissionsRegistryGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.registry.create')         return handleMissionsRegistryCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.registry.update')         return handleMissionsRegistryUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.registry.delete')         return handleMissionsRegistryDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.registry.1040')           return handleMissionsRegistry1040(params, auth);

  // ── Regions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.regions.list')            return handleMissionsRegionsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.regions.get')             return handleMissionsRegionsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.regions.create')          return handleMissionsRegionsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.regions.update')          return handleMissionsRegionsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.regions.delete')          return handleMissionsRegionsDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.regions.forCountry')      return handleMissionsRegionsForCountry(params, auth);

  // ── Cities ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.cities.list')             return handleMissionsCitiesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.cities.get')              return handleMissionsCitiesGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.cities.create')           return handleMissionsCitiesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.cities.update')           return handleMissionsCitiesUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.cities.delete')           return handleMissionsCitiesDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.cities.forCountry')       return handleMissionsCitiesForCountry(params, auth);

  // ── Partners ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.partners.list')           return handleMissionsPartnersList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.partners.get')            return handleMissionsPartnersGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.partners.create')         return handleMissionsPartnersCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.partners.update')         return handleMissionsPartnersUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.partners.delete')         return handleMissionsPartnersDelete(params, auth);

  // ── Prayer Focus ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.prayerFocus.list')        return handleMissionsPrayerFocusList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.prayerFocus.create')      return handleMissionsPrayerFocusCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.prayerFocus.update')      return handleMissionsPrayerFocusUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.prayerFocus.respond')     return handleMissionsPrayerFocusRespond(params, auth);

  // ── Updates ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.updates.list')            return handleMissionsUpdatesList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.updates.get')             return handleMissionsUpdatesGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.updates.create')          return handleMissionsUpdatesCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.updates.publish')         return handleMissionsUpdatesPublish(params, auth);

  // ── Teams ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.teams.list')              return handleMissionsTeamsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.teams.get')               return handleMissionsTeamsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.teams.create')            return handleMissionsTeamsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.teams.update')            return handleMissionsTeamsUpdate(params, auth);

  // ── Metrics ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.metrics.list')            return handleMissionsMetricsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.metrics.create')          return handleMissionsMetricsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.metrics.update')          return handleMissionsMetricsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'missions.metrics.compare')         return handleMissionsMetricsCompare(params, auth);

  // ── Dashboard ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.dashboard')               return handleMissionsDashboard(params, auth);

  // ── Country Dossier (fetch raw tab by country name) ────────────────────
  if (action === 'missions.country') {
    var country = String(params.country || '').trim();
    if (!country) return jsonErr('Missing country parameter.');
    return handleTabReadInternal_(country);
  }

  return jsonErr('Unknown action: ' + action);
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TAB READER — Generic tab data reader (?tab=<TabName>)
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function handleTabRead_(params) {
  var tabName = String(params.tab || '').trim();
  if (!tabName) return asJson(jsonErr('Missing "tab" parameter.'));
  return asJson(handleTabReadInternal_(tabName));
}

function handleTabReadInternal_(tabName) {
  try {
    var ss    = db();
    var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(tabName);
    if (!sheet) return jsonErr('Tab not found: ' + tabName);

    var data = sheet.getDataRange().getValues();
    if (data.length < 2) return jsonOk({ rows: [] });

    var headers = data[0];
    var rows = [];
    for (var i = 1; i < data.length; i++) {
      var obj = {};
      for (var j = 0; j < headers.length; j++) {
        obj[headers[j]] = data[i][j];
      }
      rows.push(obj);
    }
    return jsonOk({ tab: tabName, count: rows.length, rows: rows });
  } catch (err) {
    return jsonErr('Error reading tab: ' + (err.message || String(err)));
  }
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MISSIONS SETUP (Mark/Gospel.gs) — Creates 8 tabs
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function setupMissionsApi() {
  var ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID')
  );


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 1. MISSIONS REGISTRY — Master Country Index (28 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'MissionsRegistry', [
    'ID',                     // A
    'Country Name',           // B
    'ISO Code',               // C
    'Icon',                   // D
    'Tab Name',               // E  — Exact worksheet tab name for this country
    '10/40 Window',           // F  — TRUE / FALSE
    'Continent',              // G
    'Population',             // H
    'Capital',                // I
    'Official Language',      // J
    'Dominant Religion',      // K
    'Persecution Rank',       // L
    'Persecution Score',      // M
    'Persecution Level',      // N  — Extreme / Very High / High / Moderate
    'Gospel Access',          // O  — Unreached / Limited / Restricted / Open
    'Unreached People Groups', // P
    'Total People Groups',    // Q
    '% Evangelical',          // R
    '% Christian',            // S
    'Freedom Index',          // T
    'Region Count',           // U
    'City Count',             // V
    'Partner Count',          // W
    'Last Update At',         // X
    'Status',                 // Y  — Active / Monitoring / Archived
    'Sort Order',             // Z
    'Created At',             // AA
    'Updated At'              // AB
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'MissionsRegistry', {
    'N': ['Extreme', 'Very High', 'High', 'Moderate'],
    'O': ['Unreached', 'Limited', 'Restricted', 'Open'],
    'Y': ['Active', 'Monitoring', 'Archived']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 2. MISSIONS REGIONS — Country-Level Regions (24 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'MissionsRegions', [
    'ID',                     // A
    'Country ID',             // B  — FK to MissionsRegistry.ID
    'Region Name',            // C
    'Region Type',            // D  — State / Province / Territory / District
    'Population',             // E
    'Coordinates',            // F
    'Color Hex',              // G
    'Dominant Religion',      // H
    '% Christian',            // I
    'Literacy Rate',          // J
    'Persecution Level',      // K  — Extreme / Very High / High / Moderate / Low
    'Gospel Access',          // L
    'Unreached Groups',       // M
    'Security Threat',        // N  — Critical / High / Moderate / Low
    'Humanitarian Need',      // O  — Critical / High / Moderate / Low
    'Media Restriction',      // P  — Total / Severe / Moderate / Minimal
    'Church Presence',        // Q  — None / Underground / Scattered / Growing / Established
    'Missionary Access',      // R  — Closed / Restricted / Limited / Open
    'Primary Hurdle',         // S
    'Notes',                  // T
    'Status',                 // U
    'Sort Order',             // V
    'Created At',             // W
    'Updated At'              // X
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'MissionsRegions', {
    'D': ['State', 'Province', 'Territory', 'District'],
    'K': ['Extreme', 'Very High', 'High', 'Moderate', 'Low'],
    'N': ['Critical', 'High', 'Moderate', 'Low'],
    'O': ['Critical', 'High', 'Moderate', 'Low'],
    'P': ['Total', 'Severe', 'Moderate', 'Minimal'],
    'Q': ['None', 'Underground', 'Scattered', 'Growing', 'Established'],
    'R': ['Closed', 'Restricted', 'Limited', 'Open']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 3. MISSIONS CITIES — City/Region-Level Data (30 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'MissionsCities', [
    'ID',                     // A
    'Country ID',             // B  — FK to MissionsRegistry.ID
    'Region ID',              // C  — FK to MissionsRegions.ID
    'City Name',              // D
    'City Type',              // E  — Capital / Major City / City / Town / Village
    'Population',             // F
    'Coordinates',            // G
    'Color Hex',              // H
    'Literacy Rate',          // I
    'Dominant Religion',      // J
    '% Christian',            // K
    'Persecution Level',      // L
    'Violence Level',         // M  — Extreme / High / Moderate / Low
    'Church Life',            // N
    'National Life',          // O
    'Social Life',            // P
    'Private Life',           // Q
    'Family Life',            // R
    'Gospel Access',          // S
    'Media Restriction',      // T
    'Security Threat',        // U
    'Humanitarian Need',      // V
    'Missionary Access',      // W
    'Church Presence',        // X
    'Primary Hurdle',         // Y
    'Prayer Focus',           // Z
    'Notes',                  // AA
    'Status',                 // AB
    'Created At',             // AC
    'Updated At'              // AD
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'MissionsCities', {
    'E': ['Capital', 'Major City', 'City', 'Town', 'Village'],
    'M': ['Extreme', 'High', 'Moderate', 'Low']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 4. MISSIONS PARTNERS — Organizations & Field Workers (20 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'MissionsPartners', [
    'ID',                     // A
    'Organization Name',      // B
    'Partner Type',           // C  — Sending Agency / Field Team / Translation / Media / Humanitarian / Church Network
    'Country IDs',            // D
    'Contact Name',           // E
    'Contact Email',          // F
    'Contact Phone',          // G
    'Website',                // H
    'Focus Area',             // I
    'Description',            // J
    'Workers Count',          // K
    'Relationship Status',    // L  — Active / Exploring / Paused / Ended
    'Financial Support',      // M  — TRUE / FALSE
    'Prayer Support',         // N  — TRUE / FALSE
    'Last Contact At',        // O
    'Security Level',         // P  — Open / Sensitive / Restricted / Classified
    'Notes',                  // Q
    'Status',                 // R
    'Created At',             // S
    'Updated At'              // T
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'MissionsPartners', {
    'C': ['Sending Agency', 'Field Team', 'Translation', 'Media', 'Humanitarian', 'Church Network'],
    'L': ['Active', 'Exploring', 'Paused', 'Ended'],
    'P': ['Open', 'Sensitive', 'Restricted', 'Classified']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 5. MISSIONS PRAYER FOCUS — Rotating Prayer Targets (16 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'MissionsPrayerFocus', [
    'ID',                     // A
    'Country ID',             // B  — FK to MissionsRegistry.ID
    'City ID',                // C  — FK to MissionsCities.ID
    'Title',                  // D
    'Description',            // E
    'Scripture',              // F
    'Start Date',             // G
    'End Date',               // H
    'Priority',               // I  — Urgent / High / Normal
    'People Group',           // J
    'Prayer Points',          // K
    'Responses Count',        // L
    'Created By',             // M
    'Status',                 // N  — Active / Completed / Upcoming
    'Created At',             // O
    'Updated At'              // P
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'MissionsPrayerFocus', {
    'I': ['Urgent', 'High', 'Normal'],
    'N': ['Active', 'Completed', 'Upcoming']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 6. MISSIONS UPDATES — Field Intelligence & Situation Reports (16 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'MissionsUpdates', [
    'ID',                     // A
    'Country ID',             // B  — FK to MissionsRegistry.ID
    'City ID',                // C  — FK to MissionsCities.ID
    'Title',                  // D
    'Body',                   // E
    'Update Type',            // F  — Situation Report / Prayer Alert / Victory Report / Analysis / Breaking
    'Severity',               // G  — Critical / High / Moderate / Informational
    'Source',                 // H
    'Verified',               // I  — TRUE / FALSE
    'Security Level',         // J  — Open / Sensitive / Restricted
    'Published',              // K  — TRUE / FALSE
    'Published By',           // L
    'Attachment URL',         // M
    'Notes',                  // N
    'Created At',             // O
    'Updated At'              // P
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'MissionsUpdates', {
    'F': ['Situation Report', 'Prayer Alert', 'Victory Report', 'Analysis', 'Breaking'],
    'G': ['Critical', 'High', 'Moderate', 'Informational'],
    'J': ['Open', 'Sensitive', 'Restricted']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 7. MISSIONS TEAMS — Mission Teams & Trip Planning (20 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'MissionsTeams', [
    'ID',                     // A
    'Team Name',              // B
    'Country ID',             // C  — FK to MissionsRegistry.ID
    'Team Lead ID',           // D  — FK to Members.ID (FLOCK CRM)
    'Team Lead Name',         // E
    'Member IDs',             // F
    'Member Names',           // G
    'Member Count',           // H
    'Trip Type',              // I  — Short-Term / Long-Term / Survey / Prayer Journey / Humanitarian / Training
    'Start Date',             // J
    'End Date',               // K
    'Budget',                 // L
    'Raised',                 // M
    'Objectives',             // N
    'Partner ID',             // O  — FK to MissionsPartners.ID
    'Trip Status',            // P  — Planning / Fundraising / Ready / On Field / Completed / Debriefing / Cancelled
    'Debrief Notes',          // Q
    'Notes',                  // R
    'Created At',             // S
    'Updated At'              // T
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'MissionsTeams', {
    'I': ['Short-Term', 'Long-Term', 'Survey', 'Prayer Journey', 'Humanitarian', 'Training'],
    'P': ['Planning', 'Fundraising', 'Ready', 'On Field', 'Completed', 'Debriefing', 'Cancelled']
  });


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // 8. MISSIONS METRICS — Per-Country Aggregated Metrics (20 columns)
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  ensureTab(ss, 'MissionsMetrics', [
    'ID',                     // A
    'Country ID',             // B  — FK to MissionsRegistry.ID
    'Year',                   // C
    'Persecution Rank',       // D
    'Persecution Score',      // E
    'Violence Score',         // F
    'Pressure Score',         // G
    'Church Life Score',      // H
    'National Life Score',    // I
    'Social Life Score',      // J
    'Private Life Score',     // K
    'Family Life Score',      // L
    'Population',             // M
    '% Christian',            // N
    '% Evangelical',          // O
    'Unreached Groups',       // P
    'Source',                 // Q
    'Notes',                  // R
    'Created At',             // S
    'Updated At'              // T
  ]);


  SpreadsheetApp.flush();
  Logger.log('✅ MISSIONS API setup complete — 8 tabs created.');
  Logger.log('   MissionsRegistry (28), MissionsRegions (24),');
  Logger.log('   MissionsCities (30), MissionsPartners (20), MissionsPrayerFocus (16),');
  Logger.log('   MissionsUpdates (16), MissionsTeams (20), MissionsMetrics (20)');
  Logger.log('   Total: ~174 columns across 8 tabs.');
}


// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// STATISTICS ROUTER (Luke) — Dispatches statistics.* actions
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function routeStatistics_(action, params, auth) {

  // ── Config ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'statistics.config.list')            return handleStatisticsConfigList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.config.get')             return handleStatisticsConfigGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.config.create')          return handleStatisticsConfigCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.config.update')          return handleStatisticsConfigUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.config.delete')          return handleStatisticsConfigDelete(params, auth);

  // ── Snapshots ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.list')         return handleStatisticsSnapshotsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.get')          return handleStatisticsSnapshotsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.create')       return handleStatisticsSnapshotsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.delete')       return handleStatisticsSnapshotsDelete(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.snapshots.latest')       return handleStatisticsSnapshotsLatest(params, auth);

  // ── Compute Engine ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'statistics.compute')                return handleStatisticsCompute(params, auth);

  // ── Custom Views ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'statistics.views.list')             return handleStatisticsViewsList(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.views.get')              return handleStatisticsViewsGet(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.views.create')           return handleStatisticsViewsCreate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.views.update')           return handleStatisticsViewsUpdate(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.views.delete')           return handleStatisticsViewsDelete(params, auth);

  // ── Dashboard, Trends & Export ─────────────────────────────────────────
  if (action === 'statistics.dashboard')              return handleStatisticsDashboard(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.trends')                 return handleStatisticsTrends(params, auth);
  if (action === 'statistics.export')                 return handleStatisticsExport(params, auth);

  return jsonErr('Unknown action: ' + action);
}


// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
//  Extra.gs
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EXTRA API SETUP (Luke) — Statistics & Analytics
// Run  setupExtraApi()  once from the Script Editor to build all tabs.
//
// Creates:
//   • 3 Statistics tabs (StatisticsConfig, StatisticsSnapshots, StatisticsCustomViews)
//
// Total: 3 tabs
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function setupExtraApi() {
  var ss = SpreadsheetApp.openById(
    PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID')
  );


  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
  // STATISTICS — Customizable Analytics & Metrics Framework
  // ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

  // ── Statistics Config (metric definitions — what h1–h50 mean) ──────────────
  ensureTab(ss, 'StatisticsConfig', [
    'ID',               // A  — unique row ID
    'Slot',             // B  — h1 through h50
    'Label',            // C  — human-readable metric name
    'Description',      // D
    'Category',         // E  — Attendance / Giving / Growth / Engagement / Spiritual / Custom
    'Source Tab',       // F  — which sheet tab to pull data from
    'Source Column',    // G  — column index (0-based) or header name
    'Calc Type',        // H  — count / sum / avg / min / max / countDistinct / latest / custom
    'Filter Field',     // I  — optional column to filter by
    'Filter Value',     // J  — value to match in filter field
    'Date Field',       // K  — column holding dates for time-scoped calcs
    'Format Type',      // L  — number / percent / currency / text / date
    'Unit Label',       // M  — display unit ("$", "%", "members", etc.)
    'Display Order',    // N  — sort order for dashboard
    'Widget Type',      // O  — number / bar / line / pie / gauge / table
    'Active',           // P  — TRUE/FALSE
    'Created At',       // Q
    'Updated At'        // R
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'StatisticsConfig', {
    'E': ['Attendance', 'Giving', 'Growth', 'Engagement', 'Spiritual', 'Outreach', 'Discipleship', 'Missions', 'Custom'],
    'H': ['count', 'sum', 'avg', 'min', 'max', 'countDistinct', 'latest', 'custom'],
    'L': ['number', 'percent', 'currency', 'text', 'date'],
    'O': ['number', 'bar', 'line', 'pie', 'gauge', 'table'],
    'P': ['TRUE', 'FALSE']
  });

  // ── Statistics Snapshots (computed data rows — ID + metadata + h1–h50) ─────
  ensureTab(ss, 'StatisticsSnapshots', [
    'ID',               // A  — unique row ID
    'Snapshot Date',    // B  — when this snapshot was taken
    'Period Type',      // C  — daily / weekly / monthly / quarterly / yearly / custom
    'Period Label',     // D  — e.g. "March 2026", "Q1 2026", "Week 12"
    'h1',  'h2',  'h3',  'h4',  'h5',  'h6',  'h7',  'h8',  'h9',  'h10',  // E–N
    'h11', 'h12', 'h13', 'h14', 'h15', 'h16', 'h17', 'h18', 'h19', 'h20',  // O–X
    'h21', 'h22', 'h23', 'h24', 'h25', 'h26', 'h27', 'h28', 'h29', 'h30',  // Y–AH
    'h31', 'h32', 'h33', 'h34', 'h35', 'h36', 'h37', 'h38', 'h39', 'h40',  // AI–AR
    'h41', 'h42', 'h43', 'h44', 'h45', 'h46', 'h47', 'h48', 'h49', 'h50',  // AS–BB
    'Notes',            // BC
    'Created By',       // BD
    'Created At',       // BE
    'Status'            // BF — Active / Archived
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'StatisticsSnapshots', {
    'C': ['daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'yearly', 'custom'],
    'BF': ['Active', 'Archived']
  });

  // ── Statistics Custom Views (saved dashboard layouts) ──────────────────────
  ensureTab(ss, 'StatisticsCustomViews', [
    'ID',               // A  — unique row ID
    'View Name',        // B  — saved view name
    'Description',      // C
    'Layout Type',      // D  — grid / list / dashboard / report
    'Slots Included',   // E  — comma-separated: "h1,h5,h12"
    'Chart Type',       // F  — bar / line / pie / mixed / none
    'Period Type',      // G  — which snapshot period to display
    'Date Range',       // H  — last30 / last90 / lastYear / allTime / custom
    'Role Required',    // I  — minimum role level to see this view
    'Is Default',       // J  — TRUE / FALSE
    'Sort By',          // K  — displayOrder / label / value
    'Created By',       // L
    'Created At',       // M
    'Updated At'        // N
  ]);

  addDropdowns(ss, 'StatisticsCustomViews', {
    'D': ['grid', 'list', 'dashboard', 'report'],
    'F': ['bar', 'line', 'pie', 'mixed', 'none'],
    'G': ['daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'quarterly', 'yearly', 'custom'],
    'H': ['last30', 'last90', 'lastYear', 'allTime', 'custom'],
    'J': ['TRUE', 'FALSE'],
    'K': ['displayOrder', 'label', 'value']
  });


  SpreadsheetApp.flush();
  Logger.log('✅ EXTRA API setup complete — 3 Statistics tabs created (StatisticsConfig, StatisticsSnapshots, StatisticsCustomViews).');
}


// ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// UNIFIED SMOKE TESTS — Covers John + Matthew + Mark + Luke
// Run from GAS editor to verify nothing broke. READ-ONLY.
// ═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

function runAllSmokeTests() {
  var pass = 0, fail = 0;
  function check(label, fn) {
    try { fn(); Logger.log('✅ ' + label); pass++; }
    catch (e) { Logger.log('❌ ' + label + ' — ' + e.message); fail++; }
  }
  Logger.log('═══ Unified Smoke Tests (John + Matthew + Mark + Luke) ═══');

  check('Health check', function () {
    var out = doGet({ parameter: { action: 'health' } });
    var body = JSON.parse(out.getContent());
    if (!body.ok) throw new Error('ok was ' + body.ok);
  });
  check('Auth missing token returns error', function () {
    var out = doGet({ parameter: { action: 'users.list' } });
    var body = JSON.parse(out.getContent());
    if (body.ok !== false) throw new Error('Expected ok:false');
  });
  check('app.tab missing tab returns error', function () {
    var out = doGet({ parameter: { action: 'app.tab' } });
    var body = JSON.parse(out.getContent());
    if (body.ok !== false) throw new Error('Expected ok:false');
  });
  check('SHEET_ID property exists', function () {
    var id = PropertiesService.getScriptProperties().getProperty('SHEET_ID');
    if (!id) throw new Error('SHEET_ID is not set');
  });
  check('normalizeEmail', function () {
    if (normalizeEmail('  FOO@bar.COM  ') !== 'foo@bar.com') throw new Error('fail');
  });
  check('generateId returns string', function () {
    var id = generateId();
    if (typeof id !== 'string' || id.length < 10) throw new Error('bad id');
  });
  check('isoDate', function () {
    if (isoDate(new Date(2026,0,1)).substring(0,10) !== '2026-01-01') throw new Error('fail');
  });
  check('toBool', function () {
    if (toBool('yes') !== true || toBool('false') !== false) throw new Error('fail');
  });
  check('setupFlockOS defined', function () { if (typeof setupFlockOS !== 'function') throw new Error('missing'); });
  check('setupAppApi defined', function () { if (typeof setupAppApi !== 'function') throw new Error('missing'); });
  check('setupMissionsApi defined', function () { if (typeof setupMissionsApi !== 'function') throw new Error('missing'); });
  check('setupExtraApi defined', function () { if (typeof setupExtraApi !== 'function') throw new Error('missing'); });
  check('routeMissions_ defined', function () { if (typeof routeMissions_ !== 'function') throw new Error('missing'); });
  check('routeStatistics_ defined', function () { if (typeof routeStatistics_ !== 'function') throw new Error('missing'); });
  check('handleAppTab_ defined', function () { if (typeof handleAppTab_ !== 'function') throw new Error('missing'); });
  Logger.log('═══ Results: ' + pass + ' passed, ' + fail + ' failed ═══');
}

// FIRESTORE → SHEETS SYNC HANDLER
// ══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

// ── Firestore Timestamp → readable string ──────────────────────────────
function _ts(val) {
  if (!val) return val;
  if (val._seconds) return new Date(val._seconds * 1000).toISOString();
  if (typeof val === "string" && val.match(/^\d{4}-/)) return val;
  return String(val);
}

// ── Flatten nested objects for Sheet columns ───────────────────────────
function _flattenData(data) {
  if (!data) return {};
  var flat = {};
  for (var key in data) {
    var val = data[key];
    if (val === null || val === undefined) {
      flat[key] = "";
    } else if (val._seconds) {
      flat[key] = _ts(val);
    } else if (Array.isArray(val)) {
      flat[key] = JSON.stringify(val);
    } else if (typeof val === "object") {
      flat[key] = JSON.stringify(val);
    } else {
      flat[key] = val;
    }
  }
  return flat;
}


/**
 * Handle a sync.write request from the Cloud Function.
 * @param {Object} params - URL params (must include syncSecret)
 * @param {Object} body   - Parsed JSON body: { collection, operation, docId, data, parentId? }
 * @returns {Object}      - { ok: true } or { ok: false, error: "..." }
 */
var SYNC_SECRET = "bHoN5BstG8ikCy6ELalSzuopdbGdztTOnfgjKQm8Lms";

function handleSyncWrite(params, body) {
  if (params.syncSecret !== SYNC_SECRET) {
    return { ok: false, error: "Invalid or missing syncSecret" };
  }

  var collection = body.collection;
  var operation  = body.operation;
  var docId      = body.docId;
  var data       = body.data || {};
  var parentId   = body.parentId || "";

  var tabName = SYNC_TAB_MAP[collection];
  if (!tabName) {
    return { ok: true, skipped: true, reason: "unmapped collection: " + collection };
  }

  var ss = SpreadsheetApp.getActiveSpreadsheet();
  var sheet = ss.getSheetByName(tabName);

  if (!sheet) {
    sheet = ss.insertSheet(tabName);
    sheet.getRange(1, 1).setValue("id");
    if (parentId) sheet.getRange(1, 2).setValue("parentId");
  }

  var headers = sheet.getRange(1, 1, 1, sheet.getLastColumn() || 1).getValues()[0]
    .map(function(h) { return String(h).trim(); });

  var idCol = headers.indexOf("id");
  if (idCol === -1) {
    sheet.insertColumnBefore(1);
    sheet.getRange(1, 1).setValue("id");
    headers.unshift("id");
    idCol = 0;
  }

  var lastRow = sheet.getLastRow();
  var existingRow = -1;

  if (lastRow > 1) {
    var idValues = sheet.getRange(2, idCol + 1, lastRow - 1, 1).getValues();
    for (var i = 0; i < idValues.length; i++) {
      if (String(idValues[i][0]).trim() === String(docId).trim()) {
        existingRow = i + 2;
        break;
      }
    }
  }

  if (operation === "delete") {
    if (existingRow > 0) {
      sheet.deleteRow(existingRow);
      return { ok: true, operation: "delete", tab: tabName, row: existingRow };
    }
    return { ok: true, operation: "delete", tab: tabName, skipped: true, reason: "row not found" };
  }

  var flat = _flattenData(data);
  flat["id"] = docId;
  if (parentId) flat["parentId"] = parentId;

  var newHeaders = [];
  for (var key in flat) {
    if (headers.indexOf(key) === -1) {
      newHeaders.push(key);
    }
  }
  if (newHeaders.length > 0) {
    var startCol = headers.length + 1;
    for (var j = 0; j < newHeaders.length; j++) {
      sheet.getRange(1, startCol + j).setValue(newHeaders[j]);
      headers.push(newHeaders[j]);
    }
  }

  var rowValues = headers.map(function(h) {
    return flat.hasOwnProperty(h) ? flat[h] : "";
  });

  if (existingRow > 0) {
    sheet.getRange(existingRow, 1, 1, rowValues.length).setValues([rowValues]);
    return { ok: true, operation: "update", tab: tabName, row: existingRow };
  } else {
    var newRow = lastRow + 1;
    sheet.getRange(newRow, 1, 1, rowValues.length).setValues([rowValues]);
    return { ok: true, operation: "create", tab: tabName, row: newRow };
  }
}
